chapters.title: Chapter 601 - Sea ​​Sacrifice
chapters.body:
Chapter 601 - Sea ​​Sacrifice

Chapter 601: Sea Sacrifice

Chen Rui wore the blue charm shackles and was taken to a dungeon by 2 naga warriors. To his surprise, in addition to the sandmen, water elementals, and some sea tribes, the dungeon actually also had dark elementals. Obviously, they were all the ‘sacrifice’ for tomorrow’s sea sacrifice.

I remember that the Water Elemental King once said that the Dark Elemental King Hegel sent the dark elementals to explore the Black Sea several times, but all of them disappeared and never survived. Therefore, they chose the air route in the end. I didn’t expect they were actually imprisoned by the nagas in the Thunder Snake Island.

Chen Rui didn’t break free from the shackles, but he just thought quietly. If it is just Strena and Adeline, I still have some ideas to handle them, but I can’t do anything when facing Queen Naga Modesty who could even abandon her biological daughter. This is the Thunder Snake Island which is the base camp of nagas that is tightly guarded. There are plenty of powerhouses. Unless I give up this exploration and escape back to the Deep Blue Island, otherwise I can only adapt to the sea sacrifice tomorrow.

The night gradually became deep. There was an indistinct harp sound. Soon afterward, everything became silent. Only the whimpering sea breeze could be heard.

Early morning the next day, all the dungeon captives were taken out to the shore of the Thunder Snake Island.

10 large ships were moored by the sea. Chen Rui and others were escorted to the ship. This time there were a lot of captives. 4 ships were needed to ferry them. Each ship had a strict nagas guard to monitor the captives.

Queen Naga Modesty wore a golden crown on her head and embarked on the largest ship, followed by Adeline with a harp in her arms, and a group of naga warriors. With an order, they set sail.

The sail today was smooth. The ship was very fast. The huge sea snakes that appeared along the way strangely did not attack these ships as if they did not see them.

About 7 or 8 hours later, the nagas’ ship proficiently passed through an area covered with reefs and entered a new sea area. There was a lot of mist on the sea surface. It was almost impossible to see things. With Chen Rui’s eyesight, he could barely see the scenery within 500 meters. For the endless sea, this was already a very low visibility situation.

The 10 ships stopped. Modesty took out a translucent crystal ball with a small golden ship inside. As she threw the ball into the water, the golden sail ship suddenly appeared on the sea.

After a long silence, Modesty’s command sounded, “Return!”

This voice was unprecedentedly hoarse.

On the golden ship, Chen Rui looked at the naga girl who was holding the harp and crying bitterly. He sighed and comforted a few words.

Adeline wiped her tears and glanced at Chen Rui. Even though those dim eyes had no expression at all, Chen Rui felt a sense of being seen through inexplicably.

“Thank you, Sir Captain. But what makes me wonder is why I can’t feel the fear and helplessness of other people in your mind? This may be what you said, even if life is taken away, you will not give up hope?”

Chen Rui was extremely surprised, “Can you feel my heart?”

“Perhaps because my eyes can’t see, so my spirit sensing is slightly better than others. Furthermore, it is only in a special state that I can sense some mental fluctuations, which is useless.”

This is not a “slightly better” or “useless” ability! Chen Rui had a different expression. My current strength is the peak stage of the Demon Emperor on the surface, and my spirit power has reached the S-level of the Demon Overlord level. Even the peak stage of the Demon Overlord powerhouse can’t see through my mood swings. Let alone this kind of spirit sensing!

This naga girl, who has no combat power and was regarded as abandoned by the tribe, actually has such a special talent!

Adeline explained guiltily, “Sir Captain, please forgive me, I didn’t mean to spy on your heart.”

“It’s okay, just call me Aguile.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Ms. Adeline, I want to ask, where is the legendary Hidden Misty Island?”

“Hidden Misty Island is the core of the Hidden Misty Sea. Its location is a mystery in this sea area. However, as far as I know, the Hidden Misty Island is actually mobile in a certain large area. It will appear in a certain location for a fixed period of time. It usually changes once a year. Our current direction is the only way to go to Hidden Misty Island which is said to have many magic items with special effects. When I was a child, my sister had secretly taken me to the sea and wanted to use my spirit sensing ability to find the Hidden Misty Island, but unfortunately, we came back in vain…”

As Adeline said, her eyes suddenly turned red and lowered her head. Chen Rui shook his head, “Ms. Adeline, don’t be sad. Although you don’t have a good mother. You have a good sister. You should feel fortunate.”

“You’re wrong,” Adeline shook her head, “She is a good mother, but this good mother belongs to all nagas. Because of this, so…”

Chen Rui looked at the naga girl who had spirit sensing ability and was considerate in surprise. An urge to protect her suddenly surged in his heart.

Adeline didn’t say much on this topic. She plucked the harp string, “The golden ship is about to enter the Sea God area. We are running out of time. Let me listen to your “Castle in the Sky” again, okay?”

“Of course…” Chen Rui’s mind shifted, “One last question, what exactly is Black Sea God?”

“It is the ruler of the Black Sea who has enslaved the naga tribe for many years. It controls the survival of the phantom coral. It generally lurks in the deep sea and appears every 10 years. At this time, the naga tribe will hold a sea sacrifice and give a large number of creatures with corresponding life levels as sacrifices. Otherwise, even if Sea God does not punish the naga tribe, the naga tribe will face extinction if it just cuts off the vitality of the phantom coral.”

So that’s the case! Chen Rui felt astonished. If it is able to enslave the powerful naga tribe, the strength of this ruler is likely to exceed the level of an ordinary high-level powerhouse and is probably invincible. Just now Adeline said that this direction is the only way to the Hidden Misty Island. It seems that I can only take a risk.

While Chen Rui was thinking, there were already changes in the waters in front. An unusual undulation appeared in the mist, rushing in the direction of the 5 ships with the sacrifices.

Thunder Snake Island.

After the sea sacrifice ended, the 6 ships sailed back to the shore.

Queen Naga Modesty slowly got down from the big ship. During the return journey, the nearby naga elite guards could feel a certain strong emotion suppressed in the queen’s heart. No one dared to say a word.

However, as soon as Modesty went ashore, he saw a 6-armed elite naga reported in a panic, “Bad news! Chief. The magic cage that imprisoned the young tribe chief was broken, and the whereabouts of the young chief is unknown! According to the guard who was knockout, it should have happened in the morning!”

“What?” Modesty was taken aback. She was unable to maintain her usual calmness, and she suddenly let out an extremely furious roar.

At the same time, before the sacrificial ship, those undulating waves were getting closer and closer. A strange shape of sea beast appeared. Its dorsal fin was out of the water while the rest of the body was in the water. Its traveling speed was very fast which was kind of like sharks. There were tens of thousands of them like a dense ocean tide.

These demonic sharks began to attack the sacrifice ships. One of the weakest defensive ships began to flood under the fierce attack and gradually sank. Under the attack of the demonic sharks, the corpse disappeared. The sea water was quickly stained and became the color of blood red.

This scene made the rest of the people panic. Some struggled to control the ship, but the ship still uncontrollably followed the golden main sacrifice ship to sail forward.

The main sacrifice ship was also violently attacked. Adeline hugged the harp tightly, and her body trembled. Chen Rui turned his hand, and the blue charm shackles instantly turned into powder and disappeared, then he quickly released the shackles of the water elementals and the sandmen, but this main sacrifice ship did not have any weapon facilities. Under the influence of the main sacrifice imprint, it kept sailing forward, unable to turn around and escape.

As Chen Rui extended a hand, several huge white light balls blasted out and burst into the water which instantly killed several demonic sharks. The ferocity of these demonic sharks was even above the sea snakes. They quickly devoured the corpses of their companions and began to attack more violently. In the blink of an eye, 2 more ships sunk, and none of the sacrifice creatures on the ship survived.

At this moment, a roar sounded. A figure jumped up high from a ship behind and fell into the group of demon sharks in the sea. They could only see scimitar lights all over. The corpses of the demon sharks surrounding the golden ship were torn away by the scimitars. The road was cleared in the blink of an eye.

This familiar roar made Adeline’s body tremble, and she blurted out, “Sister!”

chapters.title: Chapter 602 - Being Besieged
chapters.body:
Chapter 602 - Being Besieged

Chapter 602: Being Besieged

The figure that came out of the sacrifice ship behind was Strena. Strena swung her snake tail and glided fast on the sea without sinking. The 6 scimitars in her hand waved in a dazzling arc which reaped countless lives of demonic sharks. She opened up a bloody path literally.

When Strena, who was covered in blood, appeared on the golden ship, Adeline had already jumped up emotionally. She ignored the blood stains and hugged her sister tightly.

Immediately afterward, the naga girl recovered her senses and pushed Strena away in panic, “Why is sister here? Go back quickly! Otherwise, it will be too late!”

Strena didn’t say a word. Everyone could see her answer from her stubborn eyes: Since I’m here, I don’t plan to go back.

Although Adeline couldn’t see Strena’s expression, she could feel the determination and perseverance from her spirit. She burst into tears, “Why are you so stupid?!”

Strena shook her head and held the scimitars tighter in her hands.

“It’s really not worth doing this!” Adeline begged, “Sister, go back quickly if you still treat me as your sister. Please!”

“Not worth it?” Strena became emotional and roared, “If it weren’t for my stupidity, you wouldn’t be here today! It’s me who dragged you into this!”

“That time was just an accident. Sister wanted to bring me to find the herbs on the Hidden Misty Island to heal my eyes.” Adeline shook her head desperately.

“No! I want to use your sensing abilities to find the treasures on the Hidden Misty Island to improve my fighting talent… I’m the most selfish bastard!” Strena’s eyes turned red suddenly. She didn’t even shed a tear when she was injured and mocked by Queen Naga, but she couldn’t control it now, “You have always known! Why did you save me at that time?! Why give me your talent?! I owe you my life!”

Chen Rui thought of what Adeline had said earlier that when she was young, her sister took her to look for the Hidden Misty Island. He finally understood why Strena would fight so hard to protect her sister. It turns out that there is such an underlying reason. Although Adeline has eye problems, her original talent should be quite powerful. She can actually bestow her talent to another person.

“As I said, this is all voluntary. I have liked music since I was a child and I can’t see. The talent of [6 Wield] is just a waste on me. Sister has always been very competitive and motivated. You’re the most suitable candidate.” Adeline hugged Strena who could no longer control her emotion, “If you want to give me something back, run away immediately and live with my hope. This is my last request.”

Strena shook her head, “From then on, I vowed to protect you with my life. Anyway, I’m a selfish person, so now I’m going to let you down for the last time.”

“I mean… ladies, stop for a moment.” Chen Rui’s voice came over, “This is not the time to relive the past. Our troubles seem to be getting bigger and bigger.”

At this time, there were more and more demonic sharks around. Some actually could jump into the ship to attack. The corpses of demonic sharks destroyed by Strena were devoured by their companions, making them more bloodlust. Except for the golden main sacrifice ship, the rest of the ship had all sunk. There was endless screaming and shouting.

Chen Rui only managed to rescue a few dark elementals from the ship behind; none of the others survived.

“There is mist everywhere. We can’t find a way out. Even if we can go back, we will definitely be killed by the Royal Highness Modesty or become a sacrifice again. There is only 1 way, that is to find the Hidden Misty Island as soon as possible, then maybe we can survive this disaster! Ms. Adeline! Please do your best to activate your sensing talent!”

Adeline trembled, “But Black Sea God…”

“So many people have died just now. The sea sacrifice should be almost done. If you really want to save your sister, make a decision as soon as possible!”

No one wanted to die, especially when Strena was here. Adeline hesitated for a moment, and she finally showed a resolute expression and nodded.

At this time, the naga on the side exclaimed, “Bad news! The bottom of the ship was broken! The water has entered!”

Strena gritted her teeth, “Adeline, hold me tight, I will take you out.”

In fact, everyone knew that even if Strena could fly, it would not be sustainable without a ship in this vast sea. Furthermore, there were so many ferocious enemies. Once she was exhausted, it would definitely be a dead end.

“Ms. Adeline, do you remember what I told you? Hope will always exist as long as you don’t give up…” As Chen Rui spoke, his body floated and shot out [Aurora Shot] to clear out an area. Strena only noticed that the blue charm shackles in Chen Rui’s hands had disappeared long ago. Even the nagas and Adeline in the main sacrifice ship cannot remove this kind of shackles. I didn’t expect that this guy whom I easily captured would have this special ability.

There were more surprising things later. When Chen Rui waved his hand, a magnificent black ship appeared in front of everyone.

“Welcome to my Devil’s Snare Ship. Please hurry up, we have to leave this damn place before more monsters appear.”

The people on the golden ship hurriedly moved to the Devil’s Snare Ship. The sandmen took their place and started to control the ship with ease while the water elementals assisted. The nagas picked up the weapons distributed by Chen Rui and worked with the dark elementals to guard against demonic sharks that would possibly jump out on both sides. This was the so-called collaboration toward a common end. At this time, no matter what kind of grudges and grievances they had before, they must work together if they want to get through the difficulties.

“Ms. Adeline, please activate your ability and try to guide the helmsman.”

Adeline bit her lip, “My spirit power is limited. I can barely sense a rough position at most. I also don’t know what dangers are on the road.”

“Drink these 2 bottles of potion first. Also, this crystal can improve the spirit power to a certain extent. Hold it.” Chen Rui stuffed the True Spirit Potion and Eternal Mind Potion as well as a refined high-purity spiritual crystal in the hands of the girl, “Do your best with the hope in your heart. At least, we shouldn’t leave regrets, should we?”

“Sir Aguile…” Adeline felt the warmth of the crystal, and she had a strange certainty in her mind. She drank the potion without further hesitation. She stood at the rudder of the ship while holding the crystal in her palm as she began to concentrate on spirit sensing.

The main sacrifice ship had sunk long ago. There were more and more demonic sharks surrounding the Devil’s Snare Ship. The number was far beyond imagination. Although they were unable to break through the ship at the moment, they pushed the ship one after another to sail in a certain direction. The ship lost its mobility. Due to the close distance and angle, it was not suitable for the main magic crystal cannons and the side cannons to attack. The situation was very dangerous.

“Replenish the crystal immediately! Turn on the magic protection. Prepare to use the emergency thruster to advance at full speed!” Chen Rui gave the corresponding orders to the sandmen and the water elementals loudly. He turned his head and said to Strena, “Ms. Strena, we need to clear a path for the Devil’s Snare Ship. Let’s do one side each.”

When Strena watched her sister drink the potion, she seemed like she was about to say something, but she didn’t. Now, she just took a deep look at Chen Rui and walked toward the head of the ship.

Facing a large number of ferocious sharks, Strena jumped down without fear. Her tail curled up and entangled a metal rope hook at the bottom left corner of the ship’s head. Her snake body stretched out and was hanging upside down.

The murderous intent in the female naga warrior’s green eyes was flourishing when she clearly saw the ferocious sea beasts. The 6 sharp scimitars launched piercing wind, that could tear the air, at the demonic sharks that were charging forward.

The sword qi was slashing all around with blood and flesh scattering around. The sword qi went out for dozens of meters, clearing out a path on the left side. Even the sea surface had an exaggerated slash marks. The powerful force made the sea stayed split for a while before ‘recovering’. The demonic sharks couldn’t get close for a while.

Strena, who continuously launched powerful slashes, showed a bit of fatigue. As her snake’s tail curled up, her whole body jumped back to the corner of the ship’s head. She happened to see countless golden half-moon-shaped ‘symbols’ on the school of demonic sharks on the other side at the same time. These symbols flashed at high speed, and the objects they encased were disintegrated and torn apart in an instant. In the blink of an eye, all the demonic sharks within a range of nearly 30 meters were dismembered into pieces without exception.

Strena was slightly shocked. At this time, the Devil’s Snare Ship had got rid of the besiege of the demonic sharks. Various thruster facilities were launched. Under the strong effect of the emergency thrusters, the ship broke through the waves like a sharp sword and pulled the distance from the school of demonic sharks at the back.

The escape from the danger caused cheers on the ship, but Adeline, who had the strongest sense of spirit power, exclaimed, “Oh no! Sir Aguile is still behind!”

This sentence made the cheers stop abruptly, and they turned around simultaneously to look at the group of demonic sharks in the distance. Strena suddenly frowned as she saw the blazing red light there. Even at this distance, she could feel an intense and terrifying violence.

Among the dense school of demonic sharks, an unknown long red “demonic beast” roared out. The sea water along the way was splashed to dozens of meters high. The red huge beast circled back and forth, and the demonic sharks were almost entirely annihilated.

The red light gradually extinguished, then the people heard the strange sound of [Sonic Boom]. A lightning-like figure had blasted over, and it instantly caught up with the Devil’s Snare Ship which was sailing at high speed.

“It’s Sir Captain!”

“Sir Aguile!”

The people on the ship shouted in surprise. Chen Rui landed on the deck with a blink, “Continue to follow the guidance of Ms. Adeline and go forward at full speed. Don’t put your guards down! This is the Hidden Misty Sea!”

This sentence reminded the sailors that they immediately started to take their positions. About an hour later, the Devil’s Snare Ship which was at full speed finally got rid of the pursuit of the demonic sharks. During this period, Strena kept staring at Chen Rui which made him uncomfortable.

“Ms. Strena, is there a flower on my face?” Chen Rui finally couldn’t stand it, and he took the initiative to speak.

“Your strength is much stronger than it seems on the surface. You can even remove the blue charm shackles on your own. You should be deliberately arrested that day right?” Strena’s scrutinizing gaze had strong vigilance, “Who are you? What is your motive toward the naga tribe?”

Chen Rui shook his head, “I don’t have any motive for the naga tribe. As for strength… It’s just a little self-defense trick. It can’t be compared with Ms. Strena.”

“Sir Aguile is too modest, your true strength may not be under my sister.” The naga girl suddenly interjected, “If there is any motive, it should be the Hidden Misty Island, right?”

Strena knew that her sister had special sensing abilities. Hearing Adeline said that ‘Aguile’ was as strong as her, she was surprised. Adeline pondered for a moment, then she asked, “Sir Aguile, I want to ask. If… you don’t know that I have the ability to sense the Hidden Misty Island, will you save me?”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Don’t you have a special sensing talent? I think you already know the answer.”

Adeline didn’t speak, but she just showed a pure smile. She crossed her hands, bowed, and continued to guide the direction of the sandman helmsman.

This question was actually for Strena. Sure enough, Sister Naga’s expression had eased a lot. Chen Rui looked at Strena, “Your injury yesterday has not recovered, and the poison of the devil fruit is also eroding your body. Maybe you shouldn’t have come here today, but since you are here… I’ll give this to you!”

Strena took the potion bottle and a green bead that were thrown over. She heard Chen Rui’s voice, “In the bottle is a potion that speeds up recovery from the injury. The bead is called Jade Pearl which is the condensed essence of the giant dragon’s horns. It can help you resist the poison of the devil fruit.”

Just as Strena was about to speak, ‘Aguile’s’ figure had disappeared at the entrance of the ship cabin. Chen Rui took out the map in the ship cabin and put on the “Dodo brand” helmet. This sea area map was illuminated. Judging from the distance between the red light point representing myself and the destination’s golden light point, the direction to the treasure is closer again. It seems that this direction is correct. The Hidden Misty Island is not only the place agreed by the Dark Elemental King, but it is also the only way to the mysterious treasure.

At this moment, Chen Rui heard a commotion outside. He quickly walked out of the ship cabin and saw another round of surging waves on the mist-winding sea ahead.

The ‘waves’ soon approached. It turned out that this was not a sea tide, but an endless amount of sea beast. This made one have goosebumps.

Adeline had an extremely fearful expression on her face as she curled up in the corner. She just said tremblingly, “Sister! Sir Aguile! Run quickly!”

Just as Chen Rui commanded the turn of the ship’s head, the same “waves” began to appear behind the Devil’s Snare Ship. The Devil’s Snare Ship was surrounded. At the same time, the sound of some kind of beasts faintly sonded in the air.

Compared with these demonic sea beasts, the previous school of demonic sharks was simply the difference between a bucket of water and a pond!

Compared with the bad situation right now, another ominous feeling faintly surged in Chen Rui’s mind, but now he had no time to think. He shouted, “All the cannoneers be prepared! Ready to attack!”

“Ms. Strena, I’m afraid that it is too late to treat the injury in the current situation. I will hand over the safety on the ship to you. Please protect Ms. Adeline and the sailors.”

Strena knew that the current situation was critical, so she didn’t say anything extra. She nodded, “How about you?”

“I will try my best to attract the attention of the sea beasts. You all quickly escape as soon as you find an opening.”

“You stay on the ship! I’ll go!” Strena said without hesitation.

“My sailors are the sandmen of the earth elementals. They have already received my order to break through. You don’t need to command alone. You’re more familiar with the nagas, so you can effectively organize them for systematic defense.” Chen Rui actually did not say the next sentence. Strena’s injury and state are not at the peak stage, so going this way is even more dangerous.

Although Chen Rui’s power was already partly consumed, due to the special response physique, only the [Scorching Dragon Kill] was temporarily unavailable. He could already launch the [True Destructive Aura Blow] and the strongest [Royal Star Transformation].

Strena stared at him for a moment. She crossed the 6 scimitars, spread out her arms, then she slightly lowered her head and bowed at him. The nagas on the ship did the same to Chen Rui. This was the highest etiquette that the naga tribe performed to warriors.

TL: At this rate, they will get to the Hidden Misty Island before the Dark Elemental King, but can they reach the island with 0 casualties? Will they face the Black Sea God before that?

chapters.title: Chapter 603 - Ominous Feeling
chapters.body:
Chapter 603 - Ominous Feeling

The siege was getting closer. Following the order from Strena who took over the command, the 2 main magic crystal cannons at the head and tail of the Devil’s Snare Ship shot a powerful white light beam at the beast tide.

Wherever the terrifying energy passed, huge waves were set off. The sea beasts were broken down into particles and disappeared without a trace.

The 2 light beams swept for a while before they gradually dimmed, but the sea beasts were fearless. They continued to pursue successively. The 2 fan-shaped empty spaces were quickly filled up by the beast tide.

The range and power of the main cannons surprised Strena, but although this magic crystal cannon was powerful, it took longer to cool down than normal main cannons. The severe situation made her react immediately with another order. Amid the explosions, the rows of open side cannons on both sides of the ship began to launch fiery shots. The firing frequency and accuracy controlled by the sandmen were excellent, but the power of the side cannons was far inferior to that of the improved magic crystal cannon. Although the lethality was still quite decent, it was a drop in the bucket in the face of the swarming beast tide.

Once Devil’s Snare Ship was completely surrounded by sea beast tide, they could only wait helplessly for death no matter how sturdy the ship was.

A figure flew out from the Devil’s Snare Ship. Facing the beast tide at the forefront, dozens of white light balls whizzed out like shotgun bullets. The destructive light balls cleared out dozens of trajectories among the beast tide before they exploded into the water. These shallow trajectories seemed so insignificant in the dense swarming beast tide; they disappeared in an instant.

Chen Rui knew that there were too many sea beasts, and the attack of [Aurora Shot] certainly couldn’t play an effective role. The purpose of this was to taunt them. After launching the [Aurora Shots], he went deeper. He could clearly see the ferocious eyes and sharp claws of those sea beasts.

Many sea beasts surged to Chen Rui who suddenly appeared. Many of them also cast long-range attacks such as water arrows, venom, and energy bombs. A translucent blue shield appeared around Chen Rui’s body, covering his whole body. The general magic shield couldn’t be moved after being activated, let alone attack at the same time unless the magic shield was canceled. Nevertheless, the protective shield skill of the Super System did not have this restriction at all, so he could move and attack freely.

While dodging, Chen Rui activated [Aura Blade] and killed the approaching sea beasts. His entire person was like a rotating sharp fan. The sea beasts along the way were quickly eliminated. Considering the number of sea beasts, Chen Rui’s massacre was just a drop in the bucket, but he had successfully attracted the attention of most sea beasts. Many of the big sea beast came roaring.

Even if Chen Rui was fighting guerrillas all the way, the protective shield on his body was still under tremendous pressure. The translucent round shield shook violently, and cracks gradually increased.

If it was a computer game, Chen Rui should be playing a tank role that resisted monsters and attracted hatred. It was just that he felt more like the big boss of the game now, being besieged repeatedly by countless players who wanted to farm the loots. No matter how much blood and how thick was the skin of this boss, he might be exhausted by huge-crowd strategy. What’s more, these sea beasts were not ordinary ants. Putting aside the difference in strength, the most terrifying thing was the same characteristic: successive attacks and fearlessness.

This kind of frantic battle was even greater than what he experienced in the battlefields previously. There were endless enemies, and the ears were full of roaring and shouting. What he saw and smelled was intense blood. He couldn’t figure out whether it was his own or the enemy’s.

Chen Rui felt that his power was consumed very quickly. He teleported and appeared high in the sky 1 second before the protective shield collapsed. Before he could catch his breath, dozens of black figures in the air hissed and rushed forward at an astonishing speed. This black figure was about 3 meters long. It looked like a kind of fish on the outside, but it had wings-like fins on both sides. Judging from the sharp teeth dripping with saliva, it didn’t look like a vegetarian.

This world is too unscientific. Let alone the fishes are howling like beasts; they are even flying in the air to bite!

Chen Rui launched the [Aura Blade] right in front of a flying fish. To his surprise, this sword qi did not cut the flying fish into halves as he expected, but it left a shocking crack on the forehead. This flying fish wailed and fell into the sea. Most of the sea beasts below were unable to fly, but they stacked up one by one like a huge tower that was constantly moving and increasing in height. While Chen Rui was struggling to cope with the flying fishes in the air, they quickly approached.

The sea beasts in the front were mostly attracted to Chen Rui. The Devil’s Snare Ship controlled the speed to pull the distance from the beast tide at the back. At the same time, they used the cannons to clear the obstacles in front. The dark elementals launched a large piece of [Dark Sky]. Together with the water wall created by the water elementals, they effectively delayed the approach of sea beast tide at the back.

In contrast, the most threatening thing was the flying fishes in the air. There were hundreds of flying fishes hovering above the Devil’s Snare Ship like black clouds. The Devil’s Snare Ship suffered a fierce attack. The top of 1 of the 3 masts broke open, and the balance sail was also torn. Several nagas and elementals were killed in the mouth of the flying fishes.

Strena covered Adeline to hide in the ship cabin as she loudly commanded the nagas to coordinate defenses to protect the cannoneers. She successively cut down several approaching flying fishes. With a bounce of her snake tail, she rose into the sky.

The flying fishes screamed and swooped toward Strena. Strena was the young tribe chief of the naga tribe and the commander of the White Tower Front Camp. Strena had competed with the joint forces of the harpies and sirens for the resources of phantom coral for many years. Hence, she was familiar to the opponents flying in the air. Her snake body in the air was as flexible as it was in the water. When she was cruising, the 6 scimitar lights flowed swiftly. The flying fishes that swoop toward her were equivalent to automatically sending their lives to the scythe of the god of death. They were either dead or injured as they plummeted into the sea like hailstones.

At this moment, there was a warning omen surged in Strena’s mind. She instantly turned back while crossing 2 scimitars, blocking the impact of a huge black figure behind her.

“Boom!” Strena’s body was knocked off as she was hit by a strong force. She was blown back for a few circles before she could regain her composure. It turned out to be a huge mutated flying fish that was 5 meters long. Its body flashed with dark silver light as it emanated wisps of icy air. It should be the king of flying fish.

Strena showed a vigilant expression. The double scimitars had actually become a little bent under this impact, but she still rushed to Flying Fish King without fear.

The snake figure flickered. The sounds of sharp wind tearing through the air and the muffled crashing sounded continuously. After a while, Strena’s figure flew out again.

This time, her face became paler. The armor on her body was mostly shattered, her mouth was bleeding, and the scimitars held by her 6 arms were twisted. There were countless intertwined slash marks on the body of King Flying Fish, some of which were deep to the bones. The broken scales were dropping like rain, but it did not suffer a fatal blow.

The Flying Fish King was very hard. He had the power of the early stage of the Demon Overlord which was inferior to Strena. Under normal conditions, Strena should be able to kill or repel him, but she was seriously injured in the battle with Queen Naga yesterday, and the poison of the devil fruit she took was not completely resolved. Even if she took the potion and Jade Pearl gifted by Chen Rui, she was still in a relatively weak state. In addition, the previous battles with the demonic sharks exhausted some of her stamina. Her combat power today was only 60 to 70% of the usual. It was very difficult to win when her weapons were broken.

As the situation is urgent now, every second of delay will further increase the danger. A quick fight is the only way to escape danger. Strena took a deep breath, and her green eyes turned golden. Her entire body began to emit a scorching golden light with a powerful sharp qi spreading rapidly around. The Flying Fish King realized the oncoming danger. A layer of blue cold light quickly wrapped around. The golden light couldn’t break through the golden light defense for a while.

In the 6 hands of the female body in the golden light, crimson flames were burning on the twisted scimitars. With a shout, nearly 100 golden figures appeared instantly, waving 6 flames. The figures simultaneously activated the naga tribe’s most powerful combat skill, [6 Wield].

The ordinary flying fishes within the golden light range were instantly burned to ashes. Countless waving flames intertwined into a giant net, trapping the Flying Fish King in it. The Flying Fish King hissed in terror as its blue light became thinner and dimmer. After a while, the giant net and the Flying Fish King past through each other. The golden light and flames disappeared. Besides the Flying Fish King in the air, there was no flying fish alive.

The sturdy and huge body of the Flying Fish King showed countless red net marks. With a “click“, its whole body finally split into countless pieces and fell into the sea.

Only the handles of the 6 scimitars were left in Strena’s hands. Judging from the fractures, they seemed to have been melted by the high temperature. There was no trace of blood on her face. Her entire person looked very battered. She seemed to have exhausted a huge vitality. In fact, the blow that contained the territory just now had indeed exhausted all of her power. All her wounds burst apart. Although she killed Flying Fish King with great risk, she had basically lost her combat power.

Strena, who was barely floating in the air, was about to go down when she happened to see the battle in the distance- The exaggerated “beast tower” just exceeded the altitude of Chen Rui’s position. It firmly wrapped Chen Rui like a huge sphere.

Strena was taken aback. Not to mention that “Aguile” is just the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, even if I am surrounded by that kind of terrifying battle group, it would be difficult for me to survive.

At this moment, a dazzling light appeared in the sea beast sphere wrapped in layers. The star-like light spread rapidly, and the entire “sphere” was instantly torn apart.

In the center of the light was a figure wearing a dazzling armor. The light suddenly became brighter. Then, the entire sea surface in front of the field of vision seemed to be separated by a huge force. The terrifying power created a huge vortex out of the sea. It wrapped countless sea beasts and soared into the sky to 100 meters high. If it weren’t for the special device of the Devil’s Snare Ship, it would have been overturned by this terrifying aftermath.

In the vortex, the brilliance was flourishing. In an instant, Strena had the illusion of a star explosion. In the terrifying shock and explosion, the sea beasts near the vortex were all shattered to pieces. A big hole was abruptly torn in the huge sea beast tide. It could not be closed for a while.

Strena watched this scene in horror. She finally understood the reason why her sister said that before. With this kind of terrifying strength, even if I am in the peak stage, I concede defeat!

“Stop firing! Go ahead at full speed! Hurry!” Chen Rui’s shout came from a distance. Although the move, [Star Explosion], successfully defeated the sea beast tide, the anxiety in his heart became stronger and stronger.

Many of these sea beasts had a hint of special breath. This kind of power was familiar to Chen Rui who owned the Super System- This is… the breath of faith!

TL: Another Demi-God? Or Pseudo-God? They almost used all their power when facing against the normal enemies, if the true boss appears…

chapters.title: Chapter 604 - Black Sea God
chapters.body:
Chapter 604 - Black Sea God

Chapter 604: Black Sea God

Strena heard the anxiety in Chen Rui’s tone. She immediately returned to the ship, ordered to stop all shooting and attacks, and rushed toward the opening cleared by Chen Rui in front.

“Madam Strena! Come quickly!” A naga exclaimed from the ship cabin.

Strena hurried into the ship cabin and saw the naga girl holding her arms in both hands as she curled up tightly. Even the harp was thrown aside. She had an extremely fearful expression on her face.

Strena was shocked and stepped forward to hug her sister, “Adeline! What happened to you?”

“Run quickly! Sister! Hurry!” Adeline was trembling all over as she panted quickly as if she had exhausted her last power to say these words. The main sacrifice imprint mark on her forehead began to faintly shine.

At this time, the ship swayed violently like it had encountered the impact of a huge wave. When Strena heard the horrified cries from the deck, she had an ominous premonition. She carried Adeline and quickly walked out.

At this time, the [Dark Sky] had gradually dissipated. The strange thing was that the sea beast tide and even the sea beast group in front of Chen Rui had retreated far away. This was by no means an impact from the [Star Explosion]. Judging from the panic and fear of the sea beasts, there should be something more terrifying about to appear.

The answer was quickly revealed. A huge tentacle emerged in the constant waves behind the Devil’s Snare Ship.

The tentacle was of dark red color. The exposed part was 40-50 meters high and nearly 10 meters in diameter. The tentacle was covered with terrifying suckers and barbs, exuding a weird and powerful breath.

The tentacle rose higher and higher. When it reached a height of about 100 meters, it whipped down, splitting apart the seawater. The violently undulating seawater quickly extended to the Devil’s Snare Ship that was desperately advancing.

The entire ship was lifted high in the air by the huge waves that were stirred up. When the power of the tentacles dissipated, the Devil’s Snare Ship fell straight down with the gushing sea water. Although there was a special device to prevent the ship from turning over, these huge ups and downs caused most of the people on the ship to fly up and fall into the water. Strena hugged her sister tightly while the other 2 hands clasped directly onto the mast, then only she barely stabilized her figure.

This was just the beginning. The direction of the sea had already experienced a strange upwelling. The Devil’s Snare Ship, which was moving at full speed, was involuntarily moved backward by the sea tide. It was like a person on a high-speed treadmill. Even though he was sweating profusely, he was still sucked back involuntarily.

Another huge terrifying tentacle appeared. This time, it was in front of the Devil’s Snare Ship. With the power of these tentacles, there would only be one end if the Devil’s Snare Ship was wrapped or smashed down directly, that was total destruction.

The huge tentacles continued to appear. There were already 4 surrounding the Devil’s Snare Ship. A powerful attack was on the verge of being launched. Even if the ship had the ability to fly into the sky, it would not be able to escape the disaster of extinction.

Strena showed hopelessness as she tightly hugged Adeline who was trembling. At this moment, a figure shining with stars suddenly appeared in the sky. The sound mixed with a certain kind of power spread from a distance, “Respectable blood octopus tribe powerhouse, I have no intention of breaking into the territory kingdom of sir. Please forgive our intrusion.”

Chen Rui’s voice was mixed with the spirit power of the [Analytical Eyes]. It penetrated directly into the bottom of the sea.

The moment the tentacles appeared just now, the [Analytical Eyes] had already given the data.

Race: Blood-marked Demonic Octopus (Mutated)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to determine.

[Analysis]: Extremely dangerous!

“Unable to determine” meant that this enemy had surpassed the level of Demon Overlord which was definitely not what he was capable of fighting against now.

The movement of the tentacles suddenly paused, seeming to be silent for a moment, then the Devil’s Snare Ship shook for a while and slowly rose up. It turned out that a tentacle was carrying it high underneath.

At the same time, the waves split apart. A giant figure emerged from the water.

This was a huge figure that looked like a hill. The whole body was dark red with a faint green color. Judging from the parts outside of the water, it looked like an octopus. The body had many eye-like red beads. The huge squirming mouth revealed hideous organs and layers of sharp teeth that made people shudder.

In addition to the horror films from the previous life, it was the first time Chen Rui saw such a terrifying and huge monster in reality. It would be a lie to say that he was not scared. It was just that he was no longer a rookie who just entered the Demon Realm. Although he was horrified, he tried his best to use his spirit power to control the fluctuating emotions as he slowly landed on the deck.

The huge beast’s red bead eyes were fixed on Chen Rui. Even Strena behind could not help shuddering in the face of this intangible terrifying pressure. Chen Rui tried to stay calm and bowed to the huge beast, “Aguile. Beelzebub. Greetings to you, sir.”

The 7 great royals in the Demon Realm were definitely not an unknown person. It could be used as a negotiation background. Moreover, Chen Rui had the God-Eating Mask and the Earth Elemental King’s bestowed [Gravity]. It was not difficult to pretend to be this identity.

The blood-red skin on the top of the huge beast’s mouth began to twist, and a face appeared. At first glance, the facial features were no different from ordinary people, except that there were 3 more inverted eyes on the forehead which looked very strange.

“You should call me the Black Sea God, but you can see through my real body at a glance. Before granting you death, I should at least compliment your eyesight.” The man face made a metallic and clanging sound, and the surrounding seawater was shaken with slight ripples.

“Dear sir, I can feel the great power of this kingdom, but the faith power in it seems to be too mottled. These sea beasts are driven by fear more than… faith in sir? “

Chen Rui’s words were by no means nonsense. He had more than 1 Pillar of Faith in the Super System, so he was fully aware of the power of faith. He used the [Analytical Eyes] to see through the race of the huge beast, but now this sentence directly hits the point of “Black Sea God”.

The 5 eyes of the huge beast’s man face lit up with a terrifying red light at the same time, “What do you want to say? You want me to praise your eyesight again before you die, or you want me to keep your eyes as a collection?”

Chen Rui felt his heart pounding. He took a deep breath with determination and said unhurriedly, “I want to express only one meaning. If sir is only this level, then you may not be able to surpass the existence behind me to grant me death.”

“Existence behind you?” The huge beast’s gaze turned to Chen Rui’s [Royal Star Transformation] armor, seeming to be thinking about something. He suddenly roared, “Even if you are a follower of some existence, but this is the Dead Sea! This is the Black Sea, it’s my kingdom! No one can stop me from devouring you, a tiny ant!”

The surrounding sea water turned into a huge vortex because of the roar as if the huge beast was the master of the world. Even a breath could cause a great momentum. Adeline had already lost the ability to speak; she could only tremble in Strena’s arms. Strena’s mind was also full of tension and fear. After all, Black Sea God was the ruler who enslaved the naga tribe for many years.

Facing the power of the huge beast, Chen Rui really calmed down instead. He shook his head, “You’re wrong, Sir Sea God. I don’t know if every Demi-God powerhouse has the ability to tear space, but what is certain is that the existence behind me has exactly this might… I don’t know if sir has heard of the Mountain Seckred?”

The huge beast’s man face was slightly stagnant. At the same time, a name was said from the huge mouth, “Sa… tan!”

The overlapping sounds were like gold and iron clashing. Everyone’s eardrums were buzzing. More importantly, Chen Rui keenly felt a trace of fear in the tone of this huge beast. It seems that Satan still has this reputation. At present, I have to use him to intimidate others.

Before the other party completely wrapped his head around it, Chen Rui took advantage of the situation to take out a red badge. It was engraved with a strange pattern which seemed to be a snake.

“Sir Sea God, this badge should prove that what I said is the truth.”

The 5 eyes of the huge beast stared at the snake pattern badge closely. After a moment of silence, the badge in Chen Rui’s hand disappeared again. He respectfully saluted, “This time, I was ordered to go to the Hidden Misty Island, but I unexpectedly entered sir’s kingdom, I sincerely apologize for this. I plead sir to let us pass. I’m willing to do my best. I will pay the corresponding wealth or treasures as sir’s compensation.”

Satan’s scheming was deep and mysterious. He was by no means a little brother who would come and go. Chen Rui was also very fearful of that guy. If he was really summoned, Chen Rui himself couldn’t predict what would happen. Perhaps there would be worse results. Therefore, after hinting his tough backer to the huge beast, he immediately showed humility and good attitude.

Sure enough, the huge beast nodded after thinking for a while, “If your compensation can satisfy me, I can let you go, but the rest must stay, especially the naga who bears the faith imprint!”

Chen Rui faintly guessed that the so-called main sacrifice imprint should be condensed by the faith power of nagas which the huge beast devoured to enhance the faith power. This was the truth of naga tribe’s sacrifice.

Strena was shocked when she heard this. Somehow, she plucked up the courage and shouted, “Sir Sea God, please let her go, I’m willing to replace my sister…”

“Hmph! You killed a lot of my believers, you should’ve died!” The huge beast said sternly, “This guy with [Armor of Faith] may still have a chance while you all are going to die!”

Chen Rui looked back at the desperate naga sisters and frowned, “Sir, they are all my sailors. I will definitely not be able to reach the Hidden Misty Island alone. May I ask if my compensation can cover my sailors?”

“The Hidden Misty Island?” The huge beast’s man face stared at Chen Rui for a moment. His eyes gradually narrowed, “If I really want to let you go, you should get out of the Black Sea. When did I say that you are allowed to go to the Hidden Misty Island? What’s more… I haven’t decided if I want to let you go yet…”

Chen Rui frowned even more. The huge beast’s man face suddenly showed an odd smile, “I don’t understand why Satan sends you to the Black Sea. I don’t even understand, if even Satan’s believers can have such a powerful [Armor of Faith], then his own power should be quite close to the legendary realm, so why did he only send an ant like you to come here? Perhaps I should rename you as… the inheritor of the Dark Dragon Emperor?”

Chen Rui finally showed a change of emotion. I did not expect that the “Black Sea God” would be so careful. He actually saw through my trick so quickly. What is even more surprising is the phrase “inheritor of the Dark Dragon Emperor” that the huge beast said!

The treasure recorded in this treasure map is actually related to the Dark Dragon Emperor hundreds of thousands of years ago, so this blood-marked demon octopus should have reached the Demi-God level. What is his relationship with the Dark Dragon Emperor and this treasure?

TL: Didn’t they say that octopus has a high intelligence? Trying to trick an octopus god? No way. How will Chen Rui convince Black Sea God to let them go?

chapters.title: Chapter 605 - Contract
chapters.body:
Chapter 605 - Contract

Chapter 605: Contract

Black Sea God looked at the respect on Chen Rui’s face, and he revealed a deep smile, “I’m suddenly a little interested in the compensation that you mentioned previously. Perhaps this can be the only way for you and your sailors to survive. “

Facing the huge beast that saw through his own strategy, Chen Rui thought about countermeasures while using the delaying tactics, “Sir is a discerning person. You should be able to see the authenticity of the snake pattern badge.”

Black Sea God’s smile turned cold, “Don’t you think I’m really afraid of that Satan! If it weren’t for this damn place that my territory kingdom…”

Chen Rui’s eyes turned. His expression became more humble as he bowed, “Sir really has a good eyesight. Please forgive me… Actually, I have nothing to do with Satan. May I know what kind of compensation I have to pay in order to satisfy sir?”

“Treasure!” Black Sea God exclaimed, “I don’t know what existence is behind you, but you should be the inheritor of the Dark Dragon Emperor. I’m not greedy, half of the treasure is enough. I must have a few items as well. We can sign a related equality contract, provided that your body can still carry the contract.”

“It’s a pity that I can no longer sign the second contract… By the way, the Demi-God powerhouse can cancel the contract, right?”

Black Sea God frowned, “The Demi-God powerhouse can carry more than 1 contract, but we cannot cancel the third party’s contract. We can only control our own contract and cancel the contract whose strength is lower than us. We can only sign 1 contract of the same type. These are the most basic common sense, you don’t even know?”

“It turns out to be like this!” Chen Rui just realized. “Since my strength is far inferior to sir, even if I give up the original contract and sign this contract, sir may cancel it?

“It takes a considerable price to void the contract. If your compensation satisfies me, it is a win-win situation. I will naturally not do stupid things.” Black Sea God said calmly, “This is the most generous condition I will give you. You can choose now whether to refuse or die.”

“The generosity of sir is comparable to the brilliance of the 2 moons.” Chen Rui suddenly smiled, “It’s just that I wonder why sir didn’t let me sign a master-servant contract? Isn’t sir not even afraid of Satan? Why will you be concerned about the existence behind me? Maybe… As sir said, only 1 contract of the same type can be signed, right? So can I assume that sir has already signed a master-servant contract with a certain existence, and you are the passive party?”

The expression on the man face finally changed a bit. Chen Rui said, “Even without this sentence… Since the territory kingdom of sir is restricted in this sea area, why haven’t you left for so many years? My bold guess is that sir had no choice, right? In other words, among the few items that sir needs in the treasure, 1 of them is crucial for you to get rid of some kind of bondage.”

The man face of the Black Sea God and his huge mouth roared at the same time. The surrounding waves blasted out water pillars that were tens of meters high and the entire sea area was shaking.

Chen Rui tried his best to control his mind and resist the terrifying power. His mind became calmer.

He knew that these speculations just now had hit the soft spots of the huge beast. Although it was unlikely that the opponent would burst into rage, he prepared the God-Eating Mask and [Star Diversion] just in case.

“Sir is a discerning person. Let me tell you the truth, Satan and I are actually a kind of… can be understood as a cooperative relationship which is why I can have a snake pattern badge. However, I don’t really want to call this troublesome partner because I don’t want to share some interests with others. Nonetheless, once my interests are fundamentally affected, I can only bite the bullet. Finally, I shall remind sir that I have some inconspicuous little skills. Even if I do not summon Satan, it is not a problem to escape even in the kingdom of sir.”

The last sentence made the huge beast’ breath even more aggressive. Chen Rui shrugged, “In fact, I have a real interest in sir’s previous “win-win”. Perhaps this is the only basis for our equal cooperation. I believe sir and I will have satisfactory results by then.”

These words implied intimidation and temptation which was like returning the previous words of the huge beast.

Huge beast gradually recovered his calm again. If Chen Rui had threatened him like this earlier, he would have turned hostile long ago, but he had to consider more things when everything was analyzed. This guy is carrying a pass to the Dark Dragon Emperor’s treasure. I have noticed that special breath when he first entered the territory kingdom. Otherwise, why make a big fuss just for the sacrifice of nagas.

“I can give up on the treasure, but I have 2 conditions. First, destroy the contract pillar that binds me. Second, find a purple spirit crystal ball and give it to me intact.” Black Sea God finally stated his conditions after pondering for a moment, “You must sign a contract with me. Otherwise, I would rather give up the hope of freedom and destroy you completely now.

Chen Rui understood Black Sea God’s concerns. If I don’t sign the contract, it is impossible that he will let me leave. This way, the goal of this trip is not only the origin fragment of the dark element, but also the treasure of the Dragon Emperor. The best result is that the origin fragment is in the treasure which can kill 2 birds with 1 stone.

In any case, it is considered a good result to be able to pass this misty sea area safely like this.

“Okay! However, if I help you achieve these 2 things, you must promise me an additional condition. I haven’t thought about this condition yet, but it surely won’t cause you harm.”

Black Sea God agreed without thinking. Anyway, he could simply tear up the contract at a certain price if this condition was too harsh. Chen Rui’s thoughts turned and he channeled out the power of the spiritual link. A shining contract appeared in front of the Black Sea God. Black Sea God looked at the contract and attached his own soul imprint. Chen Rui also did the same accordingly. The contract turned into 2 golden lights, submerged in both their bodies.

In the equality link in the link, there was an A-level link that stated the name was “Red Pipit.” it was followed by the content of the contract. The label prompted: “Can either be truncated or canceled.” This meant that Chen Rui also only needed to pay a certain amount of aura, then he could also unilaterally cancel the contract.

The name of this big octopus is Red Pipit? And not… a certain legendary King Paul the Octopus in my previous life?

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Sir Red Pipit, I think our cooperation will be very pleasant.”

The man face of the huge beast seemed to be surprised, “How do you know my name?”

“These are just trivial details, don’t need to care too much. What I want to ask is whether I can leave with my sailors since we have signed the contract? If possible, I hope Sir Red Pipit can help guide the way to the Hidden Misty Island.”

Red Pipit pondered a little, “If you want to advance, you will face at least 2 tests. Although those guys are far less powerful than mine, they will definitely not be easy with your strength. One of them is at the Hidden Misty Island that you are going to. Due to certain restrictions, I can’t tell you too much, just 1 sentence: Firm faith and fearlessness. Of course, some luck is needed here. Even if it’s just a little bit, it’s very important. From here on toward the south, you will be able to reach the Hidden Misty Island in about 3-4 days. I can give you a ride without any obstacles along the way. However, once you get there, you can only rely on yourself.”

As Octopus King spoke, the human face gave Adeline a faint look. When his 5 eyes flickered, the main sacrifice imprint on Adeline’s head gradually disappeared. The sailors who fell into the water were automatically sent to the Devil’s Snare Ship. Then, they brave the wind and sailed southward at an unprecedented speed.

When the Devil’s Snare Ship completely disappeared from sight, the face of the huge body showed horror, “Who is this guy? This contract’s rule power… actually completely surpasses Demi-God. It is even above the Dragon Emperor’s contract. Could it be…”

Chen Rui didn’t know that the spiritual link of the Super System brought a powerful shock to Emperor Octopus. After passing this obstacle, his tight body suddenly relaxed. Only then did he discover that the clothes in the Star Armor were soaked in cold sweat.

To be honest, negotiating with such a gigantic and terrifying monster can only be described as unscientific in the original world, but it really happened in this world, although it is equally unscientific.

Chen Rui’s gaze turned to Adeline, “Ms. Adeline, remember what I said, never give up hope.”

“En! Thank you, Sir Aguile.” Adeline nodded and showed a pure smile. Her main sacrifice imprint was canceled by Red Pipit, so the burden that was suppressed in her heart had disappeared. She seemed a lot more relaxed.

All the nagas who survived the disaster came to Chen Rui and bowed together. Even Strena put aside her arrogance of the past. Let alone strength, Strena was far inferior in terms of just the calm determination when facing the Demi-God-level powerhouse.

When the Black Sea God requested Adeline and others to stay earlier, Chen Rui could completely abandon them, but he did not do so. Therefore, all the nagas sincerely felt grateful for Chen Rui.

Chen Rui was not pretentious. He accepted the bow from the nagas and said with a smile, “We have a long journey, sailors. Strena, I used up too much power, so I need to rest for a couple of days. You shall command during this period of time.”

Strena knew that it was impossible to return to the Thunder Snake Archipelago for the time being. If Chen Rui can really complete the contract with Red Pipit, it means that the “Black Sea God” who had enslaved the nagas for many years would leave the place where he is imprisoned, then the naga tribe will also get real freedom. Whether it is for official or private reasons, I must go on this trip.

The female naga warrior’s green eyes showed respect for the first time, “This is my honor, Sir Captain.”

Chen Rui relaxed completely and entered the ship cabin. I can overcome the obstacle this time because I activated the [Royal Star Transformation]. Chen Rui was a little uneasy because of the low number of faith crystals.

After Shura devoured the Wheel of Hera that day in the White Feather Estate, my faith power seems to be seized by some special power. The faith crystal is greatly reduced every day. In the battle of the Deep Blue Palace of the water elementals, Shura awakened again. The production speed of the faith crystal is even slower. Recently, I activated the [Royal Star Transformation] more frequently. The accumulated faith crystal is almost running out. I can only use it 2 times.

Obviously, it is Shura’s tricks. I keep feeling uneasy as long as this stubborn and mysterious enemy exists. However, Shura could not be completely eliminated whether in the Star Evolution or the [Refined Mind] test previously. This time, Shura’s awakening is not simple. Especially the weird power that was activated to compete with the 3 Elemental Kings was far above my power.

Chen Rui had a hunch that one of the biggest tests was about to come.

TL: Could it be that Black Sea God is one of the guardians of the Dark Dragon Emperor’s treasure? But now he has a change of mind and wants to get out of this place? The origin of Shura is really intriguing…

chapters.title: Chapter 606 - The Hidden Misty Island
chapters.body:
Chapter 606 - The Hidden Misty Island

Chapter 606: The Hidden Misty Island

When Chen Rui woke up from the recovery period of the [Royal Star Transformation], the Devil’s Snare Ship was only about a day away from the Hidden Misty Island.

The Devil’s Snare Ship suffered a certain degree of damage during the first battle. Fortunately, Chen Rui’s storage warehouse contained a large number of materials. Thanks to the efforts of the sandmen, it was basically repaired and various energies were also supplemented.

A day later, the mysterious Hidden Misty Island finally appeared in front of everyone.

This horseshoe-like island was smaller than the Thunder Snake Island. It was filled with dense mist for dozens of kilometers which made it almost impossible to see things. It was indeed worthy of the Hidden Misty name. If it was not for Adeline’s special spirit sensing, the exact location might not be found even if they were close to this area.

Thinking of the magic herbs on the mystical island, Strena was full of expectations. What happened back then had troubled her mind for many years. She couldn’t return the talent of [6 Wield] to Adeline, but she must try to heal her sister’s eyes.

Taking into account the previous warning from Octopus King, Chen Rui commanded the ship to bypass the nearby reef carefully and chose a sandbank close to the shore of the island. At this time, there were still 3 days before the meeting period mentioned by the Dark Elemental King. The range of this island is not small, I wonder if the Dark Elemental King has arrived with his airship.

Behind the sandbank was a lush forest. Chen Rui kept the Devil’s Snare Ship and let the sailors camp and rest on the shore. He led Dodo, a dark elemental and a water elemental, to explore the forest to look for the whereabouts of the Dark Elemental King.

Strena wanted to go together, but since she was the second greatest combat power here, she stayed after considering that Adeline and sailors needed protection.

Chen Rui carefully explored the forest with the 3 of them. The forest was very large and the mist was very dense. Fortunately, the water elementals had the power to control the water element. Wherever they passed, the mist became much thinner. There were many unknown strange plants growing in the forest in which even the ‘plant gourmet’ Dodo, who had the bloodline memory, couldn’t name. However, the slime had learned the lessons of gluttony a few times before, so he didn’t dare to wander again this time. He followed his master’s footsteps, but he secretly tried some fruits along the way.

They did not encounter any enemy in this exploration. The journey was unimpeded, but Chen didn’t notice anything. Despite the greenery, there was no living animal in the forest; there was a strange atmosphere of death.

Seeing that the sky was getting darker, Chen Rui intended to retreat from the original road to the forest for safety purposes. However, the forest had undergone a strange change at this time. They actually couldn’t find a way to return. The whole direction was chaotic. The more they retreated, the deeper they were in the forest.

Chen Rui immediately stopped and flew into the air. The strange thing was that the woods surrounding the mist grew steadily as he rose, always surrounding him.

Chen Rui realized that there was something wrong with the forest. He rapidly condensed the power of his entire body and got ready to attack the enemies that appeared at any time. When he suddenly saw Dodo and the 2 water elementals walking out in 3 directions in a daze, he hurriedly shouted, “Don’t wander, get together first!”

Although his voice was loud, Dodo and the 2 elementals didn’t seem to hear him. They continued to walk forward. Dodo looked very happy as he jumped up and down. Sometimes he opened his mouth wide, and sometimes he laid on the ground with his transformed legs. The expressions of the 2 elementals were different. The water elementals shouted in horror, but no sound was heard. The other dark elemental was drowsy and almost fell to the ground while walking.

Chen Rui was secretly shocked as the [Analytical Eyes] did not show any strange enemies. He immediately flew toward Dodo carefully. However, no matter how he flew, there was always a fixed distance from the nearby Dodo. He couldn’t get close as if the slime was a circle center, no matter how hard he tried, he could only circle around the center.

“An unidentified spirit power intrusion is found. Turn it into auras?” A warning sound came from the Super System. Chen Rui recovered his senses suddenly. As he recalled what happened in the ancient alchemy civilization stronghold, he blurted out, “Illusion?”

Chen Rui’s spirit power had reached the level of the peak stage Demon Overlord, but he was not aware of this illusion at all. Even after the Super System turned the invading spirit power into aura, the scene in front of him remained unchanged.

It was the first time that he saw such a powerful illusion. Is it a real illusion or the power of the territory kingdom?

His mind shifted, and the God-Eating Mask appeared on his face. He immediately activated the [God Eater] skill. In an instant, the mouth of the mask opened and devoured all nearby mists like a whale sucking water.

This was the ability of the God-Eating Mask- devouring all spirit power, magic and soul attacks.

Sure enough, after the mist disappeared, the forest seemed to have returned to its original state. Chen Rui did not circle around Dodo now. He reached out and grabbed the slime.

“Bold servant! How dare you interrupt Master Dodo’s meal!”

Master Slime, who was still immersed in a wonderful illusion, raised his brows. When he was about to yell at the servant, he was struck hard on his head. As soon as he woke up, he found out that it was his master. He hurriedly said with flattery, “Master, I found out the enemy’s logistics warehouse. In order to effectively attack the enemy, I…Uh, no! Your humblest servant ate all their food with the risk of being blown up!”

It seemed that the slime hadn’t fully awakened from the dream of stealing food from “the enemy’s warehouse”, but Chen Rui didn’t have the time to explain too much. The 2 elementals also returned to normal. Perhaps because of the God-Eating Mask, they did not encounter such an illusion along the way. The group quickly withdrew to the sandbank from the woods.

As soon as they arrived at the sandbank, he saw Strena leading the nagas to surround the tents in a defensive formation like they were facing a terrifying enemy.

“Captain! You’re finally back! Are you okay?” Chen Rui’s arrival made Strena look relieved.

“I have encountered some problems, but they have been resolved.” Chen Rui frowned slightly, “Strena, is there something going on here?”

Strena nodded solemnly, “After we set up the tents, I arranged a naga and a water elemental to patrol nearby, but they did not return for a long time. When I led the people to search, I found their corpses on the other side of the beach. Their deaths are very strange. There were no signs of fighting around nor injuries on their bodies… Captain, come and see!”

Chen Rui followed Strena to the open space on the side. The 2 corpses were in a very strange posture as Strena said. 1 of the water elementals, Lantra, who was with him, came forward and looked at the corpse of the comrade with a strange expression, “Sir Aguile, judging from the state of Landyla’s death, it seems that she was burned to death by flame power. She should have encountered an enemy who is proficient with fire elements. It’s strange that there are no traces of burns on his body.”

Chen Rui looked suspiciously at the corpses of the water elemental that had somewhat melted. The water elementals would automatically evaporate and disappear after dying for 24 hours. The corpse of naga by the side did not have this change. The expression on the dead naga looked terrified. Her snake body curled up in a ball like she was frozen to death. Similarly, no real frostbite was found on her body.

“Adeline said that she faintly sensed that a dangerous and special force was watching us, so I asked the nagas to be on guard at any time.

Chen Rui frowned tightly, revealing a thoughtful look. Burning? Frozen? A powerful magician enemy? But there are no scars on the surface of the skin. Could it be that the fire or ice ‘burned’ from the mind?

He suddenly thought of a report he had read in his previous life about brain consciousness and illusion. A man was mistakenly locked in a cold room storing frozen food, and his body was found the next day. He looked like he was frozen to death, but the strange thing was that the cold storage did not cool down on that day. It was a relatively normal temperature which was not enough to cause death.

Scientists had discovered through research that the man should be thinking that he would be frozen to death in the sub-zero temperature. As a result, this subjective consciousness produced an increasingly cold illusion which led to the cessation of brain activity and ultimately real death.

Thinking of the powerful illusion encountered in the forest, Chen Rui finally understood. It must be so! The ‘force’ that Adeline said must have the great power to manipulate illusion and soul. It could use illusion to cause death of the soul. That’s why there are no wounds on the surface when the water elemental was ‘burned to death’ and the naga was ‘frozen to death’.

No wonder the Octopus King Red Pipit said ‘firm faith.” It is for this guy who controls the illusion. I can only get rid of the danger by using a strong spirit power to free myself from the illusion.

Although the power of the God-Eating Mask is very precise, I have already activated it once in the forest. The next time it can be used is 7 days later. The other party’s whereabouts are mysterious and unpredictable. Even [Analytical Eyes] can’t detect it (It is most likely remote controlling which exceeds the sensing range of [Analytical Eyes]). We can only cautiously guard against itat the moment. After meeting with the Dark Elemental King, I will try to deal with or get rid of this enemy.

A ring appeared on Chen Rui’s finger. It was the first ‘gift’ Shea gave him. Lucifer Royal Family’s secret treasure, ‘Dark Will’ which could resist different kinds of spirit power interference to a certain extent. It could also launch a random teleport once a day.

At the beginning, this ring saved Chen Rui’s life several times. As his strength grew, the role of the ring became less and less. It was more of a precious souvenir. When he wore this ring now, he seemed to see that tenderness in the pair of cold purple eyes again. He could not help feeling warm.

In addition to Dark Will, the God-Eating Mask was immune to all soul manipulations. Chen Rui was not afraid with these 2 plus the Super System, but it was very dangerous for Strena and the sailors. He didn’t know if the other party had any other offensive ability besides illusion. Therefore, he must not take it lightly.

Chen Rui put forward his own speculation, “The enemy has the terrifying ability to manipulate the soul and mind. We are currently in a passive situation, and we can only guard against the situation when we cannot take the initiative. It will soon be dark and the situation is likely to be even worse. Lantra, you are responsible for burying the corpse; Strena, you distribute the food, then arrange the selection of the night guard. We shall lead the team. I’ll handle the first half of the night, and you handle the second half. I will go to the tent to set up a protective magic circle now. I hope we can survive the test of the night safely.”

The water elementals and the female naga warriors showed a solemn expression and nodded seriously.

TL: The opponent doesn’t seem serious; the initial illusion could just be a warning. What will they face at night?

chapters.title: Chapter 607 - Illusion
chapters.body:
Chapter 607 - Illusion

Chapter 607: Illusion

In the middle of the night, the purple moonlight shone on the tent at the island’s sandbank, stretching the shadow of the alert female naga warriors.

The second half of the night was the time for Strena to guard. In fact, facing the unknown dangers surrounding her, she did not sleep well, but she forced herself to rest for a while.

Around the camp area, there were crystal pillars with strange runes inlaid on them. They formed 3 layers of circles, enclosing the tents. The ground outside the scope of the pillars was inscribed with faintly mysterious patterns. These were exactly the protective magic circles that Chen Rui set up which combined with the mystery of Dragon Inscription and ancient runes. It had a strong protective effect and could resist the erosion of spirit power. If it were not for the refinery of the Super System and the magic time rule, even if Chen Rui’s level had reached the level of a senior master, this set of things could not be completed in such a short time.

However, this protection set was not invincible. At present, the enemy was in the dark while they were visible, so they must not take it lightly. They could only adapt to changes.

The mist in the evening was particularly thick. Especially the areas near the water almost blocked all visibility when the mist blew over. This environment made Strena more vigilant outside the camp. As an experienced warrior, she understood that this kind of mist was the best cover for the enemy. It was easy to be attacked particularly at midnight when people were easily tired. She immediately ordered several guards of nagas to keep alert from the potential enemy ambush.

Strena was a typical naga warrior with extremely strong physique, power and fast speed, but she was weak in spirit power. However, she had also reached S- in Chen Rui’s [Analytical Eyes]. Currently, she had extended her spirit power to keep an eye on what might happen.

A gust of night wind gradually blew the mist closer. When the mist approached the inscribed patterns near the camp, it was blocked by an intangible power and could not approach. However, after wandering for a while, the mist began to slowly seep into the inscribed patterns. It silently filled and covered those inscribed patterns like layers of sand.

After the mist filled the inscribed patterns, it began to approach the crystal pillars. The symbols on the crystal pillars immediately flickered and changed like a flexible snake circling on the pillars, echoing in the distance. They interwove into an intangible force field which tore apart the mist.

Chen Rui, who was in the magic tent, reacted immediately. He teleported and appeared outside the tent.

“What’s the situation?” Chen Rui asked Strena.

“The pillars flickered for a while, but I didn’t see the enemy.”

“This shows that a spirit power invaded just now, but it was resolved. Be careful.”

Soon after Chen Rui went back to rest, the crystal pillars shined again and gradually recovered. After several repetitions, it seems to have subsided. There was no more abnormality.

Strena looked at Chen Rui who was awakened several times and apologized, “It seems that the enemy will not appear tonight. You are also very tired. Go and rest quickly. If anything happens, I will call you.”

Chen Rui previously spent a lot of effort in the refinery to make the protective magic circle using the time rule, plus he didn’t sleep in the first half of the night. He felt really tired indeed. He nodded immediately, “Okay, but don’t let your guards down. This is probably just a poke from the enemy. If the pillars turn red or even break, you must wake me up immediately.

“En.”

Watching Chen Rui enter the magic tent, Strena bucked up and carefully watched the changes around her. What Chen Rui and the female naga warrior did not notice was that the mists that were torn apart several times had not been completely eliminated. There were still a few strands of mist left. After passing through the pillars, they became extremely thin, but they slowly approached the tent silently.

Strena was paying attention to the surrounding movement when she saw that the central tent was opened. A figure came out. It was actually her sister, Adeline.

“Adeline, it’s so late now. Why don’t you take a good rest?”

Adeline looked a little scared, “Sister, I feel like something is calling me. I’m a little scared.”

Strena stroked her hair lightly, “Don’t worry, it was just a minor situation just now. The enemy should have retreated.”

“En, with sister by my side, I’m not afraid.” Adeline leaned against Strena, “Remember when I was a kid? I’m timid and can’t see. It was you guarding by my side with a scimitar, only then I dared to fall asleep.”

“Of course I remember,” Strena’s eyes showed a gentle expression, “At that time, I was often punished by mother because my talent was not good, and you would play the harp to relieve me every time.”

At the mention of “talent”, the brilliance in Strena’s eyes suddenly dimmed. Although she was very hardworking, she made slow progress due to aptitude problems. She was far behind her sister who suffered from eye diseases. Later, she wanted to rely on her sister’s sensing to go to the Hidden Misty Island to find the miraculous herb to improve her aptitude. She encouraged her sister to go to the Hidden Misty Island together in the name of treating her eyes. However, they encountered a dangerous situation on the road and she almost died. In the end, it was Adeline who saved her. Adeline also passed the most precious talent of [6 Wield] to her selfish sister with an incredible method.
