From that moment on, emotions such as shame, self-blame, and pain had been lingering in Strena’s heart. She vowed to protect her sister with her life for the rest of her life. This time, Adeline’s participation in the sea sacrifice was undoubtedly a dead end. She recklessly sneaked into the sacrifice ship after failing to stop her sister from being sacrificed.

The sensitive Adeline sensed her sister’s feelings and said empathetically, “Sister, the things that happened back then were not entirely your fault. Besides, it’s been so long ago, so don’t take it to your heart anymore.”

Strena was emotional. She hugged her sister tightly, “Adeline, don’t worry, I will heal your eyes!”

“That…” Adeline asked hesitantly, “Is there really a herb to treat my eyes on the Hidden Misty Island?”

Strena’s eyes flashed with strange confidence as she said firmly, “There are countless incredible plants in the legend. There will definitely be herbs to treat the eyes!”

“So… Sister, can you bring me to find it?” Adeline asked in surprise.

“Okay!” Just as Strena agreed, she felt that something was wrong. It seemed that she had forgotten the most important thing, she subconsciously showed hesitation.

Adeline lowered her head sadly, “Sister doesn’t want to heal my eyes?”

Strena replied without hesitation, “Of course I do!”

“Sister is awesome! Then let’s go now.” Adeline took Strena’s arm and smiled purely.

“Okay.” Strena nodded and walked straight out of the tent. After stepping out of the crystal pillars, she didn’t see Adeline next to her. Her senses were slightly recovered. As soon as she realized something, she heard Adeline’s voice sounded in front.

“Sister, I’m here. Hurry up.”

Strena looked at the familiar figure in front of her who kept beckoning her. She walked straight to the mist ahead without thinking further.

The rest of the nagas seemed to turn a blind eye to this. Each of them either fell into a strange state or talked to themselves or fell asleep on the ground.

The mist gradually became thicker as it surrounded the tents.

In the most central tent, Adeline laid quietly on the bed with the golden harp on her side. The girl’s sleeping face was as peaceful as a baby. Suddenly, the girl’s eyes opened drowsily, and she saw a figure in front of her.

This figure was her sister, Strena. However, the naga girl’s face showed a look of horror.

“Who are you?”

Strena looked surprised, “Adeline, you don’t even recognize me?”

Adeline ignored her. She just pushed her comrades in the tent desperately. However, those comrades seemed to be asleep. She couldn’t wake them up no matter how hard she shook.

“Adeline, are you okay? Don’t scare me!”

“Who are you?” Adeline backed away fearfully. She accidentally knocked down the harp.

“I’m your sister, Strena. I made this harp with you when you were 12 years old.”

Adeline shook her head, “You can’t lie to me! Even if your appearance and voice are exactly the same as sister, or even if you peek into the past from my mind, you are definitely not my sister. I can feel that your soul is full of violence, greed and evil.”

“It’s easy to accept these compliments.” ‘Strena’ changed quickly and turned into a hazy mist, “You can see through the illusion that even Demon Overlords can’t resist. It is a rare soul body indeed. However, I wonder if your sister has such a strange spirit talent like you?”

Adeline’s heart tightened, “What did you do to my sister?”

“Not only your sister, everyone is controlled by me.” The mist laughed sharply, “If you are willing to dedicate your body and soul completely, I can let them live.”

“I won’t believe you, let alone give up hope!” Adeline touched the spiritual crystal that she carried with her, “They will definitely defeat your illusion!”

“Naive hope!” The mist sneered disdainfully, “Let’s see if you can say such ridiculous things after you and I go to see those poor guys.”

The mist used some means, and Adeline felt that a trace of her soul seemed to be drawn away from her body. Her consciousness drifted around with the mist.

Next, her eyes seemed to have healed. She witnessed the illusion in the brains of each comrade and the danger of being trapped in the illusion. If it were not for the special spirit power, she would think that it was a dream.

Sometimes, being awake was far more terrifying than sleeping.

“No! Stop it!” The girl closed her eyes in pain. She covered her ears, but she couldn’t block her feelings.

“Now, it’s time to see the Sir Captain who gave you hope.” The white mist smiled playfully, “It seems that you also have a little affection in your heart for this guy who saved you? I think you will see more interesting things that way…”

While speaking, the white mist drifted into the magic tent where Chen Rui was located with the consciousness of the girl.

“Let’s go and have a look at this guy’s illusion.” As the white mist said, Adeline felt that the surrounding scenery had changed. She had come to an unfamiliar scene.

This was an unprecedented space. In the center was a huge and dazzling sphere. There were many spheres of different sizes and colors rotating around the huge dazzling sphere in a strange rhythm.

There were a tremendous amount of these spheres, and the range was massive. There were actually twinkling stars everywhere.

The Illusion of “Aguile” is actually such a starry sky!

TL: Is he in Illusion or is it just reflecting where Chen Rui’s mind is?

chapters.title: Chapter 608 - The Mirage
chapters.body:
Chapter 608 - The Mirage

Chapter 608: The Mirage

In the dazzling starry sky, Chen Rui was floating in it. He was not as bright and hot as the largest sphere, but one would see him first at a glance like he was the core of the entire galaxy.

Adeline looked at this magnificent starry sky a few times in surprise, then she focused on Chen Rui. She had been using her soul to feel and sense this strange man who saved her life and gave her confidence previously. It was her first time looking at him with her “eyes”.

Although that face was ordinary, he had a strange charm in the eyes of the girl which made her feel at ease and trustworthy.

The white mist immediately noticed the naga girl’s feelings. It deliberately smirked strangely, “The stars in the sky are all balls like these? The illusion is born from the heart. This guy’s weird illusion is surprising. As a creative reward, I can make his soul less painful before he is annihilated.”

“No!” Adeline pleaded. She had witnessed the torture and pain of her companions in the illusion. She knew that the threat of the white mist was by no means an intimidation.

“As long as you give your body and soul to me without resistance, not only will your companions be relieved of pain, even this man and your sister will also be free.” The white mist transformed into a human figure with 2 blue dots as “eyes” on its head. Its voice was full of temptation, “In fact, you are just merging with me, you will not die. Moreover, you will have extremely strong power! You also don’t want to be taken care of by your sister for a lifetime right? You can use your power to protect the people you value.”

Adeline’s mind finally began to waver. The white mist already knew her greatest weakness. The girl was not afraid of sacrifice, but she couldn’t let go of the person whom she valued. Using Strena or even Chen Rui to threaten her was much more effective than threatening her own life.

At this moment, a voice sounded, “It turns out to be like this, mirage… I’m really unfamiliar to this tribe.”

The 2 blue dots on the head of the white mist flickered violently. It was obviously in shock. Chen Rui’s eyes slowly opened and looked at him faintly.

“Aren’t you in illusion?” The white mist’s voice sounded hysterical, “What is this…”

Adeline had already called out in surprise, “Sir Aguile!”

Chen Rui nodded to her, “You seem to have forgotten our agreement. You shouldn’t give up hope so quickly. For the people you value, you give up more than your own hope.”

Tears of joy flashed in the naga girl’s eyes, “I’m sorry.”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “This is not the time to be sorry, we need to have a good chat with this Mr. Mirage. To be precise, it is the clone of the mirage.”

“Impossible!” The white mist screamed, “How can you, a mere Demon Emperor, know this! Even the Elemental King whom I defeated previously could not see through me!”

Of course, Chen Rui would not say that it was judged by his [Analytical Eyes], “This is not important. What is important is that you can no longer get out. Even though you are just a clone, if you are destroyed, it will definitely cause severe a damage to your real body. We might as well sit down and have a conversation just like Sir Red Pipit and I did before.”

“Don’t compare me with that stupid octopus!” The white mist calmed down and smiled ghastly, “You don’t know the true strength of the mirage tribe. Perhaps you can do some tricks of spirit power, but playing illusion in front of me is as ridiculous as a little student showing off in front of the grand master. This illusion is just a delicious meal for me. I will devour it now. Then, I’ll devour your spirit power and soul!”

After speaking, the silhouette of the white mist turned into a misty gas, spreading toward the entire starry sky. However, the galaxy was endless. No matter how hard this mist tried, it was just a drop in the ocean. When approaching the biggest sun, the mist was mostly evaporated in the buzzing sound and successive screams like snowflakes meeting the flames.

“This is not an illusion! Dear Demon God! Where the hell is this! It can actually hurt and restrain me!” The mist re-assembled into a human form and appeared to be thinner. It was obviously severely injured just now.

Chen Rui shrugged, “Perhaps you can understand this as a kingdom… More accurately, it should be a universe.”

“You actually have a territory kingdom!” The mist was shocked again, “Wait, this is… faith power? Such a terrifying faith power! How is this possible?! Also, this form of territory kingdom, is it the legendary… Who are you exactly?”

At that moment, the mirage’s mind was confused. It had always used its talent and illusion to fool people’s minds, but now it was confused by the other party’s words.

“I’m not interested in explaining anything. If Sir Mirages doesn’t have the desire to talk about it, then…” As Chen Rui opened his 5 fingers, a huge black hole appeared in the space. The mist figure was involuntarily sucked toward the black hole. Adeline at the side was not affected in the slightest.

“Wait a minute!” The mist figure’s voice finally began to panic, “The soul of this naga girl is under my control. If you dare to destroy my clone, then I will make her soul annihilate too!”

Chen Rui’s eyes were cold, and the suction of the black hole became stronger. The mist felt that its entire soul power was sucked by the terrifying power and it was in danger of being completely devoured at any time. It said in panic and rage, “If you really don’t care about her life or death, at most I can give up the soul power of this clone and die together with that girl!”

Adeline didn’t say heroic words like “don’t care about me” because that would make Chen Rui more vulnerable to threats. She just said, “Sir Aguile, the mirage seems to have said before that I’m some kind of soul body.”

Chen Rui secretly praised the girl’s intelligence. He personally heard the mirage threatened and lured Adeline to dedicate her body and soul because of the girl’s special physique initially. Perhaps the real reason why the mirage did not kill everyone was precisely to get Adeline’s body. It was likely that this body with special spirit abilities was very important to the mirage.

“It turns out to be so.” Chen Rui smiled knowingly.

“Damn it!” The mirage finally became irritated, “You mentioned the negotiation with the octopus, so it must be related to the Dark Dragon Emperor treasure. I can let you pass the Hidden Misty Island! There is only 1 condition! Give me the girl with the soul body to me!”

Chen Rui glanced at Adeline and found that there was no panic or worry in the girl’s eyes that had “restored” her eyesight. There was only a strange peace.

“Adeline, do you believe me?”

The girl suddenly didn’t dare to look directly at his bright eyes. She just lowered her head a bit, “Yes, from the moment sir gave me hope.”

“I think you have already got an answer, mirage clone?” Chen Rui said to the mirage indifferently.

The mirage was even more furious, “Very good! I don’t want this clone soul! I will die with you! In the end, this soul body will still be mine!”

Chen Rui sneered. Just as he was about to speak, his expression suddenly stagnated as if some abnormal change had taken place.Ｈe immediately covered his head tightly. It seemed to be very painful. During this process, the entire universe began to appear distorted irregularly.

Adeline was taken aback. Just as she was about to fly over, the distortion of the entire space had calmed down. Chen Rui slowly released his hands from his head, and his black pupils had turned blood red. He glanced at the mirage.

When the mirage faced Chen Rui just now, it didn’t feel anything, but now an instinctive fear actually surged from the depths of its soul with just a glance.

Adeline clearly felt something special happened to “Aguile”, but she couldn’t tell what it was at that moment. She asked, “Sir Aguile, are you okay?”

“It’s okay. I’m fine, better than ever.” Chen Rui showed a strange smile, “Are you willing to choose to believe me no matter what happens?”

Adeline bit her lip gently as she nodded. In the blink of an eye, Chen Rui flashed in front of her, gently holding the girl’s chin. His smile was even more eccentric, “Great. A very interesting toy.”

This action made Adeline’s face flushed. However, Chen Rui’s figure disappeared in an instant and appeared in front of the mirage. The distance was so close that the mirage was startled.

“Look at what I found, a mirage playing with spirit power tricks?”

“You dare to be so rude to me, Sir Lotman, I will definitely…” The mirage’s voice was a bit stern.

“Even if you are about to reach kingdomization, you are just a weak mirage. There seems to be a kind of restraining power in your soul breath. No wonder you have to use the soul body to get out. I remember the taste of the mirage soul is quite wonderful. Don’t worry, I will completely free you… Don’t try to hide. There is restraining power anyway, so you can’t escape, my delicacy.”

The coveted look in Chen Rui’s bloodshot eyes made the mirage tremble as it was truly scared. Chen Rui smiled even more when he saw all this, “By the way, what did you just say? I think I didn’t finish listening?”

The mirage screamed in horror, and the mist figure suddenly burst. It actually self-exploded the clone!

At the same time the mirage clone disappeared, Adeline felt a massive shake. Aguile, the clone, and the starry sky disappeared at the same time. In a daze, she had returned to the tent, and her eyes couldn’t see again. Everything that happened in the starry sky just now seemed to be a dream.

Her intuition told her that it was definitely not a dream. Reminiscing a certain scene, the girl’s cheeks became hot, but she quickly reacted and began to scream at her companions in the tent. However, no matter how she yelled or pushed, those companions were still drowsy.

Adeline fumbled out of the tent with an uneasy feeling. She yelled, “Sister! Where are you?”

After shouting a few times, Strena still didn’t answer her. Thinking of the previous words of the mirage, Adeline’s heart suddenly sank as she fumbled toward Chen Rui’s magic tent.

Halfway through, the girl’s footsteps stopped. She heard a familiar voice.

“Adeline.”

There was intense fatigue in this voice as if the person experienced an extremely tough battle.

Adeline said quickly, “Sir Aguile! My sister, she…”

“Strena may have fallen into the mirage’s hands,” Chen Rui frowned and looked at Adeline, “Let’s go. Use your sensing ability to find the mirage and rescue Strena.”

TL: Did Chen Rui deliberately release Shura? What is it for? To scare the mirage?

chapters.title: Chapter 609 - Clone
chapters.body:
Chapter 609 - Clone

Adeline activated her sensing power and led Chen Rui toward the jungle. All the way, the sound of the snake rustling as she moved covered Chen Rui’s footsteps.

Thinking of her snake body, the girl inexplicably had a sense of low self-esteem, but this mentality was quickly covered by the worry about her sister. She put away her distracting thought and began to sense the whereabouts of the mirage with all her strength.

Due to her soul body physique, those illusions that could affect Demon Overlords had no effect on Adeline. Instead, she could trace the origin through this illusion and lock the trace of the mirage.

The white mist along the way became more and more dense; Chen Rui’s pace became slower and slower. Adeline also slowed down, “Sir Aguile, I feel that there are layers of soul power intertwined on all sides. My sensing power is refracted away by some special power. The real body of the mirage seems to have disappeared.”

“Oh?” Chen Rui’s breathing was a little bit short. It seemed that the “scenarios” he encountered along the way were far more dangerous and complicated than the “reality” that Adeline sensed.

“The power of the illusion, [Mirror Image]… No wonder the attacks were all defended. It turns out to be like this. It seems that this guy’s illusion is close to materialization…”

Chen Rui’s red eyes showed a strange light. Although Adeline couldn’t see it, she sensed something abnormal and asked, “Sir Aguile?”

“I just thought of something very valuable. I will crack the trick of the mirage first.” When Chen Rui raised his left hand, a cluster of extremely pure terrifying breath appeared in his 5 fingers and spreaded all around. Adeline felt those complex and ingenious reflection and refraction power were quickly penetrated by a kind of “aggressive” power, then they were completely destroyed without a trace.

This kind of power seemed to be stronger than when they were facing the Black Sea God. The girl was surprised, and she plucked up the courage to ask, “Sir Aguile…may I ask a question?”

“I seem to have guessed your question.” Chen Rui’s red eyes seemed to be able to see through the girl’s mind. His smile had a touch of playful expression, “No matter what I become, I will always be me. Will you be willing to be as always… and unreservedly believe in this man who can bring you hope, my Ms. Adeline?”

The last title made the naga girl’s face blush. She gave an inaudible “En“.

Chen Rui’s red eyes flashed with evil light, and a red mark appeared on his fingertips, “Then, accept this mark. You will get the power that you did not have in the past. After that, we have to speed up. I believe it won’t take long to rescue your sister.”

The girl’s hesitation lasted only a moment before she reached out to the mark with determination.

In the horseshoe-shaped concave waters of the Hidden Misty Island, a group of dense mist was suspended on the surface of the sea. It was no different from the mist that filled the entire island, but suddenly there was a crisp sound of something cracking in the mist which sounded like the glass was shattered. The mist’s form changed in some way shortly afterward. 2 huge shell shapes appeared faintly, and there were 2 faintly gleaming blue lights inside.

“My 3 clones of [Demonic Mirror Territory] are destroyed in an instant! What kind of existence is that?! He obviously is weak, but he has such a pure and terrifying power. It seems to be the origin of destruction…” The mist’s resentful voice sounded, “It’s all because of the imprisonment of this damn place. I can’t use the strongest power of the illusion kingdom at all! If only I can get the body and soul of the soul body… No! With that girl who has the soul body around, they will be able to detect my true whereabouts soon. I must transfer immediately!”

“It’s too late…”

A figure came from the mist ahead without warning. The mirage was taken aback. It quickly emitted a lot of mist and merged into the mist.

Before it could escape, it was surrounded by a terrifying force field. The mirage’s body could ignore ordinary physical attacks. However, this force field contained the origin power representing “Rule”. The mist rolled like it was electrocuted with just a touch at the edge. The place making the contact was buzzing.

“I have to say that this guy’s [Analytical Eyes] is really useful… Uh, I should say mine.” Chen Rui and the naga girl’s figures appeared in the sky. The nearby mist seemed to have disintegrated. It disappeared quickly, leaving only the thickest mirage mist in the center.

“A big clam shell? It turns out that this is the appearance of the mirage. Speaking of it, this image is a bit similar to the image of a certain myth in the original world of that guy.” Chen Rui commented leisurely as if he did not take the mirage to heart at all.

“Don’t be too arrogant!” The opponent’s contempt caused the mirage to roar in anger. A silhouette flashed in the mist, and a snake figure shot out like electricity, rushing straight toward Chen Rui.

“Sister!” Adeline had sensed this familiar figure which was the missing Strena.

At this time, Strena’s green eyes had turned blue. Her mind was obviously controlled by the mirage. The female naga warrior’s body was shining with golden light. The 6 scimitars in her hand turned into a dazzling flame intertwined into a fierce light net that wrapped toward Chen Rui. It was an all-out attack.

Chen Rui stretched his hands, and the space around his body began to twist irregularly. It contained a mysterious rhythm. One after another “cracks” began to appear in the space. The light net was sucked in as soon as it approached the cracks like a mud cow disappearing as it entered the sea. An even stranger thing happened. After a while, the light net appeared again in the crack and flew toward Strena.

Although Strena’s mind was controlled, her fighting instinct still existed. The 6 scimitars swayed into a halo at high speed, protecting her whole body. The moment the light net touched the halo, a crisp clanking sound was made at the same time. When the light dissipated, the figure of the female naga warrior was knocked back like a broken kite and plunged into the sea.

“Sister!” Adeline exclaimed.

“Don’t worry, she just fainted.” Chen Rui said. He ignored the girl who rushed to save her sister as he walked toward the mirage step by step from the sky, “Don’t attempt futile resistance. Surrender to me, and I can give you a chance to survive or even leave here.”

“Weak ant! You actually want me, a Demon Supremo level powerhouse, to surrender? In your dream!”

“You have been imprisoned here for many years and cannot get a soul power. Your strength has been greatly weakened. However, even if you can exert your full strength, that kind of illusion trick is just a joke to me.” Chen Rui shook his head, “You should be able to sense what my power represents.”

The mirage sneered, “It’s just a bit similar to origin power. Don’t tell me you are even a reincarnation of a god! Although you can restrain me, your strength is far worse than mine. If I make a desperate move, at best we will die together.”

“You don’t know my true strength at all.” Chen Rui smiled sensibly. There was already a black armor on his body. The shape of the armor was hideous and shimmering like a dark gemstone. The momentum of the entire person suddenly increased dozens of times. This power was manageable for the mirage, but the inexhaustible power of destruction in those blood-red eyes. made it dare not look directly at him.

Chen Rui, to be precise, Shura smiled indifferently, “Just in this state, your so-called dying together cannot be done. I know that you want to merge with the soul body to get rid of the imprisonment. This may be a kind of condition of the contract.”

The blue light in the 2 giant shells of the mirage glimmered, “Are you really willing to give me the soul body? But that girl must be completely voluntary. As long as she has a little resistance, I can’t merge perfectly.”

“For a believer, the highest faith can cover all thoughts.” Shura’s gaze turned to the girl in the sea below. Adeline had swum to the shore while holding Strena who was in a coma.

“You mean she’s already…” The mirage’s voice was obviously tempted, but it still cautiously said, “I can consider your conditions, but I want to merge with this soul body first.”

“Let’s do this. I’ll give in and sign an equality contract with you first. Lend me your [Manifestation] ability in your illusion talent to build… Uh, to complete something. Then, that girl is yours.”

“Just the illusion talent?” After getting the affirmative answer, the mirage looked at the naga girl below. Its 2 blue lights flashed a greedy light.

Adeline had rescued Strena ashore. Strena was attacked back by her own killing move. Her body was covered with scars of horrifying slashes. Her soul suffered a severe injury. She was still unconscious so far, but fortunately, it did not seem to be life-threatening. Adeline was helping Strena to heal the trauma when she suddenly felt that the surrounding scene changed drastically. The space previously seen in the “Aguile” spiritual world actually appeared.

In the faint mist, a bright starry sky looked extremely magnificent.

A figure appeared in the starry sky. It was another Chen Rui wearing a star-like armor. When he saw the other “self”, he immediately shouted, “Shura!”

“Very good! Mirage, your talent really surprised me!” Shura’s red eyes flashed with brilliance, “Now that girl is yours. Remember our contract, before I finish this thing, you must maintain this [Illusion Kingdom].”

The mirage’s 2 blue lights glimmered as it turned into a thick mist rolling toward Adeline below.

Chen Rui yelled and instantly appeared in front of the mirage. His hand turned into a blade and cut toward his head. However, Shura’s figure appeared in front of the mirage. The knife slashed on the blue protective shield. A crack appeared on the protective shield, but it did not break apart. Chen Rui was about to attack when a warning sign suddenly appeared behind him. He teleported away again. His original position was hit by 2 [Aurora Shots], and Shura was right behind him.

Once Chen Rui stood firm, a wave of stacking wave-like momentum in front of him had rushed toward his face. In the unavoidable situation, he could only forcefully resist it. His qi was shaken by the continuous momentum. If he was not familiar with the characteristics of the stacked momentum, he would be severely injured by this move.

All of a sudden, there were 3 Shuras surrounding him in a triangle shape.

“Aren’t you always feeling uneasy about me devouring the Wheel of Hera?” The 3 Shura laughed triumphantly at the same time, “I can tell you responsibly that your worries have become reality. Try the test of challenging your 3 selves. In this [Illusion Kingdom] that is separated from the Super System’s territory, you no longer have the “home advantage”. Maybe you can’t even beat 1…”

Underneath, the mist of the mirage had flown in front of Adeline. The naga girl’s dim gaze was a bit more sluggish than usual. She had no idea about the great danger that was coming. After the mirage confirmed that Adeline had no resistance, a thick mist spread, enveloping the girl.

TL: I previously thought Chen Rui was letting Shura out, but he actually lost control! Without the help of Super System, can Chen Rui fight against Shura?

chapters.title: Chapter 610 - Hope And Promise
chapters.body:
Chapter 610 - Hope And Promise

Chapter 610: Hope and Promise

“[Star Explosion]!” As Chen Rui’s roar sounded, the stars all over the sky seemed to be shattered.

Facing the powerful momentum, the 3 Shuras reacted differently. A large number of strange distortions and cracks appeared in the space around one of them, constantly absorbing the power of the explosion and reflecting them to cancel it; the other’s hand made ripples like water waves which continuously dissolved and transferred the huge explosive power around the body; the third Shura was shrouded in a protective shield, and a huge black hole appears in front of him. The shattered “stars” were devoured by the black hole. The aftermath only cracked the protective shield at most; it did not hurt the core at all.

“Haha!” The 3 Shura laughed together. “How does it feel to be resolved by your own skills? Wait, the space crack is not your skill! That is to say, I’m capable of whatever you know, but you are not capable of what I know. You don’t have any chance of winning unless… you can return to the [Galaxy Territory] of the Super System. Unfortunately, you can’t go back. This is the territory kingdom of the Wheel of Hera and the mirage. As long as I behead you, the ‘clone’, then I can become the real you! You may not give up resistance, but resistance is indeed futile.”

Chen Rui clenched his fists. He would never give up, but it was undeniable that he was indeed in a desperate situation at the moment. The 3 Shuras should be clones that were split using the Wheel of Hera, each of which was real. Besides [Demonic Flies Transformation] skill which required the God-Eating Mask, these clones could freely use all the skills of the Super System. Meanwhile, the unique ability of “retaliating with one’s own skill” was something he didn’t possess.

Chen Rui accidentally caught a glimpse of Adeline on the shore below. He saw the girl wrapped in thick mist. The mist rushed into the girl’s body at a speed visible to the naked eye. He was shocked, “Shura! What did you do to her!”

“This naga girl is infatuated with you. I just fulfilled her wish and made her believe in you more…” Shura showed a playful expression, “I forgot to tell you that the true strength of the Wheel of Hera is not creating clones; it’s stealing faith. I have thoroughly refined this magic weapon these days. What do you think? This is a vocabulary you can understand.”

“Is she controlled by the mirage now?”

“No, she just accepted the spiritual link. It’s just like being honored to be my first believer. This is the link I invented. It’s called the faith link. Your faith crystal is running out. I’m afraid that it won’t be enough for the next [Royal Star Transformation] if you want to cancel this link. However, you won’t have the next time.”

“As for this cute toy.” Shura stretched out a finger and shook it, “As a believer, she must pay for her faith. I gave her to the mirage as a reward for this manifested [Illusion Kingdom]. Unless you reach the 6-star evolution, otherwise it is impossible to stop or attack the mirage with your current strength. Also, forget about your lame trick of delaying time- Your [Star Explosion] just now is too weak. I’m fed up watching it. You shall now witness the true [Star Explosion]!”

Just after Shura finished speaking, Chen Rui’s body was surrounded by dark red and dark gold stars. The next second, the stars exploded with an extremely terrifying power as if the entire “universe” had collapsed. All the breath was flooded with a feeling: Destruction.

This destructive power was far above the [Star Explosion] activated by Chen Rui. At the moment when the dark stars burst, Chen Rui had already activated the [Star Diversion] skill. His arms rippled with 2 soft waves.

[Sonic Boom] sounded. As he flew back rapidly, the light on his palm quickly dissipated the power of the approaching [Star Explosion]. The 10-second time limit of [Star Diversion] passed immediately. The power of the [Star Explosion] was still there. A protective shield appeared on Chen Rui. The protective shield instantly turned into dust, but his teleportation was activated in time. He finally escaped out of the range of [Star Explosion].

Another Shura figure appeared in front of him instantly with an evil grin on, “You can’t run away… Try this [Star Explosion] now!”

A huge crisis came in the blink of an eye. Chen Rui’s body shattered apart in the terrifying [Star Explosion], but in fact, he was scattered into countless flies. It was exactly the God-Eating Mask’s [Demonic Flies Transformation].

The flies were not affected by the impact of the explosion, but this state couldn’t last long. After converging into a human form, he could only face the unstoppable [Star Explosion] again. At this time, Chen Rui’s protective shield or [Star Diversion] was no longer usable; even the number of teleports was used up. A large buckler with a simple pattern immediately appeared in his hand, protecting his body. The buckler suffered continuous shocks in the [Star Explosion]. Chen Rui’s entire body was knocked back. The mirror-like shield was unscathed. Although he was protected by the Demon Shield and Demon Shield could absorb a certain degree of damage and turn it into his own power, this full range of powerful explosions still caused Chen Rui’s internal organs to suffer serious injuries in the shake.

At this moment, the sudden warning signs and the display of the [Analytical Eyes] caused Chen Rui’s pupils to shrink suddenly. He heard a ghastly voice behind him that sounded, “[Star Explosion]!”

It was too late for Chen Rui to dodge. The 3 Shura’s [Star Explosion] were intertwined. Their power was not simply interstacked as the ground nearby became dust. Under the terrifying power, the sea water gushed up to hundreds of meters in height with a huge vacuum in the middle. The sea water actually couldn’t fall down.

The continuous explosion of stars finally ceased, and the sea surface gradually returned to normal. A little colorful light in the center lit up and recondensed into the figure of Chen Rui, but the star armor on his body had been cracked and deformed on a large scale. His entire person appeared extremely weak.

“Oh?” The Shura sneered, “It turns out that Zola’s amulet saved you, but unfortunately, your last life-saving straw is also used up. Just now you actually went all out to cancel Adeline’s spiritual link. At this time, you are still thinking about saving that cute girl. Such a fool. When I annihilate you, I will set up a tombstone for you in the [Galaxy Territory] of the Super System with the words ‘an otaku with universal love’ on it.”

Chen Rui panted while he quickly condensed the remaining power. After Shura devoured the Wheel of Hera, a terrifying change did occur. On the surface, both their level of strength was the same, but in terms of “quality”, Shura far surpassed Chen Rui. Furthermore, there were 3 Shuras!

I have used all my trump cards. The only threats are the 4 seasons’ territory, the Sword of Fallen Angel and [Scorching Dragon Kill]. In this case, it is almost impossible to eliminate 3 Shura at the same time, but I have no choice but to fight to death.

Shura saw through his thoughts, “Do you want to use the [Scorching Dragon Kill]? I have 3 people here, and your [Scorching Dragon Kill] can only destroy 1 at most… Hehe. I’m waiting for your choice; this will be your last choice in life.”

Just when Chen Rui was in a desperate situation, Adeline, whose link was canceled, suddenly regained her sanity. She immediately noticed the huge crisis that she and Chen Rui were in.

“You are… the mirage! Get out of my soul!” The girl showed a look of fear.

The mirage’s sinister laughter sounded, “It’s too late. My soul has basically merged with your soul. You are me. I’m you. Unless I die, even a Pseudo-God powerhouse cannot separate us.”

“No!” The girl tried her best to resist the invasion of the mirage’s soul.

“Don’t be afraid! Our fusion will only give you unexpected benefits!” The mirage’s words were full of temptation, “Didn’t you feel that your eyes can already see things? Your spirit power has been greatly extended. You will have my illusion talent…”

“Sir Aguile!” These words reminded Adeline. She screamed in panic while looking at Chen Rui who was in a critical situation in the sky.

“It’s useless. He is in my [Illusion Kingdom] now. You can hear his voice, but he can’t hear any of your voices.”

“Quickly cancel the [Illusion Kingdom]! I will promise you everything!”

The mirage sneered, “You are now under my control. Even your finger is controlled by my will. Who are you to make a request?”

Adeline desperately tried to move her body. No doubt, her soul and body seemed to be separated from each other; she couldn’t control her body at all.

“Stop resisting. There is only a little left, then we will be able to merge perfectly. You will gradually become a powerhouse with kingdom power by then to accomplish things that could only be done in your imagination previously!”

Before the mirage finished speaking, it felt that Adeline’s soul power was emitting a dazzling glow. Her body actually began to get out of its control, “You actually burned your soul power. Are you crazy?”

“You just said… unless I die?” Adeline controlled her body to take out an exquisite small dagger from her waist while holding back the pain of burning the soul.

Shura’s voice in mid-air sounded, “Do you still want to use the delay to restore your power? It’s useless. This is a manifested kingdom mixed with my destructive breath. You and I are originally 1. I’m here. Even if you use the [Star Gate], you can only go back and forth here.”

Adeline was shocked. The dagger in her hand was already pointing to her heart. This action shocked the mirage. It desperately tried to cut the connection between the girl’s soul and body, but the burning heat of the soul made it unable to restrain the girl’s soul, “Wait Wait! We can discuss it! It’s not that I don’t want to stop, but because I signed a contract with that guy, the [Illusion Kingdom] can’t stop at all!”

Adeline’s dagger was close to her heart, and the mirage quickly persuaded, “Don’t do this! We still have a way! I can let that Shura imprison him! No, no! Maybe I can let him escape…”

Adeline ignored his bewitching. The dagger had already penetrated her tulle, and the mirage was so horrified that powerful illusions surged out and turned into a voice of incomparable temptation, “You regained your eyesight after great difficulties. If you die, you will never see your sister… Not only your sister, but also this man. You will never see his smile again, you will never see his figure…”

The girl’s dagger trembled violently as tears in her eyes dripped. The mirage quickly continued to bewitch, “This man should have his own lover, but I can help you keep him and imprison him by your side so that he only loves you all his life. You can even…”

Before it finished speaking, it felt a chill in its heart as the dagger pierced through it firmly. The mirage suddenly let out a scream. The girl’s body began to overflow with the white mist frantically.

“Let me end it all. You don’t have any chance with 3 [Scorching Dragon Kill].” Shura’s voice sounded in 3 directions at the same time with Chen Rui who was seriously injured in the center.

At this moment, the entire starry sky suddenly became distorted and thin. The screams of the mirage could already be heard below. Shura frowned and saw Adeline lying on the ground with blood on her chest. He gritted his teeth, “The incompetent mirage can’t even control a girl! Trying to spoil my plan!”

Once the [Illusion Kingdom] disappeared completely, Shura would be forced to return to Chen Rui’s body. He immediately exhausted the last power. The 3 clones yelled at the same time, “[Scorching Dragon Kill]!”

The fierce and manic breath instantly flooded every corner of the space. The 3 huge Scorching Dragons exuded terrifying power breaths which surrounded in Chen Rui from 3 different directions. This kind of angle couldn’t be defended even with the Demon Shield. He had already used other skills like teleport, so he could only forcefully resist it. At the critical moment, a strange light flashed around Chen Rui which changed at an extremely fast speed. The sea below was sometimes hot and sometimes frozen. As the Scorching Dragon approached Chen Rui’s body, all the time seemed to stop.

“Boom!“

In the blink of an eye, the 3 Scorching Dragons had collided into each other. The entire Hidden Misty Island shook. Chen Rui’s body appeared outside the core range of the impact. Although the aftermath was still terrifying, it could not penetrate the defense of the Demon Shield.

“I’m not willing… I blame this useless thing!” Shura’s 3 bodies merged into 1 and glanced at the screaming mirage below. He took a deep breath and actually sucked all the overflowing white mist from Adeline’s body. Then, the entire [Illusion Kingdom] began to disappear quickly with Shura’s body.

The voice still faintly echoed, “This time is just the beginning. Soon, we will have a real battle…”

Chen Rui ignored the injuries on his body. His eyes were fixed on the girl lying in a pool of blood below. His mind shifted as he flew down.

The soul of the mirage seemed to be completely devoured by Shura. Adeline no longer had the breath of the mirage. Strena, who had been in a coma, also regained consciousness. Seeing her dying sister, she was shocked and wanted to help Adeline deal with her injuries, but the depth of that dagger made the female naga warrior’s heart sink completely.

“Sorry… Sister, I can’t… play the harp for you anymore.” The girl uttered these words with difficulty as her dull eyes began to dissipate.

“It’s all my fault! I shouldn’t be deceived by the enemy!” As Strena vaguely remembered the scene before she was deceived, tears flooded out; she no longer had her usual perserverance.

“Adeline…” Chen Rui’s star armor had disappeared as he landed on the ground half kneeling down. He stared deeply at the naga girl who was dying.

“Sorry, Sir Aguile…” A tear fell from the girl’s eyes. Her voice was extremely weak, “I just want to; in fact, I just want to…”

The girl finally didn’t say anything, even at this last moment.

There is no imprisonment; no life-long commitment.

I just want to be by your side.

Just that only.

“I understand.” Chen Rui gently stroked the girl’s wet hair. His tired eyes revealed gentleness, “As long as you want, you can accompany me by my side, as a friend, as a sibling or… if there is such a day.”

With that said, Chen Rui held a bottle of black potions in his hand, “You will see the castle in the sky with your own eyes. Your harp sound will make everyone intoxicated… This is my hope for you, and it is also a solemn promise.”

The girl’s already dim and nearly dissipated pupils suddenly brightened.

TL: Shura still isn’t dead? And he even absorbed mirage? Can Chen Rui reach the 6 stars evolution before facing Shura again?

chapters.title: Chapter 611 - The Nether Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 611 - The Nether Sea

Chapter 611: The Nether Sea

Destiny had always been unpredictable. When the naga girl took the initiative to accept the sea sacrifice imprint, she was already ready to die. She did not expect so many things to happen later. Maybe at the moment she encountered “Aguile” whom her sister Strena brought back, the trajectory of the wheel of fate began to change.

Chen Rui also didn’t expect that kind of bizarre change would occur after Adeline used the resurrection potion to rebirth. It should be because a considerable amount of power of the mirage’s [Illusion Kingdom] remained in the naga girl’s body. The advantage was that the girl suddenly had a huge amount of spirit power that could control the mist of the Hidden Misty Island and even create a powerful illusion like the mirage. Of course, she was not proficient in using it yet. The downside was that Adeline was affected by some special power and couldn’t leave the Hidden Misty Island even if she had the soul body that the mirage wanted to use in order to get rid of the imprisonment. This should be an aftereffect of the failure of the fusion – She inherited the “property” and also the “debt” at the same time.

Adeline was not depressed. After experiencing the test of life and death, the naga girl seemed to have grown a lot suddenly. Nothing was more important than helping “Aguile” out of danger and save the lives of her sister and companions.

“Don’t worry, there must be a way.”

From the previous encounter with King Octopus, Chen Rui could guess that the mirage and Red Pipit were both imprisoned by the Dark Dragon Emperor to guard the treasure. There must be a way to cancel the imprisonment in the Dark Dragon Emperor’s treasure.

Seeing Chen Rui’s determined eyes, Adeline lowered her head and nodded slightly. She felt a lot of peace in her heart.

“Now that you have become the new controller of the Hidden Misty Island, the nagas and the elementals’ illusion control should be canceled.” Chen Rui knew that there was an awkward emotion in Adeline’s heart, so he spoke up to resolve the awkward atmosphere. In fact, the naga girl was a little sister who needed care in his mind. He had no extra thoughts.

No doubt, when he mentioned this, Adeline’s expression became natural as she replied, “Those people and elementals have broken away from the illusion. They will be fine after a day of rest. In front of the Hidden Misty Island is the Nether Sea, also known as the ‘Dead Sea’. Unfortunately, there is no more news about the Dead Sea in my inherited memory.”

The name of the Dead Sea reminded Chen Rui of the “Salt Lake” in another world where nobody would drown. However, the “Dead Sea” here was definitely a dead place full of threats.

Adeline looked up at the mist-winding sky in the distance, “I felt something strange approaching the Hidden Misty Island from the eastern sky.”

In the sky? Chen Rui raised his eyebrows. Perhaps it is the King Royal Highness who threatened not to wait for me. By the way, the Dark Elemental King arrived at the right time. After everything was settled, he happened to appear.

Chen Rui’s guess was not wrong. It was precisely Dark Elemental King Hegel who came. But Hegel looked very haggard. His airship had been badly damaged. Many of his dark elementals suffered casualties. Seeing Chen Rui waiting for him at the Hidden Misty Island and seeing his embarrassing situation at a glance, Hegel’s heart was quite uncomfortable.

Hegel was attacked by a large number of powerful flying sea beasts in the air and was stuck in a bitter battle. He almost couldn’t reach here. The result of the battle of the Hidden Misty Island also made Hegel feel unbelievable. He stopped here last time and was defeated by the mirage’s [Illusion Kingdom]. Now, it was incredible that “Aguile” actually defeated that hidden powerhouse – No matter what method it was, victory meant victory. If Aguile could survive the Hidden Misty Island, Hegel had to admit that Aguile had surpassed his previous exploration, no matter if he depended on luck or strength.

After inquiring about what happened previously from the dark elementals that followed Chen Rui, the Dark Elemental King was silent for a moment before he spoke up, “I want to thank you for not giving up these dark elementals in the most dangerous moment. Although it can’t resolve our feud, I can promise in the name of dark elements that I will not activate any form of revenge against you in the entire area of the Dead Sea.”

It turns out that you are still thinking about ticks while looking for the fragment! Chen Rui mocked Hegel briefly in his mind, and he shrugged, “If the origin fragment of the dark element is not in the Hidden Misty Island, then we must move on. Now we only know that the sea area of the next stop is called the Nether Sea. It seems that there is still 1 powerful enemy, and the rest is unknown. Does Your Highness Hegel plan to continue on the airship?”

“The location of the origin fragment of the dark element should be in the depths of the sea, but my airship is no longer usable.” The Dark Elemental King frowned, “I still have a ship, plus the dark elementals whom you saved, we can be reorganized into 3 ships. We must pass this level.”

Chen Rui thought for a while, and he said, “Your Highness, to be honest, I have a treasure map which shows the location of the Dark Dragon Emperor’s treasure hundreds of thousands of years ago. It’s probably the same goal as the origin fragment that you are looking for. It is also related to 2 of my friends…”

At this stage, he certainly couldn’t hide the Dark Dragon Emperor’s treasure from Hegel. It was better to be honest. Especially after hearing Hegel’s words just now, Chen Rui had faintly grasped some of the Dark Elemental King’s personality.

Sure enough, Hegel interrupted him disdainfully, “Treasure? It’s nothing more than money or treasure. Such an stupid and ignorant values! Don’t you know that only your own power is the greatest wealth in this world? The glitzy fame and wealth you are chasing is worthless in the eyes of the Elemental King! I only want the origin fragment of the dark element and nothing else. If the 2 are not together, then I will not help you find the so-called treasure.”

“Of course! As for the treasure… As King Royal Highness said, we just have different values. So that’s it.” Chen Rui did not explain too much, and he said to Strena, “You stay and take care of Adeline. I will find a way to cancel her imprisonment.”

Strena pondered for a moment, and she asked Chen Rui sternly, “After this incident is over, do you plan to take her away?”

“If she wants to.” Chen Rui looked at the naga girl, “To be honest, she is not suitable for fighting even if she has the power of the mirage. Besides, I have given her the promise and hope. It will definitely come true.”

Strena took a deep look at Chen Rui, “Thank you. Then, let me go to the Nether Sea with you. Not just to help you find the treasure, but also for the destiny of the naga tribe. As for Adeline… I believe she can take care of herself even if she is alone.”

Adeline nodded to her sister. In fact, although she was still unable to skillfully manipulate the magic power left over from the mirage, she should be able to protect herself on the Hidden Misty Island with her current ability.

“So… take a rest for 2 days, then…” After the arrangements were made, Chen Rui, who had been holding back his fatigue, was unable to control the aftereffect of the [Royal Star Transformation]. He stood unsteadily and fell down. Strena quickly reacted and gave him a hand.

Strena carried Chen Rui immediately. She suddenly thought of something and glanced at Adeline with a strange expression, which met her sister’s knowing smile. The female naga warrior calmed down inexplicably. She carried Chen Rui who had fallen asleep toward the tent area.

2 days later, the Devil’s Snare Ship left the Hidden Misty Island with 3 big black ships. Under Adeline’s control, the mist in front of the ship team disappeared without a trace. The journey was unimpeded.

Strena didn’t look at her sister who waved goodbye to the shore, but she looked down at the scimitars in her hand which were the new weapon that Chen Rui had given her. They were sufficient to withstand the ultimate move of the “flame scimitars”. The slightly red eyes of the female naga warrior were reflected on the mirror-like scimitar surface.

A few days later, the 4 ships left the Hidden Misty Sea covered by mist and entered the Nether Sea that Adeline said. The color of the sea here was darker which looked like black at first glance, giving people a sense of horror.

The weather in the Nether Sea area was very bad. It was full of hurricanes, thunder and storms which was completely different from the Hidden Misty Sea before like it was 2 different worlds.

The body of the Dark Elemental King’s ship was made of a dark crystal which had a variety of strange effects. It should be a lifelong companion crystal of the dark elementals. Chen Rui visually observed that the value of this crystal was by no means under the expensive gold crystal. In fact, it was even more than that. These 3 ships alone were invaluable. No wonder King Royal Highness looked down on the “vain” treasures.

“Look! What is that?”

This was already the third day of entering the Nether Sea. The fleet finally encountered… a ship.

The speed of the fleet team gradually slowed down. With Chen Rui and Hegel’s eyesight, they could already see the ship clearly. Its appearance was relatively old. It seemed that no one was on the ship; it looked rather lifeless.

Strena noticed that the color of the water here was darker. It was impossible to see the situation in the water at all. Even spirit power could not penetrate through.

“Go closer to take a look!” Hegel’s voice reached the Devil’s Snare Ship. The 4 ships formed a semicircle as they gradually approached the ship.

As they approached the ship, the weaker nagas on the Devil’s Snare Ship all had an illusion like intangible pairs of eyes were staring at them out of thin air. Their backs subconsciously felt bursts of coolness. A strange sense of fear surged in their minds.

The fear quickly dissipated. Hegel’s voice sounded, “Hmph! Ignorant thing. You actually dare to show off [Terror] in front of the dark elementals! Shoot at them. No matter what it is, blast it to pieces!”

The 3 black ships launched cannon attacks together, and the ship was shot all over. It soon sank into the sea.

“Left full rudder! Quick!” Chen Rui suddenly shouted, “Hegel! Watch out for the water!”

Almost at the same time, several huge things suddenly appeared on the surface of the water without warning. A black ship of the Dark Elemental King did not manage to dodge. The whole ship was overturned by the emerging thing. Fortunately, the ship of the dark elementals was extraordinary. It flew unsteadily in the air for a while before it landed on the water. It was just that some of the sailors in it swayed and plunged into the water.

Those things that emerged were actually large ships. After they emerged from the water, the side cannons on both sides of the ships began to drain quickly. These ships were covered with seaweed and other foreign objects. It was as if they had been sunk on the seabed for many years, and were awakened by Hegel’s cannon attacks!

The ship was no longer empty. After seeing the sailors, Chen Rui’s eyes flashed with surprises. He finally understood the meaning of King Octopus’ “fearless”. No wonder it is also called “dead sea”. It turns out that these sailors are all undead beings!

The ship of the undead!

chapters.title: Chapter 612 - Naval Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 612 - Naval Battle

Chapter 612: Naval Battle

The overall design of the ships of this world, especially the large ships, were relatively close to the Spanish sail ships in Chen Rui’s impression although they included magic elements. The main firing equipment was the main cannons at the front and back as well as several rows of side cannons.

The 2 undead ships that emerged from the water appeared on both sides of the dark element ship, sandwiching it. The corresponding side cannon doors opened together, and rows of black cannons quickly stretched out. “Boom boom boom…”

With such a close distance and such violent cannon attacks, if it were a naval battle on the earth, this round of violent bombing was already issuing a death notice to the dark element ship. However, this was the Demon Realm. After the dark element ship suffered a few shots, the hundreds of diamond-shaped objects on both sides that seemed to be decorations began to swell quickly, forming 2 huge crystal protection wings like 2 shields. The next cannon bombing of the undead ships only left a lot of cracks on the wings. They were unable to defeat this layer of protection.

After a round of cannon attacks, the side cannons of the 2 undead ships stopped the cannon attacks due to the cooling of the cannon energy crystals. At this time, the protection wings split into a diamond shape and quickly retracted the ship body, then both sides of the dark element ships’ 6 cannon doors shot at the same time. Wisps of dark golden lights enveloping the black electric lights shot toward the enemy’s ships.

The 2 undead ships did not have the special protection capabilities like the dark element ships. Meanwhile, the power of the dark element ships’ cannon attacks was quite astonishing which was far better than the general side cannons. Even the Devil’s Snare Ship was inferior to it. The debris flew as the 2 enemy ships were torn apart.

The body of the undead ship on the left was the most severely damaged. The ship’s body was almost completely torn apart. Many undead sailors were broken into pieces in the cannon attacks, and many fell into the water. The whole ship began to sink at a speed visible to the naked eye. The ship on the right was slightly better. It dragged its remaining body obliquely to slam toward the dark element ship in an attempt to perish together. It was just that those enemies were dead creatures manipulated by a mysterious necromancer, so there was no morale at all. There was no fear or heroism at all.

The dark element ship’s side cannons once again showed great power. The undead ship was bombarded as it approached and it nearly collapsed. The diamond-shaped protection wings on the side changed again and turned sideways. It turned into a huge blade and cut straight into the broken body of the undead ship. With the momentum of the ship sailing forward, it gave the undead ship the final fatal blow.

Chen Rui was stunned to see this scene: Transformation? Cybertron? It does have the vibe, right?

The shattered undead ship followed the footsteps of the previous ship. The undead sank to the bottom of the sea before they had time to jump out for melee combat.

The scene where the dark element ships quickly defeated the undead ship proved the strength of the dark elementals’ ship. Even the Devil’s Snare Ship could only be envious of the “Cybertron” functions. However, Chen Rui was not in the envious mood now because an undead ship had emerged in close distance from the side and rear of the Devil’s Snare Ship. If he hadn’t ordered the left full rudder urgently just now, the tail of the ship would have been hit by the undead ship.

Countless ropes were swayed from the mast of the undead ship. Strings of figures hung on it and leaped toward the Devil’s Snare Ship using the inertial power. The deck of the Devil’s Snare Ship shook and swayed slightly. Dozens of figures had landed; all of which were craggy bones. Most of these skeletons were very different from what Chen Rui saw from Guradam. They were basically the skeletons of the sea tribe, and many of them were the naga tribe. Those multi-armed snake skeletons made Strena’s eyes red. With a shout of grief, she led the nagas tribe to face them.

These nagas should all be the victims of the sea sacrifice. Although they were not high combat power groups, the naga tribe was a fighting tribe after all. Their strength had basically reached the Higher Demon which was stronger than the skeleton nagas. After days of training by Strena, both their mental outlook and overall combat capability had greatly improved. In addition, equipped with the sophisticated weapons and armors provided by Chen Rui, their combat power was far from greater than the previous Black Sea sacrifices.

Under the command of Strena, the nagas formed a half-moon battle formation and rushed toward the invading undead nagas. The special snake body coordination ability and sea combat ability made them basically not affected by the swaying deck. When the half-moon formation launched a sharp cold light, the skeleton army was shattered. These undead soldiers who had jumped over were quickly cleared out. While Strena was eliminating the skeletons, Chen Rui had quickly ordered the sandmen to control the Devil’s Snare Ship to pull apart the distance. Those undeads who tried to help by jumping over with the rope fell into the water.

The Devil’s Snare Ship quickly turned the ship around. The side cannon doors opened, and rows of special cannons appeared.

Because the improved magic crystal cannons consumed a lot of energy and had a long cooling time, they were not equipped in the side cannons of the Devil’s Snare Ship, but Tetenis also took pains to design. This side cannon was a 3-barreled cannon which was similar in appearance to the revolver machine gun of Chen Rui’s other world. When it was launched, it rotated to shoot in turn which was equivalent to an automatic 3-shot. When the third cannon was launched, the first barrel had been basically cooled by the magic circle and magic crystal. It shot in 3 stages in 1 round, and it could quickly restart the second round. When the “excess” heat accumulated to a dangerous level, then only it must stop to cool down for a long period of time.

Although it was inferior to the dark golden energy of the dark element ships in terms of power, the launch frequency of the 3-barreled cannon was very fast. The continuous damaging power was particularly terrifying. It could quickly destroy the enemy equipment and combat power.

As soon as the side cannons of the undead ship were opened, the 3-barreled cannon of the Devil’s Snare Ship began to fire. In the sound of the bombing, dozens of huge holes appeared on to the undead ship immediately, and these holes were still increasing and expanding rapidly. Soon, the ruined undead ship sank.

The 3 dark element ships had finished off their opponents. The power of the cannon especially in the main ship where the Dark Elemental King was located was especially fierce. It had destroyed the enemies who wanted to approach to attack without Hegel making a move.

Just after taking a breath, the thunder suddenly flashed in the sky, and it began to rain heavily. The rain not only interfered with the battle to a certain extent, but the most important thing was that the sight and the power of the cannon were affected. More than a dozen undead ships appeared in the nearby sea.

The dark element ships at the front were attacked from both sides. The protection wings on the left were completely shattered. A large undead ship released planks with hooks to buckle the dark element ships. One after another undead boarded the dark element ships via the planks and the ropes of the mast.

The commander on this ship was the elite dark elemental, Hesak of the early stage of the Demon Emperor. He ordered the dark elementals to charge toward the enemy. However, the strength of the undead on the large undead ship was significantly stronger than those destroyed by the Devil’s Snare Ship. It should be an advanced undead. Although the dark elementals were completely immune to the terror breath released by the undead, the “hate” characteristic of the dark elementals which drove the enemies crazy had no effect on the undead. Both sides got into a fierce battle for a while.

The combat power of dark elementals was much higher than that of the undead. But undead fights are not afraid of death at all. Moreover, the rain in the sky seemed to have a special effect on the undead as if their vigor had doubled for no reason.

When the battle situation was in a stalemate, the undead ship didn’t care about their own people who were still in the battle and directly launched a cannon bomb on the dark element ships. In this case, the dark elementals inevitably began to have more and more casualties. Hesak did his best to lead the dark elementals to kill all the undead that boarded the ship and destroy the large undead ship.

Hegel, who sensed the continuous death of the dark elementals, let out a furious roar. 3 black clouds floated out of the dark element main ship, covering the 3 surrounding undead ships. These 3 ships just launched cannon attacks on the dark element main ship, but they did not cause much damage to the target. The speed of the floating black clouds was extremely fast. In the blink of an eye, they had already shrouded the 3 ships. Only the whirring and clashing sounds were heard endlessly. After a while, the black clouds gradually faded. The 3 large sea ships were burnt. They turned into black powder that scattered into the sea. None of the undead on the ship was spared.

In terms of status, the Dark Elemental King was exactly at the optimal stage which absolutely surpassed the Earth Elemental King who was still “digesting” the element imprint; in terms of the characteristics of elements, the offensiveness of dark elementals far exceeded the earth elementals who were good at defense. Furthermore, Elemental King was able to freely manipulate and launch origin power. He could send out terrifying attacks with every move, so Hegel’s combat power was still above Moore. He completely annihilated the 3 powerful undead ships in an instant.

The 4 ships cleared out these 10 undead ships with great difficulty. Both ships and sailors suffered some damages.

Chen Rui ordered the sandmen to bring the Devil’s Snare Ship closer to the dark element main ship. He gathered his power to ask the Dark Elemental King, “This is not the way to go. I don’t know how many enemies there are. Your Highness Hegel, can your spirit power penetrate into the deep sea to sense the traces of the enemy?”

“Didn’t you call me Hegel just now?” The Dark Elemental King sneered. The dark elementals’ hatred of petty things made Chen Rui complain in secret for a while, but the king still gave the answer, “This sea area is weird, My spirit sensing is limited to within 100 meters, and it is constantly disturbed by some kind of external force. I can feel that the location of the origin fragment should be relatively close. Perhaps it is in this Nether Sea, but I can’t sense the specific location. Most probably it is affected by the power of a certain powerhouse’s kingdom.”

The origin fragment is in the Nether Sea? Chen Rui thought. He took out the treasure map and shouted, “Dodo!”

The slime, who had been hiding and turned into a banner in the mast observation deck during the battle, immediately “resurrected”. He squirmed down from the mast. Before landing, his voice suddenly trembled, “Master, front, front…”

Large areas of unusual undulations began to appear in the distant sea. As expected, one after another undead ship emerged from the water. 10, 20… and more. In the blink of an eye, at least hundreds of ships appeared, and the number was still increasing.

This was no longer a mere trifle, but a huge fleet of the undead. Based on the kind of combat power just now, Chen Rui was definitely not an opponent. If the enemy ships fired altogether, the 4 ships could be blasted into honeycomb briquettes. Even if powerhouses such as Chen Rui and Hegel could escape by chance, just by flying was not sustainable on this endless sea where there was no land at all. The sinking of the ship basically declared failure and death.

There was also a mysterious territory kingdom powerhouse in the Nether Sea. It would likely be difficult for even the Dark Elemental King to survive, let alone the nagas and ordinary elementals. Chen Rui had the last choice that was to use the [Star Gate] to escape back to the Deep Blue Palace of the water elementals. However, that would mean he gave up all his companions who were fighting together here, and he also gave up the only hope of curing Isabella.

The undead fleet formed a fan shape and began to move toward this side. The speed was not very fast, but it gave people a kind of terrifying pressure as if watching death approaching. Before the huge ship, countless small ships carrying lots of soldiers were released. The target was naturally the 4 ships on Chen Rui’s side.

These sampans were obviously used for melee combat missions. It seemed that the enemy still had an attempt to capture them alive. In this situation, Chen Rui couldn’t cope with it no matter how quick-thinking he was. At this time, Hegel’s voice reached his ears, “Help me delay! At least 10 minutes!”

Chen Rui had no time to ask or guess what Hegel would use to solve the immediate crisis. Since they were in the same boat now, they could only trust each other. He immediately commanded, “Main cannon ready!”

The magic crystal cannon at the ship’s head immediately began to gather energy. Following Chen Rui’s command, a strong white beam of light was launched. Although the distance of the undead fleet was far beyond the normal range of cannon attacks, the cannon of the Devil’s Snare Ship couldn’t be described by the word “typical”. The undead ship at the front was shot by the white light and was torn apart by terrifying energy in an instant.

Wherever the light beam went, the sailors and facilities all turned into particles and dissipated. The light beam did not stop after destroying the undead ship. It swept to the next ship, but its power was obviously weakened. It only cut the ship into half, but it also made the ship lose its balance and gradually sink into the sea.

This attack destroyed the 2 large ships of the enemy. It stood to reason that the morale of the other party should be greatly weakened. Unfortunately, those were undead. There was no panic, no fear, no mood swings, but just dead silence as they continued the rhythm of coming forward.

In the small battle just now, the Devil’s Snare Ship did not use the main cannon due to the distance of the attack. This improved magic crystal cannon surprised Hegel slightly, then he continued to prepare.

“Turn the ship! Prepare the main cannon at the tail of the ship!” Chen Rui commanded loudly. Although the momentum of the attack just now was astonishing, the cooling time of the main cannon was the biggest flaw. Once the opponent’s huge fleet approached the range to use cannon attacks, then the Devil’s Snare Ship had only 1 end, the disaster of extinction.

Just as the Devil’s Snare Ship was turning around, Chen Rui saw that the 3 damaged dark element ships already gathered together, emitting a strange light. He didn’t know what were they preparing.

I hope Hegel really has a surprising way to win. Now time is life, I must persist for 10 minutes.

Chen Rui gritted his teeth, “Second mate, pay attention to the rudder. Immediately fire the main cannon at the tail after turning the head of the ship! The side cannon deals with the approaching sampans! Strena, prepare to attack with me!”

TL: What Hegel is preparing? Can he demolish the fleet in an instant?

chapters.title: Chapter 613 - Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle
chapters.body:
Chapter 613 - Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle

Chapter 613: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle

The main cannon at the end of the Devil’s Snare Ship emitted a bright white light. The sandmen cannoneer became very skilled in controlling the energy and time of this magic crystal cannon. In the blink of an eye, 2 more undead ships were annihilated.

However, for the number of undead fleets, this attack was just a drop in the bucket. After the 2 main cannon shots, the magic crystal cannon entered a cooling period and couldn’t fire temporarily. 2 figures flew out of the Devil’s Snare Ship toward the dense fleet in the storm. It was precisely Strena and Chen Rui.

Strena wore a new set of dark silver armor which was carefully created with materials such as magic immunity mithril and star sand. The weight was much lighter than imagined. It not only had amazing defense power, but it would also increase attack speed, reduce magic damage, and greatly enhance the speed of stamina recovery. Although this armor was only a quasi-legendary grade, the 3 attributes were the most needed for the naga tribe. It could perform beyond the general legendary grade equipment.

What made Strena even more surprised was that the shape of this armor was also tailored for the naga tribe. Except for the arm part, even the relatively weak parts of the lower snake body are better protected. The same is true for the excellent grade armor of those naga warriors. I really don’t know how Sir Captain, who usually only enters the ship cabin for a few hours, completes so many sets of customized equipment.

Of course Strena didn’t know. Those few hours were actually equivalent to a few days or even dozens of days after the Super System was linked to the Time Rule. However, these armors were originally prepared for the medusa legion. Apart from the one on Strena, the rest didn’t take much effort. He just had to modify the arm part and size a bit. The real time-consuming one was the 6 golden scimitars of Strena. These 6 scimitars were a set. In addition to the original special effects such as armor piercing, tearing wounds and attribute attacks, the 6 scimitars could double the damage and fully withstand Strena’s [Flame Territory] at the same time. Otherwise, her weapons would melt and she would become unarmed every time the skill was finished. This was the weapon that was truly tailored for Strena which had reached the legendary quality. It was named ‘Rage Incineration’.

Strena was now holding Rage Incineration in her hands. She passed by the sampans and rushed directly to the undead ship in front. The 6 golden lights in her hands draw countless dazzling arcs like lightning that tears the sky apart in a torrential rain. As the golden lightning passed by, the 3 huge masts broke down and fell on the ship; the fractures were charred. It was the additional fire attribute attack effect of the ‘Rage Incineration’. Once the mast of the huge ship broke, her speed suddenly slowed down. The undeads who were buffed up under the buff of the special power of the heavy rain swarmed to her.

Strena’s green eyes suddenly turned golden. The 6 scimitars all burned into red flames. The entire ship was filled with crisscross sharp qi. The storm in the sky was dispersed. The undead ship instantly turned into a world of flames. The undeads were disintegrated into countless charred fragments. They slowly sank with the entire ship that was also on fire.

Despite the powerful weapons and armor given by Chen Rui, this move still consumed a considerable amount of power of the female naga warrior. Nonetheless, this time was the critical juncture to buy time, so Strena did not hold back her stamina. As her snake tail shook, she rose into the air and flew toward the ship behind.

As soon as Strena rose into the sky, she suddenly felt that there was a fierce and hot berserk breath in the damp and cold air. She saw a red scorching light on the sea below; a red winding huge beast roared out through it. Everywhere it went, the sampans and the undead turned into ashes. The sea water rolled back one after another.

Strena once saw Chen Rui use this kind of ‘huge beast’ attack against the demonic shark swarm in the Black Sea, but this huge beast actually rushed toward himself after going around in a circle.

The answer was quickly revealed. The huge Scorching Dragon merged with the figure burning with black flame. The sea water twisted and boiled under the powerful red power. The black flame turned red as the amazing power gradually merged with the figure. Only then, the boiling and vortex of the sea calmed down.

[Scorching Dragon Possession].

Because [Royal Star Transformation] and [Scorching Dragon Possession] were not compatible, Chen Rui rarely activated this skill normally. He used a lot of faith crystals previously to cancel Shura’s contract on Adeline. Now, he couldn’t activate the [Royal Star Transformation] with the remaining number. Therefore, when he activated it now, the [Scorching Dragon Possession] could be advanced to the early stage of the Demon Overlord combat power based on his original status at the peak stage of the Demon Emperor.

The turbulent waves caused by the circling Scorching Dragon overturned the sampans in this area. Even the approaching undead ships were slowed down due to the blocking of the waves. However, no matter if their comrades were sunk or destroyed, the rest of the undead ships sailed forward rhythmically and blindly and continued to sail forward.

The top priority now was to buy time for the Dark Elemental King, so Chen Rui’s tactics were very targeted. He did not directly destroy the ships, but he used the power of the sea to block the ships. Strena was quick-witted as she immediately realized this, but her melee combat characteristics were not suitable for the main attack, so she changed her tactics to match his actions.

The vortex jointly created by both of them effectively blocked the advancement of the fleet, but the undead ships were not ordinary ships. As long as they were not destroyed, even if they overturned and sunk into the seabed, they could still emerge without being affected.

The storm in the sky became more and more intense. The rain not only strengthened the fleet further, but it also made Chen Rui and Strena feel intensely uncomfortable. Whether it was the power channeling in their bodies or the use of moves, they felt restricted and required several times more strength than usual.

The foremost undead fleet had already begun to launch cannon attacks, not against Chen Rui, but against the Devil’s Snare Ship and dark element ships. Chen Rui rose into the sky and caught a glimpse of the 3 dark element ships combining together. The form was undergoing tremendous changes, and it had reached the final juncture. He immediately made up his mind. The power of [Scorching Dragon Possession] was burned to the limit, and a huge black hole appeared above the sea. In an instant, a large amount of sea water, sampans, undead ships, and the rainwater carrying strange power in the sky, were all sucked into the black hole.

After a while, the strength and speed of the black hole’s devour gradually slowed down. There was still a big gap between the effects of [Scorching Dragon Possession] and [Royal Star Transformation]. Obviously, it was strongly interfered with by the territory kingdom power of the other party. Not only that, [Star Devouring], which had not absorbed most of the power previously, soon showed an overflow warning.

At this time, the shout of the Dark Elemental King finally came. Chen Rui ended [Star Devouring] immediately and signaled Strena to fly back together. The 3 dark element ships had transformed into a huge form which was actually the shape of a turtle.

Chen Rui stared at this turtle with a strange expression- Transformers and…Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle?

I risked my life on the front line for 10 minutes just to let Hegel, no, the great Your Highness Hegel make this ‘secret weapon’?

“You don’t need to be too amazed. It’s just a trivial skill for the dark elementals.” Hegel smiled proudly, “Ask your people to abandon the ship immediately and come to my Dark God Ship!”

Who is amazed? Chen Rui was quite speechless about the Dark Elemental King’s understanding ability, but it was obviously not the time to complain. He immediately ordered the Devil’s Snare Ship to come closer. Then, they quickly used the sampan sling to transfer to what Chen Rui perceived as the strange Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship. Following that, Chen Rui waved his hand, and the entire Devil’s Snare Ship disappeared.

Space ability? The surprised red light in Hegel’s eyes flashed slightly. After Chen Rui flew into the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship, he spread his hands and the 2 winged tortoise shells began to slowly close up and merge layer by layer. The entire ship’s body suddenly became pitch dark.

Next, there was a slight sense of zero-gravity like they were in an elevator. It felt like everything from the outside world was isolated; even the sound of cannon attacks exploding in the nearby waters could not be heard.
