The darkness only lasted for a while. Soon, a blue light lit up. At the same time, 5 huge crystal balls appeared on the 4 sides and the center. The crystal ball on all sides showed the situation in 4 directions while the crystal ball in the center was an image similar to a holographic image.

Seeing the scenes shown in those crystal balls, Chen Rui suddenly reacted with a really amazed expression on his face- Submarine?

I don’t feel suffocated in this. The solution to this problem is already “scientific” enough. Recalling the airship that Chen Rui had seen before, he finally looked at the Dark Elemental King, whom he had always prejudiced against, in a different gaze. He lowered his head, “Your Highness, maybe we will still be enemies in the future if we are unlucky. But now I have to praise you from the bottom of my heart that this is really an amazing creation.”

Facing the ‘enemy’s’ heartfelt admiration, even Hegel inevitably showed a proud expression, “This is nothing. The dark elementals can surprise you more than that.”

The outer shell of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship was very hard and could resist all kinds of attacks. Its head and limbs could be stretched in and out. It could also emit a light beam for illumination. The main center part was made of a special water element crystal gifted by the Water Elemental King which enabled the Dark God Ship to use organs similar to ‘gills’ to transform the water energy to provide breathing and propulsion power as well as freely move up or down like many deep-sea creatures.

After briefly showing off the characteristics of the Dark God Ship, Hegel proudly said, “The enemy’s advantage is the quantity and firepower of the sea fleet, but this is the bottom of the water. Even if they can sink in the water like us, those cannons cannot unleash their power.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “Yes, we can also use a torpedo to destroy the enemy!”

“Torpedo? Destroy the enemy?”

Hegel frowned, “What magic weapon is that?”

“It’s… “energy cannons” that can be launched underwater to explode.” Chen Rui was taken aback, “Could it be there is no such thing on the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle… Uh, the Dark God Ship?”

“An explosive power in the water? Are you fooling me?” Hegel’s face was gloomy, “I’m the Dark Elemental King, not the Water Elemental King!”

“…”

Chen Rui really wanted to say that this was a scientific problem, and it had nothing to do with the Elemental King of any attribute, but he didn’t understand the torpedo himself. In this indeed unscientific world, he really couldn’t explain too much.

“So are there any weapons to attack the enemy?”

“There is a hatch here from the left.”

“Is there a cannon station or the…harpoon launch pad there?” Chen Rui had already greatly reduced the scientific degree of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship in his mind.

“There is a fighting exit. If you want, you can go out and fight against the enemy under the water.”

“…”

Chen Rui finally understood. After working for a long time, this is still a kind turtle. There is no weapon to attack at all?

TL: 🤣🤣🤣, it should be a stubborn turtle that doesn’t want to attack in the water.

chapters.title: Chapter 614 - Deep Sea And Getting Close
chapters.body:
Chapter 614 - Deep Sea And Getting Close

The Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship is indeed worthy of the name of ‘ninja’. There is actually no attack weapon. Judging from the offensiveness of the dark elementals, the key to this problem is technical. In an underwater environment, a cannon is definitely not usable including the dark golden ‘cannon bombs’ in the dark element ships.

After Chen Rui and the others dived into the seabed, the undead ships on the sea were really helpless. Although ‘Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship’’ was just a tortoise, its depth and underwater speed were quite commendable. The undead ship which could not sink into the seabed was not comparable to it at all. They got rid of the scope of the undead fleet soon.

Chen Rui was not idle either. The dark elementals and the sailors of the Devil’s Snare Ship had suffered heavy casualties in previous battles. He was busy treating the wounded. The healing potion was useless for the elementals, but one of Chen Rui’s items played a big role, that was the Yuan Recovery Tree.

Yuan Recovery Tree——Attribute: Healing, fixed timing. Restores the stamina and magic power within the range of healing. The function can be timed; the longest life span is one month.

For the dark elementals, the magic power of the Yuan Recovery Tree was much better than the healing magic effect of the water elementals. Even the dark elementals that had been severely injured received unexpected healing and recovery effects.

Regardless of any grudges and grievances, everyone was really in the same boat now. Hegel’s hostility toward Chen Rui had also eased a lot unconsciously.

Chen Rui asked, “Your Highness Hegel, can you sense the direction of the origin fragment in this environment?”

“At the Hidden Misty Island, I still had a strong sense of the origin fragment. But just after entering the range of the Nether Sea. Sometimes I feel close at hand, and sometimes I feel that it’s far away.” Hegel’s tone was solemn, “Up to now, we are still under the monitoring and interference of a certain person behind the scene even if we sink to this depth of the sea. This invisible opponent is the most difficult to deal with. Moreover, our energy and combat power are not infinite. Once we are exhausted, I’m not sure whether we can escape alive.”

“Dodo.” Chen Rui called and took out the treasure map. The slime immediately turned into a glasses helmet. The golden light dot on the treasure map had been closer than when they first entered the Nether Sea, but the current direction seemed to start to deviate.

“Your Highness Hegel, in this situation, I can say that the treasure and the origin fragment must be closely related. Or the 2 are in the same place. Since your sensing has been unable to determine the location, shall we advance according to this map’s instructions? If you arrive at the treasure location, but there is no origin fragment that Your Highness needs, then it’s not too late for us to look for other locations.”

Hegel glanced at the treasure map in Chen Rui’s hand, then he glanced at the strange “helmet” and he finally nodded.

The Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship began to change course and dived toward the spot marked on the map.

As time passed, 3 days have unconsciously passed.

The Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship had a lot of space. With sufficient oxygen supply, food provided in Chen Rui’s storage space and the Yuan Recovery Tree function, the nagas have recovered well from their injuries. Dodo finally could feast relaxedly, but this was the bottom of the sea where they couldn’t feel day and night. They could only calculate the time by estimation.

Perhaps due to a coincidence, the monitoring of the crystal ball didn’t spot a living creature in the sea during this journey. This was somewhat similar to the situation on the Hidden Misty Island. The reason for the Hidden Misty Island was that all animals except plants had been sucked up by the mirage. But the Hidden Misty Island was just an island. In contrast, in such a large area of the Nether Sea area, it was quite creepy when there was no sea creature or fish or shrimp.

Just as Chen Rui walked out of the magic tent after waking up, there was a violent shake. Even the light of the nearby magic lamp began to flicker. The nagas and elementals all showed vigilant expressions. Soon, another shake came as if the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship was struck by something.

A black smoke came and turned into a dark elemental figure, “Sir Aguile, His Highness Hegel invites you to go to the command cabin immediately.”

Chen Rui hurriedly walked toward the command cabin. Strena and others followed closely. There was constant shaking along the way. In the command cabin, Chen Rui saw Hegel with a solemn face, “We are attacked by the enemy and we must take action immediately.”

Chen Rui’s gaze turned to the 5 crystal balls. Judging from the images displayed by the crystal balls, there seemed to be a lot of enemies. The enemies’ visual information that vaguely appeared in the illumination actually had long bodies; they violently hit against the Dark God Ship.

“They could not break the defense of the Dark God Ship for a while, but we can’t continue like this. Once the important systems are destroyed, most of the sailors here are in danger of being buried on the seabed.” Hegel’s gaze was fixed on Chen Rui, “You lead a group of people to go out of the combat hatch immediately. Eliminate these enemies as quickly as possible.”

If Chen Rui had just entered the Dark God Ship, he would definitely think that Hegel was using him to kill others, but now he already knew that the Dark God Ship was controlled by the Dark Elemental King’s personal will, so Hegel was equivalent to this “submarine’s” core power and controller. His every movement would affect the whole ship. It was really not suitable for him to fight personally especially in this kind of deep sea environment.

Thinking of this, Chen Rui nodded without scruples, “Okay.”

“I’ll go with you.” Strena spoke up. The water elementals and the nagas on the side also expressed their willingness to go together. Considering the deep sea and strength issues, Strena did not agree with the nagas to go out.

“Your Highness, you should ask him to hand over that treasure map before going.” The elite dark elemental, Helor, suddenly interjected. This intention was obviously unusual.

Chen Rui’s eyes finally narrowed this time. He just looked at Hegel without saying anything.

“Helor!” Hegel snorted as a red light flickered in his eyes as if shooting at Helor, “Do you think your power can already surpass my will?”

Helor didn’t dare to look at him directly. He quickly bowed and said, “Your Highness, I didn’t mean that, but…”

“Great, then you go with them.” A cold red light flashed in Hegel’s eyes.

Helor struggled for a moment, but he didn’t justify or resist. He saluted, “Yes.”

The water elementals gave Chen Rui and Strena 2 seaweeds, ” This is the gillyweed. After eating, it is equivalent to the magic of underwater breathing. It can last for up to 3 hours. Please pay attention to the time limit.”

“This is the deep sea. Compared with the enemy, the water pressure is also an enemy that cannot be ignored.” Strena kindly reminded Chen Rui, “The bones and muscles of the naga tribe can change accordingly. We have a particularly flexible characteristic that maintains the body’s balance of internal and external pressures, but this state is not sustainable. The body of ordinary demons is even more unsuitable for this environment. You must be careful later. Find ways to return to the ship if you can’t take it.”

I’m a human, not a “demon”. Chen Rui corrected Strena’s sentence in his heart and nodded to express his understanding. A group of people came to the battle exit which was a one-way magic entrance. Unless there was Hegel’s will, one could not enter from the outside.

The water elementals jumped out first. This kind of deep sea had the least effect on the water elementals. Instead, it was the best environment for them to unleash the water element power. Strena jumped out afterward. The flexible snake body was like a rudder in the water that could easily control the movement of the body. Sometimes, it could also play a role in binding and so on.

Chen Rui ate the gillyweed given by the water elementals. He felt that some strange things seemed to grow on his cheeks. It opened and closed like the gills of a real fish.

Chen Rui glanced lightly at the elite dark elemental, Helor, whose gaze was full of hostility, then he jumped out of the exit. As soon as he entered the water, his first feeling was that he was under a lot of pressure, and his second feeling was that his cheeks began to breathe incredibly in the water just like in the training ground.

That’s right. It was the deep-sea environment training ground of the Super System. In fact, Chen Rui was very familiar with the deep-sea environment.

It could be seen from the light of the Dark God Ship that the huge enemies swimming and attacking around were actually sea demonic beasts’ skeletons. There was a faint green color on them- They are the undead creatures indeed!

In the [Analytical Eyes], the lowest strength of these undeads was the Great Demon King level. The highest was the early stage of the Demon Overlord. However, the strength shown by the data was not equivalent to the real effect in this kind of underwater battle. Once this Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle was breached, even the Dark Elemental King of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord would be in danger of life, let alone the sailors on the ship.

The attack power displayed by Strena was much lower in underwater as her power and speed were greatly restricted by the resistance of water. The scimitars of the fire attribute couldn’t exert their due power. However, the female naga warrior had abundant combat experience. Using the sharpness of the scimitars, she finally cut off a huge sea beast’s head after a few slashes.

In contrast, the dark element power of the elite dark elemental, Helor appeared to be stretched out in this combat environment. He could only barely deal with the undead sea beast. Although the water elementals were “like a fish in water”, they could only use magic to restrict and slow down the enemy’s attack because their strength was too weak.

Chen Rui took a deep breath and felt the wonderful taste of really breathing in the water. The power in his body quickly condensed. Circles of faint ripples began to ripple from his fist.

The quasi-artifact “Thunderous Sound” that he wore could cause double damage to undead. In addition to double damage and additional thunder attribute attack, it could also increase movement speed by more than 50% which could be regarded as a big killer against the undead. The deep sea was a very harsh combat environment for others including sea creature tribes like the nagas. However, Chen Rui usually spent 100 days training under this condition, so the deep sea environment was more favorable for him. He even realized a considerable part of the “overlapping power” in this environment. Furthermore, the transmission with water and water pressure in the deep sea greatly buffed the power and exerted an effect that was not available on land.

In the Dark God Ship, Hegel stared at a figure in the crystal ball as his red eyes flashing with surprise. The figure punched out and actually shattered the entire skeleton of an undead sea beast into dozens of segments. Then, he turned around with another punch, which knocked off the huge body of the other undead sea beast which was banging against the Dark God Ship. It left countless bubbles along the way.

If it was on land, the Dark Elemental King would not take this kind of combat power to heart. The problem was that this was extremely high-pressure underwater! A deep sea that could crush one into pieces if he was careless!

This kind of fighting technique, this kind of destructive power, this kind of skillful use of the environment… By the way, this figure did not even activate the strongest [Armor of Faith] power!

“Is your master a sea creature tribe or demon?” After watching for a long time, the Dark Elemental King finally uttered a sentence. The target was naturally Master Dodo who was watching the battle nervously while stuffing his mouth with food.

This sudden sentence made the slime, who had turned the fear into appetite, shocked. His big mouth that was still chewing just now disappeared. His 2 small ears and hands disappeared, leaving only an onion wearing the Purple Flame Heart glasses who pretended to stare at his master in the crystal ball.

The slime, who pretended not to hear, thought he had Zola’s style except that he didn’t ask “what”. This attitude naturally made the Dark Elemental King very displeased. He snorted irritatedly, but he didn’t ask anymore.

About 2 hours later, more than 30 undead sea beasts were finally cleared out. 3 more water elementals were sacrificed. Strena was slightly injured, and the elite dark elemental, Helor was seriously injured. Chen Rui was not injured, but his power consumption was huge and he looked very tired.

When Helor looked back at Chen Rui, his mouth squirmed, but he finally didn’t say anything. If it hadn’t been for this “enemy” who blocked the undead sea beast for him, he would be unable to come back.

Chen Rui was not in the mood to care about these. The 3 water elementals were the sailors who had been following him. He had tried his best in the battle just now. Not only had he activated the [Galaxy Territory] skill, but he also activated the buff effect of the Mystic Jade Armor. Nevertheless, the water elementals eventually died because of the delay in rescue, so he felt very sorrowful in his heart.

This atmosphere affected Strena and the rest of the elementals. Everyone didn’t speak for a while. Hegel glanced at Helor who bowed his head silently. This time, he also didn’t say more.

The Dark God Ship continued to move forward in a silent atmosphere. After some time, the Purple Flame Heart glasses on the slime’s face suddenly emitted a faint light.

Seeing this, Chen Rui’s mind moved and he immediately took out the treasure map from the storage warehouse. Just as he took it outside, he saw that the treasure map also began to glow.

At this time, everyone’s attention was attracted by this. Even the people who didn’t understand the mystery of the treasure map would have guessed it: This meant that the Dark God Ship was already quite close to the location of the treasure.

Chen Rui put on the Dodo-helmet to look at the treasure map carefully. He found that the red light dot representing himself was already very close to the golden light dot representing the hidden treasure.

The treasure of the Dark Dragon Emperor… is actually at the bottom of the sea?

This Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship is really accidentally lucky.

“Be careful and move forward at full speed!” The Dark Elemental King said calmly, but the red light in his eyes showed some heat.

chapters.title: Chapter 615 - Resentful Souls
chapters.body:
Chapter 615 - Resentful Souls

In the following time, Chen Rui and the others encountered more and more undead under the sea. Sometimes, even the Dark Elemental King had to attack in person. After the Dark God Ship encountered several close calls, they finally overcame the dangers.

Everyone knew in their hearts that the increase in danger meant that they were getting close to success from a certain perspective.

“We are quite close to the treasure place now. We have reached the border of a certain area. As long as we cross this border, we can reach the final destination shown on the map.” Chen Rui, who was wearing the Purple Flame Heart glasses and Dodo-helmet, said after looking at the labels on the treasure map. He was currently in the treatment room, using the Yuan Recovery Tree and potion to treat the wounded. Hegel was also using the dark origin power to treat the seriously injured elite dark elemental, Helor.

Hegel was silent for a moment, “Now my vague sensing about the origin fragment seems to have increased a lot. It seems that this direction is our common destination, but we can’t let our guard down. The undead manipulator hidden in the dark may also be lurking there.”

At this time, a dark elemental hurriedly came to report, “Your Highness! Please come to the command cabin! A large number of enemies appeared in front of us!”

As soon as Hegel heard the report, he couldn’t be bothered about healing the others and immediately went to the command cabin with Chen Rui.

The crystal ball in front showed dense black figures. From the estimation of previous battles, there would be thousands of enemies in this batch. Chen Rui had goosebumps while looking at it. With the current combat power of the Dark God Ship, even if the Dark Elemental King went out to fight, he could not clear out so many enemies.

The red light in Hegel’s eyes flickered for a moment as he asked, “You just said that we have reached the border of a certain area?”

Chen Rui nodded, “Yes, this is the label on the treasure map. If we cross this area, we should be able to reach the final location.”

“Since this is the case…” Hegel raised his head, “All sailors will immediately gather in the command cabin now! Including the wounded!”

Chen Rui didn’t ask too much. He asked Strena to pass down the command quickly. Helor also started to summon the dark elementals quickly.

Hegel did not order the attack, but he made the dark elementals stand in front of the crystal balls in the 4 directions. After a while, the 4 crystal balls began to emit a strange light which seemed to produce some kind of resonance. The center of the resonance was the Dark Elemental King at the center crystal ball.

Hegel’s body was surging with strong dark element power. Judging from the “hologram” of the crystal ball in the center, the entire shell of the Dark God Ship was twisting strangely. The shape began to grow gradually from a tortoise to become a kind of fish.

The foremost enemies had approached and launched an attack, but the Dark God Ship ignored it and continued to transform.

“Swordfish?” Now Chen Rui was no longer a rookie who just entered the Dead Sea. At a glance, he recognized the flying swordfish that the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles had transformed into. It was a very aggressive sea creature and looked a bit like a saury in Chen Rui’s memory. This kind of fish was 1 of the predators of the Dead Sea which moved very fast. Its body was as long as a knife, and its head and fins were equipped with sharp bone blades. In fact, those blades were tiny digesters that moved at a high speed with a strong acid hydrolysis effect that could even easily cut metal.

In the difficult situation of withstanding the opponent’s constant attacks, the Dark God Ship finally completed the transformation from Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles to Saury.

The red light in Dark Elemental King’s eyes was flourishing. He instructed, “Hold tight!”

The body of “saury” burned with black flames resembling flames which looked particularly dazzling on the dim seabed with no sunlight. Then, the entire Dark God Ship thrust forward at an incomprehensible speed like a sharp arrow that was released from the string. It was as if the originally slow sightseeing ship suddenly activated its nuclear-powered thrusters.

Although Chen Rui and the other sailors were already reminded, they didn’t expect it to be so fast. Many people fell and stumbled. The Dark Elemental King’s roar came, “Aguile! Report the location!”

Chen Rui, who had just stabilized his figure, knew that this was a critical juncture. He looked at the labels on the treasure map and replied aloud, “29 degrees east…, then 12 degrees north!”

The Dark God Ship which transformed into a swordfish directly cut into the group of undead sea beasts like a sharp knife. Whether it was a Demon Emperor or Demon Overlord sea beast, they were torn apart by the terrifying sharp qi before they got close.

This sharp knife thrust forward according to the direction reported by Chen Rui and broke through the encirclement of thousands of undead sea beasts. Behind it were the shattered huge skeletons.

However, when the speed of “saury” slowed down gradually, a lot of cracks appeared on the 4 crystal balls due to overload. Most of the dark elementals’ bodies were close to translucent. Some of them with serious injuries or weak power were even annihilated. The Dark Elemental King’s body trembled, emitting a lot of black smoke.

Obviously, the price to be paid for this form of brute force attack just now was not small.

When Chen Rui’s thoughts moved slightly, a Yuan Recovery Tree appeared in the center of the crystal ball. The Yuan Recovery Tree emitted a thin green mist which spread out. The fading dark elementals gradually slowed down, and the black smoke coming out of the Dark Elemental King also began to go back into his body.

Hegel glanced at Chen Rui and nodded. The Dark God Ship suddenly shook violently as if it had hit something, then it penetrated through again.

In the broken crystal ball, the light had dimmed. Even the magic crystal light had lost its function.

Soon, the darkness turned into light, and then everyone felt a sense of weightlessness. It seemed that the Dark God Ship had lost the buoyancy of the water and fell from a certain height. Hegel’s eyes flashed in red light, and the Dark God Ship’s falling speed immediately slowed down a lot.

This kind of descent continued for several hours. Nobody knew how deep it was. Just when everyone was almost used to it, it finally fell to the bottom.

The crystal ball showed a vast expanse of whiteness nearby, but no specific scene could be seen. When Chen Rui came to the battle exit that Hegel opened, the sight in front of him surprised him. It is the long-lost dry ground and light outside. There is actually no more water on the “seabed”!

No, to be precise, the water should be in the sky. The waves of water can be seen faintly in the sky. This is a huge space isolated from the bottom of the deep sea. On Earth, this scene can only appear in fantasy novels. Even in the Demon Realm, this cannot be done without substantial power.

In the distance, a white tower-shaped building could be seen faintly. It seemed to be the source of the entire light.

The Dark Elemental King, Strena and others who came to the exit also saw this scene. Everyone had an idea in their hearts: The Dark Dragon Emperor treasure! Only the legendary Dark Dragon Emperor has such a powerful ability to build such a strange treasure land on the seabed.

After determining the external dry land environment, the sailors walked out of the Dark God Ship. At this time, one could see that the swordfish of the Dark God Ship had been ruined. The crisscrossed crystal shell looked dull. Many parts were deformed due to melting.

Hegel frowned. There was a crystal ball in his hand which was the “holographic” center crystal ball.

Chen Rui saw that the Dark Elemental King had the intention of discarding this big saury, so he asked, “Is Your Highness Hegel leaving the Dark God Ship here?”

Hegel shook his head, “The Dark God Ship has been severely damaged and has basically lost the value of repair. It is better to recreate one with the crystallization of dark elements at the Dark Furnace.”

Dark Furnace? Chen Rui felt a bit familiar with this name, but it was not the time to figure it out now, “Then…Your Highness wouldn’t mind giving this scrapped guy to me, right?”

“These dark element crystals should be a huge wealth for demons.” Hegel glanced at him with disdain, “Greedy and shallow young man, you still don’t understand what real wealth is after experiencing so many life and death battles?”

“No, 1 of my teachers who is also the maker of the Devil’s Snare Ship…”

“I don’t have time to listen to your nonsense, that treasure map is enough to explain everything.” Hegel said contemptuously, “Since you’ve been saving the dark elementals on the way, this abandoned ship will be given to you.”

“So… please accept my shallow gratitude.” Chen Rui was quite speechless for the Dark Elemental King being so presumptuous. He just said something, lest Master Hegel changed his mind again.

I’ll just be a shallow guy then. I’ve always thought of myself as an ordinary otaku who is greedy for money and lust rather than a hypocrite who pretends to be a gentleman. Especially when I have an empire and my own team behind me now. The reconstruction of ancient civilization alone requires a lot of money.

Money is not omnipotent, but nothing is possible without money. This sentence is also applicable in the Demon Realm. Although the Dark Dragon Emperor treasure is secondary to saving Isabella, I must definitely not miss it since I am here already. Not to mention the most important origin fragment is also inside.

After the shallow guy accepted the Dark God Ship which was nearly scrapped, they began to move toward the white tower.

The white tower didn’t seem to be far away, but when they walked, they realized that it was only a little closer after walking for nearly half a day.

Chen Rui took out the treasure map and the Purple Flame Heart glasses. The light of these 2 items had turned into pale golden. The golden dot shown on the map was obviously the location of the White Tower! Just when he took out the treasure map and Purple Flame Heart glasses, the surrounding waves suddenly began to change. A large number of strange ripples appeared in the distant air, extending rapidly toward this side like ocean waves.

When Chen Rui looked at it, his expression suddenly changed. This is not a ‘wave.’ It is a flying translucent phantom!

Phantom is an undead transformed from a deceased who had a strong amount of spirit power during his lifetime. It has a strong immunity to physical damage, but it is very rare. Even Guradam has only a phantom brigade of thousands. The number of these phantoms in front is astonishing. They are swarming densely like waves. According to the preliminary visual observation, there are at least 1 million people! This is the real sea of the undead! In comparison, Guradam’s army of undead is only a drop in the ocean. This means how many creatures must be sacrificed to create it?

The sea of phantoms had come to the front in an instant, surrounding Chen Rui and others. The sky was full of translucent undead soul creatures flying around intertwined with ghastly sounds. This atmosphere was quite terrifying and creepy. Even the dark elementals who were immune to magic like [Terror] couldn’t help but show a nervous expression.

As for Dodo, he had already turned into a puddle of transparent slime, trembling on the ground. He was just praying that he would not be discovered by the enemy.

Chen Rui’s [Analytical Eyes] was densely packed with the enemies’ information, but the “race” column showed not the phantom he imagined, but…

“Resentful souls?” Chen Rui blurted out.

“Yes, it is resentful souls!” Hegel’s eyes showed solemnity, “Resentful souls are undead that cannot rest in peace for some reason. Pain and hatred breed a powerful power which is difficult to be killed. Their strength is far greater than the phantom. There is no shelter here. Everyone, immediately forms a circle. Don’t take the initiative to attack first. Watch out!”

It was the first time Chen Rui heard of the resentful souls. He asked hurriedly, “How can we deal with them?”

The Dark Elemental King sneered, “The best way to deal with these things is the damn light element magic. Oh right, you can take out your damn sword.

Chen Rui was quite speechless when he heard the adjective that the Dark Elemental King used consecutively with a strong subjective derogatory tone. Now that the enemy was present, he had no time to be bothered about it. The Northsea Sword suddenly appeared in his hand. The Northsea’s trump card of energy accumulation, [Flow Back to Origin], was a light element and water element attack. With the power of Thunderous Sound, it should have a pretty good effect on these resentful souls, but the number of resentful souls is too much. How long can I hold on in this sea of resentful souls without activating the [Royal Star Transformation], even with the help of Strena and Hegel?

These resentful souls gave Strena a different feeling. Her green eyes were intertwined with horror, shock, and anger. She was sobbing unknowingly.

“At least one-third of this place is the resentful souls of the nagas! Even though I don’t have the sensing power of Adeline, I can still clearly feel the inextricable sorrow and pain.” Strena grasped Chen Rui’s shoulder tremblingly, “I know that you have a special power that is different from the others. Please find a way to help liberate them. As long as you can do it, I can promise you any request!

“I’ll do my best.” Chen Rui smiled bitterly. The last sentence of the female naga warrior made him sweat a little. Let alone help these resentful souls, it is still a problem whether I can protect myself.

At this moment, the front of the resentful souls suddenly separated, and a black figure appeared. The blurry image gradually became clearer.

“Hehe! You have some insight to be able to recognize the resentful souls at a glance.” The figure made a chilling voice, “Welcome to the Land of Hatred. Guests from afar, are you satisfied with my welcome ceremony?”

TL: Is it the Dark Dragon Emperor himself?

chapters.title: Chapter 616 - The Test Of The Corpse Necromancer King
chapters.body:
Chapter 616 - The Test Of The Corpse Necromancer King

This black figure dressed in a dark golden robe was actually a skeleton. He had a weird skeleton staff in his hand and a silver crown on his head. The most conspicuous was the 2 blue lights in the skull like a burning ghost fire. It made one shudder.

Race: Corpse Necromancer King.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S.

Physique: A-, power: A-, spirit: S+, speed: A.

[Analysis]: (clone).

Among undead magic, the most common low level one was the magic of skull transformation which could transform skeletons into manipulable skeleton warriors, but there was also a higher level and more dangerous transformation magic that could transform the caster himself through secret medicines and rituals into the immortal undead magician which was the corpse necromancer.

It was not the first time that Chen Rui had seen the corpse necromancer. His servant, Guradam, was a corpse necromancer. The undead legion led by him had played a very crucial role in several wars, but this was the first time he had seen the higher-level “Corpse Necromancer King”.

Chen Rui knew that the corpse necromancer did not have a real body. The body in front of him was just a storage body. Therefore, there would be a label of “clone” on [Analytical Eyes]’s [Analysis]. Guradam once used projection to fool those treasure hunters in Paglio’s treasure vault.

The current situation was extremely precarious. The sea of resentful souls had surrounded Chen Rui and others. If they fought by force, their chances of winning were slim.

“Greetings to you, Your Highness Corpse Necromancer King.” Chen Rui thought swiftly and bowed to salute, “Your Highness’ welcome ceremony is really impressive.

A shrilling voice sounded, “You should add great, supreme and unique in front of ‘Your Highness’!”

It was not Corpse Necromancer King who spoke, but a green resentful soul beside him. The Comprehensive Strength Assessment of this resentful soul was A+. He was staring at Chen Rui fiercely as if this “guest” said the most unforgivable words in the world.

“Prinz.” The grim voice of King Corpse Necromancer King sounded. The green resentful soul, Prinz, shut up immediately. His fierce expression instantly turned into incomparable sincerity and humility. The rapid change of facial expression made Chen Rui secretly stunned.

Corpse Necromancer King slowly floated forward. After looking at Chen Rui a few times, his gaze turned to the treasure map with pale golden light in his hands. He said ghastly, “I like eyes with good eyesight. That will be the best material for specimens. Maybe I can consider turning your skeleton into a work of art that will give you a ‘deeper’ impression. I can assure you that you will enjoy the whole process very much.”

Chen Rui noticed the Corpse Necromancer King’s gaze and ignored this threat. He just raised the treasure map calmly, “We were guided by the Sir Dark Dragon Emperor and came here with great hardships. We passed the test of the Red Pipit and Sir Lotman along the way. I think we should be eligible to enjoy the treatment of real guests.”

“Lowly fellow, don’t compare the great Royal Highness with those 2 incompetent creatures!” Prinz screamed again.

Chen Rui understood that this Prinz was a character who reinforced the majesty of the villain, just like the old nationalistic movie, the pseudo-soldier who gave a thumbs up to the Japanese, and even added emotionally, “Great, truly great!” (A flattery compliment)

“It seems that you forgot to add ‘Supreme’ and ‘Unique’.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, but he calmed down. The Corpse Necromancer King made such a big show. If he wants to start fighting, he can directly dispatch the resentful souls to besiege. He would not take so much effort.

Prinz was speechless for a while. Just as he was about to get mad, the 2 blue ghost fires in the eye sockets of King Corpse Necromancer King flickered more vigorously, “Although you are an ant, you are an interesting ant… Since you have the complete treasure map of Sir Dark Dragon Emperor, you are also considered qualified to enter the Tower of Destruction. Come with me.”

After speaking, he turned around and drifted backward slowly. Prinz hurriedly followed. The whole sea of resentful souls separated to the sides to show the way.

It turns out that the white tower is called the Tower of Destruction. Chen Rui and the Dark Elemental King looked at each other and saw the surprise in each other’s eyes. I expected a fierce battle, but I didn’t expect to pass so easily?

Although it was unexpected, it seemed to be the best result. If they really fought, apart from Chen Rui and the Dark Elemental King who might have special life-saving methods, the rest, including Strena and Helor, would hardly survive.

The 2 quickly exchanged glances. Chen Rui bowed and said, “Thank you, Your Highness King Corpse Necromancer.”

“My name is Glorios. Maybe you can call me Lich King.” The corpse necromancer floating in front said without looking back.

Lich King? This title surprised a certain crossover otaku- Are you sure your name is Glorios and not… Arthas?

Okay, this is the Demon Realm. Let’s continue walking all the way to the west… Uh, to the White Tower.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, their speed was obviously much slower than before, but the distance of Tower of Destruction was rapidly getting closer. It was as if they reached in just tens of minutes although the journey would initially take dozens of days to arrive.

Obviously, this was a kind of strange power of “shrinking the ground into an inch”. Perhaps the initial road was only this far away, but Chen Rui and the others were caught in a strange and completely different “rule” because of the power of the territory kingdom. If it weren’t for the appearance of the Lich King, perhaps they would never be able to reach the real white tower.

The appearance of the Tower of Destruction gradually became clear. This was a huge all-white obelisk. When he looked closely, he could see a strange blood-colored texture. The closer he got, the more he could feel the suffocating and suppressing breath as if this obelisk was a tall god whom he needed to worship.

There was only 1 passage in front of the huge obelisk surrounded by numerous statues. Many of these statues were armed with weapons, glowing with dark black metal luster. They looked hideous and lifelike. The statues spread all the way to the entrance of the obelisk like a guard legion.

The largest statue, which seemed to be the leader, was stationed at the gate of the obelisk.

“Dark Iron Mystic Ghost?” The Dark Elemental King frowned as he glanced at these statues.

Chen Rui had heard from Tetenis that the Dark Iron Mystic Ghost had powerful combat power. It was made of secret spells and special materials which gave it the characteristic of greatly reducing the physical and magic damage they receive. Not only that, the Dark Iron Mystic Ghost could also shield the detection of spirit sensing, so it was difficult to sense the strength of its combat power.

Unlike the lamp spirits and crystal beasts, which had a certain subjective consciousness, the Dark Iron Mystic Ghost was a war machine without emotions. It was similar to the gargoyle that Chen Rui encountered at the Mountain Seckred or the goldman made by Zola, but its power was a world’s difference.

There were hundreds of thousands of Dark Iron Mystic Ghost guards. They were all silent like statues. However, once they were activated, the intruder would encounter a terrifying attack.

“As expected of the king of the dark element, you recognized these toys at a glance.” Lich King Glorios obviously could easily see through the identity of the Dark Elemental King. “Everyone, the treasure of Sir Dark Dragon Emperor is inside. You can go in now.”

Just go in like this? Surrounded by the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts? Almost everyone showed a vigilant expression.

“Your Highness Lich King.” Chen Rui said, “Can I take it as once we enter this passage, we will be violently attacked by the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts?”

“You said it yourself.” Glorios let out a sinister laugh. The golden robe on his body was moving without wind. “Let me tell you some interesting news first. You should have already encountered the simple-minded octopus and that guy who scared people with mist previously. The souls they obtained have been transported via a certain channel to this place where all the valuable souls in the nearby sea area are gathered here. They are burned by the phantom fire every few days and can’t escape. They can only hate constantly in the endless torture, so this place is called the Land of Hatred!”

No wonder there are no living creatures along the way. All the creatures in the vast sea have been turned into the undead! The undead ship, deep-sea skeleton beasts, resentful souls… Chen Rui felt horrified while Strena couldn’t help grasping the 6 scimitars in her hands.

The Lich King continued nonchalantly, “You currently have 3 choices. First, enter the obelisk directly from the passage surrounded by the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts. Of course, I can’t guarantee what will happen. Second, stay here and become a member of the Land of Hatred like them. I believe that before you become like them, they will be happy to enjoy the long-awaited blood and flesh. Unfortunately, you have too few people. It’s not enough to fill their stomach…”

Glorios pointed his finger at the sea of resentful souls. Although the sea of resentful souls was filled with boundless resentment and hatred, when they were pointed at by the craggy bone finger, they showed expressions of fear and retreated. There were also many resentful souls who showed salivating expressions when facing Chen Rui and the others.

“The last choice is to play a game with me. If you can beat me, you are considered to pass the final test. I can let you pass this passage safely.”

Sure enough, this third obstacle was not so easy to pass.

The Dark Elemental King pondered for a moment. He took the lead to speak up, “Tell me about your game first.”

“It’s very simple.” Lich King’s figure floated to a strange round table near the passage. This round table was large with a black statue holding a scythe in the middle and various strange patterns nearby.

“The magic card game, ‘Fate Showdown’.”

Fate Showdown? It was the first time Chen Rui heard of this game. It is even a magic card game?

“Fate Showdown? Very old game.” Hegel seemed to be familiar with it, “How do you want to play?”

“Awesome. It seems that the Dark Elemental King is also a fan.” The blue lights in Glorios’ eye sockets shone brilliantly, “You are a guest. There are 3 ways to play: Victory Race, Spectacular War, and Death Game. You can choose any of them. How about the best of 3?”

The red light in Hegel’s eyes flashed, “However, I want to figure out how we can guarantee the fairness of this game in your kingdom?”

Glorios seemed to be very interested in this kind of magic card, “We can sign a soul contract based on your soul level, then you shouldn’t have to worry about me cheating with a contract.”

Hegel thought about it for a while, and he slowly nodded, “Okay! Since it’s the best of 3, then let’s play 1 match for each game. If… you can hold on to the third game.”

“Your Highness Hegel is so confident. I’m more and more interested in the following game now.” Glorios let out a ghastly laugh, “However, everything has a price. The bargaining chip of this gambling game is you and all your partners’ lives. I don’t know if the King Royal Highness has this courage?”

“Life and death match? Very good,” Hegel gave a deep smile, “Since you want the life of an Elemental King, then you should also give your life as a bargaining chip.”

“As you wish, if I lose, not only will you enter the Tower of Destruction, but my life is also yours.” Glorios seemed to smile more happily, but the skull face looked terrifying no matter how one looked at it, “As a true fan of magic cards, I can’t wait to look forward to the exciting match that comes.”

“Wait a minute, the dark elementals’ partners will only be the dark elementals.” Hegel pointed at Chen Rui and others arrogantly, “It doesn’t include these guys who just use each other.”

This sentence made Strena’s facial expression change suddenly. She said back in retaliation, “This is also what I want to say. The naga tribe also won’t entrust our lives to people whom we don’t trust. I would rather choose – Aguile.”

The rest of the nagas and water elementals also nodded. Glorios looked at the nagas and water elementals’ focus, Chen Rui with interest. His smile was even more strange. “It seems that there is also an interesting game between both of you. Maybe my fun will last longer later.”

“Provided if your life can last until that moment.” Hegel said coldly.

Glorios smiled and didn’t talk more about this statement. He and Hegel walked to the round table and sat down face to face. “Before signing the contract and the start of the game, I will remind you one last time, the loser will lose his own life and soul. Even if you are an Elemental King, at this table where the Land of Hatred’s Rule power is condensed, you are not exempted from the punishment from failing. Perhaps your soul can override the rule, but your elemental heart will rupture. You can only spend a lot of effort and time to regenerate.”

“If that’s the case, even if you have the power of the kingdom, your soul essence in the life box will disappear too once you fail?”

“Of course!” A strange symbol appeared at Lich King Glorios’ fingertip and flew toward Hegel. Hegel did the same. The 2 symbols combined and interacted in the air. After reaching a mutually satisfactory clause, it turned into a contract with both their names before disappearing immediately.

After the contract was successfully signed, a large number of mists appeared from the round table’s pattern, faintly glowing with pale golden light. The statue in the center seemed to become alive, and its body became hazy. It was wearing a black cloak with a long black scythe in its hand. When the scythe pointed, a stack of strange playing cards appeared on the table.

The material of these cards was very special. The exquisite patterns on the back looked like the sun and the moon. The edges were glowing with pale gold patterns, emanating a majestic and mysterious breath.

TL: A card game? This is really unexpected. Is Hegel playing first to give some guides to Chen Rui? Or am I overthinking?

chapters.title: Chapter 617 - Fate Showdown
chapters.body:
Chapter 617 - Fate Showdown

Chapter 617: Fate Showdown

“Your Highness Hegel,” Lich King had already learned the Dark Elemental King’s name from the contract. He spread his hands, “You choose first. The first game is Victory Race? Spectacular War? Death Game? Oh, Prinz, introduce the rules to the nearby guests later, especially ‘Aguile’. After all, both parties on this table can’t hear anything outside the game area after the start of the game.”

“Yes, the supreme Your Highness Lich King.” Prinz gave a deep salute, but when he floated in front of Chen Rui and the others, he returned to that kind of arrogant manner.

“Hmph!” Hegel glanced at Chen Rui, “The first game, let’s start with the simplest Victory Race. Best of 3.”

“Okay, start.”

As soon as he said, the light of the entire card table flashed. When the Death God’s scythe waved, the cards flew up and flipped open on the table. Chen Rui clearly saw that these cards had various images such as humans with a crown, demons, generals in armor, as well as the sun, moon, and staff. There were a total of dozens of cards.

Prinz on the side began to introduce the games. In the Victory Race, there were a total of 64 cards divided into main card and secondary card. The main card had 2 camps, Order and Chaos. There were 5 types of Order main cards including Golden King, Silver Queen, Glorious Cavalry, Champion Swordsman and Farmer; the Chaos main cards included King of Darkness, Phantom Concubine, Evil Magician, Demon Warrior, and Demon Slave. There were 4 main cards of these 10 types.

The Order secondary card consisted of the sun, staff, crossed swords, and so on. There were also moon, poison dagger, cloak, and so on that corresponded to the Chaos secondary card. The neutral cards included star, gem, wood, mineral, and crystal lamp. 1 card for each type.

The rule of the Victory Race was to draw 5 main cards and 1 secondary card within 10 seconds. The one with the largest card pattern would win.

The largest was Order or Chaos’ set of 5, such as king, queen, cavalry, swordsman and farmer;

The next was 4 same-type cards in the same camp. For example, 4 kings plus 1 farmer or 4 farmers plus 1 king would be of the same level;

The third was the 3 same-type cards plus 1 pair in the same camp, such as 3 cavalry plus 2 swordsmen;

Then it was 2 pairs or 3 same-type cards from the camp…

The lowest was a mixed camp with no pair and sequence.

According to Chen Rui, this was somewhat similar to Texas Hold’em on Earth. Namely the straight flush, 4-of-a-kind, flush, straight, and so on, but the rules were slightly different. Nonetheless, the secondary card rules explained by Prinz were very intriguing. In the Victory Race. The role of a secondary card was crucial. The main cards’ pattern must correspond to the secondary card’s camp in order to be established. Otherwise, it would be invalidated and directly lost.

For example, Chen Rui got the greatest “straight flush” Order main card which was a set of king, queen, cavalry, swordsman, and farmer. The secondary card that must be drawn was the sun, staff, and crossed swords in order for this straight flush to be effective; if the Chaos’ secondary card like the moon or poison dagger was drawn, then the straight flush was invalid. Even if the opponent got the smallest mixed cards, he would win.

At this time, if the secondary card drawn by Chen Rui was neutral, it would also be valid, but something more unpredictable would happen. The players would draw 1 from each others’ cards to determine the size. The “straight flush” just now might become the smallest mixed cards.

There was no such restriction on the card pattern of the mixed camp, but this card was also the smallest level.

After the card was checked, the card game began. 62 cards flipped to the back and started to automatically mix and shuffle at a super high speed. Even Chen Rui’s eyes couldn’t keep up with that speed.

What Prinz said was true. This kind of magic card game was not simple. In addition to skills, it also needed strong spirit power as a backing. In the shuffling stage alone, a considerable amount of spirit power must be spent to judge. The more accurate the judgment, the smaller the error and the higher the winning rate. Except that both sides had selected the same card, then during this fleeting time, they would use spirit power to execute a high-speed and fierce competition.

Of course, the luck factor was equally important.

The 62 cards were spread again. The pattern on some of the cards began to have a star which could not be noticed if one didn’t look carefully. The cards with a star represented the secondary cards, and the rest were the main cards. This kind of “label” didn’t appear before the shuffle.

Soon, several cards began to move quickly and appeared at their table. In the blink of an eye, the remaining cards in the center of the table burned up and disappeared, leaving only the 6 cards chosen by each side in front of them.

Glorios’ voice sounded, “Your Highness Hegel, since you are the guest, you will show the cards first.”

According to the rules, both sides need to show the main cards first, then the secondary card. When Hegel’s mind shifted, the 5 cards were flipped over. 3 King of Darkness, 1 Phantom Concubine, 1 Evil Magician. The same camp with 3 same-type cards. It was considered a high card pattern.

“Sigh, it seems that my luck is a bit worse than Your Highness.” Glorios turned over his own card which was also of the Chaos camp. 2 Demon Warriors, 2 Demon Slaves, and 1 King of Darkness. 2 pairs of the same camp which was just 1 step lower than Hegel’s.

Next, they opened the secondary cards. 1 was “moon” and the other was “cloak”. Both card patterns were valid. Hegel won the first game. The table began to shine a golden light. The cards of both sides disappeared. A new deck of cards appeared in the center of the Death again.

“Your Highness Hegel’s strength is really extraordinary. Your Highness took this King of Darkness first just now. Otherwise, it is likely to be a draw. But… this way, the game will become more and more interesting. Let’s start the second round.” Glorios grinned. The skull’s smiling face gave people goosebumps.

The cards of Glorios in the second game were 2 kings, 1 queen, 1 cavalry, and 1 farmer. A pair from the same camp. Hegel’s cards were 2 Demon Concubine, 1 mage and 2 Demon Slaves. 2 pairs of the same camp which were larger than Glorios’. However, when the secondary card was revealed, the red light in Hegel’s eyes flashed suddenly. It turned out that his secondary card was actually a “sun” of the Order camp, which was equivalent to be invalid. Meanwhile, the secondary card of Glorios was a staff, so his card pattern was valid.

“Hmph!” Hegel snorted. He was strongly interfered with by Glorios’ spirit power when he was judging. As a result, he missed a step, made a mistake, and drew a fatal secondary card.

Lich King let out an evil laughter, “Currently, it’s 1 win and 1 loss, so it’s just a tie. The next round is the most exciting deciding game.”

The 3rd round began. After the shuffle, many cards spread on the table were actually blurred. In Chen Rui’s concentrated eyes, this blurry feeling was actually caused by the high-speed competition between both sides. 10 seconds passed quickly. The extra cards were burned automatically. Everyone’s attention fell on the 12 cards of Hegel and Glorios.

“Please show your cards first, Your Highness Hegel.”

The 5 main cards in front of Hegel were opened. They were king, queen, cavalry, swordsman, and farmer. A full set of Order camp cards which was the biggest straight flush. As long as the secondary card was also an Oder card, he would undoubtedly win or at least not lose this round unless the final valid card of Lich King was also a straight flush.

Glorios seemed to ponder. If there was flesh on the skull’s face, his brows were probably already frowning. The Lich King turned over his card.

1 King of Darkness, 2 Evil Magicians, and 2 Demon Slaves. 2 pairs of the same camp. It was not a small set, but it looked eclipsed in front of the ‘straight flush’.

Next came the most critical secondary card. Hegel smiled proudly. In everyone’s gasping breath, the secondary card slowly opened. A ‘crossed swords’!

The dark elementals cheered. The card pattern is valid! Our king won!

“As the Dark Elemental King, you actually chose the deck of Order. It’s an ironic victory,” Lich King laughed strangely, “But you have to wait for the trump card to be revealed to know whether you really win.”

Chen Rui had a bad omen. He watched too many movies about the King of Gamblers and God of Gamblers. In the final stage of the final battle, it seemed that the first to reveal the cards was basically the loser…

Hegel suddenly thought of something. The red glow in his pupils suddenly shrank. The Lich King’s secondary card opened- ‘Stars’.

Neutral secondary card!

Then, both sides would draw 1 of each other’s cards at the same time. With the current cards, Lich King was the Chaos card, and the Dark Elemental King was the Order card. Once the 2 drew, no matter what the draw was, both sides would change to the smallest mixed card pattern. The Lich King had at least 1 pair of cards. In conclusion, Hegel lost!

The surrounding cheers stopped abruptly. The Lich King’s ghastly laughter sounded, “Your Highness did not make the mistake of the last time. You repelled my mental interference, and not only grabbed the largest card pattern, but you also got the corresponding secondary card. Unfortunately, the world is unpredictable. I won this Victory Race.”

Hegel’s eyes shone in great red light, then he gradually regained his composure, “Good means, but the real winner is the one who laughs last. Let’s start the second game immediately, Spectacular War.”

Spectacular War was another way to play magic cards. Both sides had a 50-story spectacular building to be built. The cards could be used to build one’s own building or demolish the other’s building. The spectacular building had a total of 100 floors.

The criterion for determining the outcome was which side’s spectacular building was built or destroyed first. If the winner was not determined within half an hour, the side with the highest spectacular building layer would be the winner.

The number of cards was not limited to 62 cards. After a set was drawn, the cards would be shuffled again until the end.

In this kind of game, each person drew 5 cards at a time. Both parties drew again after they played 1 round. No matter whether the cards were played or not, they always kept 5 cards in their hands. The functions of the main card and secondary card had changed. The main function of the main card was to damage each other. The single king was the largest, then there were pairs and 3-of-a-kind. The more cards, the greater the damage. The most special was 4-of-a-kind which could become a “bomb” that destroyed everything. However, this “bomb” was a bit special. It would not only blow up 4 floors of the opponent’s building, but it would also destroy 2 floors of one’s own building. So, it should be used with caution.

The role of the secondary card was to build. The secondary cards of the same camp could add 2 floors to your own building; 1 floor for different camps. Neutral camp would add 1 floor to both sides. The effect of the sun, moon, and stars would be doubled.

This was a one-off game. Since Hegel had already lost 1 game before, if he lost again, he would be completely defeated, so the Dark Elemental King was extremely focused.

Hegel chose the Chaos spectacular building. When he won with the attack card of the Chaos camp, he would deal double damage. Lich King chose the Order spectacular building. 2 3D buildings appeared on the card table, facing each other from afar. 1 emitted a faint black mist, and the other was shining with golden brilliance. The workers were building underneath, and there was a number “50” label beside it which was very vivid.

The stacked cards were automatically distributed to Hegel and Glorios, and stopped after 5 cards were distributed. When Glorios threw a pair of Demon Warriors, the center of the table flashed light. All of a sudden, 2 huge Demon Warriors appeared, waving their flails and walking toward Hegel’s spectacular building step by step in a roar.

Hegel threw out the card in his hand. 2 Glorious Cavalries wearing full body armor and holding cavalry spears appeared on the ‘battlefield’, urging the silver armored warhorse to rush toward the Demon Warriors.

Under the powerful charge of the cavalries, the Demon Warriors were shattered. The shadow of the charge struck near the spectacular building of Glorios. The spectacular building shook. Under the action of a pair of cards plus different camps, it lowered 4 floors and became “46”.

Next, Hegel played a card. A golden staff inlaid with a red gem stood on his spectacular building, emitting a strong white light. The construction speed was increased immediately, adding 1 floor. Then, the staff disappeared. Since the ‘staff’ was an Order secondary card, his Chaos spectacular building could only add 1 layer. After Hegel played the biggest single card King of Darkness, Glorios chose to give up. The spectacular building became 51:45.

There was only 1 card left in Hegel’s hand. If he was restrained by the opponent, his spectacular building would be reduced, so the Dark Elemental King did not play any more cards. When both sides gave up, they started to draw cards again. Hegel drew 4 cards and Glorios drew 2. Both sides still had 5 cards in their hands. A new round began.

The sacred and majestic Golden King, berserk and bold King of Darkness, the dignified and beautiful Silver Queen, the charming and moving Phantom Concubine, the fair and rigorous Glorious Cavalry, the weird and tricky Evil Magician… The pictures on these cards were displayed in front of everyone in a gorgeous and vivid posture. They began to battle. Both the image and the fighting effect were breathtaking, but behind this dazzling scene, there was a cruel gambling game of life and death.

Under fierce offense and defense, the spectacular building of both sides was constantly changing. The attacks on both sides were very precise. Sometimes one spectacular building was about to be destroyed, but it was increased by playing several consecutive secondary cards; the spectacular building of the opponent was now in a crisis.

After several exchanges, the battle situation had entered the most exciting stage. Hegel’s spectacular building only had the last 3 floors while Glorios had 6 floors. With 3 cards in each side’s hand, Glorios played a pair of Evil Magicians. Hegel couldn’t do anything to it and chose to skip it. Only the last layer of the spectacular building was left.

Glorios played the only single card Glorious Cavalry in an attempt to give Hegel a fatal blow. At the critical moment, Hegel played a King of Darkness which cut the spectacular building of Glorios to 4 floors. This also gave him an important first mover in the next round.

In the next round of card draws, Hegel played the 3 Phantom Concubines that determined the outcome. The triple card plus the double of the same camp equaled 6 layers of damage. He finally destroyed Glorios’ 4 floors in one fell swoop at a critical moment. A decisive victory was achieved.

The victory of Glorios in the first “Victory Race” and the victory of Hegel in the second “Spectacular War ” meant that both sides had returned to the same starting line. It all depended on the most critical third game, the Death Game.

TL: Will Hegel win in the end?

chapters.title: Chapter 618 - The Debut Of The Rookie
chapters.body:
Chapter 618 - The Debut Of The Rookie

The last game, Death Game, would truly determine the success or failure of the Dark Elemental King and the Lich King. Perhaps it would also determine the final outcome of this Dark Dragon Emperor treasure’s adventure.

“It’s been a long time since I have encountered such an exciting game. Your Highness Hegel, you are a good opponent.” The 2 dim lights in Glorios’ eye sockets flashed. “The first 2 are just additional games. Death Game is the true essence of “Fate Showdown”. This round will determine our survival. Do you need to take a break?”

“For elementals, life and death are nothing more than the transformation of existence. If the soul essence in your life box disappears, even this undead body will also be annihilated. If you want to rest, I don’t mind.”

This kind of dialogue with mind games meant that both sides had begun to exchange moves quietly.

“I think there is no need to continue this kind of meaningless discussion. Let’s speak with victory.” As Glorios said, the scene on the table changed again.

The entire space seemed to be infinitely enlarged. There was a castle in front of Hegel and Glorios, representing Order and Chaos respectively. Except for a certain area around the castle, all other areas were shrouded in mist. At this time, there were only 2 cards in front of both parties. Both were secondary cards of wood and mineral. As soon as they threw their cards, a logging yard and a mine appeared around the castle which began to flicker to indicate work. Soon, several farmhouse-like houses appeared around Glorios’ castle. Hegel had caves in front of him.

After about 2 minutes, there was a card floating on each farmhouse and cave: Farmer (Demon Slave).

The card quickly turned into real people who entered the logging yard and the mine to work under the command. It seemed that as a reward, the 2 had a gem secondary card in their hands and began to build the gem mine.

Chen Rui became familiar the more he watched the next scene. Almost without Prinz’s introduction, he already knew the rules of this kind of Death Game- As a former otaku. It is impossible not to know what this is. In fact, I know it all too well.

If the first 2 games are equivalent to a turn-based game, then now it is RTS (Real Time Strategy). From the Red Alert and Dune that Chen Rui first came into contact with, to the World of Warcraft, Age of Empires, StarCraft, as well as the second and third generations, these classic games are well-known.

The “Death Game” in front of me is obviously a “3D” real-time strategy game battle which is slightly different from the previous life. It is controlled by spirit power instead of a mouse. The rule of the Death Game is just like the name, to completely annihilate the other party.

As the 2 sides explored, the mist was gradually removed. There were many landscapes like rivers and mountains as well as wild mines such as gems and crystals that directly affected the speed of marching and combat effects. While both sides were exploring and building, a considerable number of troops had been generated in the castle. The battle has evolved from small-scale combat to large-scale combat.

A large number of Glorious Captain (Glorious Cavalry’s advanced unit) of Glorios chased down Hegel’s Evil Magician Master (Evil Magician’s advanced unit) all the way. Although the attack was strong, the speed was slow which was very disadvantageous for single-arm combat. Many Evil Magician Masters were killed along the way. The Cavalry Legion had been chasing to an unexplored valley entrance. Just at this time, a strange roar sounded.

Chaos secondary card, “Berserk Totem”- Additional 30 minutes of ‘Berserk’ state, increase all allies’ damage by 5 points and critical hit chance by 10%.

When the cavalries wanted to retreat, the valley entrance had been sealed off by the Berserk Demon Warrior (Demon Warrior’s advanced unit) that jumped from above. A large number of enemies also appeared in front. The Succubus Queen (Phantom Concubine’s advanced unit) was the nemesis of cavalry. Those Demon Magician Masters hiding behind the Beserk Demon Warrior also began to exert their terrifying power.

The characteristics of Glorious Captain were speed and charge. The longer the charge distance, the stronger the attack power. Now it was under a tight siege and could not unleash its power. Although there were several Holy Queens (Silver Queen’s advanced unit) with healing and purification capabilities, there was a huge gap between them and the enemy. Under the unfavorable circumstances, the entire army was eventually killed and no one was spared.

After clearing out the opponent’s main cavalry by luring them into the trap, Hegel roughly judged the distribution of Glorios’ military power through the annihilation of his Demon Slave team who explored the way. He began to quickly gather the main legion and prepared to launch an overall attack in the roughly ascertained direction of the opponent’s castle.

However, at this moment, a sudden change occurred. Hegel suddenly discovered that a large number of enemy troops appeared in his own force. He initially judged these small groups of enemy troops, which were initially scattered, as pathfinders and disturbers. When they gathered together, the number was actually quite terrifying- This is the main force of the enemy!

Seeing the main enemy force marching extremely fast to the castle, Hegel’s red pupils suddenly contracted. The secondary card ‘march horn’- increase the movement speed by 50% within 30 minutes!

In an instant, Hegel understood the opponent’s strategy. Glorios deliberately sacrificed the main force of cavalry to attract his attention, then he used the method of breaking up the main force to sneak into his vital place. This move could be said to be dangerous. If Hegel did not chase the cavalry, but got the main force to stay steadily, then these invading main forces would be defeated by them and the situation would be reversed. Glorios’ main force was now approaching Hegel’s vital land. It was too late to return to provide aid. Once the castle was invaded, the source of production would be cut off while the opponent could continue to create new troops. Those outside troops would be pincered. They would undoubtedly be defeated.

Hegel didn’t expect to encounter such a situation. He made a firm decision not to rescue the castle. While mobilizing a small amount of garrison force to prepare for full defense, he controlled the main force outside to attack the opponent’s castle as quickly as possible.

The tragic offensive and defensive battle had begun, but in contrast, Glorios was prepared to fight. He deliberately created a large number of defensive facilities. He also spent a lot of resources in the facility ‘Mystic Shop’ to purchase the nemesis of the Chaos army, the strongest secondary card ‘Sun’.

“Sun”- Order force’s defense and life increase by 30%. Chaos force’s attack and speed decrease by 20%.

In this kind of well-prepared situation, before Hegel had completely breached the opponent’s castle, his base had been wiped out by Glorios’ army. All the buildings and facilities were destroyed. In the end, Hegel’s army was completely annihilated under the attack from the front and back.

Seeing the last soldier being annihilated, Hegel’s eyes showed strong unwillingness. The scene of the flames of war gradually disappeared, returning to the original smooth table.

“You lost!” The Lich King let out a creepy laugh. With a wave of the Death God’s scythe in the center, Hegel, who had just stood up, trembled. He was unable to move under the power of a certain mysterious Rule. The same was true for all other dark elementals.

The contract signed by the 2 parties appeared in Glorios’ hands, “As long as I tear off this contract, the bodies of the dark elementals will be annihilated, leaving only the soul wandering in pain and hatred forever; they are unable to free themselves. Your elemental heart will also be completely shattered and cannot be repaired. Being able to control the life and death of an Elemental King is really satisfying…”

As he said, Lich King looked at Chen Rui, “Aren’t you going to say something? For example… Bet a game with me and try to win back the lives of these ‘companions’?”

“Since it is the request of Your Highness Glorios, then I can only do it.” Chen Rui spread his hands, “Moreover, it seems like I have no choice.”

“Oh? Are you really going to choose to win back the lives of the dark elementals as a reward for winning? Instead of entering the Tower of Destruction?” Lich King said in a playful tone, “Have you forgotten that they didn’t recognize you as partners? “

“The dark elementals are fierce, cruel, and quite vengeful. Not only are they not my friends, but we are also even enemies not long ago. It’s just that we temporarily let go of our hatred to cooperate for some purpose. In the future, we may continue to be hostile to each other.” Chen Rui looked at Hegel and dark elementals who were unable to move. He shrugged, “It’s just that I would rather face this kind of “enemy” than those “friends” who hide the blade behind their smiles. What’s more, I have one more matter that needs on the power of dark elementals. To me, this matter is much more important than the treasure of the Dark Dragon Emperor.”

——Isabella’s curse has reached the last moment. I need Hegel to resolve it, so Hegel must not die.

“Very well, I like a soul with a story. The things that are more difficult to part with will be more delicious when you divide them.” Glorios held his chin calmly. “I enjoyed the game just now very much. I don’t mind some desserts after a big meal. You know the rule. If you want to participate in the card game, you must prepare the corresponding chips, but… this should not be a problem. These nagas and elementals should have been prepared to entrust their lives to you.”

“My level is too low, I dare not bet on everyone’s lives.” Chen Rui shook his head, “But the chips are definitely needed. Maybe it can be replaced with something that Your Highness Glorios is interested in?”

The Lich King shook his head, “The bet for life can only be life. But I want to hear what you call the bargaining chip that interests me first.”

“Ancient Undead Secret Technique?”

Lich King smiled disdainfully, “You want to show off the so-called undead magic in front of a corpse necromancer? How long is the undead magic created? Where is the ‘ancient’ secret technique coming from?

“The ancients do have the secret technique of the undead. It can not only create a huge number of skeleton magicians, skeleton flying demonic beasts, but it also uses the bones of giant dragons to create undead dragons! Your Highness Glorios is a real master, Your Highness should be able to distinguish the authenticity if I just reveal a few terms. Soul baseline: 163.549, mental division twelfth power, telematu 2-color fusion chain.”

The so-called ancient secret technique was naturally a trick, but those terms were indeed “technical terms” in the process of manufacturing undead giant dragons. This was what Chen Rui remembered when Guradam showed off the results in front of Chen Rui.

Although the strength of Guradam was far from Glorios, his research talent in undead magic was excellent. His inspiration was overflowing after being inspired by Chen Rui. The half-finished spirit dragon had killed the capital’s Demon Overlord, Pegasus.

No doubt, when the Lich King heard these terms, the blue flames in his eyes suddenly became blazing. “ You are able to make the Dragon Power Essence’s soul baseline data accurate to 3 digits after the decimal point! That’s right, then the twelfth power of the next spiritual division is quite reasonable. The telematu’s 2-color fusion chain behind can stabilize the 7-stage soul fluctuations… there is more?”

Of course, Chen Rui would not go on. He smiled slightly, “It seems that Your Highness has already distinguished the authenticity.”

The Lich King’s tone restored his calmness again, “Regardless of whether it is an ancient secret technique or not, what you can provide is indeed of considerable value, but the bargaining chip I want is still life. The secret technique of the undead plus your own life can be used as a bargaining chip for this gambling game.”

Chen Rui thought for a moment and nodded, “Okay, if I lose, the secret technique and my life are yours. If you lose, the Dark Elemental King and dark elementals will get rid of the shackles of the previous life and death contract. It’s just that I have a small request. I have never played this kind of magic card. I wonder if I can practice first?”

“Practice?” Lich King’s gaze was a little more suspicious. His mind turned, “Should I praise a rookie for his courage, or laugh at a rookie for his recklessness? In order to have a little more fun later, I can give you a chance to practice. Your opponent is Prinz in this round. If you can beat him, I will bet with you. If you lose to Prinz, then your life will end early.”

Chen Rui glanced at Prinz, “Okay!”

“Thanks to Your Highness for your trust, I will personally cut off this guy’s head.” Prinz respectfully saluted Lich King. When he looked at Chen Rui, he changed into a contemptuous and arrogant face. “Such a lowly fellow does not require the great Your Highness to make a move, I, Prinz can…”

“Stop talking nonsense, since it’s 1 round, let’s choose the Death Game.” Chen Rui didn’t bother to rattle on with this guy. He directly sat down at the card table. After sitting down, he felt that he had entered an independent space where his spirit power could be extended freely in this space. However, the consumption was several times that of ordinary training or use relatively speaking. No wonder this kind of game required powerful spirit power as a backing.

Prinz gritted his teeth, “Ignorant trash! I won’t finish you too soon. I want you to watch every building of yours being destroyed, every soldier killed! I want to tear your body inch by inch and dedicate your soul to the great His Highness Lich King!”

“You forgot to add ‘Supreme’ and ‘Unique.” In the meaningless war of words, the prelude to Death Game kicked off. The choice of Chaos and Order camp could be directly decided or randomly selected. Chen Rui’s pick was Order. A castle full of holy breath appeared in front of him. There were only 2 basic cards in his hand, wood and mineral. His spirit power could not penetrate the rest of the misty area until it was explored.

Glorios, who was watching coldly from the outside, initially studied Chen Rui’s fighting style and tactical habits, but after watching it for a few minutes, he lost interest in continuing to watch.

Rookie, 100% rookie.

This was Lich King’s evaluation of Chen Rui. From his experience, he could tell that although this guy had fast adaptability and good learning ability, he was a rookie. The performance of that kind of novice means was definitely not pretended. The level of Prinz was also unsightly in the eyes of Royal Highness Lich King, so there was no need for careful observation of this mediocre match.

TL: Maybe it’s another mind game by Chen Rui?

chapters.title: Chapter 619 - Wrath Of Lichapter King
chapters.body:
Chapter 619 - Wrath Of Lichapter King

Chapter 619: Wrath of Lich King

‘Fate Showdown’ required pure spirit power control. As soon as Chen Rui thought of this, he played 2 basic construction cards and turned into automatic logging yards and mines.

10 units of wood and 2 units of minerals could generate a Farmer card. The Farmer was the lowest soldier type, and the combat power was pitifully low. Even the advanced unit “Farm Operator” was the same, but Farmer had the characteristics of production. If they entered a resource location, they could greatly increase the speed of resource generation.

Although the skills of Order and Chaos were different, they were relatively balanced. They were both the lowest. Although the Farmer’s hp was not as high as the Demon Slave, it was faster to cut logs and extract mine. The construction cost of a farmhouse was also lower than that of the Demon Slave’s cave, but the mining of gems and water crystals was not as good as the Demon Slave.

This was equivalent to a game. Chen Rui started to operate while deeply immersed in familiarizing himself with the characteristics of the soldier types.

This game, which Lich King deemed as uninteresting and boring, was exciting and thrilling in the eyes of the nagas and elementals. Chen Rui had been suppressed by Prinz.
