If it was not for the Order camp’s reinforced defense facilities and large production of Champion Swordsman with outstanding defense power that withstood several rounds of Prinz’s onslaught, the castle would have collapsed.

After attacking vigorously for some time, Prinz wasted a lot of troops, so he stopped for a while. Chen Rui used the resources that were still unexplored by the opponent to produce desperately, but he did not take the initiative to attack. He just built a defensive magic tower step by step and expanded the defense area step by step.

Prinz’s next wave of attack began again. This time, Chen Rui lost much fewer troops, and he also created the main attacking troop, Glorious Cavalry. However, he still did not take the initiative to attack. Instead, he carefully defended.

Then, defend, defend again, defend again…

After minutes passed, Chen Rui finally launched a counterattack. The powerful troops advanced with an overwhelming advantage all the way and surrounded Prinz’s castle. It was only then Prinz realized his resources were unsustainable due to excessive loss of troops. Apart from the few teams of newly-created Berserk Demon Warriors in the castle, only the Great Demon Slave was left.

It could be said that Prinz was exhausted to death.

Chen Rui won the final victory of this protracted war. The nagas and elementals were overjoyed. Dodo was even more smirking and shouting long live the great, supreme and unique master. It seemed it was indeed true that the slime’s learning ability was extraordinary in certain aspects.

Prinz came to Lich King dejectedly, “Great Royal Highness, I’m sorry, I was caught in the trick of that guy. Please give me another chance, I will surely…”

“Shut up! You trash!” Glorios said sternly, “The battle that can be finished in at most half an hour actually dragged on for nearly 3 hours! You still lost in the end! Since you lost to him, you should pay for the corresponding bargaining chips.”

Prinz showed a panic expression, “No! Your Highness, he is just an intruder while I’m your most pious servant! I will kill him now and dedicate his soul to Your Highness for atonement!”

After Prinz finished speaking, he turned into a light green smoke and rushed toward Chen Rui. Before he could reach, his whole body suddenly froze in the air. Little blue flames appeared in the intangible body.

Immediately afterward, the light smoke began to burn. Prinz screamed tragically. The resentful souls in the distance showed empathy expressions.

“No!”

“Your Highness, spare me!”

The Lich King ignored him. A callous dim light flashed in his eye sockets. Prinz’s tragic screams gradually extinguished. His entire body turned into nothingness in the little blue light flames.

“Trash!” The Lich King said disdainfully and turned his gaze to Chen Rui, “I give you a choice. Dedicate your soul and become my servant. Otherwise, once you lose to me in the game, this trash will be your role model after confessing the ancient secret technique.”

“Your servant… I have seen the end of this role model.” Chen Rui said calmly.

“Very good! Don’t regret it.” Lich King slowly came to the table and sat down, “The game just now is really boring. If there is anything that can be called a highlight, it is your spirit power. Your spirit power should have reached the level of Demon Overlord which is far better than Prinz. It’s a pity that the trash was unaware of it. Speaking of it, your learning ability is also commendable. If you really want to attack, it probably only takes 1 hour to kill Prinz. The reason why you take so long is because you want to further adapt and understand the control skills and the characteristics of both camps’ army… so as to cope with the next match with me.”

“Good eyesight, I know I can’t hide from Your Highness Glorios.” Chen Rui shrugged, “Pardon me, I’m really a novice, and the time is too short, so I have to use this opportunity to learn. I don’t want to be completely defeated by Your Highness Glorios in my first match.”

“No matter what tricks you use, you can’t make up the huge gap in strength and experience,” Glorios sneered, “I’m not Prinz the trash. I don’t foresee that you have the slightest chance of winning. I have no patience to dawdle with you. 1 round to determine the winner!”

Chen Rui sighed, “At this point, I have no choice. Then Your Highness, please sign a competition contract with me. If Your Highness wins, I will surrender my life and the ancient undead secret technique. If I luckily win, please give up the ‘chips’ you previously won from the dark elementals.”

“Oh? At the level of your soul, are you not afraid that I will unilaterally tear up the contract if you sign a contract with me?”

“As I said, I have no other choice. In a sense, this is more representative of my sincerity and determination.” Chen Rui’s words actually had a hidden agenda. Putting aside other matters, the spiritual link’s skill of contract cancellation would make Lich King suffer a loss.

Glorios certainly didn’t know this. Looking at the contract light in Chen Rui’s hand, he laughed strangely, “As you wish.”

The 2 successfully signed the equality contract. Glorios spoke up, “Okay, let’s start! Just choose the ‘Death Game’ just now. Since you are a novice, I can let you choose the Order camp directly. Aguile. Shura, a guy with a strange last name… It will only take 10 minutes at most, and your soul is mine. I will let you enjoy it before slowly annihilating you.”

It was not possible to use a pseudonym to sign a contract. However, with a skill like the spiritual link, even a strange name could be used to sign a contract.

Strena and others were all worried. Everyone knew that Lich King was a powerful existence that defeated the Dark Elemental King. His amount of spirit power and card skills were far from Prinz’s and the like. Chen Rui’s winning rate in this battle was minimal. Dodo was covering his eyes and dared not look at it. Although Chen Rui did not bet on the lives of other people, once the master died, then his servant would also be annihilated.

In the midst of the flashing light, the game began under the nervous gaze of Strena and others.

Unlike the protracted battle in the previous round, this round ended in around 10 minutes as Glorios said. However, Royal Highness Lich King guessed the beginning correctly, but not the ending.

The winner was actually Chen Rui.

If there were muscles on Glorios’ skull face, one would be able to see a rich and intriguing expression.

“How is this possible?!” Glorios’ voice in disbelief. Although he despised the rookie, he did not throw the game just now. However, the opponent attacked the castle at an unimaginable speed. This force was actually the lowest grade Farmer and a small number of Champion Swordsmen who were strong in defense but weak in offense. This force did not attack the castle. Instead, it shamelessly turned the target of the attack to Demon Slaves and the resources. They killed the production Demon Slaves and occupied the resources.

Glorios didn’t expect Chen Rui, a rookie, to actually have this surprise move. He quickly used the remaining resources to create some Demon Warriors, and finally cleared out these invaders. Chen Rui had used the resources to create new forces. It was still Champion Swordsmen and Farmers going to Glorios’ castle to kill the producers and occupy resources while starting to attack the castle. This repeatedly continued which made Glorios unable to catch his breath. Seeing that incredibly proficient use of technique, he was obviously familiar with this.

Poor Glorios had many strategies, but he couldn’t use it. In the end, he was suppressed and defeated at the feet of a group of Farmers and Champion Swordsmen of the lowest rank.

“Damn Aguile! How dare you fool me!” By this time, Glorios couldn’t believe that Chen Rui was just a rookie— He is not only a veteran, but also a guy who is quite good at pretending! He actually fooled me!

Chen Rui felt innocent. It is indeed just my second time playing ‘Fate Showdown’. It’s just that the number of my matches in real-time strategy games is 4-digit? 5-digit? I can’t remember it either.

Although Lich King was angry, he did not tear up the contract. Certain restrictions on the Dark Elemental King and dark elementals were immediately canceled and their freedom was restored.

Hegel glanced at Chen Rui, and the red lights in his eyes moved slightly. He was silent, then he walked aside with the dark elementals.

“I admit that your pretentious trick is brilliant.” Glorios said ghastly, “But I won’t be caught in your tricks again!”

“Then the chips for the next round should be allowing us to enter the Tower of Destruction, right?”

Lich King laughed slyly, “You have successfully infuriated me. You still want to enter the Tower of Destruction so soon? Don’t think of running away until I’m satisfied!”

Chen Rui had expected that the opponent would not give up easily. He asked, “Since this is the case… then what is Your Highness’ next bargaining chip?”

“Since you are proficient in the ancient undead secret technique, you should know the value of these resentful souls. Here are… 200 million or 300 million or more resentful souls. In the next round, I bet 10 million, and you can only bet your life and the undead secret technique. If you can win all my chips, then only we talk about entering the Tower of Destruction! Sign the contract! Now!”

Chen Rui looked at the sea of resentful souls behind, then he looked at the contract power in Glorios’ hands. His response was delayed by half a beat before he answered, “Oh“.

He felt that this sentence had some of Zola’s demeanor, but unfortunately, it made Lich King, who didn’t know how to appreciate it, more vigilance.

After the draw, Chen Rui was lucky enough to draw Order camp again. Lich King sneered, “Let me remind you first, your trick can only be used for one time!”

Facts had proved that Glorios was very sad to be cheated by this ‘trick’ again. 15 minutes later, the game ended again with exactly the same failure. Chen Rui once again quickly succeeded in quick offense.

“These 10 million resentful souls are yours! Again… Impossible! Damn guy! Play again…the entire Land of Hatred echoed the furious roar of Lich King from time to time.

TL: Oh nono, Lich King more like Rip King. He has fallen into the endless loop of failure…

chapters.title: Chapter 620 - Reverse! Failed Victory
chapters.body:
Chapter 620 - Reverse! Failed Victory

Chapter 620: Reverse! Failed V ictory

The ‘Fate Showdown’’ card table continued to shine before finally fading. The hot blue light in Glorios’ eye sockets also dimmed. Even if there was no expression on the skull’s face, one could still sense the incredible shock in His Highness Lich King’s mind.

Glorios was really in disbelief. As an immortal corpse necromancer, he had not dreamed in tens of thousands of years, but right now he did feel like being in a dream as if everything he experienced just now was unrealistic, but his logic told him that these were true.

He couldn’t remember how many rounds of Death Game were played, but he only remembered that he won a total of 4 times. The resentful souls that he recaptured these 4 times were quickly won by the opponent again. It was only when there were no more chips in his hand that he woke up.

The sea of resentful souls like the sea were all unexpectedly lost to that Aguile. Shura!

Bullied. He was being bullied from the beginning to the end. Glorios even suspected that the 4 “wins” were just baits that were deliberately given by the opponent. The purpose was to make him lose inextricably and bet all-out.

The previous Farmers’ quick attack technique seemed to be just 1 of the endless strategies of ‘Aguile’. The subsequent tactics experienced afterward were unheard of, so he could not deal with it in a short time. In the end, His Highness Lich King had to shamefully imitate the opponent’s tactics.

Even so, he still couldn’t change the one-sided situation.

For example, the tower defense tactics of grabbing resources. When Glorios went to grab Chen Rui’s resources, he was severely defeated by Chen Rui’s magic towers. He only demolished 1 or 2 of the opponent’s towers after many casualties. Then, when he imitated the same tactics in the next game to build the towers, the opponent just sent a team of the lowest Demon Warrior, plus 2 Demon Magician Master wandering around; they ran away after just fighting for a short while. He shattered a defensive tower at a very small price. The cost of building these defensive towers alone would far exceed the production of the mine during this time period. This small group of people almost exhausted the resources. Before he figured out this tactic, the opponent immediately changed to a new tactic…

In the past hundreds of thousands of years, Glorios had also “played” with hundreds of opponents. Even if his level of magic cards was not the best in the Demon Realm, he was definitely 1 of the few. He never thought that he would encounter such a powerful opponent.

With the power of Glorios as a corpse necromancer, he could feel that the true age of this opponent was only in his twenties at most. However, his attainments in magic cards far exceeded his age category. Not only is his skill and tactics incredible, but he also has unimaginable combat experience like he has experienced the tempering of thousands of opponents- This is an ancient magic game which should have been lost now. Is this kid a carrier body of an ancient soul?

Lich King naturally did not expect that in another dimension with a widespread computer network, there were more than tens of thousands of such ‘super-level’ game lovers. Chen Rui’s level was just average at best compared to those people.

‘Fate Showdown’ was almost lost in the Demon Realm. Even though His Highness Lich King was an enthusiast who lived for many tens of thousands of years, the experience he had with his opponents was pitifully less compared to Chen Rui’s game experience. After Chen Rui became familiar with the attributes of soldiers and buildings, it was not surprising that Lich King was completely bullied.

When Chen Rui first encountered tactics such as one push victory or towers demolishing strategy in online battles in the past, he was also bullied to death by his opponents. Sometimes he wanted to smash the monitors. Therefore, he could understand Glorios’ feelings. Of course, despite understanding, he would still bully him.

“Your Highness Glorios, I was lucky enough to win all your chips. Then, please fulfill the contract and let us enter the Tower of Destruction.”

“Don’t forget, our contract is to ‘discuss’ about entering the Tower of Destruction after winning all my chips! I didn’t say to let you in! Now let’s have a good ‘discussion’!” Glorios gritted his teeth as he said, “Let’s consider that you won the previous one. Now, let’s bet the last one! I use my soul to bet against you, you can only use your own soul! If you refuse, then I will activate all the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts to kill you all!”

“Your Highness Glorios, let’s not go too far,” Chen Rui pondered, “Before we make the last bet, the chips that I just won should be cashed out? According to the contract, those resentful souls are all mine.”

Lich King said coldly, “I will naturally not regret it. From now on, these resentful souls will be yours. Our contract will end here!”

The light of the contract flashed, then it disappeared. Chen Rui felt that there were countless incoming senses in his spirit power which was as vast as the sea. It was the soul senses of those resentful souls.

“I want to remind you that as long as the Tower of Destruction exists, these resentful souls will never leave the Land of Hatred. Unless you can become the master of the Tower of Destruction, you will not be able to take them away.”

Glorios’ words made Chen Rui frown, but his main purpose this time was not the resentful souls. He asked, “So…Your Highness Glorios, do we need to change the game for the next final game?”

“Put away your little tricks! I have my own opinion!” Glorios said coldly, “I will bet with you in the next game, Victory Race!”

Chen Rui suddenly understood the other party’s intentions. His spirit power reached the S+ level which was equal to Glorios, but as Earth Elemental King said that day, his spirit power’s ‘quality’ aspect had not really reached the level of the peak stage Demon Overlord due to lack of understanding of the real Demon Overlord level. Compared with the real body of the Lich King who was already a kingdom powerhouse, he was far inferior in terms of use or control. This was precisely the most important factor for the Victory Race.

Chen Rui showed a thoughtful expression, and he finally spoke up, “Your Highness is a true magic card lover. You should understand that I do have some lack of advantage in the Victory Race, but I’m also a person who can afford to lose. If we are to bet, let’s be even more bold… Compared with death, the more painful thing is living death. Let’s change the bet, in addition to entering the Tower of Destruction and the resentful souls, how about putting half of our souls?”

“You mean… soul splitting?” Glorios’ eye sockets flashed 2 blue lights. “This is a pretty good idea. A life with half of its soul missing will always be incomplete whether it is power or realm even if it can barely survive. At the time of splitting, the pain is unimaginable. Are you sure you can endure the pain that life is worse than death?”

“Before the outcome is determined, everything is possible. Perhaps Your Highness will be the one enduring the pain by then.” A strange look quickly flashed past Chen Rui’s face.

Lich King laughed strangely, “I suddenly admire you a little. As a reward, regardless of whether you win or lose this round, I will let you enter the Tower of Destruction. I want to see, upon coming to the last level after all your hard work, what you will be like when facing the Dark Dragon Emperor’s inheritance which can be obtained, but you are unable to obtain it as your soul is incomplete?”

“Whether I win or lose, I can enter the Tower of Destruction?” Chen Rui’s eyes flashed with a strange light. This is really an unexpected gain.

Lich King nodded, “Of course, there is also another reward that is I will imprison half of your soul in the kingdom forever. I’ll burn and torture it with the soul devouring flames every minute and every second!”

“Okay!” Chen Rui agreed without hesitation, “Then I Aguile. Shura will sign a contract with Your Highness under the name of ‘Shura’. If I lose to Your Highness, then Shura will be split out and be imprisoned and tortured forever by Your Highness!”

Lich King’s blue pupils were shining brightly, “I can see that you seem to be very confident, which allows me to enjoy more pleasure when destroying you just like… dealing with the Dark Elemental King.”

This sentence made Dark Elemental King Hegel snorted. Losers were always in the wrong. He was indeed defeated by the Lich King before. Although he was furious, he was speechless.

Chen Rui seemed to smile more happily, “To quote Your Highness, I can’t wait for the next game.”

The 2 reactivated the power of the contract. After Chen Rui signed a contract with Glorios under the name of Shura, the last crucial game began under everyone’s attention.

Glorios learned the lessons of the previous Death Game, so he would not give Chen Rui extra opportunities again. The game would be determined in 1 round.

The light of the card table flashed. While Death God’s scythe waved, the cards were turned over on the table to be checked.

After the card verification was over, the cards were automatically shuffled at a super high speed. Chen Rui was intently staring at the magic cards that moved quickly. Glorios sneered secretly- This kind of shuffling is not only extremely fast, but it also mixes with the power of special rule. it is impossible for even the kingdomized powerhouse to master it; they can only use the sensing ability to minimize errors. The amount of spirit power of this “Aguile ” is only barely reaching the later stage Demon Overlord level. It is absolutely impossible to fully grasp the movement of each card from the process of card verification to shuffling. It will be counterproductive and cause more misjudgments.

Glorios’ thoughts was indeed correct, but he didn’t know that this opponent whose spirit power barely reached S+ had the [Deep Analysis] skill. Otherwise, he would definitely choose the ‘Spectacular War’ which was based on luck in the last game rather than the suggested “Victory Race”.

Based on the previous lesson, although Lich King appeared to be contemptuous on the surface, in fact, he did not dare to underestimate him in the slightest. He truly achieved the ‘strategic contempt of the enemy and non-underestimation of the enemy’s tactics’. His spirit power was fully unleashed from the start. He quickly grabbed the card with the highest probability in his judgment immediately. At the same time, he started to interfere with Chen Rui’s card selection.

However, if His Highness Lich King knew that Chen Rui didn’t even think about winning this round even if he was confident, Lich King would be vomiting blood with anger, provided that the skeleton could still vomit blood…

In fact, Chen Rui had quietly set up a ‘trap’ when he signed with Glorios under the name “Aguile. Shura” at the first match.

Due to the cruelty of the Lich King now… From Chen Rui’s point of view, it should be called ’support’. The effect of this trap was even beyond his original expectations. Therefore, the outcome of this game was obvious,

The time for card selection was only 10 seconds. Within a short time, both their spirit power had battled each other numerous times. All of a sudden, Glorios had a strange “illusion” that the spirit power of “Aguile. Shura” began to become extremely unstable; he was sometimes strong and sometimes weak as if he was engaged in a fierce internal struggle.

It must be the enemy’s trick. Glorios had a preconceived notion, and he didn’t think too much. He just tried his best to win. The opponent’s spirit power changed more and more drastically. Meanwhile, time seemed to slow down until that spirit power became an extremely strange and unfathomable feeling. The pressure on his side had doubled, and the competition had become increasingly fierce.

In the eyes of the audience outside, 10 seconds passed in a flash. Both parties had already selected their own cards. The rest of the cards were burned.

“Hmph! I didn’t expect you still hide such a powerful spirit power.” Glorios sneered, “But no what trick you use, you cannot change the outcome of your failure.”

Chen Rui revealed a strange smile. His slightly squinted eyes glowed with a blood-red color that was not there before, “In a certain memory I have obtained, there is such a scene where the gambling party who shows the card first will surely be the loser. Today, I will break this so-called ‘convention’.”

With that said, he revealed the main card in front of him. 2 Devil King, 2 Silver Queen, and 1 Glorious Cavalry.

“Really?” Glorios also revealed his main card. Chaos camp; 3 Phantom Concubine and a pair of Demon Slave. Full house of the same camp. Judging by the current cards, Glorios had an absolute advantage.

“This is what you mean by breaking the convention?” Glorios smiled, “However, you still have the last hope. If your secondary card is a neutral card, then you can probably change the main card of the Order camp to me. If you are lucky, you can trade Cavalry for my Phantom Concubine, then we can maybe make a tie? Then, quickly reveal your secondary card.”

The secondary card in front of Chen Rui flipped over. His expression suddenly froze.

Staff – Order main card. The card pattern was valid. 2 pairs of mixed camp; a very small card pattern.

The hearts of Strena and others who were watching the poker table suddenly sank. It seemed that they lost their last hope too.

Glorios laughed, “Is it unexpected? Although your spirit power has reached the peak stage of the Demon Overlord and your attribute is very weird, don’t forget that my real strength is the kingdomized powerhouse. Even if my spirit power is limited to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord level, my skills and control are far beyond your reach. This is actually just a small trick. I have replaced the neutral card you want to reverse the situation during the competition.”

“Half of your soul is mine.” Glorios smiled as he opened the secondary card in front of him. In an instant, everyone looked surprised.

The secondary card of Glorios is a sun!

Since his previous main card was full house of the Chaos camp, and his secondary card is Order camp, then the card pattern is invalid. He directly loses!

Even if this secondary card is just a neutral card, Glorios will also not lose, but this is an Order card! Glorios couldn’t believe his eyes. Perhaps ‘sun’ could express what he wanted to say most at this time.

“Are you satisfied with the secondary I gave you? It’s actually just a small trick.” Chen Rui’s evil laughter sounded, “For some guy, this is actually a failed victory, but for you… I can return that sentence to you. Half of your soul is mine.”

TL: I almost thought Chen Rui ‘won’, now Shura gets half of the soul of Lich King…

chapters.title: Chapter 621 - Life Box
chapters.body:
Chapter 621 - Life Box

Chapter 621: Life Box

“Impossible!” Glorios roared, “How could I lose! How could you, an ant, get past my sensing!”

“In the blockbusters, suspense is usually left at the end,” Chen Rui’s smile was a little stiff, the black in his pupils seemed to cover the blood color, but it was suppressed by the blood color again, “Want to struggle? Your calculations are good, but unfortunately, I’m the ultimate winner in this gambling game!”

Glorios didn’t know that the last 2 sentences of the other party were not actually directed toward him. At this moment, Lich King’s heart was filled with the raging anger caused by the failure. He gritted his teeth and said, “Damn it, don’t be so proud! I’m going to kill you all. Let your soul suffer in my kingdom forever!”

Chen Rui’s body trembled slightly, his face was still smiling, “Oh? Want to back out?”

“So what if I back out? You’re all going to die!” Glorios shouted. As his mind turned, the contract signed by the 2 parties suddenly suspended in front of them. His body turned into plumes of smoke with blue flames that wrapped the contract. The contract suddenly burned, making crackling and popping noises.

The Dark Elemental King outside the scene reacted fastest. With a wave of his hands, a dark golden light blasted toward Glorios. However, Glorios was already prepared. There was some kind of irregular twist in the air as if there were countless pairs of transparent hands. The dark golden energy was continuously resolved and weakened in this process. It was disintegrated before it got close to the table.

After the blast, the blue light of Glorios’s pupils dimmed a lot as though he exhausted a lot of energy. However, after the smoke gradually dissipated, the contract remained intact.

Lich King exclaimed in horror, “You’re nothing but a Demon Overlord at best. Why can’t I cancel the contract?!”

“Haha!” Chen Rui laughed. His bloodred eyes flashed strangely, “According to the contract, I will accept half of your soul. As a reward, I can cancel another condition of the contract…”

As he said, the contract immediately shone brightly. Glorios covered his head in pain and kept screaming, “My soul! No! No! What kind of existence are you?!”

Chen Rui took a deep breath. Strands of golden soul power floated out of Glorios as if it was being pulled by some kind of suction. It was completely devoured.

Chen Rui’s body trembled more and more violently after he devoured the soul power, but his eyes glowed as he laughed, “Very delicious soul power. The next time I come out, it will be time for us to finally end this. It will be very soon…”

Before he finished speaking, his pupils were constantly alternating between black and red before it finally turned black.

After recovering to his normal state, Chen Rui gasped violently as he squeezed his fists unwillingly- It was originally a fairly complete plan, using the contract of the match to borrow the kingdom of Lich King to split and confine Shura. Unexpectedly, Shura actually appeared again at the critical moment, desperately snatching control of the body, and he finally won the match. As Shura said, this round was a failed victory for Chen Rui.

Shura not only devoured half of Glorios’ soul, but he also canceled Glorios’ contract which was the clause that they could enter the Tower of Destruction regardless of victory or defeat. Glorios, who was extremely injured, naturally would not give up so easily.

The figure of Lich King had drifted like a light smoke toward the scream filled with indescribable rage that sounded through the entire Land of Hatred, “Damn it! Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts! Kill them all!”

The dark red light appeared in the eyes of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts that had been silent like a statue near the Tower of Hatred. They all became alive in an instant.

The largest Dark Iron Mystic Ghost slowly raised the greatsword in its hand and pointed it at Chen Rui and others. The Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts all rushed toward them like a black torrent.

With the number of people on Chen Rui’s side, there was no chance of winning at all in the face of such a terrifying number of Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts. There was also a kingdomized powerhouse clone, Glorios, next to them.

The Dark Elemental King and others hurriedly prepared to fight. Chen Rui’s mind moved, and his figure appeared in the air instantly. His loud voice spread from afar, “Resentful souls! I know that your souls have been tied to the Land of Hatred, forever suffering endless torture and curse. I have become your master. I now swear by my soul, as long as you clear out these Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts and help us enter the Tower of Destruction, I will do my best to help you completely liberate yourself from pain!”

The resentful souls were in a commotion as they looked at each other as if they couldn’t believe it. Because of the Land of Hatred’s curse, the resentful souls would not die. Once annihilated, they would take a long time to slowly regenerate in endless pain. This process was no less than hell-like suffering which was a living death. Prinz’s “death” previously was also like this.

Because of the Lich King’s remaining prowess, no resentful souls dared to take the lead.

Seeing that the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts were approaching soon, Strena’s voice sounded, “The heroic spirits of the naga tribe! I’m the current young chief of the nagas, the inheritor of the golden tent. I followed this man to eliminate the life sacrifice and suffering that has plagued the naga tribe for countless years. Along the way, he proved himself with actions and made me choose to trust him unreservedly. I also entrusted the lives of my tribe people and myself to him! Please believe him like I do! Help him! He will definitely help everyone out of pain!”

As soon as Strena said these few words, a lot of the naga souls from the sea of resentful souls rushed out toward the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts. This action was like a catalyst. Countless resentful souls rushed out. The vast sea of resentful souls charged wave after wave toward the black torrent of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts.

The 2 forces collided in an instant. The resentful souls were like phantoms. They had a certain chance of being immune to physical attacks, and their attacks also had strong curse power and poison. Unfortunately, this kind of poison or curse power was completely ineffective for the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts. The amazing power of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts was fully unleashed. It was difficult for the attacks of the resentful souls to break through the extremely high defense of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts while the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts had a high chance of tearing resentful souls easily.

However, there were too many resentful souls. An army of ants could often kill the elephants. In the face of the surging waves, the “torrent” of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts was at best a small river. Their number began to decrease rapidly.

Glorios didn’t expect to get a taste of his own medicine. The resentful souls whom he lost to the opponent were used to deal with the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts. Suddenly, the blue lights in his eyes were blazing. The translucent little flames fluttered and spread out all over.

The resentful souls that touched the flame screamed and disappeared. This was the soul fire of the Lich King’s kingdom. The soulless Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts were not affected. The resentful souls wailed constantly as they were very afraid of the flames while the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts still maintained this powerful combat power without any feeling. The situation was reversed again. The situation was in a stalemate for a while.

A large amount of black gas burst from Hegel’s body and formed a circle that protected everyone including Chen Rui. The black gas and the soul fire seemed to be resisting each other, but Hegel clearly looked exhausted.

“So what if you are the Dark Elemental King; this is not the world of elements!” Glorios gritted his teeth and said, “Although most of my kingdom is made up of dark elements and it is not comparable to your origin power, but I’m a kingdomized powerhouse. You have no chance of winning. Any resistance is just a dying struggle.”

“Kingdomized? It’s just pseudo kingdomization!” Hegel sneered, “Even if your soul was severely injured just now, you still did not appear in your real body! You must be restricted by the relevant rules, so you can only appear in the form of clone. You can’t really activate the kingdom power! You’re anxious to kill us because you want to heal and restore the soul power that has been severely damaged as soon as possible! Let me guess… the life box containing the soul essence is hidden somewhere in the Land of Hatred. At this point, as long as we find the life box and destroy it, then you will also be completely annihilated!”

As the bone staff in Glorios’ hand swung repeatedly, the light of the Land of Hatred dimmed. A terrifying pressure spread rapidly. The movement of Chen Rui and the others became restricted. The Dark Elemental King’s protective black gas also shrank under the pressure.

Everyone had an instinctive feeling as if they were ants and Glorios was the supreme master; they could only be slain as per his wish. They could hardly have any resisting thoughts. The most obvious reaction was the resentful souls. Their power was suppressed to the lowest point, and their fighting spirit was greatly dampened as they fled around. They were completely suppressed by the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts which were far fewer than them.

This feeling was not an illusion, but something like “Rule”- This is no longer territory power, but kingdom power!

Even Strena showed an uncomfortable look. The only people who remained normal were Hegel and Chen Rui. Chen Rui frowned as the appearance of stars appeared around his body. With the buff of [Galaxy Territory], Hegel’s protective black gas expanded slightly. He was secretly surprised.

“Hmph… Such a bizarre power. You are actually not limited by my kingdom power. How can a small corner of your territory compare with the whole kingdom?” Lich King’s tone suddenly became sharp and strange, “No matter what kind of existence is behind you, I will crush you today, then I’ll cut your soul apart inch by inch!”

Countless whirring figures began to appear in the air. It was the images of Death Gods holding scythes as they flew toward Chen Rui and others. These “Death Gods” were similar to Broc’s [Incubus Territory]. Their ethereal figures transformed into dissipating smoke after being attacked, then they quickly merged back into their original form. However, their attacks were not illusory. The terrifying scythe had strange characteristics. Many dark elementals and nagas on the edge of the black gas protection turned into light smoke and annihilated after just being slashed from the distance.

Hegel’s protective black gas suddenly changed into tens of thousands of “silk threads” flying toward Death God. After Death God’s void body was contaminated with black gas, it quickly merged into a solid body, then it was shattered like glass by the black silk.

It was just that the smoke in the kingdom was inexhaustible. New Death Gods were constantly being formed. Even if Hegel had the buff from the [Galaxy Territory] and the dark elements’ origin power had a certain restraining effect, it would not last.

“I can’t hold on for long. We must find the life box and destroy it as soon as possible!” Hegel said solemnly, “Although I am strongly disturbed, my dark elemental heart can sense that the soul that echoes with this kingdom is nearby! You must cover me!”

“Okay!” Chen Rui knew that it was urgent, so he agreed without thinking even if he could not activate the [Royal Star Transformation].

TL: Damn Shura, he really likes to mess everything up.

chapters.title: Chapter 622 - The Real Life Box
chapters.body:
Chapter 622 - The Real Life Box

Chapter 622: The Real Life Box

As Chen Rui took a deep breath, his power rose.

Since his initial faith crystals were used to cancel Adeline’s possession, the remaining number was no longer enough to activate the [Royal Star Transformation]. The resentful souls outside were unable to beat the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts as they were suppressed by the kingdom power. The situation was critical.

With the current strength, it was impossible to finish off Glorios forcefully even if it was just a clone-activated pseudo kingdom power.

If he wanted to win, the only hope was to destroy the life box, so he had to take a risk.

A mask suddenly appeared on Chen Rui’s face. In an instant, the smoke nearby the Death God was all devoured like a long whale sucking water. However, the kingdom was completely different from a territory. For the kingdom that shrouded the entire Land of Hatred, the God-Eating Mask could only absorb the spirit power of this small area; it couldn’t shake the spirit power of the entire kingdom. Just like the [Galaxy Territory] skill could strengthen oneself and the allies, but it couldn’t weaken the entire kingdom.

Nevertheless, this moment was enough to buy Hegel time.

The Dark Elemental King didn’t waste Chen Rui’s efforts. He turned into a puff of black smoke and rushed out quickly. The direction of the attack was actually the army of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts.

With the departure of the Dark Elemental King, the initial protective power disappeared. The rest of the people suddenly felt that the pressure doubled.

Chen Rui activated the aura of Mystic Jade Armor coupled with the buff effect of [Galaxy Territory]. Strena obviously benefited the most as she had broken free from the suppressive power of the kingdom. In the clear clanging sound, the green eyes of the female naga warrior suddenly turned golden. The 6 scimitars all burned in red flames. The criss-crossed sharp qi turned into a flame greatsword which slashed toward Glorios.

The ‘Death God smoke’ along the way was unable to gather for a while as they were forcibly slashed apart by the intensive fire attribute sharp qi.

Facing the flame greatsword, Glorios stretched out a white finger and tapped on it. The greatsword instantly disintegrated into sharp qi which was then decomposed and weakened by countless transparent ‘hands’. It disappeared in the blink of an eye.

Strena’s full blow at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord was actually easily disintegrated by a finger. The level of strength between Demon Overlord and kingdomized was very different. If it weren’t for the special origin power of the Dark Elemental King, perhaps she would have lost.

At this time, the Dark Elemental King had quickly rushed into the army of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts. Judging from the trail of the black smoke, it should be the huge-sized leader of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts group- This leader has not taken any action and is just commanding the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts to fight, unlike ordinary massacre machines. Judging from Glorios’ actions, the life box must be hidden in the Dark Iron Mystic Ghost!

Lich King screamed with slight panic. He ignored the counterattack of Strena and waved the bone staff. Countless Death God smoke quickly chased the black smoke. A large number of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts also appeared in front of the giant leader to surround the Dark Elemental King.

Glorios’ reaction reaffirmed the determination of the Dark Elemental King. He actually adopted a desperate approach by completely ignoring the obstacles and attacks along the way. He had suffered many attacks in a short time before he finally approached the leader of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts.

The black smoke suddenly stopped. Hegel’s exclamation came out, “Wait! This is just a trace of the soul breath that has been deliberately buffed! I was fooled!”

With that said, he was overwhelmed by the torrent of the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts from all directions. Lich King let out a triumphant laugh, “Smartass! Do you think you can easily find my life box?”

“Glorios! Watch out!” Chen Rui’s figure appeared in front of Glorios. Several huge light balls flew over.

“It’s just ants!” Fighting was not a card game. Glorios naturally didn’t take Chen Rui seriously as he was only at the peak stage of the Demon Emperor.

The hatred of the split soul caused Lich King to hate this ant deeply. As soon as his mind moved, countless twisted and cut openings appeared in the space. The [Aurora Shots] were split and disintegrated in the blink of an eye. The terrifying aftershock spread to Chen Rui, who was rushing over, splitting his whole body into pieces- To be more precise, he split into countless demonic flies.

Almost at the same time, something exploded in front of Glorios.

This was a swollen package which seemed to contain a lot of bottles and cans. In the sound of the explosion, the juice of countless crumbs spurted out swiftly.

This explosive force was quite amazing. Even a Demon Overlord powerhouse couldn’t take it lightly. However, this level of damage was nothing at all for a powerhouse with a kingdomized strength level. It was not even comparable to Strena’s attack just now. Nevertheless, what was amazing was that this explosion made Glorios let out a scream just like when his soul was split; the pain was definitely not feigned.

The core of the explosion was Zola’s imitation of Zeray, burst bombs. However, the burst bomb was just a combustion aid in this attack. The most important thing was the bursting black juice.

Grand master level black potions – Resurrection potion.

For an undead, the grand master-level resurrection potion was more terrifying than any poison. It was not the first time Chen Rui used this kind of ‘sulfur acid’. When he was looking for Paglio’s treasure back then in the Silent Night Wetland, he had tested the terrifying power of the resurrection potion on the corpse necromancer, Guradam.

Given the strength of Glorios, there was more than 1 resurrection potion this time. Speaking of it, this was the most extravagant bomb of the Demon Realm. If those potion masters knew that the Demon Realm’s discontinued high grade black potions were wasted in such a way, they would definitely be completely devastated.

Glorios also never thought that this ant-like enemy had such a big killing move. The Death God who was within the explosion range made a sizzling sound and disappeared. Glorios’ body was penetrated with countless ‘bullet holes’. The golden magic robe which condensed the power of the undead was in tatters.

The damage on the surface was fine. The soul attached to the clone was the one suffering from heavy damage.

Glorios suffered severe injuries in Chen Rui’s hands twice in a row. He was so sick of him. He waved the bone staff while enduring the pain. Countless transparent ‘hands’ grabbed Chen Rui. At this time, [Demonic Flies Transformation] had reached the time limit and couldn’t be used again in a while. Once he was caught, his body would truly be ripped apart.

At the critical moment, the sound of [Sonic Boom] sounded. Chen Rui’s fast-flying figure brought out countless trajectories like water waves. He ‘slid’ away from those approaching ‘hands’ like a mud loach that slipped away.

[Sonic Boom]+[Star Diversion]!

Glorios’s trump card failed again. He was frightened and furious. Just as he was about to chase, he suddenly sensed something. When he turned his head, he saw an unnoticeable wisp of smoke flying close to a place behind him.

The blue flames in Lich King’s eyes flashed with unconcealable horror. The light smoke’s target was actually the Death God statue holding the scythe in the center of the ‘Fate Showdown’ card table.

“You’re the smartass! Don’t underestimate the king of dark element!”

The voice was Hegel, who should have been swarmed in the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts, “The one in front is just the origin power that I separated! You can’t lie to me. This is the real hiding place of your life box!”

Chen Rui had already felt Hegel’s real movement from the [Analytical Eyes]. In order to cooperate with this tactic, he used the super sulfuric acid bomb of the resurrection potions which successfully attracted Glorios’ attention.

“No!” Lich King yelled out loud. This time it was definitely a real panic. He even gave up chasing and killing the most hated enemy, Chen Rui. He exhausted his kingdom power and rushed toward Hegel frantically.

It was too late. Hegel who turned into the light smoke had already penetrated the Death God statue.

A crack appeared on the sturdy statues after just what seemed like a soft sweep of the light smoke. Then, the crack spread rapidly. In the blink of an eye, the long-handled scythe fell. The shattered pieces scattered on the ground and turned into powder.

After Hegel smashed the Death God’s statue, he suddenly revealed a surprised expression. By right Glorios should have disappeared after the life box was smashed. However, the tremendous kingdom power still came surging unabatedly, accompanied by Lich King’s rage.

This was much beyond Hegel’s expectation. The attack just now exhausted all his power. He hurriedly gathered his power to defend. When he was knocked away by the terrifying kingdom power, a large amount of black gas leaked from his body. The red lights in his eyes was dim. He obviously took huge damage from it.

After the Lich King hit Hegel severely, he didn’t intend to stop at all. He continued to attack with all his strength. He was about to break the Dark Elemental King to pieces once and for all.

At this moment, the Lich King’s skeleton body shook and all his movements stopped. The kingdom’s power was frozen in the air. As he slowly turned his head, he saw Chen Rui had appeared in front of the pile of shattered powder at some point of time. He was grabbing something in his hand.

That long-handled scythe.

“Who said that the life box must be a box?” Chen Rui said lightly, “Star iron, emery sand, blue pattern mithril, red silk crystal… This scythe is not only extremely sturdy, but it also can interfere and isolate sensing power. It is indeed the best container for soul essence.”

“Put it down!” Glorios’ voice was full of fierceness. Chen Rui could hear the obvious sternness.

Chen Rui smiled calmly, “No doubt, this scythe is your real life box. This kind of mixed metal is made with the secret technique which has a high degree of solidity. It cannot be destroyed by ordinary means. No wonder it is still intact after Hegel’s strike, but you should have been taken aback. That’s why you were so anxious to kill Hegel to cover up.”

“Destroy it!” Hegel yelled and pounced at Glorios. “As long as it is destroyed, not only Glorios, but the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts will also stop acting!”

“You can’t destroy this scythe!” Glorios’ voice was slightly shaky. Although he knew that the metal was extremely sturdy and contained the soul power of a kingdom-level powerhouse, he had an ominous premonition in his heart for some reason.

Facts had proved that Lich King’s hunch was accurate. When the other party used some means, the mixed metal made using the secret technique was actually quickly weakened. A hole cracked, and the traces of soul essence hidden inside had felt an unprecedented crisis.

It was as if… a little defenseless beauty encountered a strange uncle who was salivating.

TL: 🤤come here baby…

chapters.title: Chapter 623 - The Tower Of Destruction
chapters.body:
Chapter 623 - The Tower Of Destruction

Chapter 623: The Tower Of Destruction

Glorios, who was aware of the greatest crisis, started to go all-out. He fought hard to attack while resisting Hegel’s dark origin power. The terrifying raging wave-like kingdom power seemed to severely injure the Dark Elemental King again. Then, it rushed toward Chen Rui without stopping. At this time, there was a sword in Chen Rui’s hand.

The quillons were 2 back-to-back angels. The swords were all white and engraved with 2 strange marks. The simplicity was full of mysterious breath.

Before the turbulent kingdom power approached, the sword in Chen Rui’s hand had slashed incisively on the fracture of the scythe. In an instant, Glorios and the scythe howled at the same time. The power of the entire kingdom began to be distorted in response to tragic howling.

The snow-like long sword had a special restraint power. The strands of golden soul essence power that initially tried to escape were annihilated like a snowflake encountering a fire.

“No!” The double voices of the scythe and Lich King sounded, “That sword…”

The sword in Chen Rui’s hand was not Northsea, but 1 of the 7 artifacts, the Sword of Fallen Angel.

The mixed metal of the scythe was extremely strong, but those materials just happened to be excellent materials for [Aura Conversion]. Although the whole scythe could not be turned into aura in a short time, it had no problem opening up a hole. The Sword of Fallen Angel had the characteristic of [Soul Searing] which could directly kill and split the soul power of the enemy. Even the soul of the kingdom-level powerhouse stood no chance when it was hit by the Sword of Fallen Angel.

The surrounding kingdom power quickly decayed. Glorios’ figure began to fade as he roared unwillingly, “Damn ant! I didn’t expect to be defeated in your hands… Let’s die together!”

With that said, the bone staff in his hand turned into a ray of blue light and launched toward Chen Rui. After this strike, the soul essence remaining at the scythe fracture was instantly annihilated. Glorios’ body turned into a puddle of ashes.

The mist that shrouded over the entire Land of Hatred dissipated. The Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts, which were besieged by the phantoms, also ceased their actions at the same time; they were drowned by the sea of resentful souls. However, Chen Rui was facing a huge crisis at this moment.

Lich King’s dying strike condensed the final kingdom power which was extremely terrifying. Although Chen Rui had another teleporting skill, he instinctively felt that this strike contained a special power of Rule. No matter what method was used, there was no way to dodge it; he could only resist it forcefully.

Once he was struck by the bone staff full of kingdom power, not only his body, even his soul would be completely destroyed. It was useless even if he had the [Regeneration] feature.

At this time Chen Rui could no longer activate [Demonic Flies Transformation] or [Star Diversion]. A large shield with a simple pattern appeared in his hand- With the strength of Demon Shield, even the abyss lord could destroy it. It should be able to resist this blow. However, I cannot activate [Royal Star Transformation] at the moment and have no time to activate the [Scorching Dragon Possession]. My strength is only the Demon Emperor level. Even if I can survive this, I will suffer extremely serious injuries because of the aftershock.

At the critical moment, a wisp of black gas shrouded the bone staff.

The increasingly rich black gas spread quickly, wrapping it. In the process of wrapping, the blue light on the bone staff was constantly eroded, and the swift momentum suddenly slowed down.

In the end, a bone staff stopped about 2 meters away from Chen Rui and began to break apart. It shattered into powder and dissipated without a trace.

After the thick black gas destroyed the bone staff, its breath had been greatly weakened. It had obviously exhausted a huge amount of power. Then, when it condensed into the body of the Dark Elemental King, it appeared a little thin.

Chen Rui showed a stunned expression. He did not expect that Hegel would risk his life to help him to block the final fatal blow. He only heard the indifferent voice of the Dark Elemental King, “The dark elementals not only hold grudges.”

Chen Rui was taken aback. This was what I said casually when I was betting with Glorios. Hegel actually took it to heart. Isn’t this holding grudges?

Facing the Dark Elemental King who had saved his life but still had a tough attitude, Chen Rui didn’t say much. He just nodded, “I understand.”

Hegel’s gaze turned to Chen Rui’s God-Eating Mask, then he looked at the big shield and long sword. His red pupils suddenly flashed with brilliance, “You are a person full of secrets. Perhaps we will never be friends, but I don’t want to be your enemy. It’s not because you have the power to make the dark elementals fear. In fact, you don’t have this power, at least not yet. As for the real reason… if you live to that day, you will naturally understand. In return for saving the dark elementals, I will not reveal your secrets to anyone.”

“Thank you.” Chen Rui understood that Elemental King had countless years of inherited memory, so his knowledge and experience were extremely rich. He would not be able to hide the “branded goods” like the 7 artifacts from Hegel. It was naturally better to be able to get this promise of keeping the secret.

“Hmph! I’m just repaying your favor! If you don’t help me find the origin fragment, I still won’t save your friend!” Hegel uttered a sentence, ignored Chen Rui, and walked toward the dark elementals.

Chen Rui smiled slightly and followed suit.

After this battle, the Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts, who lost their control core, returned to silent statues. Only about half of them remained. There were many elementals and nagas casualties. There was only 1 water elemental on Chen Rui’s side. The sandmen had been completely annihilated in Lich King’s kingdom due to the weak combat power. Fortunately, Chen Rui had the Earth Elemental King’s gift, sandstone essence, so the sandmen could be resurrected when necessary.

The resentful souls were the most joyful. The annihilation of Glorios made them cheer. Due to the power of the Land of Hatred, the resentful souls still couldn’t really be free, but without the Lich King, the terrifying ruler who took pleasure in torturing everyone, the resentful souls already felt extremely lucky.

Chen Rui planted the Yuan Recovery Tree to help his companions and the dark elementals to heal the injuries. The function of the Yuan Recovery Tree was amazing. Even the resentful souls could quickly recover their soul power.

After comforting the resentful souls, Chen Rui and his companions walked to the final destination, the Tower of Destruction.

The entrance of the Tower of Destruction was a completely closed door with strange inscriptions. When Chen Rui took out the treasure map, the treasure map shone an unprecedentedly bright golden light. It split automatically and turned into little dots of golden symbols which then immersed in the inscriptions. The inscriptions changed rapidly, and a keyhole appeared in the center of the door.

Chen Rui’s mind moved. He put on the Purple Flame Heart ring. When he put his hand close to the keyhole, the Purple Flame Heart ring quickly changed. The protruded purple gem’s shape was exactly the shape of the keyhole. After inserting it, it was tightly closed, then the purple light flourished. The whole door disappeared and became a space entrance rippling with strange “ripples”.

“Let’s go,” Chen Rui said to everyone.

“My people and I will not go in.” Strena said, “The so-called treasure is meaningless to the naga tribe. You have the token of the Dark Dragon Emperor. Now you have defeated the Lich King, you should be able to successfully become the inheritor. By then, we only need to dispel the seal of the Red Pipit to solve the problem of life sacrifice that has plagued my tribe for tens of thousands of years. Moreover, the ancestors of the nagas just now asked us to stay and learn the secret skills of the naga tribe that are now incomplete, ‘[6 Scimitars Break]’. For us, this is the real treasure.”

Chen Rui did not force her as he saw that her attitude was very firm. He nodded, “Don’t worry, I will definitely help the nagas solve the trouble of sea sacrifice and Adeline’s shackles.”

Dodo, who had been pretending to be dead in the battle just now, appeared lively on Chen Rui’s shoulder. Obviously, the slime, which was tainted with the dragon’s collection habit, was quite sensitive to the word “treasure”- If I go in with master, I can pick up a shiny thing at least.

Hegel thought for a while and asked the rest of the dark elementals to stay. He came here for the dark origin fragment. The dark elementals suffered huge casualties during this journey. Now this Tower of Destruction should be the last level. He didn’t know what dangers were in it, so there was no need to let his people sacrifice for nothing.

And so, only 3 people entered the Tower of Destruction in the end… Uh, 1 human, 1 Elemental King, and 1 slime.

Chen Rui entered the gate of the Tower of Destruction under everyone’s gaze. After entering, the ripples gradually disappeared and returned to the original closed gate.

As soon as they entered the gate, 3 of them felt dizzy. Then, the entire field of vision became wider. The Tower of Destruction did not have the layers of stairs as imagined; it was simply an independent space.

The space was gray and hazy. 2 sources of light and heat appeared gradually. It was not the 2 moons of the Demon Realm, but a sun and a moon, facing each other far away.

Mountains, water, animals and plants began to appear slowly in the space. Then, people and cities appeared. They could clearly sense the strong breath of life. In the middle of the city stood a huge statue which seemed to be the image of a giant black dragon. This statue reminded Chen Rui of the Tower of Faith in the Super System. Yes, this is the building of faith. There are a large number of believers worshipping the statue every day.

The area under the sun was bright and hot, full of hustle and bustle whereas the area under the moonlight appeared cold and quiet.

Between the sun and the moon was a circular trajectory. it slowly moved to change positions as the day and night alternated in the space.

The space provided a living environment for the lives, and the faith power of life had become a powerful source of continuous supply to this space, forming an endless cycle. Chen Rui suddenly had a kind of realization- This is the real kingdom.

The sun and the moon cycled continuously. After some time, the light began to dim. The noisy city became deadly silent. The black statue in the center gradually decayed. The vitality in the entire kingdom gradually faded out, and the space became void again.

Chen Rui and others floated in the air like the outsiders of the entire space. They witnessed the rise and fall of this kingdom. Unlike Hegel and Dodo, Chen Rui’s mind had always been disturbed by a strange feeling as if this kingdom was the Super System that he owned.

At the moment when the kingdom turned void, the feeling in Chen Rui’s mind suddenly unraveled, forming an unprecedented insight. A certain path that he had been searching for indistinctly suddenly became much clearer.

This kind of realization also made his state of mind further touch the edge of a certain bottleneck, but he didn’t have much time to comprehend it because 2 rays of light had appeared in the void kingdom.

This was a pair of huge eyes, 1 with a golden pupil and the other with a silver pupil, looking at the 3 outsiders who had invaded the space.

TL: Is he going to advance to the next star level soon? What can he gain from the Dark Dragon Emperor?

chapters.title: Chapter 624 - The True Identity Of The Dark Dragon Emperor
chapters.body:
Chapter 624 - The True Identity Of The Dark Dragon Emperor

This bizarre pair of golden and silver eyes were snake-shaped vertical pupils which should be the eyes of a giant dragon in this world. The faint coercion exuded a penetrating power that seemed to see through one’s mind. It was like the entire silent space had opened up its sleepy eyes. Traces of destructive breath gradually appeared in the void kingdom.

“Inheritor with the Dragon Eye Ring, you finally came here under the guidance of destiny.”

A deep voice sounded. It had no special deterrence, but it gave people a feeling of heart throbbing. There was no doubt that it should be the legendary Dark Dragon Emperor.

Dragon Eye Ring? Chen Rui was startled as he subconsciously glanced at the “infatuation ring” in his hand. It turns out that its real name is “Dragon Eye Ring”, but forget about the “guidance of destiny”. It’s more like the guidance of the treasure.

“You have passed the test of courage, will and intellect and successfully arrived at [Destructive Kingdom]. As you have seen before, my kingdom has experienced an inevitable process of rise and fall. You can choose to inherit my legacy or wealth. Tell me, what do you want most? Wealth? Power? Or something else?”

The test of courage should refer to King Octopus, the test of will was the mirage, and the test of intellect was Lich King. Although there were many accidents in the process, he finally passed all of them.

As soon as this sentence came out, Dodo’s eyes suddenly flashed a sparkling gem. Chen Rui also felt tempted as if he was about to blurt out a strong desire, but the Super System immediately prompted a warning.

This was by no means a simple question. It contained strange spiritual confusion.

The Dark Elemental King sneered coldly, “Put away these little tricks that confuse the senses. I only need 1 thing, and I can clearly feel it is here.”

The Dark Dragon Emperor cast his gaze on Chen Rui without answering Hegel, “So, what is your wish?”

Chen Rui had gotten rid of the mental confusion, and he glanced at Hegel, “His wish is my wish. I wonder if Sir Dark Dragon Emperor can satisfy it?”

“Oh?” The Dark Dragon Emperor seemed a little surprised, “You are willing to abandon infinite wealth and power just to satisfy his wish? Are you sure you want to do that?”

“I’m sure.” Chen Rui shrugged. He was not short of wealth. There was also no lack of ways to make money. Similarly, he had his own way of power. The most critical matter was that he needed Hegel to save Isabella’s life. This was his most important purpose in coming to the Dead Sea.

“Amazing friendship.” The Dark Dragon Emperor’s words caused the Dark Elemental King to sneer coldly, but his sight was immediately attracted by something.

A black diamond-shaped crystal appeared in the void ahead.

“So, both of your unanimous wish… is this?”

Hegel’s eyes were blazing red. His figure flickered, and a wisp of black smoke flew toward the crystal. However, no matter how fast the black smoke was, he always kept the same distance from the diamond crystal as if he was standing still.

“Any reward must be paid.” The Dark Dragon Emperor’s voice sounded, “If you want to get the drak origin fragment, you must stay in my kingdom and become my believer.”

“You want an Elemental King to become a believer?” Hegel sneered, “A ridiculous delusion. Do you think you are an Elemental God?”

“Since you have entered my kingdom, this has become your only choice.” The Dark Dragon Emperor’s voice became a little more irresistible and majestic. Chen Rui had a bad omen.

“Shameless boasting! Your kingdom has collapsed and annihilated. You are just a trace of remnant soul.” The black gas in Hegel’s body began to surge, “I admit that you are very powerful. Although I can’t defeat you, with my most quintessential dark origin power, any dark creatures in the Demon Realm can’t be exempted. At least, I can die together with your last trace of soul!”

“Die together? Are you showing the ignorance of a foolish person?” When the Dark Dragon Emperor blinked, the destructive breath in the entire space suddenly increased. Just this breath made Chen Rui suffocate.

A completely different level! A power that cannot be resisted at all! This kind of strength is far superior to King Octopus or Lich King. No wonder even the Dark Elemental King can’t defeat this “trace” of remnant soul.

Even if Chen Rui could activate the [Royal Star Transformation] now, he would definitely not be able to compete with such a powerful power which had far exceeded the limitation of “kingdomized”. So is the Dark Dragon Emperor’s power at Demi-God level during his lifetime? Or even stronger …

“Sir Dark Dragon Emperor,” Chen Rui quickly said, “We can try to help you rebuild the kingdom and restore the power. How about this as the reward in exchange for the origin fragment of the dark element?”

“As I said, you have no choice, let alone mentioning the word ‘reward’ to the god who you are about to worship.” The voice of the Dark Dragon Emperor was full of disdain, “I have to say that your arrival actually made me very disappointed. The Dragon Eye Ring holder who has passed the 3 major tests, the inheritor I have been waiting for many years, is not a dragon! My original plan was to find an excellent soul carrier, but it was screwed up by your arrival! Now I can only compromise to let you become the first batch of believers in the resurrection of the kingdom.”

Chen Rui finally understood. Perhaps the Tower of Destruction actually does have a huge amount of wealth, but the true face of this treasure is a trap similar to body possession. The real purpose is to attract the treasure hunting dragons to come so that the Dark Dragon Emperor can seize the body to rebirth. The so-called 3 major tests are nothing more than screening out the strongest candidates for the body possession.

The inheritance of the ancient alchemy civilization that I encountered was the same. No wonder the legendary treasures often coexist with danger. None of these ancient souls or wills are easy opponents.

The Dark Dragon Emperor did countless calculations. He did not hesitate to disintegrate the treasure map, pass the Dragon Eye Ring out, and set 3 major tests, but it was a miscalculation in the end— The one who arrived at Tower of Destruction was not the dragon as he imagined. At most, it was just a slime who had a little Dragon Power Essence. Such a lowly creature naturally couldn’t be the body chosen by Sir Dark Dragon Emperor.

“However, the arrival of the Dark Elemental King is an unexpected surprise. He can become a source of faith and energy for the dark side of the kingdom, allowing the kingdom and my soul power to recover faster.” The Dark Dragon Emperor’s voice was full of enchanting power. “And you can become the highest spokesperson of my faith. I will give you the strongest faith suit to dominate all believers and enjoy supreme power, authority and wealth.”

Chen Rui was of course not tempted at all, but it was obvious that he couldn’t defeat the opponent at the moment, so he immediately used a delay strategy, “Sir Dark Dragon Emperor, please allow me to consider it.”

The huge eyes gradually shrank and solidified into a human form which was the image of a tall man with his eyes closed. He was wearing a green and gold full-body armor with a simple and elegant appearance.

Chen Rui felt the Dragon Eye Ring on his fingers trembled slightly. It seemed to echo with the armor.

At this time, [Analytical Eyes] finally showed the [Analysis] data.

Race: Soul body (Dragon soul).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to determine!

Attribute: Extremely dangerous!

The man extended his hand and showed the origin fragment of the dark element floating in his palm. He shook his head and said, “In front of absolute power, any flattery words or trick is futile. Since it is my bestow, you must accept it whether you want it or not…”

As soon as he finished speaking, the terrifying breath immediately wrapped Chen Rui and the others. There was a huge gap in power between the 2 parties. Even if the Dark Dragon Emperor was just a trace of remnant soul, he was definitely not what Chen Rui’s current level could contend with. Chen Rui was immediately restrained by this breath. No matter whether it was his body or will, he had no power to resist.

The same happened to the slime who tried to turn into a pool of water and pretended to be dead. The only exception was the Dark Elemental King. Hegel’s body emitted a black flame-like gas, and his eyes burned with a bloody light. His whole body changed quickly to become a long sword wrapped in dark flame that slashed toward the Dark Dragon Emperor.

This time, the “long sword” was not restricted by distance as if it had surpassed the rule of the kingdom space. It approached the man in the blink of an eye. By now, there was no room for the slightest change, so the Dark Elemental King did not hesitate to use the biggest trump card. He paid a great price to launch this attack that contained the strongest origin power.

The Demon Realm was the world with the strongest dark elements. The lives that grew under the 2 moons were basically dark attribute creatures. The origin power of the dark elements could restrain the existence of the soul power, so Lich King Glorios was very careful with Hegel previously.

Although Hegel risked everything, he had absolute confidence to severely injure or kill the remnant soul of the Dark Dragon Emperor. Then, he would use the seized origin fragment of the dark element to repair the huge origin power he had lost.

However, something that Hegel didn’t expect happened. A shield with the head of a giant dragon appeared on the man’s left arm. When the long sword slashed on that shield, sparks splashed everywhere. It actually couldn’t break through the shield’s defense.

“The defensive power of this dragon shield is comparable to the Illusive Demon Shield of the Demon Realm’s 7 artifacts. Now you are only the power of the Demon Overlord. You can’t destroy its protection at all.”

“Don’t underestimate the origin power of the Elemental King! As I said, all dark creatures can’t be exempted from this kind of power damage! Even if you are a black dragon immune to elemental damage!” Hegel’s cold voice sounded from the long sword. The flame on the long sword gradually penetrated into the dragon shield. Although the dragon shield could withstand the physical slash of the long sword, it could not stop the penetration of this flame.

Immediately afterward, the hands of the Dark Dragon Emperor behind the dragon shield began to burn. Not only his hands, but his entire body in the armor burned.

Seeing that the soul was about to be burned out, the eyes of the Dark Dragon Emperor opened suddenly. The right eye was an empty black hole, and the left eye suddenly radiated a dazzling and hot light which was as hot as the sun.

The dazzling light quickly wrapped the whole body of the Dark Dragon Emperor. Under the effect of this light, the origin dark flame of the dark elements became thinner and thinner. Hegel, who turned into the long sword, shouted in shock, “What is this? Could it be… the origin fragment of the light element! Impossible! What kind of Dragon Emperor are you! You actually…”

Hegel’s voice quickly became weak. He could no longer maintain the shape of the long sword, and he returned to his original human form, but a black crystal on the surface of his body began to spread rapidly. His body that was sealed in the blink of an eye could no longer move.

Light and darkness were opposites that restrained each other, and the damage they dealt to each other would be doubled. For example, given that both were basic magics, the damage of fire bombs to dark elementals was 2, then the damage of light bombs to dark elementals was 4. Hegel’s current state was not only restrained by the origin fragment of the light element, but it was also the cost of burning his own origin power.

“Who said that the Dark Dragon Emperor must be a black dragon?” The Dark Dragon Emperor burst into laughter as he looked at the Dark Elemental King who was in disbelief. His laughter was full of unconcealable pride.

“Holy dragon…” Hegel only had time to say 2 words before his face was completely covered by crystals. He became an ice statue. Although he did not die, he had completely lost his combat power.

Holy dragon! Chen Rui was shocked. He had heard Paglio and Zola say that the holy dragon was the most powerful and rare type of dragon. It possessed incomparable vitality as well as the best offensive and defensive capabilities among all dragons. It could be immune to the low and medium level magic of all elements. Some mutated ones also had the characteristics of [Regeneration].

The most critical issue was that the holy dragons were of light attribute and were enshrined as glorious dragons by the human world.

In addition to the black dragon, which was a naturally dark attribute, many dragons also chose the Demon Realm as their place of residence or came to the Demon Realm for various reasons. For example, Zola came to the Demon Realm to study magic 100,000 years ago. On the other hand, Paglio was born in the Demon Realm, which was considered the aboriginals.

The dragons in the Demon Realm are depicted as fallen dragons by the human world. In fact, they just chose different places. Dragons rarely participate in the war of demons and humans. However, who would have thought that the Dark Dragon Emperor of the Demon Realm is actually a glorious dragon completely repelled by the dark elemental power!

“Are you surprised? I, Rodriguez, is one of elite holy dragons. I was once known as the wing of light, but no one knows that I also have the strongest mutated bloodline that is compatible with the existence of dark elements! After getting the origin fragment of the light element back then, I almost got a glimpse of the shortcut to the highest level. If it weren’t for the damn Raphael…”

When the name “Raphael” was mentioned, Rodriguez’s voice was intertwined with hatred and fear. He actually inserted the origin fragment of the dark element into his right eye, turning it into a silver eye, “Fortunately, after I fled to the Demon Realm, I got the origin fragment of the dark element which brought me 1 step closer to the highest goal. Unfortunately, before my old injury was healed, I encountered a new powerful enemy which caused my body and kingdom to be destroyed beyond repair. Therefore, I can only leave clues to the treasure to attract the body of a dark attribute dragon with excellent power and will in order to resurrect, completely control the origin fragment of the dark element, and then understand the highest secret of light and darkness. I didn’t expect that after waiting for so many years, it is actually ants like you all! To become a believer of Rodriguez, you should feel the supreme honor. Now, I will give you the most pious baptism of faith!”

With that said, the left golden eyes glowed like the sun that covered Chen Rui and Dodo in it.

TL: Can he pull out the Super System’s trick and consume the soul again?

chapters.title: Chapter 625 - Body Of Light Blessing]’S Mutation! Chen Rui’S Strange Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 625 - Body Of Light Blessing]’S Mutation! Chen Rui’S Strange Decision

“Demon who walks in darkness and evil accept the baptism of this light faith!” Dark Dragon Emperor Rodriguez’s left eye shone a bright light. Because the power gap was too great, Chen Rui and Dodo didn’t even have the power to resist. They were shrouded in light in a split second.

Covered by the light, Dodo closed his eyes tightly in fright. His transformed hands hugged his onion head tightly. However, after a few minutes, the imaginary pain did not come.

The slime opened his eyes secretly and found that the seemingly terrifying light actually surrounded it. To be precise, it surrounded his master. It seemed that his master’s body was experiencing some strange changes.

“The level of power of this light element can’t actually convert you demon? With such a strong willpower, you really deserve to be a guy who has passed the 3 tests. Unfortunately, I still can’t control the origin fragment of the dark element. Otherwise, in my double-sided kingdom of light and dark, you should be the strongest believer in the dark side…”

Rodriguez’s sounded a little surprised. A white cube appeared in the pupil of his left eye. It was the origin fragment of the light element, “Since you are the first believer in my new kingdom, then I will give you a special honor. The stubborn dark believer shall become the most pious believer of the light with the baptism in the light of the origin fragment of the light element.”

The white cube slowly flew out, scattered into leaf-like light spots, and wrapped Chen Rui and Dodo who couldn’t resist.

Dodo instinctively felt the terrifying power of the light leaves. Once he was wrapped, perhaps even his most basic soul consciousness would be erased. At this critical juncture of life and death, the strong desire to survive finally stimulated the slime’s hidden potential.

As a result, Master Dodo burst out his strongest talent which was … eating.

The onion-head turned into a huge mouth. The light leaves nearby were sucked into the big mouth as it chewed desperately.

——The taste of the light leaves is too unpalatable. It is not comparable to master’s superb aromatic millet wine; it is not as good as purple berry wine and black grape wine; it is even worse than the worst-quality blended fruit wine on Lane 5 in the 30th block of Dark Moon City, but I will die if I don’t eat it. It is just like when I was forced to eat the flesh and blood of the giant dragon that made people… Uh, slime trembled in the black rainforest.

The light leaves exploded immediately in the big mouth. After eating, it continued to explode in the stomach. For a while, it shattered away, but Dodo’s immortal body fully played his role. The exploded onion body immediately regrouped, and he desperately devoured the light leaves again.

During this process, the slime gradually adapted to the “taste” of the light leaves with his miraculous “mouth”. He also began to truly digest the power of the light leaves as he swallowed faster and faster. Although it could not be absorbed within a short time, he could at least eat it first.

“Oh? A slime with the Dragon Power Essence’s breath… as well as devour ability and immortal body? Is this still a slime?” Dodo’s performance surprised Rodriguez as he began to re-examine this lowly microorganism whom he had disregarded all this while. When his mind shifted, the slime and Chen Rui were separated by an intangible power. The slime, who had been fully engaged in eating, did not notice this change. He still used a huge mouth to desperately devour the light leaves around its body.
