Most of the light leaves were concentrated on Chen Rui. Without Dodo, he was quickly wrapped in the light leaves to form a light cocoon.

The light cocoon flashed with a dazzling light. The purest light element power tightly wrapped Chen Rui in it. This was a special baptism technique that Rodriguez stole and improved from the priests of the Light Divinity Temple. It could transform some stubborn non-believers into devout believers.

The holy dragon could not activate this secret technique, but with the origin fragment of the light element plus the attached soul power, it should be a breeze to transform Chen Rui, a “demon” with the strength of the Demon Emperor, into a light believer.

1 hour later, the slime at the side was still devouring the light leaves, but the light cocoon that wrapped Chen Rui was still shining with no signs of stopping.

Rodriguez was surprised when he saw that the light cocoon began to rotate uncontrollably from slow to fast. Moreover, the dazzling light on the surface became thinner and gradually translucent. The human figure in it was faintly visible. Part of the human body seemed to be wiggling strangely.

“Origin fragment of the light element…… My soul power is depleting? Impossible!” Rodriguez’s voice revealed a rare panic, “Stop!”

The light cocoon did not stop, but it changed more rapidly. Finally, a figure broke out of the cocoon. Behind this figure was a pair of wings condensed with light.

“[Body of Light Blessing]?” Rodriguez’s golden left eye had dimmed. His face was full of disbelief, “No! It should be called [Body of Light Glory] now! You… you are actually a human!”

Just as the Dark Elemental King didn’t expect that the Dark Dragon Emperor’s real body was a light element giant dragon, Rodriguez didn’t expect that the “demon” he baptized with the origin fragment of the light element was actually a human. He even had the [Body of Light Blessing] that could only be born by the purest light bloodline!

Sir Holy Dragon couldn’t wait to give himself a slap in the face if his claws were still there- Using the origin fragment of the light element to “baptize” a human with [Body of Light Blessing] was just like gifting a big tonic of the devil fruit to a great demon stuck in the bottleneck.

If Rodriguez wanted to kill Chen Rui, he would not exert so much effort. It was because his kingdom was broken, and he urgently needed believers to rebuild it, so the purpose of activating the origin fragment of the light element this time was to “transform” Chen Rui.

Therefore, under the intense “baptism” of the origin fragment of the light element that used Highness Dark Dragon Emperor’s precious soul power, Chen Rui’s [Body of Light Blessing] finally mutated and became the rarest [Body of Light Glory].

Even in the purest light bloodline, [Body of Light Blessing] was one of the rare bloodlines in a million, and [Body of Light Glory] was the rarest existence among the [Body of Light Blessing]. In the entire human world, there were only a handful of people who had the [Body of Light Glory]. These few people included the highest controller of the Light Divinity Temple, Pope Glorious.

[Body of Light Glory] would reduce and absorb the damage of light element far better than the [Body of Light Blessing]. The effect of launching a light element attack or receiving the aid of the light element would be doubled. It also had a special restraining effect on dark creatures.

If Chen Rui went to the Light Divinity Temple now, he would definitely be regarded as a “rare animal”. It should not be a problem to be a high level priest.

Rodriguez hurriedly kept the dim origin fragment of the light element. He was in disbelief, “How can you be a human with [Body of Light Blessing]? Whose believer are you? Raphael? Gabriel? Or… Michael?”

Chen Rui himself did not expect such an accident to happen. He was still surprised as he felt the new changes in the body. The [Body of Light Glory] was not for nothing. Whether it was his current physique, power or spirit, they had all undergone sublimation-like qualitative changes as if they had been reborn.

Since Chen Rui’s upgrade was an evolution of the Super System, it was different from ordinary demons. So this kind of sublimation was ‘external’. Although the ‘internal’ evolution had not really come yet, it was equivalent to having an optimal ‘development platform’. As long as he could break through the existing bottleneck and reach the next level of evolution, the impact would definitely far exceed the usual advancement.

Meanwhile, Rodriguez had gone from horror to frustration as he roared, “Damn it! No matter who you are a believer in, you are destined to be annihilated today!”

Only the Light Elemental King could freely use the origin fragment of the light element. Rodriguez had comprehended for hundreds of thousands of years, but he could barely control it with the light attribute power of the holy dragon. Now the holy dragon only had a trace of remnant soul, and Chen Rui’s [Body of Light Blessing] had almost exhausted his soul power attached to the origin fragment of the light element. He had suffered irreparable loss. He was naturally infuriated as he went for wool and came back shorn.

The destructive breath in the kingdom prospered and escalated to an extremely berserk level in the blink of an eye. This was not the ‘baptism’ just now. Even if Chen Rui had the [Body of Light Glory], he couldn’t take this blow. Chen Rui’s mind turned sharply. In an instant, he had already made the most important decision.

While Rodriguez thought, the terrifying destructive power had completely wrapped Chen Rui into it. He had no doubt that the body and soul of this ant would be completely annihilated within a second.

However, something that shocked Rodriguez happened again. The destructive power that was enough to annihilate the Demon Overlord in an instant had no effect on this ant with only the Demon Emperor level. To be more precise, it was incredibly “devoured” by the opponent’s body.

This is definitely not the function of [Body of Light Glory]!

Rodriguez stared closely at the figure whose wings had turned blood red. He felt that this hateful ant seemed to become a different person. What shocked him the most was the trace of breath that this person emanated— Destructive breath!

Although it was a trace of breath, the destructive power contained in it was more refined than what the Dark Dragon Emperor had now. No! Even at my optimal state back then, there is no such “pure” destructive power! This is simply… the most original power of “destruction”!

“What a puzzling move,” The strange figure said, “It’s so unexpected! He actually gave up the control of the body on purpose? Want to watch in safety whilst we fight then reap the rewards when both sides are exhausted? Or does he want to lend my power to avoid annihilation? This is not his style. Besides… he should know that after I come out this time, he will never regain control. Not only that, I will completely annihilate his will and become the real and only controller of this body.”

Rodriguez had recovered from the astonishment, and he said contemptuously, “Is it the [Manifestation] illusion similar to the mirage? It seems that you still have a little trick. Unfortunately, an ant is always an ant. In the face of absolute power, any illusion is just a ridiculous trick!”

“You have to figure out 2 things first.” Chen Rui blinked his blood red eyes as he looked at the holy dragon with interest, “First, don’t pretend to be dismissive of things that are outside your knowledge. This will only further show your ignorance and cowardice; secondly, don’t simply call others ‘ant’. You will know your pitiful position right away.”

“Damn ant!” Rodriguez raised his hand at Chen Rui, and waves of intangible trajectories immediately rippled near Chen Rui. Wherever the trajectories passed, the space was no longer undergoing ordinary distortions, but shattering. The cracks contained extremely terrifying destructive power. Everything close to it would be crushed and devoured.

Chen Rui, no, it should be Shura instead. He turned a blind eye on these space cracks as he walked slowly like he was strolling in the courtyard. He seemed to be adapting to the blood-colored wings behind him.

Rodriguez’s pupils contracted as could not believe everything he saw— I have activated [Destructive Kingdom]’s strongest annihilation power. Even Demi-God could hardly resist this immense power. This ant actually completely ignored them as if it is just a few gusts of breeze.

“You are just a trace of the remnant soul that barely reaches the Pseudo-God and possesses a fragmented kingdom of destructive power. To me, you are the ant.” As Shura yelled, there was already a pair of black hideous armor on his body. His spirit power skyrocketed. As he waved his hands at the cracks in the space, the cracks actually went back toward Rodriguez.

Facing a counterattack that was only a Demon Overlord level, Rodriguez instinctively felt a sense of crisis. He put away his disdain as his figure flicked and appeared in the distance. This kind of space shift was a means of the kingdom. It was by no means comparable to mere teleportation. The actual distance was thousands of kilometers away. However, those cracks actually ignored the limit of distance. They penetrated the space and surrounded him tightly like a vortex.

Rodriguez tried to move several times, but he still couldn’t get rid of the ‘vortex’. Not only that, the cracks also exuded strange devour power, pulling out traces of his soul power.

“Impossible! This is my kingdom!” Everything in front of him had completely deviated from Rodriguez’s knowledge. It was impossible for this human, who should only have the strength of Demon Overlord at most, to have this kind of unimaginable ability even with the [Body of Light Glory].

“As I said, you will find your pitiful position very soon.” Shura showed a wicked smile and appeared in front of Rodriguez in an instant, “From the power level, I’m really insignificant in front of you even if you’re just a trace of the remnant soul; but from the perspective of origin power, you are the real ant!”

If Rodriguez had half the strength back then, then he could easily resolve Shura’s power no matter how strange it was. The problem was that he now only had a trace of soul left, so his power was greatly reduced. The origin fragment of the light element was regarded as a nutrient by the other party. The origin fragment of the dark element was originally out of control. It was even used to seal the Dark Elemental King this time. The only destructive power available was completely restrained by the other party, so he was really helpless.

The most terrible thing was that if this continued, this trace of remnant soul would be completely sucked by the weird power sooner or later. He would be truly annihilated by then.

This fact made the Dark Dragon Emperor’s heart frightened. There was no sense of pride at all. Being annihilated by such a weak existence is too shameful- Body! As long as there is a body, at least I can save my soul from annihilation now!

Suddenly, the holy dragon’s eyes brightened. His gaze was fixed on the slime who was desperately devouring ‘the light leaves’ beside him.

TL: Dodo, your final task, digest that soul 😏. Can Chen Rui evolve successfully inside the Super System to get back his control?

chapters.title: Chapter 626 - Final Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 626 - Final Battle

Chapter 626: Final Battle

Rodriguez’s figure flickered, and the shifting technique was activated again. The space cracks quickly followed him. They continued to surround Rodriguez without giving him a chance to escape.

However, Rodriguez’s shift this time was not to escape. Instead, he turned into a white light and flew toward the nearby Dodo.

At this moment, Master Dodo had entered a state of near-mysterious state… To be precise, he was in a state of a foodie that was a realm of eating everything he could get hold of. The power of that part of the origin fragment of the light element had almost been digested by the slime. Although a considerable part of it was lost because of the explosion, most of them were devoured under Dodo’s rare desperate eating.

As expected, Dodo devoured the white light that Rodriguez had transformed into. When there was not much white light left, the slime’s movements stopped abruptly. His pupils gradually turned into 2 colors of gold and silver.

“It’s too easy!” Rodriguez’s laughter came from Dodo. His body trembled. The light leaves were gradually sucked into his left eye. Its body twisted for a while and transformed into a human shape. “This body’s will is as weak as a piece of paper. It’s almost effortless to occupy it.”

“The strength is also equally weak.” Shura’s voice sounded in the sky. Rodriguez’s laughter stopped abruptly. A fist was magnified in front of him, then his whole body burst open…

The body scattered into countless pieces and finally reunited. Another punch came, burst again, and the cycle continued…

“Asshole!” In order to protect most of his soul at the fastest speed from being devoured, Rodriguez used the method of suppressing his soul in order to occupy the body. At most, he could only exert the power of the body. The strength of the slime, which had always been lazy, always stayed in Demon King-level. Even if he unleashed his potential just now, he was just at the peak of the Demon King which was still 1 step away from the Great Demon King.

Facing Shura who was wearing the [Royal Star Transformation]’s black armor, his combat power was at least at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Rodriguez could not fight back at all.

Rodriguez desperately used his undead body to resurrect and put on the armor. However, due to the huge difference in strength, the only power of the [Destructive Kingdom] that he could activate had no effect on Shura, so it still couldn’t change the result of being completely tormented.

The so-called “immortal body” was not endless. Once the power was exhausted, he would truly exhaust to death because he could not resurrect. Even the body would be annihilated. If this continued, Rodriguez would still fall into the previous crisis.

“Actually, you can try to merge with his soul so that your combat power would be greatly improved… Perhaps you could escape?” Shura let out a strange laugh as he watched at the slime who was reintegrating his body again.

Rodriguez sneered coldly, “I can sense that the contract relationship between this body and you should be a non-equality contract. Although I don’t know what scheme is going on in it, I won’t be fooled! Anyway, I want to annihilate its original consciousness, so I will choose to use the secret technique to assimilate this soul, completely abandon the contract part, and take full control of this body. My power will also be restored step by step. Speaking of which, although this body is not a dragon, immortality and devouring are good talents indeed.”

“The method you said is good, but do you think you have the time?” A murderous intent flashed in Shura’s blood pupils, “As long as I attack a few more times, you will be completely annihilated! Your only way to survive now is to merge with the soul of the slime to become my believer and servant. I will give you stronger destructive power in order to become a real dragon of destruction.

Rodriguez laughed hysterically. He deliberately set up 3 tests and waited for countless years just to lure the best body to be possessed, then rebuild the kingdom.

He didn’t expect that his plans went astray. The one who came was actually a terrifying nemesis. Under the current circumstances, I have to infest my soul in a lowly slime. The Demon Overlord level ant in front of me actually wants me, a pseudo-God powerhouse, to surrender?

Shame, such a shame!

“Dreaming! Ignorant ant! Don’t think that everything is under your control!” Rodriguez’s eyes shone 2 dazzling brilliance at the same time, 1 gold and 1 silver, which hung high in the air. It illuminated the entire kingdom like the sun and the moon. With Shura’s strange power, it was actually impossible to launch an attack under this light.

When the “sun” and “moon” gradually overlapped, the space cracks controlled by Shura began to close automatically. Countless pulsating runes appeared in the space. Shura’s body slowly froze like he had lost the ability to move. Not only Shura, even the crystallized Dark Elemental King Hegel and Rodriguez’s own body (Dodo’s body) also began to freeze under the rune.

The Tower of Destruction glowed with a bright 2-color light. Wherever it shone, no matter the resentful souls, the nagas or elementals, they were frozen like a wax statue that had lost its life. The entire Land of Hatred was dead silent.

“It’s a pity.” Rodriguez, who turned the situation, showed a regretful look, “It’s too late to further comprehend the power of the origin fragment of the dark element. The power of this cage will be greatly reduced. It cannot completely annihilate you. Once I use my last soul force to activate this move, I can only truly be reborn in this body.”

Shura didn’t panic as he asked faintly, “Do you think this kind of power can imprison me forever?”

“This cage can last at least 10,000 years which is enough time for me to truly master this body. More importantly, I will recover most of my power after waking up, and you…” Rodriguez sneered, “You are a human. Even if you have the [Body of Light Glory] and Demon Overlord power, you will only have a lifespan of a mere thousand years. It is a pity that I can only vent my anger by thwarting your body at that time.”

“10,000 years?” Shura sneered, “Don’t worry. My life is at least 100,000 years or more for now. We will meet again soon. Let me remind you that when you have been awakened in 100 years or decades from your sleep, don’t be surprised. At that time, I have reached a height that you can only look up to. Given your tenacious performance today, I will grant you a survival chance by then.

Rodriguez did not speak. After losing his gold and silver pupils, his eyes were closed. His body gradually returned to an onion appearance and fell into a deep sleep.

Shura showed a weird smile and slowly closed his eyes. He didn’t fall asleep, but he entered the consciousness space.

The Super System.

In the beautiful [Galaxy Territory], Chen Rui was floating in the air.

When Shura appeared, Chen Rui’s closed eyes opened…

“You are here.”

“I’m here.” Shura’s bloodshot eyes narrowed, “Are the next few sentences, ‘you shouldn’t be here, but I’m here anyway?’ There are some interesting scenes in your memory. “

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Really? In that world, there are many people and things that are worth remembering.”

“Seize the time to remember it as early as possible including everything in this world.” Shura raised a finger, “This is your last moment. I know you deliberately gave up control of your body and wanted to use that holy dragon to exhaust my strength. It’s a pity that your plan is still futile. I have hardly suffered any damage. Now, it’s time to end you completely. This is your last battle.”

Chen Rui nodded, “Yeah, we should really put an end to this.”

“You seem to be particularly calm? Are you already prepared to die?” Shura frowned, “This is not the same as the panic and unwillingness I expected. Could it be you have any trump cards? You’re already inferior to me initially, now you can’t even activate the [Royal Star Transformation]. There is no chance of winning at all.”

“[Royal Star Transformation] is actually just a tool just like the entire Super System, but the biggest reliance is not this, but the original mind.” Chen Rui shook his head, “I thought about a lot of things during this period of time. You’re not an inner demon. In other words, from the moment [Refined Mind] ended, you are no longer an inner demon, but another me. Your power comes from my will, so as long as my will exists, you will never perish. Fighting with you is fighting with my own will. For me, you are not only a threat, but you are also an opportunity that allows me to truly find myself, truly control myself, and truly transcend myself.”

“You seem to understand something, but unfortunately, even this can’t change the fact that I will replace you.” The murderous aura in Shura’s blood red pupils began to intensify, “Since you understand that I’m you, this environment is no longer your ‘home field’. Now die!”

Chen Rui teleported instantaneously and appeared in the distance. Several [Aurora Shots] with destructive power shot out. Shura’s hand formed a knife shape and easily cut the [Aurora Shots] away. The destructive breath all over his body skyrocketed. “The skill of the Super System is useless to me! What’s more, your current state is too weak! Have a look at the real destructive power!”

An asteroid next to him suddenly burned and glowed like a sun. Then, the stars exploded fiercely. The violent explosion almost illuminated the entire [Galaxy Territory]. Those planets with humans could witness the gorgeous color of the supernova.

Under the splendid appearance was the terrifying destruction which was the core of the explosion. All the materials were blasted outward at high speed. The extremely powerful heat and power shook Chen Rui away. If this was not in the Super System, this blow alone could instantly annihilate him into flying ashes.

“The Super System can only be regarded as a dusty jewel in your hands. Fortunately, I will become its master soon.” Shura’s figure appeared ghostly behind Chen Rui. Chen Rui seemed to have unleashed his final potential. His whole body emanated a piercing cold aura. The surrounding stardust and meteorites suddenly stopped floating and began to freeze quickly. “4 seasons territory? You finally use it?” Shura’s sinister laughter echoed in Chen Rui’s ears, “Unfortunately you forgot this kind of [Winter Territory] is originally derived from my destructive power. Will it be useful in front of the source of destruction?”

Chen Rui shook. When Shura’s hands made an embracing gesture, a huge translucent roulette object appeared in the void and formed a black hole-like vortex.

“Wheel of Hera!”

Chen Rui yelled. It was too late to escape. His body was torn by the strong devour force, and gradually became nothingness. His figure stacked with Shura, and the 2 soon merged together.

The whole [Galaxy Territory] was sounded with Shura’s triumphant laugh.

TL: The end? What did Chen Rui comprehend? How did he want to control Shura?

chapters.title: Chapter 627 - Transcend And A New Beginning
chapters.body:
Chapter 627 - Transcend And A New Beginning

Chapter 627: Transcend and A New Beginning

“It’s finally over!” The huge image of the Wheel of Hera gradually disappeared. Shura, who successfully devoured Chen Rui into his body, was already a sure winner. He laughed arrogantly, “I said long ago that I am the final winner! “

As soon as Shura said that, the temperature around him began to drop sharply. An icy breath was exuded, and a large area froze again.

“It’s [Winter Territory] again? Poor 4 seasons territory, the only offensive territory is derived from the destructive power.” Shura said with disdain, “No matter how strong your power and will are, it’s useless. In front of the origin of destruction that is as vast as the sea, there are only brooks and rivers which are not worth mentioning!”

No doubt, as Shura channeled his power, the effect of [Winter Territory] gradually disappeared, but Shura’s body became stiff again soon as the [Winter Territory] reappeared.

Shura sneered coldly, “Aren’t you giving up yet? I told you, it’s useless. No matter how many times you try, the result is the same!”

This repeated several times. [Winter Territory]’s power seemed to be increasing each time. Shura’s bloody eyes overflowed with a cold light, “Want to fight to the death and resurrect? It’s a pity, no matter how hard you try, it’s futile. You are already the loser!”

Shura’s figure flickered and appeared in the nebula where the ‘supernova’ exploded just now.

To be precise, this was just an explosion of an ‘artificial sun’, but it was not much different from a real supernova explosion. The expanding gas and dust form a dazzling nebula, and the matter on the surface of the planet spurted out due to the huge explosion impact, leaving only the very dense core inside.

The entire nebula was full of terrifying destructive breaths which formed a strange whirlpool that surrounded Shura under his action.

“Since you want to fight to death so stubbornly, I will assimilate your [Winter Territory] and let your remaining will completely give up!” Shura’s bloody pupils flashed, and his whole body faded to nothingness. The power of [Winter Territory] suddenly increased by several times that even the surrounding nebula began to freeze. Strange changes began to appear in the center of the nebula. The twisted space absorbed all the light from the explosion. Not only the light, even the various substances nearby were all devoured.

It turned out that under the effect of the destructive power, the explosion of this ‘artificial supernova’ actually produced an astronomical object like a black hole. It was not the [Star Devouring] skill, but a real black hole: A dense astronomical object which was actually equivalent to another kind of planet.

Shura leaped into the black hole to become the center of the devour. The power of [Winter Territory] overlapped with the black hole, and it eventually disappeared gradually. As expected, there was no repeated ‘attack’ as before.

“Destruction is the power above everything!” Shura showed strong confidence, “Even if you are in the peak stage state, you are not my opponent. Besides, you only have the last trace of consciousness left now. You still don’t want to disappear?”

“Destruction is indeed the most original law in the universe. I have clearly felt it with unprecedented clarity.” Overlapping shadows of Chen Rui and Shura appeared. His voice seemed very weak, but his eyes flashed with a strange light, “Just like the kingdom of the holy dragon, any immortal will eventually decay. Everything in the universe, no matter life, stars, matter, there is no way to escape the moment of destruction. This is an unchanging universal truth. Although I have understood this truth a long time ago, I didn’t really comprehend it until the moment you assimilated the [Winter Territory].”

“So what even if you really comprehend it? Accept this ultimate power of truth and be annihilated!” Shura’s blood pupils glowed with the rays of destruction, enveloping Chen Rui’s faded figure.

Chen Rui’s shadow disappeared little by little, but the brilliance in his eyes became brighter, “So, what is after the destruction?

After saying this sentence, Chen Rui was completely devoured by the destructive power. Shura shook suddenly. He was actually trembling slightly.

Large-scale distortions began to appear on the nebula after the explosion of the supernova. The initially dimmed light became dazzling again. Shura’s body flashed in response, alternating between physical entity and nothingness from time to time. He was shocked.

“Impossible, he is obviously annihilated!” Shura screamed. The originally devoured [Winter Territory] territory power began to spread out with unprecedented intensity. Everything nearby the [Galaxy Territory] was frozen and solidified. Even the power of the black hole’s devour stopped unbelievably.

After freezing, a black flame emerged from Shura’s body. Another new breath began to spread. This breath was full of vitality and hope. Shura’s face showed a rare painful expression. He covered his head, “Is it Nirvana? No, what kind of power is this?! Could it be…”

“After destruction, it is creation. The cycle of life and death goes on and on. This is the truth of the universe.” Chen Rui’s voice sounded in Shura’s mind, “You’re right, Shura, I’m indeed fighting to death and resurrecting, but…”

“Are you actually borrowing my ‘destruction’ to comprehend ‘creation’?” Shura finally understood. At this time, [Winter Territory] was already full of vibrant power. This was no longer called [Winter Territory], but [Spring Territory].

Shura screamed and held his head tightly. The huge Wheel of Hera appeared beside him. The illusion power of the mirage, the undead power of Lich King and other powers flashed one after another, but they still couldn’t stop the strange transformation of his body. The blood color in his eyes became paler and paler, constantly changing into different lights.

“This is the power of creation?” In the black flame, Shura’s body began to annihilate little by little, “It is actually this level of spirit power? No! My body! My will!”

“Although you call yourself the origin of destruction, the destruction law you have is actually just a trivial matter for the real universe. The same is true for the creation law I comprehended. There is still a long way to go.” Chen Rui’s calm voice became more determined, “Perhaps for the rest of my life, I will not be able to comprehend the true way of life and death, but I will keep going, not only for myself, but also for everything I cherish.”

The black hole under Shura’s feet suddenly emitted a strong light. It no longer devoured everything. In contrast, it spurted various materials quickly like a fountain.

The Super System’s Tower of Faith also experienced a blowout. The massive faith power that had disappeared previously quickly returned. The number of faith crystals was increasing sharply.

Shura’s tragic voice became inaudible. The black flame exploded and completely turned his body into flying ashes, leaving only those eyes. One could vaguely see that the original red eyes had undergone a strange change. 1 side was a black pupil on a white background, and the other was a white pupil on a black background.

“It’s over, or I should say it’s a new beginning…” Chen Rui’s voice sounded in the flames. The strange pupils gradually closed, seeming to fall asleep.

Witnessing the prosperity and destruction of holy dragon Rodriguez’s kingdom. The original understanding in his heart became clearer and clearer. The reason why he chose to take the initiative to let Shura seize control was that he was determined to die in order to realize life. He used [Winter Territory] to understand the ‘destruction’ law from Shura, then he realized the mystery of the opposite “creation”.

If it was not for the dire situation; if it was not for the determination to fight to death and resurrect; if it was not for the Super System’s [Galaxy Territory] which was equivalent to a small universe, it was impossible for Chen Rui to touch the mystery of the most original universal law in such a short period of time..

——This is not only the most important battle to end Shura. It is also an opportunity to transcend myself and break through the bottleneck.

With the swelling black flame as the center, a huge power full of vitality spread across the entire [Galaxy Territory]. In addition to the few planets with life, water sources and green plants began to appear even in some lifeless planets. The whole [Galaxy Territory] was undergoing some subtle changes.

At the same time, the meteorites and clusters on the edge gradually evolved into new planets. The range of [Galaxy Territory] continued to expand.

In the black flame, the original flying ash burned again and merged into Chen Rui’s body and a jujube nucleus-sized thing floated out. This thing was lush green. If Chen Rui was not asleep now, he would definitely recognize it.

Under the vigorous flame power, this thing quickly ‘germinated’. It changed into a green bud shape, flashing a magnificent colorful halo.

In the kingdom of Tower of Destruction, the body of ‘Shura’ frozen by the 2 origin fragment cages was surrounded by circles of colorful light. Water wave-like distortions began to appear on his body. This distortion caused space fluctuations nearby, but this kind of fluctuation appeared very soft; it did not have any aggressiveness.

After a while, the lights disappeared, and the fluctuations in the space gradually subsided. Meanwhile, Chen Rui, who was originally imprisoned, had unbelievably disappeared.

In a courtyard of the Fallen Angel Capital.

Alice looked at the ray of light that pierced the night sky in surprise, “Look! What is that? Is it a meteor?”

“Yes.” Eve nodded on the side, “I’ve seen it in the book before, but this is the first time I have seen it with my own eyes.”

“What a beautiful meteor!” Alian’s eyes widened, “I heard Sir Aguile said that if you make a wish to a meteor, your dream will come true.”

“That Aguile… said that?” Alice frowned as she muttered to herself, “Brother seems to say the same thing.”

“Don’t think about it, let’s make a wish before the light of the meteor disappears!” Alian said. The 3 girls quickly closed their eyes and silently wished.

After a while, the girls’ eyes opened.

Alice asked enthusiastically, “What wish did you make?”

Alian looked at her sister. She shook her head and refused to say it. Eve smiled slightly without saying anything too.

“Hmph!” Alice pouted, “I can guess even if you don’t tell me. It must be related to that guy! I told you, that guy is not a good person!”

Eve shook her head, “Sir Aguile is not like what you said!”

Alian was not as timid as she was in front of others when she was with Alice. She looked at Royal Highness Little Princess curiously, “Alice, what is your wish?”

“I…” Alice’s face suddenly flushed, then her eyes turned to the table beside her. She suddenly exclaimed, “Olypheus! Why did you eat up all the donuts and pudding?!”

“I thought you all didn’t want to eat it just now? I reluctantly did it for you.” Ms. Black Dragon said vaguely with a mouthful of food.

“We are making a wish to the meteor!”

“You are too cunning, Olypheus!”

“Why don’t you make a wish to the meteor?”

“What is a meteor? Can it be eaten…?”

TL: Did Chen Rui get out of the imprisonment? What about the Dark Elemental King and Dodo? What a shocking final battle!!

chapters.title: Chapter 628 - Human World! Unexpected Arrival
chapters.body:
Chapter 628 - Human World! Unexpected Arrival

Chapter 628: Human World! Unexpected Arrival

Warm and cosy.

Chen Rui’s consciousness gradually awakened in this feeling.

He still remembered that in the life-and-death battle before he slumbered, he fought to death in order to resurrect. He finally succeeded in transcending himself and truly defeated Shura.

When Chen Rui’s mind moved, his consciousness had entered the Super System.

The first impression was that it was huge. The area of the star space had been expanded dozens of times or more. The original [Galaxy Territory] was actually just a galaxy, but now it was not just 1 ‘sun’ that emitted light and heat; it had increased to 5. Each 1 was in its own line. This was the real [Galaxy Territory].

Not only that, the planet with life had also increased a lot. As the controller, he could clearly sense the vibrant life fluctuations in [Galaxy Territory].

Chen Rui entered the Galaxy Divinity Temple and sat on the throne. The difference from the past was that the status bar, skill tree and other light screens did not appear, but they appeared directly in Chen Rui’s mind. He could know with just a thought.

Inside the mouth and nose of the 3D human, there was a dark blue flame with the word “Merak” on it which was the Star Pulse of the Merak realm.

In addition to the previous 5 Star Pulses, there were a total of 6 arranged in a straight line.

Title: Pole Star Emperor

Evolution Level: 6 stars

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S+

Physique:S+, power: S+, spirit: S++, speed: S+.

Aura Value: 197 million

Faith Crystal: 6567.

Pole Star Level: Blue Star

No doubt, this understanding of life and death finally made him break through the bottleneck of Phecda state and reached the Merak state of 6-star evolution. His title had advanced from “Star Lord” to “Pole Star Emperor”. The various values directly reached S+ which was different from the S- he imagined for the early stage of the Demon Overlord. His spirit power even reached S++. The standard of this evaluation index seemed to have changed. There would be no 2 “+” previously.

Surprisingly, there was no Experience Value data in this “status bar”. There was a new bar for faith crystal, and there was also a Pole Star Level that was not available before.

Chen Rui remembered that when he finished Shura, he regained the large amount of faith power that had been stolen previously which was as many as 100,000. Now there were only 1,500. It seems that the advancement this time not only consumes 1 billion aura, but it also consumes 100,000 faith crystals.

Aura was equal to the “basic energy” that maintained the operation of the Super System. Especially in the initial stage, the Super System needed to transform foreign matter into aura to improve its functions step by step. The so-called skill was actually to ‘replenish’ the body’s energy by consuming aura. With the evolution of stars coupled with the appearance of facilities such as the Star Garden, the aura gradually became self-sufficient. At the current 6-star evolution, the basic energy of “aura” was more than enough. The speed and quantity generated far exceeded the needs of system maintenance. He didn’t have to struggle as before when he exchanged for black potions or blueprints.

Faith power belonged to the “higher energy” of the Super System. Power up, [Royal Star Transformation], and evolution were all inseparable from the faith crystal. With the advancement of the star level evolution, the demand for faith power would also increase.

Fortunately, the hidden danger of Shura has been completely resolved. The area of [Galaxy Territory] has greatly expanded, and there are more and more living planets. The accumulation of faith power will also speed up a lot.

Evolving to the present level, data such as experience value is no longer needed. That pole star level should be able to reflect the current level. Blue Star is only the first level. There should be higher levels. Similarly, my strength will also be more powerful.

After advancing, Chen Rui was naturally concerned about the new skills. When his thoughts moved, the skill tree had already surfaced in his mind.

4 new skills appeared on the 6th level of the illuminated skill tree.

[Punishment] (Passive feature)- Reflect all the damage suffered (could be set to exempt the damage level). The chance of activation at the current blue star level s 30%. This skill made Chen Rui widen his eyes. Reflect damage? This is a super hedgehog skill. If I use it with the characteristics of [Astral Form] and [Regeneration], I can kill the enemy by just standing still and be beaten without fighting back? Although this idea is a bit strange, the ability to reflect 30% to 50% of the damage is indeed a pretty terrifying passive attribute. Blue Star’s activation chance is 30%, and the following level should have a higher chance.

In addition to this passive skill, there were 3 active skills.

[Sneak] (Active skill)- Hides the trail; goes unnoticed by the enemy; automatically deactivated when launching an attack. The maximum duration is 1 hour; limited to once every 3 hours. Each activation requires 10,000 aura.

The [Sneak] skill is equivalent to invisibility which is very effective. Even if my figure is revealed when I launch an attack, the opponent has no time to react under normal circumstances. Chen Rui inexplicably remembered a hunter who was good at sneak attacks in a game. He remembered that when his little warlock was assassinated and fell to the ground for the first time in the wild… It was unforgettable. But now it is my turn to be the assassin… In short, this is the best sneak attack skill for assassinations.

[Scorching Dragon Roar] (Active skill)- Powerful attack skill, launch a group of Scorching Dragons to attack the enemy. The number and power of Scorching Dragons are proportional to one’s own power. Each activation requires 100,000 aura.

This should be the aoe version of Scorching Dragon. The power of a group of dragons in action will definitely be amazing.

[Pole Star Transformation] (Active skill)- Powerful combat form transformation; the specific form is unknown. The current pole star level is a blue star. Each activation requires 1 million aura and 10,000 faith crystals.

[Pole Star Transformation]? [Royal Star Transformation]? Pole Star Emperor? Star Lord? Chen Rui seemed to have a sense of understanding. He looked at the fifth level of the skill tree. As expected, the original [Royal Star Transformation] has become unusable gray. This should be the upgraded version of [Royal Star Transformation].

There were 3 types of original skills that had been upgraded accordingly. In addition to the original [Sonic Boom] flying technique, he had a high-speed flying skill [Light Boom] which could be used only once per hour. Another star point was added for the [Star Gate], making it a total of 3. The protective shield had been upgraded to a defensive shield; the ability of absorbing damage and defense had been greatly improved.

The ‘cooldown’ of some skills such as [Scorching Dragon Kill] and [True Destructive Aura Blow] were removed. The cooldown was actually for the recovery and buffering time of the Super System to channel the energy to launch special skills. As the system upgraded, some skills no longer needed buffering and they could theoretically be activated infinitely provided that Chen Rui’s own Star Power was sufficient.

In the ‘extra skills’ at the canopy of the skill tree, in addition to the original skills of the God-Eating Mask, the Sword of Fallen Angel, and the Flame of Nirvana, 2 surprising new ‘fruits’ had been added.

[Time Control]- Control the time flow rate; the specific detail is unknown.

[Cloning]- Separate a clone that is completely controlled by oneself; the specific detail is unknown.

When Chen Rui comprehended the 4 seasons territory, a strange law was created. There would be a pause in time which Chen Rui had faintly understood in the previous training and battles. In addition to the special effects of 4 seasons’ territory, the ultimate mystery was the ‘time’ law.

This law used to be spontaneously stimulated only at dangerous moments. Now that he had reached 6-star evolution, especially after comprehending the universal law of creation and destruction, his comprehension of ‘time law’ became clearer. Now it had become a separate skill, and it was still a skill other than the Super System, so there would be an ‘unknown’ prompt.

As for [Cloning], I saw this kind of immortal mystic arts in Xianxia novels before. It should be equivalent to a ‘shadow’ skill here which can create a separate clone. Although there is no specific experiment, I have a faint feeling that this skill and clone… should be related to that ‘old friend’.

Chen Rui was about to continue to study the new features of the 6-star evolution, but he suddenly felt some change. It seemed that someone approached in this direction, and there was a faint conversation.

Chen Rui remembered that he was in the Tower of Destruction before ‘sleeping’. The holy dragon’s remnant soul Rodriguez paid a considerable price to imprison Shura with 2 origin fragments. This imprisonment lasted for 10,000 years.

How come someone came to the Land of Hatred so soon? Or maybe many years have passed? Then Isabella…

Thinking of this, Chen Rui opened his eyes in shock.

The first feeling was the dazzling and warm light which was a bit difficult to adapt to.

Chen Rui squinted slightly and saw the surrounding situation clearly. He was lying on a small hill with a small stream in front of him and a large lush forest nearby.

The sound of footsteps and conversation came from the woods ahead. Now Chen Rui’s strength has reached an unprecedented height. He felt that his overall strength seemed to have completely reborn; it was completely different from the past. His sensing ability alone was 100 times higher. Although he heard those sounds, the other party was still far away from the hillside outside the jungle.

This is the kingdom that Glorios rebuilt?

When Chen Rui scanned the surroundings vigilantly, he faintly felt a strange feeling in his heart. It seemed to be produced by the merged Arthur’s consciousness. It was a kind of instinctive familiarity.

By the way, the thing that emits a strong light above my head… is the sun?

He had witnessed the sun and moon in Glorios’ [Destructive Kingdom] which was transformed from the origin fragment of the light element, but the sun in front of him gave him a completely different feeling. It is just like the real ‘sun’ in the Super System!

The more Chen Rui looked at it, the more he felt that something was amiss. At this time, the conversation was getting closer. Chen Rui’s mind moved slightly, and he used the new 6-star evolution skill: [Sneak].

He gradually became 1 with the environment as if he had disappeared. He sneaked forward silently.

The people who came to the woods were 3 men wearing leather armor and holding weapons in their hands. They talk about a certain mercenary mission, plus teasing topics such as the chicks in the wine pavilion in the town.

The data shown in [Analytical Eyes] shocked Chen Rui. These 3 men should be mercenaries with weak strength at only E-level. It is equivalent to Intermediate Demon. What shocked Chen Rui was that “Race” column– Human!

From the feeling of ‘familiar’ just now, Chen Rui vaguely had an ominous premonition in his mind. Now he finally understood: This is not the Demon Realm! It’s the human world!

Shura once devoured the space seed that allowed the return to the human world when he devoured Nero in the past. It must be this seed! When the Shura was eliminated, the seed was accidentally activated, bringing me back to the human world!

TL: GG, but now he can’t find the Snow Dallet right? The question is how can he get back to the Demon Realm? Can [Star Gate] be used for that?

chapters.title: Chapter 629 - Save Yini! Target Snow Dallet
chapters.body:
Chapter 629 - Save Yini! Target Snow Dallet

Chapter 629: Save Yini! Target Snow Dallet

The unexpected arrival at the human world shocked Chen Rui who was unprepared. He took a long time to come back to his senses. The 3 mercenaries were long gone.

If it was ‘Arthur’, he would definitely be ecstatic at this moment to return to the human world from the horrifying Demon Realm; if Chen Rui was just reborn from the cross over, he would be happy to be the idle prince; but now it was different. After more than 3 years, his roots had grown in the Demon Realm. His women, Athena, Zola, Shea, Kia, Isabella, as well as Catherine the Great, and friends like Paglio, Roman, Delia, Aldas, Moore and so on were all at the Demon Realm. In other words, the Demon Realm was his real home.

So now Chen Rui’s first reaction was to return to the Demon Realm. Just in case, he set up a star point in the jungle. There were 2 original star points which were set at the Fallen Angel Capital and the water elementals’ Deep Blue Island. After 6-star evolution, the [Star Gate] had 3 star points, so the flexibility of this skill would be much greater.

When Chen Rui activated the [Star Gate] to return to the Demon Realm star point, an accident happened. The system prompted, “1 million faith crystals are required for A-level space crossover. The number of faith crystals is insufficient and cannot be used.”

This prompt made Chen Rui dumbfounded. 1 million faith crystal? A-level space should refer to the space level of the human world and the Demon Realm, but the ‘travel cost’ is too absurd. I now have only 6,000 faith crystals which are not even enough to activate the Pole Star Transformation that requires 10,000 crystals, let alone the astronomical figure of 1 million.

Although the hidden danger of Shura has been solved, [Galaxy Territory] has also expanded several times, and the accumulation of faith power has greatly increased, but it will take a long time to reach 1 million. The most important thing is that the deadly [Light Annihilation Seal] on Isabella hasn’t been dispelled yet!

With the help of Earth Elemental King Moore, the activation of the [Light Annihilation Seal] is extended to 9 months. After departing from the Fallen Angel Capital, it has been more than 3 months by the time I arrived at the Tower of Destruction after going past various sea areas. At most, I have only less than half a year left.

I don’t know how long I have fallen asleep during the time I was teleported to the human world after defeating Shura. Once the final time limit is exceeded, Isabella’s life will come to an end. The more Chen Rui thought about it, the more nervous he became. The joy after advancement disappeared. Now the key was to figure out this time issue.

Thinking of this, Chen Rui ran in the direction of the previous 3 mercenaries. Although his speed was quite amazing, the mountain roads were intricate. The 3 of them had been away for a long time, so he was unable to find them for a while, but he sensed that there was a person near the trail not far ahead.

Chen Rui immediately turned to the trail and approached the man in the blink of an eye. This was a relatively tall man. This ‘relatively tall’ was for humans. Compared with the burly minotaur and great demons of demons, he could only be regarded as average.

The man was leaning under a big tree. Holding a wine bottle in his hand, his body smelled of wine. There was a spear on the ground. In the [Analytical Eyes], his Comprehensive Strength Assessment was E+ which was equivalent to the demons’ later stage of the Intermediate Demon.

With Chen Rui’s current strength, he could crush this man to death with a single finger. He walked over without hiding. He used [Breath Holding], and his apparent strength was only the Intermediate Demon. When the man saw him walking over, his eyes brightened as he picked up the spear on the ground to greet him.

“Brother, may I ask if this is…”

Chen Rui remembered the common language that Nero said back then, and he asked tentatively. However, before he could finish speaking, he was interrupted by the man. No doubt, it was also common language, “Hey! You must be the rookie mercenary of the Blue Wild Forest!”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “Huh?“

“Don’t pretend anymore! Rookie.” The man sneered, “I can see that you have suffered a lot in the Blue Wild Forest at first glance. You have even lost your weapons!”

Chen Rui had experienced a series of battles with the underwater undead huge beast, Lich King, the holy dragon as well as Shura in the Dead Sea. At this moment, his appearance was indeed very haggard, but since the man had such a preconception, Chen Rui naturally would not explain. He just nodded in accordance with the man.

The man’s eyes were even brighter. His body was full of vigor, “So, rookie, you must have never heard of me, ‘Burning Spear’ Master Lucio’s reputation! This is my domain. If you want to return to Town Gudam, you must first hand over some valuables! At least 20 white crystal coins! Otherwise, I don’t mind stripping you out to feed the wolf.”

When Chen Rui used the fundraising scheme to scam Obsidian back then, he knew that the coins of the Demon Realm and the human world were the same. Obviously, Master Lucio in front of me is an incompetent robber. He requested for a ‘huge amount of money’ of 20 white crystal coins. It’s almost the same as the lowest level gangster of the Dark Moon City in the past. That’s right, it was indeed ‘in the past’. The living standard of Dark Moon City has been greatly improved now. Those gangsters wouldn’t be bothered to ask for 20 white crystal coins.

Before Master Lucio had the time to threaten the rookie with a few more words, he felt dizzy. An unimaginable and terrifying murderous aura instantly locked his whole body, and he couldn’t move.

“Now, I’ll ask 1 sentence, and you answer accordingly.” Chen Rui was worried about Isabella’s curse, so he had no time for this kind of delay, “If there are any untrue words…”

When Chen Rui lightly tapped the spear in Lucio’s hand, the tip of the spear suddenly turned into iron shavings and disappeared, leaving only the bald handle of the spear like a stick.

The big beads of sweat dripped down from Lucio’s forehead. He couldn’t wait to slap himself: Too terrifying! He turned the spear of fine iron into scraps with 1 finger. This kind of strength is definitely not only a Warrior; I’m afraid that he has reached the Master! I was actually so blinded that I thought of him as a rookie and even took the initiative to blackmail him?

The humans’ Warrior was equivalent to the Demon Realm’s lower-level Lesser Demon, Intermediate Demon, and Higher Demon; Master was equal to the middle-level Demon King and Great Demon King; Saint was the Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord.

Facing the ‘Master’ powerhouse, Lucio nodded and dared not have the slightest hesitation. If he knew that this young man who looked like a rookie in front of him had the real combat power that surpassed the top Saint powerhouse, what kind of tragic expression would he have?

“What year is it now? What month and date?”

This question surprised Lucio. He was obsessed with a niche novel written by a delusional guy in the elf tribe hundreds of years ago which said that the protagonist’s soul was reborn after a space crossover. He became invincible in another novel world, became a deity, and also harvested countless beauties. After the protagonist was reborn, the first sentence he asked usually sounded like this.

Lucio was curious, but he didn’t dare to ask more. He replied, “Today is the third year of the solar twelfth year, 15th July.”

Chen Rui heard Samuel mentioned in the Red Spirit Estate about the epoch of the human world and the time when Samuel came to the Demon Realm. He recalled and carefully calculated it on the spot. Lucio was lost in thought when he saw that Chen Rui seemed to ignore him. He had a few thoughts in his mind, but he finally dismissed the thought of running away. With the strength of this powerhouse, I’m afraid that I will be overtaken before I can run far. I will surely die if I infuriate him.

Chen Rui calculated it several times carefully, and he finally confirmed it. 4 months have passed from the journey of the Dead Sea and the awakening from this space crossover, so there is still 5 months until the final activation of the [Light Annihilation Seal] of Isabella.

5 months is not enough. The Dark Elemental King who can save Isabella is imprisoned in the Tower of Destruction by the remnant soul of the holy dragon Rodriguez. The nearest star point of the [Star Gate] is the Deep Blue Palace of the Water Elemental King. It takes nearly a month’s voyage from the Deep Blue Palace to the Land of Hatred. Even if the Dark Elemental King is successfully rescued, taking the Dark Elemental King back to the Fallen Angel Capital will take 2 months at the earliest because the [Star Gate] cannot “carry people”. After deducting 3 months from 5 months, only 2 months are left. This does not include possible battles and ups and downs.

I must collect 1 million faith crystals in 2 months. According to the current growth rate, this is an impossible task.

Therefore, I must consider other ways to save Isabella. Besides the Dark Elemental King, there are 2 ways to cancel the [Light Annihilation Seal]. 1 is to kill the caster, the other is to find the Snow Dallet flower.

Killing the caster is considered the best solution. He can dispel the [Light Annihilation Seal] automatically without returning to the Demon Realm, but the empire area of the human world is much larger than the Demon Realm. Furthermore, hundreds of years have passed. Finding and killing the guy who deceived Isabella was like looking for a needle in a haystack.

As such, finding the Snow Dallet flower is the most likely way to succeed. My task now is to gather 1 million faith crystals in 5 months, then get the Snow Dallet flower from Holy Light Mountain, and use the [Star Gate] to return directly to the Fallen Angel Empire to save Yini.

Of course, I can inquire about the whereabouts of Breeze Shadow Boots at the same time. It will be best if I can track down the bastard back then; I can solve them together.

Chen Rui, who had made up his mind, nodded and asked, “Which empire is this? How far is it from Holy Light Mountain?”

Upon hearing the familiar name of Holy Light Mountain, Lucio’s ‘crossover’ fantasy suddenly vanished. He answered honestly, “This is Yang Shao Empire, Holy Light Mountain is in the White Cliff between Dragon Bright Empire and Blue Glory Empire which is very far. Sir can go to Yang Shao Capital first, then from the capital to Dragon Tooth City on the border of the Dragon Bright Empire. The Dragon Tooth City has a [Teleportation Portal] dedicated toward the White Cliff.”

Hearing the name of Dragon Bright Empire, Chen Rui’s mind moved. ‘Arthur’ is the real prince of the Dragon Bright Empire. Is it possible to use this identity? But this idea was only fleeting. The most important matter now was to get Snow Dallet to rescue Isabella. Moreover, Prince Arthur was involved in too many matters, so he shouldn’t reveal this identity until he was forced to do so.

“Sir, this is the first time you have come to the Yang Shao Empire. Dragon Bright Empire is 1 of the 2 major light empires. It is well guarded. If you want to go to Dragon Bright Empire through the capital, you must have a corresponding identity certificate. I can accompany sir to the mercenary union to apply for a certificate.”

Lucio’s flattery voice sounded. Chen Rui understood that this guy wanted to save his own life. He thought for a while and nodded.

TL: Will it be easy to get the flower? Is there any test waiting for him on the cliff?

chapters.title: Chapter 630 - Unfreeze Mission
chapters.body:
Chapter 630 - Unfreeze Mission

Chapter 630: Unfreeze Mission

“Sir, there is nothing in Town Gudam that I don’t know. Sir can ask me anything.”

“If sir needs to take a break here, I can introduce sir the best hotel as well as the most beautiful and caring maid.”

“The equipment on sir seems to be badly damaged. I know that there is a blacksmith shop opened by a hobbit whose craftsmanship is the best in town…” Along the way, Lucio spared no effort to show his value in front of Chen Rui. Chen Rui did not say anything as he knew Lucio’s intention. In fact, he had no intention to kill the little pawn, Lucio. He just wanted to get an identity certificate and go to Dragon Bright Empire. Speaking of which, he also learned a lot of useful news from the endless words of this guy.

“Your great-grandfather was in the military of the Dragon Bright Empire?” Chen Rui finally asked.

Lucio tried to get close to this ‘Master powerhouse’ by listing his genealogy in the hope of saving his life. When he heard this question, he hastily replied, “Yes, my great-grandfather was once the leader of the Red Dragon Legion spearmen team, but unfortunately, our family suffered a reversal of fortune. During my father’s time, we migrated to the Yang Shao Empire. Later, my father died of illness and I…”

Speaking of ancestral glory, Lucio lowered his head in shame in comparison to his current situation, “My dream since I was a child is to be a spearman and inherit the glory of my grandfather. Unfortunately, my luck is quite bad…”

Bad luck? Is it because spearmen is a miserable profession? Chen Rui remembered a sentence, “Since ancient times, spearmen have been miserable, their luck is the lowest”. A typical example is a miserable guy holding the ‘Crimson Rose of Exorcism’.

Of course, Chen Rui knew that Lucio’s shame contained a lot of crocodile tears. He shook his head indifferently and did not speak any more.

The miserable spearman was very familiar with the terrain here. After about 1.5 hour, the 2 walked out of the forest and came to Town Gudam.

Chen Rui was silent along the way. He seemed more mysterious in Lucio’s mind. He didn’t dare to ask more, and he just asked kindly, “Sir, mechanic badge, potioneer badge, academy badge and mercenary badge are common identity certificates for all empires, but there is only mercenary union in Town Gudam. If sir doesn’t mind, you can first register a mercenary identity for temporary use.”

There were mechanic badges and potioneer badges in Chen Rui’s storage warehouse, but they were the Demon Realm’s badge. There were also the 3 empires’ inscribed pattern logos which were definitely impossible to use in the human world. Chen Rui pondered for a moment and spoke up, “Then let’s go to the mercenary union. I’m a low-key person. You know what to do now?”

This sentence implied a threat. Lucio shook his head quickly, “Understood! Please rest assured sir!”

The 2 came to a larger building. There was a sword-shaped logo on it.

After entering the door was a hall. There were many people in the hall who looked like mercenaries. Soon after both of them walked into the hall, they heard a disdainful voice coming from the side, “Look who is that? Isn’t it the ‘lousy spear’, Lucio? Even his spear is broken. He’s a veritable trash this time.”

The man who spoke was a bearded man carrying a broad sword behind him. His strength was D- which was a realm higher than Lucio.

The mocking voices beside him also sounded, “This guy usually only bullies some rookies. He has no ability. That day I saw him being chased by a flame pig and half of his pants were burned. Haha!“

“Lucio is not simply a trash, he is also an unlucky fellow. Last time, he was so ignorant that he blackmailed the guard leader’s cousin who just came here, then he was beaten severely and imprisoned for 3 months…” Lucio didn’t dare to say anything. He walked forward with his head down.

A petite female mercenary with a well-developed body spoke up, “Hey, the kid following behind! Lucio is not a good thing, don’t be fooled by him!”

This was considered kind advice. Chen Rui glanced at the female mercenary, and he still followed Lucio.

“He doesn’t even accept Sister Ina’s kindness. This rookie deserves to be fooled!”

“I bet this rookie has been tricked by at least 30 white crystal coins.”

“It should be 50 white coins, shall we bet?”

Chen Rui’s voice faintly sounded in Lucio’s ear, “It seems that you are quite famous.”

Lucio’s face blushed, and his head dropped lower. They arrived at the ‘reception desk’. Right in front was a pretty girl, and several girls were busy behind her. The huge bulletin board on the side listed mercenary missions of various levels in detail including content, time limit, and reward. The most striking thing was the popular mission marked on the big black sign. There was no mercenary union in the Demon Realm, so Chen Rui looked at it curiously.

“Sandy, my friend wants to become a mercenary, please help to register him.”

Sandy glanced at Lucio and gave Chen Rui a form. Chen Rui’s current face was the Earth otaku that he used in the Dead Sea which was not eye-catching. He filled in the name “Richard” in the form, and the rest of the information was naturally made up based on what Lucio said.

Sandy took the form, took a quick glance, and nodded, “Richard, I don’t know if Lucio has clearly stated to you that to become a union certified mercenary, you must first complete the simplest qualification mission and become a reserve mercenary. Then, you need to complete 3 white crystal-level missions within 1 month to become an official mercenary with a white crystal badge.”

Lucio hurriedly spoke up, “Uh… This is the case, Sandy, please register Richard to join my Burning Spear Squad. That way, as long as he can complete the reserve mercenary mission, he can directly become an official mercenary.”

This was indeed the rule of the trade union. As long as one formally joined the registered mercenary team after becoming a reserve mercenary, the reserve mercenary could directly ‘become official’ and get the badge. This was not a loophole. Mercenary was a life-risking career. An accident would cause death and injury or even team wipe. A formal mercenary team would definitely not recruit members without strength.

“The reserve mission should be the hunting wind rabbit. Here is a wind rabbit’s corpse, please check it.” Lucio took out the wind rabbit hunted on the way and put it on the table.

“Yes, it is indeed a fresh wind rabbit corpse. Richard can already obtain the reserve mercenary qualification, but…” Sandy took out a form and looked at it carefully, “Lucio, I’m afraid… you don’t have the qualification to recruit team members. Burning Spear Squad is now in a frozen state as you have not completed a purple crystal-level mission within a year. According to regulations, you must complete a purple crystal-level mission within 7 days starting today to unfreeze it. Otherwise, Burning Spear Squad will be disbanded forever.”

“What?” Lucio shook, “It’s been a year already? Why didn’t I receive notice in advance?”

“Hmph! A trash like you who can’t admit failure all day long only knows how to scam others and be drunk to dispel sorrows. How can you remember the time? Naturally, there is no need to waste energy to notify you.” A strong voice sounded from behind. This middle-aged man with a red beard and a scar on his face.

“Sir President.” Sandy’s words indicated the identity of the red-bearded man, who was the head of the Town Gudam’s mercenary union branch. The strength of the Red Beard’s was Warrior peak stage (D+) on the surface, which was equivalent to the later stage of Higher Demon, but his actual strength had reached the Master which was equivalent to the early stage Great Demon King (B-). These did not escape from Chen Rui’s eyes.

Red Beard naturally couldn’t see through Chen Rui’s strength. He only regarded him as a poor rookie who was scammed by Lucio and didn’t bother about him at all. He cast a cold gaze on Lucio, “You’re more miserable than I thought. Have you resorted to scamming in the name of the mercenary squad? Such a squad has no meaning at all. “

“No! Sir Rodan, I didn’t! Really!” Lucio yelled. He suddenly broke out in cold sweat when he recalled that there was a terrifying character beside him.

From the words of the Red Beard, Chen Rui heard that the miserable spearman seemed to be a guy with a bit of a story. Now that the mercenary team is frozen, the plan to get the mercenary badge quickly has failed, but the miserable man shouldn’t be doing this on purpose as it concerns his life.

“So after completing a purple crystal-level mission, I will be able to get the mercenary badge?” Chen Rui suddenly interjected.

“Kid, it’s not easy to be a mercenary. Otherwise, even if you get the mercenary badge, you will only die faster in future missions if you are not a true mercenary.” Red-bearded Rodan glanced at Chen Rui and shook his head disapprovingly, “Don’t believe this liar’s so-called shortcut. Honestly complete the 3 white crystal-level missions, and accumulate your experience slowly, then maybe you can live longer. As for the purple crystal-level missions, it is surely not something you can touch at your current level.”

Chen Rui had already noticed the mission of white crystal level. It was really not difficult. There were assisting potioneer in collecting herbs, sending letters to neighboring towns, assisting the guards in night defense, collecting magic beast skin and fur and so on. But for him, who was not familiar with this place, it was too time-consuming.

“Ms. Sandy, I would like to ask, what is the fastest mission to cancel Burning Spear Squad freezing? I only ask the mission with the shortest time regardless of the level.” Chen Rui smiled at Sandy and asked.

For some reason, Sandy felt a strange charm in the ordinary smile, and she replied, “On the popular mission, there is a manticore egg mission posted by Pastor Mana. The level is black crystal level 7, and the reward is 300 black crystal coins.”

“Oh.” Chen Rui nodded and said to Lucio, “Let’s go.”

Lucio didn’t dare to talk more. He followed suit. The Red Beard frowned slightly when he noticed that the relationship between the 2 was a little weird.

Stepping out of the mercenary union, Lucio quickly explained, “Sir Richard, I’m sorry; I really don’t know that Burning Spear Squad has been frozen…”

“Where is the manticore in the Blue Wild Forest?”

“In the Mighty Poison Cave deep in the Blue Wild Forest…” Lucio replied, and he immediately reacted, “Sir! You…”

“Stop talking nonsense. Now lead the way to the Mighty Poison Cave immediately!”

“Huh? Me?” Lucio trembled and stopped walking. “Mighty Poison Cave has 2 manticores. 1 is said to be close to Saint. They are the kings of the Blue Wild Forest. No one has ever dared to provoke them. A year ago, my team was collecting poisonous fruits nearby and accidentally alarmed a manticore. As a result, everyone except me was…”

“You now have 2 options. First, die immediately. Second, go to Mighty Poison Cave. Perhaps you can not only survive, but you can also avenge your lost companions.”

Lucio looked at Chen Rui’s calm eyes, and he finally gritted his teeth, “I’ll go!”

TL: Hmmm, it seems like this Lucio will be his future servant.

chapters.title: Chapter 631 - Spearman’S Luck
chapters.body:
Chapter 631 - Spearman’S Luck

Chapter 631: Spearman’s Luck

A thick cloud layer shrouded the sky, and it looked gloomy. It seemed to be a sign of a storm.

The terrain of the Blue Wild Forest was relatively winding. Although Lucio was familiar with the road, he and Chen Rui walked for nearly 5 hours before reaching the said Mighty Poison Land. This was a mountain forest with darker plants and rugged terrain. There were many bones buried in the soil and fallen leaves along the way, most of which were human.

Lucio’s footsteps slowed down. His face became more tense as he lowered his voice extremely cautiously, “Sir Richard, we have entered the manticore’s lair and may be noticed at any time. If sir wants to set a trap, we can’t go further.”

“Set a trap?” Chen Rui was startled. He showed a thoughtful expression, “I want to confirm first, there are manticore eggs in that Mighty Poison Cave?”

“There are 1 male and 1 female manticore in the Mighty Poison Cave. Just 3 months ago, the Agni Squad encountered a female manticore who was about to lay eggs. Except for the 2 who escaped by chance, the rest were killed by the male manticore.” Lucio’s tone was empathetic and bleak, “The female manticore should have laid eggs smoothly by now. Pastor Mana is a member of the Holy Church. After learning the news, he immediately offered a reward. Although the reward is high, the mission is too difficult. Even the strongest Holy Feather Mercenary Squad in the town did not accept the mission.”

The territory of the Yang Shao Empire was not vast, but it was quite famous in each empire. Robben, the founder, was once a mercenary. He led a mercenary group to create the miracle of an empire. Yang Shao Empire was relatively loose in mercenary management, giving mercenaries a lot of free space. They were called the empire of mercenaries. 1 of the 3 general associations of the mercenary union was located in the royal capital, and the other 2 general associations were located in the Dragon Bright Empire and Blue Glory Empire.

Town Gudam was not considered an important town in the Yang Shao Empire. However, the strength of the mercenary branch was not weak. According to Lucio, the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad was a black crystal-level team. The leader, Dazwin, was close to Saint while the rest of the members were also extraordinary in strength, especially their tacit understanding in cooperation. They were also considered quite well-known in the entire mercenary world, yet they dared not take this mission.

In fact, everyone understood that it was not that the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad could not complete it, but that the price to be paid was too great. Therefore, they were unwilling to do it.

Chen Rui looked at the cave in the distance and continued to walk forward, “Since there are surely manticore eggs in the Mighty Poison Cave, then let’s go.”

“Oh.” Just as Lucio replied, he felt something was wrong immediately, “Huh? Just go like this? Wait! Sir…”

“Sir! At least 1 of the 2 manticore’s strengths is close to Saint, and the demonic beasts are very talented. Their combat power is even higher than that of humans of the same level…” Lucio did not control his volume due to his anxiety. A roar from a distance sounded, making the spearman’s legs wobbly and almost urinating.

A long and large figure flew out of the cave in the distance, flapping its wings toward this side. Lucio did not expect to alarm the terrifying demonic beasts so quickly. He had goosebumps all over his body. The nightmare that had troubled him for 1 year reappeared in front of him.

The spearman desperately tried to tell himself to run away, but his feeble feet were as heavy as lead. He could only tightly hold the handle of the spear in his hand as if it was the only thing that could be grasped.

The terrifying and hideous demonic beast was getting closer. Accompanied by the roar that once traumatized Lucio, the scene 1 year ago reappeared in his mind. The devilish figure, the sharp claws, one after another collapsing companions, the blood-red sight…

As the heavy breath sounded loudly in his ears, his spirit, which he once thought to have been cooled by decadence, burned suddenly. His fear was suddenly covered by another kind of rage and hatred. The spearman grasped the weapon that could only be called a stick in his hand, let out a roar that even he couldn’t believe, and charged forward with all his strength.

This was the most powerful strike Lucio had ever made since that incident, and it might be the last strike in his life. Lucio didn’t know why he did this. Maybe it was just a near-instinct reaction. Most importantly, he had already done so.

Suddenly, the spearman saw a light as dazzling as the sun in the gloomy jungle. It did not have the warmth of the sun; there was only an indescribable destructive power.

When Lucio recovered his senses, the light had disappeared. The oncoming nightmare also disappeared.

The spearmen looked at the stick he stabbed in surprise… Is this the power of my strike? What a joke, it’s impossible!

While he was astonished, Chen Rui’s figure appeared in front of him with 3 oval objects floating in his hands which were about 30 centimeters long. It had a grayish-brown shell with white strips.

“These are… manticore eggs?” Lucio still maintained the posture of launching the spear, but he looked particularly stiff. How is this possible? If the previous nightmare is the past, then the scene before him is another dream?

“Okay, we can go back.” The other party’s reaction was calm. As if the 3 eggs were eggs laid by ordinary poultry, not eggs laid by the frightening demonic beast manticore.

Lucio dropped the spear and pinched his thigh violently. He finally woke up- It is not a dream, it is real! So, what about the 2 manticores?

In such a short time, he can be unscathed…

Lucio’s gaze at Chen Rui was no longer fear, but it was another kind of complete awe on the spiritual level.

Saint powerhouse!

Lucio bowed deeply. This general etiquette was similar to the Demon Realm, except that the hands were slightly different. The Demon Realm placed either the left or right hand on the abdomen or heart while the etiquette in the human world was that the right hand was placed on the left shoulder.

When Lucio recalled that he had the idea of using the power of the Red Beard to deal with ‘Richard’ in the mercenary union, he couldn’t help but feel ashamed: Let alone killing him, the other party didn’t even have to exert any effort to kill red-bearded Rodan.

“It is my honor to meet a powerhouse like sir! These 2 manticores are the biggest disaster in the Blue Wild Forest. At least 300 mercenaries have died in their hands including my former companions. No words can describe my gratitude and respect for sir.”

Chen Rui shook his head slightly, “Today I can kill them, someone stronger can kill me someday. The so-called disaster or enmity is nothing more than the survival law after all. Natural selection; survival of the fittest. From a certain perspective, I’m also a weakling. As a weakling, I still have the right to survive or move forward to become stronger, but the prerequisite is that I do not give up this right. Do you understand?”

Lucio nodded and smiled bitterly, “I actually understand this. I may understand a little bit more now. If… sir can give me a chance to live.”

“Oh?“

The spearman hesitated for a while before he finally gritted his teeth and spoke up, “I have 1 thing to confess to sir. Sir should have been training in a hidden place for many years without asking about worldly affairs. Actually… these days are a bit special, even if sir gets the mercenary badge and goes from Yang Shao Capital to Dragon Bright Empire, you cannot go to the White Cliff because a while later is the day when the Light Divinity Temple selects Divinity Temple Cavalry. Now the White Cliff has begun to be closed. No one is allowed to enter except for related personnel. We must wait until the selection of the Divinity Temple Cavalry is completed before it will reopen and allow believers to enter for praying.”

“Divinity Temple Cavalry selection?” The news really surprised Chen Rui, “How long will it take until it reopens?”

Lucio replied respectfully, “Divinity Temple Cavalry is selected once every 50 years. It is said that there are various trials and competitions. Each time takes about 2-3 months.”

Chen Rui’s brows frowned tightly. I have only 5 months at most. Besides getting the Snow Dallet flower, there is also a huge burden of 1 million faith crystals. If the selection of Divinity Temple Cavalry alone takes 3 months, I’m afraid that I will not be able to catch up later. I must not wait passively.

“Please forgive my previous ignorance, sir.” After understanding the power level of the other party, Lucio no longer dared to have extra thoughts. Offending a Master powerhouse and offending an advanced powerhouse were completely different concepts, “If sir really has something important to go to the White Cliff in a low-key manner, I have an idea.”

Chen Rui glanced at Lucio, “Tell me.”

“Sir can get through the relationship with Holy Church’s clergy and try to become the relevant personnel for selecting the cavalry.”

“Clergy?”

Lucio nodded, “For example, Pastor Mana, the publisher of this mission. My father had a little friendship with Pastor Mana during his lifetime. I know this person has a great desire for power and money. He offers a reward for manticore eggs this time is definitely not to cancel the hidden dangers of Town Gudam… In fact, Pastor Mana has long been dissatisfied with being the head of the church in Town Gudam. He has long coveted the position of the bishop of the capital. According to practice, after the selection of the Divinity Temple Cavalry this time, there will be related changes and adjustments in the positions of the Holy Churches everywhere. For Pastor Mana, it is a long-awaited opportunity. He is likely to use the manticore eggs for bribery.”

Chen Rui didn’t expect the miserable spearmen to have this analytical ability. His eyes brightened, “You mean…”

“Bypassing the mission of the union and using the manticore egg to bribe Pastor Mana. Perhaps I can be of little help to sir.”
