“Your plan does have a reference value, but…” Chen Rui pondered for a moment. He suddenly smiled with a deep meaning, “Since I’m going to enter the White Cliff in secret, then, the more you know, the faster you will die. Since you can think of going through Pastor Mana, it is impossible not to think of this. Aren’t you afraid…”

Lucio suddenly knelt on 1 knee, “I once swore that my life belongs to the person who can kill these 2 manticores to avenge my companions! I want to be a follower of sir!”

After he went all in to stab in the previous moment of life and death, the spearman felt that his nerves that had been numbed by decadence and wine seemed to regain a little more sobriety. It is a great opportunity to meet a Saint powerhouse, even if this opportunity meant the danger of death at any time. If I miss it, I’m afraid I will regret it for a lifetime.

From the moment of the previous confession, Lucio was determined to take a bet.

Accepting a follower as soon as I arrive at a new place. This kind of scene is too common… Chen Rui understood Lucio’s intentions. I am too unfamiliar with the situation of the human world and I needed time urgently. Lucio is a good candidate who is familiar with the environment. The plan is indeed feasible.

“You’re wrong. Only the dead are the most reliable keepers of secrets.”

These words made Lucio, who was kneeling on 1 knee, shiver in cold sweat.

“However, Sir Lucio, congratulations. You made the right bet. The following is a matter of contract procedure.” Chen Rui smiled, “1 thing I want to say to you most is, your luck has greatly increased now.”

TL: And the danger the spearman faces will increase as well😏…

chapters.title: Chapter 632 - Mission For Unfreezing
chapters.body:
Chapter 632 - Mission For Unfreezing

Chapter 632: Mission for Unfreezing

After solving the manticore, Chen Rui left the Mighty Poison Land with his newly acquired follower, Lucio.

With the manticore egg in hand, Lucio’s original plan was to skip the mercenary union and go directly to Pastor Mana. However, even if they could approach Mana, people with “unknown origins” like Chen Rui still needed an identity certificate like a mercenary badge. Otherwise, he would also encounter trouble in the follow-up plan.

Chen Rui’s plan was to get the badge first. Pastor Mana offered reward for only 1 manticore egg, but this time he got 3. It was completely possible to complete the black crystal mission and reactivate Lucio’s team authority. Although this would cause a certain sensation, with his current strength, he didn’t care about these at all as long as he could save time and not affect the implementation of the plan.

Now both of them were a little hungry. Chen Rui gave Lucio some food from the storage space. Although Lucio was curious about the fresh and delicious food that appeared out of thin air, he didn’t dare to ask more. The 2 were eating while walking. About 3 hours later, when they were going downhill, Chen Rui suddenly spoke up, “Wait.”

Lucio stopped quickly. Chen Rui looked at the hill on the left, “There is a voice over there that seems to be calling for help.”

“Master, uh… leader,” Lucio changed his address in time and looked at the direction of the hill, “That place is the iron grenade bee site. The queen bee crystal of the iron grenade bee is not only delicious, but it also speeds up magic power recovery. It is very valuable. However, iron grenade bees are demonic beasts that live in groups. They are very aggressive and their poison is especially special. It does not kill people immediately, but the pain caused is very terrifying. People who are attacked by iron grenade bees often will not be poisoned to death, but they will die in pain.”

Speaking of this, Lucio could not help but shudder. He suddenly seemed to think of something, “The union has a long-term mission of collecting honey which is a free mission that can be accepted directly. This mission is of purple crystal level 3, but it has been monopolized by the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad previously. Could it be…”

Chen Rui’s eyes flashed, “Let’s go and have a look.”

Lucio led Chen Rui to a forest under the hill on the left. From a distance, they saw 2 people lying on the ground howling in pain mixed with the indistinct cries of “help”. In front of the forest, a small cloud-like swarm of bees was slowly receding away.

Chen Rui and Lucio approached them. The 2 men on the ground were covered with protective gauze, but the gauze could not completely resist the frantic attack of the iron grenade bees. Red and swollen marks of the size of a jujube kernel could be clearly seen all over the body under the gauze. It was astounding.

The bee venom was strong and abnormal. The 2 of them wailed tragically and couldn’t move their bodies. Their muscles were twitching uncontrollably. Judging from the distorted expression, it seemed that they were enduring extremely throbbing pain.

“Leader, be careful! The bee venom of iron grenade bees is contagious. You must use dragon beard grass and fennel wattle to dissolve it.” Lucio reminded, “Leave it to me. I have some dragon beard grass but no fennel wattle. It should ease the trigger duration.”

Chen Rui was not afraid of any poison at all. Seeing Lucio taking the initiative, he nodded and threw him a pair of leather gloves. He added another sentence, “With these gloves, your hands are basically immune to all poisons. By the way, it also has an attribute that increases attack speed by 35%.”

Lucio surprisingly looked at the pair of brown gloves which also faintly shined with crystal light. Although he didn’t know the specific grade, they were extraordinary products judging from the delicate and seamless materials as well as near-perfect weaving skills.

After putting on the gloves, the gloves automatically shrink to the most suitable size. The touch felt like his own skin without the slightest feeling of being hindered.

The most surprising thing was Chen Rui’s words. Immune to “all” poisons? And it can increase attack speed by 35%!

What… What kind of equipment is this?

“Thank you leader, I’ll return it to you later.” Lucio understood the value of these gloves and held them carefully for fear of spoiling it.

Lucio’s behavior amused Chen Rui, “No need to return it, it’s just a quasi-legendary armor. From now on, it’s yours.”

Quasi-legendary grade! Moreover, it belongs to me! Lucio’s eyes widened, then he showed an expression of ecstasy, “Thank you, leader!”

The main material of this pair of gloves was Jacob’s scales. Chen Rui still had a lot of them. Moreover, a pair of quasi-legendary grade gloves was really nothing to Boss Chen and Master Chen, whose property and potential assets could no longer be estimated. However, for the spearman who had been in the lower level all year round, he couldn’t even afford an excellent grade equipment, let alone a quasi-legendary grade one.

Lucio knelt down, opened the gauze with his gloves, and searched the 2 men. They could not move due to the bee venom and could only scream. They couldn’t even hear what Chen Rui and Lucio said just now, let alone resisting.

“It turns out that these 2 people only have fennel wattle and they ran out of dragon beard grass.. The collection this time must have alerted the queen bee, so they ended up in such a tragic situation. Huh… what is this?” Lucio found a crystal bottle from the waist pocket of a man. He opened and smelled it, revealing a surprise expression, “The iron grenade bee’s queen bee crystal! It seems that the portion for half a month is here. Although it is a little less, it should not be a problem to get the purple crystal level 1 evaluation. We can just use it to complete the activation mission!”

Things are going really well. Chen Rui refreshed. Is the luck of the miserable spearman actually shifting? Could it be because of the protagonist’s halo infection?

“These 2 people are also considered a great help. Let’s save them.”

Lucio quickly took out his dragon beard grass to mix with the fennel wattle from the 2 men. He grinded them and fed the herb to them. The antidote herb formula really worked. The twitching on the 2 men’s bodies gradually subsided. The pain was obviously fading.

“Hey, I saved the lives of both of you. In return, the queen bee crystal is mine!” Lucio tossed the crystal bottle in his hand and stood up.

“Wait a minute…” A man who was barely regaining his sanity said weakly, “You can’t take the queen bee crystal away. We are from the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad!”

In the past, Lucio would definitely be afraid, and he would even choose an extreme method of killing them, but now there was a “Saint powerhouse” behind him, so naturally, he would not be afraid of the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad. He said disdainfully, “So what if it’s the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad? Don’t forget that if it weren’t for me to save you, you would be dead! And I can still get the queen bee crystal!”

After finishing speaking, Lucio stopped paying attention to the 2 of them. He stood up, turned around and left. Due to the effect of the venom, they were still unable to move for a short time, so they had to watch Lucio and Chen Rui walk away.

“Damn bastard! They actually took advantage of the situation to rob us. The queen bee crystal is snatched away now. A month of hard work is gone. The team leader will definitely punish us. Josen, what should we do?”

“When I was chased by the bee swarm, I had already released the magic message for help. The people in the squad will arrive in a few hours at the earliest.” Josen gritted his teeth, “Also, I seem to recognize this person. It’s the Burning Spear’s trash. How dare he snatched from us, the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad! When our venom is completely dispelled, we must not let him go!”

Lucio and Chen Rui didn’t stop all the way. After returning to the town, they immediately came to the mercenary union.

“Queen bee crystal?” Sandy looked at the crystal bottle that Lucio had handed over. She carefully confirmed again and again. She finally revealed an expression of surprise, “It’s really a queen bee crystal of the iron grenade bee!”

“Ms. Sandy. This is a free mission and does not limit the participant. Although the weight of these queen bee crystals is a little insufficient, there should be a level 1 purple crystal rating right? Is it possible to unfreeze my mercenary team?”

Sandy did not ask how these queen bee crystals were obtained in accordance to the professional standards. She nodded, “Yes, this kind of purity and weight can be rated for the level 2 purple crystal. According to the union regulations, the Burning Spear Squad is unfrozen and regains its normal authority. Here is the reward of 10 black crystal coins, please accept it.”

Lucio took the money bag and put it in his arms under Chen Rui’s sign, then he said, “Then my squad member should be able to become a formal mercenary, right?”

“Of course.” Sandy took out the form that Chen Rui had previously registered, “Richard, please sign your name here and press a handprint. This handprint will be imprinted on your mercenary badge.”

Chen Rui complied with all of them. Soon, “Richard” became a formal mercenary which was equivalent to possessing a legal identity that could pass through all empires.

The mercenary who witnessed this scene began to whisper, “That’s strange, how does this thrash spear get the queen bee crystal of the iron grenade bee?”

“The trash just went out just now. What actually happened?”

“No. Hasn’t it always been the people of Holy Feather Mercenary Squad who monopolized this mission?”

“Did Lucio snatch from the people of Holy Feather Mercenary Squad? Is he courting death? He dares to grab the food from Dazwin’s bowl?”

“Impossible. He didn’t even have the ability previously, let alone now…” After Lucio led Chen Rui to leave the mercenary union, he immediately went to the Holy Church in town to look for Pastor Mana.

Although Pastor Mana was just a small leader of a church, it was not so easy to meet him. Lucio claimed that he must meet Pastor Mana in person for confidential matters and paid 10 black crystal coins before they could meet the meditating Sir Pastor in the prayer room.

However, judging by the nuns who hurriedly left at the door just now, Sir Pastor’s seemed to find an assistant to help with his ‘meditation’.

Pastor Mana was a short and fat middle-aged man with a bald head, triangular eyes, and a mustache. At first glance, he looked like a villain. How did he get into the ‘light’ church?

The fat pastor’s eyes had a fierce look as if he was annoyed by the interruption of some good matter, “I know you, Lucio, the son of Tenival. For the sake of that old friend, I stopped the most important meditation to meet with you. If your so-called ‘confidential matter’ does not satisfy me, even if you are the only bloodline left by Tenival, I will give you a severe punishment in accordance with the law of fairness and justice of the church!”

Lucio glanced at Chen Rui, and he showed great confidence, “Don’t worry, my answer will definitely satisfy sir. In fact, you will be very satisfied.”

TL: Signs of following a good boss: getting good stuffs and having an unreal amount of confidence🤔. This pastor seems to be easy to bribe, hmm…

chapters.title: Chapter 633 - Pastor Mana
chapters.body:
Chapter 633 - Pastor Mana

Chapter 633: Pastor Mana

Pastor Mana was still skeptical. When he took over a space bracelet with 3 manticore eggs, his expression suddenly became quite excited. After confirming again and again, his original coldness and sternness disappeared and became friendliness.

“Lucio. Bis, I’m very pleased that I can see your father’s diligence and capability in you.” Fatty Pastor nodded encouragingly to Lucio as his face was full of praise. When his eyes turned to Chen Rui, he looked more amiable.

“Sir Richard, I’m very happy to meet you. It’s Lucio’s greatest fortune to have a friend like you. If there is anything that needs my help, I will definitely not refuse.”

Mana was of course jubilant. He originally endured the pain to spend 300 black crystal coins in the trade union to offer a reward for a manticore egg. Not only had he saved the 300 black crystal coins now, but he also unexpectedly got 3 manticore eggs plus 1 valuable space bracelet.

Fatty Pastor was an adaptable person who was good at judging the situation. Judging from the other party’s generous gift of space bracelet, he is by no means a simple character. Lucio also wears a space bracelet on his wrist. I know a little about the situation of this old friend’s nephew. After losing their wealth at home, he is just a poor man. It is impossible for him to have a high-level item like a space ring.

Obviously, it is because he got close to a certain big shot such as… the ordinary-looking young man.

Therefore, the fatty put down the usual self-proclaimed noble attitude and became quite friendly.

“Sir Pastor no doubt is as approachable as Lucio said.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Then I’ll just say it directly. My family is considered famous among a certain empire. Unfortunately, I’m only one of many inheritors. In order to make myself more competitive, I left the comfort home and to be trained by the challenges outside. Before I am confident, I don’t want to use my noble surname. So, I accepted Lucio’s help to become a mercenary.”

Mana showed an expression of “As I expected”, but he secretly estimated in his mind. Since the opponent can get the manticore egg, his strength or the one behind him is certainly not simple. Furthermore, he is so generous. Even if these words cannot be fully believed, they should be quite authentic.

“Holy Church is the guide of the human world that is admired by all humans and possesses the great might of omnipotence. I relate to this more deeply than before when I experience the outside world. I hope to use the power of the church to give myself the heaviest bargaining chip in this competitive scale.” Chen Rui bowed again, “Therefore, I specially came to visit Sir Pastor, and I would like to ask sir to point out a bright path.”

“What needs to be corrected is that it is not the church that has the supreme might, but the Light God.” Fatty Pastor’s triangular eyes narrowed slightly, and he shook his head regretfully. “Also, Sir Richard, I think you have found the wrong person. I’m just a pastor in a small town. How can I be qualified to give sir pointers?”

Chen Rui still kept smiling, “For a wise sage like sir, it is only an easy thing to point out the way for someone like me who is lost. I came in too hurriedly previously and only brought the newly acquired manticore eggs which is disrespectful. Please forgive me. As long as sir can give me a suitable and feasible suggestion, I will provide a handsome reward. If it is successful, then there will be a reward that makes sir more satisfied afterward.”

The fatty’s eyes lit up when the other party mentioned the “reward”. He thought for a moment, “Sir Richard, if what you said is true… Please forgive me for being rude, my suggestion is directly related to this…”

Seeing Chen Rui nodding, Fatty Pastor went on to say, “The might of Light God is endless. As long as there is sincerity and faith, it is possible to get the blessing of the light… In your case, becoming a Reserve Light Knight should be the best way. This way you can get power of light and take care of your family’s problems. The only drawback is that you will not be able to become a clergy that serves the light for a lifetime after you have the opportunity to take over the family in the future. Reserve Light Knight is the upper limit of the clergy that you can reach.”

These remarks had a cult vibe from time to time, but Chen Rui understood the point, Reserve Light Knight.

“How can I become a Reserve Light Knight?”

“According to Yang Shao Empire’s level, candidates for the Reserve Light Knight need to be nominated by the city-level church leader or the royal bishop. I don’t have this qualification yet.”

“During my training experience, I learned that the most important thing is to focus on the future. Sometimes, the determinants of potential are far more important than their appearance.” Chen Rui shook his head slightly, revealing a knowing smile, “Sir is just a pastor right now, but it doesn’t mean that it will be the same in the future. I believe… I will call you ‘Sir Bishop’ soon. Maybe this title will be even higher in the near future.”

Mana frowned. Just as he was about to speak, he saw Chen Rui’s hand holding a small bag out of thin air, “Sir Pastor, it was my negligence. You have shown me a bright path. As promised, this red demon gem is a token of appreciation. Please accept it.”

Mana initially seemed displeased when he saw the small bag. When he heard the words ‘red demon gem’, he shook slightly. When he opened the bag without shying away from Chen Rui and Lucio, there was a fire red gem that was the size of an egg. It had a faint breath of fire and dark elements, and there was no impurity in it. Mana was a person who could distinguish quality items. The value of this gem is at least 3000 black crystal coins!

Is this “a token of appreciation”? Mana’s gaze on Chen Rui suddenly became friendlier. This kind of gem was actually not too expensive in the Demon Realm which was rich in gems in dark elements. Moreover, Boss Chen had too many treasures. Any 1 of them was much more valuable than this. The original master of these treasures was the dragon.

“Sir Richard, I agree with your view just now. Potential is a very important quality.” Mana put the gem into the space bracelet. “As the saying goes, one can achieve anything with effort. No matter how difficult the road is, it is the result of people’s effort. If sir is really sincere and interested in becoming the Reserve Light Knight, you can try some ways. However, there is one thing I want to remind you, sir, even if you are nominated for Reserve Light Knight through some channels, it will be difficult to succeed if you don’t have the corresponding strength.”

“Well…” Chen Rui said with a thoughtful expression, “To be honest with sir, I do have a certain amount of power behind me, but I personally completed the manticore egg mission this time. Lucio, who led the way, can testify about this. However, I did not confront the manticores head-on. Instead, I used a special power related to talent which can barely be considered a strength.”

“Oh?” Mana showed a surprised expression when heard that Chen Rui did it himself.

“Sir Richard used a beast taming skill, and it is unimaginably powerful.” Lucio said, “The 2 manticores let Sir Richard take the egg without attacking at all. When I saw this scene, I almost thought I was dreaming! To tell Sir Pastor the embarrassing truth, I bite myself before I clearly understand that this is the truth.”

“The beast taming skill that can tame manticores!” Mana’s eyes showed a strong brilliance as he looked at Chen Rui carefully for a while, “Sir Richard, is this true? This is the key issue related to whether your dream can really be realized. Please answer me truthfully!”

“Yes.” Chen Rui nodded affirmatively, “The 3 eggs in sir’s hands are the best proof. The 2 manticores also left the Blue Wild Forest under my command. If you don’t believe me, sir can send someone to investigate.”

The so-called beast taming skill was a well-prepared foreshadowing specially prepared by Chen Rui. Judging from Lucio’s intel and the situation in which Mana offered a huge reward for the manticore egg, the manticore egg was probably related to the taste of a sir in the upper level. If he guessed it correctly, choosing Mana would be the right path.

No doubt, Fatty Pastor’s reaction was very eager. He rolled his triangular eyes and suppressed the enthusiasm in him as he asked, “Sir Richard. This matter is very important. Before we cooperate further, can I see your powerful beast taming skill with my own eyes?”

“Sure.”

“A few years ago, someone gave me a wind leopard. Although this wind leopard is far below the level of the manticore, it has a violent temperament. Even if it has a contract with me, it is hard to tame. I don’t know if sir can…”

Chen Rui replied without hesitation, “No problem.”

“Then, please come with me.” Fatty Pastor walked out with the 2 of them.

They passed through a few corridors and came to a hall. This was the hall where believers usually pray and worship. Today was exactly the day of prayer. The believers would pray at home, so there were no outsiders.

The fatty ordered the friars to leave the hall, leaving only Chen Rui and Lucio, “Please wait here, I will bring the wind leopard over now.”

As soon as the fatty left, Lucio immediately whispered, “Master, I know that wind leopard is a mutated bloodline. Its combat power has reached the peak of Warrior which is only a step behind Master. Of course, with sir’s strength, it must be easy to kill it, but…”

“Don’t worry.” Chen Rui shook his head indifferently and began to look at the prayer hall. The hall was very spacious. He could see the rows of seats like a church with a Light God statue in front of which was exquisite and meticulous, but its appearance was vaguely processed which made it even more mysterious.

Chen Rui had a different expression in his eyes when he stared at the statue of Light God. As the highest controller of the Tower of Faith in the Super System, he could clearly sense the special breath contained in the statue that was not perceivable by ordinary people.

The breath of faith!

A gleam of inspiration flashed through Chen Rui’s heart as if he had thought of something important, but before he had time to think about it, his thoughts were interrupted by a roar.

Pastor Mana approached with a black demonic beast which was the so-called wind leopard.

The wind leopard’s temperament was no doubt as violent and ferocious as Mana said. When it saw Lucio, a hostile growl sounded from its throat, making the spearman startled; he almost took out his weapon.

“Sir Richard…” Mana was about to speak when he saw the wind leopard’s movements suddenly stiffened. When it turned its head and glanced at Chen Rui who was approaching slowly, its pupils had a frightened gaze. It did not dare to move.

Chen Rui was silent for a moment, then he beckoned. The wind leopard walked over cautiously and lay down in front of him, making a cat whine sound as if it was not a ferocious demonic beast, but a docile kitten.

This scene not only stunned Mana, but even Lucio was dumbfounded- This kind of beast taming skill that made the ferocious wind leopard surrender at first meeting is simply unheard of.

Chen Rui wanted to say that in fact, he just released a breath to frighten the wind leopard, then he threatened and lured with a few words using the [Analytical Eyes]. Thus, he completed the process of turning the poor wind leopard into a cat.

TL: Is he thinking of stealing faith? Hmm, a little bit suspicious 🧐

chapters.title: Chapter 634 - Cooperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 634 - Cooperation

Chapter 634: Cooperation

Chen Rui squatted down and patted the wind leopard’s head. The wind leopard rolled over, revealing the vitals of its abdomen, and made a submissive purr. It no longer had the usual ferocious aura.

The shock in Mana’s heart was simply overwhelming. As the master of the wind leopard, even with the power of enslaving contracts, I can only barely control the demonic beasts instead of the current complete surrender. This level of beast taming skill can only be described by the word ‘amazing’. Those so-called beast masters are simply scums compared to him!

The facts are right in front. ‘Richard’ did not lie. He really obtained the manticore’s eggs with his power!

Mana recovered from the shock and looked at Chen Rui with a completely different gaze. He was arrogant when they first met; he was kind after seeing the manticore egg; he was stunned after getting the red demon gem, then he was fanatical at this time.

“Sir Richard, your abilities are really astonishing.” Mana’s face was full of smiles. Even the triangular eyes were squinted by the fat. There was a strong brilliance in his small eyes as if he spotted a rare treasure.

“It’s just talent with a little secret technique which is nothing to experts like Sir Mana.” Chen Rui humbly shook his head and asked tentatively, “What sir said before, a certain channel to become a Reserve Light Knight… “

“Sir, with my current status, I really can’t directly recommend you as a candidate for the Reserve Light Knight, but with my network, it is not impossible to get the title of a candidate…” Fatty Pastor did not go on. He held his chin with a thoughtful smile.

Chen Rui knew the meaning by listening to his words. He smiled, “Sir rest assured, the help between friends is mutual. If I can be of any service to sir, I will also not refuse. It will be ideal if we can form a solid relationship of mutual benefit as well as mutual advancement and retreat.”

“Talking to a smart person is easy!” Pastor Mana showed an expression of joy that could not be concealed, “Our goals are quite related. Cooperation will benefit both sides. If you don’t mind… Richard, please allow me to call you that way.”

“Of course. My friend, Mana.” Chen Rui glanced at Lucio, and Lucio immediately understood. He found an excuse to leave the hall area.

Pastor Mana admired Chen Rui’s intellect. He spoke up, “Richard, to be honest, I have been eyeing the bishop position in the capital city for a long time. I have also established some connections. For this reason, I even gave up the opportunity to serve as a pastor in a more prosperous and wealthy city. Normally, after the Divinity Temple Knight selection at the White Cliff this time is over, the positions in various places will be adjusted accordingly. This is a rare opportunity that must be seized. The White Cliff’s cardinal, Sir Roger, will come to Yang Shao Capital for inspection soon. This sir has a niece called Elisa whom he cares very much like her own daughter. He will take her with him when he travels. Ms. Elisa is a light element magician and also a beast tamer who loves to collect exotic beasts. I offer a reward for manticore eggs just to cater to this lady’s preferences. As long as Sir Roger agrees, plus the support of the sir behind me, I can undoubtedly become the bishop of the royal capital. Even the chief bishop of the royal capital is not impossible when I have sufficient qualifications in the future.”

Chen Rui finally understood the real reason Mana wanted to obtain the manticore egg. It seemed that the previous ‘beast taming talent’ foreshadowing was right. Cardinal Roger from the White Cliff attracted his attention. Perhaps, this was an opportunity to mix into the White Cliff.

“Sir Roger is 1 of the 3 cardinals of the church with a high level of authority. It is definitely not a problem for him to directly set you as a Reserve Light Knight. You who just want to use the power of the church to control the family instead of becoming a life-long clergy. The real role of the Reserve Light Knight is to have the opportunity to become a follower of the Divinity Temple Knight. As long as you can take this opportunity to attach to a Divinity Temple Knight, then I can say with certainty that your goal will be achieved very soon!”

“A follower of the Divinity Temple Knight?” Chen Rui thought about it, “Is this selection of Divinity Temple Knight a good opportunity?”

“Of course!” Mana nodded, “Ms. Elisa is not only Sir Roger’s niece, but also the apprentice under the Holy Lady who has a wide range of networks in the church. As long as you can associate with Ms. Elisa, you can ask her to introduce a very promising contestant to you at that time.”

Holy Lady? Cardinal?

Chen Rui heard from Lucio that the positions of the Holy Church in descending order were Pope, Archbishop, 3 cardinals, chief bishop, bishop, pastor, deacon and ordinary friar or nun.

The current glorious Pope Vantis was the highest leader in the human world.

Whether it was the 2 great empires or the other empires, the empire kings could only lower their noble heads in front of this Pope. For countless years, there had been countless changes in the ruling of the empires, but the Light Divinity Temple had always stood firm. The power of the church had penetrated into every level and every corner of every empire. It could be said to be deeply rooted and unshakable.

There were 2 Archbishops second only to the Pope who enjoyed special power and status. One was Pusmeer, who was proficient in astrology, and the other was Holy Lady Eudora.

The cardinals were directly appointed by the Pope. There were 3 people in total, but in addition to the 3 cardinals, there were 2 people who also had the same status as the cardinals. 1 was the Head Judge of the Tribunal, Seus, and the other was the Paladin Captain, Parsali.

The Tribunal was 1 of the 2 armed powers of the Holy Church which directly reported to the Pope. It mainly consisted of penance cultivators with strong combat power. Its responsibility was to sanction the heretics and clear out the dark power.

Another armed power was the Glorious Knight which was responsible for defending the faith and guarding the light. Each empire capital had a Light Knight Legion branch which was not restricted by the laws of the empire. The highest level of the Glorious Knight was the Paladin under the Holy Light Mountain, followed by the Divinity Temple Knight stationed in the Holy Light Mountain or in charge of each empire branch, and lastly the ordinary Light Knight.

The same was for the chief bishop. The chief bishop of Holy Light Mountain had a higher status than the ordinary chief bishops responsible for the church affairs of each empire. The candidates for chief bishops were selected among the bishops, and the bishops were selected from the pastors, and so forth.

Chen Rui’s current goal was the low level ‘Reserve Light Knight. Of course, even the low grade clergy also represented the great might of the temple in a sense. What’s more, Fatty Pastor also suggested him to be a follower of the Divinity Temple Knight.

Holy Light Mountain has been closed… cardinal’s niece… Divinity Temple Knight candidate… Divinity Temple Knight selection competition… These keywords were quickly turning in Chen Rui’s mind. For a time, several implementable plans appeared in his mind. There was only one purpose, mixing into the Holy Light Mountain!

Chen Rui thought for a while and finally made a decision, “Okay! In order to prove the sincerity of both parties, I think it is necessary for us to sign a related contract.”

“No problem!” Mana was overjoyed. This suggestion made the fatty completely relieved. His ‘contract’ with the wind leopard was actually a mark of slavery instead of a real contract. He could ask the beast tamer to use a special method to cancel it if it was really necessary.

As a result, under Chen Rui’s ‘link’ power, the 2 signed an equality contract which was to maintain a mutually beneficial relationship until they achieved each other’s goals. After the contract took effect, the fatty looked a little more highly at his partner who was able to realize the contract as he wondered how to make full use of this Richard within the rules allowed by the contract to maximize his own interests. When necessary, he could also sacrifice the other party. However, the fatty didn’t know that this seemingly unbreakable contract could be invalidated at any time for Chen Rui. Chen Rui was also tricking him.

The 2 looked at each other and burst into laughter at the same time, but each had ulterior motives in their minds.

At this moment, a friar hurried over to report, “Sir Mana, bad news. The people from the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad flooded into the church, grabbed Lucio, and threatened to take this guest away. Deacon Martier sent me to report to sir immediately.”

If this happened half an hour ago, Mana wouldn’t care about such trivial matters at all, but now things had changed drastically, so the fatty immediately showed an expression of anger, “Damn mercenary group, how dare they arrest people in the church? It’s even my guest! I can’t bear it! Let’s go and take a look!”

Chen Rui’s mind shifted. He clutched his temples and showed an exhausted look, “Mana, I used a lot of spirit power to acquire that item previously. Plus, I just used the power of contract just now. I have to rest for a while now. Otherwise, my spirit power will be damaged due to exhaustion. Lucio… is actually my new servant, I’ll leave this matter to you.”

“Don’t worry, my friend! Let me handle these little matters!” The fatty patted his chest to make a guarantee, and he said with concern, “You go to the hall to recuperate now. You must take care of your body.”

Chen Rui was now the fatty’s collaborator and a key figure to be associated with Cardinal Roger. Naturally, he shouldn’t be subject to any harm, especially the spirit power related to the beast taming skill. Otherwise, the fatty would regret it if it affected the plan.

“Dhora, help my friend to rest in the hall now.”

The friar was about to step forward when Chen Rui shook his head, “It’s okay, I can go by myself, but please don’t disturb me for now.”

“Alright! Dhora, immediately deliver my command that no one is allowed to go near the hall!” The fatty commanded and walked toward the corridor with the wind leopard.

Friar Dhora noticed the close relationship between Chen Rui and Sir Pastor from the way they addressed each other, so he didn’t dare to neglect him. After Chen Rui entered the hall, he closed the door for him and guarded the corridor outside the door so as to prevent disturbances.

After Chen Rui entered the hall, his fatigue disappeared. He stared at the Light God statue exuding faint faith power in front with a contemplative expression. After a while, the breath on his body continued to undergo a subtle change. He seemed to be trying all kinds of methods.

Suddenly, Chen Rui’s eyes brightened. As his mind moved, there was already a figure in front of him. This person’s appearance was the same as Chen Rui except that his pupils showed faint blood.

TL: Shura? Why does he need him for? Really stealing faith power?

chapters.title: Chapter 635 - Faith Stealing! [Cloning]’S Abilities
chapters.body:
Chapter 635 - Faith Stealing! [Cloning]’S Abilities

Chapter 635: Faith Stealing! [Cloning]’s Abilities

In the hall of the church, a group of mercenaries was waiting. The leader was a middle-aged man with a fine stature, short hair and no beard. He was wearing a silver chain armor and a purple cloak behind his back. His eyes were gleaming. It was Dazwin, the leader of the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad.

Lucio was in the hands of a mercenary behind Dazwin. He obviously got caught. Since it was on the church site, the spearman hadn’t suffered much for the time being.

“Deacon Martier,” Dazwin said to the church deacon in front of him, “Thank you for your cooperation this time. Please forgive me for the disturbances. I will treat you to a good drink later at the Vanilla Tavern.”

Martier smiled, “It’s not a problem at all. Leader Dazwin has a long relationship with the church, so you don’t need to be so polite.”

Dazwin nodded and frowned slightly as he glanced at Lucio. When he received a report from the group members earlier that the queen bee crystal of the iron grenade bee was snatched away, his first reaction was anger, then when he heard that the brave person was actually Lucio who was laughed at as trash, he was surprised.

The Holy Feather Mercenary Squad was the most elite team in Town Gudam. They were robbed of the quest item now, and the robber even openly went to the mercenary union to deliver the mission. It was equivalent to slapping the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad in the face in public.

——When Lucio delivered the task, there were a lot of mercenaries present. This matter had spread quickly.

Although Lucio had rescued the 2 members first before snatching the queen bee crystal away, in any case, their reputation must be restored. He wanted to use this opportunity to teach Lucio severely as well as to deter the rest of the competitors. So when Dazwin heard that Lucio and his accomplice were heading to the Holy Church in the town, he immediately chased after them with his people.

Dazwin was a friend with the church’s Deacon Martier. He had taken the task of escorting the church personnel previously, so he was also familiar with Pastor Mana. In the name of the most elite mercenary group, he thought Pastor Mana would give him face since he came in person this time.

What puzzled Dazwin was that Lucio was only slightly surprised when he saw him coming with the people. Then, Lucio let them arrest him without resisting. There was always an indifferent sneer on his face. Compared with the usual decadent appearance, he seemed to be a different person.

At this moment, a furious voice sounded from the inner door, “Who is it?! How dare you cause trouble in this sacred place of faith!”

A bloated figure appeared in front of everyone. It was Pastor Mana who was in charge of Town Gudam’s Holy Church.

“Sir Pastor.” Dazwin bowed slightly, “Please forgive me for taking the liberty…”

Before he finished speaking, he was interrupted by Mana’s cold voice, “Dazwin, you are so bold! You actually blaspheme the highest faith of light!”

Dazwin didn’t expect Pastor Mana to accuse him of such a thing as soon as he appeared. He immediately took out a small black bag, “We mercenaries are all unrefined people. If we have offended sir, please forgive us. Please accept a little compensation for the damaged facility, sir.”

In fact, not even a piece of wood in the church hall was not damaged. In view of the fatty’s usual temperament, the so-called ‘compensation’ was nothing more than a benefit. This was already giving face for the fatty. Even if he was making a pretense, there should be a limit.

Unexpectedly, the fatty didn’t even look at the little bag, and his face became unsightly, “What do you mean? You want to bribe a glorious pastor who dedicated his life to light faith? I will give you 10 minutes. Take back the bribe immediately, then let Lucio go and leave this place. Otherwise, the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad’s actions will be regarded as an attack to the church!”

Dazwin didn’t expect the fatty’s attitude to be so tough. His brows frowned more tightly, “Sir, Lucio and his accomplice robbed my squad members and submitted the mission under false pretense. This caused my squad to suffer a huge loss. I will now take him and that accomplice away for a fair…”

“Nonsense!” The fatty sneered disdainfully, “A clergy will rob your squad members?”

When these words came out, not only the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad and Deacon Martier, but even Lucio himself was stunned: Me? Clergy?

The spearman’s reaction speed was quite good. He smartly remained silent- Although I didn’t see master, judging from Mana’s tough attitude, master’s plan should have succeeded. The strength of the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad is just a disdainful ant for master’s level. I’ll just let the fatty handle this.

“Sir Mana, as everyone knows, Lucio is an ordinary mercenary. When did he become a clergy?” Dazwin glanced at the surprised Deacon Martier, “Deacon Martier, do you know about this?”

Martier was not a fool. He could pick up some clues from the abnormal attitude of his fatty boss. He rolled his eyes and said, “The appointment of personnel is usually appointed by Sir Pastor himself. There is no need to go through a mere deacon like me.

The fatty nodded. He was satisfied with Martier’s reaction, “Lucio has always been inspired by the light. He has secretly joined the church long ago, and he is responsible for investigation and security work. Now, he is even more fortunate to be a follower of a future Light Cavalry! Although his position is low, as a believer who serves the light wholeheartedly and a follower of a noble knight, it is impossible that he will rob! I believe Leader Dazwin also knows what is the crime to falsely accuse a clergy. In any case, even if this clergy really has any fault or crime, only the church can sentence him. Otherwise, even the law of the empire cannot be imposed on him, let alone you mercenaries!”

These words caused a commotion among the mercenaries. Many people showed angry expressions. The wind leopard beside the fatty had a ferocious temperament. It immediately roared when it saw the situation. Its hair stood up. With only a command, it would pounce forward. It no longer was the appearance of the meek cat in front of Chen Rui.

“Dazwin, I just want to ask before you decide to point your sword at the church, are you ready to bear all the consequences?” The fatty only barely reached Warrior, and he was actually very afraid of the mercenary’s combat power, but his attitude was still very tough.

“Calm down everyone!” Dazwin exuded a terrifying aura that suppressed the tense situation. The wind leopard immediately felt the pressure from the opponent, showing intense vigilance and hostility.

Dazwin took a deep look at Lucio and spoke up, “Since Lucio is a member of the church, there must be a misunderstanding about what happened today. I will hold those members responsible for the misreporting and interruption. Please forgive us, Sir Pastor. “

Attacking the church was a very bad crime. Once a conflict really occurred, they would be chased by the Light Knight Legion even if Lucio and that accomplice could be captured today. By then, not only the members of the mercenary squad, but even their family members would be in danger.

The strength of the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad was a trivial ant in front of the behemoth Holy Church. It could be obliterated easily.

After all, they were just making a fuss about Lucio’s matter. In the face of the threat of life, the warning for others and reputation were put aside. They couldn’t take this risk.

Under the gesture of Dazwin, Lucio was released. The spearman’s appearance still seemed very calm with an attitude of ‘I will not be bothered regardless of your identity. I just fight silently for high scores’.

Dazwin was slightly surprised. I don’t know what happened to this decadent “thrash spear”. but what is certain is that he is definitely not the previous Lucio.

The Holy Feather Mercenary Squad left the church angrily. Lucio quickly thanked Mana, and the fatty patted the spearman’s shoulder encouragingly as he secretly thought: This result should satisfy my partner. I wonder how well Richard’s spirit power has been restored.

The fatty didn’t know that when he confronted the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad, Chen Rui was undergoing an incredible change in the prayer hall.

What appeared in front of Chen Rui was his old enemy, Shura, who had been troubling him, but Shura now had become a strange existence——[Cloning].

Since evolving to become the Pole Star Emperor, it was the first time Chen Rui activated [Cloning]. Since this was out of the existence of the Super System, the Super System’s prompt was ‘unknown’.

After being activated, Chen Rui’s mind suddenly showed the characteristics of the clone. This clone was a copy of the original body which could become an independent life entity of consciousness, but it was completely controlled by the original body and could be canceled freely. If the clone died accidentally, it could be reborn after spending the corresponding time and faith power.

The strength and attributes of the clone were exactly the same as Chen Rui’s body. They were all S+, and the spirit power was S++, but unlike Shura who had all the Super System’ skills previously, the clone had Shura’s independent power: [Supernova Explosion], retaliating with one’s own skill, devour power, the mirage magic power, undead power and so on. In addition, there was another power that was most special for Chen Rui- Wheel of Hera.

Right now, the phantasm of the Wheel of Hera appeared around the Light God statue. Below was a disc full of primitive patterns. On the disc, there were various pillars of different heights. The whole space was filled with a bizarre force field.

Shura stretched his body and turned into a blood light, wrapping the Light God statue.

When the blood light began to seep into the Light God statue, it was suddenly subjected to a strong repulsive force. Ripples were shaken out of the blood light. At this moment, runes appeared on the pillars of the Wheel of Hera. The disc below began to rotate. Every time it turned, the blood light penetrated a little more.

Gradually, the repulsive force emitted by the god statue was assimilated by the blood light. There was a layer of phantasm on the Light God’s original blurry facial features. The phantasm twisted and it gradually became the appearance of Shura which was the appearance of Chen Rui!

Next, Chen Rui felt a stream of pure power passed into Shura’s body from the Wheel of Hera. This is… faith power!

This faith power was different from the faith that Chen Rui felt in the Super System. It seemed that it couldn’t be absorbed directly. However, something more amazing happened at this time. The blood light of Shura began to flicker, and the faith power of Light God began to disintegrate and transmitted into Chen Rui’s body. The production speed of the faith crystal in the Super System status bar suddenly doubled.

Shura was equivalent to a converter which stored the faith of Light God, then he refined it into its essence. He also converted them into faith power that was absorbable by Chen Rui and transmitted them to the Super System.

Compared with the speed and quantity of Shura’s absorption of Light God’s faith power, the absorption speed after this conversion was relatively slow, but this was enough to make Chen Rui ecstatic.

Shura can really steal and convert faith power!

In this way, the task of getting 1 million faith crystals has changed from impossible to possible!

TL: 🤔wouldn’t this act put him in danger? Since its faith power, it must be a powerhouse above Demi-God. If he comes for Chen Rui…

chapters.title: Chapter 636 - Set Off
chapters.body:
Chapter 636 - Set Off

Chapter 636: Set Off

The face of the Light God statue returned to its initial blur, and the bizarre force field surrounding the statue gradually disappeared.

It was not because Shura had undergone some kind of change. In fact, Shura was not completely annihilated, but when Chen Rui comprehended the universal truth of creation and destruction, he truly returned as part of Chen Rui. Just as the rivers returned to the ocean, the destruction returned to the mystery of the entire ‘universe’.

And [Cloning] was more like a clone skill derived from this. Even if this clone was given a corresponding independent consciousness, it was just another consciousness that was quite similar to the original body; it would not become a rebellious presence as before.

The reason Shura stopped his power was because the faith power accumulated by the god statue at the prayer hall was scarce. Furthermore, the less faith power, the stronger the repulsive power would be. Just in case, Chen Rui withdrew the clone. Moreover, the sound of footsteps outside was getting closer; it should be Mana and the others.

The stolen faith power was accumulated in Shura’s body and converted into the Super System’s faith power. This conversion speed was relatively slow. It was equivalent to collecting a lot of food for storage, then eating part of it every day and slowly digesting it.

In any case, the success of this attempt gave Chen Rui an unexpected surprise. The ‘legacy’ left by Shura is indeed extraordinary. It is just like stealing the faith power of the Super System back then, I can actually steal and convert the faith power outside my body.

In this way, the production speed of the faith crystal will be greatly accelerated. It is not an extravagant hope to reach the 1 million that can activate the [Star Gate] back to the Demon Realm!

So, Chen Rui now had 2 primary tasks. First, mix in the White Cliff and go to Holy Light Mountain to pluck the Snow Dallet; second, try to steal the faith power of the Holy Church and get 1 million faith crystals as soon as possible.

Both of these tasks were related to the Holy Church, and the current plan of ‘Reserve Light Knight’ was the key.

Chen Rui walked out of the prayer hall and saw Pastor Mana, Lucio and others waiting outside. Fatty Pastor hurriedly asked when he saw Chen Rui come out, “Richard, has your spirit power been fully restored?”

“It hasn’t been fully restored yet, but it’s better now.” Chen Rui looked at Lucio, “It seems that our Sir Pastor is really extraordinary; the problem was solved so quickly.”

“It’s just a trivial matter.” A proud expression flashed past Mana’s triangular eyes, “But you, my friend. Just now Dhora said that there was something strange in the hall, but he didn’t dare to go in and disturb you. This made me a little worried about your condition. Fortunately, you are okay.”

Chen Rui’s heart skipped a beat as he looked at Friar Dhora. He found that his strength was only F, and his spirit power reached E-. He deliberately asked, “Friar Dhora, what did you feel just now?”

Dhora replied respectfully, “It’s just a special feeling. I can’t explain in detail. This feeling lasted for a while, then it disappeared when Sir Mana came. Maybe it was just my illusion.”

“No, your feelings are not wrong. It was my spirit power fluctuating just now.” Chen Rui quickly thought of an excuse, “There is a special sacred breath in this hall. When I restore my power, my spirit power quantity seems to have been washed and sublimated… My strength has been stagnant for several years initially, but now I have actually found a faint enlightenment of breaking through the bottleneck.

“Oh?” Mana’s eyes lit up. The higher the level of ‘Richard’ and the stronger his ‘beast taming skill’, the better it was for their plan. If they could successfully get close to Irina and Cardinal Roger, not only Mana would be able to ascend the long-awaited bishop of the royal capital. ‘Richard’ could also be the Reserve Light Knight. In the long run, if Richard found a powerful Divinity Temple Knight as a backer, Mana the bishop would also benefit a lot as a contract party with binding interests.

“Mana, if you don’t mind, I hope to stay in the church for a while to seize the inspiration of this breakthrough and strive to break through to the next stage of Master.” Chen Rui’s words faintly revealed that his current strength had reached the first stage of the Master (equivalent to Demon King).

No doubt, Mana showed a surprised expression. He started to believe that Chen Rui was a genius of a major family, and he agreed without hesitation, “Of course it’s okay! You will be a candidate for Reserve Light Knight soon. There are some corresponding standards and etiquette that need to be firmly grasped, so you can stay in the church and seize the time to comprehend and learn. In fact, we don’t have much time.

Just like that, Chen Rui stayed in the Holy Church with a dignified reason. For the next few days, he would go to the prayer hall to ‘comprehend’ every day; sometimes in the dead of night and sometimes when the believers prayed.

After a few days, there was a bounty harvest. Not only did Chen Rui digest half of the stolen faith power and turn them into faith crystals, but he also discovered a more concealed method of stealing, He used Shura’s illusion talent from the mirage to create and manifest [Realistic Illusion] which hid the changes on the statue’s face and the Wheel of Faith so that the faith could be stolen openly even in the public.

Of course, the prerequisite was that there was no powerhouse that could see through the mirage’s illusion. Generally speaking, it was safer when there was no one.

His only regret was that since he stole the faith power of the statue by activating the clone for the first time, the recovery speed of the god statue’s faith power had been unsatisfactory. In the past few days, the sum of the faith power stolen by Shura was less than 10% of the first time.

There were quite a lot of believers in the Holy Church. The god statue was equivalent to the Pillar of Faith of the Super System. Even if they didn’t pray in the prayer hall, their usual faith could be automatically absorbed by the Light God statue. It would probably recover a couple of months later. This speed was actually not too slow, but for Chen Rui, who had limited time, waiting like this was obviously not feasible.

It seems I can no longer just steal from Town Gudam; I need to change the target.

At this moment, Pastor Mana just proposed to leave for the Garden City immediately. The fatty received the latest news that although Cardinal Roger did not arrive at Yang Shao Capital, his beloved niece, Ms. Eliza, changed her itinerary on the way. Her destination was the Garden City where the largest demonic beast trading market in Yang Shao Empire was located.

The head of the Garden City’s church, Pastor Solanton, was Mana’s cousin, and he belonged to the same faction in the church as Mana. Chen Rui’s Reserve Light Knight’s candidacy this time was recommended by the Garden City church.

Of course, Chen Rui would not raise objections. He brought along Lucio and set off with Mana. They got on the carriage to Garden City.

Garden City was about 5 days from the Town Gudam by the carriage. As always, Mana hired mercenary escorts at the mercenary union. The Holy Feather Mercenary Squad was not used this time due to ‘offending’ the church. Mana chose another powerful mercenary group, ‘Iron Shield Mercenary Squad’.

Coincidentally, Chen Rui happened to have an impression of the commander of the Iron Shield Mercenary Squad. It was the female mercenary who reminded Chen Rui not to be tricked by Lucio. Her name was Ina, who was around 28 years old. Her figure was relatively petite, but she had a mature charm. Her strength was D which was equivalent to Higher Demon. She was a shield warrior who was proficient at defense.

There were more than 40 Iron Shield Mercenary Squad members who participated in the escort this time. They were all equipped with mounts. The escort team formed 2 rows to protect the carriage.

Ina’s mount was a geodragon. It looked clumsy, but its speed was not slow. Lucio’s attitude toward Ina seemed particularly attentive. He rode a horse side by side with Ina, chatting with her from time to time along the way. Ina’s attitude was very indifferent and rarely talked back to him.

At night, everyone camped in the woods along the way.

“You are really different from before.” Ina finally initiated the conversation, “Even compared to 1 year ago, your changes are quite remarkable. Is it because of… that person?”

Lucio looked at the direction of her gaze and nodded, “Yes. The group annihilation at the Mighty Poison Cave a year ago was a turning point in my life, and meeting leader… means that my life has a chance to start again.”

Ina showed a slightly different expression. She looked at Chen Rui in the distance with a little surprise in her eyes.

“You call him leader?” The bearded mercenary on the side showed an expression of contempt, “Looking at his age, even if he hides his strength, he is at best a Warrior. But judging from the attitude of Mana the fatty toward him, his background should not be trivial. Burning Spear Lucio, you really have a good ‘sight’. You have found a powerful young master to be your master.”

Lucio blushed as he felt embarrassed in front of Ina. He stood up suddenly, glared at the bearded man and calmed down suddenly. He turned and left without saying much- Master is at the Saint level. As a follower, I naturally do not need to care about these ignorant people.

This reaction caused Ina’s gaze to move and frown slightly, “Silva, I know that you and Lucio do not get along with each other, but we are hired by the church to escort them to Garden City this time. We can’t affect the completion of this mission. Moreover… I always feel that Richard is not simple. Ask our brothers to restrain a little. Be mindful of our words and actions.”

“Understood, captain.” The bearded man nodded, “Actually, I’m not bothered to care about Lucio the trash. I just can’t stand watching him keep pestering you without any self-awareness. Besides, even if the master whom he recognizes is powerful, it is impossible to compare to our deputy commander.”

“Of course.” At the mention of ‘deputy commander’, Ina’s eyes were a little bright. “I wonder if his mission is completed or not. This guy just likes to act alone.”

“Don’t worry.” The bearded man shook his head disapprovingly, “With that person’s strength, it shouldn’t be a problem. The only thing commander needs to worry about is whether he will be snatched away by other women.”

“What nonsense, you are in charge of the night watch tonight! If something goes wrong, go back to Town Gudam!” As Ina waved her fist, the bearded man laughed and fled away.

Chen Rui didn’t pay attention to these details. After eating something, he hid in the tent and started ‘training’. Naturally, Fatty Pastor ordered everyone not to disturb him.

These days, in addition to researching the faith power, Chen Rui was also experimenting with the new features of the Super System.

In addition to the new skills, the 6-star evolution had a brand new building- Star Conferring Platform.

The construction of the Star Conferring Platform required 100,000 auras and 100 faith crystals. Initially, Chen Rui was reluctant to use the faith crystals for other purposes as he had no choice other than accumulating bit by bit to reach 1 million faith crystals in order to return to the Demon Realm.

Now that Shura had succeeded in stealing the faith power, nearly 3,000 faith crystals had been added before the ‘stolen’ faith had been fully digested. Chen Rui made up his mind and started to build the Star Conferring Platform.

TL: New building? What does it do?

chapters.title: Chapter 637 - Night Ambush
chapters.body:
Chapter 637 - Night Ambush

Chapter 637: Night Ambush

The Star Conferring Platform was a large open space with a high platform directly in front of it. It looked a bit similar to the speech center of a plaza which was generous and simple.

As Chen Rui’s mind moved, he had come to the high platform. He felt that the open space below had turned into an endless starry sky. At the same time, the Star Conferring Platform appeared in his mind with its corresponding functions.

The role of the Star Conferring Platform was to grant star positions. Those who get the star position title could have special attributes and characteristics. The attribute power and quota of the star position were related to the Pole Star Level of the Pole Star Emperor. At present, there were 3 star positions that Chen Rui could grant with his Blue Star level: Star General, Star Servant, and Star Apprentice.

Among them, there was 1 spot for Star General, 2 for Star Servant, and 3 for Star Apprentice.

Star General- Star buff: Power S-. Feature [Break Army]: Increases damage and doubles destructive power.

Star Servant- Star buff: Spirit power A+. Feature [Concentration]: Accelerates magic casting speed and spirit power recovery.

Star Apprentice- Star buff: Speed A. Feature [Ligtning Dash]: Accelerates movement speed and attack speed.

It meant that the person who had obtained the star title could directly have the corresponding level of buff attribute and characteristics. The conferred person must be a spiritual link contractor or a firm believer who met the requirements of the level of faith. Not only that, if the quality of the conferred person did not meet the minimum requirements of the star position, an extra faith crystal must be paid to conduct the confer.

For example, Zola was now at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. After obtaining the title of ‘Star Servant’, the A+ spirit power effect would be added on to her original spirit power which was equal to S+ plus A+. For Zola, who found it difficult to make progress as her power had reached the bottleneck, this spirit power might be the key to defeat enemies of the same level. As for the special effects of [Concentration], it was the best support for magicians.

But if this Star Servant title was to be conferred to the imp Slee whose power was only Lesser Demon, his spirit power could jump directly to A+ after obtaining the title. However, due to Slee’s own strength, Chen Rui must pay a lot of faith crystal to complete this title conferral.

What made Chen Rui a little speechless was that these 3 star positions not only had restrictions of quota and star position requirements, he also needed to spend a lot of money to activate the faith crystal. It could be said that MONEY was required everywhere!

Although there are still about 10,000 faith crystals, and Shura has the ability to steal faith power, the number is still far from 1 million after all. It is about Isabella’s life and death. Before I have absolute confidence, I must not spend it lavishly.

In addition to the Star Conferring Platform, some great stuff also appeared in the exchange center. Coincidentally, those things not only needed aura, but they also needed faith crystals to be exchanged. Therefore, as a non-P2W player, Chen Rui could only watch the various scam features that cost a fortune in the ‘free’ game, ‘Pole Star Emperor of the Super System’.

When he was feeling aggrieved, he sensed a strange movement. Chen Rui, who had been keeping his eyes closed to rest, immediately quit the Super System and opened his eyes.

A burst of rustling sound approached from afar. Immediately afterward, there was a neighing of horses mixed with screams outside.

“Enemy’s ambush!”

“Snake!”

“It’s viper! A lot of them! We are surrounded!”

“Be careful…”

As it was late at night, the members of the Iron Shield Mercenary Squad were caught off guard, but they quickly formed a defensive formation under Ina’s command.

The mercenaries formed a circular defensive formation, guarding the panicked Fatty Pastor and others in the center. An astonishing number of snakes appeared around the circle. These snakes were fast and had fierce attack power; most of them were poisonous. The mercenaries could only barely maintain the defense circle after fighting with much struggle. A few of them were brought to the middle for treatment after they were being poisoned.

Ina’s weapon was a huge shield. She stood in the forefront. The 3 magicians in the team played a key role. They released a circle of [Fire Wall], effectively blocking the vipers’ invasion. However, the vipers seemed to be driven by some force. Despite many being burned in the fire, they still rushed forward one after another.

Seeing the vipers’ terrifying appearance under the firelight, Fatty Pastor was in utter shock. His clothes were soaked in cold sweats. He usually went out for many long trips. At most, he encountered a few ignorant thieves. With the protection by the mercenary squad and the reputation of the church, he basically didn’t encounter any major troubles. However, he encountered this kind of terrifying ambush after only leaving Town Gudam today!

The vipers’ attack became more and more fierce as they came one after another. The strength of the 3 magicians was not strong. 2 of them were only the early stages of the Warrior (Lesser Demon F level), and the other was the intermediate stage of the Warrior (Intermediate Demon E level). After the continuous casting of magic, their spirit power was almost exhausted.

As the power of the [Fire Wall] gradually weakened, more and more vipers passed through the flames. The mercenaries were on the edge of collapsing.

“Hold the line!” Ina’s voice sounded. She lifted the huge shield with both hands and slammed toward the ground. A circle of power rippled forward, and the approaching vipers were shocked by a strong force. A giant mutated snake just trembled backward, then it wriggled forward at a faster speed. The hideous snake head appeared on the shield and rushed toward Ina.

Under the flame light, the 2 rows of sharp teeth could already be seen in the widely opened mouth.

Ina had just launched a shockwave, so she had not recovered her strength. Just as she was about to be bitten by the giant snake, a long spear with a sharp wind thrust and penetrated the snake’s head at a critical moment. A crimson flame emerged from the tip of the spear, burning the struggling giant snake into a coke.

Ina looked back at Lucio holding the spear in surprise, and she nodded at him. Lucio was a little surprised too. The appearance of the spear given by master is not amazing, but it is several times stronger than I imagined. It also has the power of the flame buff. It is simply tailor-made for my own trick [Flame Thrust]. Could it be, like those gloves, it is…

Lucio shot 3 times in a row, piercing the approaching 3 vipers. While Ina commanded everyone to hold on to the defense loudly, she launched the shockwave with the help of Lucio to knock out the vipers close to them.

Seeing the defensive circle getting smaller and smaller, the wind leopard next to Pastor Mana showed an extremely vigilant look. Although its strength was better than any viper, it was definitely a dead end to rush into so many snakes.

The terrified fatty finally couldn’t help but yell, “We can’t hold on anymore, quickly protect Richard and I to leave this place!”

At this moment, the vipers suddenly stopped their attacks, and they retreated in panic. They disappeared into the night soon.

After confirming that the viper had evacuated, the mercenaries all breathed a sigh of relief and began to count the casualties and treat the injuries. Due to the sudden attack of the vipers, 2 of the 3 mercenaries patrolling at the outermost periphery died. The bearded Silva was spared as he was better than his peers, but he was also badly poisoned and dying. Many of the remaining mercenaries were injured or poisoned. 4 of the mounts were dead, and half of them ran away.

Mana brought along 2 friars who were trainers of light element magic on this trip. They began to help with the healing of the mercenaries. The effect of light element’s [Treatment] and [Dispel] wasn’t inferior to that of water element’s [Healing] and [Detoxification]. The [Dispel]could also remove some common debuffs. With the help of 2 friars, the wounds of the most severely injured mercenaries were temporarily controlled. The other mercenaries who were slightly injured used herbs and potions to heal themselves.

“This is by no means an accident, but a planned ambush! Those vipers must be controlled by someone!” Ina, who squatted down to bandage the squad members, punched the ground angrily. She initially thought that it was just an ordinary escort mission. She never expected to encounter such an ambush. She lost 2 companions on the first day of departure and suffered a huge loss.

“Is it the enemy of us, Iron Shield Mercenary Squad, or Sir Pastor?”

“Is it the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad? They were humiliated this time because of the iron grenade bee mission and they even offended Sir Pastor.”

“By the way, doesn’t the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad have a beast tamer named Chelse? It must be him!” The fatty felt that it was more and more possible when he thought about it. He couldn’t help but burst into a rage, “How bold the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad assault the clergies. I must report to the church to send Light Knight and send them all to the torture frame!”

“The attacker must be at least a high level beast tamer to manipulate so many vipers. Chelse does not have the capability yet…” As the commander of mercenaries, Ina didn’t lose her mind because of anger, “It’s very likely that there is someone else.”

The 3 words, ‘beast tamer’, reminded the fatty. He suddenly thought of the most important partner, and he quickly asked Lucio, “Where is Richard?”

Lucio shook his head and said that he didn’t know. The fatty looked around and found that Chen Rui had disappeared. His heart tightened, and his cold sweat began to burst again. He yelled, “Richard! Where are you?”

“I’m here.”

A dark figure flew out of the forest and fell to the ground, completely motionless.

The fatty was startled. There was already another person beside him; it was Chen Rui.

Chen Rui glanced at the man on the ground and said to Ina, “This guy is the one who manipulates the viper. I think you should not be short of interrogation means.”

Ina was shocked, “It turns out that you were the one who made the vipers retreat just now…”

Chen Rui nodded without saying much. He threw 2 bottles of potion to Lucio, “1 bottle is a special detoxification potion, and the other is a special healing potion. Go help them treat their injuries.”

The fatty wiped the cold sweat on his forehead, “Richard, I was worried about you just now. I didn’t expect… thanks to you this time.”

“Don’t worry, my friend,” Chen Rui smiled and comforted the fatty, “There should be no more enemy ambush tonight.”

When the 2 were talking, Ina’s surprised voice came, “That guy… is dead.”

Chen Rui frowned slightly while the fatty said angrily, “What do you mercenaries do for a living? When the viper attacks, you will only hide behind the defense cowardly. Even the protected employee has to catch the enemy! Now my friend brought the captive for you to interrogate. You actually killed him so quickly?”

These words made the mercenaries of the Iron Shield Mercenary Squad reveal a raging expression, but what the fatty said was the truth, so they were speechless for a while.

Ina didn’t refute. She just said, “This guy is from the Dagger Brotherhood.”

The name ‘Dagger Brotherhood’ made the fat on the fatty’s face tremble. His excitement seemed to be splashed in cold water, and he suddenly stopped speaking.

TL: Dagger Brotherhood? Are they the sworn enemy of the church?

chapters.title: Chapter 638 - Dawn Extinction]
chapters.body:
Chapter 638 - Dawn Extinction]

Chapter 638: [Dawn Extinction]

“You mean… we are targeted by the Dagger Brotherhood?” The fatty swallowed hard, “You can’t be serious, right?”

Lucio knelt down and tore off the sleeve of the corpse. There was a 2-dagger tattoo on his shoulder which was gradually fading. Soon, the corpse burned under a strange power and gradually turned into ashes. Even no bones were left.

“Yes, it should be a member of the Dagger Brotherhood.” Lucio’s expression looked a little solemn as he made a gesture to Chen Rui.

The Dagger Brotherhood was a well-known assassin organization with its power spreading over several empires. It was said that as long as one could afford the price, even the empire’s king could become their target.

The killers of the Dagger Brotherhood were not only superb, but they were also cruel. Even if they were captured, they would not leave any remnants just like this self-burning corpse. After the mission failed, they would send another killer to retaliate more vigorously. However, if they failed 3 times in a row, the mission would be deemed to have exceeded the expected cost. Then, they would automatically give up and would not assassinate the target.

This was a tradition set by the human’s dark forces. Although the time of origin was unknown, even the current largest assassin and bandits organization ‘Rogue Union’ was strictly following this tradition, let alone the Dagger Brotherhood.

After confirming that the enemy was from the Dagger Brotherhood and not the Holy Feather Mercenary Squad, the fatty was immediately horrified and became very fearful, “Who actually hired the Dagger Brotherhood to deal with us at a high price?! No way! We need to return to Town Gudam immediately…”

The fatty only said half a sentence, and he suddenly remembered that since the other party was the Dagger Brotherhood, he still couldn’t escape from the killer’s hand even if he went back. The level of the Garden City’s church is higher than that of Town Gudam, and the Light Knights are stationed there. There is a chance of survival there. He suddenly changed his words, “Commander Ina, you must protect us to Garden City. I will double… No, pay 10 times the rewards! I will also be responsible for all the casualties you have suffered including the consolation money of the 2 brothers who died.”

According to the rules, the hirer generally only needed to pay the commission in accordance with the hiring agreement regardless of the mercenary loss or casualties during the task. Although the fatty loved money, he was not stupid. No amount of money was usable once life was gone.

If the mercenaries abandoned the mission midway, in addition to not getting the commission, they would also need to compensate for the breach of contract and their reputation would be greatly tainted. However, if Ina really abandoned the mission, the Iron Shield Mercenary Squad would only lose the money and reputation while the fatty and the others would lose their lives. The fatty had been in the position of the head of the Town Gudam church for many years, and he naturally had a few means. He knew the principle of ‘there must be a brave man under great reward’. Therefore, he immediately endured the pain and raised the issue of increasing the salary and being responsible for the compensation.

Ina pondered for a moment. She looked at the mercenary and said, “Sir Pastor, rest assured. Our Iron Shield Mercenary Squad values trust the most. Now that we have accepted this mission, we will definitely do our best to complete it.”

“Great! You all are worthy of being Iron Shield Mercenary Squad!” The fatty sighed with relief, “I have my word, I will immediately pay 10 times the salary and compensation once I arrive in Garden City.”

Ina nodded. She began to rearrange the defense, order the mercenaries to look for the lost mount and arrange the wounded to rest.

When passing by Chen Rui, the female commander took a deep look at him and spoke up, “It is generally impossible for the assassin of the Dagger Brotherhood to be captured alive. I don’t know how you captured this assassin. But I can be sure that regardless of whether the original assassin’s target was you, you will become 1 of the Dagger Brotherhood’s key targets during the remaining journey.”

“Oh, I just went through an intense battle, so I need to go back to the tent to rest for a while.” Chen Rui shrugged nonchalantly as if he didn’t understand the current adversity. He turned and walked toward the tent. Lucio on the side quickly followed suit.

Ina looked at Chen Rui’s back and snorted coldly. He asked the bearded man lying on the ground, “Silva, how is it?”

“I won’t die.” The bearded man barely supported himself to stand as he smiled. “By the way, the special antidote is really magical. Even the poison that can’t be removed by the [Dispel] has been cleared. The rest is just some minor injuries which will not get in the way.”

Although the bearded man said that he was fine, Ina could see that this was definitely not just “minor” wounds. Fortunately, after removing the strong poison, there was no risk of life. He just needed to rest for a few days to recover, but his combat power would surely be greatly reduced in the short term.

“This Richard is really not simple.” Ina showed a thoughtful expression, “His strength is even higher than we expected. Maybe he can really escape the Dagger Brotherhood’s 3 assassinations.”

“No matter how powerful he is, he can’t compare to… By the way, commander. Did you agree to continue the protection mission this time because the deputy commander…”

Ina looked around and whispered, “Before we left Town Gudam, I just received a magic message from him from Town Laize. He said he has completed the Stam City’s mission and he is on the way back. I left him a message at the hotel. He should come and join us after he returns to Town Gudam. It will probably take 2-3 days.”

The bearded man showed a surprised expression, “Great! If he can rush over, we don’t even need to be afraid of the Dagger Brotherhood!”

Ina’s voice lowered. “He didn’t come just to meet up with this time. Instead, he is going to go to a place through Garden City, and it happened to be in the route of our mission. This matter is related to his private secrets, so I don’t want to ask further. I didn’t tell everyone. Now that the enemy is the Dagger Brotherhood, then the deputy commander’s matter should not be disclosed so as not to attract the Dagger Brotherhood’s attention. As long as we can survive the Dagger Brotherhood’s 3 attacks, we will pass this obstacle.”

“Understood.” The bearded man nodded and laid down again.

The night passed without another ambush. The team continued their journey the next day. Some mercenary mounts were not recovered, so 2 of them shared a mount. Their speed was not very fast as they remained careful along the way. 2 days passed, and nothing unusual happened. Most of the members of the Iron Shield Mercenary Squad had recovered from their injuries, but they did not dare to relax their vigilance.

It was autumn in the human world. The sun was not dazzling, but it was easy to cause fatigue. Amidst the bumps of the carriage, the fatty’s eyelids began to close. He couldn’t help taking a nap.

Before Sir Pastor slept for long, he was awakened by the violent shaking and screams. The fatty nerves that had been loosened immediately tightened. After opening the curtain to see, blocks of boulders on the side of the mountain rolled down.
