In the Clear Mirror City battle, Cancer Holy Apprentice Murev and Aquarius Holy Apprentice Colina died, Capricorn Holy Apprentice Clark and Scorpio Holy Apprentice April were seriously injured. The news of Chief Bishop Phil’s death made the entire Loya Empire’s church succumb to chaos. The Holy Light Mountain really had to re-evaluate the strength of that mysterious enemy.

Vantis quickly summoned the remaining 8 holy apprentices to the Clear Mirror City area to stand by, and he used the Holy Light Mountain authority to use the [Teleportation Portal] of several empires; they were ready to use teleportation to rush to the enemy’s location at any time. The 8 great holy apprentices finally got the intel through Isyorul’s [Divine Spying] and set up an ambush in the Pala City of Loya Empire, but the enemy mysteriously disappeared.

The whole city was sealed up by the church with all its strength. They searched inside out, but found nothing.

“Sir Yvesrul, please calm your anger.” Pope Vantis spoke up, “Although the enemy is cunning, the general location is in the east. He can’t go far. Sir, please activate [Divine Spying] to find his whereabouts.”

Isyorul flipped his hand and the blood bead reappeared. The original dark red color has become pale red, and it looked extremely thin as if it may disappear at any time, “[Divine Spying] can only be activated for the last time, and it must not be wasted easily. The Snow Dallet Tree is probably still in the hands of this guy. It seems that I need to make a move personally!”

Vantis exclaimed, “With sir taking action, this enemy will surely be easily taken down! I wish sir success in advance!”

“Of course!” Isyorul proudly said, “I still need some time to integrate the power of the artifact that Sir Raphael gave me back then. You order to control the entire border of the Loya Empire first, and the holy apprentices will stay in Pala City temporarily; don’t get in the way. After I completed the fusion and arrived in the eastern region, I will use the divine eye with [Divine Spying] to sense him. No matter how cunning the person is, he cannot escape from me!”

The people in the church wouldn’t expect that Chen Rui was not anxiously in the Loya Empire at this time. He had come to the Starlight Empire border through the [Teleportation Array]. He first used the teleport point in the Clear Mirror City to arrive at the Starlight Empire’s Venus City, then he set the star point in Venus City before returning to the Clear Mirror City. He went all around to arrive at Pala City. The holy apprentices were really fooled. When they concentrated their forces to encircle Chen Rui, he returned to the Starlight Empire with the [Star Gate], changed his appearance, and walked around the gate of the church in Venus City openly. No one paid any attention to him.

Chen Rui didn’t know exactly how many times Isyorul had used the [Divine Spying], but judging from this siege, it was used at least once. As long as it was consumed again, the medium object of [Divine Spying] could be exhausted. Otherwise, he could delay another 1 month and return to the Demon Realm directly. Chen Rui didn’t believe that Isyorul had the ability to chase him all the way to the Demon Realm. Even if he could still use the [Divine Spying] or see anything in across the A-level space, he could only stare.

Chen Rui was going to the Blue Star City in the south of the Starlight Empire. In addition to playing a delay tactic with the church people, this trip had another purpose, which was to set off from the port of the Blue Star City, pass the Ice Sea area, and go to the elf tribe location at the Jade Forest Sea.

Before returning to the Demon Realm. he needed to visit the Grand Master Finoia of the elf tribe.

In the first battle of the Clear Mirror City, Chen Rui unexpectedly received lots of fire energy from Chief Bishop Phil. Not only did Pastor Clyde bribed the high-quality fire element crystals, but Phil, who majored in fire element training, also had a lot of fire element crystals in store. This included the fire essence jade and red obsidian whose quality was no less than the flame soul stone. Except for the flame soul stone bead string left as a souvenir, he stuffed the rest into the space ring where the phoenix egg was located.

In the following days, the phoenix egg laid quietly in the space ring, seeming to enjoy the fire crystals in comfort and did not cause trouble. This quietness remained until Chen Rui bought the sea area map of the Ice Sea and left the Blue Star Sea port on the third day, which was also the second day of Shura’s resurrection.

Shura was annihilated by the power of the Light Divinity Temple on the top of the Holy Light Mountain. After Chen Rui paid a lot of aura, he was finally reborn. With Shura plus Chen Rui’s own strength, even if he encountered the 8 holy apprentices head-on, he could escape easily- It’s possible to fight head-on, but if I left some bloodstains or something else again, it will be troublesome if the ‘weird eyes’ get it.

To be honest, with this kind of surveillance skill, I will suffer a huge loss if I am spied on ‘bed’ after I return to the Demon Realm.

As the name suggested, the Ice Sea’s water temperature was quite low. There were many icebergs on the islands in the sea area. The strange thing was that the water surface with the temperature below zero was not frozen which made it easier for the Devil’s Snare Ship to sail through. There were also many active creatures, especially the kind of silver flying fish that looked like wild geese and lined up to glide on the water; it was a spectacular view.

Chen Rui was admiring the wonders of the Ice Sea when he suddenly felt the ring vibrate violently. He thought all the fire element crystals were exhausted, so he quickly explored with his mind and found that most of the fire element crystals were still there. However, the few high grade goods like fire essence jade and red obsidian that were depleting yesterday had disappeared. The phoenix egg vibrated greatly, and the space ring was in danger of bursting. Chen Rui quickly took it out.

As soon as the phoenix egg was taken out, there was a feeling of scorching heat in the nearby cold air. The silver flying fishes in the distance seemed to feel something terrifying and fled in horror.

The pale red phoenix egg had turned crimson, and it exuded a horrifying heat wave. The nearest ship sail actually started burning. Chen Rui was taken aback. He quickly asked the sandmen to take down the sails of the ship. Not only that, the ship also began to heat up quickly. Fortunately, the material of the ship was extraordinary, so the rest of the ship was not ignited. A lot of steam came out from the surrounding ice-like sea water.

Chen Rui sensed the powerful breath of life exuded by the phoenix egg. It was probably about to hatch. He quickly let the sandmen fully activate the emergency magic crystal power thruster to drive toward the nearest ice island.

If someone was nearby, he could see a big ship braving a lot of steam moving forward at an incredible speed. In the waters where the big ship passed, many fishes floated up with white bellies.

The temperature of the phoenix egg was rising. Even Chen Rui had to activate the power for protection. The ship was already faintly red, the sandman’s overly dry body also had a tendency to collapse, and it seemed that they couldn’t hold it anymore.

Chen Rui decisively kept the sandmen into the sandstone essence immediately and put the Devil’s Snare Ship into the storage space. He rapidly flew toward the ice island while holding the phoenix egg exuding the terrifying heat.

After the rays of light flew fast for a while, a [Sonic Boom] sounded, and he finally arrived on the ice island. Wherever he passed, the ice that had not melted for thousands of years melted. Even Chen Rui couldn’t bear that kind of temperature.

He was about to place the phoenix egg on the ground. Unexpectedly, there was a suction from the phoenix egg which stuck to his hands, and the suction became stronger and stronger, absorbing the power in Chen Rui’s body like [Star Devouring]. Chen Rui instinctively wanted to break away from the suction when he suddenly sensed a strange mental fluctuation from the phoenix egg. He suddenly understood that this was the accumulation of energy for the little phoenix right before hatching. He endured the high temperature at the moment without resisting.

The temperature was getting higher and higher, the air was full of rich fire elements, and the phoenix egg emitted a faint flame. The flames flickered and dimmed. It seemed ordinary, but it actually contained extremely terrifying heat. Chen Rui’s skin could no longer resist it as it started to redden and blistered. His hair also gave off an unpleasant burnt smell – If it weren’t [Anti- Magic] and the self-healing physique, he had become a coke with such a close distance.

When Chen Rui’s mind moved, a black flame was burning on his body. It was the fire of Nirvana.

As soon as the fire of Nirvana appeared, the burned part gradually healed, and the flame of the phoenix egg became scorching, and it became 1 with the fire of Nirvana. It gave Chen Rui a feeling of being connected to it, and he actually slowly adapted to that kind of high temperature.

There was a ‘ding ding’ sound from the phoenix egg. Something seemed to be pecking from inside, and a crack finally appeared. The crack became bigger and bigger with the effort of a small sharp mouth, and the egg shell was pecked open.

A clear phoenix chirp sounded. Chen Rui saw a sea of flame in an instant as if a huge fire phoenix was rising into the sky. Within a radius of tens of kilometers, the ice and snow instantly melted into water, then it quickly evaporated.

The phoenix’s phantasm and flames gradually faded, and the temperature gradually returned to normal. What appeared in Chen Rui’s palm was a little red bird.

This little bird was about the same size as a newborn chick, and it was covered with fluffy flaming red feathers. It looked very cute, but it didn’t look like a phoenix in any way.

The closed eyes of the little bird slowly opened. It seemed that they were still not adapted to the external light. One could see that its pupils were faintly golden, and the mucus of the eggshell gradually penetrated into Chen Rui’s hands from his palm to his body. The originally burn scars and skin recovered in the blink of an eye.

Race: Phoenix

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A-

Physique: A, Strength: A-, Spirit: A, Speed: A-

Attribute: Fire attribute. Nirvana.

As expected of the phoenix, it already had the strength of the early stage of the Demon Emperor when it was born. If it grew up, reaching the Demon Overlord level was definitely not a problem.

The little red bird saw Chen Rui and made a chirping sound which sounded very pleasing to the ears. In the [Analytical Eyes], it became a young girl’s immature voice, “Mommy!”

Chen Rui knew that many newborn animals, especially birds, could easily regard the first creature they saw as their mother. He scratched his head and corrected, “I’m not your mom.”

“Mommy! mommy!”

“I just… Oh, well, I’m daddy.”

“Got it, mommy!”

“…”

This little phoenix was clever, cute and very likable. Chen Rui wanted to bring it back to the Demon Realm, but unfortunately, it had hatched and couldn’t enter the space equipment. He sighed, “If only you can get back into the eggshell…”

“Eggshell! Eggshell! Got it, mommy!”

The little phoenix actually walked toward the eggshell. Chen Rui was taken aback, Could it really go back into the eggshell?

The little phoenix quickly ate up the eggshell.

TL: Never expect his first offspring is a phoenix🤣… There is no way Chen Rui leaves it here alone in the human world right?

chapters.title: Chapter 688 - Unicorn
chapters.body:
Chapter 688 - Unicorn

Chapter 688: Unicorn

After several days of sailing, the Devil’s Snare Ship finally reached the north of the Jade Forest Sea on a sunny morning.

The Jade Forest Sea was the largest forest area in the human world, covering a considerable area which was actually only ⅓ of the territory of the Blue Glory Empire. With the influence of the Blue Glory Empire and the strong power of the elf tribe itself, the Jade Forest Sea had become the only elf kingdom in the human world. Any human who dared to capture an elf here would be listed as the enemies of the Blue Glory Empire and the elf tribe as well as receiving the most severe sanction.

The Blue Glory Empire, known as the magic empire, was 1 of the 2 holy kingdoms. It had the most advanced magic civilization and magic power in humans. In addition to the support of the elf tribe, it had great power that was enough to deter the Dragon Bright Empire which was supported by the giant dragons.

There was a little red bird on Chen Rui’s shoulder. Except for the immature wings, the rest was all fluffy. It twittered and jumped on Chen Rui’s head from time to time.

The strength of the little phoenix after birth was the early stage of the Demon Emperor, but it seemed to have a similar ability like [Breath Holding]; it only showed the level of the Lesser Demon. No matter its appearance or strength, it looked like a cute pet bird now which did not match the ‘phoenix’ which was the legendary powerful demonic beast.

“Dad! dad!” After Chen Rui’s painstaking correction these days, the little phoenix finally changed the word ‘mommy’, but the little guy was very naughty. Except for bedtime, it basically never stopped making trouble. Chen Rui gave the little phoenix a name, Duoduo – Don’t mention that this guy was tasteless, he originally wanted to be lazy and just call it the ‘Little Red Bird’.

(A little black horse in a certain house neighed in grief and indignation…)

Duoduo jumped from Chen Rui’s shoulder to his head, pecked his hair, then jumped from his head to the other shoulder, “Daddy! I’m hungry, I want to play the slingshot game!”

The so-called slingshot game was to take a customized big slingshot and shoot the little phoenix as a bullet at the target – The target was the pig head carved from the fire crystal.

The little phoenix had just hatched and was not very good at flying; she mainly glided. This game was dubbed ‘Flight Bombing Practice” by the boring and unscrupulous adoptive father. What made people speechless was that Ms. Duoduo liked this game very much. It must be played once before the ‘meal’. Only after playing to the fullest would she hit the pig’s head crystal for a meal. So this game was also called the ‘Hungry Bird’.

Ms. Duoduo had a big appetite; she ate almost everything. Chen Rui had no awareness and experience of being a dad. Those baby foods with 3-nos were thrown into the mouths of the adopted daughter. In addition to the main food, the fire element crystal, there were complimentary foods like the aura fruits produced by the galaxy garden, cakes and desserts produced by the Chen Family and so on.

“Duoduo, be good. We’ll be docked soon, can we play again next time?”

“Daddy! Now! Now!”

Chen Rui knew that this little girl would play for at least a couple of hours. His eyes rolled, “Shall we play moving target bombing? It’s an A-degree of difficulty.”

“Yeah!”

The poor fire element crystal pig’s head was thrown upward by the unscrupulous adoptive father and flew toward the shore. The adopted daughter launched from the slingshot excitedly and pecked the pig’s head skillfully and accurately – The ship landed smoothly.

Chen Rui also went to a few ‘forest seas’ in the Demon Realm, but when he arrived at the Jade Forest Sea, he realized that the ones he went to were nothing more than creeks and rivers. This was the real sea, the sea of the forest.

There was lush greenery, and the leaves broke the warm sunlight into bars of light. The fresh breath of flowers and leaves filled the air, and the plants seemed to have spirituality. They seemed particularly vibrant. This was something that Chen Rui had never seen in those forests before.

Chen Rui did not relax his vigilance. The Jade Forest Sea was vast. In addition to the elf tribe, there were many races and creatures, and some were even very powerful and dangerous. Although he was just in the outer area now, he could not let down his guard.

The Jade Forest Sea had a special power which caused a lot of interference to items such as magic maps. Fortunately, Chen Rui had the skill of [Deep Analysis]. He walked and recorded carefully to avoid getting lost. He went step by step toward the depths of the forest.

The little phoenix didn’t jump around anymore, but she stood on Chen Rui’s shoulder and looked at everything in the forest curiously.

Chen Rui released some breath appropriately and scared off many uninvited guests who wanted to approach along the way. Nonetheless, the Jade Forest Sea was too vast. From entering the forest in the morning to the sun setting now, no trace of elf was found.

A small lake was faintly visible under the mountain in the distance which was like a mirror inlaid in the kingdom of the forest. Duoduo saw the small lake and pestered to go to drink water. Anyway, Chen Rui was walking aimlessly now, so he took the little phoenix and ran toward the small lake.

As Chen Rui approached the small lake, he stopped his footsteps abruptly because he saw that there was already a ‘guest’, who had arrived there first, drinking from the lake.

This was a white horse. Unlike ordinary horses, this horse had a silver horn on its head. With Chen Rui’s eyesight, he could vaguely see the spiral patterns on the horn.

Chen Rui was no longer a rookie who knew nothing; he immediately knew what this ‘horse’ was- A unicorn!

Unicorns were high level demonic beasts with strong mysterious powers. Their strong body and wind-like speed made them have the ability to surpass all ground mounts. Most unicorns were the masters of [Thunder] and could easily release [Thunder] to punish offenders. In addition to physical attacks, that sharp horn could release a light element of blindness magic like [Flash] which could make people fall into a blind state.

The unicorn was a kind of peace-loving creature with a gentle temperament, but it was not docile. It could even be considered stalwart. It was said that only the purest virgins could win their friendship. They liked to roam freely in the forest and the wild, but unicorns had a natural hatred for dark creatures and dark power. They were immune to general poison and curse. In many ancient records, they were often portrayed as the holy avatar.

The only horse-type demonic beasts that could rival the speed and power of unicorns was the Incubus Beast of the Demon Realm, and Chen Rui had 1.

The unicorn in front of him should not be very old. Its strength was around the Demon King level, but its condition did not look ideal. There were several bloodstains on its body which seemed to be severely injured.

According to the legend, the relationship between the unicorn and the elf is very close. This unicorn may be the key to finding the location of the elf. Chen Rui shifted his mind and was about to step forward to try to communicate with the unicorn, but Ms. Adopted Daughter had already rushed out – without a ‘slingshot’. This was exactly the result of an unscrupulous adoptive father’s ‘flying’ training. If it continued like this, perhaps it would not become a phoenix, but it would ‘evolve’ into a javelin bird or mudskipper. Thinking of this, Chen Rui couldn’t help but wipe the sweat from his forehead.

The heroic posture of Ms. Duoduo’s ejection was quite beautiful. It was indeed a professional-level action with a difficulty coefficient of A-level. Unfortunately, after the inertia of the ejection, the undeveloped little wings flapped and flew slanting and obliquely which was not up to the previous level, but she was finally close by the lake.

The appearance of the little phoenix made the unicorn not far away reveal a vigilant expression. Ms. Duoduo glanced at the big guy (relatively to her) contemptuously. She chirped twice in demonstration and started drinking the water.

The unicorn observed Duoduo for a while before it put down its guard, but its vigilance was still there. It had to take a look at the little phoenix after drinking a few sips of water.

“Daddy, Duoduo wants to eat fruit!”

The little phoenix turned her head and chirped twice. Chen Rui was hiding his breath to hide behind. He ignored the little phoenix as he was thinking about how to communicate with the unicorn in the most appropriate way to find the elf tribe. Ms. Duoduo chirped 2 more unrestrainedly. Seeing that daddy hadn’t reacted yet, she actually sat down on the ground with her fluffy belly upturned, and her 2 little wings kept beating. Chen Rui was stunned to see the posture of ‘I’ll kill myself if you don’t give it to me’: When did the little girl learn this trick? Does every baby self-learn this ‘talent’?

In desperation, the adoptive father had no choice but to throw an aura fruit. The little girl ejected again with a high difficulty movement, proudly grabbed the aura fruit with her small mouth, and pecked it underground.

As a result, Chen Rui’s trail was immediately exposed. The unicorn was shocked. Its mane was erected, and the horn on its head flashed and buzzed with electric sparks.

Chen Rui immediately expressed kindness from the [Analytical Eyes], but the unicorn seemed extremely hostile and did not accept the kind intent at all. Instead, it made a long neigh. A blue lightning flashed, enclosing Chen Rui.

This level of lightning naturally had no effect on Chen Rui. His figure flickered, instantly appearing beside the unicorn, with 1 hand on the unicorn’s back. The unicorn sensed that the hand seemed to have infinite power. Its whole body was actually unable to move. The horn on its forehead suddenly radiated a bright light, activating the [Blinding] talent.

Chen Rui sensed that this [Blinding] was much stronger than the [Flash] light element magic. Not only his eyes, but even his spirit power was also affected to a considerable extent. No doubt it was a very unique talent. However, for him with S++-level spirit power, at most he was flashed by the camera’s flash; he was unaffected.

The unicorn made a sad neigh when the last move was ineffective. Suddenly, it felt a burst of cool power coming from the opponent’s hand. This kind of power was full of vibrant power, making it feel cordial and comfortable. Not only that, the injuries on its body began to heal quickly.

Chen Rui lightly lifted his hand on the back of the unicorn. The unicorn stepped back and pulled away the distance, but it did not attack or escape.

The unicorn was a kind of demonic beast with a high degree of intelligence. It knew that this human had the strong power to easily subdue it, but he healed its wounds. The kindness just now shouldn’t be fake.

The little phoenix had jumped onto Chen Rui’s shoulders as she chirped angrily at the unicorn. The surrounding air began to become hot. The unicorn felt the danger and took a few steps back in surprise.

Chen Rui hurriedly appeased Ms. Adopted Daughter and took out 2 aura fruits to coax her. The unicorn looked at Duoduo pecking at the fruit that overflowed with pure natural power which was exactly what it needed to grow up. The power of this kind of fruit was many times stronger than those in the Jade Forest Sea.

The observant Chen Rui immediately threw 1 over. After careful testing, the unicorn finally began to eat the aura fruit. Chen Rui secretly rejoiced when he sensed that the hostility of the opponent was greatly reduced.

At this moment, Chen Rui suddenly turned around and caught an item that shot toward him – an arrow!

TL: Arrow🤔… elf? Is the elf thinking he was attacking the unicorn?

chapters.title: Chapter 689 - Poachers
chapters.body:
Chapter 689 - Poachers

Chapter 689: Poachers

The second after Chen Rui clamped the arrow, the second arrow arrived again, followed by the third one – they all aimed at the vital point of his throat. When Chen Rui clamped the third arrow, a change occurred. The third arrow between the fingers suddenly turned into powder and disappeared. At the same time, a sharp qi hit his eyes. The arrow actually appeared on his head incredibly.

Although Chen Rui was surprised, his hand was not slow. He instantly caught an arrow that was shot toward his left eye, but the arrow suddenly exploded. At the same time, 2 more arrows came. 1 arrow drew an arc, bypassing the arm, and targeted the heart directly. Another arrow suddenly accelerated when it flew close, and it targeted the throat again.

The exploding magic arrow didn’t hurt Chen Rui as he instantly caught 2 other arrows. In this world, the bow and arrow attack was not as simple as imagined, especially the arrow of this level. Just like a person facing the muzzle of a gun, it was fortunate to be able to dodge like Neo in the Matrix. As for catching a bullet, it was almost impossible.

Of course, Chen Rui now had this ‘impossible’ strength. He caught all these arrows using the same hand, and he didn’t move his feet at all.

Chen Rui didn’t give the opponent a chance to continue shooting. His body suddenly disappeared. The archer knew that something was amiss and was about to retreat when he suddenly had a warning sense. He turned back and stretched his bow, aiming at the enemy who appeared out of thin air behind him.

This was a female, about 17-18 years old with dark blue hair tied behind her head. She was wearing a set of simple and tight-fitting leather armor. Her figure is bumpy, but she was a little too thin with beautiful features. It was a pity that… She wore a black blindfold on her left eye. Such a beautiful lady was actually blinded with 1 eye.

What Chen Rui noticed was that her ears were a bit pointed. At this time, the [Analytical Eyes] showed in addition to the relevant information- Race: Half-elf (mutated). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C. Physique: C-, Strength: C-, Spirit: C, Speed: C+. [Analysis]: Wind attribute, precise strike. The mutated talent was unknown.

Chen Rui initially thought she was an elf, but unexpectedly she was a half-elf. This was the second half-elf he had seen; the first was the apprentice of the Holy Lady, Miranda.

The reaction and archery skills of this half-elf girl were breathtaking. Especially her archery, which was even better than the Fallen Angel Empire’s Flying Cloud Legion commander, Romanty. The reason why Chen Rui took the arrow easily was because the gap of strength of the 2 sides was very different. If she had Demon Overlord level strength, perhaps Chen Rui would be injured.

Since there is a half-elf, it shouldn’t be a problem to find the elf tribe. Chen Rui immediately communicated through the [Analytical Eyes], “Don’t get me wrong, I’m not the enemy!”

“Soul language?” The surprised expression in the half-elf’s eyes was fleeting. She recovered sharply and shouted, “Human, put away your tricks! The Jade Forest Sea doesn’t welcome despicable poachers!”

Poacher? Chen Rui was taken aback, then the unicorn appeared behind him with the little phoenix on its back.

When the unicorn saw the 1-eyed half-elf girl, it immediately ran over and stood side by side with the girl while looking at Chen Rui warily. They were obviously on the same front. Ms. Duoduo ejected and landed on Chen Rui’s shoulder without showing any weakness, looking at the girl warily.

“Miss, you misunderstood.” Chen Rui saw that the other person was speaking in the common language, so he didn’t use the [Analytical Eyes] anymore, “I’m not a poacher. On the contrary, I cured the unicorn’s injury.”

With that said, Chen Rui took out an aura fruit and put it in the palm of his hand. The unicorn hesitated for a moment, then it came over. Just as it was about to open its mouth, a small red figure ejected out like lightning, taking away the aura fruit the moment the unicorn approached it. It was the little phoenix. Ms. Duoduo, who succeeded in grabbing food from the unicorn’s mouth, pecked the aura fruit on her small pointed mouth, awkwardly flashing her small wings, then she flew back to her dad’s shoulder. She put down the aura fruit and pecked it quickly for a while making a triumphant sound.

Chen Rui shook his head and took out another aura fruit. Due to the previous miss, the unicorn was afraid of being snatched by the little phoenix again. It immediately bit in its mouth and chewed. The half-elf girl was really surprised this time. This unicorn has an unyielding temperament. Even many of the elf tribe cannot approach it. I didn’t expect it to actually eat the fruits of this stranger at ease. It seems that this man is indeed not a poacher.

Thinking of this, the bow in the hands of the half-elf girl slowly lowered, but she still did not let down her vigilance, “Who are you? How did you let the unicorn…”

Chen Rui smiled slightly and was about to speak, but he suddenly frowned. Soon, the half-elf and the unicorn also sensed the abnormality, but Ms. Duoduo, who ate and drank to her satisfaction, laid on her dad’s hair in an indifferent manner.

Soon, 6 people appeared in the forest. When the unicorn saw these people, a ferocious expression suddenly appeared in its eyes, and electric sparks began to gather on its horn. Chen Rui showed an understanding expression. It turns out that these are the real poachers. The injuries suffered by the unicorn should be related to them.

These 6 people were all human who were wearing armor and holding weapons. As soon as they spotted the unicorn, Chen Rui and others, they immediately surrounded them. The leader was a fierce and ferocious man whose comprehensive strength had reached B+. The strength of the peak stage Master, and he was only 1 step away from entering Saint. He should already be considered a powerhouse among humans. 2 of the remaining people had reached B-level, and 3 were C-level. It seems that the strength of this team is indeed very remarkable. No wonder they dare to come to the Jade Forest Sea to hunt the unicorn.

“Guys, it seems that we are quite lucky. We found our prey so quickly.” The leader made a gesture, and the 6 people surrounded Chen Rui, the half-elf and the unicorn.

“Boss Paller, I told you it can’t run far.”

Paller sneered coldly, “You 2 idiots. You alarmed the unicorn so early. You let it escape from the trap before I arrived. If we can’t find it this time, I will teach you a lesson when we go back.”

“Hehe, Boss Paller, didn’t we just find it again? Let’s catch the unicorn first.”

These people talked and laughed freely, and they did not put Chen Rui and others in their eyes. Chen Rui’s current strength was E while the half-elf girl and the unicorn were C-level strength, so they were not their opponents at all. As for Ms. Duoduo, she was directly ignored.

“How bold of you to hunt unicorns in the Jade Forest Sea!” The half-elf girl pulled her bow at the big guy and said angrily, “I will give you 1 minute to leave here immediately. Otherwise, you will be severely sanctioned by the elf tribe!”

Paller laughed, “Little girl, don’t scare me. If you are a pure elf, I would be a little bit fearful, but unfortunately, you are just a half-elf. You can’t get the recognition of the elf tribe at all. What qualifications do you have to talk about the ‘elf sanctions’?”

“This chick is really attractive, and her face is also beautiful, but she is 1-eyed… but it seems we haven’t touched a woman for a long time…”

“Do the important thing first!” Paller’s broadsword flashed with intense flame breath, “As for this little girl, I haven’t played a half-elf yet. After we get the unicorn horn, we will take turns!”

As soon as this sentence came out, several people laughed wickedly; some of them even whistled. The half-elf girl’s eyes burned with extreme rage. She was about to blast out when Chen Rui stepped forward, “You seem to have forgotten something?”

“You ant, you even want to be a hero?” A tall, thin man smiled contemptuously, “Don’t worry, before you die, you will witness how we play with your woman. In the end, I will personally finish you both off. “

“I’m sorry.” Chen Rui turned his head and said to the half-elf girl, “If these people are my kind, then I’m ashamed of it.”

“Ashamed of your mother…” Before the thin and tall man finished speaking, he became stiff as if he was frozen quickly by something. Then, he split into countless particles and scattered on the ground, disappearing without a trace in the blink of an eye.

The faces of the other 4 people changed dramatically. Their companion with Master strength was actually annihilated in the blink of an eye. No matter how stupid the 4 were, they knew what a terrifying powerhouse this man ridiculed as an ‘ant’ was. They dared not fight anymore. Just as they were about to flee, their whole body began to freeze quickly, and they couldn’t help being frightened.

The strongest Paller barely swung his broadsword, and a flame power flew toward Chen Rui. The little phoenix on Chen Rui’s head opened its mouth and instantly devoured the flame. Before Paller could be horrified, his body was annihilated like the rest of his companions.

Ms. Duoduo spat out a mouthful of sparks and seemed to dislike the smell of these flames.

The half-elf girl looked at this scene with surprise and took a long time to react. She bowed and said, “Thank you sir for your help.”

The girl was very clear that the strength of these poachers was far above her. However, if this man can easily annihilate them, then it is easy for this person to kill me or hunt the unicorn. This kind of strength has definitely entered Saint. He is very likely to be a real Saint.

“You’re welcome. I wonder if Miss can do me a favor?”

“My name is Blanche. How can I help sir?” The half-elf girl still didn’t let go of her vigilance. What is the purpose of a human Saint powerhouse ‘infiltrating’ the Jade Forest Sea? (She didn’t know that this powerhouse actually didn’t know the way at all)

A voice came from the distant air, “Blanche! Where are you?”

Blanche was taken aback and seemed to be thinking about something quickly, then she apologized to Chen Rui. She slightly turned her head and said loudly, “Michelle, I’m here!”

The sound swiftly approached. Chen Rui could see clearly that there was a flying horse with wings in the sky, and its body faintly glowed with silver light. This was the unique aerial mount of the elf tribe, the silver pegasus.

The silver pegasus had excellent flying ability, but the combat power was much inferior to griffon, but they had a special talent of increasing the spirit power recovery of the knight which was a very precious mount for the magic knight.

Behind the silver pegasus was a 12-13 years old girl with green curly hair, exquisite facial features and 2 pointed ears. Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. Even without using the [Analytical Eyes], he could see that this Michelle was a real elf!

TL: Will they bring him directly to the elf tribe?

chapters.title: Chapter 690 - Elf
chapters.body:
Chapter 690 - Elf

Chapter 690: Elf

The silver pegasus landed on the ground and folded its wings. Michelle jumped off her horse and happily jumped over here, “Blanche! So you are here!”

Blanche greeted her. She had always looked cold even when facing a powerhouse like Chen Rui, but when she saw Michelle, she showed a rare smile.

Blanche pulled Michelle over, “Michelle, this is…”

“Richard”. Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Ms. Michelle, nice to meet you.”

“Human?” Michelle was taken aback as she looked at Blanche and nodded to Chen Rui, “Hi I am Michelle.”

The figure of this elf girl was similar to that of Alice. She looked lovely and had big eyes like a doll made of jade. Her speech and behavior were also very polite, which gave a good impression, but her strength was only F.

Michelle looked at the human with a little red bird on his head curiously, “Are you… Blanche’s friend?”

“Um, if Ms. Blanche doesn’t object, I think we can be friends, and this… White Wind.”

The aura fruit contained a powerful force of nature which was very important for the growth of the unicorn. It was very scarce even in the Jade Forest Sea, and the magical effect of the aura fruit was way better. White Wind had previously tasted the sweetness of the aura fruit and witnessed Chen Rui eliminate the enemies who hurt it. Therefore, its trust in this strange human increased greatly. When it heard him calling it by its name, it immediately leaned over.

This scene made Michelle look surprised- Even White Wind, who is difficult for many elfs to get close to, approached this human so proactively? Chen Rui understood when he saw the unicorn staring at his hand. He took out an aura fruit.

A red figure suddenly appeared on Chen Rui’s head, rushed into his palm, and unceremoniously took the aura fruit away, then she jumped back to the temporary birdhouse on his head. It was none other than Ms. Duoduo.

The little phoenix was actually full, but she just wanted to mess around plus “whatever I want” was the temperament of Ms. Duoduo. Ms. Duoduo sat on the aura fruit and chirped provocatively. If it wasn’t for the physical constraint, she might even have crossed her claws.

“Wow!” Michelle stared in awe, “Richard. Your bird is so cute! Can you let me touch it?”

Chen Rui, “…”

Blanche, “…”

“Michelle.” Blanche interrupted Michelle’s easily misunderstood words, “This is what happened. White Wind and I encountered the poachers and Richard saved us.”

Michelle’s favor with Chen Rui had risen again, “Richard, thank you for saving Blanche and White Wind.”

Chen Rui nodded as Blanche spoke up, “I have something to discuss with Richard. You ride Flying Wings and take White Wind back first, okay?”

Michelle glanced at Chen Rui in surprise, then at Blanche, mysteriously pulling the half-elf girl aside and whispered, “This is the first time I have seen you take such an initiative to a man. Could it be…”

“Don’t talk nonsense.” Blanche gave her a little push, “Go back now!”

“You still deny it.” Michelle grinned, “You don’t want me to be a third-wheeler, isn’t it?”

“Just do me a favor. Michelle, I beg you, go back now.”

“Why stop calling me Your Highness? It seems that my good friend is in a pretty good mood today? Since it’s a date, why don’t you take off your ugly eye patch, it really looks ugly.”

Chen Rui on the side finally understood Blanche’s good intentions. She didn’t want ‘Richard’, a person of unknown origin and powerful strength, to know Michelle’s special identity so as not to be held hostage or have other accidents. Therefore, she wanted Michelle to ride the unicorn away from danger while she stayed on her own.

From this point of view, this Ms. Half-elf has some plot, but more importantly, she has a pretty good heart.

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “It turns out to be ‘Your Highness’ Michelle. Pardon my demeanor.”

Blanche’s expression changed. When Michelle said that, she knew it was going to be bad. Michelle smiled and said, “If you dare to bully Blanche, I won’t let you go.”

Chen Rui quickly explained, “Ladies, I think you have all misunderstood. I came to the Jade Forest Sea because I wish to meet Sir Grand Master Finoia for an important matter. Unfortunately, this is the first time I have come to the forest sea, so I’m lost… Ladies, please take me to the location of the elf tribe.”

“So you’re looking for teacher…” Michelle was stunned as she accidentally revealed another identity. The half-elf girl shook her head helplessly.

“Please do me a favor?”

“En!” Michelle nodded, “Take it as a thank you for saving Blanche and White Wind, but I’m not sure whether teacher will see you or not. It’s getting late, let’s hurry up.”

After making a promise with the aura fruit as bait in the [Analytical Eyes], Chen Rui successfully rode the unicorn. Michelle and Blanche sat on the silver pegasus together, and the 2 mounts rushed forward through the forest. Finally, they went through the layers of water-like special enchantment to arrive at the residence of the elf tribe: the Silver Moon Celestial Capital.

It was nighttime. The celestial capital under the moonlight looked like countless magnificent night pearls. The sound of music could be heard faintly, giving people a poetic and picturesque feeling.

“Dear Moonlight Goddess! Your Highness Michelle, you are finally back! Your Highness is absent from the banquet today. Her Majesty Liv seems very angry. Your Highness should go back to the palace.” At the gate of the city, a sharp female voice sounded. This was a tall and beautiful female elf with a team of guards behind her.

The elf tribe’s figure and appearance were indeed outstanding. There was no shortage of handsome men and beautiful women. The strength of these guards was not weak, especially the tall female elf leader who had reached the A level.

“I went to the northern part of the forest sea to help teacher collect some alchemy materials today.” Michelle pouted and muttered in a low voice, “I don’t want to attend that kind of boring banquet.”

“North? That area is not safe recently!” The female elf’s voice became serious when she saw Chen Rui, “This… is a human? Who is he?”

The guards behind her all surrounded them. What surprised the elves was that the human actually jumped off the back of White Wind, the most unruly unicorn.

“Nana, don’t be so nervous. Richard is Blanche… and my friend who came to visit Teacher Finoia. He helped us eliminate the poachers.”

“Your Highness, you may not know but humans are very cunning. Don’t be fooled by them!” Nana glanced at Blanche, and her gaze getting sharper, “Half-elf, you dare to confuse Princess Royal Highness to bring an unknown human into the Silver Moon Celestial Capital!”

Someone in the guard whispered, “Hmph! This half-elf actually brought a man back.”

“This man is really ugly. No doubt, she inherited Lanzily’s level of appreciation. Like mother, like daughter…” From Nana’s title and the whispers behind her, Blanche was indeed the target of discrimination in the elf tribe. The half-elf girl’s mouth moved, but she did not explain. Her face was as indifferent as before.

“Nana! It’s not about Blanche. I brought him back!” Michelle said unhappily, “Didn’t Philly also bring back a group of humans yesterday? Mom even hosted a banquet to entertain them!”

“Those are of course different. They are the classmates of Royal Highness Philly at Starlight College. This time they came to train in the forest sea, and there is also the Blue Glory Empire’s…” Nana gave Chen Rui a wary look and did not say anything, “In any case, this human of unknown origin must not be allowed to enter the Silver Moon Celestial Capital unless he is willing to spend the rest of his life in prison.”

Blanche rode the silver pegasus along the way. Michelle and Chen Rui, who had nothing to do, had a great chat. When she heard that Nana wanted to expel or arrest Chen Rui, she resolutely shook her head and said, “No! This is my friend!”

Chen Rui’s unhurried voice sounded, “Your Highness Michelle, thank you very much for your trust and friendship. I’m honored to know such a beautiful, elegant and polite elf princess like you. Likewise, it’s an honor to meet a brave, strong, and kind-hearted Ms. Half-elf.”

His tone of voice changed as he said proudly, “It’s just that, as a diplomatic envoy of the mountain hobbit, I express regret and indignation for the treatment I’m currently receiving at the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. I will immediately return to the Black Rock Mountain’s Thick Soil Castle and faithfully convey the attitude of the elf tribe to the Hobbit King Ovge.”

Chen Rui’s palm slowly opened to show a leaf-shaped magic badge exuding a faint natural breath. It reflected gem-like crystal light under the moonlight.

“Holy Leaf Heraldry!” Nana shuddered and called out aloud.

“This is the Holy Leaf Heraldry which represents the highest ally of the elf? It is said that only the mountain hobbit and the Blue Glory Empire have it, right?” Michelle spilled the beans again while looking at this heraldry with gleaming eyes, “Can I touch it?”

Chen Rui, “…”

Nana, “…”

Shortly after the guards rushed to the palace to report, 2 elves appeared at the gate of the city – 1 male and 1 female. The male elf had a cold face, and the female elf was beautiful and elegant, both were wearing white robes with silver rims.

Michelle, who was still chatting with Chen Rui just now, immediately showed a nervous expression and stepped forward to salute when she saw the female elf, “Teacher Patricy, Elder Cheropan.”

It seems that Michelle has more than one teacher, and obviously she has a lot of reverence for this teacher.

“Little girl, don’t be nervous. I’m not here to punish you.” Patricy pursed her lips and smiled, then she turned her eyes to Chen Rui, “It is surprising that the mountain hobbit will send a human to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital as a representative. I’m Patricy, the elder of the elf tribe, and this is Elder Cheropan. Welcome to Celestial Capital, the envoy of the mountain hobbit.”

The strengths of these 2 elves were both at the Demon Overlord level. It seems that the elf tribe still attaches great importance to me, the envoy. Chen Rui bowed slightly, “Richard, greetings to both elders, I’m sorry to disturb you so late. In fact, thanks to the guidance of Royal Highness Michelle and Ms. Blanche, otherwise I’m still lost in the beautiful forest sea.”

“Sir Richard, please go to the city and rest. Tomorrow morning, Her Majesty Liv will formally meet sir at the palace.”

Chen Rui originally only came to meet Grand Master Finoia. He didn’t expect that a small badge could actually cause such a big movement. He nodded and followed the 2 into the city. Michelle was also caught by Patricy and returned to the palace.

At this moment, Ms. Duoduo opened her dim sleepy eyes and chirped.

“Dad, supper! Supper! Duoduo wants to eat pudding!”

Chen Rui helplessly took out a pudding in the strange gaze of everyone while exchanging courtesies with the 2 elders. He put the pudding on his head for Ms. Adopted Daughter to enjoy.

Cheropan looked at Duoduo for a while and revealed a puzzled expression, “That bird…”

“That’s Richard’s bird.” Royal Highness Michelle said with her gleaming big eyes, “I really want to touch it.”

Elder Cheropan, “…”

Student Richard, “…”

chapters.title: Chapter 691 - Landbis
chapters.body:
Chapter 691 - Landbis

Chapter 691: Landbis

In the early morning of the next day, the gentle morning light shone into the room through the window, and Chen Rui slowly opened his blurry eyes.

The first thing he saw when he opened his eyes was the warm body of the little phoenix. Normal birds would sleep standing up with their heads in their wings, but Ms. Duoduo was lying down and sleeping with her face sticking to her dad’s face which was very cute.

Chen Rui gently touched Duoduo’s feathers and sat up from the bed. This was a room with a peculiar style. It felt more like a small garden than a guest room.

The room seemed natural and random, but every corner, every flower, and every piece of ornaments was ingeniously and carefully arranged. The whole room was a large and seemingly clumsy work of art. Only the elf tribe could have this kind of elegance and care. Elf was a natural artist. Sometimes their requirements for perfection were almost harsh. In their relatively long life, enjoying life and feeling the nature became their main keywords. Just as the elf couldn’t understand the human’s busyness, humans also couldn’t understand that elves ‘wasting’ a lot of time on some unbelievable things such as spending a month sculpting the pattern of a window and listening to the gurgling water by the creek all day long…

Chen Rui opened the window and felt a refreshing natural breath blew into his face. He felt very comfortable. The cities he had seen were high-rise buildings, carved beams and painted buildings and even steel jungles. Occasionally, some greens were artificially planted, but it was the first time he saw this kind of city with nature as the main theme.

Under the light blue sky, there were beautiful houses. Many of them were tree houses with peculiar shapes which were integrated with the green mountains and green waters. From time to time, there were crisp bird chirpings and melodious music in the breeze. One could see a waterfall that flowed straight down from a far distance; the faint mist lingering between the cities made people feel like they have come to a fairyland on earth. This was the Silver Moon Celestial Capital of the elf tribe.

While Chen Rui was amazed, the little phoenix had already woken up.

The first thing Duoduo did after waking up every morning was to find dad. When she saw Chen Rui at the window, she immediately fluttered her wings, flew forward and landed on his shoulder.

“Dad! Breakfast! Breakfast!”

Just as Chen Rui was about to take out a fire crystal, he suddenly thought of something and said in surprise, “Duoduo, you can fly now?”

Just now, the little phoenix flew up by flapping its wings directly, and it appeared very stable and much stronger than the unstable flight previously. The pair of little wings seemed to be longer.

“Wow, dad, Duoduo can fly!” The little phoenix flapped its wings and circled him again, before returning to his shoulder affectionately next to his face.

At this moment, Chen Rui felt an unprecedented sense of satisfaction like a parent witnessing his child growing up little by little and learning the skill step by step. This feeling was an incredible and wonderful experience for him who had never been a father in the past and this life. The little phoenix had subconsciously occupied a very important position in Chen Rui’s heart as if she was really his daughter.

He suddenly had an urge to bring Duoduo back to the Demon Realm to form a perfect family with Athena and the others. I believe they will also like this lovely daughter.

The problem is that the [Star Gate] cannot take living beings away. Precisely, the [Star Gate] skill can carry a limited level of life. If the little phoenix is still in the egg, then the level of life in this form can directly go through the [Star Gate], but unfortunately, it is impossible to return to the egg now (Ms. Duoduo gnawed away the egg shell without any remnant).

I heard Samuel said that there are masters in the elf tribe who can send people directly to the Demon Realm, but this method is very dangerous. There is a considerable chance that they will fall into a different space or space turbulence and never return. This was originally Chen Rui’s final choice if he could not accumulate sufficient faith crystals. Now it is only a matter of time before the conversion of 1 million faith crystals is completed, so there is no need to take this risk. Naturally, I don’t want the little phoenix to take risks. What’s more, the little phoenix doesn’t have the ability of the [Star Gate], even if she can safely reach the Demon Realm, I’m not sure where she will be teleported to.

Just when Chen Rui had a headache, Duoduo’s twittering voice sounded again, “Duoduo don’t want to fly like that, Duoduo still likes to fly like this!”

Seeing Ms. Duoduo was ‘launched’ like a spring, her unscrupulous adoptive father sweated profusely. Finally, he had the frustration of giving birth to a mischievous child.

“Duoduo, um, uh… that training can end now. We are going to fly for real now. You see dad is also flying. Come fly with dad, okay?” Chen Rui controlled the power gradually to float in the air.

“No, dad’s wings haven’t moved!”

Chen Rui was dumbfounded. After hesitating for a moment, he finally waved his arms and started the teaching work of flying with ‘wings’. Under her dad’s personal demonstration, Duoduo began to flap her wings and flew beside him. She shouted excitedly; even forgetting to eat breakfast.

The space in the room was not very large. Fortunately, Chen Rui’s power control was subtle and they didn’t hit anything. At this moment, the door suddenly opened, “Richard! I’m coming to see you and the bird!”

The next second.

Michelle and Blanche stared dumbfoundedly at Chen Rui who maintained a certain ‘graceful’ posture in the air.

Michelle, “…”

Blanche, “…”

Chen Rui, “…”

Duoduo, “Dad, fly fast, your wings aren’t moving!”

Another second.

Michelle jumped up excitedly, “Richard, I want to fly with you and your bird too!”

Blanche, “…”

Chen Rui, “…”

Duoduo, “Dad! Why did you fall on the ground!”

After a dozen seconds.

Chen Rui took Ms. Duoduo, Michelle and Blanche out of the room. Even if he had thick skin, he was extremely embarrassed just now. It was the fault of the elf tribe’s room that had excellent sound insulation enchantment, plus the father and daughter were very engaged in flying, so he didn’t have time to react.

“Richard, if I treat you to a green leaf cake, will you let me touch Duoduo?” Michelle looked at the little phoenix on Chen Rui’s head.

Blanche reminded her, “Didn’t Her Majesty Empress have an order? After the envoy finishes breakfast, we should take him to the palace immediately. Don’t let Her Majesty wait too long.”

“I know, I just want to touch his…” Blanche covered her mouth before Michelle finished speaking.

Chen Rui smiled slightly and did not go on with Michelle. He walked straight to the restaurant on the second floor.

There were also some guests in the restaurant on the second floor. To Chen Rui’s surprise, they were actually human.

There were more than 10 of these humans, many of whom were handsome and beautiful. Chen Rui saw 1 of the young girls at first glance. The appearance and temperament of this girl were exceptional. Even if it was not Chen Rui and some other person, one would still notice her at first sight even if there were hundreds of people around. Some people could be seen at a glance even in the vast crowd; she was this type of girl.

In terms of appearance, the girl had reached the level of Catherine and Zola, even Shea or Isabella was inferior to her. The nearly perfect facial features and figure, purple-blue shawl hair, and mirror-like eyes. Her whole body exuded a peaceful and elegant temperament. If one really wanted to pick a flaw, her gaze was a little resolute and lacked tenderness.

There was a faint familiar feeling in Chen Rui’s heart. It should be in Arthur’s original memory fragments, but he was not throbbing like the time he saw the sea-blue eyes at the Dragon Bright Empire. Instead, it was another special indescribable feeling.

Although the girl had a peerless appearance, Chen Rui was more of an appreciation. It was like women like to see handsome guys. Meanwhile, it was normal for men to enjoy looking at beautiful women. As for other ideas, he really didn’t have any.

Just like Master Paglio who looked east and west along the way, and he would look back when he saw beautiful women. Nevertheless, he still obediently returned home to buy supper to honor Ms. Emerald Dragon in the end.

Scientific research showed that the greater the number of crystal harem, the greater the risk of the male protagonist being mutilated by a hatchet. Even the teeth and tongue would inevitably bump with each other. Happy stories like the harem harmonious family, all women brainwashed and obsessed with the male protagonist only appeared in myths.

——These people must be those who were mentioned by the city gate guard leader Nana last night. They are the Starlight College students who come to the Jade Forest Sea to participate in some kind of training. There should be noble families of the Blue Glory Empire among them. The Blue Glory Empire and the elf tribe have covenants, so these humans will receive the special courtesy of the elf tribe.

When those people saw Chen Rui, they also showed a surprised expression. They didn’t expect that another human was staying in this Green House which was equivalent to the elf tribe royal hotel.

“Hey, boy, mind your eyes. Otherwise, I don’t mind digging them out for you.” A discordant voice sounded.

The speaker was a thin man with luxurious clothes. At first glance, he was the kind of silly person who liked to show off himself in the limelight. Chen Rui didn’t bother to care about such a small character. He didn’t even look at that guy and went straight to an empty table.

The man originally tried to use this and his noble status to please the girl, but he did not expect that this guy with a bird on his head actually ignored him completely. He felt embarrassed in front of the public especially in front of the pretty girl. He jumped up stylishly and appeared at Chen Rui’s table, “Asshole, did you hear what I said?! Do you know who I am?”

“I know, you are a celebrity!” Chen Rui said with a serious expression. This ‘who I am’ was stunned for a moment. “You will appear in every online novel, but unfortunately all are the victims of the male protagonist who will step on your face relentlessly, so go back to your table obediently. This might make some beauties have a different view of you.”

The man didn’t understand Chen Rui’s meaning much, but he also heard the sarcasm. He couldn’t help being furious and was about to break out when a voice sounded from the door, “Richard, wait for me!”

An elf girl held a plate of green pastries and hopped to Chen Rui.

The silly man was surprised as he recognized that this girl was the little princess Michelle of the elf tribe. Michelle pleasingly said, “This is the green leaf cake I made by myself. Try it.”

Chen Rui picked up a piece and put it in his mouth. The green leaf cake had a soft texture and a refreshing taste. It melted in his mouth. He couldn’t help but praise, “Not bad.”

“Richard, since I treat you so well, let me touch it.”

Everyone was almost petrified. The dignified little elf princess actually…

Chen Rui called Duoduo, and the little phoenix flew to his palm. She looked at the green leaf cake with an expression of disdain before returning to the top of his head to continue enjoying the aura fruit. Chen Rui shrugged at Michelle and put the green leaf cake into his mouth.

Michelle showed a disappointed expression and suddenly rolled her eyes, “Mom is waiting for you now in the palace. After the meeting is over, I will take you to Teacher Finoia, okay?”

Everyone couldn’t help but be even more surprised when they heard that the elf empress was going to summon this ordinary-looking man, and that this man seemed to be related to the legendary mechanic Grand Master Finoia who would not meet foreign guests. The girl’s slender brow raised slightly when she noticed that Michelle used the word ‘meet’. She walked over and glanced at the silly man. The man didn’t dare to look at her directly, and he lowered his head.

“I’m Landbis, an assistant teacher at Starlight College. My student Melodan was rude just now. I apologize to sir on his behalf. Please forgive him.”

TL: Hmmm, Did ‘Arthur’ recognize this girl?

chapters.title: Chapter 692 - Trial
chapters.body:
Chapter 692 - Trial

Assistant teacher of Starlight College? Chen Rui nodded. As for the name ‘Landbis’, he didn’t delve into it. It was a big world and there were too many people with the same name. Moreover, in Chen Rui’s heart, it didn’t matter if it was or not. ‘Arthur’ had been annihilated while ‘Chen Rui’ was just an outsider.

“It turns out to be Teacher Landbis. My name is Richard. I’m glad to meet you. Now that Teacher Landbis has spoken, I’ll forget about it.”

“Thank you, sir’s generosity is admirable.” Landbis looked at Michelle who was aside. She bowed slightly and walked back with the silly student, Melodan.

Michelle’s impression of Landbis didn’t seem to be very good. Her gaze was a little hostile, and she bowed back with her head turned sideways in the end.

Elves were vegetarians. There was no meat in the food. All green foods were mainly light in taste. As Chen Rui was used to eating meat and fish, these foods had a special flavor. He ate slowly while chatting with Michelle from time to time. Blanche stood silently behind Michelle.

After eating and drinking, Chen Rui stood up, “Let’s go to the palace.”

When passing by Landbis’ table, the beautiful assistant teacher gave Chen Rui a friendly smile. Chen Rui nodded casually. His eyes slightly paused on a beautiful red-haired girl next to Landbis, then he walked out of the restaurant door all the way.

“This guy’s eyes seem to be really blind. Facing senior’s goddess smile which subdues all boys, his mental fluctuation has actually not changed at all.” The red-haired girl said with a grin.

Landbis shook her head slightly, “Ariel, didn’t I tell you not to simply snoop on other people’s emotions? This is impolite.”

“Senior, I just feel unfair for you. Besides, he discovered my sensing power long ago. The ‘snooping’ that was discovered shouldn’t be considered snooping.” Ariel’s eyes narrowed, “I can sense that this person… is very powerful.”

“How powerful is it?” A cold and arrogant voice sounded.

“I don’t know either.” Ariel glanced at the cool young man behind and asked with interest, “You can try it if you have a chance.”

The young man scoffed coldly and did not speak anymore.

Chen Rui followed Michelle toward the palace. Blanche did not follow; she separated from the 2 at the gate of the Green House.

According to Michelle, a ‘professional bean spiller’, Blanche’s mother was from the elf noble family while her father was a half-elf. The elf tribe had always looked down at half-elf, so the combination of the 2 was strongly opposed. In order to get the approval of the elf tribe, Blanche’s father went to the dangerous Nightmare Wilderness to find the springwater of the Fountain of Vitality to save the sacred Tree of Nature of the elf tribe. Unfortunately, he died in the Nightmare Wilderness. Blanche’s mother had just given birth to her daughter. Hearing this sad news, she was utterly distraught and died of depression after a serious illness. Blanche had been discriminated against by the elf tribe since she was a child. If it was not for her mother’s special status who had made outstanding contributions to the elf tribe, she would have been kicked out of the Jade Forest Sea as early as that year.

The reason why Blanche wore the eye patch was not blindness, but because that eye had been mutated because it inherited some kind of power from her father. It had a forbidden power, so she usually wore an eye patch to cover up.

During the conversation, the 2 had already arrived at the palace. The palace of the elf tribe was on a cliff. The exquisite buildings exuded a poetic charm. Even a corridor or a section of stairs were all exquisite artworks.

Chen Rui followed Michelle all the way into the palace hall without obstruction.

On the throne, there was a female elf with a crown on her head. She had a beautiful appearance as well as delicate and shiny skin. She was wearing a long silver-white dress without too much embellishment, but it revealed a graceful and luxurious elegance. Those crystal-like green eyes gave people the deepest impression as if they could see through everything.

The supreme ruler of the elf tribe, Michelle’s mother, Empress Liv.

Race: Elf.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S++

Physique: S+, Strength: S+, Spirit: S++, Speed: S++.

Attribute: Wind attribute, proficient in archery and magic.

Degree of danger: High.

Empress Liv empress was next to the 2 elders whom he met last night, Patricy and Cheropan.

“Welcome, the envoy of the mountain hobbit, Sir Richard.” The empress’ melodious voice sounded, “Please have a seat.”

“It’s a great honor to meet the beautiful and noble Your Majesty Empress.” Chen Rui bowed and sat in the lower seat. Michelle stood beside the empress.

“I’m very surprised that the king of the mountain hobbit will actually entrust a human to come as an envoy. An outstanding human indeed.” The empress was slightly moved when she looked at Duoduo on Chen Rui’s shoulder, then she recovered her senses.

“Special envoy with a bird.” Michelle whispered. Empress Liv glared at her. The latter sentence “I want to touch it” was swallowed back due to the glare.

Chen Rui grinned and did not go on with the topic of ‘bird’. He said, “I’m also surprised that I was fortunate enough to meet Your Majesty. His Highness Hobbit King Ovge initially gave me a badge… I’m sorry, but I didn’t know that it was the Holy Leaf Heraldry at the time. Then, he entrusted me to find a stolen blueprint and asked me to give it to the elf tribe’s Grand Master Finoia. Later, I found the blueprint by chance, so I immediately set off to the Jade Forest Sea. Thanks to Princess Michelle and Ms. Blanche’s help that I am able to reach here.”

Seeing Chen Rui deliberately mentioning her, Empress Liv nodded and said, “So, it seems that Sir Richard does not understand the meaning of the Holy Leaf Heraldry. The appearance of this heraldry at the Silver Moon Celestial Capital represents the attitude of the mountain hobbit. As a trusted friend of the hobbit king, sir, please convey the elf tribe’s most sincere kindness and respect to the mountain hobbit. Let the past events go with the wind. We should focus on the future of the 2 tribes, the elf tribe and the mountain hobbit will establish an intimate relationship of mutual assistance, advancement and retreat just like the ancient covenant.”

“I believe the mountain hobbit will cherish this friendship with the elf, but I’m afraid Your Majesty Empress will need to send another envoy to the Thick Soil Castle. I only promised Royal Highness Ovge to use this heraldry to enter the forest sea and hand over the blueprint to Grand Master Finoia.” Chen Rui took out the Holy Leaf Heraldry, “I have successfully reached the forest sea, and now I only have to hand the blueprint to Grand Master Finoia. As for everything other than this, it has nothing to do with me.”

Putting aside Michelle, Empress Liv and the 2 elders looked at each other and simultaneously showed a surprised expression. This task is not difficult. ‘Richard’ can get the favors and benefits from the hobbit and the elf tribe that ordinary humans cannot get by being a facilitator of the friendship between the 2 races. However, he rejected all these in a sentence. At most, there is only a ‘personal’ relationship with Grand Master Finoia.

Liv slightly pondered. A voice sounded in Chen Rui’s mind, “Sir is so eager to steer clear with the mountain hobbit. Is there any special reason? Or you don’t want to burden the mountain hobbit?”

Chen Rui didn’t expect the insight of the elf empress to be so strong. He also responded with the power of the [Analytical Eyes], “Perhaps. I only have 1 request. Your Majesty, please allow me to personally hand over the blueprint to Grand Master Finoia.”

“You have a very magical spirit power.” Empress Liv’s beautiful eyes were even more shocking. “To me, these words are not simple emotional transmissions. They are completely flawless elf language which is even better than the elf’s soul language. Not only that, I also cannot figure out the strength you are hiding. I feel fortunate for my allies of the hobbit tribe for having a powerful friend; a true friend. I kind of understand why Royal Highness Ovge gave you the Holy Leaf Heraldry.”

“Your Majesty has overpraised. I just finished a promised matter.”

“Do you know the origin of the kid on your shoulder?”

“I think I know.”

“It seems that you brought me a lot of surprises today…”

After a brief and rapid heart-to-heart exchange, the elf empress took a deep look at Chen Rui and signaled Patricy to take back the Holy Leaf Heraldry before speaking, “Since this is the case, then I will not force you. Thank you Sir Richard for contributing to the friendship between the hobbit and the elf tribe. Michelle, take Sir Richard to the Purple Heart Treehouse to pass the blueprint to Sir Finoia.”

Chen Rui immediately got up to leave and followed Michelle out. The elf empress was not only a powerhouse, but also a sage. She neither promised to take all the troubles that might arise nor expel him from the Silver Moon Celestial Capital once his value was delivered. Instead, she deliberately avoided this question which had actually shown the attitude.

The Purple Heart Treehouse was located in the Purple Forest outside the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. This forest was designated as a special area. and no one was allowed to enter without the permission of Grand Master Finoia. Grand Master Finoia had not met foreign visitors for many years. Even the elf tribe people rarely see this grand master. The general affairs were handled by his direct apprentice, the elf tribe’s well-known alchemist, Master Taranna.

Taranna’s residence was on the bank of the small lake at the entrance of the Purple Forest. She was greeting a group of guests at this time.

These guests were the students of Starlight College. The trial test of Master Taranna was 1 of the contents of the assessment for obtaining an advanced bachelor’s degree.

A total of 12 students participated in the trial test including the princess of the elf tribe, Michelle’s sister, Philly. In addition to Landbis, there were 2 teachers from Starlight College.

Although Taranna was already 500 years old, his appearance was still a handsome young man in his twenties. Elf’s appearance would not change after reaching the adult stage, even for hundreds of years. Only in the last 10 years of his life would he begin to age rapidly.

“From now until dark, the closer the person is to the Purple Heart Treehouse, the higher the score. If you can enter the treehouse, you can also get extra guidance from the grand master. Grand Master Finoia is not only an alchemy grand master, he is also the powerhouse of peak stage Saint.”

Taranna’s words brightened everyone’s eyes. Master Elf went on to say, “However, the last thing to remind you is that the Purple Forest is by no means a simple place. It contains all kinds of dangers, and some are even fatal. You can use all methods to enter. Don’t lose the teleportation stone that I gave you. In case of irresistible danger, you can use it to teleport out. Everyone has only 1 chance to teleport. After teleporting out, you can’t enter again. You must grasp it well, understand?”

The 12 students responded in unison, “Understood!”

At this moment, the figures of Michelle and Chen Rui appeared by the lake. Michelle waved to Taranna from a distance, “Master Taranna, will you take us to see teacher?”

As soon as these words came out, everyone’s eyes looked over.

TL: Are these ancient rune traps? Chen Rui can get into the house without Taranna right? Will Isyorul chases him here at the elf tribe?

chapters.title: Chapter 693 - Crack The Array
chapters.body:
Chapter 693 - Crack The Array

As soon as Taranna announced the rules of the trial, Michelle led a stranger to meet Grand Master Finoia immediately. This made Taranna a little awkward especially in front of so many outsiders.

“Who is he? Michelle, you are getting more and more bold. Putting aside your absence at the banquet yesterday, you actually brought a strange human here today!” It was Michelle’s sister, Philly. As she was preparing for the trial in the palace, she was not in the Green House previously, so she did not know Chen Rui’s ‘identity’.

Facing her sister’s public questioning, Michelle pouted sulkily, “I brought Richard to meet teacher on my mother’s order!”

“Royal Majesty’s order?” Taranna frowned and looked at Chen Rui, “It’s just that the magic circle of the trial has been activated now. This magic circle full of various traps and dangers was set up by teacher. Even I can’t stop it. If you want to see teacher, you must wait until the end of the day when the trial is finished.”

Michelle looked at Chen Rui. Chen Rui didn’t want to make things difficult for the little girl. He shrugged, “It turns out that there is a magic circle, then I’ll wait until the end of the day since I’m not in a hurry.”

At this moment, a cold voice among the trial students said, “Ariel, didn’t you say that this guy with the bird on his head is very powerful? Turns out he is a coward.”

The red-haired girl, Ariel, spread her hands, “Unfortunately, I can’t predict a person’s guts. Maybe I previously sensed his bird, not him.”

The students burst into laughter, and Michelle exclaimed angrily, “Richard is not a coward! You bad guys are not good people!”

“Michelle! How can you be so rude to my friends!” Philly frowned and said, “Don’t forget that you are the princess of the elf tribe. You should learn something instead of fooling around with that lowly half-elf or some guys from unknown origins regardless of your status!”

It might be right to say this from Philly’s point of view, but it was also meant to show off an elder sister’s authority in front of the students deliberately with this reprimanding tone that didn’t save her sister’s face.

Michelle’s face flushed, “You’re not allowed to say that about Blanche! She is my friend! Richard too! Apologize now!”

Chen Rui looked at the little elf princess who was about to cry for him and Blanche, and there was a touch of warmth in his heart. He stopped the quarrel between the sisters, “Well, I will go to see Grand Master Finoia now. I will go alone. If I see sir grand master before you, I only have 1 request – All of you, including Princess Philly, must apologize to my friend, Michelle.”

Chen Rui referred to Philly as the ‘princess’ and used ‘friend’ when referring to Michelle. The meticulous little elf girl’s eyes lit up when she heard it.

As soon as these words were spoken, there was a commotion among the students. These students were all outstanding in Starlight College. Many of them were even the nobles of the empire. This ordinary-looking guy actually said that he wants to defeat everyone. Such a shameless brag.

“What a bold claim!” Quinn sneered, “What if you lose?”

“I’ll satisfy any of your requirements.” Chen Rui turned to look at Landbis, “Ms. Landbis, what do you think?”

Landbis frowned and exchanged opinions quickly with the 2 teachers, then she nodded, “Okay, if you lose, we won’t ask too much. You just need to apologize to our students and answer my questions truthfully.”

“Deal.” Chen Rui smiled lightly like he didn’t pay attention to these arrogant kids at all.

This attitude angered everyone and they clamored. Chen Rui didn’t care as he watched these students enter the mist-shrouded Purple Forest. On the other hand, Michelle was a little anxious, “Why don’t you go in yet?”

“No hurry, the magic circle at the entrance is very interesting. People who enter late can take advantage of it.”

Michelle was taken aback, and she asked Taranna, “Master, is that true?”

Taranna showed a surprised expression and took a close look at this human. “This advantage is not so easy to take.”

In fact, this was not an ‘advantage’. The entrance was a triangular inscription array mimicking the water element. Those who went in first would trigger the magic circle while those who went in later could figure out the magic based on the previous fluctuations and crack it.

It should be noted that it was ‘crack’ rather than ‘pass through’. Although the triangular inscription array was not too complicated, the magic circle was fixed but the people were flexible. There was some mystery in the triangular inscription array that Grand Master Finoia personally set up. If it was the first time to enter, even Taranna was not confident to crack it, let alone this human who seemed ordinary.

Chen Rui shrugged and did not speak. After a while, he walked forward.

“Richard! The trial’s magic circle is very dangerous…”

Chen Rui turned his head, but Michelle’s next sentence was not a reminder such as “be careful”, but, “It’s better to put your bird…”

Before she finished speaking, someone who was sweating on his forehead had disappeared.

Taranna didn’t notice the misleading meaning in the words of junior sister. What he noticed was the time Chen Rui entered the magic circle was actually the best time to get into the fluctuations. He couldn’t help being wondered.

Chen Rui didn’t want to show off. 1 of the reasons was to fight for Michelle. Another reason was to see and learn from the magic circle of Grand Master Finoia. Magic circle was a separate subject, but it was closely related to alchemy. Chen Rui’s current magic circle attainments were already quite high. He was also proficient in the Dragon Inscription and ancient runes. With the assistance of [Deep Analysis], he had almost reached quasi-grand master level.

Of course, Chen Rui’s biggest goal was to use this trip to the Jade Forest Sea to reach the threshold of the grand master in terms of mechanics.

The triangular inscription array began to emit strange waves, then it gradually calmed down. Taranna smiled knowingly, but not long after, the fluctuations appeared again repeatedly. The elf master frowned.

The students of the Starlight College who entered the magic circle were fighting fiercely with the ‘enemies’ mimicking the water element power. They only felt that the enemies were alternating between strong and weak. When they were exhausted to deal with it, those enemies suddenly turned into water patterns that disappeared without a trace and a way out appeared ahead. Many students cheered as they thought that their own efforts had defeated the enemies.

The sound originally blocked by the magic circle reached the entrance, and Taranna’s facial expression suddenly changed. That human actually cracked the triangular inscription array! Finoia is a mechanics grand master, but he also does considerable research on the magic circle and has reached the realm of quasi-grand master. In such a short period of time, how can this human…

Landbis noticed the change in Taranna’s expression while listening to the faint cheers in the distance. The beautiful female assistant showed a pondering expression, not knowing what she was thinking.

In Purple Heart Treehouse, a tall, thin, handsome male elf was sitting leisurely at the table. There was a strange chess board on the table. The elf held a chess piece in his left hand and a small wine cup in his right hand. The wine was amber and exuded a faint fragrance.

There was a big bearded hobbit with white beard and hair on the opposite side of the elf. His hair was messy, but his beard was carefully woven into small braids. The hobbit’s height was only a little more than half the height of the elf, but the wine cup in his hand was 3 times bigger than the el’s. He was pouring wine into it.

“Bernd, your excessive drinking has ruined my orchid fragrance wine.” The male elf looked at the wine dripping from the hobbit cup with distress.

Bernd’s eyes widened, “Wine is delicious when drunk like this. Your way of drinking is more sissy than the female hobbit! Okay, hurry up and play chess!”

“What’s the hurry?” The elf man who was scolded as a sissy was not angry. He savored a sip slowly, “Playing chess is like drinking wine; you have to taste it slowly to enjoy the taste. A vulgar guy like you… including all the forest hobbits will not understand.”

“Hmph! Hurry up, or I will consider that you have lost!” The old hobbit gulped a mouthful of wine unabashedly. Just as he was about to speak, he saw a map on the opposite wall glowing and buzzing. He immediately shouted, “Hey! Your so-called magic circle is cracked!”

“Oh?” The elf picked up a piece of pastry unhurriedly and put it in his mouth, chewing slowly, “Today is the advanced bachelor’s trial of the Starlight College. It seems that the quality of the students who participated in the trial this time is pretty good. At least 1 of them is proficient in magic circle.
