I remember that the little guy, Socrates, has a lot of experience in the research of the triangular inscription arrays. It should be his favorite apprentice who is able to crack it so quickly. Unfortunately, this is just an appetizer. There are more big meals in the back..”

Socrates was the deputy dean of the Starlight College, and the famous top magic circle master of humans. He was highly respected and well-known. However, in the mouth of this elf, he had become a ‘little guy’.

The 2 of them were playing chess while drinking wine. Suddenly, there was a buzzing sound on the map again. The elf’s brow moved slightly and the old hobbit grinned, “It’s the second one. It seems that Socrates has got a remarkable apprentice.”

The elf nodded, “It’s really surprising. No matter how far he can go this time, we should meet this young man with considerable potential.”

As time passed by, it was the fourth time the buzz sounded.

At this time, the elf and the old hobbit had no intention of playing chess, and they all looked at the magic map. Finally, the fifth area flashed. The old hobbit, Bernd, scratched his head, “Smart guy, he passed the Dragon Thunder Kill Array in 35 minutes. It was only 10 minutes slower than my speed at the time. Fortunately, he just passed through and did not crack it. Otherwise, I don’t know where to put my old face…”

Before he finished speaking, the buzzer sounded, and the old hobbit jumped up from the stool as if he was electrocuted, “It’s cracked? Impossible! Finoia, isn’t the Dragon Thunder Killing Array even combined with the inscription of the giant dragon family? Did you modify something?”

The elf looked at the map solemnly, “I can answer you affirmatively that there is no modification.”

The hobbit frowned desperately, “Socrates’ apprentice has such a strong ability?”

“No, even Socrates himself doesn’t have this kind of ability…” The elf took a deep breath, “Old friend, let’s calm down and drink wine first. I believe it won’t be long before we can see this mysterious guest who is at least a magic circle quasi-grand master.”

TL: Hmmm, thought Finoia is a female elf🤦♂️, sorry if I addressed him as female previously. So, now what, students of Starlight College?

chapters.title: Chapter 694 - Grand Master
chapters.body:
Chapter 694 - Grand Master

In fact, it was not easy for Chen Rui to crack the magic circles, but the gain was absolutely worth it. Both practice and theory were very important in magic circles. If it was just in 1 of them, it would be of little value. One needs to continuously absorb, learn and improve to make progress.

Finoia was a true magic circle quasi-grand master. In all fairness, his level was much higher than Chen Rui, but Chen Rui had the knowledge of Dragon Inscription and ancient runes, so his comprehensive strength was about par with Finoia. Facing such an opponent at the same level, with the help of [Deep Analysis], Chen Rui gained a lot of valuable insights including some magic circle details and techniques.

However, starting from the seventh magic circle, Chen Rui did not crack it anymore. Instead, he just passed it directly. Firstly, he didn’t want to delay too much time. Secondly, he was already familiar with Finoia’s setup style, so there was no need to crack it to gain insight anymore. Thirdly, he also wanted to leave some face for the grand master whom he was about to visit.

Finally, after passing the last magic circle, Chen Rui saw the destination this time, the Purple Heart Treehouse.

It was not so much a treehouse as it was a huge tree. On the purple trunk, there was a small house.

This shape was very different from Chen Rui’s imagined grand master house. Such a small house… probably just enough for 1 person to lie down. The only mechanic grand master of the elf tribe lives in this place?

At this moment, the door of the treehouse opened. A halo was projected on the ground in front of Chen Rui, and 2 figures appeared. One was a slender male elf with a very young appearance. In contrast to the arrogance and self-superiority of the general elf, he gave people a natural and cordial feeling. His calm gaze carried insightful maturity and wisdom. Next to him was a very old the white bearded hobbit, but in terms of real age, he might not be comparable to the ‘young’ elf.

The male elf spoke, “I’m Finoia, this is the mechanics grand master Bernd of the forest hobbit tribe. Welcome to the Purple Heart Treehouse, young human friend.”

“Richard is glad to meet Sir Grand Master Finoia and Sir Grand Master Bernd.” I didn’t expect there would be 2 grand masters. Chen Rui did not dare to neglect and bowed.

Finoia and Bernd formally saluted back. The elf grand master spoke up, “Sir Richard doesn’t need to be too polite. The magic circle accomplishments that sir showed when you came here are already qualified enough to communicate with us in an equal position. Please come into the treehouse with me. “

Chen Rui thought about it for a while, and he walked into the halo without hesitation. The halo had the effect of fixed position teleportation. Chen Rui felt that he had arrived at a bright and spacious place. This was a hall with a magnificent style and exquisite facilities. There were many rooms.

“This is… an independently built space! It can be called a perfect hexagon branch structure. It turns out that Sir Finoia is also a top space magician. This is really admirable!” It turned out that there was a cave in this small treehouse which was similar to Zola’s Rainbow Valley. It was very stable, but the space was much smaller.

“Sir Richard has good eyesight! Do you also have experience in space magic?” Finoia’s eyes lit up with a bit of surprise. It was not surprising to recognize the independent space, but it was rare to explain the type of space structure immediately.

Chen Rui shook his head, “Unfortunately, my talent in magic is not as good as that of ordinary magic apprentices. I only have a little understanding of some theories. Please don’t laugh at me, Sir Finoia.”

The old hobbit interrupted, “Skills are specialized. Not everyone is as leisurely as a guy who can live for thousands of years and study all the knick and knack.”

Finoia smiled slightly, “Bernd, don’t be jealous. Moonlight Goddess is fair. Although the elf has a long life, the fertility rate is not high, and the population growth has been slow.”

“Hmph, why don’t you say that if the fertility rate is high, the elf tribe would have ruled the world long ago?”

Finoia smiled without saying a word, and he waved, “Please sit down, Sir Richard.”

Chen Rui sat down, “Sir Finoia, the way I came to visit this time is a bit rude, please forgive me.”

“It’s okay, today happens to be the trial for Starlight College.” Finoia smiled, “You still gave me a little face for not cracking all the magic circles and let the students find this place directly.”

Chen Rui laughed and did not explain too much. No matter which location, only talented people had the right to speak. Excessive modesty could sometimes have counterproductive effects.

“Let me be straightforward, I came to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital because I was commissioned by the Hobbit King Ovge of the Thick Soil Castle hill to hand over Grand Master Rick’s relic to Sir Finoia.” Chen Rui took out the old blueprint and handed it over.

Seeing the blueprint, Finoia trembled. He took it with both hands with rare excitement on his calm face. After seeing it carefully, he nodded, “That’s it, very good, very good.”

“This is the magic weapon that you and Old Rick researched together back then?” Bernd leaned over to look at the blueprint while frowning, “This blueprint should have a very clever concealed inscription technique, and it’s incomplete. It must be pieced together in order to see the original thing.”

“Yes, I still have half here.” Finoia took out a blueprint of the same texture. When the 2 were put together, they glowed with golden light and turned into a brand new complete blueprint.

A special device was drawn on this blueprint with various cross-sections and data analysis. Chen Rui was shocked when he glanced at it. It is actually such a thing! It seems that even if they are on 2 completely parallel planes, the inventions and creativity are still surprisingly similar.

“If I guess it right, this magic weapon can give ordinary people the ability to fight against powerhouses just like a miniature magic crystal cannon.” Chen Rui said, “If the war tactics are right, even mid-to-high-level powerhouses will be deterred. Perhaps its advent will change the form of the future war. However, at present, the design of this weapon is still in its rudimentary form with various flaws such as aiming…”

The more Finoia and Bernd listened, the more surprised they were. This kind of comment had surpassed the scope of knowledge of the magic circle. Only a real alchemist or even a grand master could have such excellent insights. Some aspects even inspired Finoia as he was seeing things from a whole new perspective.

The shape or structure of this magic weapon was very similar to the thermal weapon of another world. Chen Rui actually retained a lot of memory of it. He just mentioned the idea of the aiming scope.

After Chen Rui finished speaking, the elf grand master carefully digested what he had just heard. After a long time, he took a deep breath and looked at the human with an eager gaze.

“I haven’t left the Jade Forest Sea for many years. It seems that I’m out of touch with the outside world. I don’t know when such a human genius alchemy grand master appeared in the world.”

“I can only say that I admire this kind of insight. No wonder the kid, Ovge, entrusted a human to come. You are less than 30 years old?” The old hobbit scratched his head vigorously, “Looks like both Finoia and I have lived in vain for a long time.”

“The 2 grand masters have misunderstood. In fact, I’m still far from the grand master. This time I came to the Jade Forest Sea to ask the 2 grand masters about the true meaning of mechanical skills…” Chen Rui’s mind shifted, and he included Bernd.

Bernd grinned, “These words fully demonstrate the cunning of humans. I became a grand master for less than 1 year. Except for Finoia, only the upper layers of the forest hobbit know. How did you hear that the forest sea has 2 grand masters?”

“Sir Richard, don’t mind us. Since you’re a friend of the mountain hobbit, you should know that the hobbit tribe is straightforward like this. However, the hobbit has a proverb that says, ‘The hammer can tell the truth best.’ Is sir willing to show us, the 2 old guys, your mechanic skills?” When Finoia glanced at the next room, the door of that room opened. There was a separate space inside which was a mechanics room.

“Of course, this is my honor.” Chen Rui was overjoyed when he heard Finoia’s intention of giving him pointers.

At the Holy Light Mountain, the Glory Forest of the Holy Blessing Summit.

The book in the hands of the 4-winged angel statue suddenly burst into red flames which spread to the whole body in the blink of an eye. The nearby woods were burning, and the Glory Forest was full of blazing breath. If Chen Rui was here, he could sense that the flow of faith power around had doubled.

The blazing breath gradually dissipated. The strange thing was that the white forest trees that were still blazing just now had no trace of being burned, but the leaves turned into a fiery red color.

A man appeared outside the Glory Forest where the Holy Light Mountain’s 3 major leaders led by Pope Vantis were waiting respectfully.

Seeing Isyorul appear, the 3 major leaders said in unison, “Congratulations Sir Isyorul!”

Isyorul had a hint of joy in his eyes, “This time I finally succeeded. The power of Shackles of True Flame is completely integrated into the Judgement Book. For this reason, Eudora contributed a lot of precious fire element treasures; her credit is indispensable.”

“It is an honor for Eudora to be able to contribute to sir.” Eudora bowed, but she was secretly upset. In fact, those fire element treasures were prepared for the phoenix egg. As the hateful Richard stole the phoenix egg, her previous work was completely abandoned. Now she had no choice but to sacrifice the treasures to Isyorul.

“I’m a person who rewards and penalizes clearly. I will speak in favor of you in front of Sir Raphael in the future.” These words made Eudora overjoyed. Isyorul glanced at Vantis, “As for Vantis, as the highest leader of the church, you will bear the greatest responsibility for the holy trees’ disappearance this time; punishment is definitely inevitable. But before that, I have to personally capture the damn cultist to see if there is any hope of recovering the holy trees.”

As long as the Snow Dallet Trees could be recovered, the bad consequences of this incident could be greatly reduced. Vantis hurriedly said, “Thank you sir. At present, the eastern part has been completely sealed off, especially for the few empires that can travel through teleportation. Sir can arrive in the eastern region first, then activate [Divine Spying]. I believe that the cultist must be unable to escape.”

Isyorul nodded slightly, turned his hand over, and the dim blood bead had already appeared in his hand. His eyes shot out with fiery breath, “No matter who you are, this time, you can’t escape my hands!”

TL: It seems like Chen Rui will fight Isyorul inevitably. Will the elf tribe protect him? Or he will leave as to not burden the elf tribe?

chapters.title: Chapter 695 - The True Essence
chapters.body:
Chapter 695 - The True Essence

The Jade Forest Sea, in the mechanics room of the Purple Heart Treehouse.

Finoia and Bernd were carefully appreciating a long sword which was forged by Chen Rui just now. It didn’t take much time. The shape looked very simple. It seemed that any ordinary blacksmith could create it. However, the looks of the 2 mechanics’ grand masters seemed very serious.

“This sword is quite good. It seems clumsy but it hides the ingenious principles. It has the essentials of mechanical skills. Although its grade is only excellent grade, the level of production has surpassed the level of the Master.” Finoia’s eyes flowed with undisguised appreciation, “It turns out that Sir Richard is a dual quasi-grand master of magic circle and mechanical skills. It is really amazing.”

“Please don’t mind my inadequacies, grand masters.” Instead of this kind of appreciation, Chen Rui hoped to hear really useful opinions or even criticisms, “Please give me some pointers.”

Bernd took a sip of wine, “Don’t worry, boy, this guy Finoia has a bad habit, which is to compliment first to make you flattered, then he will kick you off the cliff with relentless criticism.”

Chen Rui smiled and nodded, “This is exactly what I look forward to.”

No doubt, Finoia’s face was stern, “As far as mechanical skills are concerned, your technique, usage and other aspects are fantastic. You even have a certain sense of realization and have reached the quasi-grand master level of forging quasi-artifacts. However, in the eyes of the grand master, you made the most basic mistake, so this sword is quite unqualified. Just like a dead corpse, it is worthless.”

A corpse? Chen Rui finally understood Bernd’s previous metaphor. The elf grand master criticized him really harshly. He didn’t give any face, but Chen Rui was not at all discouraged by the blow. Instead, his eyes lit up, “I would like to hear the details.”

Finoia nodded secretly and said, “When we are learning mechanic skills, there was a sentence that was repeatedly mentioned, ‘mechanics is creating life’. But in fact, not many people can really understand this sentence and apply it to mechanics. Countless mechanics and even mechanic masters have regarded the artifact as the only criterion for becoming a grand master, but they are all wrong. In fact, this phrase that is most commonly heard and ignored is the true meaning of mechanic skills! Take a quasi-artifact as an example. Perhaps your production technology and details have reached a near-perfect state, but no matter how high the attribute is, it is ultimately a dead object. It cannot achieve a qualitative change. That’s why I said that your sword is a corpse.”

Life? This familiar word made Chen Rui reveal a thoughtful expression. Bernd said, “I don’t have Finoia’s eloquence. As he said previously, the hobbit has a saying, ‘The hammer can tell the truth best’. I’ll show it to you.”

Bernd came to the forging platform, picked up the hammer and slammed it. He used pliers to grab a piece of red-hot iron and began to beat it. Under the beating, a sword gradually took shape. It was also an ordinary-looking sword, and the old hobbit’s technique was not special. However, it revealed a kind of spirituality that Chen Rui’s sword did not possess.

“Any equipment is unique, be it an artifact or a non-artifact.” Finoia’s voice sounded in Chen Rui’s ear, “It’s like life.”

Chen Rui was shocked as he suddenly thought of the quasi-artifacts made by blueprints in the Super System- Thunderous Sound, Northsea, Judgment. These artifacts are produced by the system, and the refined purity of the materials has reached 100%. The craftsmanship is perfect, even the grand master can’t reach that level of perfection. It stands to reason that every detail has reached the state of flawlessness, but I have not been able to create a real artifact. It seems that something is missing. Now it seems that the missing thing is ‘spirituality’ or should be called ‘soul’!

Chen Rui realized that he had already unknowingly entered a dead-end previously. I was pursuing all kinds of ultimate perfection, but I ignored the most original and most important thing. It is like a painter who, after years of hard work, has brought his skills to the pinnacle and can copy the works of various famous artists which look very close to the original one. However, he can never become a real master – Although manufacturing and creation are only a word difference, there is a world’s difference.

In the words of another world, it is the difference between ‘skill’ and ‘way’.

As Chen Rui was deep in thought, his eyes became brighter and brighter. The old hobbit, who had been busy for a long time, walked over with the newly built sword. He couldn’t help but be offended when he found that this guy hadn’t even glanced at the sword.

But the elf grand master showed a surprised expression. After Chen Rui came back to his senses, he asked, “You have understood?”

Chen Rui nodded. The old hobbit, who was originally a little annoyed, was taken aback. It took him hundreds of years to understand this, this human kid was actually so fast…

“But it’s 1 thing to understand the truth, and it’s another thing to be able to apply it. I think I have found a new starting point. Maybe I need to comprehend not only mechanical skills, but more.” Chen Rui was speaking frankly. Although he understood the key point, he definitely could not truly understand and achieve a qualitative breakthrough in a short time. In any case, this would be a crucial turning point in his mechanical skills.

“You… really understand?” Bernd felt frustrated, “It seems that I’m really old… Finoia, what are you laughing at? I’m younger than you in terms of age!”

“Sir Finoia, I will stay in the Jade Forest Sea for a while. Can I come to consult you again these few days?”

Seeing the elf grand master nodding, Chen Rui was overjoyed and said to the old hobbit, “Sir Bernd, can you give me this sword?”

“You finally thought of this sword? Hmph, don’t even think about it, cunning human!” The old hobbit pressed on the sword, “Unless you have something good in exchange, preferably wine. This guy’s so-called orchid fragrance wine tastes pretty good, but it is not strong enough. The hobbit likes to drink…”

Before Bernd finished speaking, his eyes widened with the intense fragrance of wine, “Good smell!”

Even Finoia couldn’t help but look at the bottle of wine in Chen Rui’s hand. The old hobbit strode forward and stepped up to Chen Rui with a step length inconsistent with his height. He slid the sword into Chen Rui’s hand, then grabbed the wine bottle. At this moment, a red figure flicked toward the old hobbit’s hand. It was Ms. Duoduo who had been comforted so obediently previously.

Ms. Duoduo had always felt bored. Seeing someone actually dared to grab her daddy’s thing now, she launched an attack immediately.

The old hobbit seemed taken aback, but Ms. Duoduo’s launching missed a little. The wine bottle had fallen into the old hobbit’s hands, “Hey, the bird you raised is so ferocious. Isn’t it just a bottle of wine? You can learn other things from Finoia, but don’t learn that kind of petty style!”

Ms. Duoduo was about to continue launching when Chen Rui gently caught her in his hand, comforting her.

“Dad, what is that? Duoduo wants it too!”

Chen Rui didn’t want his adopted daughter to develop the drinking habit since she was a child, so he quickly said, “Duoduo can’t eat that. Dad will feed you the fire element crystal when we go out later, okay?”

“No! Duoduo wants that bottle!”

“Fire element crystal plus grilled fish!”

“Add another pudding!”

Chen Rui didn’t expect that the adopted daughter had learned how to bargain without teaching. Just as he was feeling embarrassed, the old hobbit over there could not wait to take a sip of wine. After just sipping it, he appeared extremely intoxicated and full of praise, “Good mellow taste! The taste is excellent, especially the lingering aftertaste. What kind of wine is this? I have been drinking wine for hundreds of years, and this is the first time I have tasted this fine wine! The orchid fragrance wine is simply boiled water by comparison!”

Chen Rui gave another bottle to Finoia and replied, “This is called the aromatic millet wine. It is… left to me by my grandfather. It is brewed with a secret formula.”

These top-quality aromatic millet wines were naturally produced by the Demon Realm. When Chen Rui took out the aromatic millet wine, he thought about the people in his mind. A few days later, the faith crystal will be converted to almost 1 million, and I can return to the Demon Realm to reunite with my family and friends. Before that, I must seize the time to learn more from the 2 grand masters not only for my mechanical skills, but also to increase Teacher Tetenis’ chances of survival.

“Deal!” The old hobbit slammed the table with force, “I will also stay at the Purple Heart Treehouse these days. I will give you pointers with Finoia, but every time I come, I must have a bottle of such aromatic millet wine!”

“No, 2 bottles.” Finoia added, and the 3 smiled at each other.

A few hours later, the students who had the trial in the Purple Forest unanimously felt the mysterious force field fluctuations around them. Under the tremendous power, they were involuntarily sent back to the entrance.

The students shouted out in surprise, “Didn’t he say that the trial time is until the end of the day? Why did it end early?”

A calm voice sounded, “It’s very simple, because 6 magic circles of the trial were cracked by someone other than the student, so for the sake of fairness, it ended early. The current result will be the final.”

“Why must it be whatever you say? Master Taranna, who is this guy?” It was the ignorant young man who had conflicted with Chen Rui in the restaurant.

“Melodan! Shut up!” It was Philly who actually spoke. The elf master politely bowed to ‘this guy’, “Sir Finoia.”

It turns out that this is the mechanics grand master of the elf tribe! The 3 teachers of Starlight College were taken aback and hurriedly bowed. Landbis saw Chen Rui next to the elf grand master. She was shocked when she thought of the sentence ‘6 magic circles’ just now.

“Teacher! Richard!” Michelle, who was waiting in boredom, was playing with Blanche who arrived later by the lake. Seeing Finoia and Chen Rui coming out, she hurried over.

“Michelle, don’t be rude, you have to refer Richard as ‘sir’. Taranna, Sir Richard can enter and exit the Purple Forest at will without notification. He will stay in the celestial capital for a period of time. If you have the opportunity, you should learn from him more. I believe you will benefit a lot.”

When Taranna heard the teacher’s title for this human youth, he knew that the other party’s level had surpassed the master level with at least the quasi-grand master level. He solemnly bowed to Chen Rui with an incredible expression in his eyes.

Chen Rui bowed back to Taranna and said, “Sir Finoia has overpraised. If I have the opportunity, I will communicate with Master Taranna. As for Her Highness Michelle and Ms. Blanche… It’s thanks to them that I can come to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. We are friends, so we don’t need to be so formal.”

When Blanche heard the word ‘friends’, her eyes trembled slightly as she lowered her head in silence. Finoia nodded to Chen Rui. Then, without talking to everyone, he turned around and walked into the woods, disappearing in the blink of an eye.

Without waiting for Chen Rui to mention the bet, Landbis had already walked over, “Sir Richard, our students were rude just now, and I now apologize to sir and Your Highness Michelle on their behalf.”

TL: Time is ticking, whether is it the faith crystal conversion or Isyorul’s pursuit, can he make another breakthrough and become a true grand master? Btw, will he entrust the elf tribe to take care of Duoduo?

chapters.title: Chapter 696 - Fiancée
chapters.body:
Chapter 696 - Fiancée

“Shouldn’t you all apologize?” Michelle disliked Landbis all along, so she said with dissatisfaction.

“Don’t go too far, Michelle.” Philly frowned, “Senior Landbis is from the Blue Glory Empire…”

“Forget it, Michelle.” Chen Rui gained a lot today and was in a good mood, “There is no need to care about these people, let’s go.”

“What does ‘no need’ mean! I dare you to say it again!” It was Student Quinn with a cold and arrogant expression. His eyes were full of provocation. From the eyes of such a ‘genius’ who had received much attention, the plain dismissal was more humiliating than being slapped in the face directly.

“You can’t afford to lose, and you still want to argue?” Chen Rui glanced contemptuously at the students who looked bad. “You can tell from the quality of the students that the Starlight College, which is famous across all empires, is just that.”

Quinn was furious and was about to make a move when a sturdy college teacher came forward, revealing an aggressive mental oppression. “Students can apologize if they are rude, but if you insult Starlight College, you must give us an explanation.”

This teacher’s name was Andrew, and he usually protected his shortcomings the most. He was already secretly dissatisfied with the early end of this trial. He dared not say anything in front of Grand Master Finoia previously. Now, when he heard the other party ‘questioned’ Starlight College, he immediately began to bring up the matter with it.

“Is this an insult? I kind of understand why there are such students. It turns out that there is a teacher who has misled the children.” Chen Rui smiled with a hint of coldness, “As for the explanation…”

At this moment, Ariel, the red-haired girl with a talent for spirit sensing, shivered suddenly. Her gaze toward Chen Rui was full of fear.

Andrew suddenly felt enveloped by a terrifying mental oppression. His tiny oppressive breath was like a candlelight under a violent wind; it was instantly extinguished without a trace.

There was an extremely harsh murderous qi in that momentum which seemed to be condensed from the blood sea and the corpse mountain. It frightened Andrew out of his wits. He instinctively felt that as long as the other party made a move, his body and soul would be annihilated immediately. His body could not help but tremble slightly.

Except for Ariel, most of the students behind did not notice Andrew’s abnormality. But Turiave, another sturdy teacher, sensed the crisis. A thick yellow mirror-like light glowed all over his body, and with a tap of his feet, he was already blocking in front of Andrew, “Be careful!”

As Turiave made a defensive posture, his figure suddenly stopped and froze in place.

“You should feel fortunate that this is the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. Considering the face of the elf tribe and Grand Master Finoia…” Chen Rui scoffed coldly and did not continue. He said to Michelle and Blanche, “Let’s go.”

Seeing Chen Rui turning around disregarding everyone else, the students were furious. Quinn couldn’t hold back anymore. A long sword appeared in his hand, and he had already jumped in the air. With a violent shout, he was just about to slash when he saw a dazzling flame, and the air instantly became hot.

The strong sense of crisis made Quinn hurriedly parry with his sword, and he was immediately knocked over by a strong force. After all, he was among the top 10 students in Starlight College. The young genius who was about to be promoted to Saint, flipped upside down several times in a row, and barely stood firm. He felt the terrifying heat coming from the sword in his hand, and he could no longer hold it firmly, so he let go. When it fell to the ground, the blade of the sword had actually melted and changed its shape!

Chen Rui, who had already walked far away, called out. A small red figure flew back to his head and chirped a few times like a demonstration of prowess. Only then everyone discovered that it was actually the little red bird that shot the flames at Quinn.

Although they were shocked, there were many aggressive ones among these students. They were about to rush to besiege when they heard a trembling shout, “Don’t move!”

It was Turiave who blocked in front of Andrew. His body was soaked in cold sweat, and blood was oozing from his nostrils and ears. The mirror-like thick yellow light on Turiave’s body shattered suddenly like fragile glass falling on a stone slab. Turiave’s sturdy body shook as he spat out a mouthful of blood.

The students were shocked. Turiave is the defensive instructor of the college who has stepped into the real Saint. His unique earth mirror barrier can resist the joint attacks of several Saint powerhouses at the same time. Yet, he was defeated in a blow!

“Peak stage of Saint…” Turiave managed to utter 4 words from the gap between his teeth before he vomited a mouthful of blood and fainted.

The students were shocked. The man who did not look eye-catching is actually standing at the highest stage of power in the world…

If the other party really wants to kill us, except for Philly who is an elf, I’m afraid that no one can survive. Many people had expressions of rejoicing after escaping death and fear. Only Landbis had been staring at the distant figure. Her beautiful mirror-like eyes flashed in splendor.

“Richard, your bird is amazing!” Michelle didn’t know Chen Rui made a move just now. She only saw Duoduo sprayed flame at Quinn. Her big eyes staring at the little phoenix couldn’t help but brighten.

“Can you call her Duoduo?”

“Is Duoduo not your bird? Let me touch it please…” Chen Rui slapped his forehead speechlessly, “By the way, Michelle, I will stay in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital for a while, but my diplomatic mission is finished. I don’t want to go back to the Green House again. Is there a quiet place where I won’t be disturbed?”

“A quiet place without disturbance?” Michelle thought for a while, and she looked at Blanche on the side, “Only the place where she lives is the quietest…”

Chen Rui turned his head and looked at Blanche. Blanche was taken aback and shook her head immediately, “No, my place…”

“Will it disturb Miss? Then forget it.”

“Not at all.” Blanche explained. She bit her lip lightly and finally made up her mind, “If you don’t mind it…”

After sending Michelle back to the palace, Chen Rui then followed Blanche to her residence. He then understood why she said ‘mind’. Not only because this was a barren forest far away from the celestial capital and it was a dilapidated tree house, but because it was actually a cemetery.

“You live in a place like this?” Chen Rui frowned, even if there was no ghastly cemetery. The environment here was indeed too shabby which was completely contrary to the exquisite style in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital.

“It’s already considered good to have this kind of accommodation.” Blanche’s face became more indifferent, “For a half-elf.”

The vast majority of elves believe that half-elf was the shame of the elf tribe and discriminate against them. When the elf tribe signed an alliance agreement with the Blue Glory Empire, the object of asylum even deliberately excluded half-elf. Although half-elves were more easily accepted by humans, they did not receive the protection they deserved. As a result, many half-elves became playthings of noble families or powerhouses and could not escape for life.

They encountered unimaginable things outside, and rejection and discrimination inside. As a half-elf of mixed blood carrying an unimaginably heavy destiny, Blanche was quite lucky to be able to stay in the Jade Forest Sea and become good friends with Princess Michelle.

“In the cemetery of half-elves, the tombs were all half-elves’ remains, and there is my father’s cemetery. Michelle should have told you, he fell into the Nightmare Volcano while looking for the springwater of the Fountain of Vitality in the Nightmare Wilderness, and his corpse is nowhere to be found.” A trace of sadness flashed past Blanche’s indifferent eyes, “The elf tribe called this place the cursed Dead Silence Land. I suggest you go to the celestial capital.”

“It’s very quiet here which is suitable for my meditation. If you don’t mind, I’ll bother you for a few days.”

“Meditation?” Blanche showed a knowing expression and nodded, “Well, if you don’t mind the simplicity of the treehouse, just stay in that treehouse for a few days. I will guard under the tree in return for helping me and White Wind in the forest sea.”

The beloved figure guarding his tent at Mountain Xilang back then appeared in his mind. It warmed his heart and he shook his head, “No, it’s not that I don’t trust you, but that I don’t have the habit of mistreating my friends, especially a lady.”

This was the second time Blanche had heard the word friend. The indifference in her eyes seemed to fade a little, “It’s okay, I’m used to sleeping out.”

These simple words revealed the hardships experienced by the half-elf. Compared with the elf of the celestial capital, the life of a half-elf was like the shadow of the beautiful moonlight.

Chen Rui thought for a while and nodded, “Okay.”

For Blanche, accepting good intentions could make her feel the friendship more than refusing. There was no need for excessive politeness between friends.

No doubt, the ‘1-eyed’ half-elf brightened up after hearing this sentence, and a slight smile appeared which actually looked very moving- It’s a pity that the damn blindfold made this kind of attractiveness greatly discounted.

Soon, the half-elf discovered that the tent Chen Rui lent her was actually a luxurious magic room, and her simple treehouse couldn’t be compared with it.

Blanche had a touch of emotion. She didn’t say anything about exchanging, but she just sat quietly under the tree, guarding the human who entered meditation. He was the third friend in her life besides Michelle and White Wind.

Chen Rui entered the refinery of the Super System. In the refinery, he was able to comprehend and experiment in a 1:100 rule, so he could seize the time to digest the knowledge that he gained today.

However, shortly afterward, this quiet place which rarely had visitors, ushered in an uninvited guest.

The beautiful assistant teacher of the Starlight College, Landbis.

Landbis’s beauty was top-notch even among the elf tribe. Her visit to the Jade Forest Sea this time attracted the attention of many male elves including some noble families. This smoothed her journey to the forest sea all the way until she met Chen Rui.

The beauty of Landbis naturally had no effect on Blanche. Even affected by Michelle, she also expressed considerable hostility and refused to allow her to pass.

Landbis breached the half-elf’s ‘line of defense’ in just 1 sentence.

“I came to Richard for an important thing that might affect his life’s fate. If you are qualified to give up for him, then I’ll turn around and leave. I won’t bother him again.”

After Blanche was silent for a while, Landbis met Chen Rui.

“Ms. Landbis, you took a lot of effort to find this place. I don’t like to beat around the bushes. Did you come to apologize or warn me because of the Purple Forest incident?”

“No.” Landbis shook her head with an elegant and charming smile, “Landbis. Sherbert of the Blue Glory Empire greets Sir Richard.”

Chen Rui raised his brows and narrowed his eyes slightly. It is actually her! Landbis. Sherbert, the daughter of the Blue Glory Empire’s Klongter, the only princess of the Blue Glory Empire to hold the title. For Chen Rui, she also had the most special identity – The official fiancee of ‘Arthur’!

TL: Landbis discovers his identity? How? He is completely different from the Arthur she knew right?

chapters.title: Chapter 697 - Recruitment
chapters.body:
Chapter 697 - Recruitment

Chen Rui’s surprise was only fleeting as he nodded, “It turns out to be the most shining pearl of the Blue Glory Empire, the noble Princess Royal Highness. Pardon my impoliteness.”

He said that he was impolite, but his tone was as plain as water as if the most beautiful Princess Royal Highness in the Holy Empire was no different from the average passerby.

In fact, the strength of this princess had reached A+. Putting aside her appearance and status, she was still a rare genius at her current age.

Landbis was slightly stunned, then she smiled wryly, “People cannot choose their birth. Although the royal family looks noble, they are actually like many people. They are just involuntary puppets, but the costumes on these puppets are more gorgeous.”

That kind of pitiful expression was particularly moving. Chen Rui actually had a feeling of a throbbing heart. Fortunately, he had experienced [Refined Mind] training, and there was a succubus little maid who had a charming talent, so he had considerable immunity. He quickly recovered his calm and frowned, “Maybe. May I know why the Princess Royal Highness is coming to me?”

Landbis noticed this detail, and the expression on her face gradually returned to calm, “I don’t like going around in circles, so let’s just say it. I came here today with the highest sincerity, on behalf of my father, the Blue Glory Empire’s Klongter the Great, to invite Sir to join the Holy Sanctuary of the Blue Glory Empire.”

“Holy Sanctuary?”

“Holy Sanctuary is an institution created by the 13th Blue Glory King. Every member is a powerful Saint powerhouse. The Blue Glory Empire is 1 of the 2 Holy Empires that has a strong power and an association with the elf tribe. The members of the Holy Sanctuary can use a large number of precious resources unmatched by the outside world for training. You can read countless classics treasured by the royal families and compete with powerhouses of the same level to improve… If you join the Holy Sanctuary, it is equivalent to the royal high-level guest who will receive the king’s courtesy with the power and status far superior to ordinary members of the royal family. Except for the Blue Glory Empire’s king, you are not controlled by the House of Representatives. The Holy Sanctuary powerhouse can usually focus on training and will only make a move when the empire is threatened or there is an emergency. There is an extra reward every time.”

Chen Rui then realized. It turns out that the Blue Glory Empire also has such an organization. As we all know, the Blue Glory Empire is different from the Dragon Bright Empire. The sovereignty of the Dragon Bright Empire is unique and its rule is quite thorough. Meanwhile, the Blue Glory Empire has an organization like the House of Representatives, which has veto power over many of the king’s decisions, which is tantamount to evading part of the king’s power. There have even been precedents for the removal of kings in history which is naturally unwanted by any king. The Holy Sanctuary should be a trump card in the hands of the Blue Glory Empire’s king. Even if he just holds it, it can have a powerful deterrent effect on the House of Representatives.

For ordinary trainers, even Saint Powerhouse, this temptation was quite big. Putting aside the position of power, it was difficult to refuse the conditions such as the training resources of an empire, competition among powerhouses of the same level, and reading of precious classics.

Unfortunately, these were all useless for Chen Rui. Even if the Blue Glory Empire ceded the throne to him, he would not be interested. He immediately shook his head and said, “These conditions are quite attractive, but unfortunately, I’m used to being loose and free; I’m not used to being controlled by others.”

Seeing his swift rejection, Landbis showed a slightly surprised expression, but she quickly reacted and smiled, “To be honest sir, I have been in contact with many powerhouses. This is the first time I have seen a person like Sir Richard who views fame, wealth and power as nothing. In fact, I envy you very much. My so-called princess is a little bird trapped in a golden birdcage. I can’t control my own fate. If I can, I really want to be like the cute bird on sir’s shoulder, able to find a strong support and live a free and peaceful life…”

There seemed to be some other meaning in Landbis’ words. Chen Rui’s mind shifted and didn’t reply to her.

“The recruitment of powerhouse is actually a task given to me by the emperor as a condition of exchange for a short freedom.” Landbis did not continue on the topic of the ‘little bird’. She sighed, “I don’t know why, but now that sir rejected me, I ironically have a relaxed feeling. I wonder if Sir Richard would like to make friends with an ordinary assistant teacher, Landbis?”

Landbis’ openness gave Chen Rui a touch of goodwill. Naturally, he would not be so resolute to her. He nodded and said, “Of course, it is my honor.”

“Thank you, Richard, please allow me to call it that way. I’m about to leave the Jade Forest Sea. What are you planning to do next? I wonder if we still have a chance to meet again?”

Probably no chance… Chen Rui said in his mind. He naturally wouldn’t tell the truth, “I don’t have a clear destination. I have always traveled around training to pursue a stronger realm of power.”

Landbis showed a thoughtful expression, “I see. You should have heard of the Star Tower of Starlight College, right? The Star Tower will open in 3 months. Even for Saint Powerhouse, it is also an excellent way to train. However, only excellent students within the college are eligible to participate, but each teacher has an additional recommendation quota to someone outside the college. This is actually a way for college to recruit mentors. Although the background of Starlight Empire students is not as good as that of the Blue Glory Empire, it was also extraordinary. Of course, the choice is entirely yours. If you are interested in the Star Tower, you can join a small team I created called Shueisha to get a place through a fair competition. You can rest assured that there are no restrictions or regulations in Shueisha, only some like-minded friends. How about that?”

Shueisha? This name is a bit familiar. It seems to be the publishing group of a certain country in my previous life?

After experiencing the trials and hardships of the Demon Realm, Chen Rui was no longer the casual otaku in the previous life nor the weak Arthur. He instinctively felt that this fiancée was by no means simple.

If the previous method was to lure with benefit, now it is to move with emotion. One thing to note is that in the former, she represents her father, the Blue Glory Empire’s king, to recruit, but now it seems it’s for herself…

Landbis reminded Chen Rui of an acquaintance of the Demon Realm, Celine. But in comparison, Landbis’ means were much smarter. She gave out a friendly vibe from the beginning to end; it was difficult to reject or disgust. Unfortunately, it was useless to Chen Rui, and he answered almost without thinking, “I’m not interested in the Star Tower. As for Shueisha, I’m sorry that I have to let down Your Highness’ kindness.”

Landbis showed an expression of surprise. It was the first time she saw such a person who was so hard to deal with. Her previous alluring charm of men seemed useless in front of this man. If it was just an ordinary genius, it was fine. However, this person not only possessed the great power of the peak stage of Saint, but he was also very likely a grand master who specialized in both magic circle and mechanics which was very rare in the entire world. It was far more valuable than a person who only possessed brute force.

“Sorry, I was abrupt.” Landbis stood up and suddenly asked, “I’m very curious. You don’t care about fame, wealth, power, and friendship. You really don’t have any desires?”

“No, Your Highness made a mistake. I’m actually a very greedy person.” Chen Rui shook his head and asked deliberately, “What if I say that my condition is you, Princess Royal Highness?”

“Me? This condition is a bit unexpected. Judging from the previous performance, I thought you couldn’t care less about me. If your condition is really this… it’s not impossible!”

Landbis’ eyes flashed, “My fiancé is the Second Prince Arthur. Roland of the Dragon Bright Empire. He has been missing for a few years, but Lex the Great insists that he is still alive. This is recognized by my father, whose empire’s interests are paramount, this ridiculous political marriage is equivalent to a heavy shackle, and it is still effective today. This matter is almost a common matter in the entire human world. As long as you have power that surpasses the 2 Holy Empires, ignores all rules, and helps me break this shackle, then I’m your woman… Do you have this power?”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “If I have this kind of power, I don’t need to wander around.”

Landbis revealed an alluring smile, “Then another way, if you can help me to achieve a great strength, and take the key of destiny step by step in my own hands, then I will be very happy to be a partner of this person and bear all ups and downs together. So, the key now lies in you. Do you have this kind of determination and courage?”

Chen Rui shook his head, ignoring Landbis’ expectant look, “I can answer you for sure, I don’t.”

“Can’t even love shake you? You’re the hardest-hearted man I have ever seen.” Landbis took a deep look at Chen Rui and sighed, “I’m sorry, I have disturbed you for so long. Goodbye, I will visit again when there is a chance.”

When Landbis turned and left, Chen Rui spoke, “The world is unpredictable. Perhaps 1 day, your fiance will suddenly appear and cancel the marriage contract.”

“So what? Even without this marriage, as a royal woman, my body, my marriage… everything in the future is also just a bargaining chip for political transactions. I can only be manipulated like a puppet.” Landbis’ voice was a little low, “I just want to be in charge of my own destiny.”

Chen Rui was silent for a moment before he spoke up, “I agree with your will and pursuit, but true love is not a bargaining chip, so is friendship. I don’t agree with this kind of transaction, so I can only bless you, Your Highness Landbis.”

Landbis said without turning her head, “Recently, the eastern region has been very chaotic. The Holy Church has blocked several teleportation empires. All the church elites have been dispatched to conduct raids. They also sent envoys to the Blue Glory Empire to request assistance. I did not return to the empire, but I got the related intel, especially the 2 names, Simon, Richard… As a person with the same name, you have to be careful during this time. If you change your mind, you can come to Starlight College or the Blue Glory Empire to find me any time. I will spare no effort to help a partner.”

Chen Rui was slightly shocked by this intel. It was unexpected. When he heard the last sentence, his eyes flashed and he suddenly smiled, “If there is nothing else, please don’t come and disturb me again, Your Highness.”

Landbis clenched her fists with a strong sense of frustration surging in her heart as she strode away without looking back.

TL: Try to tempt ma boy Chen Rui? Lesson 1: The more you force him, the more impossible for you to get him…

chapters.title: Chapter 698 - Blood Eye
chapters.body:
Chapter 698 - Blood Eye

3 days passed unknowingly.

No doubt, Landbis did not look for Chen Rui again, he was also very relieved for the quietness. During these 3 days, Chen Rui went to the Purple Heart Treehouse twice. Every progress and understanding shocked Finoia and Bernd as if it was after several years of experiments and comprehension. The 2 grand masters naturally didn’t know that there was a special existence like the Super System; they just lamented that he was a ‘genius’.

Finoia’s apprentice, Taranna, had also benefited a lot. The elf master’s foundation was already very firm. After receiving the guidance from the human perspective that was completely different from his Teacher Finoia, he felt that the narrower and narrower road suddenly opened up. His arrogance toward this human had also become true respect.

Under the beautiful and peaceful moonlight, Blanche was lighting a fire and grilling food while Chen Rui was thinking about something; neither of them spoke. When Blanche handed over a roasted bamboo shoot, Chen Rui took it, took a bite, and praised, ” It tastes good!”

Although there was no shortage of food in the storage warehouse, this was Blanche’s kindness. Moreover, it was true that these vegetarian dishes were really delicious after her cooking.

Hearing his praise, Blanche’s 1 eye brightened, but it quickly dimmed again. She rarely asked, “Are you leaving tomorrow?”

In the past 3 days, the half-elf had said no more than 10 sentences to the human, but she had done more than 10 things for Chen Rui: Guarding, cleaning, finding food, taking care of Duoduo…

This was a girl who spoke with action, using a silent dedication to interpret the word ‘friendship’. Chen Rui didn’t say much thank you, but he only showed the trust and tacit understanding between friends.

“Yes.” Chen Rui nodded. In about a day’s time, the faith crystals will reach 1 million. At that time, I will be able to activate the [Star Gate] and return to the long-awaited Demon Realm.

Take the Snow Dallet back to Isabella.

“Oh.” The half-elf girl gave Ms. Duoduo 1 skewer for her to eat. She lowered her head to pick the mushrooms in the basket and asked casually, “Will you come to the Jade Forest Sea in the future?”

“Yes, but there should be very few opportunities…” Chen Rui was telling the truth. After returning to cure Isabella this time, he would come to the human world again after he had collected 2 million faith crystals in the future to obtain the light source power and the wind source power for Zola. He had very few friends in the human world. Although he didn’t know Blanche for a long time, he was definitely a real friend worth making. He would definitely come to the forest sea to visit her the next time he comes back.

However, after getting the 2 element source power… Maybe there will be no next time.

“En.” The half-elf girl’s head was lowered even more. The expression on her face was barely clear.

“This is for you.” Chen Rui handed over a bottle.

The half-elf girl looked at the transparent liquid in the bottle with some surprise, “What is this?”

“Fountain of Vitality, this magic bottle should be valid for 3 months.”

Blanche was shocked. This bottle is actually filled with the Fountain of Vitality that can save the Tree of Nature! The Tree of Nature was the holy tree of the elf tribe which was said to have miraculous power, but it had gradually withered over the past tens of thousands of years. Only the Fountain of Vitality could revive it. Blanche’s father did not hesitate to venture to the Nightmare Wilderness, searching for the legendary springwater of the Fountain of Vitality in order to be recognized by the elf tribe. However, he not only found nothing, but he also unfortunately fell into the volcano, leaving no corpse.

I didn’t expect this human to actually own the Fountain of Vitality. If he gives the springwater to the elf tribe, he will definitely get precious treasures or benefits, but he gives it to me directly!

“Michelle said that the elf empress should be considered as your aunty, who promised your mother to keep you in the forest sea before your mother died, but because of the prejudice of the elf tribe, she cannot give you more care. If you pass the springwater to the elf empress, you will make a great contribution to the elf tribe. In the future, you should not be discriminated against and unfairly treated by the elves. At least, the situation will be much better than the current situation.” Chen Rui looked serious as he said, “You must accept it if you treat me as a friend, but remember to hand it in after I leave. I don’t want to cause extra trouble.”

“En, I understand.” Blanche took the bottle tremblingly and put it in the basket. She didn’t say thank you, but she lowered her head and continued to skewer the mushrooms to prevent Chen Rui from seeing her red eyes. After tossing it several times, the mushrooms were finally skewered on the bamboo skewers and grilled on the fire.

The 2 were speechless at the moment. After the half-elf girl finished roasting the bamboo shoots and mushrooms, she made some vegetable soup and ate some by herself. Most of it was in the stomachs of Chen Rui and Duoduo.

“I’ll play a tune for you. This is the only memory my mother left for me.” The half-elf girl took out a green leaf and placed it on her lips. A crisp sound slowly played.

This was a lullaby of the elf tribe. The leaf didn’t seem to be an ordinary leaf, and the sound they made was somewhat similar to a flute. The sound was peaceful and elegant which made people feel at ease. Even the usually active little phoenix lightly closed her eyes.

Chen Rui could hear that the half-elf girl was really playing attentively. For the generous gift of the Fountain of Vitality, she didn’t have anything to give back. She could only play a song for her friend to express her gratitude.

Chen Rui closed his eyes lightly. This should be 1 of the most precious gifts he received in the human world.

At this moment, the sound of the music began to become a little weird. Finally, Chen Rui felt that something was wrong. He opened his eyes and saw that Blanche seemed to be trying her best to suppress an agonizing pain. Cold sweat was already coming out of her head, but she insisted on finishing this song.

“Blanche?”

The leaf in the half-elf girl’s hands fell to the ground. Her body trembled slightly, “No!”

Chen Rui hurriedly stepped forward and asked, “What’s happening to you?”

“Why now…” Blanche pressed her left eye tightly. Her nails scratched blood out of her forehead. She gritted her teeth, “Stop!”

Chen Rui suddenly recalled that Michelle had said that the reason for Blanche wearing the blindfold was not blindness, but because her left eye inherited her father’s bloodline and some kind of mutation occurred which possessed a cursed forbidden power. This kind of forbidden power would trigger at night from time to time, so under the strong request of the elf empress and Blanche herself, Michelle never dared to come to her residence at night. The last time Michelle brought Chen Rui to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital was at night; Michelle was also reprimanded by the elf empress for that.

“Richard! Get out of here! Hurry! I can’t control it!”

“I can help you! Let me take a look at your eyes!” Chen Rui wanted to help Blanche get rid of this so-called forbidden curse. He grabbed her hand that pinched her forehead and used the [Analytical Eyes] to tell Duoduo to fly back to the treehouse and not come out for now.

“No! Leave now!” The half-elf girl’s voice had a rare cry.

Suddenly, Chen Rui felt a terrifying destructive power surging out of her eyes. The blindfold actually burned. His hands were also shaken away. The bleeding red pupil was revealed. On 1 side was the dark blue pupil, and on the other side was the blood red pupil. They looked particularly strange.

With Blanche’s left eye as the center, traces of intense breath radiated out. This breath had far surpassed her own Demon King level strength, and even reached S level. The half-elf girl’s body began to radiate blood-colored flames, and the plants in the cemetery area began to wither and scorched quickly. A strange and powerful destructive power struck Chen Rui’s body directly and began to destroy everything rampantly, but the Super System quickly came into play, quickly offsetting and devouring this destructive power.

Chen Rui looked up and found that the moon had turned blood red. He was shocked and suddenly realized that the surrounding scenes had changed drastically.

In an instant, the moonlight, cemetery, and treehouse were all gone. It was all molten lava like a blood sea. The sight was distorted in the high temperature, and the air was full of suffocating heat.

This familiar scene shocked Chen Rui. He faintly heard the crying sound from the front, and he immediately shouted, “Blanche! Where are you?”

The crying sound was unclear. It was mostly covered by the bubbling sound of magma grunting. Chen Rui sensed that in this scene, his vitality actually had a tendency to be weakened gradually just like a game that kept losing HP. Even if no enemies appear, one would eventually die of losing HP.

Chen Rui’s mind moved, and a little blood color appeared in his eyes. His whole body seemed to be integrated into the world full of destructive breath. The corrosive force could no longer have an effect on his vitality. This was a new mystery in which he understood the 6-star evolution- He, the original body, could activate Shura’s power to a certain extent when Shura was not used as an avatar.

Many strange figures suddenly appeared in front. They were wearing golden-red armor while holding a long whip surrounded by flames and electric light, exuding a terrifying breath.

Chen Rui was shocked because he had seen this powerful and terrifying creature before somewhere. Blazing flame witch!

However, with Chen Rui’s strength now, he could see that these blazing flame witches were nothing but phantoms. The light in his eyes changed again, and the magic power from the mirage penetrated into space.

Gradually, the phantasms of the blazing flame witches disappeared, the color of the blood sea also dimmed a lot, and the line of sight began to become clear. A little girl was floating in the air ahead.

The little girl was about 3-4 years old with both blue and red pupils. Her appearance was delicate and cute, but it still vaguely resembled Blanche’s face. She was crying with strange flames all over her body.

“Mom, where are you?”

“Don’t leave Blanche.”

“Blanche is so scared…”

“Others bully me…”

“Sobs…”

“Blanche!” Chen Rui slowly flew forward, but Little Blanche seemed to be unable to see him. She was just crying.

“I will protect you, Blanche.” Chen Rui spread his hands, and a magical force gently wrapped Little Blanche.

Little Blanche seemed to hear something. Under the comfort of that kind of warm power, she gradually fell asleep. The surrounding blood sea scene quickly faded, and finally, the scene returned to the original cemetery under the moonlight.

Blanche laid in Chen Rui’s arms. The terrifying destructive power had disappeared without a trace. Her beautiful face had a serene expression with her eyes gently closed and her long eyelashes were slightly raised. She was asleep like that little girl in space.

TL: So, her father is one of the blazing flame witches? Is she somehow related to the Abyss Family?

chapters.title: Chapter 699 - Crisis Is Approaching
chapters.body:
Chapter 699 - Crisis Is Approaching

Chapter 699: Crisis is Approaching

Note: 4 chapters for today! 🎉 Patreon monthly community goal has been achieved!

In the morning, Blanche opened her eyes and found herself sleeping in the magic tent, covered with a comfortable blanket.

The half-elf girl vaguely remembered that when she was playing a tune last night, her forbidden left eye suddenly triggered. Later… she couldn’t remember clearly what happened. The only clearest feeling was a very warm embrace that had been long-lost.

Blanche glanced at the human who was making a fire and cooking outside the magic tent. For some reason, she suddenly felt that her heartbeat was a little fast. This strange feeling was unprecedented, not only for this human, but also for other men.

Chen Rui was sitting outside with a pot in front of him while the little phoenix Duoduo was fluttering on the side. Duoduo looked particularly restless today. Her chirping was full of anxiety.

“Dad! dad!”

In the [Analytical Eyes], the little phoenix’s voice was crying.

“Don’t leave Duoduo!”

“Duoduo wants to go together!”

“Duoduo hates daddy!”

Chen Rui grabbed the little phoenix lightly, stroked her head in his arms, and sighed, “Dad also can’t bear to part with Duoduo, but the current strength of dad is not enough to take Duoduo away. Dad swears by my life that I will definitely come to pick Duoduo back. At that time, Duoduo will see several mothers and live a happy life together, okay?”

Chen Rui really wanted to take Duoduo back to the Demon Realm, but unfortunately, he really couldn’t go through the [Star Gate] with the little phoenix. The little phoenix would be rejected and stay in place. This was confirmed before he came to the Jade Forest Sea.

The little phoenix had a deep attachment to Chen Rui; Chen Rui also truly regarded Duoduo as a family. Because of this, he had been afraid of her being sad previously and did not tell her that he was about to leave.

However, the 1 million required to teleport to the Demon Realm would be gathered this afternoon. The [Light Annihilation Seal] in Isabella’s body might kill her at any time and must not be delayed, so today should be his last day in the human world. He must leave.

He was not sure if the next level of evolution of the Super System would allow him to carry a complete life entity across space. In any case, when he returns to the human world next time, he must try to take the little phoenix back home.

No matter what he said, the little phoenix kept crying non-stop. She jumped on his left arm and pecked desperately with great strength which hurt Chen Rui. The little phoenix was knocked away by the automatic defensive power in his body, but she cried and rushed forward to peck again. Chen Rui sighed. He retracted all the defensive power to let Duoduo peck his arm till it bled. He could only comfort her.

At this time. Blanche walked out of the tent and was surprised to see this scene, “What happened to Duoduo?”

The half-elf was not Michelle. If the little elf princess was there, the question ‘what’s wrong with your bird’ would definitely shock all sentient beings again. Chen Rui lovingly looked at the little phoenix who was still leaving blood marks on his arm, “She is sad because she is about to part with me. The place I’m going to is very special. I can’t take her with me for the time being… So, before I come here next time, I would like to ask you to take care of Duoduo for me, okay?”

Blanche was stunned. Her eyes lit up suddenly, and she nodded vigorously. She knew very well the relationship between Duoduo and Chen Rui. Leaving Duoduo in her care was not only a kind of trust, but it also meant that this human man would definitely come back to the Jade Forest Sea and appear before her in the future. I don’t know at that time if he will…

The half-elf blushed and didn’t dare to think about it. She suddenly felt not used to her face and realized that her blindfold had disappeared. She was taken aback and hurriedly searched for cover. At this moment, a hand passed over a pair of glasses.

“This is a pair of magic glasses that I made at the last minute which can change the color of your pupils. They can also confine some of the abnormal changes in your left eye. If you drop a drop of blood on it now, then no one can take it off except yourself.” The human’s gentle voice sounded, “This should be my first work after comprehending a certain knowledge, if you don’t mind being a guinea pig.”

The half-elf bit her lip lightly, took the glasses and dripped a drop of blood on them. The glasses suddenly glowed with a dark golden light as if they were part of her body. After putting them on, she felt an unprecedented coolness and comfort in her brain, especially in the left eye. The cozy feeling replaced the original faint burning feeling just like the warm embrace in that memory.

A faint mist rose from the glasses, making the half-elf’s sharp sight blurred while the hazy figure in her heart became clear.

“It looks suitable.” Chen Rui smiled slightly. To be honest, the moment the half-elf threw away the blindfold and put on the glasses, it gave him an amazing feeling. She was also a beauty with glasses. Zola looked mature and moving while the half-elf girl was a delicate girl. If she wears a student outfit with a book…

Soon, Chen Rui got rid of the distracting thoughts from his mind. He pointed to her eyes and asked, “I want to take the liberty to ask if your father ever had some kind of abnormality? Have you heard of anything about your grandparents?

Blanche shook her head, “My father is just an ordinary half-elf. The only special thing is that both his pupils are red, but there is no such forbidden power as mine. Her Majesty Empress once said that my grandfather is an elf, but Her Majesty has never mentioned my grandmother.”

Chen Rui nodded. In Blanche’s left eye, it should be the power of the Abyss Family, and it is very powerful. Fortunately, it has not fully awakened yet. Her father didn’t have the ‘forbidden power’, it could be that the bloodline power has skipped a generation. In this way, the Abyss Family has not only appeared in the Demon Realm, but they also have their traces in the human world. In any case, Blanche is innocent. Now that I helped her seal the bloodline power of her left eye in advance, it shouldn’t happen again if there are no accidents in the future.

Chen Rui did not talk about this issue anymore. He handed over a space ring, “I should have given you this space ring yesterday, but I forgot it. Please accept it. There is a Fountain of Vitality and fire crystals in it which Duoduo usually consumes. Please take care of Duoduo in the future.”

The half-elf girl knew what a space ring was. Almost every elf had 1. Only she, a half-elf, couldn’t have it. Now, she finally had 1. However, this also signified the upcoming separation.

Blanche suddenly asked knowingly, “You will come back, right?”

Chen Rui nodded, “I will definitely be back.”

“I’ll wait for you.” The half-elf girl said 4 words softly.

The bright and firm eyes behind the glasses made Chen Rui’s heart tremble slightly. He dared not look directly as he sighed secretly.

Duoduo’s small beak had already stopped pecking earlier. She flew to his head feebly to rest. While Chen Rui talked with Blanche, he did not notice his arm was pecked with a strange blood mark. Under the special physique attribute, it soon disappeared.

A few hours later, Duoduo finally flew to the half-elf girl’s shoulder aggrievedly. Chen Rui was actually very reluctant to bear this cute ‘daughter’, but he showed a smile on his face. It was time to leave.

Chen Rui’s departure did not disturb too many people. In addition to Blanche and Duoduo, there were also Finoia and his apprentice, Bernd as well as Michelle. Surprisingly, Landbis was also there.

Although the past few days were not a long time, Chen Rui and the 2 grand masters had a very harmonious relationship. He put forward many constructive opinions especially in the design of the blueprint which made them confidants.

The old hobbit said unabashedly, “Don’t let Finoia and I wait too long. Remember to get more aromatic millet wine next time!”

Chen Rui smiled and nodded, and patted Michelle’s head. The girl’s big eyes were a little teary. The last time Chen Rui stood up for her in the Purple Forest, the girl already regarded this human as a trustworthy friend in her heart.

Taranna lowered the arrogant head of the elf tribe and bowed respectfully to the human. He completely surrendered to Chen Rui today. He was even more grateful for those selfless instructions. Chen Rui bowed back. Landbis’s voice sounded, “Take care, Richard, I wish you good luck, I hope… we can really become friends in the future.”

“Teacher Landbis, I also wish you good luck, and hope your ideals will come true soon.” Although Landbis’ scheming and acting were very purposeful, in any case, she was not wrong from her perspective. The magnificent palace was actually a big whirlpool. In front of power, any feelings sometimes appear fragile. If she was too naive, perhaps she would have been swallowed by the whirlpool. Taking destiny into one’s own hands was also Chen Rui’s long-standing faith. Perhaps it would be difficult for him to have an intersection with this fiancee in the future. However, this blessing was sincere.

At this moment, the blue sky above was suddenly stained with a fiery red color. A certain intangible enchantment force began to violently distort. Then, as if some kind of glass was shattered, countless light beams were projected down and shrouded this area.

Everyone was taken aback, especially Finoia and Taranna. They knew exactly what was ‘shattered’ just now – The defensive enchantment of the elf tribe! This was just the outer suburbs of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital where the power of enchantment was relatively weak, but the enchantment collapsed in an instant. Even if it was just such a small piece of sky, the strength it represented was quite terrifying.

There was a trace of green in the fiery red sky and the projected beam of light dimmed a lot. A deep voice sounded, “Isyorul? How dare you ignore the Demi-God contract and attack the Jade Forest Sea without authorization! Does the Light Divinity Temple wants to provoke a war?”

Isyorul? Chen Rui was shocked. This guy actually made a move himself, and it is at this time!

Fortunately, the elf tribe also had a super powerhouse who was temporarily in negotiations to buy him precious time.

Chen Rui used the [Analytical Eyes] immediately to instruct Blanche to take Duoduo to escape from this place. With a thought, a blue light door flashing like stars appeared in front of him.

The faith crystal had a little more to 1 million, but he could use the [Star Gate] to escape to the nearest star point, Venus City in the Starlight Empire! As long as I escape from here, Isyorul’s last [Divine Spying] will fail!

TL: Will Isyhorul let him go just like that?

chapters.title: Chapter 700 - Could Only Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 700 - Could Only Battle

Chen Rui’s mind turned. Before entering the [Star Gate], he did something. His body burst out with a strong light. Several light balls with strong destructive breath shot toward Finoia and Michelle at the same time.

Murder the witness! Michelle could hardly believe her eyes. This trusted friend actually showed such a hideous true face!

After his identity was exposed, he killed the witnesses before leaving to avoid leaving clues… At least, it seemed so on the surface.

It was just like Chen Rui immediately dismissed himself as having anything to do with the mountain hobbits when he met the elf empress.

A few seconds before Chen Rui launched the [Aurora Shot], Finoia heard the reminder in his mind and a trace of understanding passed through his eyes. With a furious shout, the water-like magic waves appeared in front of him, spreading out to wrap everyone. At the same time, sharp blue lights were emitted from his hands as he fought back toward Chen Rui.

However, unexpected things happened. Whether it was Chen Rui’s attack, or Finoia’s protection and counterattack, they were all refracted by several beams of light projected from the air. They did not reach the destination, but were ‘refracted’ to the distance.

This phenomenon was similar to the space barrier, the protective move of Aquarius Holy Apprentice Colina that Chen Rui encountered. The difference was that the refraction of the light beam was continuous. Every time it was refracted, its power was greatly weakened. Chen Rui’s [Aurora Shot] only refracted 4 times before it disappeared without a trace, as did the counterattack of the elf grand master, but the power of this light beam was 100 times stronger than Colina’s space barrier!

Chen Rui was taken aback and he walked toward the [Star Gate] without hesitation. This step was taken, but the position of his body was strangely retreating instead of advancing. He was farther away from the [Star Gate]. This was true whether he moved forward or backward. After a few steps, he was tens of meters away from the [Star Gate]. Chen Rui’s pupils contracted, and he could already sense it. This is by no means a simple 20 meters, but countless partitioned spaces.

Chen Rui immediately used a teleportation in an attempt to cross the space, but after the teleportation, he found that he was still in the same place. He unwillingly activated the [Star Gate] again, but he was still unable to enter as before. The closer the distance was, the wider the distance pulled apart.

Chen Rui’s heart sank. The biggest trump card, [Star Gate], which enables escape at any time, is actually suppressed by such a method!

A gloomy voice in the sky sounded through everyone’s ears, “Pulos, if it was a race war, I would come directly to the center of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, not in such a place! I came here just to hunt down a cultist who committed a serious crime!”

The deep voice had a touch of arrogance, “This is the Jade Forest Sea of Moonlight Goddess, not the Holy Light Mountain! Not only did you break the enchantment without authorization, but you also attacked the mechanics grand master and little princess of the elf tribe which has seriously violated the dignity of the elf tribe. If you still don’t leave, don’t blame me for being impolite!”

“Pulos! Put away those pretentious words! If the Jade Forest Sea insists on protecting this felon, then it must be really ready for war!”

The deep voice sneered coldly, “Exaggeration! This little guy is the so-called felon? He can actually cause a war between the Holy Light Mountain and the elf tribe?”

“Do you know what he did? He sneaked into the Holy Light Mountain and destroyed 3 Snow Dallet Trees!” Isyorul’s voice sounded colder, “Now, Pulos, are you sure you want to stop me?

The people below were shocked; even Landbis could not help but take a breath. What are the holy trees of the Holy Light Mountain? Not only is it a sign of faith, but it also involves many secrets related to miracles. In terms of status, it is almost equivalent to the elf tribe’s Tree of Nature. It is unexpected that ‘Richard’ actually caused such a big issue. He completely destroyed the 3 holy trees!

The elf’s super powerhouse, Pulos, was silent. Only after a long while did he ask, “It’s just this human?”

This question had already expressed the attitude of the elf tribe.

The attitude of the elf tribe’s super powerhouse to stay out of the incident was expected by Chen Rui. He didn’t want to hurt his friends anyway. What he really didn’t foresee was the failure of the [Star Gate]. Losing this escape trump card was tantamount to a desperate battle.

“Yes, this guy is good at changing appearance and escaping. Even the holy apprentices are deceived, so I had to activate power to break the enchantment and directly imprison this area. As for the rest, they are just victims who are being deceived.” Isyorul immediately answered. As the light flickered, everyone else was moved out and appeared in the distance except for Chen Rui in the light beam area.

This move made Pulos determined, “Then the elf tribe will not intervene in this matter again, but the Holy Light Mountain must compensate for the destruction of the enchantment in the future.”

“Okay!” Isyorul’s figure appeared in front of Chen Rui. This was a handsome man with brown hair and blue eyes. He was wearing a blue-gray robe with a book under his arm, looking like a polite scholar.

Race: Human (Mutated).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SS.

Physique: SS, power: SS, spirit: SS, speed: SS.

[Analysis]: Fire attribute, space ability.

Degree of danger: Extremely dangerous!

The strength of SS! Fully kingdomized level! Wait… His race is ‘human’? Not ‘angel’? Chen Rui recalled that Capricorn Holy Apprentice Clark once said that Isyorul was a 4-winged angel, so he couldn’t help but wonder.

In any case, this would be the strongest enemy he had faced in his life. Although the opponent did not reveal a special momentum, Chen Rui had a hunch that the strength of this ‘4-winged angel’ was even beyond the Octopus King or Lich King in the Dead Sea!

Even the Holy Dragon Rodriguez, whose kingdom was destroyed and had only a crippled soul, was not as good as Isyorul who was currently in the optimum stage.

Isyorul saw Chen Rui’s previous failed attempt, and he showed an expression of contempt, “Don’t waste your time! I know you have a special talent for space. You fled in public at the Holy Light Mountain and used this trick to confuse the senses to hide and escape the encirclement and suppression of the holy apprentices. Unfortunately, in my eyes, this ability is just a trivial trick. This is my kingdom. There are countless separate spaces. Your space door has been locked by my kingdom power. Unless you can defeat my kingdom, otherwise, even if I don’t attack, you will never be able to enter the space door.”

Chen Rui took a deep breath. His Star Power channeled at high speed, seeming to make his last desperate fight.

“Ignorant ant, haven’t you realized what kind of existence you are facing?” Isyorul’s eyes were full of disdain. “Blasphemer, I, the 4-winged angel, give you the last chance to tell me the location of the Snow Dallet Trees. I can grant you a pain-free death! Otherwise, your body and soul will live forever in the agonizing torment!”

“Angel?” Chen Rui gave a mocking expression, “I don’t know what made you abandon the true identity of a human, or is it just a trick to deceive yourself and others? As for blasphemy… Compared to those who stole faith power, I can be regarded as the most loyal believer of the Light God!”

Isyorul’s face changed slightly. He did not expect that this ant actually exposed 1 of the biggest secrets of the ‘angel’. His body was full of vigor, and his 4 fiery red light wings appeared behind him. The entire area where the light beam was cast was instantly filled with pressing scorching breath. The terrifying coercion made Chen Rui feel like being pressured in the boulder. Despite the comprehensive strength of S+, he was actually unable to move at all.

“I won’t talk nonsense with you! For the last time, where are the Snow Dallet Trees?” Isyorul’s voice used kingdom power as if it penetrated Chen Rui’s mind and buzzed. He was almost unable to have the will to resist.
