At this time, the powerhouses of the elf tribe had approached as they heard the news. The leader was Empress Liv, but she was informed immediately by Pulos to not come forward. She just came to Michelle’s side.

The trial team of Starlight College also rushed over to join Landbis. They looked at the 2 people in the area of the light beam from a distance. The teachers and students of Starlight College were not ignorant people. The image of Isyorul and the intangible terrifying coercion made everyone look utterly shocked: The legendary angel! Demi-God powerhouse!

In the human world, Saint was already the highest realm that a so-called mortal could reach. However, above Saint, there was a super powerhouse close to God called the Demi-God. This was a collective term like the Demon Realm. Only powerhouses who really reached or approached that level would know that there were 3 levels – Kingdomized, [Armor of Faith], and Pseudo-God.

What surprised the teachers and students of Starlight College was that on the opposite side of the Demi-God, it was actually the loathsome ‘Richard’! However, judging from the current situation, ‘Richard’ was about to be annihilated by angels which made many people gloat.

“Since I can’t escape,” Chen Rui looked straight at Isyorul without fear, his momentum began to rise rapidly, “Then I have to try to bring you down.”

Now that there was no way to retreat, he could only battle.

“This is your answer?” Isyorul was startled, then he laughed as if he had heard the funniest joke. The surrounding space actually shook slightly under the laughter.

The ‘spectators’ in the distance, especially the teachers and students of Starlight College, couldn’t help but secretly ridicule someone’s boastfulness when they heard Chen Rui’s remark. Even if ‘Richard’ really reaches the peak stage of Saint, there is an insurmountable gap between Saint level and Demi-god level. It is just like a Saint powerhouse facing an ordinary Master or Warrior who can be easily obliterated.

Isyorul’s smile froze suddenly because he sensed that Chen Rui’s soaring momentum had far exceeded his expectations, and it was still rising as if some terrifying power was brewing. This actually gave him a kind of dangerous feeling.

Soon after, Isyorul saw the light; everyone saw the light.

The vigorous blue light seemed to burst out with countless brilliance. The entire forest was illuminated at this moment, and even the nearby Silver Moon Celestial Capital felt this shining brilliance.

The bright light gradually converged into the figure. Before everyone could see the specific image, the figure suddenly moved.

In an instant, everyone had an illusion that a meteor was flying toward Isyorul.

The naked eye could no longer keep up with the specific movements of the meteor; they could only feel the burst of brilliance. After a violent tremor of sight, everyone could finally see the situation inside.

Isyorul stepped back about 50 meters. The contempt on his face was replaced by seriousness. There were 2 terrifying drag marks on the ground, and the dazzling figure appeared on Isyorul’s original position, raising his fist wrapped in armor.

At this time, whether it was elf, human or the hobbit, all spectators almost simultaneously held their breaths. The angel is actually punched back by him!

Is this a Saint’s power? Many people reacted immediately, especially Landbis, with incredible light flashing in her beautiful eyes: ‘Richard’ is… a Demi-God powerhouse!

TL: How far is Chen Rui’s strength from the Demi-God powerhouse? Will he try the skill that he hasn’t used before?

chapters.title: Chapter 701 - [Blue Pole Star Transformation]
chapters.body:
Chapter 701 - [Blue Pole Star Transformation]

Chen Rui was wearing dark blue armor. The dazzling light had faded, but it had dots of light like a blue gem… No, the gem was definitely not so deep and gorgeous- Stars! Only the stars had such magnificent splendor!

This full body armor was full of glorious and sacred vibe which made people involuntarily have the intent of looking up at it. Behind it was a pair of huge wings which were elegant and solemn. Isyorul’s red wings were overshadowed compared to this. It was like an ordinary-looking woman stroking her hair coquettishly in front of the peerless natural beauty.

Chen Rui felt the powerful strength surging out of his body. The realization of ‘taking oneself as a small world and integrating the real world’ was unprecedentedly clear without barriers as if every cell was active in this cyclical way. The countless small cycles throughout the body brought out a real endless power just like… the universe.

The strongest battle transformation- [Blue Pole Star Transformation]!

In addition to 1 million aura value, Chen Rui also paid 10,000 faith crystals for the [Pole Star Transformation] this time. It would take more time to collect 1 million faith crystals now.

Isyorul’s pupils shrank suddenly, and it was the first time he saw an [Armor of Faith] with this kind of temperament and power. It made this ant, who was originally only Saint’s strength, instantly soared to the point where it was almost on par with him!

People above Demon Overlord and below God were collectively referred to as Demi-God level, but those who had reached or approached this level knew that the so-called Demi-God powerhouse was actually divided into 3 levels, and there were huge differences in each level.

The first level was the kingdomized territory which was the lowest threshold to enter the Demi-God level. This level of powerhouse had completed the transition from territory to kingdom, but had no believers, so it couldn’t produce the [Armor of Faith]. Isyorul, Octopus King and Lich King of the Dead Sea belonged to the ‘kingdomized powerhouse’. The mirage had no physical entity, and there were certain problems with its own attributes, so he was relatively weaker.

The second level was to establish a complete territory kingdom with believers and strengthen believers through faith power. Not only did the powerhouse owned a [Armor of Faith], but he could also give the [Armor of Faith] to the most pious believers. Only powerhouses at this level could be called ‘Demi-God’ in the true sense. Judging from this point, Satan of the Mountain Seckred who could bestow [Armor of Faith] to Tiffany, was at least the level of Demi-God.

The third level was called ‘Pseudo-God’. The most fundamental difference from the previous 2 levels was the condensing of the rudiment of Godhood, also called Pseudo-Godhood. This was the highest level of Demi-God which could touch the edge of God. Once a Pseudo-Godhood trained into a real Godhood, and turned the territory kingdom into a Kingdom of God, then one could become a real god.

Chen Rui made Isyorul feel amazed not by the sudden increase in strength, but by [Armor of Faith]. Having [Armor of Faith] without the strength of Demi-God means that this [Armor of Faith] was [Bestow], and a believer has such a terrifying [Armor of Faith], then the existence behind…

In the distance, 2 figures stood in the air while watching Isyorul and Chen Rui battling below.

“The origin of this little human being is not simple. Pulos, your decision is very correct. Regardless of the outcome of this battle, the elf tribe will be a bystander.”

“En, it’s a pity… that little guy advanced to the kingdom level by [Armor of Faith] on the surface, but he doesn’t have the real kingdom. So, he is still impossible to fight against Isyorul. This battle will soon have a result. “

Isyorul obviously had the same idea as the 2 figures. Although he was surprised, he still didn’t put Chen Rui in his eyes. He sneered, “Ridiculous guy, you think you can fight against a true powerhouse by just wearing a fake shell? The biggest difference between the kingdom level and Saint is the kingdom power. Your bluffing power is actually vulnerable!”

Chen Rui didn’t talk nonsense. He had already arrived in front of Isyorul in an instant with a punch.

“Boom.” This punch was grasped by Isyorul’s left hand, and Isyorul immediately launched a counterattack. His right hand’s punch was also blocked by Chen Rui. The 2 attacked and defended at the same time, shaking the entire forest.

Pulos in the sky pointed, and suddenly there were layers of green thorns around the woods. These thorns looked like those in Jade Sea Forest, glowing with crystal light. The thorns surrounded the 2 men’s battle, and the tremor of the woods gradually subsided. In the eyes of the elf empress and others, Chen Rui and Isyorul seemed to be much slower, and they could barely keep up with their movements.

Isyorul and Chen Rui both flew out at the same time, then they collided with each other at an incredible speed. The 2 figures kept flashing. In just a few seconds, they had exchanged countless hits. The forest ground kept shaking. Those who watched the battle knew in their minds that if it wasn’t for the protective enchantment made by the green thorns, the aftermath of the battle between the 2 would be able to kill a peak stage Saint powerhouse.

Isyorul repulsed Chen Rui with a heavy punch, but his chest was inexplicably stuffy. This weird phenomenon had appeared several times. This was exactly the function of the new passive attribute, [Punishment], obtained by Chen Rui in the 6-star evolution.

[Punishment] could reflect all the damage suffered. At present, Chen Rui’s Blue Pole Star Level had a 30% activation probability and could reflect 30% to 50% of the damage to the opponent.

While Isyorul was stagnant due to the reflection, Chen Rui took advantage to slash [Aura Blade] in the air. Isyorul dodged, but a faint red mark appeared on the side of his face. He could not help being furious. This ant actually hurts me!

“Ant! See what the real kingdom power is!” Isyorul’s eyes flashed brightly, and the 2 pairs of wings behind him showed a fiery red brilliance. The light beams projected from the sky changed into physical pillars with all kinds of mysterious runes engraved on them. The physical light pillars burst out raging flames and arranged in a strange formation in the sky.

Chen Rui suddenly felt that the opponent’s momentum had soared dozens of times, and he felt a strong sense of crisis.

“Boom!” As a burst of berserk power burst out, Chen Rui flew backward for hundreds of meters. He felt that his arms were about to break apart, and a terrifying flame power passed through the [Pole Star Transformation] armor straight into his body as if it was about to turn his whole body into ashes. Before he could stabilize his figure, Isyorul suddenly appeared in the air. The intensive hitting sound continued. This series of chain attacks actually continued for a distance of nearly 200 meters. In the last impactful punch, Chen Rui was knocked down to the ground like a meteor. A huge pothole was left in the ground.

Isyorul did not use teleporting, but he used shifting instead which could move freely in a large range in the kingdom. Of course, the longer the distance, the more power it consumed. However, he did not pursue anymore because the attribute of [Punishment] was activated again. Half of the previous consecutive attacks were reflected back.

Although only 30% to 50% was reflected, Isyorul also felt the pain like he was attacking an enemy covered with thorns. When hitting the opponent, he would also be hurt by the thorn. He could not help but curse secretly.

This round of attacks caused Chen Rui to suffer a lot, but his eyes were brighter. The real difference between the kingdom-level powerhouse and Saint-level powerhouse was not the absolute difference in the original body’s power, but the kingdom. Isyorul was like the master of this ‘small world’. Under the rule of the kingdom, ordinary opponents couldn’t cause substantial damage to it unless the foundation of the entire kingdom was shaken. Not only that, the owner of the kingdom could also integrate with the kingdom to exert dozens or even hundreds of times the strength of the original body’s power.

From this point of view, even if a Saint powerhouse trained his strength to be infinitely close to the kingdom level (such as Zola), it was impossible to defeat a kingdom level opponent if he had no real kingdom power.

Isyorul was really fearful of the weird reflection and didn’t want to delay any longer. With a thought, a book appeared in his hand. It was the 1 he brought with him when he first appeared.

“Accept your retribution! Sinner! I can’t believe I actually need to use the Judgement Book for an ant!” Isyorul coldly looked at Chen Rui who got up from the ground, and he slowly opened a page, “God said that sinners will lose their freedom!”

Chen Rui suddenly felt his body tighten and could no longer move. This was definitely not some magical power, but a kind of mysterious kingdom rule power. It was impossible to get rid of it regardless via teleportation, [Sneak] or other means.

“Can’t move anymore? Ant! I will smash your body into thousands of pieces, then I will pull out your soul to throw it into the fire of purgatory, letting you suffer the burning pain forever!” Isyorul sneered and turned the page again, “God said that sinners will be punished by thousands swords!”

Countless translucent red blades appeared around Chen Rui. The dangerous breath emitted by these blades was 10 times more than the previous Isyorul attack. If he was hit by all of these blades, even the Pole star armor had a strong defense, it was also hard to escape from being dismembering to death.

Chen Rui did not panic, but calmed down. The Star Power in his entire body was channeling in a special trajectory. There seemed to be an image of something rotating in his black eyes. At this time, if one used the magnifying mirror, one could see that they were stars!

When the half-elf girl saw Chen Rui in crisis, she felt her heart beating violently. Her left eye began to exude destructive breath because of the emotional turmoil. In desperation, she took off her glasses and was about to activate her left eye when she suddenly felt a pain in the back of her neck. She suddenly lost consciousness. It was Empress Liv who knocked her out. Looking at the half-elf who had fainted on the ground, there was an expression of pity in the empress’ eyes. She shook her head and sighed: Not to mention that Blanche’s power is not enough to shake a kingdom-level powerhouse. Even if she can, I can’t let her interfere in this matter.

Without Blanche’s control, Duoduo immediately flew up, flapping her wings to rush into the battle, but she was blocked by the intangible force emanating from the emerald thorns, so she couldn’t get close.

“It’s time to end.” Pulos said in the distance.

Another voice suddenly revealed a hint of surprise, “No! The real battle… has just begun.”

In the kingdom of Isyorul, there were countless star phantasms slowly rotating in a mysterious pattern. Not only was it rotating, but it was also revolving. The center of the entire galaxy was Chen Rui, who was bound by the Judgement Book.

The star phantasms became clearer and clearer and gradually condensed into physical entities. When Isyorul felt the powerful breath of the rule, he could no longer remain calm and blurted, “Kingdom!”

TL: All he needs is just a sparring partner. Will Duoduo also help in this battle?

chapters.title: Chapter 702 - [Pole Star Storm]
chapters.body:
Chapter 702 - [Pole Star Storm]

Chen Rui himself was surprised. This was the first time he activated [Pole Star Transformation]. The current Pole Star Emperor Level was blue, so the system was called [Blue Pole Star Transformation].

The mystery of [Blue Pole Star Transformation] was far more than that. In addition to the qualitative change of power, some skills had also undergone corresponding changes.

The supposedly [Galaxy Territory] activated by Chen Rui became [Blue Star Kingdom] in the state of [Pole Star Transformation]. The original debuff and buff attributes as well as the time limit disappeared. The attribute display was grayed out like there was no function. However, Chen Rui felt a completely different power breath from before. This kind of breath was no longer limited to the feeling of ‘taking oneself as a small world and integrating the real world’. He seemed to be the universe itself. Although it was only a faint realization, it was enough to point out the direction of Chen Rui’s future.

In a sense, the role of the [Pole Star Transformation] was more than fighting. If he could fully understand the mystery of [Blue Pole Star Transformation], then he could enter the next Pole Star Level.

In the field, the 2 kingdom powers, the stars and the flame pillars, repelled each other. The ground in the central area began to sink inch by inch at a speed visible to the naked eye. At this time, little yellow flowers bloomed quickly on the emerald thorns. The peaceful force of nature calmed the violent turmoil again.

Isyorul clearly felt the pure and incomparable kingdom power exuded from Chen Rui which was actually on par with his. He was shocked. A real kingdom-level powerhouse! This enemy hides so well!

Of course, he is not yet a Demi-God, but the kind of terrifying existence with such a believer… is definitely Pseudo-God!

The Snow Dallet Trees are of great importance. No matter what is behind this enemy, I must knock down the opponent and torture the whereabouts of the holy tree today.

“I have locked the space here. Even if you have real kingdom power, you can’t escape!” Isyorul’s Judgement Book glowed in red, and the translucent red blades surrounded Chen Rui from all directions with terrifying crisscross sharp qi. The nearby space showed a series of tiny cracks under the terrifying power.

“Be annihilated under the power of judgment! Sinner!”

The sharp blades turned into countless red light streams which speedily intertwined. A large area of ravine appeared on the ground protected by enchantment. People outside only saw high-speed red light cocoon enclosing Chen Rui.

The ‘silk threads’ of the light cocoon were getting thicker and thicker, and the figure in the middle could no longer be seen. Perhaps the target had been annihilated under the terrifying [Judgement].

This scene made the elf grand master and the old hobbit who were watching the fight clenched their fists in unison. Michelle covered her mouth in panic, and tears appeared in her trembling eyes. Even if she had misunderstood Chen Rui’s previous actions of ‘killing the witness’, the kind-hearted little elf princess couldn’t bear to see her former friend die in front of her.

Isyorul’s pupils contracted suddenly as the figure in the red light cocoon began to become clear. He seemed to be wrapped in 2 huge wings. The red light streams, which were enough to cut the space easily, could only leave dots of sparks on the wings.

When the wings gradually retracted, Isyorul felt [Judgement]’s pressure increased sharply. His facial expression changed drastically. As the wings abruptly stretched out, bright blue lights burst out; the entire light cocoon suddenly shattered.

In the spreading giant wings, Chen Rui hovered in the air unscathed. The shattered countless red light streams blasted back at Isyorul instead. Isyorul was shocked, and he hurriedly channeled his power. Most of the reflected red light streams were diverted to the other side by the space power, but there was still a part of them that was not diverted in time. In an instant, his body seemed to be slashed by countless blades and he became a blood man. This was solely caused by the spent force of his own killing move.

This was another mutated skill of the [Blue Pole Star Transformation], [Star Guardian Wings], which replaced the original ‘defensive shield’, greatly improving his defensive ability. It could also reflect the opponent’s attack within the acceptable range.

“Damn it!” Isyorul didn’t expect that the other party actually had such a strong strength to reflect [Judgement] back. The Judgement Book flashed a soft white light, “God said that the devout believers will get holy protection.”

Under the white light, the blood on Isyorul quickly flowed back into his body. The large-scale lacerations on his body and face were also recovering at a speed visible to the naked eye, but his expression was even more hideous. Now he no longer had the slightest fluke of underestimating him. The opponent’s strength is weird. I must go all out, otherwise the situation will develop to an extent beyond control.

Thinking of this, Isyorul’s forehead split and revealed a third eye. The golden pupil and the breath of his body soared to the apex. At the same time, the Judgement Book in his hand turned fiery red, revealing strange patterns like some terrifying power was brewing.

As Chen Rui waved his hand, several huge destructive light balls appeared and flew toward Isyorul. However, when approaching the opponent, [Aurora Shot] seemed to have touched something that was slippery, and they were repelled into the distance.

Chen Rui felt more crisis in his mind. He slowly floated in the air with his arms stretched out. The blue giant wings behind him completely opened and extended as if they were endless. The spreading wings turned into countless stardust all over the whole [Blue Star Kingdom]. The planets in the kingdom were moving faster and faster and getting more and more blurred. In a moment, the planets had disappeared and turned into a series of high-speed blue stardust. The countless bright stardust drew an irregular death arc in the air which condensed into a giant blue storm.

“[Pole Star Storm]!”

This was the real powerful attack skill in [Pole Star Transformation]. This kind of attack that also carried the law could no longer be diverted. It could only be defended forcefully.

Almost at the same time, Isyorul’s voice sounded, “[Wrath of Flame God]!”

In the eyes of everyone, a huge god-like phantasm engulfed in flames faced the blue storm shining with countless starlight.

In an instant, everyone’s vision was blurred. They could only feel the ground and mountain shaking. Then, they seemed to have lost their vision and hearing, feeling only the storm and flames that resisted each other.

Under this terrifying power, how small was life?

The nearby emerald thorns broke and scorched as they could not withstand this terrifying power. Fortunately, a crystal barrier appeared around them again, blocking the berserk impact.

After a long time, the horrible impact finally subsided. In the center of the battle, all the trees and plants were gone, and the ground was distorted so terribly. Only 2 figures were still standing.

Isyorul’s appearance was extremely miserable. His body was full of terrifying wounds. Several wounds were even deep to the bone. His third eye was bleeding and couldn’t be opened. The Judgement Book, which had never been damaged, was torn to pieces, leaving only a damaged cover —— Fortunately, he made a decisive decision just now to sacrifice the Judgement Book in order to protect himself. Otherwise, he would have been turned into fly ash under the terrifying power of [Pole Star Storm].

When Isyorul rushed to the Jade Forest Sea, he thought it was a sure-win, but he would never imagine that he would fall into such a miserable situation. Not only was he seriously injured, but even the most important Judgement Book was destroyed!

Compared with Isyorul, Chen Rui’s injuries were much lighter. There were faint cracks on the blue armor and a trace of fresh blood on the corner of his mouth, but his expression was extremely nervous because Isyorul had something in his hand. A little red bird.

It’s Duoduo!

“Damn it! It’s actually a baby phoenix!” Isyorul staggered, almost losing his balance. He felt that his injuries were extremely severe. He could not help but gritted his teeth, “If it weren’t for this damn phoenix, you would turn into ashes by [Wrath of Flame God]! I’m going to tear you all into pieces!”

Just now at a critical moment, Duoduo suddenly appeared in the kingdom and used her talent to devour most of the power of [Wrath of Flame God]. Otherwise, Chen Rui would suffer extremely serious injury even if he was not turned into ashes.

Isyorul was severely injured, and his kingdom was about to collapse now. Chen Rui could already activate the [Star Gate], but he couldn’t go because Duoduo was still in the control of the other party!

Duoduo’s expression was extremely exhausted mainly due to devouring the [Wrath of Flame God]. If it was not the special physique of the phoenix, that blow plus the pure fire element power of the [Wrath of Flame God] would have annihilated her.

Chen Rui was distressed when he saw Duoduo’s listless look. He shouted, “Let her go! I can let you leave this place safely!”

“Tell me! Where are the Snow Dallet Trees?”

Isyorul once saw this little red bird and Chen Rui through [Divine Spying]. Now he was even more sure that his relationship with the little phoenix was unusual. After adding force to his hands, Duoduo couldn’t help crying out, “Daddy!”

Chen Rui’s heart trembled. It was even more uncomfortable than his own suffering. A Snow Dallet Flower appeared in his hand, “Stop! Otherwise I will destroy the Snow Dallet Trees!”

As soon as the Snow Dallet Flower appeared, Isyorul immediately felt the sacred power of the familiar light element and knew that it was definitely not fake. The hand holding the little phoenix loosened slightly, confirming the long-held assumption: The Snow Dallet Trees are not destroyed indeed. They are kept by this mysterious enemy in a special way!

“Don’t be afraid, Duoduo, daddy will come to rescue you!”

“Duoduo wants to be with daddy!”

“Daddy will not leave Duoduo!”

“Duoduo must be with daddy!”

“Must!”

Chen Rui took a deep breath and looked at Isyorul with a cold murderous intent, “Release the little phoenix. I will return you the Snow Dallet Trees! If you dare to hurt her, even if you escape to the end of the universe, I will still crush you into ashes! Not only that, I will completely destroy the Snow Dallet Trees and every church I encounter in the future! If no one dares to join the church or lose faith because of this, your faith power will disappear completely!”

“Hmph! Even if you kill all the ants, it won’t have any effect on me!” Isyorul was a trainer who had lived for countless years. Now that he had a hostage in his hand, he naturally wouldn’t let go easily. All of a sudden, he felt a shock in his hands. The little phoenix’s body burst open suddenly.

Isyorul was shocked. He did not launch a killing move at all. It was the little phoenix that blew herself up!

TL: Explode? Why?

chapters.title: Chapter 703 - Shackles Of True Flame And [Fire Phoenix Stigmata]
chapters.body:
Chapter 703 - Shackles Of True Flame And [Fire Phoenix Stigmata]

Chen Rui’s gaze instantly froze and fixed on the burst of flames.

In the dimness, the childish voice still echoed in his ears.

“Got it! Mommy!”

“Daddy! Duoduo wants to play the slingshot game!”

“Daddy, Duoduo can fly!”

“Duoduo wants to go together!”

“Duoduo must be with daddy…” Unconsciously, his body trembled uncontrollably. The fingers of the clenched fists almost pierced into the hand armor.

Isyorul’s explanation got stuck in his throat because he saw Chen Rui’s eyes that had turned berserk crimson red like a flame would burn everything in ashes. He was terrified even if he was a kingdom-level powerhouse proficient in fire element.

There was only 1 answer to this gaze – Either you die or I live.

Any explanation was superfluous.

Isyorul leaped into the sky and shouted as if he was emboldening himself. There were thousands of meteor-like red flames around him, and they blasted at Chen Rui. He actually made the first move.

Chen Rui’s consciousness was already burning with extreme rage, so he didn’t notice a strange mark exuding burning power under the armor of his left arm. At this moment, there was only 1 thought left in his mind: Kill!

The figure in the blue armor turned into a flash of lightning, ignoring the red flames flying in the sky as he rushed toward Isyorul directly.

“Boom! Boom! Boom…” As the red meteor flames hit the target, sparks splashed everywhere. The figure that was hit hard unexpectedly charged toward Isyorul.

Isyorul shivered when he looked at the pair of red eyes. Just as he was about to shift, his lower abdomen was hit hard by the berserk power and his body flew upside down for hundreds of meters. He crouched down with pain, clutching his belly like a shrimp. Bleeding foam was sprayed from his open mouth.

Immediately afterward, a sense of danger came from behind again, and he was struck hard. His unbalanced body slammed directly to the ground. Before landing, a figure appeared below instantly with a knee bump, and Isyorul was slammed into the air. Everyone saw 2 figures constantly flashing in the air accompanied by dense and muffled hitting sounds.

Isyorul barely used the space to shift it away. The robe on his body had been torn into pieces like a beggar. His swollen face was full of bruises, and he kept coughing out blood.

As an aloft ‘angel’ enshrined by the church, Isyorul had never been so haggard. With a furious shout, there was already a fiery red sword in his hand as he struck toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui did not evade, allowing the sword to penetrate the armor. However, before it could penetrate deeper, a fist quickly magnified before Isyorul’s eyes… “Boom!” Isyorul’s nose was dented. The pain was so throbbing that his tears and mucus flowed out. How could he hold the sword firmly? He screamed tragically.

The 2 powerhouses of the elf tribe in the distant sky shook their heads. Isyorul’s momentum has been completely suppressed. His will and fighting spirit are all taken away by the other party. I’m afraid that there is no hope of a comeback.

Isyorul, who was beaten all the way frantically, turned into a honeycomb full of fist marks.

Chen Rui’s mind was full of the small cluster of flame that had previously exploded in Isyorul’s hand. His attacks without defense became more and more frantic. Isyorul had completely lost the chance to fight back and could only barely parry.

“Ah!” Isyorul let out a stern scream. The red light wings behind him were actually torn apart by Chen Rui; blood splattered all around immediately. The elf empress couldn’t help covering Michelle’s eyes. Michelle was really scared, but she still subconsciously hoped that ‘Richard’ could avenge Duoduo.

“Wait a minute!” Isyorul desperately shifted to the distant space with deep fear in his eyes. He would rather face the cooperation of the 2 elf powerhouses than fight with this terrifying lunatic.

Isyorul did his best in setting up space barriers continuously. The broken cover of the Judgement Book appeared in his hand. The cover changed rapidly and turned into red shackles suspended in the air, exuding terrifying breath.

“This is the artifact, Shackles of True Flame, granted by Sir Raphael! If you dare to come over again, I will use the flame of life to spur the shackles and die with you!”

Just after Isyorul breathed a sigh of relief, he saw that the killing intent in Chen Rui’s eyes became more intense. He rushed over at an unprecedented speed in an instant.

Isyorul cursed the madman. He knew that he had to go all out now, so his hands immediately burned with a flame which was the flame of life. Due to this flame, the red shackles began to emit a strong fire element power. The entire kingdom was reflected in red, steaming with an extremely powerful breath.

The Shackles of True Flame seemed to carry some kind of magical power, devouring the flame of life between Isyorul’s hands. Even the blood on his body continued to flow to the shackles.

Isyorul’s face became paler and paler, and his vitality was rapidly fading. Finally, the shackles moved and turned into a huge ferocious beast that pounced toward Chen Rui.

Isyorul’s body softened and sat down slowly. He only had the last trace of vitality. He had completely lost his resistance; even Michelle could kill him at this time.

As soon as Chen Rui used shifting to leap across the space barriers, he saw the terrifying huge beast rushing toward him. A strong sense of crisis surged in his heart. He instantly recovered his senses, and his hands immediately glowed with water-like light. The huge beast was forcefully pulled away, but it immediately turned around to pounce again. If it hadn’t been for Chen Rui to suddenly scatter into flies, the huge beast would have already pounced on him. After that, Chen Rui’s attacks failed to work. No matter how he shifted (mutation of teleportation), the huge beast was always following him like his shadow.

“Stop your futile effort. This artifact has the power of space, no matter how far you shift, you will be caught up in an instant.” Isyorul let out a weak laugh, “No matter how sturdy is your [Armor of Faith], the might of the Shackles of True Flame will turn it into ashes. Your flesh and blood will be devoured by the shackles, and your soul will be imprisoned forever!”

All of a sudden, Chen Rui’s figure shifted toward him, clearly wanting to kill him before being imprisoned by the chains. Isyorul was taken aback. He currently had no power at all. Fortunately, the huge beast’s speed was amazing. “Boom,” it had pounced on Chen Rui.

At this moment, Isyorul suddenly felt that everything around him slowed down. Not only Isyorul, but all the onlookers had this feeling at the same time. Then, Chen Rui, who was supposed to be pounced on, suddenly appeared in front of Isyorul and grabbed the top of his head.

Impossible! Isyorul just had this thought. He paused suddenly, and his pupils began to dilate.

At this time, the huge beast, that arrived later, pounced on Chen Rui.

Chen Rui’s body trembled, exuding an intense flame. The blue star armor on his body was dyed fiery red in the blink of an eye, and his skin had turned completely red as if he was about to burn. However, the flame only blazed for a moment before it gradually converged into his body without any more abnormality. It was as if Isyorul’s ‘turn into ashes’ and ‘devour flesh and blood’ were just bluffing; even the shackles were gone.

In Chen Rui’s mind, the Super System prompted: Found the invasion of unknown law energy. Activate [Aura Protection]? Consumes 1000 aura values and 1 faith crystal every minute.

This cost is very expensive. However, Chen Rui immediately chose ‘Yes’, and the system continued to prompt: [Aura Protection] activated successfully. Starting [Deep Analysis]… The estimated analysis time to determine the attribute – 24 hours.

Isyorul didn’t know this at all. He was stunned for a while. He had seen the terrifying power of the Shackles of True Flame before with his own eyes. Why…

This was the last question in his life. Everyone watching the battle from a distance saw the dazzling flame fading, then Isyorul’s body scattered in pieces and finally turned into nothingness like ashes.

Everyone seemed to wake up from a dream. The super powerhouse of Holy Church and the Demi-God Isyorul was actually annihilated by ‘Richard’!

Finoia and Bernd looked at each other and saw the disbelief in each other’s eyes. The elf empress and others also felt unbelievable. The teachers and students of Starlight College were more afraid than they were shocked. This ‘Richard’ whom we offended has such terrifying power. If he wanted to eliminate all of us, it would be just a breeze!

The only exception was Landbis who sighed secretly. She always thought that she had highly regarded this man, but she didn’t expect to still underestimate him. Such a Demi-God powerhouse, I’m afraid that I will never be able to get his help anymore.

In the distance, Pulos slowly lowered his arms across his chest. His ears suddenly moved, and his eyes flickered for a while. He didn’t make any move in the end.

After Chen Rui turned Isyorul into flying ashes, the raging blood color in his eyes gradually faded. He took a deep breath and looked at the distant air vigilantly. A blue door of light appeared in front of him. After he walked in the door, the door gradually dimmed and disappeared in an instant.

“Kelsa, why stop me? If Isyorul died here, I’m afraid the elf tribe would still be in trouble.”

“Regardless of whether you can take down that human or not, the Jade Forest Sea may have to face the terrifying existence behind him. Do you want the elf tribe to fall into a greater crisis?” Kelsa shook his head, “This matter is fundamentally unrelated to the elf tribe. Furthermore, Isyorul was wrong as he came here and destroyed the enchantment without noticing us. I have used the magic crystal to record everything that happened just now. By then, I only need to send a messenger to give the crystal to the Holy Church – With the Demi-God contract, I believe the Holy Light Mountain knows how to weigh the matter.”

The Venus City of the Starlight Empire.

A blue light door appeared in a long-term reserved hotel room and Chen Rui walked out of it. The Pole Star armor on his body had disappeared. Feeling a burst of irresistible fatigue, he walked slowly to the bed and laid down.

The Shackles of True Flame that Isyorul desperately activated just now was not ineffective, and the Super System prompt was actually generated after enduring the power of Shackles of True Flame. The reason that really freed Chen Rui from damage was that the Super System suddenly had an additional skill.

[Fire Phoenix Stigmata]- Reduce fire element damage 90%. There is a 10% chance to be immune from fire element damage. Increase the affinity with fire element creatures.

Chen Rui clearly remembered that there was no such additional skill before. It should be related to the annihilation of the little phoenix.

Is it the protection that Duoduo used her life to cast…

Duoduo…

My daughter……

In the tears, his eyes began to dim. His consciousness gradually blurred, and he finally fell asleep.

TL: Is Duoduo really dead? What is the signature characteristic of phoenix? Rebirth right?

chapters.title: Chapter 704 - Choice And Return
chapters.body:
Chapter 704 - Choice And Return

When Chen Rui woke up, a day and a night had passed.

The [Aura Protection] of the Super System continued automatically, and the result of [Deep Analysis] was ready.

Isyorul regarded the Shackles of True Flame as an artifact, so it was indeed not an ordinary commodity. According to the Super System, this artifact had turned into a ‘law power’ that stubbornly entangled Chen Rui’s body. If there was no [Aura Protection], the Shackles of True Flame would continue to devour his soul power and life power until he was completely dead.

It was feasible to activate the [Aura Protection] in the short term, but the cost of this protection was quite expensive. It consumed 1000 aura values and 1 faith crystal every minute, which required 1.44 million aura and 1,440 units of faith crystals in 1 day. It had greatly exceeded the current output of the Super System. Although he could still use his savings now, it would be unsustainable in the future.

After the Super System proposed 2 solutions based on the analysis. Once the solution was implemented, it couldn’t be stopped, so he must carefully choose.

The first solution was ‘eliminate the law’ which would cost a one-off 5 million faith crystals to completely destroy the Shackles of True Flame. The time needed was 3 months. During this period, the active aura skills couldn’t be used.

The second solution was to ‘absorb the law’ which would cost a one-off 500 million aura value to gradually incorporate the law power of the Shackles of True Flame into the Super System. However, this time span was a bit lengthy. It was expected to take about 2 years under normal circumstances. During this period, he could not use the faith battle transformation.

If other factors were not taken into consideration, these 2 solutions had their own advantages and disadvantages. The main advantage of the first 1 was the short time. It could be done once and for all, but the restriction of ‘active aura skills couldn’t be used’ had a greater daily impact.

The second 1 could absorb the law for his own use, and it seemed to have a better effect. However, the time delay was longer, and the faith battle transformation, which was the [Pole Star Transformation], could not be used. This would affect the high-level strength; he would be unable to compete with the super powerhouse above Demon Overlord.

Chen Rui chose the second option without hesitation. The reason was simple. He did not know how long it would take to collect the 5 million faith crystals required by the first method, and if he could not use the active aura skill, the [Star Gate] could not be activated. Isabella couldn’t wait. Although the second option required a lot of aura, it was still possible to collect them now.

After collecting 500 million aura values, Chen Rui activated the solution to absorb the law- The [Pole Star Transformation] could indeed fight with a kingdom-level powerhouse, but he had more than 1 battle buff transformation. If he completely relied on this kind of transformation, his own training would only stagnate which would be harmful instead.

In the battle with Isyorul, Chen Rui faintly touched the edge of universe law through the [Pole Star Transformation]. Although it could not be activated again within 2 years, that kind of precious insight was obviously more important from the perspective of training. If he could break away from [Pole Star Transformation] and comprehend on his own, it would allow his own strength to truly enter the door of the kingdom level. At that time, he could most probably directly reach the next level of the Pole Star Emperor.

As he activated the [Pole Star Transformation] in the battle of the Jade Forest Sea which cost another 10,000 faith crystals, the time to gather 1 million faith crystals was delayed again. However, the faith savings stolen by Shura had not been ‘digested’ yet, plus the sleeping time of the last 1 day and night, it would only take about 2 days to activate the [Star Gate] back to the long-awaited Demon Realm.

Chen Rui looked at the pillow habitually, and the little warm body that was nestled in his face was gone. Not even a feather was left. His heart twitched as he clenched his fists, and slowly sat up.

After leaving the hotel, Chen Rui came to the streets of the Venus City. It should be because of the news of Isyorul’s death, the church and the nearby empires stopped the joint blockade, and there were more people on the street.

With a Demi-God-level enemy who could kill Isyorul, this time-consuming and laborious blockade was meaningless and would only expose the incompetence of the church to more people.

Chen Rui walked aimlessly on the street without the little chirping figure on his shoulder. He felt that his heart was empty, so much so that when he passed the Venus City’s Hall of Light, his heart was involuntarily filled with a strong murderous intent.

This murderous intent was quickly suppressed by Chen Rui. Hatred should be directed to the doer only. Isyorul was already dead. If the hatred was brought to these innocent people, then how was he different from the Aquarius Holy Apprentice Colina who killed the young boys?

Chen Rui entered the Hall of Light and watched many believers pray in front of the statue and donate their hard-earned money. He couldn’t help but sigh secretly. People need faith and spiritual support. The believers are not wrong. What is really hateful is those bastards who are dressed in sacred clothes on the surface, but act dirty in the dark.

From lower-level people like Chief Bishop Phil, who harmed the young children, to the higher-level ‘angels’ such as Isyorul, aren’t they fooling the world in the name of Light God by actually using their authority and power to satisfy their own selfish desires?

Countless believers prayed with their lives in darkness and suffering only for the last hope in their hearts. However, it is these angels of God who personally buried their hope and plunged them into deeper darkness, which is intolerable.

I shouldn’t tar everyone with the same brush, but the existence of black sheep is unquestionable. What’s more, there are not just a handful of them. Absolute status and power are often accompanied by decay and darkness. The growth of these malignant tumors will only harm more and more innocent people.

Should I just be an onlooker?

Chen Rui left the Hall of Light quietly without any action, but decided 1 thing in his heart.

Upon walking into a secluded alley, his shadow under the sun suddenly divided into 2.

Shura.

Chen Rui urgently needed to return to the Demon Realm, but there was no rush for Shura.

The evolution trend of the Super System in the future would require more and more faith crystals. The faith power obtained by Shura, no matter how far away, could be directly converted into the Super System and become faith crystals- What is the easier way to get faith power other than the human world?

As long as Shura, the avatar, is not eliminated, he can stay in the human world forever.

As for the removal of some malignant tumors and the rescue of some innocent people while obtaining the faith crystals… Just take it as ‘convenient deeds’.

Personal power is actually limited, but ‘seeing’ and ‘doing’ are 2 completely different concepts.

Chen Rui suddenly remembered a sentence in the anime in his previous life: Although I have only a sword, if I can use my eyes to stop… I can still protect someone, right?

Looking at the familiar face, Chen Rui nodded slightly, and Shura also tacitly nodded. A faint red glow flashed across his eyes, revealing a strange smile as he turned to leave.

Watching Shura go away, Chen Rui felt relieved. He walked out of the alley toward the largest magic shop in Venus City.

When the owner of the store heard what Chen Rui wanted to buy, he couldn’t help but be stunned, “Dear customer, the number of scrolls you need is too many. We don’t have so many stocks. Please wait a few days and we will dispatch the goods urgently. The teleportation portal’s opening hours are approaching. It will probably arrive in 2 days.”

“2 days?” Chen Rui calculated, “Okay, I’ll wait for 2 days. The price is not a problem, but the quantity and quality of the goods must be guaranteed.”

“No problem! Don’t worry, the goods will arrive in 2 days. As for the price… I can guarantee that sir will be very satisfied!” The owner immediately agreed and sensibly did not ask the other party the reason for the large purchase of magic scrolls and blank scrolls. From his experience, the customer’s origins should be extraordinary. It was likely to be a purchaser from a certain empire magician branch or college. Once the relationship was established, the transaction would definitely go on for a long time. Therefore, he would definitely give the customer benefits during the first transaction.

Chen Rui didn’t have the time to figure out the mind of the shopkeeper. The important purpose of ordering scrolls was to learn and apply scroll art.

Magic scrolls were very popular in the human world. Even ordinary people could also cast the magic recorded on a scroll. However, for the Demon Realm, scroll art had been in decline for many years due to various historical reasons. Even in the 3 major magic shops of the capital, magic scrolls were rarely for sale, and the prices were very expensive, so they were rarely used in combat.

During Chen Rui’s visit to Grand Master Finoia in the Jade Forest Sea this time, in addition to getting enlightenment in mechanics, another huge gain was scroll art. In the human world, as a part of alchemy, scroll art was slightly inferior to mechanics and pharmaceutics, but it was also a recognized important subject. This course was offered in both colleges and universities.

Due to time constraints, Chen Rui was newly-introduced to scroll art, but he was inevitably attracted by the mystery of it. The elf grand master gave him 2 books, “Basics of Scroll Art” and “Scroll Art Mastery”, which were the entry and advanced levels of scroll art. The information recorded in these 2 books was quite complete. What was even more precious was Finoia’s own insight and label which were 100 times more precious than ordinary college textbooks.

If he mastered the scroll art, then the Fallen Angel Empire would have an extra bargaining chip when facing the 2 empires. Perhaps, he could resurrect scroll art in the Demon Realm.

More than 100 years later, there would be a large-scale war between humans and demons.

The cause of the war was that they were deported to the Demon Realm, where the environment was harsh, after being defeated by the human coalition army in the ancient war. The demons had always never given up their attempts to return to the ground. Therefore, every 500 years, when the enchantment entrance weakened, they would start a terrifying war.

The Demon Realm was the home of Chen Rui, and the human world was the home of Arthur. As a crossover, he was not the human of this world. He was more inclined to the Demon Realm where his lovers and friends were, but in the eyes of people in this world, he was human. No matter which side won by then, his situation was very awkward.

Chen Rui always had an idea. If the Demon Realm is as prosperous as the human world, is it necessary to continue to start a war for this reason? Of course, there are many unsolved mysteries in this world, and perhaps this kind of war has other reasons, but there are still more than 100 years. As the owner of the Super System, Chen Rui, who also had infinite possibilities, still had time to change something.

At the very least, he had to become stronger and better protect everyone around him.

2 days later, Chen Rui got the scrolls as he wished, and the faith crystals finally reached 1 million. A blue door of light slowly appeared before his eyes.

Behind this door was home.

Chen Rui was a little excited. He took a deep breath and walked toward the light gate.

TL: Homecoming finally… Really wish Duoduo could be there… Shura has his own will to a certain extent, will he be able to evolve in the human world on his own as well?

chapters.title: Chapter 705 - Unexpected Guest At The Dark Moon Residence
chapters.body:
Chapter 705 - Unexpected Guest At The Dark Moon Residence

Chapter 705: Unexpected Guest at the Dark Moon Residence

The blue light door gradually faded away as Chen Rui’s figure appeared on the long-parted land.

In a room in the Fallen Angel Empire’s palace of the Demon Realm,.

As soon as the [Star Gate] disappeared, an immature voice suddenly sounded in his mind, “Daddy! Duoduo is going to sleep!”

Chen Rui was shocked and subconsciously shouted, “Duoduo!”

However, the voice no longer sounded. Chen Rui shook his head vigorously. Is it an illusion? Duoduo is no longer there, and this is already the Demon Realm. How could it be…

The calling of ‘Duoduo’ had already alarmed the guards outside. This was a beautiful woman with a veil and sky blue skin. Although Chen Rui’s face had changed, the special spiritual imprint breath enabled this lamp spirit to recognize the master’s identity. She bowed immediately.

Soon after, a familiar graceful figure appeared in front of Chen Rui’s eyes. On her long golden hair was a delicate crown inlaid with gems. This crown symbolized the peak of the Demon Realm’s power, and countless people yearned for this crown. However, only 3 people in the Demon Realm really owned it.

The moment she saw Chen Rui, that beautiful face moved slightly while still maintaining her usual calmness, but in the bright purple gem-like eyes, the usual cool snow had been melted by the heat.

“You are back.” It was still this faint sentence; a very familiar style.

“En.” Chen Rui felt warm in his heart. He walked straight forward, and held her in his arms. The lamp spirit guards at the door had quietly retreated. This moment only belonged to 2 of them.

The woman moved slightly and closed her eyes. She wrapped her arms around his waist and held the long-lost embrace tight. No matter how noble an empress she was outside, in front of this man, she was just a woman; a woman who loved him. She didn’t need a mask that she usually wore; she just needed to simply love.

This was a rare bliss, especially for the empress of an empire.

Neither of them spoke. Just quietly feel the warmth of the other party.

After a long time.

Shea opened her eyes and said shocking news, “Isabella and Zola have some issues. You should go back to the Dark Moon right now!”

“What?” Chen Rui was shocked. I went to the Dead Sea this time, and to the human world by accident, to get the Snow Dallet after all hardships. The purpose is to treat Isabella. What happened to her? And Zola!

“You’ll know when you go back to the Dark Moon.” Shea sighed when she saw his nervous look. She gently broke away from her embrace, “You should go right away.”

Chen Rui showed an apologetic expression, “I’m sorry, I originally wanted to tell you a lot… but I can only postpone it.”

“Very well, don’t forget your promise. I must be the first person to know these things. This means you can’t tell other women before me, understand? Go now!” Shea revealed a trace of a smile. She suddenly stepped forward and took the initiative to kiss his face.

Chen Rui felt warm as he nodded and walked out the door. Her Majesty Empress added another sentence.

“Resolve Isabella’s issue as soon as possible…We need a bridesmaid for our grand wedding.”

The highlight of this sentence is a grand wedding? Or a bridesmaid? Or is it about… the crystal harem’s secret fight?

Chen Rui’s forehead was a little sweaty as a long-lost feeling of helplessness surged. For some bastard who took things for granted, this was also a kind of happiness.

Chen Rui was worried about Isabella and Zola. After dressing up, he rode a horse out of the capital toward the Rainbow Valley.

A few hours later, Chen Rui appeared in the Rainbow Valley. The sight surprised him. The Rainbow Valley was completely unrecognizable. The original magic circles and inscriptions were completely destroyed. From the perspective of that situation, it was not technically cracked, but destroyed by some kind of irresistible and terrifying power. Fortunately, the laboratory area was not damaged.

What happened?

Chen Rui had an ominous omen. He rushed to the laboratory immediately, shouting, “Zola! Isabella!”

Every room in the laboratory was empty, and the voice of shouting echoed in the valley. Chen Rui couldn’t help but think of Duoduo. His heart was tense. He could no longer bear the shock of losing his loved ones. His gaze turned to the path leading to the space passage of the Dark Moon’s house, so he rushed in quickly.

After the dazzling teleportation, he came to the Dark Moon residence that he hadn’t seen for a long time.

“Zola! Isabella!” Chen Rui’s yelling shocked several people in the yard.

“Chen Rui!” An alluring voice sounded; it was Zola.

This voice undoubtedly sounded heavenly in Chen Rui’s ears. Although there were still a few acquaintances in the yard, Chen Rui only saw Zola at first sight. His hanging heart was finally relieved as he rushed forward to hug her tightly, feeling the familiar fragrance and warmth.

Great, my Zola is fine.

Why would Shea say…

And the Rainbow Valley…

Why do I hear someone coughing? Sigh… Whether it’s lovey-dovey or paying more attention to a lover than friends, just let those 2 bastards laugh as they wish.

“When did you come back?” Zola let Chen Rui embrace her. Her charming eyes squinted, and she looked ecstatic.

“I just came back.”

(He cares so much about me, calling my name as soon as he came back, and embraces me so warmly. Wahahaha! It seems that I am the woman he values most!)

(How did I learn “Wahahaha”? It seems to be taught by a little princess…)

(Hmph, it’s a pity that Athena and Kia are not present… Also, he seems to call Isabella? No matter what, the first name is me!)

“Cough…“

The coughing sound became louder on the side. Chen Rui heard Paglio’s voice. He relaxed his arms and scolded, “You dead duck dragon. Are you having a cold or is it envy and jealousy?”

“Your whole family is…” Paglio put on a smile before he finished mocking, “Erm… Sir Auglas, this is Chen Rui.”

Auglas? Chen Rui’s mind moved, and he finally saw a stranger sitting in the yard.

This was a man with short black hair who was about 30 years old. His face was cold and stern with thick eyebrows and a mustache. His dark pupils were full of vicissitudes and depth. The man was just sitting there, but he gave Chen Rui, who had already used his spirit sensing, an almost ethereal illusion as if he could disappear at any time. Therefore, he didn’t notice that man immediately.

Race: Dragon (Black dragon).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to determine.

[Analysis]: Extremely dangerous!

Chen Rui was shocked. With his current strength, even a kingdom powerhouse like Isyorul would show specific information prompts, but this dragon man’s prompt was ‘Unable to determine’. Then, there is only 1 reason. He possesses a powerful strength above the kingdom level- Either Demi-God or Pseudo-God!

Why does such a powerful dragon appear here?

Chen Rui frowned when he thought of what Shea had said about the ‘issue’ and what he saw at the Rainbow Valley. He was about to walk over, but was held tighter by Zola. Ms. Fairy Dragon seemed to look at the man like a demonstration, “He is my man, Chen Rui.”

Chen Rui felt warm when he heard Ms. Fairy Dragon’s called him that. He patted her back lightly, motioning for her to let go. He walked to the man and bowed, “I’m sorry, I was rude just now, respectable dragon powerhouse.”

“Oh?” Auglas, the dragon man, raised his eyebrows, “You can actually see that I’m a dragon? Is it because of Paglio’s calling? Or some kind of hint that I don’t know?”

“It’s just intuition.” Chen Rui felt the kind of unspoken deterrence and smiled, “Please forgive me for any offense. I felt that sir should be a powerful black dragon, at least Demi-God. As the master of this house, please allow me to extend my sincerest respect and welcome to sir, although it is a bit late…”

Auglas’ pupils glowed like a cold electric light, and a burst of oppressive spirit power was released. This spirit power was extremely powerful like a storm that would tear everything apart. Zola shouted furiously, and she was about to do something. As soon as the man glanced at her, she suddenly couldn’t move. Paglio moved slightly, but he was pulled by Krobelus beside him.

In the face of the terrifying mental pressure, Chen Rui’s face remained unchanged and still smiling. He was secretly channeling the Super System to disintegrate the spirit power that was invading his consciousness into auras, but this pressure was extremely huge, and the disintegration speed of the Super System was slightly unable to keep up. After a while, Chen Rui’s forehead began to secrete cold sweat.

Auglas did not expect Chen Rui to be able to withstand his dragon demeanor. A different expression flashed across his eyes as he dispelled the oppression and nodded, “Not bad.”

Zola glowed with blue and yellow brilliance, and automatically drew strange runes to eliminate the man’s control. Ms. Fairy Dragon immediately teleported and blocked in front of Chen Rui, “Auglas, what are you trying to do?”

“Nothing, just testing. I’m quite satisfied with the result.” Auglas’ deep gaze seemed to penetrate Chen Rui’s soul, “Having the strength of the peak stage Demon Overlord under the age of 30. His spirit power is even close to kingdom level. He is indeed a rare genius, but… he is actually a human! You didn’t tell me about this before.”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “No doubt, sir has a remarkable vision. I have tried my best to use the secret technique to disguise myself, but I was still exposed.”

“Amazing secret technique! In fact, I didn’t see through your disguise, but I faintly sensed that disgusting light attribute physique. Even in the human world, your identity is not an ordinary existence.”

Auglas frowned suddenly, “Wait a minute, you still have a strange breath, is it law power?”

“It’s just a little trouble that can be solved in some time. I don’t dare to bother sir.” Chen Rui knew what Auglas was talking about, and didn’t want to reveal the secrets of the Shackles of True Flame and the Super System, so he said it flatly.

“Small trouble?” Auglas sneered, “It seems that your power is stronger than what it seems, but in my eyes, it is just a little trick… Since you, the master, gave a welcome speech, then I should also introduce myself. Auglas. Sierrasalomekre, the ruler of Dragon Island. You can also call me… Royal Highness Dragon Emperor.”

The ruler of Dragon Island! Royal Highness Dragon Emperor! No wonder he has such a powerful strength! Chen Rui was taken aback.

At this moment, a figure rushed in excitedly at the gate, “Dad! I have spent all the 300,000 black crystal coins that you gave me! I even bought you a barbecue!”

Upon hearing this voice, the Royal Highness Dark Dragon Emperor, who was illusory and unattainable just now, immediately stunned. He was smiling from ear to ear like a humble middle-aged uncle.

This voice surprised Chen Rui even more. Ms. Black Dragon, Olypheus!

TL: Hmmm, this ‘father-in-law’ is a little bit more powerful… Olypheus indeed has a huge background!

chapters.title: Chapter 706 - The Ms. Black Dragon Who Scammed Her Father
chapters.body:
Chapter 706 - The Ms. Black Dragon Who Scammed Her Father

That Ms. Black Dragon of the Mountain Seckred is actually the daughter of the ruler of Dragon Island?

Nothing surprised Chen Rui more than this news.

Facing Olypheus, the Royal Highness Dark Dragon Emperor didn’t have the domineering vibe just now. He became a cheerful uncle as he took a bunch of barbecued meat handed over by his daughter and ate it with relish. He was really careful, lest he ate too fast and wasted his daughter’s kind intent. Chen Rui was warm and sad when he suddenly thought of the little phoenix daughter who called him ‘daddy’.

Auglas frowned when he saw Chen Rui’s gaze. At this time, Olypheus spotted Chen Rui and jumped over happily, “Boss, you’re back!”

“En, Olypheus, it’s been a long time.” Chen Rui habitually patted Olypheus on the shoulder, and he immediately sensed the sharp gaze of an uncle beside him, so he quickly stopped.

Olypheus didn’t feel anything strange, showing a flattering face, “Boss, I don’t know that you are coming back. Otherwise, I will bring one for you.”

This expression made Chen Rui feel a threatening gaze behind his back, and a little flattered. This chick grabs food faster than anyone else. When did she learn to… do a money-losing deal?

Ms. Black Dragon revealed her true face in the next sentence, “Uh… Boss, when do you think we should settle the previous account?”

No doubt. Chen Rui smiled, “Okay, if I am free…”

An uncle seemed to be dissatisfied with his daughter’s intimacy toward another man, and he interjected, “Olypheus, what good things did you buy for 300,000? How about showing them to dad?”

“What?” Olypheus asked Chen Rui like she didn’t hear it clearly.

Play dumb! Chen Rui rolled his eyes. Based on his understanding of this little chick, there must be some problem with the huge expenditure of 300,000. Facing a certain uncle with strong resentment, Chen Rui betrayed Ms. Black Dragon without hesitation, “Your father is asking what you bought with 300,000?”

“Huh?” Olypheus asked Chen Rui with a confused face.

Chen Rui, “…”

Knowing that she couldn’t hide, Ms. Black Dragon searched for a long time and took out a handful of blue stones. “I bought these magical divine stones from a mysterious gypsy businessman. It is said to be able to change a person… Uh, a dragon’s fate.”

When Chen Rui looked at the stones, his cold sweat dripped. What kind of ‘divine stones’ are these? They are clearly picked up by Ms. Black Dragon and Alice when they played in the Blue Lake area last time. The little loli also pestered Chen Rui to tell the story of a mysterious gypsy businessman selling his fate stones.

Auglas glared at the ‘divine stones’ that could change the fate of a dragon, and he instantly exuded a terrifying breath, “Where is this damn liar businessman? I’m going to tear the bastard who dares to deceive my baby girl to pieces!

“What?” Olypheus asked Chen Rui with a confused expression.

Everyone, “…”

Just as the Royal Highness Dragon Emperor roared that he wanted to destroy the Dark Moon, a series of footsteps sounded at the door.

“Olypheus, why are you running so fast?”

This familiar voice made Chen Rui’s heart race. His gaze suddenly turned to the gate, just in time to meet with the gaze of the veiled woman. In an instant, only each other was left in their eyes. There was no affectionate and intense hug; just looking at each other in this way had already surpassed 1000 words.

It wasn’t until… a certain guy was pinched by a certain lady in glasses on the waist that he recovered his senses.

“You are back.” Like Shea, Isabella also said the same plain sentence, but anyone couldn’t tell that her indifferent temperament had changed. The charming breath exuding in her blue eyes was full of vitality and charm. She seemed to be a different person.

The Sir Dragon Emperor on the side couldn’t help but sneered, “Julia, didn’t I ask you to accompany Olypheus? How did she get scammed of 300,000 black crystal coins?”

It turned out that Ms. Black Dragon Julia, who was brutally raped by Zola on the battlefield last time, came back together.

“300,000 black crystal coins?” Julia was taken aback, seemingly unaware of it.

Auglas frowned, “What did Olypheus spend today?”

Julia shook her head, “Ms. Olypheus didn’t spend any money today. Instead, she picked up 2 white crystal coins… Oh, yes, she had a big meal at the Cloak Hot Pot Restaurant under the name of Athena. She also took away 100 skewers in the end, but she couldn’t finish the last skewer…”

The people in the yard showed weird expressions at the same time. She didn’t even spend any of the 300,000 black crystal coins that her father gave her. All… are embezzled? This is a veritable father scamming.

Sir Dragon Emperor’s face twitched. The fingers holding the skewer trembled, “Olypheus?”

“What?” Olypheus asked Chen Rui with a blur face.

Everyone, “…”

Soon.

“Woo…” Olypheus cried, “I have a headache and a bad memory. I forgot.”

“Your head hurts again?” Auglas shuddered, stood up, and gently hugged her daughter, “Just forget it if you have a bad memory. It’s just a little money, don’t worry about it.”

“I have a bad memory…” Olypheus kept nodding, but her teary eyes flashed with a hint of smugness.

Chen Rui saw it in his eyes. He took out a pair of red gem earrings, “Zola, these fire rose earrings are for you.”

Upon hearing the words ‘fire rose earrings’, Olypheus’ ears suddenly stood up and appeared in front of Chen Rui at an astonishing speed, “Boss, aren’t these earrings meant for me?”

Chen Rui had a puzzled expression on his face, “I don’t think so? When did I say it?”

Olypheus said with a serious face, “You said 4 days before you went to the Dead Sea at the gate of the Princess Villa in the Fallen Angel Empire’s capital that you will give me this reward when you are back. I remember the time displayed at the magic clock was 9:20:58. Sister and Alice were also present at the time.”

Everyone was speechless while Chen Rui wiped the cold sweat from his head, “Don’t you have a bad memory?”

Olypheus opened her mouth. About 10 seconds later, she suddenly covered her head, “My head hurts again…”

Before Chen Rui could speak, he immediately had a premonition of extreme danger. The Royal Highness Dragon Emperor yelled, “You bastard, how dare you give Olypheus a headache…”

Ms. Black Dragon saw from the gap of her fingers covering her head that the fire rose earrings had disappeared, so she immediately stood in front of Chen Rui, “Dad! You’re not allowed to say this to boss. Boss is a good person!”

When Auglas saw this little girl suddenly no longer had a headache, he was actually speechless, but he was not annoyed that the beloved daughter would speak for the man, “Olypheus! Don’t be fooled by this man!”

“Boss will not lie to me!” Olypheus was overjoyed when she caught a glimpse of the fire rose earrings reappearing. She said quickly, “My first black crystal coin was given by boss, my first barbecue was made by boss, and my first space ring was given by boss…Wow, it looks like… boss is really good?”

Of course! Chen Rui accepted the good man card without blushing. Shea should not be bluffing when she said that Zola and Isabella had an issue. It is likely due to Dragon Emperor Auglas. Now it is clear that Sir Dragon Emperor is subject to Ms. Black Dragon. As long as I can get through Olypheus, no matter what the problem is, it will be much easier to deal with.

When Auglas heard this, his face really relaxed slightly. Olypheus felt that something was stuffed in the hand behind her back. Judging from the touch, it should be the fire rose earrings. She couldn’t help but be overjoyed.

The greedy Ms. Miser was determined to seize the opportunity to earn extra money, then said impassionedly, “Boss gave me 100 black crystal coins when we first met! It’s 100! Boss then used a lot of delicious barbecues to be exchanged for that useless Fertile Yuan Soil, and I was hired for 300 years at the price of 100 black crystal coins every year…”

The faces of Auglas and Chen Rui changed at the same time, and Ms. Black Dragon, who didn’t realize it, was still praising Chen Rui’s ‘great achievements’ without paying attention to the appearance of blue veins on his father’s head. She kept talking about her proudest bodyguard career.

Royal Highness Dragon Emperor was about to erupt when Olypheus solemnly said, “Boss is a good man and has taught me many things such as the professional ethics of a bodyguard. If someone blocks the way, I will help him beat the person; if there is a magic mine on the ground, I’ll step on it first; if there is a puddle, I’ll jump in and fill it… Boss also said, if a man dares to approach my sister, I will beat that person badly; if my sister’s yard door is locked, I will help boss to open it secretly from the inside; if boss came in over the wall, I will treat it as if I hadn’t seen it; if the boss wants to papapa with sister, I will help him guard the door… By the way, I always want to ask, where do they sell papapa? I want to eat it too…”

An impatient uncle couldn’t listen anymore, and he grabbed Chen Rui who wanted to slip away. His furious voice made the magic circles in the yard tremble, “You bastard!”

Olypheus seemed to be taken aback as she suddenly covered his head. When the 3-point diamond mark on her forehead flashed, her black eyes gradually turned white, her face showed an uncomfortable expression, her black hair began to flutter all over the sky, and her nails spread quickly to half a foot long. She was full of violent breath. In the [Analytical Eyes], her Comprehensive Strength Assessment actually reached S+.

“Oh no!” Auglas shook, and he couldn’t bother settling the account with Chen Rui. 3 marks also appeared on his forehead, and a warm power wrapped Olypheus. Olypheus showed a vicious expression as if she did not recognize Auglas. She was all ready to attack him, but she was unable to approach as she was blocked by that power.

“Olypheus!” Isabella called Ms. Black Dragon’s name, and she approached slowly in spite of danger. Chen Rui was about to stop her, but Zola stopped him and shook her head.

Olypheus trembled and stopped her actions when she heard Isabella’s voice. Her expression seemed more agonizing. As Isabella kept calling, the viciousness in Olypheus’s eyes gradually became dim, turning into big teardrops, “Mom.”

After calling, she fainted and was hugged by Isabella in time. Auglas retracted his power, nodded to Isabella, and sighed. He seemed to have aged a little. No matter how powerful he was, he was just an anxious and worried father.

chapters.title: Chapter 707 - Gifting A Daughter Is Unscientific
chapters.body:
Chapter 707 - Gifting A Daughter Is Unscientific

Auglas looked at his unconscious daughter in Isabella’s arms, then he looked at Chen Rui with piercing eyes, “Olypheus has a spiritual imprint containing law power. This law power is very powerful and can increase her power step by step, but it will also make her lose her consciousness. Do you know what’s going on?”

Of course, Chen Rui knew it because he had received such a spiritual imprint as well. If it weren’t for the miraculous effect of [Dual Training], he would have lost consciousness and become a puppet of a mysterious powerhouse.

Seeing Chen Rui’s expression, Auglas suddenly became aggressive, “Who is it?”

Strange, didn’t Ms. Black Dragon tell her father about Mountain Seckred? Chen Rui pondered briefly and said the answer, “The Mountain Seckred’s Satan.”

“It’s actually him!” Auglas shook and took a deep breath, “No wonder Olypheus can’t tell his name. It should be the activation of the spiritual imprint which restricts her memory! Unexpectedly, the person who sheltered Liana back then was actually Satan! In this way, Liana gave the Night Wave Staff to Satan as the price of shelter.”

Liana should be the name of Olypheus’s mother. Chen Rui noticed that Auglas knew Satan and asked tentatively, “Is it impossible to cancel this imprint despite Your Majesty’s strength?”

“Satan’s strength is unfathomable. When I was newly promoted to Demi-God back then, I overly estimated myself and arrogantly challenged him. I failed miserably in the end.” Auglas gave a rare wry smile, “Now I just touched the edge of Godhood faintly while this spiritual imprint has the breath of Pseudo-God, and it is even a quite powerful Pseudo-God!”

The figure that crossed the space at will appeared in Chen Rui’s mind, and he couldn’t help but shudder: It turns out that Satan is actually Pseudo-God instead of Demi-God!

Auglas sighed, “It’s all my fault. I didn’t notice the existence of the spiritual imprint, so I directly integrated the ‘Imperial Demon Claw’ into her bloodline imprint to improve her power. As a result, it induced unexpected changes. Although Olypheus will no longer become a puppet because of the spiritual imprint, but… you have also seen that she often loses herself and goes into madness as before. Only Isabella can comfort her.”

It turned out that Auglas had been sleeping on Dragon Island. After waking up, he heard Julia’s report that a black dragon girl with a black dragon royal bloodline mark on her head appeared at the Dark Moon. Auglas rushed to the Dark Moon immediately. After some twists and turns, he saw Olypheus with the bloodline mark on the forehead and the face that resembled his wife, Liana. Auglas determined that Ms. Black Dragon was her long-lost daughter and only daughter in the end.

Olypheus’s aptitude was excellent, and she had the ability to approach the peak stage of the Demon Overlord before she was 20 years old. She was considered a top genius even at Dragon Island. Coupled with the bias of spoiling her daughter, Auglas merged the Dragon Island’s secret treasure, ‘Imperial Demon Claw’, into Olypheus’ body. He didn‘t expect his kind intent to become harmful to her. Tragically, it completely induced the spiritual imprint hidden in her body and caused an unexpected change.

“Sir,” Chen Rui asked as he recalled that he still had a badge to summon Satan, “If we can find Satan, can Olypheus be cured?”

“If it’s just a spiritual imprint, of course he can, but the ‘Imperial Demon Claw’ is the ancient treasure of Dragon Island with powerful might. It has been tied to Olypheus’ soul. This kind of mutation… even if Satan is really willing to help, it can’t be solved. A careless mistake will completely annihilate Olypheus.”

When Chen Rui heard ‘complete annihilation’, he didn’t dare to think about his bad idea to kill Olypheus first and then resurrect. Auglas grabbed his hair in annoyance, “Perhaps it can only be resolved until I break through to the Pseudo-God realm and fully activate the law artifact, [Dragon God Eyes]. It can take decades, hundreds of years or even longer!”

Chen Rui frowned. This matter was really difficult to handle. He suddenly felt the Royal Highness Dragon Emperor’s 2 scorching eyes fixed on his body, making a certain human shudder in an instant.

“Hmph! Your talent and strength are alright, and you have a lifespan of tens of thousands of years.” Auglas seemed to struggle for a while, reluctantly squeezing a sentence from his teeth, “You will take care of Olypheus.”

Chen Rui thought that Auglas would bring Ms. Black Dragon back to Dragon Island. He was surprised to hear this request, but he nodded, “Don’t worry, Sir Auglas, Olypheus is my friend, I will take good care of her…”

Before he finished speaking, he was interrupted by Sir Dragon Emperor’s roar. Chen Rui was grabbed by an uncle again, “What shit friend! You damn human, listen clearly! I entrust my daughter to you; it’s entrust!”

Isabella, who was holding Olypheus, chuckled, “Don’t you understand? You will become Sir Auglas’s son-in-law. It’s a good bargain for you. Our Olypheus is the cutest dragon princess.”

“No!” Chen Rui had a bad omen when he was grabbed by Uncle Roaring just now. He couldn’t help being shocked when he heard Isabella’s words. This is unscientific! How can he give his daughter to me as soon as we meet!

“Are you actually not willing?” Auglas sneered, “You have only 2 choices now. First, marry my daughter and take care of her until I become Pseudo-God. Second, I marry Isabella and bring all the Dark Moon dragons back to Dragon Island including Zola… Zola is the best dragon genius that I have ever seen and cannot be buried in this kind of place. Perhaps she will also become 1 of my concubines and give birth to the dragons of excellent bloodline.”

“Fuck!” Chen Rui couldn’t help but swear. He finally understood what Shea said about Zola and Isabella. Marry your damn sister!

Auglas was about to level-up to the Emperor Roaring, “If it weren’t because Olypheus liked this place very much, if it weren’t for Isabella to comfort her, if it weren’t for Isabella who would rather die due to the curse and not accept the power of the black dragon… do you think I would wrong my daughter to marry a damn human?”

Chen Rui was shocked. He had already guessed a series of things that happened when Auglas came here. If it weren’t for Isabella, I’m afraid that all the dragons including Zola would be taken away. The power of the other party is too strong to contend. The proposal to marry Olypheus is actually the last resort.

Looking at the affectionate Ms. Secret Intelligence, Chen Rui seemed to have a strong emotion surging out in his heart. Auglas said coldly, “The [Light Annihilation Seal] on Isabella has reached its final stage, and I can’t cure it as well. My black dragon power can transform her physique and prolong her lifespan by 70 years. You must have the same ability to soothe the Olypheus’ spirit within 70 years. Otherwise, I will take Olypheus away and kill all of you!”

“70 years?” Chen Rui shook his head. With the Snow Dallet there, his Isabella would definitely life longer than this.

“Oh?” Auglas misunderstood the meaning of Chen Rui shaking his head, and he squinted. “I heard Paglio say that you have the inheritance of the ancient grand master. You took only 5 years from Lesser Demon to the current peak stage of the Demon Overlord. You are indeed a rare genius!
