That attempt was absolutely not easy, but the effect was unexpectedly effective. He inadvertently realized the key of Star Collector’s physical training. Not only the Experience Value rose rapidly and reached 30%, but the strength of the body also improved quickly during the training.

That was the reason the “skeleton” was close to a solid state. The function of the training ground was quite powerful, but the cost was equally high. The initial 35,000 aura had only 17,000 left.

“Paglio, do you think I can defeat the “Quick Wolf” with my current strength? I researched the guy’s information. He’s a dark elf, good at close-combat and dagger and he knows a skill called <Afterimage>. His opponents mostly knocked out with 1 hit.”

Paglio pondered and replied, “With your current strength, there is at least a chance. I am not certain, but there should at least be a chance. The dark elf race is talented in terms of speed and sense. Generally speaking, Endurance is their weakness. You have to pay extra attention to the opponent’s killing move. The <Afterimage> should be a skill combining both his talent and high-speed; it was mainly to confuse his opponent. In terms of how to fight specifically, that would depend on the opponent’s performance on the spot, so your strategy shouldn’t be too rigid. Always remember to never let your guard down before crushing the opponent entirely.”

Chen Rui had a deep understanding of the last sentence and nodded. Paglio later pointed out that although his speed improved rapidly, the control wasn’t enough. The true speed wasn’t just about reflecting on movements, but also the frequency and explosiveness of attacks. He had to be aware of the perfect combination of speed and power. Besides, there was the attack timing problem. In the face of an opponent like a dark elf, he had to control it well.

Theory didn’t need to be elaborated as the key was to realize and improve during practice. After Paglio mentioned a few essentials, they started the battle training directly. Faced with tremendous pressure, Chen Rui didn’t complain about the poison dragon’s power level this time, he was fully absorbed into the training instead.

The poison dragon clearly felt the change on his human partner’s face. He was secretly delighted, and his moves were even deadlier.

10 days passed by quickly. At night, the Dark Moon’s arena was brightly lit and busy as usual. The final battle was about to begin.

The one taking part at the arena was famous; he was the strongest participant among the middle-stage of Intermediate Demon, “Quick Wolf”, Jesse; the other side was No. 64 who killed “Bloody Hand”, Lance 10 days ago. This battle attracted a lot of audiences, and the gambling odds also almost doubled.

At that moment, Jesse who was in light attire slowly walked toward the battlefield, yet No. 64, one of the protagonists had yet to appear.

Keithahn at the VIP seats looked anxious whereas Arux was tasting the wine in his hand calmly.

“That No. 64, could it be that he doesn’t dare to come!” The lich frowned his brows tightly, “If he escapes this battle, then our loss…”

Before the lich could finish his words, Arux gold-like voice sounded, “He’s already here.”

A masked, cloaked man was walking down the opposite participant’s tunnel. It was No. 64.

Arux focused his gaze on the masked man for a while and his brows suddenly raised. Although he was far away, he could still feel that No. 64’s demeanor had changed a lot compared to 10 days ago with his Greater Demon’s ability.

“Middle stage Intermediate Demon?” Arux’s flaming red iris slightly shrunk; a surprise flashed through his eyes. He suddenly laughed, “This battle should be quite interesting…”

chapters.title: Chapter 54: Lightning And Wind
chapters.body:
Chapter 54: Lightning And Wind

Although No. 64 had a comeback fighting with Bloody Hand, Lance 10 days ago, the audience also saw him helplessly suppressed by Lance. Now that his opponent had changed to Jesse, someone much stronger than Lance, not many of them supported No. 64 naturally.

The hosting succubus went to the stage seductively and introduced the general situation and record of the two to the audience. Jesse was an agile dark elf; pointed ears; short silver hair; his face and body was full with scars of various sizes and sharp eyes. It could be seen that he was a veteran who had experienced many tests of life and death.

When the succubus asked about both parties to give the battle declarations, Jesse kept quiet and didn’t say anything. The succubus seemed to be accustomed to it, and she asked Chen Rui after.

Chen Rui pondered slightly and asked, “What is my odds today?”

“Your odds today is much higher than the previous one. It’s 1 for 15.”

Even higher? It seems that I can earn again this time if I pull off a coup. Chen Rui didn’t mind and threw a money bag, “Here are 50 black crystal coins, I bet myself to win!”

The audience was amazed. 50 black crystal coins! Such a huge bet!

Most of the audiences were commoners. Generally speaking, 1 black crystal coin was already a very huge bet. Now, No. 64 actually bet 50 black crystal coins! That money was enough for the low-class demon families to live for several years.

“The arena doesn’t accept anything higher than…” Before the succubus could finish speaking, she saw Arux at the VIP seat signaled by waving. She immediately took the black crystal coins, smiled and said, “So, it’s 50 black crystal coins then. Jesse, please choose a fighting style, empty-handed? Or with a weapon?”

Jesse didn’t seem to like speaking, so he waved the cold dual daggers on his hands. The succubus nodded and said, “Then this battle allows the use of weapons. Other than weapons, no poisons are allowed on the weapon, and armor or magic tools can’t be used. No. 64, please show your weapon!”

“I don’t need any weapons.” Chen Rui said faintly. He wasn’t skilled in weapons. If he used it rashly, he might be shackled instead.

A light flashed through Jesse’s eyes. He looked at the opponent and later resumed his calmness. The confidence of No. 64 had changed the impression of those audiences who didn’t think highly of him. Some of the people started to bet on No. 64 temporarily; the odds changed accordingly.

The battle started. Jesse didn’t launch a raid like Lance, but he stared at his opponent. Chen Rui suddenly felt like he was locked on by Jesse, he secretly became vigilant, and he did not attack rashly. He only circulated Star Power to every part of the body as a precaution.

Jesse’s footsteps began to move. Unlike the expected high speed, the speed was not fast. He began to circle around Chen Rui slowly.

Chen Rui carefully moved his body. He always kept himself at the center to face Jesse at all times to defend the opponent’s high-speed attack at any time. Jesse who was circling at the outer circle was supposed to exhaust more stamina while Chen Rui was just keeping the center of the circle. However, the dark elf’s footsteps seemed to have a strange rhythm. Chen Rui actually felt dizzy after looking at it for a while.

Right when Chen Rui’s eyes were blurred, Jesse’s speed suddenly accelerated. As Chen Rui just recollected his mind, he felt that a figure had appeared in front of him. Yet, he did not panic, but he struck a long-accumulated blow. That blow hit right on the dark elf’s chest, but something weird happened. His blow went through Jesse’s body without any hindrance as if he was hitting the air.

<Afterimage>! Chen Rui immediately reacted and at the same time, there was a huge sense of crisis at his back. A sharp, strong wind hit him like a lightning; there was already a stinging feeling before it hit Chen Rui.

At the critical moment, the result from the poison dragon’s high-pressure training suddenly showed up. Chen Rui moved his mind, and his body had already made the muscle reflex in advance. He miraculously leaned forward, and the sharp knife brushed past his back, leaving a shocking wound. After the sharp wind blow missed, he didn’t back up, but he kept up like he was attached to Chen Rui’s shadow.

Chen Rui felt that his eyes were full of dazzling edge, and the <Afterimage> technique was especially difficult to deal with. It was hard to tell which was real and which was fake. He was at a disadvantage at once. Not long after, there were more than 10 wounds on his body. The cloak was gradually dyed red by his blood.

Soon after, Jesse’s storm-like attacks finally slowed down. Before Chen Rui could counterattack, Jesse had already pulled away his distance at high speed; he continued to maintain his previous slow pace, obviously looking for the next opportunity to attack fiercely.

Chen Rui couldn’t bother the injuries on his body. He adjusted his slightly flustered breathing and focused on this fearful opponent. As compared to Jesse, the previous Bloody Hand, Lance wasn’t the same level at all. If it weren’t for these days that he desperately trained at the training ground along with Paglio’s high-pressure training, the previous round of surprise attack was enough for him to die 10 times.

<Afterimage> and fatal attack. It was the same as the information. Yet, the confusing effect of that step couldn’t be noticed by outsiders. Besides, Jesse’s <Afterimage> had reached a rather ingenious level. It wasn’t just a literal skill, but a fatal assassinate technique.

The strongest among the middle-stage of Intermediate Demon was definitely worthy of his reputation.

Jesse still remained silent, but his eyes were getting sharper. Rumor has it that this No. 64 was almost dying in the hands of trivial character like Lance a few days ago. I didn’t expect he has such strength. The deadly attacks just now would have already killed a normal middle-stage Intermediate Demon. However, this opponent did not suffer fatal damage while he missed the first strike. The reaction speed is especially not inferior to the talented dark elf race!

Arux who had been sipping his wine calmly for a long time suddenly paused. The audience saw No. 64, who was initially suppressed to a helpless situation suddenly moved; he was actually making an active attack!

And… that speed!

The characteristics and strength of the “Quick Wolf”, Jesse was no secret. Even the audience understood the strengths and weaknesses of the dark elf. He had a quick and fierce attack, but relatively weak endurance. In general, the best tactic was to defend and use physical energy to drag the opponent. However, many of Jesse’s previous opponents had chosen such tactic, but basically, no one succeeded. Jesse also understood his own characteristics, so he worked hard on this attack, not only the strength and skill, but also the tactics.

Everyone knew that his opponent should defend and delay, but few people could withstand Jesse’s attack. Even if they tried to fight back, they couldn’t keep up with the speed of dark elf. Those who could defeat Jesse or survive his attacks were mostly participants with extremely strong endurance and defense who could endure past the time limit, and let Arux decide the victory.

Now, No. 64 chose the most unwise move to attack actively. Yet, his speed… was quite amazing. It turned out that No. 64 was also a speed type!

No. 64 was definitely reserved when he faced Bloody Hand, Lance in the previous battle!

Facing an opponent with equally amazing speed, Jesse was shocked at first, but it was replaced with some kind of fanaticism. The trajectory of the dual daggers in the hands was even weirder. Both of their speeds were getting faster and faster, and the audience outside the field could only see two high-speed figures colliding and separating under the light of magic crystal. After a long time, the relatively weak demons felt dizzy.

At the VIP seats, Arux downed a glass of wine and gave the glass to the Keithahn. He saw the lich staring hard at the field, so he shook his head and said, “Don’t bother; you can’t keep up with their speed.”

“Sir,” Keithahn blinked his eyes effortfully. “Who is faster among those two?”

“Jesse is faster.” Although the two figures in the field were extremely fast, it was just child’s play in Arux’s eyes.

Keithahn had a sudden realization and said, “So, Jesse will win in the end?”

Arux shook his head, “If Jesse’s speed is like lightning, then No. 64 is the wind. Lightning is faster, but the wind blows endlessly. However, Jesse should have an ultimate move that he hasn’t used. For the time being, I am not sure who will win or lose.”

“No. 64 can only barely kill Bloody Hand, Lance 10 days ago,” Keithahn said with surprise, “Now, he can actually rival Jesse. Is the thing about the seal actually true? Or has he been hiding his strength?”

Arux didn’t answer anymore, but he looked at the empty wine glass in the lich’s hand calmly. Keithahn immediately shut his mouth tactfully, filled the glass and handed it to the Great Demon respectfully.

Jesse’s speed was indeed slightly faster than Chen Rui’s speed, but the dark elf felt that it was bad at the moment. Although the opponent’s speed was worse, his opponent could basically still keep up with his movements.

Generally, speed and endurance were two relatively extreme qualities. No. 64 actually maintained high speed while not being worn out. Instead, Jesse was the one who began to worn out.

The two figures moving at high-speed finally separated after a fierce collision. They paused and looked at each other cautiously. The effortful, eyes-fatigue stage finally ended for the audiences. The Demon Realm advocated power the most. Although only 1 man would likely survive eventually, such an exciting battle of strong forces naturally stirred up the audience at the arena.

No big wounds could be seen on Jesse’s body, but he obviously began to pant. The fierce high-speed battle just now clearly used up a lot of stamina.

Chen Rui was slightly panting and his cloak was full of reddish cut. Jesse was faster than him, so it took more effort for Chen Rui to keep up to his opponent. He hit Jesse several times just now too, but because of the dark elf’s speed, the force was voided before it hit entirely. The <Astral Form> special ability gave him a huge advantage in a certain sense as it quickly replenished the energy lost during the fight, and the wound recovery was pretty smooth.

Jesse understood that although the opponent was injured, it wasn’t as serious as it looked. Unless he could deal a fatal damage, he might not stand for 2 hours if this level of the fight continued.

The dark elf utilized his body’s remaining strength, and flashes of lighting spark suddenly appeared on his body. The familiar “ Pzzt! ” sound reminded Chen Rui of Aldas from the same race. Instinctively, Chen Rui could feel that the power of this lightning was definitely not an illusion.

This electric spark not only increased Jesse’s speed tremendously, but it also had an enchanting effect on the dagger. When Chen Rui’s ribs were accidentally slashed by the dagger, not only his body hair erected, but it also produced a temporary paralysis. If he didn’t react quick enough, he would be stabbed to death.

I haven’t seen this skill in the arena’s information. It is probably the secret art or a new killing move of the dark elf. It should also be his last ultimate move!

chapters.title: Chapter 55: Whetstone
chapters.body:
Chapter 55: Whetstone

Although Chen Rui was passive, he expected that Jesse’s state would certainly not last long and wisely adopted the tactics of avoiding its edge. Thanks to Paglio’s cheating training, Jesse’s speed was faster than before, but it did not reach the highest level of pressure exerted by the poison dragon during training. Thus, despite looking battered, Chen Rui still effectively avoided the dark elf’s attacks.

Sure enough, after Jesse persisted for a while, his power began to weaken just like the Bloody Hand, Lance used his <Berserk> talent. Chen Rui was looking for the best timing. As he was about to launch a counterattack, Jesse snorted, jumped sky high, and stabbed both his daggers from above. Although this kind of aerial attack was fierce, it was easy to be countered as there was no support in the air. It was an unwise move for a speed type like Jesse.

However, Jesse in the air suddenly blurred and turned into five Jesse, pouncing toward Chen Rui simultaneously. Chen Rui was taken aback. He knew that 4 out of these 5 figures were <Afterimage>. However, as each one had an “electrical body”, it couldn’t be differentiated at such a desperate moment, so Chen Rui quickly dodged. The 5 Jesse’s speed exerted its speed to its extreme and surrounded Chen Rui in the middle; Chen Rui couldn’t dodge those 10 cold daggers anymore.

That was already Jesse’s last and deadliest move that determined his victory or loss.

The audience saw five figures rushing toward No. 64 at the center. After a tremor, a figure flew far away backward and fell to the ground.

That figure was actually the “Quick Wolf”, Jesse who just turned into five people. At that moment, the dark elf no longer had his daggers in his hands. He was just covering his wounds and laid sideway on the ground; he seemed to be seriously injured.

That kind of five lightning clones fatal attack was actually resolved by the opponent! Jesse’s eyes were full of unbelieving.

Not only that, his chest was hit with 5 punches at the same time. The horrifying explosive power completely destroyed the remaining strength of the dark elf.

During the entire battle, Jesse had been suppressing his opponent, and No. 64 counterattack seemed to be unsuccessful. However, at the last moment, Jesse was actually defeated by one critical hit. When he moved, he would defeat the enemy was supposed to be the style of “Quick Wolf”!

The masked No. 64 was expressionless. (of course, he quickly removed the dagger on his shoulder and kicked away another dagger on the ground. He could not bother to stop the bleeding and slowly walked toward Jesse)

Jesse looked at the approaching masked man, and his eyes gradually cooled. He did not beg for mercy like Lance, but he asked, “How did you resolve my <Afterimage>?”

No. 64 was silence. Jesse understood that his opponent didn’t want to say it, so he didn’t ask again and quietly waited to be killed. Since the first time he set foot in the arena to battle, the dark elf had abandoned life and death. No. 64 could see through the flaws of his ultimate move just now and endured the stab to counter forcefully to destroy his defense; he was indeed vicious and strong.

Although there was still something in his heart that he didn’t want to just die like that, Jesse admitted his defeat.

The audience made a commotion and shouting for No. 64 to kill the dark elf. Those who won money and also those who lost money because of the dark elf were the same. Both types of person had the same level of reverence toward the winner. The winner was the king; this was the arena; this was the Demon Realm.

“That move just now should be able to get stronger.” No. 64 hoarse voice sounded. The audience heard No. 64 spoke and calmed down altogether, waiting for him to declare his opponent’s death.

Jesse proudly said, “It was just an immature ultimate move. I haven’t had time to master it completely. If this move is perfected, the one that is dying will definitely be you.”

No. 64 silenced again, then he said faintly after a while, “Then, I will wait until it is perfect.”

The demons watching the battle at the arena saw No. 64 actually let go of the loser, Jesse, and they raised a commotion together.

Jesse saw that the opponent didn’t kill him, and he was taken aback. He blurted out, “Why?”

“I’m don’t empathize my enemies” No. 64’s answer was very demon-like, “It’s just that my scythe needs a whetstone.”

Arux had been listening to the conversation between Chen Rui and the dark elf. When he heard the word ‘whetstone’, his eyes flashed with blinding lights, and the smile on his face was more obvious.

“Whetstone?” Jesse covered his wounds, slowly stood up and said coldly, then he turned and left, “You will regret it!”

No. 64 didn’t look at Jesse again nor did he bother about the shouts of dissatisfaction from the audience. He just looked at the VIP seats, and he just happened to meet with Arux’s gaze.

Feeling the strong conviction contained in the other’s eyes, the Great Demon sneered. He suddenly stood up, and his metal-like strange voice resounded the entire arena, “This battle, No. 64 wins! 20 days later, No. 64 will challenge the strongest among Intermediate Demon – “Balrog” Reka!”

Whetstone? If you want it, I’ll continue to give you! It’ll also be the strongest!

This audience was completely stirred up by that. That’s too exciting!

Although No. 64 defeated Jesse today, who’s Reka? The king among the Intermediate Demons in the arena! The strongest Intermediate Demon who is one step away from Greater Demon!

It had been a long time since any Intermediate Demon dared to challenge Reka, just like no Greater Demon dared to challenge Arux. No one ever expected No. 64’s next opponent would actually be the king of Intermediate Demon!

That must be the most exciting matchup among Intermediate Demon!

Jesse was shocked, and he was finally moved. He turned around and looked at No. 64 with unbelieving eyes.

No. 64 whose opponent was personally appointed by Arux, stood still quietly after hearing the challenge notice. Perhaps the mask covered his true expression, but Jesse had an instinct: This cloaked man has no fear.

No. 64 finally said something. It wasn’t to reject or being angry at Arux’s “unreasonable” arrangement. His hoarse voice seemed to be exceptionally calm instead, “I think I can get back the money I won right.”

The succubus winked and walked over seductively with her body exuding some kind of sexy demeanor, “This is the reward and the bet you won today. I like strongman the most. Are you interested to play a game called ‘conqueror’ [1] with me on the bed? It’s free.”

Chen Rui received the heavy money bag and looked at the seductive succubus in a strange way. Conqueror? Why does it sound familiar? Yet, he couldn’t afford to play this “free” game, so he would pass.

Today’s victory made Chen Rui even more confident. Although he would be facing tougher opponents, he wasn’t nervous at all. He casually teased, “Perhaps next time you can be more reserved in your attire. It’s better if you wear a uniform; I might be interested in it.”

Wait! Uniformed succubus, is it… Kia’s image? That’s right. Is Princess Royal actually granting me the essence sucking siren two months later? Eh, what am I thinking… … that damn charming talent!

Chen Rui shook his head hard, removed the distracting thoughts, and strode away.

The succubus was stunned. She wanted to pester him, asking about the uniform, but then she saw this guy actually shook his head and strode away insensitively.

After Chen Rui walked out of the arena, he immediately rushed to the side of the street. His current speed was something now. He had already passed several streets in a blink of an eye and came to a secluded place before he stopped.

“Why are you following me?” Chen Rui turned around and asked.

The dark elf, Jesse appeared at his back and asked, “I’ve already lost. Why do you want me to be your whetstone?”

Chen Rui shrugged his shoulders and replied, “What if I say, I did that for someone to see. Will you believe?”

“ Hmph! Do you think I’m a kid? What’s your purpose?” Jesse shook his head disdainfully.

Chen Rui sighed. I actually said the truth, but he still didn’t believe it. I have to find a way to get rid of this complex-thinking guy.

“Whetstone is just whetstone, stop talking nonsense. Can you still become stronger?”

“Of course I can!” Jesse replied firmly. “But I want to remind you that if you fail once, you, as a scythe will be broken forever!”

“Have you seen the scythe that was broken by a whetstone?” Chen Rui replied bluntly, turned around and left. Yet, the dark elf still followed closely.

This guy is addicted to tailing!

“Why are you still following me?”

The dark elf answered equally blunt, “If a whetstone leaves the knife, is it still a whetstone?”

You’ll still be a dark elf after you leave me, brother. Chen Rui was speechless and replied in his heart.

With Jesse following, he definitely couldn’t go back to the lab. This guy was faster than him, so he couldn’t even escape. In desperation, he came to the headquarters of Cloak Gang.

The old dwarf, Didi was shocked seeing Chen Rui (Aguile) full of blood, “Master, your wounds…”

Right after Didi finished his words, he saw a cool looking dark elf behind his master; he immediately recognized that it was the famous “Quick Wolf”, Jesse from the arena. The poor dark dwarf’s weak soul was shocked again; he was so shocked that he couldn’t speak.

“Didi, go get me a new cloak.” The master’s words awoke Didi, and Didi hurriedly ran into the house.

“This is Cloak Gang. I am the leader, Aguile.” Chen Rui introduced to Jesse and took out two potions; he drank 1 himself, then he threw another to the dark elf.

Jesse grabbed it, removed the cap, sniffed it and recognized that it was a healing potion. He hesitated for a while and drank it all up. The effect of this healing potion was surprisingly high. It was far from the ordinary goods. The dark elf felt that the soreness at the heavily-injured chest was recovered a lot; there was a complex emotion in his eyes.

The old dwarf had already taken a cloak out hurriedly. Chen Rui took off the bloody junk and covered himself in the new cloak. It seemed that he needed to put some cloaks and masks in the storage as spares next time.

Jesse noticed that the terrible wounds caused by the daggers on “Aguile” actually healed a lot; some wound had already disappeared. Is the effect of the healing potion that fast? Or…

“If you want to be a whetstone, then stay in the Cloak Gang. From today onwards, you can challenge me once a month.”

The old dwarf had another shock: According to this tone, is Jesse defeated by Master?

It was Chen Rui’s spontaneous idea. Since he had already planned to use Cloak Gang as another beginning for Aguile, he needed someone strong to keep watch when he wasn’t around. Jesse’s combat power was unquestionable. Since Jesse sent himself here, Chen Rui wouldn’t be polite of course.

Jesse’s brow frowned; he looked like he was pondering. He indeed didn’t reject.

[1] The name was taken from an MMORPG called Zhengtu.  <a href=”https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zhengtu”>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zhengtu</a>

chapters.title: Chapter 56: Aura! The Most Urgent Need For Resources
chapters.body:
Chapter 56: Aura! The Most Urgent Need For Resources

The old dwarf recollected his mind and took out a pouch as if he was offering a treasure. He said, “Master, these are the fluorescent stones and other materials I got these few days. These cost 15 black crystal coins in total.”

There were about 10 pieces of materials in the pouch including 5 or 6 fluorescent stones of varied qualities. However, an average quality fluorescent stone usually cost 10 black crystal coins in a magic store, so it was quite worthy.

“Well done. For now, don’t worry about other things and focus on getting magic materials; mainly the fluorescent stones. The more the better. As for the money, you don’t have to worry. I will find a way.”

The old dwarf looked joyful for being praised in front of Jesse and he said, “It’s like this, my master. The fluorescent stone is a relatively unpopular material that is produced in the Dark Shadow Empire, so merchants usually don’t keep much in stock. However, I received a message that a merchant named Silva has a batch of stock, but the price they asked is pretty high. 18 black crystal coins for high quality, 9 black crystal coins for medium quality and 2 black crystal coins for low quality. If you want to take all the goods, it probably needs 600 to 700 black crystal coins.”

Chen Rui just won 750 black crystal coins. It totaled up to 760 together with the reward of 10 black crystal coins which was just enough to buy this batch of fluorescent stones. 10 days ago, he had 35,000 auras, but now there were only 3,000 left. That wasn’t enough for the spending on the training ground at all. Besides, he would be fighting against Reka after 20 days, so he needed a lot of auras. Therefore, the old dwarf’s information came right about time.

“I know Silva.” The dark elf suddenly spoke, “This guy is very despicable, and he has quite a number of subordinates. If you deal with him directly, you might be devoured completely.”

The old dwarf nodded, “Sir Jesse was right. Silva’s reputation isn’t very good, but he is very strong. In fact, an unpopular business like fluorescent stones is just his cover. Rumors said that he is secretly doing some shady trades.”

Chen Rui was silent for a while and asked Jesse, “What are the powerful characters under Silva?”

“The most powerful one is a centaur called Grau, who has already reached the highest stage of Intermediate Demon. However, his strength is incomparable to Reka. The rest includes a number of Intermediate Demon. If you give me 30 black crystal coins, I will accompany you on this trip.”

That’s too expensive! 30 black crystal coins! That’s equivalent to 3000 purple crystal coins! The old dwarf almost jumped. If the money was given to him and his daughter, it was enough for them to live for 3 years. Who knows that his master, Aguile agreed without any hesitation, “Good! That’s a deal.”

Chen Rui could still afford 30 black crystal coins as the demand for aura was urgent. This trip could only be successful but not fail.

“How long do you need to recover your injuries?” Chen Rui asked Jesse. He saw the dark elf raised a finger and nodded, “Didi, I will come to the Cloak Gang in the morning the day after tomorrow. By then, I want you to contact Silva and say that I want all the fluorescent stones. In terms of the pricing, you can make the call.”

Didi hurriedly agreed. Chen Rui didn’t stay any longer and returned directly to the lab. During this period of time, he was not questioned by the palace guards because of Princess Royal’s instruction. Similarly, Aldas, who learned about the two-months test, also expressed his maximum support. In fact, the dark elf master didn’t know that he was now “challenging grand master” because someone’s lies. He was just hoping that this “inheritance” could bring him a potion-related surprise.

When Chen Rui returned to his secretary identity, he activated the ability of <Breath Holding>. In the eyes of others, he was still a powerless human.

He asked Kegu to send a letter to Paglio, saying that he was safe so that the poison dragon wouldn’t worry. During these times, Kegu had been traveling back and forth between the blue lake and the lab, so he had already been familiar with the path. After the wyvern left, Chen Rui returned to his room.

Over the days, the improvement in the control of Star Power and muscle strength increased the Experience Value tremendously. Of course, the Experience Value was just a digitized display. It didn’t mean that when the Experience Value reached 100%, then he could “level-up”. It only meant that he had reached a certain level of mastery in the current stage. The skeleton of filaments in the status bar had been completely solidified. It was the result of his 10-days special training. To be precise, after using 5-fold the time for 4 times and 2-fold the time once, it was equivalent to more than 1 month.

This changes in the human light figure not only made Chen Rui’s power reach the middle level of Intermediate Demon which was the stable state of the Alkaid state, but his body’s defensive ability was also greatly enhanced. Today, although the battle at the arena was fierce and he had a lot of wounds, he didn’t actually receive serious damage. Instead, it was just trauma; it was a lot lighter compared to the battle with Lance.

Today, the truth for Chen Rui to break Jesse’s ultimate move was <Analytical Eyes>. Among the 5 shadows of Jesse, only 1 could be realistically analyzed, and that was the true body. Although the other illusions couldn’t be judged by naked eyes or feelings, they couldn’t deceive the skill of <Analytical Eyes>. This also inspired Chen Rui in future battle.

In the status bar, after the “skeleton” completely consolidated, the countless filaments centered from the light ball of “Alkaid” wasn’t absorbed into the “skeleton”. Instead, it expanded further by gathering on the skeleton weirdly in groups; it seemed to be faintly forming pieces of “muscles”.

With the experience from the increased-gravity training ground, Chen Rui faintly understood that once the “muscles” became solid like the “skeleton”, the Alkaid state that was characterized by <Refined Body> would likely be completed. If he truly reached completion of the Alkaid state and subsequently triggered two-star evolution, breaking through to the next state, then rivaling the Greater Demon would no longer be a fantasy.

Practices have proven that the gravity rule is the best way to train the body. In the current state, twice the gravity is of little use already. Subsequently, it should be 4-fold the gravity. However, for 4-fold the gravity, even without any time rule, it still needs 4000 auras per day. The material provided by the old dwarf provided a total of 1,500 auras. Along with the initial 3000, it only totaled to about 4500 points. I should just wait after the trade with Silva the day after tomorrow.

He had been stretched too tightly physically and mentally in these days. Everything needs to be done at an optimal level, otherwise, it will be counterproductive. I’ll better take a break tomorrow during the day, then go to the poison dragon for special training at night.

Chen Rui slept till dawn, got up and ate something. When he was walking out of the lab, he bumped into Slee. The imp reported a thing to him. It turned out that Zach, the centaur from the “Guillotine” blacksmith shop, just purchased a large batch of waste ores, and he wanted to find Chen Rui to deal with them. Yet, it was during Chen Rui’s “seclusion”, and the imp got Aldas’s instructions, so he dared not to disturb Chen Rui in his room. Now that the imp saw his master walking out, he hurriedly reported.

Although 1 ore didn’t provide much aura, it was still something. Chen Rui was in desperate need of aura currently, so he immediately rushed to the blacksmith store.

Zach deliberately bought a large number of “waste ores” with crystals. When he was anxious as he couldn’t do anything with them, he was suddenly overjoyed when he saw Chen Rui came.

“Zach, as Princess Royal gave me a mission, I have been very busy during these 2 months. That’s why I’m late. I’m sorry!”

The human’s apology moved Zach, “My friend, you are now the secretary of Dark Moon City. The mission of Princess Royal is, of course, more important. I’m really grateful for you to make time here to help!”

Chen Rui couldn’t explain much, so he patted Zach’s shoulder, “Well, we’re friends, so let’s not be courteous. Let’s see those minerals.”

Zach immediately took Chen Rui to the yard. There were a lot of ores, approximately 100 pieces. The crystal on them was more than the ones previously. In the blacksmith’s perspective, they were basically useless ores, but they were a lot of auras in Chen Rui’s eyes.

“Chen Rui, there’re quite a lot of ores…” Zach scratched his head in embarrassment. “I’m not sure if you bring enough powder? If you don’t have enough, I can give you some money to buy from the master.”

The more the merrier… Chen Rui said in his mind and shook his head, “Don’t worry. I have enough. Yet, you have to collect all the powders remained after converting the crystals, so that I can give it to Master Aldas for research.”

The centaur obviously agreed instantly for such request. Chen Rui immediately began his work of turning waste into treasure. In Zach’s happy eyes, the annoying crystals on the waste ores magically turned into powder, and the pieces of ores were also “resurrected” subsequently. The more crystals on these waste ores, the more aura was provided. After some hard work, Chen Rui harvested more than 4,000 auras; the total amount was close to 9,000.

Chen Rui received the powder that Zach collected and said, “Zach, let me know the next time you bought minerals. As long as I have time, I’ll come here as soon as possible.”

“Thank you so much.” Zach nodded quickly, “My brother and I also can’t consume too many minerals at once. Besides, the mine’s situation in recent years is very bad. I heard that the thieves even occupied the main mining pit. These waste ores were stolen from the main mining pit by the miners by risking their lives.

Chen Rui learned from Shea that the trade route in the west was controlled by the thieves. However, he didn’t expect them to expand their control over the mines. Although a waste mine could only provide dozens of auras, there was a saying of “many little drops make an ocean”. The waste ores that had been accumulated for hundreds of years could definitely provide a considerable amount of auras.

At present, he was forced into the urgent collection of magic materials such as fluorescent stones. Besides, the cost was too high, so it wasn’t suitable for long-term development. After passing this two-months test, he had to visit the mines and ‘settle’ all the waste ores. That could be considered as a win-win action of turning waste into treasure.

Leaving the blacksmith shop, Chen Rui thought of Alice’s newly opened store. Due to the urgent special training in the past few days, he was unable to attend the opening ceremony. Now that he had nothing to do, obviously he had to go and take a look.

Upon reaching the wide street, he could see the initial “strange” shop at the end of the street from a distance that had a huge signboard with 3 big, magic words: Princess Retail Store.

chapters.title: Chapter 57: The Up-And-Coming Princess Retail Store
chapters.body:
Chapter 57: The Up-And-Coming Princess Retail Store

The effect of the signboard wasn’t bad; Chen Rui gave above-average comment for that. When he got closer, he saw that the number of customers entering and leaving the store had increased significantly. Walking into the Princess Retail Store, the messy arrangement previously had been improved into a sorted and orderly display. Kaguli who was once holding a scythe to frighten people appeared in the “security room” at the back, and the front desk waiter was replaced to an imp and a succubus. With the imp’s eloquence and the succubus’s charm, they were naturally able to attract customers. It seemed that little loli truly listened to Chen Rui’s opinions.

Kaguli saw Chen Rui. She was also loyal to Shea like her brother, Kaguron. When she saw the secretary that Princess Royal trusted, naturally, there was no hostility that she showed when they first met. Instead, she nodded slightly. Chen Rui smiled at Kaguli and went up to the second floor.

Due to Alice’s identity, Chen Rui’s idea was to let the Princess Retail Store focus mainly on high-end. The first floor’s products were relatively for lower-end consumer whereas the second floor was the luxury version of a VIP floor. Not only the products were expensive, but it also had layers of protective magic personally cast by Old Gauss. It could avoid people will evil intentions, so it made the products seemed more mysterious.

The most attractive things in the Princess Retail Store were absolutely the two types of chess. One was the princess chess. According to the customers’ needs, it was divided into the perverted version and the ordinary version. What made Chen Rui ashamed was that customers who bought the perverted version were obviously more. The second was not Peg’s Solitaire, but it was another “grand master level” work provided by Chen Rui, demon-fighting chess. The demon-fighting chess was actually just animal-fighting chess [1], but the animals were changed into demons. There a total of eight demons. The strongest was the king; the demons in the middle were relatively weaker; the weakest was the succubus, but the succubus could seduce the king in turn. Some of the rules and names were also adjusted accordingly. Since demon-fighting chess was easy to understand, and it could be played between 2 players, its popularity was much higher than the princess chess, becoming the signature product of the Princess Retail Store.

Since there was a precedent of little princess’s copyright infringement, it was just a matter of time before these things were copied. So, Chen Rui introduced the concept of branding. All items in the Princess Retail Store had a special magical logo which was also the trademark.

The princess chess and demon-fighting chess were divided into normal and luxury version according to their quality and craftsmanship. The normal version was affordable and cheap with the magical trademark of the Princess Retail Store on the back. The luxury version was not only superior in quality, it also had a fine craftsmanship, but in addition to the trademark, it also had Alice’s personal magic signature. It was considered as a limited edition; the price was obviously high.

In addition to the two types of chess, there were some other products on the second floor. As for the unhealthy books that seriously affected the mental health of young girls, they were all removed and destroyed under the little loli’s reluctance.

The most expensive products were the royal family’s “limited collection”, which was basically just the dolls, hairpins and other toys or pieces that were priced ridiculously high. However, they had all been delicately handled. It was not only accompanied by pretty packaging, but the “history” of these items was also specifically mentioned. For example, the doll was given to the crown prince, Grimm by the Lord of Midnight Sun personally, and it was later given to Alice by the crown prince…

In that way, a doll that Alice was tired of becoming a reward given by the Lord of Midnight Sun personally. Besides, no one could doubt it with Alice’s identity.

The burr puzzle was also within them. Its identity had also changed and became a miraculous collection given to the Lucifer Royal Family by the ancient alchemy grand master. There were only two pieces in total, and it was tagged with a sky-high price which was mainly for publicity. Of course, the more expensive the goods, the stronger the protection magic.

The Dark Moon Estate was originally a famous and bustling place, so families with strong economic power weren’t lacking. However, the gradual slump in recent years made the families turned their focus to the foreign place. Yet, the foundation accumulated over the years still existed, so there was no lack of spending power. The key was the lack of places and products for consumption.

Both Alice and Kia were on the second floor, together with 3 other female Great Demon shop assistants. Alice was sitting there with a high spirit, looking exactly like a proprietress. With her identity, she naturally didn’t need to talk much. She just had to say something occasionally to the customer, and it would give a good effect.

Kia at the stairway was the first to notice Chen Rui. Her eyes suddenly flashed with a strange look, and it didn’t seem to be a little friendly. Although it was a fleeting glance, Chen Rui still captured that look. He felt strange in his heart: I don’t think I’ve provoked this siren lately right?

Kia’s eyes instantly changed back to being charming. She came close and whispered, “Sir Secretary, you are here.”

The ecstatic voice in Chen Rui’s ear and the strange fragrance that went into his nose immediately accelerated his secretion of testosterone. His lust was rising; he almost embarrassed himself in public.

Thinking of the seductive talent of the succubus at the arena, he suddenly understood that this siren was deliberately charming him. However, it was several times more powerful than the succubus at the arena. With his current strength, he actually had an irresistible feeling, so he quickly focused his mind. Before he could speak, he heard the little loli’s surprised voice, “Chen Rui!”

“Are you done with your stuff?” Alice hopped over, “Are you here to help at the store today?”

This little loli wants to catch a strong coolie immediately when we meet. Chen Rui quickly shook his head, “Not yet. I was too busy in the past few days. Today, I could finally take some rest, but perhaps I will continue to be busy at night. I won’t be free at least for half a month.”

“It’s like this…” The little loli looked disappointed; it looked like she had a lot of things to say. She looked at the customers looking at her side with her eyes swiveled around, “The Jade Dragonfruit in the store is almost sold out. I command you to accompany me to the blue lake to pick the fruit right now!”

Chen Rui thought of the dangerous siren that would release her charm at any time, and he knew that it could be even worse if he stayed there, so he promised it. Alice said happily, “So let’s go now!”

“Only two of us?” Chen Rui was stunned.

“Of course. Athena is practicing her Greater Demon’s demonic fire, and the store can’t operate without Kia,” Alice smiled weirdly, “Are you… afraid that I’ll eat you alive?”

“Let’s go now then!” Chen Rui was afraid that the little loli would say something shocking in front of so many customers, so he quickly left.

The duo mounted on the tri-horned rhinos and headed out of the city gate. Alice couldn’t hold the excitement in her heart anymore; her words burst out like popcorn.

It turned out that after Shea personally attended the Princess Retail Store’s grand ribbon-cutting ceremony a few days ago, the business became better immediately. At first, it was basically just aristocrats coming with the main intention of supporting, but gradually, many people were truly attracted by the two types of chess, especially the demon-fighting chess. The customers gradually increased and the commoners also began to follow suit. The brand of Princess Retail Store had been successfully set, especially the limited editions of the two chess were in short supply. Looking at the magic crystal coins coming in daily, the little loli grinned from ear to ear.

“I have a good news! 1 of the 2 burr puzzles has been sold to the patriarch of the Mellon family!”

Chen Rui was taken aback. The burr puzzle is tagged with a sky-high price, but 1 was actually sold. Besides, it’s the Mellon family! Isn’t the Mellon Family supporting Joseph’s party? Why did they support us so much?

Chen Rui finally realized after listening to Alice’s explanation that the Mellon Family was a mechanic family. The patriarch himself was also a mechanic, but many members of the family had developed outside the Dark Moon Estate. The most famous one was Carl Mellon who had obtained the title of the mechanic master; he was currently working for the Red Spirit Lord, Josh, Alvin. It was also one of the main reasons the Mellon Family fell toward Joseph.

“The burr puzzle was sold at 50,000 black crystal coins!” When it came to this, the little loli’s eyes were brightened, and her pupils seemed to have changed into dollar signs?.”Let’s make a few more along with those limited editions of demon-fighting chess and princess chess; these things can sell for a lot of money!”

“No.” Chen Rui’s words interrupted the vain thoughts of the little miser. “Why could the burr puzzle sell at such high prices? Why is the limited edition of the demon-fighting chess and princess chess in short supply? This is called the price of rarity. Let alone the burr puzzle, the game of the luxury and normal version are actually the same. Only with the difference in craftsmanship, materials and your signature, the price actually differs a few folds. If you only look at the cost, the difference between the two isn’t much. Once the quantity is increased too much, the most important rarity value will be lost, then the price will inevitably fall. Do you understand?”

Alice was very clever and immediately understood. She looked like she had a sudden realization and the dollar signs in her two big eyes became admiring stars?, “ Oh , it turns out to be like this. Human brother is always despicable. I’ll always… listen to you.”

“When are you going to give me my part of the earnings?” Chen Rui seemed to have a certain immunity toward little loli’s ultimate move; he directly ignored the lethality of the word “brother”.

“Talking about money hurts feelings,” The little loli’s beautiful big eyes flashed continuously?. “The brother in my heart isn’t someone so ostentatious.”

The problem is that it’s too hurtful to my wallet to talk about feelings with you… Chen Rui didn’t have Shea’s aptitude, so he was a bit overwhelmed under such gaze. The little loli didn’t continue teasing him and changed the topic, “The money has been taken away by my sister. If you want, you can go to my sister. Also… my sister said, she will grant you Kia two months later.”

Shea’s promise previously was actually true, and she even told Alice!

“I’ve already told Kia, but Kia doesn’t seem willing.”

Chen Rui recalled Kia’s unfriendly gaze and the deliberate use of her seductive talent when he saw Kia just now, then he finally understood.

“Kia is truly stupid. What’s wrong with being your maidservant?” The little loli looked disappointed. She counted with her fingers while saying, “She can eat your cooking every day. When she’s bored, you can tell her stories and make something fun. When she has no money, you can pay for it…”

Chen Rui was speechless. How is that a servant? That’s more master-like than the master!

While the little loli spoke, she made the cute look again?, “Brother, why not I’ll be your maidservant?”

“Little princess, stop kidding. I’m really afraid of you, okay? Let’s hurry.” Chen Rui was shocked and urged the tri-horned rhino to run faster. Little loli seemed to realize something and followed him with her mount.

[1] <a href=”https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jungle_(board_game)”>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jungle_(board_game)</a>

chapters.title: Chapter 58: Counterattack! Loli'S Sneak Attack
chapters.body:
Chapter 58: Counterattack! Loli'S Sneak Attack

These days Chen Rui had gotten used to the helicopter-like wyverns, so it wasn’t as comfortable riding the bus-like tri-horned rhino now. After about an hour, the tri-horned rhinos that had been sprinting all the way finally arrived at the destination.

The place where Jade Dragonfruit grew wasn’t far from where Paglio liked to stay. Chen Rui was afraid that the poison dragon would come forward to greet or that Alice would find any clues, so he deliberately said loudly, “Little princess, we are here. I remember Jade Dragonfruit should be on the hill right?”

“Why are you so loud for?” Alice jumped off the tri-horned rhino with dissatisfaction. “Are you hiding something here that you’re afraid of me finding it out?”

She got it right! Chen Rui was cold sweating: Her reasoning skill shows again, and it’s still so strong!

Fortunately, Alice didn’t continue to deduce; suggested with interest instead, “Why not we barbeque again? Just like the last time we came to the blue lake.”

Chen Rui didn’t have the mood for picnic, so he shook his head and said, “Next time, we will go back after finish picking the Jade Dragonfruits.”

“I have been exhausted all these while, and it’s so rare for me to be out,” Alice said with her protruded lips☹️. “Do you really hate being alone with me? Didn’t you come along with Athena a few times to gather herbs?”

As she said, the little loli seemed to think of something and she looked suspicious, “Are you and Athena hiding something from me? Why does she look weird every time she talks about you?”

“No such thing!” Chen Rui knew that Athena worried about the poisoning incident the most, so perhaps the keen little loli noticed something wrong.

“No, something is wrong!” Alice looked at Chen Rui with suspicion. “I always feel that there’s something wrong with you guys. She is now blushing more compared to the past few years that I’ve known her. Did you swindle Athena’s… that?”

What is this! It was concerning the virginity, so Chen Rui quickly shook his head, “How am I dare to do that? You are oversensitive! By the way, don’t you know <Mind Reading>? Why don’t you try that cause I definitely didn’t!”

“That <Mind Reading> skill, you’ve known that it was fake a long time ago.” The little loli smiled like a little fox, “Let me guess; did you learn it from Athena?”

Seeing Alice’s expression, Chen Rui inexplicably felt anxious.

“I remember that the last time I said that I know <Mind Reading>, you seemed to be particularly nervous,” Alice frowned and looked like she was recalling, “It seemed to be about the grand master’s inheritance. Could it be that… there’s something wrong with the inheritance? You’re really good at telling story. Could it be that… the wilderness and inheritance are simply just some interesting stories made up by brother?”

Someone felt a chill down his spine: That’s too keen! Such an amazing observation! That was his greatest secret, so he couldn’t let the cat out of the bag.

“Little princess, you truly misunderstood! If there is no inheritance of the grand master, how do I do so many things? I even have the ability to resist poison and tame beasts?”

“Perhaps it’s your initial ability or the ability that you obtained after coming to the Demon Realm, but you deliberately hide them or you are waiting for a certain timing… I think you may be a lot stronger than this, perhaps even having strong combat power like Athena?” Little loli narrowed her eyes and examined Chen Rui, as if a CIA officer.

Chen Rui was truly pouring in cold sweat this time. Has little loli been monitoring me in some way? Or did Holmes… fucking cross-over?

It seems that reasoning and observation skills are the most powerful hidden talent of the Lucifer Family… In terms of this, the little loli is 10 times more powerful than her sister who has a beautiful misunderstanding.

“So, confess to me!” Alice’s sudden raise pitch shocked Chen Rui, “Did you have any bad intention toward me back then?”

It turned out to be a mischievous wild guess again! A false alarm! Chen Rui wiped a sweat. To avoid the little loli shifting her suspicion toward the greatest secret, he had to go along, “Since it has come to this, I have to tell the truth! I really do have some sort of… liking toward little princess. Every time I look at you makes me think of my sister in the human world. As my little life was in the hands of little princess back then, I dare not say it for fear of being blamed by you.”

“It is really liking…” Alice’s eyes widened and looked at Chen Rui in surprise. The strange brilliance of her purple eyes flickered for a while and gradually dimmed while she lowered her head.

“So, all this while, I’m just a sister in your heart…”

The little loli lowered her head and her slightly trembling body seemed to be crying. She suddenly raised her head, but there was no tear in her big eyes. Instead, she looked like she was thinking, “The words after… I don’t seem to remember… Wait, let me look at some reference.”

As Alice said, she took a few books out of her space bracelet, picked one and started reading seriously. Chen Rui, who was almost stunned, leaned over and saw the cover of these “references.”

“Confessions of A Lolicon”

“The Brother and Sister in between Taboo and Incest”

“Brother, We Can’t Do This”

……

By reading the names of the 3 books, Chen Rui’s cold sweat was out of control like the Yellow River – It turned out that the unhealthy books in the Princess Retail Store are not destroyed, but they are secretly hidden by little loli.

“Alice!” Chen Rui grabbed the book in her hand. “Don’t read this kind of book! I’ll give it to Princess Royal!”

“You dare!” Alice glanced with her eyes while holding another book titled “Magic! Whoever You Stare Gets Pregnant”. Chen Rui’s entire body was immediately petrified, and the book he grabbed was immediately taken back.

Alice skillfully kept all the books back to her space bracelet, “ Hmph! If you dare to report me, I’ll tell my sister now that you have bad intentions over me!”

Chen Rui was full of sweat – The beautiful misunderstanding with Shea isn’t solved yet. If Alice did that, the label of sister-con and lolicon will collide. I’m afraid that the explosion caused by this collision between two extremes would turn me, the innocent man into ashes.

“Princess Alice, you can’t frame me like that!” Chen Rui had to admit defeat, “I’m really afraid of you. I promise you that I won’t complain to Princess Royal, and we will start the picnic now, okay?”

“Wouldn’t you be fine if you said it earlier?” The little loli smiled sweetly, and her cute face suddenly turned red, “Also, don’t call me little princess or Your Royal Highness anymore; I prefer you to call my name directly.”

Is that the line from those unhealthy books just now? Chen Rui knew that he was no match with the current little loli, so he could only nod his head.

Seeing him agreed, Alice jumped happily.

“Brother, go pick some Jade Dragonfruit; I’ll prepare the picnic tools here.”

The word “brother” sounded smoother as little loli said, and it sounded very natural with no signs of pretentious. It seemed that her acting was getting better and better that Chen Rui had to admit that she was good.

Jade Dragonfruit grew on the opposite hill. When Chen Rui took a basket and started walking, he suddenly found out that someone was tracking him. Based on the footsteps, it shouldn’t be Paglio. He deliberately pretended to drop something and leaned over to pick it up. In his peripheral view, he saw a tiny figure quickly hid behind a rock. It is actually Alice!

Why is little loli tracking me? Did she find out something? Or does she want to prank me?

Countless thoughts flew through his mind. He acted as he didn’t notice and continued to move forward. Alice’s tracking technique was very amateur; sometimes she even inadvertently made a sound. Yet, the guy being tracked only looked back, then he went along with Alice and moved forward after he found no abnormalities.

Jade Dragonfruits grew on a shrub-like tree with a thick orange-like skin and fresh pulp inside. Chen Rui squatted and started picking Jade Dragonfruits. Under the effect of <Analytical Eyes>, he could clearly feel little loli hide herself from place to place all the way, as she was slowly approaching.

Soon, Alice had crept to a tree behind him. Chen Rui guessed that little loli was probably pranking, so he didn’t expose her to avoid further troubles. Then, when Alice came to his back, he keenly felt a gust of wind hitting the back of his head swiftly.

Chen Rui’s fighting nerves were instantly triggered. Sneak attack?

His current strength had reached the middle level of Intermediate Demon, and he had rich practical experience. Even if Alice used her <Dark Flame>, she still couldn’t rival. At that moment, Chen Rui made a choice between dodging, counterattacking and not moving.

“ Poom! ” The human who was focusing on picking fruits received a heavy blow at the back of his head and suddenly fell unconscious to the ground.

Alice as the main culprit was taken aback instead. She dropped the wooden stick in her hand and turned Chen Rui’s body over anxiously.

“Chen Rui! You won’t die right! I wasn’t intentional…”

Not intentional, but you still sneak attacked? Chen Rui who pretended to have fainted was scolding furiously in his mind. With his current Alkaid state physique, along with Star Power’s defense, he didn’t suffer much damage even though that blow just now wasn’t light. However, that wooden club did have a special stun effect making his brain a little bit dizzy now.

With his eyes closed, Chen Rui could feel Alice’s warm, little hand touched his forehead and checked his breath. She even put her head on his chest to listen to his heartbeat. She finally took a sigh of relief after confirming that Chen Rui wasn’t dying.

“This stun enchanted wooden club is still quite useful. Too bad it can only be used a few times. Next time I’ll let Old Gauss make me another one.” The little loli said to herself. She crouched down, approached, turned around, changed a few directions and searched his body for a while.

Is she searching for something? Chen Rui felt weirder. He had no treasure with him. Even if he had something, it’d be kept in the storage. While he was suspecting, suddenly his abdomen sunk. Alice actually sat on him.

Chen Rui could feel the sitting posture with her legs opened without opening his eyes… that seems a bit too… flirtatious .

Subsequently, Alice slowly leaned down and her body was closer. Her warm breath was approaching his face; she seemed to be a little nervous as well. Chen Rui could smell the faint fragrance from her body and the warm temperature of her body on him which made his heart beat crazily.

What is this little loli trying to do?

chapters.title: Chapter 59: First Kiss! The “Victim” Of The Unhealthy Books
chapters.body:
Chapter 59: First Kiss! The “Victim” Of The Unhealthy Books

Alice’s quick breathing was approaching. She seemed to hesitate for a while, then her soft, warm lips touched Chen Rui’s lips.

Chen Rui’s mind was blown. A strange feeling from his lips instantly spread to his entire body.

After his brain went blank for a short while, he finally regained consciousness – my first kiss after rebirth lost just like that!

Alice seemed to be even more uncomfortable as her body trembled. Her hands that were supporting her on the ground became powerless and her soft body laid on him.

Chen Rui once fantasized about his first kiss target after the rebirth. There was the passionate Athena, the charming Kia and even the iceberg royal sister, Shea, but in all honesty, Alice was definitely not one of them!

He never thought that his first kiss, at least the first kiss in this life, would be “taken away” by Alice in such a way. Those beautiful fantasies and lustful desires were all crushed by that ruthless stick!

The little loli once again started her great attempt and exploration. She was clearly more skillful this time. Her gentle lips made someone felt even weirder. It seemed that this feeling was actually not bad… However, a certain part seemed to begin to stir. No! I have to hold it! Otherwise, something bad will happen!

Soon, the little loli sat up slightly and Chen Rui heard the sound of flipping books. He immediately thought of the unhealthy books that were kept into the space. Even without looking at the cover, I could guess the name of the damn book!

Sure enough, I become the practice target of those unhealthy books…

After a while, the fragrance was approaching again. This time the little loli actually stuck her tongue in. Chen Rui was unconscious now but he dared not to act recklessly so he clenched his teeth tight and dared not to loosen.

Alice’s wet tongue stuck in simply for a while, then she felt exhausted, so she started panting on while leaning on his chest. Although little loli couldn’t be considered as a girl with child-look and big brea… that, but her chest was still a little big. What made Chen Rui want to cry even more was that the perverted part representing the “Alkaid” state couldn’t be contained anymore even though he kept suppressing it. Eventually, it reacted with his primitive instinct. That was such a beast!

The little loli seemed to feel the abnormality at her buttocks, so she sat up curiously, wanting to see what happened.

Chen Rui knew that he couldn’t pretend anymore. If Alice truly wanted to further study the structure of human male academically, then he wasn’t sure if he could preserve his virginity even if he didn’t want to be a pervert.

Chen Rui moved a bit, pretended to yawn and swallowed some saliva along the way to moisturize his dry throat.

Sure enough, at the moment that he moved, the little loli bounced off the body like she was electrocuted, and she quickly distanced herself; the speed wasn’t much inferior from Jesse’s. Chen Rui rubbed his blurry eyes, pretending to be just awakened, “ Eh , Alice, why are you here?”

Alice wanted to turn around and run initially, but when she heard his question, she quickly turned around and smiled, “I noticed that you haven’t come back, so I come to take a look. I found you suddenly fainted, so I wanted to come and help.”

Come and help with the posture of turning around to run? Your hand is even secretly hiding at the back? In all likelihood, it is the book that she didn’t get to keep in the bracelet in time.

The little loli looked very calm, but the blush on her face couldn’t be covered. She was like a shy green apple and also the best green apple. However, underripe was still underripe after all. If it was picked up in advance, once it was known by someone’s sister, the punishment would at least be castration.

What’s more, he was basically an innocent victim in this incident.

Sneak attack, force kissing, push down… It seemed that the Demon Realm is indeed a dangerous planet, but unfortunately, I can’t go back to the Earth…

Chen Rui regretted that he didn’t “wake up” earlier. At that moment, there was still a kind of warmth between his lips and there was an indescribable feeling in his heart. He shook his head fiercely and shook all the weird thoughts away. He said, “Thank you, Alice. I didn’t know what happened. I suddenly felt a pressure at the back of my head, then I couldn’t remember anything. I’m still kind of dizzy now. Let’s pick these Jade Dragonfruits and go back directly. We’ll have a picnic next time okay?”

The little loli was guilty, so she nodded and didn’t insist. When the two turned around and left, they seemed to have heard an irresistible laughter. Alice looked around suspiciously, but she did not find anything. Chen Rui acted as if he didn’t hear anything, but he was fiercely cursing in his heart: Damn Paglio has been watching the fun out of us all this while!

The world has changed. Today, I actually failed unexpectedly. Could it be that royal sister has become the past while loli is the kingly way now?

Upon reaching the Dark Moon City, the little loli left Chen Rui and rushed straight to the Princess Retail Store angrily.

Chen Rui was dumbfounded as the reason why Alice was unhappy was very simple. Along the way, little loli had been avoiding the conversation for a long time and finally, she seemingly asked casually, “Do you prefer someone with “well-developed” breasts like Athena?”

Someone had been overwhelmed by her questions earlier, so he nodded subconsciously. The little loli’s smirking expression immediately turned gloomy, and she rushed back on the tri-horned rhino.

Chen Rui sighed: Haih, this is fine too. If not, I don’t know how it will develop under the influence of those damn unhealthy books…

Sure enough, when Chen Rui went to the blue lake for special training at night, he was laughed at shamelessly by Paglio. The disgusting poison dragon even imitated Alice’s voice and called him ‘brother’. It made the human have a goosebump, and he almost fought with Paglio with his life.

Finally, the poison dragon went back to the main topic and asked Chen Rui about last night’s victory in detail. The next opponent was Balrog, Reka. According to the information, Reka had strong offense and defense capabilities; his mean was ruthless; he was the strongest Intermediate Demon at the arena.

Reka was famous but Chen Rui had become increasingly confident after the first two battles. Not to mention that his strongest move, <Aurora Shot> still wasn’t used.

The sturdiness of the “skeleton” in the Alkaid state had greatly enhanced the defense of Chen Rui. If the filament “muscles” could be solidified like the “skeleton” in the future special training, his strength would definitely be brought up another level. The key was to see how much aura could he get from today’s deal.

The next day, Chen Rui who was in a cloak, came to the base camp; the old dwarf had already been waiting there.

Chen Rui asked, “Did you contact Silva?”

The old dwarf replied, “I’ve already contacted. However, the one who passed the message is his most powerful subordinate, Grau. He said he’ll give us an answer after 2 hours; now it’s almost time.”

“Where’s Jesse?”

The old dwarf frowned, “He went out early in the morning, saying that we don’t have to wait for him; he will appear at the right moment. I’m worried that this guy will run away with the money.”

Chen Rui said calmly, “He doesn’t seem like that kind of person. Then let’s believe that he will appear at the right moment.”

As the old dwarf still wanted to say more, a little imp ran in, “Silva’s party passed a message asking Master and Sir Didi to go to the ancient house on the 4th street of the southeast area. They also said they’re afraid that we will play tricks, so only two of us are allowed to go.”

“The ancient house? That is Silva’s nest! That guy’s reputation has always been very poor. Master, let’s forget about this deal!” The old dwarf looked anxious, “It’s all Jesse’s fault for missing at the critical moment!”

Chen Rui spoke, “Let’s go; you lead the way.”

“Master!” The old dwarf shivered, and he still wanted to persuade.

“I have to get the fluorescent stones.” Chen Rui turned around and looked at the old dwarf, “This is your last test. If you dare not go, I won’t force you. However, don’t call me Master in the future.”

The old dwarf was shocked. The difficult life with his daughter in his previous days came to his mind, then he thought of the huge transformation after the encounter with Aguile and the trust of his “master”. He contemplated in his mind for a while, clenched his teeth and finally walked forward.

Whether it was out of the appreciation or the thought of seeking wealth in risks, the old dwarf had taken the most important step in his life.

Exactly like the old dwarf portrayed, Silva’s nest was really not simple. Just the 4th street alone was filled with his men; mostly muscular, ugly people.

The old dwarf was getting more afraid as he walked. However, since he was already there, he had to force himself to continue moving forward. The courtyard of this ancient house was quite large; it was similar to a villa. Through layers of protection, they finally saw Silva in a hall.

Silva was a middle-aged lich. Although his body was thin, a magic aura was faintly surrounding his body. He was holding a charming succubus with revealing attire in his arms. Beside Silva was a sturdy centaur. That was Silva’s strongest fighter; his strength had reached the peak of ordinary centaurs.

Chen Rui had already activated <Analytical Eyes> earlier. It showed that the strength of Silva and Grau were E. In other words, they were all Intermediate Demons. There were still several demons with E-level strengths around, and two of them were hiding behind the pillars on both sides.

In the battle with Jesse, Chen Rui further realized the mystery of <Analytical Eyes>. Not only it could assess the strength and communicate with demonic beasts, but it could also act as a detector to find hidden enemies. However, there were certain restrictions on the effective distance.

Silva was sitting on the sofa as he took a sip of the wine fed by the succubus. His bird claw-like palm was caressing the succubus’ busty chest. He asked casually, “So you are Aguile, the leader of the Cloak Gang?”

“That’s right.” Chen Rui went straight into the topic and asked, “I heard that you have a batch of fluorescent stones for sale?”

“Are you sure you can afford it?” Silva’s expression was full of unconcealed contempt. “Did you bring the money?”

Chen Rui turned his hand and a large, bulging pouch appeared. An experienced person could tell from the crisp collision sound that it was black crystal coins when the pouch was shaken.

Seeing his master actually took out the money so quickly, the old dwarf’s heart was anxious, but he didn’t dare to speak.

“You even have space equipment.” Silva’s eyes showed his greed, “15 high quality, 30 medium quality, and 50 low quality. A total of 2000 black crystal coins; give me the money if you want it.”

The old dwarf, Didi heard that it was 3 times higher than the original price and the retail price in the magic store, so he finally couldn’t help but pulled Chen Rui’s cloak, “Master…”

Chen Rui asked for a price calmly, “Such an unpopular stock can’t sell for much. I’ll take everything with 600 black crystal coins.”

“You dare to bargain at my territory?” Silva seemed to hear a joke. The succubus in his arms also smiled along with Silva’s words. The surrounding subordinates also burst into laughter. Only Grau didn’t; he was carefully looking at his surroundings.

Silva laughed coldly, “I’ve changed my mind now. 5000 black crystal coins and your space equipment.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “That’s too expensive; I can’t afford it.”

“Who said that’s the price of the fluorescent stone? I don’t intend to sell the fluorescent stones at all!” Silva sneered, “That’s the money to buy the lives of two of you! Since you are not willing, then die here! Do it!”

chapters.title: Chapter 60: Silva Who Was Too Late To Regret
chapters.body:
Chapter 60: Silva Who Was Too Late To Regret

As Silva just finished his words, the figures hiding behind the pillars from both sides suddenly ambushed. Chen Rui had been long prepared for a long time. He swept his feet, but his first target was actually the old dwarf. That kick’s strength was well controlled; the old dwarf was knocked back under the wooden cabinet at the side.

At that moment, the figures from both sides had already rushed over. The cloak turned and “ Poom! ”. Before the two could form a pincer attack, they were already knocked back. One of them crashed into the pillar heavily; he could barely hold himself up. There were even cracks on the sturdy pillar.

Those two were just early-stage Intermediate Demon who were far inferior from Bloody Hand, Lance. Thus, they naturally couldn’t stop Chen Rui’s charged heavy blow. Chen Rui mostly battled with opponents who were stronger than himself, so now he could clearly feel his improvement after he fought with these people.

The centaur, Grau was about to attack, but suddenly a figure jumped down from the magic chandelier on the ceiling. It was charging as fast as lighting toward Silva’s head. Grau’s reaction was extremely fast as he pulled Silva up and threw him several meters away to escape the danger. However, the figure that came down turned out to be an <Afterimage>; the true ultimate move appeared at Grau’s back. The centaur felt a chill at his back, and he was already stabbed by a sharp weapon.

Grau’s strength had already reached the highest stage after all, so when he stiffened his body with all his strength, only 3/10 of the weapon was penetrated. When Grau turned around to attack, the assassin had already run far away. As the assassin retreated, other screams could be heard; another two men were dead.

Although the assassin injured Grau, he also exposed himself. Grau wiped off the blood at his back. His ferocious eyes were staring at the dark elf who almost took his life. He thought of a name, clenched his teeth and said, “Quick Wolf Jesse!”

As expected, Jesse appeared at the right moment.

“That’s the strongest middle-stage fighter from the arena?” Silva was shocked. He pushed away the succubus who wanted to help him up. He got up and said, “Jesse, how much benefit did you receive from Aguile? You actually dared to provoke me?”

Jesse sprinted through the crowds while the dual daggers in his hands harvesting life swiftly. Although there was also Intermediate Demon among Silva’s thugs, Jesse’s experience and means were far from those average demons. In a blink of an eye, several more corpses were on the ground, making the rest felt terrified.

Jesse paused his body and he replied faintly, “30 black crystal coins.”

” I’ll pay 10 times the price, 300 black crystal coins.” Silva waved his hand and a coin bag flew toward Jesse. “Kill Aguile for me.”

Jesse’s scary strike left Silva with a tiny trauma, so he intended to use the money to make Jesse and Aguile kill each other, or perhaps taking advantage of the internal strife.

Jesse received the coin bag and looked at Chen Rui. He felt that the eyes behind the mask weren’t moved. The dark elf raised his brows and threw the coin bag to Chen Rui, “I don’t have space equipment; help me hold it for a while.”

Chen Rui agreed and the money bag instantly disappeared in his hand. There was a smile behind the mask. This Jesse is quite interesting.

Silva didn’t expect the dark elf to not appreciate his kindness. He clenched his teeth and said, “Damn Jesse. You’re just a little famous in the arena. How dare you ignore I, Sir Silva’s kindness!”

“I think you haven’t been to the arena these past few days,” Jesse said faintly while keeping his hands busy and killed another two. “My life has already lost to Aguile.”

Silva was taken aback. His eyes fell on the little-known Cloak Gang’s leader. There was a demon at the entrance that already realized, “That’s right! Aguile is No. 64! The strongman who defeated Jesse and Lance!”

No. 64! Silva was shocked and secretly regretted underestimating the Cloak Gang. However, since the two parties had turned their faces to this extent, even if the loss was huge, he had to eliminate the two of them, otherwise, he would lose his place in the Dark Moon City.

“Get rid of them! Grau, you deal with Jesse; the rest will deal with Aguile together!” Silva thought and immediately gave a killing command. Then, countless men were constantly rushing in from outside the house.

Silva stood up as he mumbled. Suddenly, a faint green glow appeared on Grau’s body. With the help of the green light, Grau rushed toward Jesse with his speed increased suddenly. It was a skill called <Accelerate> of the wind magic, which could greatly enhance the speed at the cost of defense. However, it was the most suitable tactic for Grau when facing someone with weaker strength like Jesse.

Jesse knew that Grau was at the peak of Intermediate Demon who had greater strength than him. What’s more, he was enchanted by <Accelerate>, so he paused and focused.

Chen Rui made use of his speed to swiftly moved and attacked around the crowd while gradually approaching Silva. Silva was using magic to interfere with Jesse’s speed, making Jesse fell into a dangerous situation. When Silva noticed Chen Rui’s intentions, he was shocked.

Initially, he wanted to use the strongest Grau to kill Jesse, who was relatively weak, then he would concentrate all forces on Aguile. However, he didn’t expect Aguile wasn’t trapped by so many people, and he was coming closer instead.

As “Aguile” was very fast and he was mixed in the crowd, Silva couldn’t use his spiritual power to lock on him to cast magic. He set his mind and started mumbling. After a moment, he waved both his hands and a huge lightning appeared out of nowhere, hitting directly at the crowd. The lightning first hit a demon near Chen Rui. The demon was instantly electrocuted and fell with a burnt body. Yet, the lightning was chained; it continued to hit another demon and the third strike fell on Chen Rui finally.

Chen Rui’s body trembled and his muscle involuntarily paralyzed. The demon next to him was also knocked down to the ground. That was <Chain Lightning>. It could attack the closest 4 people regardless if they were allies or enemies. Seeing Aguile being struck by the <Chain Lightning>, the rest of the demons took advantage to rush toward Chen Rui.
