At once, countless punches and sticks hit directly on Chen Rui.

Chen Rui snorted furiously and his strength burst out. The few guys that were in front of him were instantly knocked back, following with consecutive hits sound and a few men falling.

Silva was secretly shocked. He himself was a lich at middle-stage Intermediate Demon that specialized in wind magic. The <Chain Lightning> just now was already all he got. Although the first out of the 4 strikes of the <Chain Lightning> was the strongest and it gradually weakened, the power was still strong. Coupled with those attacks by his subordinates, even Grau couldn’t endure that. He didn’t expect Aguile to be so horrifying that he seemed to be not affected at all.

Actually, Chen Rui’s situation wasn’t as easy as Silva’s imagination. Yet, the Alkaid state’s defensive power and the regeneration of <Astral Form> were very powerful. Thus, he could endure the attacks and charge toward Silva at full speed – First capture the leader to capture the bandits.

Silva was shocked. The lightning spell’s chant was too long that it was too late to start chanting. He drew a circle with his hand while his mouth fluttered quickly, then a translucent dome appeared outside his body. Chen Rui punched directly, then Silva and the shield were knocked flying into the wall, And the shield shook for a while. Although Silva who was inside wasn’t harmed, he was petrified with fear.

As Chen Rui was about to attack the dome shield, he saw Jesse being kicked by Grau at the opposite. Jesse’s body hit the wooden cabinet that the old dwarf was hiding coincidentally and the wooden cabinet instantly shattered, scaring the old dwarf of his wits.

“Grau! Die!” Chen Rui couldn’t bother about Silva and charge toward Grau.

When Grau was about to catch up with Jesse to kill, he heard Aguile shouting. As soon as he turned around, he saw a white ball with a horrific breath rushing straight toward him. As it was too close, he was too late to react, so he was hit directly.

Grau had a huge fear in his mind instinctively. He tried desperately to resist it, but he still couldn’t resist the mighty power of the light ball. Both his feet dragged a crazy path on the ground with countless cracks along the way.

As the white ball’s distance lengthened, Grau’s defense, which was already weakened by the wind magic became weaker and weaker.

Horrific destructive power… was Grau’s feeling of the light ball, which also became the last conscious thought of the centaur in this world.

Silva saw Aguile opened his hand and a huge light ball hit Grau with countless terrible trace of destruction along the way. Even someone as strong as Grau couldn’t survive it. After resisting for a while, he was completely engulfed. The light ball penetrated through the walls, and the screams could be heard from outside the house. No one knew which unfortunate guy faced the same ending as Grau.

Silva was frightened. The thugs who were ready to charge were also petrified. At the same time, Jesse, who had just struggled out of the wooden cabinet was stunned. Instead, the old dwarf who climbed out was relatively calm.

Chen Rui hit perfectly with a blow. He felt that the Star Power in his body was exhausted, but he showed no difference on the surface. He opened his palm again and aimed at the group of thugs, “Fuck off if you don’t want to die!”

As soon as Chen Rui finished that sentence, those who were scared out of their wits had already escaped, even those who were faking death on the ground were no exception. Even Grau couldn’t resist such terrifying power, who dared to stay here?

Silva’s entire body was trembling and the protective layer on his body had long crumbled as his magic collapsed. When he saw Aguile approaching while making a chilling sneer, he was horrified, “Don’t kill me! I’ll give you everything!”

“That depends on how much you’d pay for your life. If you can’t give up your wealth, then I can only take your life.”

Silva recalled that he said a similar threat to “Aguile”; he couldn’t help but want to slap himself a few times. It was too late for him to regret now. In order to save his life, he couldn’t hold onto his money, so he hurriedly removed the space ring from his hand, “Sir Aguile, here is all my wealth…”

Chen Rui took the space ring and opened the entrance. Then, he saw many bulging leather bags falling out. They were all black crystal coins. There were a few hundred of such bags; they piled up on the floor instantly. Other than that, there were a few items that looked expensive, but there weren’t any fluorescent stones.

The old dwarf’s eyeballs almost fell out by looking at that. So much money! There are at least two to three hundred coins in a bag which adds up to tens of thousands in total!

Chen Rui was also secretly surprised. This Silva actually has so much wealth! How exactly did he get these!

However, this money was all belonged to Chen Rui now. Such a “righteous” move that robbed criminals of their wealth and benefited himself should be done more often.

Chen Rui waved his hand; he didn’t seem like he used any space equipment, but hundreds of coin bags along with the ring actually disappeared.

That move shocked Silva: Such speed and technique are definitely not from space equipment. Could it be the lost space magic?

“Sir, as long as you let me go, I am willing to join Cloak Gang as your subordinate to make more money for sir.”

That suggestion moved Chen Rui’s heart slightly. He asked, “Where are the fluorescent stones?”

Silva looked hesitant, then Silva saw his opponent slowly stretching fingers and pointing at him. Silva said as he was terrified, “Please come with me, sir!”

Jesse and the old dwarf stayed at the hall to look out while Chen Rui took Silva to the basement warehouse.

chapters.title: Chapter 61: Unexpected Discovery
chapters.body:
Chapter 61: Unexpected Discovery

Upon entering the basement warehouse, Chen Rui found out why Silva hesitated. The fluorescent stones were stored in several boxes in the warehouse, but there were actually dozens of people locked up in jail beside the warehouse. Among these people, there were succubi, dark elf, centaur, and even two female great demons, all of which were women and children. They were all naked, restrained by magic handcuffs and dispirited.

Chen Rui suddenly recalled that Dark Moon often had incidents of missing women and children in Shea’s estate logbook. He thought about it and suddenly realized it. He said calmly, “No wonder you can earn so much money. It turned out that the unpopular business like the fluorescent stones is just a cover. Where will these demons be trafficked to? What’s the price?”

Silva saw that Aguile seemed to be interested, so he took a sigh of relief and replied, “Sir is truly an understanding person. These demons will be trafficked to Blue Lava Estate as their bidding price is really high. If sir is willing, it can be our Cloak Gang’s biggest source of income…”

Blue Lava Estate! Chen Rui originally inferred that it might be Red Spirit Estate’s doing, but the truth was unexpected. He immediately thought of a problem. The Blue Lava Estate was at the south of Dark Moon. The passage is long blocked by the bandits; it has been inaccessible. How are these demons trafficked over?

Silva’s sense of immersion was very strong; he immediately regarded himself as a member of Cloak Gang, hoping to be recognized by this nemesis. He just wanted to stay alive for now, so he flattered again, “There are quite a few virgins among these women. If sir like any of them, enjoy as you wish! From my personal experience, the young girl of the dark elf race is the best, sir should give it a try. I’m sure…”

“The little dark elf girl? Is it?” Silva’s flattery made Chen Rui glance at him with murderous intent, and he said, “I have long wanted to be involved in such business. I never expected such a coincidence. It is truly a godsend opportunity. As far as I know, the bandits on the path to the Blue Lava Estate is quite powerful. This path seems to be inaccessible. You won’t be lying to me right!”

Before dealing with this scum, it was necessary to clear this problem.

“No!” Silva explained quickly, “There is a badge among the item that was offered to sir earlier. As long as you show the badge, the bandits will naturally let you pass.”

Badge? Chen Rui moved his mind and immediately found the badge among the icons in the storage. He moved his mind slightly, then a palm-sized blue badge appeared in his hand. There was a black dragon image on it with two heads, “Are you talking about this badge? Where did you get this?”

Silva saw it clearly that Aguile had no space equipment on the wrists or fingers. The badge appeared out of nowhere. He was more certain that his opponent possessed the lost space magic; he must have a remarkable background. So, he dared not to lie and answered honestly, “When I was smuggling herbs at the Blue Lava Estate previously, I met a Great Demon named Lavat. The badge was given by him, and the business of demon-trafficking was also introduced by him. When I meet the bandits on the road, I only need to say Lavat’s name and take out the badge. It is best to offer some wealth, then the route would be unimpeded back and forth whether it was transporting herbs or demons. The demon-trafficking business usually trades once half a year. The last deal was less than 2 months ago, so sir can enjoy these women as you please. It’ll be alright even if you play until they die.”

Chen Rui asked for more details. He finally confirmed that the bandits at the south came from the Blue Lava Estate. Judging from various factors, the bandits might actually be dispatched by the government. In Shea’s data, the Blue Lava lord had been greatly favored by the Crown Prince, Grimm in his early years. They were one of the forces that secretly supported the Dark Moon. He never thought they would be the ungrateful demon who had hidden agendas behind their smile.

The development of an estate was inseparable from the resources of funds, construction, population, etc. Over the years, the Blue Lava Estate supported Shea on the surface, but they had been taking away huge amounts of herbs and population resources quietly through such a method at the back. At the same time, they dispatched “bandits” to blatantly block the trade route and achieve the purpose of pleasing the imperial city. Silva was most likely not the only one involved in such trade in the Dark Moon. To some extent, the Blue Lava Estate that had benefited from both sides was more wicked and ruthless than the Red Spirit Estate.

It was definitely an unexpected discovery, and it was quite important.

After Chen Rui probed a lot of information from Silva, he patiently asked, “Recall carefully. Is there anything that you didn’t mention clearly?”

Silva pondered carefully for a while, then he shook his head and said, “I’m certain there’s no more. I’ve said everything that I know; I dare not to hide; I will do my best under sir and play my role to make Cloak Gang rise to another level!”

“Very good!” Chen Rui nodded with satisfaction. The next sentence made Silva’s sneer froze on his face, “Unfortunately, you have no value now.”

That was the last sentence that Silva heard in his life.

The No. 4 street in the southeast block had always been Silva’s territory. It could be regarded as one of the biggest forces within the southeast block. However, after a change, Silva’s old house had changed its owner into a small organization called Cloak Gang. A number of Silva’s men also defected to the Cloak Gang.

Weirdly, Najib, the leader of the law and order of this area couldn’t care less about this. He expressed his support for Cloak Gang in a tacit manner. In fact, Najib had gotten a substantial benefit secretly.

After witnessing Chen Rui eliminating Grau with <Aurora Shot>, Jesse had been quiet. Until Chen Rui gave him the 300 black crystal coins, he asked, “Did you really want a whetstone the other day or were you just pitying me?”

Chen Rui couldn’t bother to explain much and asked, “Did you lose your courage to be the whetstone now?”

That sentence provoked the dark elf and his eyes also became sharper, “At this time of the next month, I will challenge you!”

“Good! Before that, you stay at Cloak Gang.” Chen Rui nodded. To deal with this kind of person, he had to provoke him; he could also get a fighter as the second master and the like for the Cloak Gang.

“Don’t be complacent for killing Grau by sneak attack. Balrog, Reka is regarded as the king of Intermediate Demons. A weak character like Grau is incomparable. The effect of your ultimate move might do only a little to him. Reka’s offense and defense capabilities and his abilities were close to horrifying. If you rely on speed, you will not be able to beat him. If you fight him head-on, you’ll probably be killed within a few minutes with your current strength.”

Is this guy reminding me? Chen Rui looked at the dark elf with a strange look and smiled, “Maybe you are right, but that is just my current strength.”

The dark elf replied with a cold ‘ Hmph ’.

Chen Rui didn’t spend too much time at Cloak Gang. He left the specific affairs to Jesse and the old dwarf, and he returned to the palace’s lab. Although the Cloak Gang replaced Silva, it was impossible to actually be involved in demon-trafficking. The women and children who were caught were sent back, and the homeless individuals stayed at Cloak Gang.

Silva’s foundation was very thick; it had its manpower and territory. With Chen Rui’s ability, he could definitely make good use of these conditions to do some legal business or develop in other ways. However, that wasn’t his current priority as everything had to wait after the 2-month test.

The harvest from the ancient house was considerable; in contrast, the injuries suffered were negligible. The pile of fluorescent stones alone provided more than 30,000 auras. Together with the rest of the available magic materials in the warehouse and the original 9,000 auras, the total had exceeded 70,000 auras. He didn’t specifically count those black crystal coins; he simply gave the old dwarf two bags as the funds of Cloak Gang.

There were less than 20 days left. If Chen Rui were to compete with a high-stage with his current middle-stage strength, he would definitely lose. Jesse said that Grau’s strength was incomparable to Reka, the king of Intermediate Demons in the arena. It was just like today’s battle where he could easily knock down the fighters of the same stage. What’s more that <Aurora Shot> could only be used twice a day. For each shot, more than half of Star Power would be gone. If he didn’t look for the right timing, it would be counterproductive, so he must fully utilize the time rule of the training ground.

During the gap of rest and recovery, Chen Rui finally couldn’t hold his curiosity and selected the construction of “exchange center” among the building at the throne. Now that he had 70,000 auras along with the estimated more than 100,000 black crystal coins in total, using 1000 auras to activate the exchange center seemed relatively insignificant.

Unlike the architecture of the training ground and storage warehouse, the exchange center looked mysterious and gorgeous. After entering the exchange center, the light screen displayed: Star Collector, exchange capped at 1 Star. There were several major categories; Except for the potion category, the rest were gray. It seemed that 1 star could only exchange for potions.

The first page was just Sober Potion, Healing Potion, Antidote Potion, Stamina Recovery Dust, Spirit Recovery Dust and other common goods that a usual potioneer could brew. The following were the white potions that could only be brewed by master level, such as Strength Potion, Wind Walk Potion, Iron Wall Potion, Spirit Potion etc, as well as the high difficulty Stamina Recovery Potion, Spirit Recovery Potion, Single Elemental-enhancing Potion, etc.

After the page was turned, there were 10 potions on the second page. All of which were black potions. The name made Chen Rui really surprised:

True. Strength Potion! True. Wind Walk Potion! True. Spirit Potion! True. Iron Wall Potion! True. Earth-Enhancing Potion! True. Water-Enhancing Potion! True. Fire-Enhancing Potion! True. Wind-Enhancing Potion! True. Dark-Enhancing Potion! True. Light-Enhancing Potion!

If white potions were a symbol of potion master, then the black potions represented an almost insurmountable gap – the potion grand master!

Demon Realm hadn’t had any grand master for thousands of years. If any 1 of the 10 black potions was taken out, not only the pharmaceutics field, but also the alchemy field and the entire Demon Realm would be shocked.

Compared to the white potions, the “True” potions had the word “True” added literally. Both were used to enhance strength, but their effectiveness was poles apart. For example, Strength Potion could increase strength by 30% and last for 10 minutes. After 10 minutes, one would enter a weakened state which was the so-called side effects. After ingesting 1 bottle, it required 2 hours before ingesting another bottle, otherwise it would be ineffective.

True. Strength Potion was more effective and longer-lasting. It could increase strength by 60%, and it would last for 20 minutes. After the effective period, there wouldn’t be any side effects, and the cooldown was shortened to an hour.

The “True” potions were merely the introductory potions as a grand master. As it went further, there were also the “Eternal” potions that permanently increased various abilities. In addition, there were also the potions that resembled a potioneer’s highest achievement, Longevity Potion, and Resurrection Potion!

Coincidentally, these potions alone would be able to let Chen Rui back up his identity as a grand master’s successor. Besides, it was just an item available for exchange within 1-Star.

chapters.title: Chapter 62: 4-Folds Gravity
chapters.body:
Chapter 62: 4-Folds Gravity

Chen Rui could be sure that when he broke through Alkaid state and achieved 2-Stars evolution, the categories available for exchanged would increase. There were still 3-Stars and 4-Stars… At once, someone was immersed in dreams and delusions.

However, the price of “True” potions wasn’t cheap. Each bottle cost 10,000 auras. The white potions were 1000 to 2000 auras per bottle while the ordinary potions were 100 to 300 auras.

Since Chen Rui’s last bottle of Healing Potion was given to Jesse, he tried to exchange for a Healing Potion from the center with 100 auras and drank it. He found out that the effect was even stronger than the one that Aldas brewed; the recovery speed of injuries was greatly accelerated. Only Star Power wasn’t recovered yet.

Chen Rui guessed that these ordinary potions or master-level potions were all brewed by the “grand master level” Super System. So, their effectiveness was better than those from ordinary masters. Nominally, he was Aldas’ apprentice, but in reality, they had a close relationship. If his face was thick, he could feed on the potions. Potions at the exchange center consumed aura after all. Especially the “True” black potions. First, it was too expensive. Second, it wasn’t the right time to reveal. So, he would save it for the future possible needs.

After getting enough rest, Chen Rui entered the training ground. He could already adapt to doubled gravity without Star Power. This time, he wanted to try 4-folds gravity. As for the time rule, it would still be 5-fold.

Originally, from Chen Rui’s perspective, 4-folds gravity had only doubled the pressure of 2-folds gravity. With his current strength, he would try his best to hold on without Star Power. If it was successful, he could give 8-fold gravity a try. However, only after entering the state of 4-folds gravity that he realized it couldn’t be measured using usual numbers or addition.

For example, if one’s weight limit is 200 kg, one could still support after adding 100 kg to the initial 100 kg. If another 100 kg is added, one absolutely won’t make it. It is just like the last straw that broke the camel’s back.

It wasn’t merely the addition of power, but it was more a challenge of limits!

Chen Rui felt that it was 10 times more uncomfortable as compared to the first time he entered doubled gravity. His original wright of 65 kg suddenly became 260 kg. Whether it was breathing or internal organs’ movement, the load was multiplied under accumulation. Even if he laid on the ground in a ridiculous position, he still felt kind of dizzy.

Am I being too impatient to choose 5-folds the time right away? Am I going to stay like this for 5 days? Anyway, I can’t waste the 9000 auras!

Chen Rui laid on the floor with his face flushed and his eyes were bloodshot. He tried hard to move his fingers. If he used Star Power, it would definitely accelerate the adaptation, and it wouldn’t be so difficult. However, after the experience with 2-folds gravity, he knew that in such a state, the lesser the Start Power was used, the better the effectiveness of <Refined Body>.

If he couldn’t stop using Star Power, then he would get used to relying on it to avoid suffering and the training effect would be greatly reduced. Therefore, he had been using his physical strength to resist the terrible gravity without using any power. If he wanted to break through the limits, he had to put himself at the brink of death. If he tortured himself now, he could be torturing enemies during battle.

There were a few times that Chen Rui felt like he couldn’t hold it anymore, but he still gritted his teeth to make it through. From slowly moving his fingers and body… to supporting himself to sit up, stand up, fall, and stand up again… It was like simply putting the body on an anvil and letting the hammer of gravity repeatedly beat and refine it. It was definitely a huge challenge to willpower.

Strength couldn’t be attained just by shouting slogans. There was no shortcut on the path to true strength. A lazy genius was equivalent to an idiot, not to mention that he was no genius.

Red Spirit Estate.

The shattering noise of things crushing constantly sounded from a room; it only stopped after a long time.

Joseph was panting with his fists tightly clenched. The room was already a mess. There were broken pieces everywhere; a sturdy wooden table was shattered; there were also several corpses of succubus dressed like a maid on the floor making the floor full of blood.

Other than Joseph, there was only one demon living. It was a medium-sized man who looked like a human being, he was most likely also a great demon with the mutated bloodline.

The man quietly waited for Joseph to finish venting, then only he opened his mouth, “Kanita deliberately grabbed the opportunity of you losing the match to accuse master of not completing the Regent’s orders on suppressing the Dark Moon. Wallon who participated in the match on behalf of Red Spirit also took the opportunity to tell the Lord in the face that master put shame on the Red Spirit Estate, and even lost the valuable wyverns to the Dark Moon. That’s why the Lord was so furious. Obviously, Walloon and the few old guys who were initially neutral have defected toward Kanita. We need to be prepared. Master, what you need most now is to keep a calm mind.”

Joseph took a few deep breaths, and he finally calmed down, “Ledo, you are right. The failure has become a reality, so staying angry is pointless. It’s just that the fucking Kanita is so good at taking the advantage when I fall. He actually mentioned a few times in front of the father to replace me to take over the Dark Moon! What’s more, father actually didn’t object!”

“He didn’t object, but he didn’t agree either! Actually, master and Kanita are only competing to be the first successor, not truly succeeding in the Lord’s position. Besides, Sir Lord has yet to reach his old and weak age. That’s why he has been playing with the balance.” Ledo smiled slightly, “Since the failure at the arena is irreversible, master might as well be generous in this aspect. It can show Kanita’s lack of magnanimous. The next step depends on how master wants to counterattack.”

Joseph Shen said with a lowered voice, “Royce came with important news some time ago, Aldas in the Dark Moon City is likely to be attempting grand master-level potions.”

“Grand master-level potions!” Ledo looked stunned, “That Aldas is the dark elf that poisoned and killed the No. 1 potioneer genius from the imperial city? There isn’t any potion grand master in the Demon Realm for thousands of years. Examples of people trying to achieve grand master-level aren’t little, but none succeeded. Is this Aldas certain of succeeding?”

“Even if he has a 99% chance of failing, we can’t ignore the 1% chance of succeeding.” Joseph’s eyes revealed a serious expression. “Aldas was originally sponsored by Princess Royal Shea, so he could barely pass the Master-level assessment. Yet, don’t know what happened these years that his pharmaceutics research has reached such a terrible extent, and he has been hiding it. If it weren’t for Sandro dying in his hands, no one would know his true strength. Nowadays, many people have regarded him as the top potion master of the empire. Even if he fails to attain grand master-level, his powerful strength cannot be ignored. In case he succeeded, I’m afraid even the Regent, Prince Obsidian has to reconsider his moves…”

Ledo nodded thoughtfully, “In this way, even if Aldas can’t be a grand master, as long as he becomes part of our support with his current reputation and strength, even Sir Lord will bias toward master among the successor candidates.”

“Aldas lacked some materials when he was experimenting with potions; he once let his human apprentice to ask for free test samples from the magic store. Royce handled it pretty well as he gifted him a complete piece of every material, at least leaving a rather good impression in Aldas’ heart.”

Ledo’s eyes were brightened, “It seems that as long as we can continue providing a large amount of materials, then…”

“No, Aldas’ loyalty toward Princess Shea is well known. He won’t bother even when the imperial city tried to invite him” A creepy smile gradually appeared on Joseph’s face, “However, everyone has a weakness. During the previous Master Challenge, Sandro once threatened with Aldas’ long lost sister, and he eventually angered Aldas. He didn’t hesitate to show his true strength and poisoned Sandro into ashes with just one potion. Thus, to control or to win Aldas over, his sister was the most important key. Ledo, you shall complete this task; you must find clues in this regard at all costs.”

“Understood, master.”

Ledo bowed and walked out of the room. He waved at the scared maids outside, only then the few maids dared to go in and clean up the mess.

In the Galaxy Divinity Temple’s training ground.

Chen Rui finally endured five days in 4-folds gravity, but he only left the system to sleep, then he immediately continued the difficult training. This time it was the rule of 4-folds gravity and 10 days.

During the gap of boring self-torture, thinking had become his only way to relax. Thinking about his future direction, thinking about the development of Dark Moon, thinking about how to deal with the enemies of Dark Moon… not just thinking about matters, but also the people.

A partner that is supposed to be a dragon, but he is as stubborn as a duck’s beak.

The iceberg royal sister who likes to play with murderous intentions, and shows only her back.

The violent girl who is enthusiastic, generous and eye-catching when she pats her chest.

The little loli who is an unhealthy books collector, blackhearted, precocious and sneak attack with a stunning stick as her ultimate move.

The master who was unjustly framed as the “king of fart”, wholeheartedly wants to learn some potion-related knowledge from the grand master’s inheritance.

The siren who is unwilling to be my maidservant can simply seduce people with her wink, and she has the ultimate move of sucking people dry by kissing.

……

During the repeated attempts, failures, and reattempts, his psychological and physiological limits were challenged again and again while the filaments from the “Alkaid” light ball were also condensed in an orderly manner.

Princess Retail Store.

Although the business was getting better and better, and the little princess, Alice smiled all day, but someone as attentive as Kia could still find Alice often inexplicably dazed and distracted. Sometimes she would even talk to herself in a voice that only she could hear.

“ Hmph , I won’t lose to Athena!”

“Why are these breast enlargement methods from the books useless?”

“Damn Chen Rui, he didn’t come to look for me again. Does he really only like women with big breasts…”

A hidden chamber somewhere in the Dark Moon City.

Athena sat with her legs crossed and her eyes closed. The red flame surrounding her body was swaying along with calm breathing.

She took a deep breath and the flame gradually went off. She opened her eyes and her red irises were like jewels containing extreme heat.

After getting up and stretched for a while, she suddenly touched her smooth face, as if there was some kind of residual heat from her memories.

“That guy… is he alright?”

The garden in the palace’s inner courtyard.

A lonely figure stood quietly at the edge of the pond like an ice sculpture, allowing the breeze to gently sway her long blonde hair and white skirt.

The deep purple eyes stared at the reflection on the water surface. After a long time, she finally raised her head slowly and looked at the duo moon with similar loneliness and beauty in the night sky.

The difference was that they were not alone.

What about you?

chapters.title: Chapter 63: Must Lose! Alan'S Threat
chapters.body:
Chapter 63: Must Lose! Alan'S Threat

Days went by and it was late in the evening. Compared to the usual crowd, the audience at the arena almost doubled today. Such a scene hadn’t appeared during battles for a long time.

The number of audience and the atmosphere excited the 2 centaurs of early Intermediate Demon battling on the stage. Their battle became fiercer and fiercer, but most people weren’t there to watch the battle between them. They were there for the next match instead. It was also the last exciting battle of the day; the two fighters were the “Balrog”, Reka and the mysterious No. 64.

“Balrog” Reka; Great Demon; strongest Intermediate Demon in the arena; took part in more than 100 battles and had a 27 win streaks. He was definitely worthy of his title as the King of Intermediate Demon. Rumors said that he was one step away from Greater Demon, and it had been three months that no one dared to challenge him.

Although No. 64 was previously unknown, his experience was miraculous. At present, it was only his third battle. In the first battle, he battled against “Bloody Hand”, Lance, an early-stage Intermediate Demon, he was once suppressed that he couldn’t even fight back. Subsequently, the situation was reversed after Lance used <Berserk> talent, then he managed to kill Lance. In the second battle, he battled against “Quick Wolf”, Jesse, the strongest among the middle-stage, he broke Jesse’s multiple fatal moves, and he eventually defeated Jesse. For some reason, he didn’t kill Jesse. In the third battle, No. 64 would be battling against Reka, the King of Intermediate Demons!

The three battles of No. 64 were early-stage, middle-stage and high-stage of Intermediate Demon. There was huge leap from every battle. It all depended on whether he could create a miracle in the third battle!

According to well-informed people, No. 64 was actually the leader of the newly-emerged organization, “Cloak Gang” at the Southeast Street, called Aguile. About half a month ago, Aguile went to the famous black merchant, Silva for trade, but Silva tried to rob and kill him. As a result, Aguile and Jesse swept the No. 4 street alone, killing Silva and the high-stage Intermediate Demon, Grau. Subsequently, the ancient house also became the new headquarters of Cloak Gang. Recently, many demons had joined the Cloak Gang; its momentum was getting bigger.

That battle record made more audience being optimistic about No. 64, Aguile; the gambling odds of the two were actually not far apart.

Arux was sitting at the VIP seats as usual. In addition to the lich, Keithahn, there were two more people at the seats as compared to previous matches. One of them was the sheriff, Alan; the other was a friend of Arux, one of the three scythes of Joseph, Royce.

Arux and Royce were having their own conversation; they didn’t pay much attention to Alan. Alan tried to join the conversation, but he realized the two didn’t bother about him, so he felt embarrassed. However, he also understood for him to sit in the VIP seats together with two experienced Greater Great Demon was because of his identity as the Karon Family’s young master instead of his personal strength.

Alan stopped embarrassing himself, but he sneered from time to time instead.

In the arena’s preparation room, Chen Rui was cloaked and masked as usual. He listened to the lively cheers outside quietly. As compared with the tension and uneasiness before stepping foot into the arena for the first time during the Master Challenge, he was extremely calm now.

It wasn’t just the improvement in strength, but also a change mentally.

In the eyes of others, it was just half a month, but it had actually been more than three months for him who possessed the training ground. Besides, it was in a 4-folds gravity environment. The initial 70,000 auras had already been exhausted. In between the training, he converted twice the materials bought by the old dwarf using Silva’s money. He also had special training with Paglio in reality. The remaining aura was more than 50,000 auras. It wasn’t because he was reluctant to use, but he thought it wasn’t necessary.

These three months of training had achieved remarkable results. 4-folds gravity was nothing to him already. During the last training ground practice, he even specially selected the forest scene. He jumped in the forest of gravity like it was plain ground. It was by no means a fluke as Chen Rui himself knew best about the pain and pressure he faced. Especially during the early stage, he was on the verge of life and death several times, but he finally made it through with his tenacious willpower.

Under this constant endurance of spiritual self-transcendence, the limits of the body were also broke through again and again.

In the 3-D human body in the status bar, the translucent bones and the muscles were all solidified from the light ball center of Alkaid state. It was integrated with the numerous fine filaments that was flowing in cycle. The Experience Value display had already become red, showing 100%.

That data showed that his control of Star Power and the progress of <Refined Body> in the Alkaid state had reached a fully mature stage. He already had the basic conditions for breaking through to the next realm. However, he wasn’t sure how to trigger the evolution of the next star and enter the “Mizar” realm. Due to the time constraint, it wasn’t necessary to temporarily adapt to the 8-folds gravity. According to the poison dragon, even if the training intensity was increased, it would only train the body; the effect wouldn’t be great. He had to rely on actual combat to find the best breakthrough opportunity, .

Therefore, Chen Rui was eagerly awaiting the arrival of this battle as it would probably be the key to break through the bottleneck. He seemed to be calm on the surface now, but he was very high-spirited in his heart. It was completely different from the cautiousness of battling against Jesse in the last battle.

“No. 64? Sir Aguile?” A familiar voice sounded at the entrance.

At this time, no one was supposed to be able to enter the preparation room. Chen Rui took a look and it was actually Alan’s subordinate, the lich, Najib. When he killed Silva and occupied the ancient house earlier, Najib came to investigate on behalf of Sheriff Alan. Finally, Cloak Gang’s doings at the ancient house was successfully accepted after bribing with some black crystal coins.

What is this guy’s intention for coming to the preparation room so suddenly?

“It is Sir Aguile indeed!” Najib was no stranger to this cloaked, masked man. Now it seemed that his strength was indeed horrifying as he dared to challenge Reka directly. Fortunately, Ganke and Najibdidn’t fall out with Aguile when they went to the Cloak Gang previously, “Sir, I came here was because of Sheriff Alan’s command; he wanted sir to promise one thing.”

Alan? The trash-talking, pathetic man? Chen Rui frowned, “What is it?”

Najib tried his best to keep calm and said, “It’s like this. The incident of Cloak Gang killing Silva and occupying the ancient house is really troublesome and hard to settle. It is going to be reported to Princess Shea soon. Once Princess Shea sends the imperial guards to suppress, even Sir Alan can’t help the Cloak Gang.”

“Stop beating around the bush! Tell me straight!” Chen Rui sneered in his heart. These words could only be used to intimidate others. Whether it is Alan or Najib, they would never thought Aguile himself is Shea’s most trusted advisor. On the other hand, This Najib has just accepted a huge bribe, but he is falling out with me now, such a standard ungrateful demon.

“Sir really is an understanding person.” Najib said with a smile, “Sir Alan can try to suppress this matter and officially recognize Cloak Gang’s position at the southeast block. The condition is simple, in this battle, Sir Aguile has to lose to Reka!”

Faking result? A threat?

Chen Rui snorted and Najib felt an invisible murderousness from the opponent. He was instantly terrified; his body shivered involuntarily.

“Alan really think so highly of me that he thinks Reka will lose?” Chen Rui said coldly, “If I don’t agree, is Alan going to deal with me and Cloak Gang?”

Najib explained in a stutter, “Please calm down sir. I am just a tiny fry who conveys the request of Sir Alan. It is pointless for sir to kill me. It’s like this. Reka has sworn loyalty to the Karon Family, so Sir Alan doesn’t want him to have any accidents. So, as long as sir agrees to fake your lose, there will not be any danger in the arena.”

Finally, the murderous intentions slowly faded. Aguile’s hoarse voice sounded, “Since this is the case, tell Alan that I’ll make sure he’s satisfied.”

Najib was finally relieved. He was afraid to lose his life by making Aguile angry, so he was like having an amnesty after listening to this. He said happily, “Thank you, sir! Najib won’t bother sir to prepare for the war! I’ll leave now!”

Chen Rui saw Najib leave, and he sneered: If it is the usual stuff, I might just give in. Now, I can’t lose the battle. Even without Arux’s threat, I’ll go all out to break through to the Mizar realm as soon as possible.

That’s right, “Sir” Alan, I’ll make sure you’re “satisfied” by then.

At present, the current battle ended with the death of a centaur. After a little cleaning up, the finale was finally staged with the magic amplifier.

Under millions of eyes, the two parties competing appeared at the center of the arena.

Reka was a very standard image of a Great Demon; a tall physique; red-skinned; 2 dark, curved horns on his head glowing faintly; he was filled with the demeanor that he might explode at any time.

In contrast, No. 64, who was still in his mask and cloak, looked relatively thinner; his demeanor was rather low-keyed. He was much inferior compared to Reka’s appearance.

Royce on the VIP table stared at No. 64 for a while, and his calm eyes showed a little praise. He smiled and said, “Arux, it seems that you have good insights. This No. 64 isn’t simple.”

Although No. 64 didn’t look imposing on the surface, someone as strong as Royce could definitely tell that the physical and spiritual energy of No. 64 were already integrated into one. His restrained demeanor even though wasn’t obvious, but his impression toward others was not inferior to Reka.

Arux’s eyes were also fixed on Aguile’s body. Surprised flashed past his eyes as he spoke to himself, “Peak of Intermediate Demon? It’s truly surprising but… very good!”

“I thought it will be Reka’s solo performance again, but the result might be hard to tell based on the current situation.” Royce said thoughtfully, “If No. 64 is a Great Demon, then he is just in his regular form now. Once he uses his battle form, it is very likely that he’ll reach Greater Demon. If that’s the case, then Reka is in danger.”

Arux’s eyes suddenly brightened. That’s right! In the two previous battles, Aguile had never used transformation!

“Yet, this is not absolute,” Royce took a sip of wine gracefully and continued to comment, “Transformation doesn’t mean crossing realms. Many later-stage Great Demons still remain at later-stage after transformation; only their strength is enhanced. Besides, this guy might not necessarily be a Great Demon. He might be a descendant of a pathetic royal family.”

Arux recalled that Aguile once mentioned “deprived honor”, so it did seem possible. He was frowning and silenced at once, then he finally decided not to think about this. A battle is a battle. As long as I can truly enjoy the exciting battle, I don’t care whether he is a Great Demon or a royal family! This is me, Arux!

Alan was a little scared listening at the side. Aguile looked ordinary, but he actually had the chance to defeat Reka. At that moment, he saw the lich, Najib appeared at the side of the VIP seats.

Alan saw Najib’s gesture, and he felt a lot safer. He gave Najib a praising look and signaled Najib to make his bet immediately. Najib understood, and he quickly turned and went out.

chapters.title: Chapter 64: Duel! The Strongest Intermediate Demon Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 64: Duel! The Strongest Intermediate Demon Battle

In the arena, the seductive succubus introduced both parties to the audience excitedly. After “Balrog”, Reka took a look at the VIP seat, he decided to have an empty-handed battle. He then told No. 64 5 words, “Are you ready to die?”

What surprised Succubus was that No. 64’s declaration didn’t include anything about betting. Coincidentally, it was also 5 words like Reka, “Please don’t let me down.”

The so-called strongest Intermediate Demon battle began. The audience held their breath. preparing to see the most violent collision. However, after both men got into their battle posture, none of them move. They were just staring at each other closely, trying to look for an opening.

If the gaze was a weapon, then both parties had already collided thousands of times in an instant. Reka’s gaze was like an erupting volcano, any move will be earth-shattering while No. 64 was as calm as a lake; his greatest power was hidden deep in the calmness.

Right when the audience was getting impatient, someone finally took the lead. Unexpectedly, the first one to move was actually No. 64.

At the moment that No. 64 made a move, Royce’s and Arux’s eyes flashed with lights simultaneously. The audience was also surprised because No. 64 actually disappeared!

Almost at the same time, a fast-paced hitting sound came from Reka, “ Poom! Poom! Poom! Poom… “

Reka had already adopted a defensive posture; his body was shaking involuntarily; he was clearly in a passive move. Some of the audience with extraordinary eyesight had already noticed that No. 64 thin figure appeared and disappeared frequently around Reka while the ground beneath Reka gradually cracked.

Among the audience, the dark elf, Jesse’s face looked oddly pale. His pupil shrunk, staring at the high-speed figure in the field. He actually felt like he almost couldn’t keep up with his eyesight.

Jesse had always been proud of his speed. Even losing to Aguile last time, his speed was still superior. Yet, only 20 days past, Aguile’s speed… actually improved to such a horrific degree!

Not only speed! Also power! When he was fighting with Silva in the ancient house, he hadn’t shown such power. What happened in this half-month?

With Aguile’s absolute advantage with his current strength and speed advantage, if they battle again, Jesse most probably couldn’t last more than 5 minutes or even shorter! Am I really challenging this man after a month? The dark elf tightly clenched his fist, and his knuckles were already paled.

Can you still become stronger? The voice sounded again in his ear.

“I can!” Jesse snorted lowly as if he was answering that person, but it was more like answering himself.

In contrast, the Cloak Gang members led by the old dwarf who specifically came to cheer was excited while watching, and they cheered for their leader loudly. These cloaks of varied sizes also became a strange landscape in the stand.

In the arena, the violent blows continued, but the change of rhythm became more erratic. Reka had slowly retreated, but the posture of defending critical parts never changed. Yet, other parts could only be attacked. That was also because it was Balrog, who was known for his offensive, defensive capabilities, and endurance. If it were someone else, he probably couldn’t endure it and faint.

As Reka was retreating, then “ Poom! “, a red flame appeared on his body, and he disappeared instantly. Chen Rui missed a hit; Reka appeared behind him at the same time. A burning fist launched out instantly; Reka launched his first counterattack finally.

However, that punch also missed. Chen Rui flicked and distanced himself 6 to 7 meters away at high speed.

The Great Demon family had three basic talents: The first one was weapon expertise. They were good at using various weapons especially the scythe. That’s why they were also called the grim reaper.

The second was teleportation. Chen Rui had already seen it during the Sky Battle. At that time, when Alan fell from the wyvern’s back and used teleportation in midair to safely return to the ground. The higher the level of Great Demon, the farther the effective distance of teleportation, and the shorter the cooldown of the skill.

The third was demonic fire. The role of demonic fire wasn’t to burn the enemy but to burn oneself, which was equivalent to a stimulant for power enhancement. The effect and effective time of demonic fire were directly proportional to the user’s talent and strength.

To Reka’s surprise, after using the demonic fire to enhance his strength, he was still unable to catch up with the speed of the opponent. On the other hand, his opponent actually didn’t pant or showed any sign of exhaustion after such a series of high-speed attacks.

“If just looking solely on the speed,” Royce at the VIP seat put down his glass and looked appreciative, “No. 64 was close to the level of early Greater Demon. I truly don’t understand how he did he train to such extent. Reka’s victory might be difficult in this battle.”

Arux didn’t say anything; his eyes faintly burned with inexplicable flames. Just a month ago, this No. 64 was just a powerless nobody. I never expect him to improve to such an extent in such a short period of time.

Although he can only be regarded as a relatively strong nobody, there is still a month time. After a month, how much could Aguile grow? The Great Demon’s face had a strange smile. He then raised his head and downed the wine in the glass.

“A guy who only evades. You don’t even have the courage to defend directly?” Reka sneered with disdain.

Such a standard of provoking words truly suck. Chen Rui shook his head. He was too lazy to say anything. Instead, he reached out his hand and gestured Reka to come on. Such obvious provocative action was clearly more effective; the demonic fire on the angered Reka blazed stronger. He jumped and charged toward Chen Rui from above.

This time, Chen Rui didn’t make use of his speed advantage to dodge. He adopted a defensive posture instead to actually face his opponent’s strength with his own weakness. A strange look appeared on Reka’s face; both of them collided instantly.

The audience exclaimed and saw No. 64 reached out his hand. He actually blocked Reka’s violent, burning punch directly. His feet moved slightly to the back, then he held his body. “ Ka! “, the slate beneath cracked again, showing the power of this punch.

Chen Rui also punched without hesitation. Reka blocked the attack; his body also swayed slightly. It seemed that they were evenly matched. Subsequently, the two began to have a head-on match without any fancy moves; the dull fighting sound was endless.

This fierce scene made everyone stunned. This cloaked, mysterious guy was not only amazingly fast, but his power could even rival Reka. The fighting sound continued; the thick and hard slates under their feet couldn’t stand the pressure and fragmented. It was not only the collision of power, but also the collision of willpower.

That is what we called a battle! Coming to the arena today is definitely worth it. The audience was stirred up and cheered excitedly. The audience led by the cloaked demons cheered for No. 64 loudly while the other group cheered for Balrog. Their cheers were getting louder and louder.

Chen Rui didn’t realize that during this mad, violent battle, his body was faintly revealing a layer of white light as if something was about to emerge.

“He’s a good one. At least, he has the same strength and endurance as Reka. This match deserves to be called the strongest Intermediate Demon battle. Yet, this No. 64 obviously has a speed close to a Greater Demon. Why did he choose such an unwise way to fight?” Royce as a Great Demon who liked to strategize felt a bit puzzled.

After listening to Royce’s comment at the side, Alan was even more confident: Fortunately, I sent Najib to threaten him, otherwise, Reka might really lose. This time I made a big bet; I can make a huge profit. That Aguile is quite a tactful guy, and he has decent strength. I can consider recruiting him to work for the Karon Family in the future.

“A whetstone….?” Arux narrowed his eyes and answered himself. He seemed to understand Chen Rui’s true intention.

Time passed by, but the rhythm of battle in the arena still did not slow down. However, both parties had begun to pant slightly. Reka initially wanted to rely on his endurance to exhaust his opponent, but he didn’t expect his opponent’s endurance was slightly above himself. In particular, the bravery of risking his life made “Balrog” secretly worried.

After all, Reka was still the King of Intermediate Demons, so his strength was absolutely not a fluke. He knew it would be bad for him if this close-combat continued. He immediately shouted and punched toward Chen Rui with full force. When the two were blown away by each other’s strength, Reka used his teleportation and instantly appeared behind Chen Rui. He was covered in blazing flames. Both his hands formed a claw shape. Within his palm, a burning ball of light quickly formed, and it was launched toward Chen Rui.

That was <Pyroblast>, Reka’s ultimate move which was created by combining his talents. It had amazing damage. This was the origin of his name, “Balrog”.

Chen Rui hadn’t landed properly. He had just exhausted his strength too, and he hadn’t recovered. Besides, there was no place to support himself. At the desperate moment, he could only turn around and cross his arms to make a defensive posture.

The <Pyroblast> imploded when it hit Chen Rui’s arm, and the strong force blew him away, even tearing his cloak. As Reka hit successfully, he posed his hands again. Another two <Pyroblast> were launched toward Chen Rui, then the blasting sound resounded in the arena again.

I have to take this opportunity to kill No. 64! Reka had already exhausted all his strength. His pair of hands seemed to become 4, shooting <Pyroblast> one after another like a four-barrel machine gun that was desperately sparking.

The explosive sounds resonated in the entire arena successively. Cloud of dust and debris were all they could see; they could hardly see what happened within.

After a long time, Reka finally stopped the bombardment. He was panting heavily. The flame on his body was clearly weaker. No matter how strong was his endurance, there was still a limit to it. That chain of <Pyroblast> had almost exhausted Reka’s strength, but he finally settled this difficult opponent. He couldn’t help but smile – He didn’t think that there would be any Intermediate Demon that could survive under the all-out bombardment of his mutated talent.

The cloud of dust slowly settled, but Reka’s smile suddenly froze on his face. A standing figure gradually became clearer within the smoke. The members of Cloak Gang and the supporters of No. 64 immediately cheered when they saw the figure.

Chen Rui’s situation at that time wasn’t good. He was panting while adjusting his Star Power. His cloak had long ruined, and his body was covered with shocking wounds caused by the <Pyroblast>. The ground under his feet was shattered as if there was a big pit in the arena.

However, Chen Rui’s injuries were mostly superficial, and it didn’t damage any muscles or bones. This was due to the great effect of Alkaid state’s <Refined Body> these days. If it were 20 days ago, he would probably be dead.

Chen Rui tore off the remaining of the cloak. He jumped and left the pit. He walked toward Reka slowly. Although his steps weren’t fast, each step seemed to be stepping on “Balrog’s” heart.

Reka’s heart trembled slightly; there was a chill from his back.

chapters.title: Chapter 65: Accident? Aurora Shot Fired Toward The Vip Seats
chapters.body:
Chapter 65: Accident? Aurora Shot Fired Toward The Vip Seats

Notes: Greater Demon that was used previously will change to Higher Demon due to the confusing term between Great Demon (race) and Greater Demon (rank). There is also an update that the chapter will be released on UTC +0 00:00. There will be some errors to schedule the release in novelupdates, so please give us some time to work around it.

Reka had reached the later stage of Intermediate Demon 15 years ago, and he was one step before reaching Higher Demon. Yet, he had been stuck at this last step. For that reason, he trained everywhere, and he even joined the arena. He had been triumphant, and he became the king of Intermediate Demon in the arena.

After becoming the King of Intermediate Demon in the arena, Reka began to change mentally as time passed. On the one hand, he enjoyed the support and generous rewards. On the other hand, a thought was breeding in his mind after several unsuccessful attempts to achieve Higher Demon. That was the fear of failing again, and the fear of losing the prestige and money that he had now. What’s more, even after breaking through to Higher Demon, he would need to face terrifying forces like Arux. The chance of survival was less than 10%.

Arux was quite belligerent. The number of Higher Demon in the arena had always been small, so no one dared to challenge him basically. Therefore, Arux would arrange mandatory matches from time to time. If his opponents could endure up to the specified time limit, they would be heavily prized; if not, they would be killed on the spot. That was certainly a way to promote improvement, but it also caused panic at the same time.

Ever since the last remaining Higher Demon in the arena died in Arux’s hands 4 months ago, the battles of Higher Demon had paused.

Under the influence of these overall factors, Reka gradually weakened in his pursuit of victory at all costs. Instead, his laziness increased. 20 days ago, Arux specifically appointed Reka to deal with No. 64. Subsequently, he met the Karon Family’s Mikas. Under the Mikas’s invitation, Reka finally made up his mind to leave the arena and join the Karon Family after participating in this last battle.

However, he encountered No. 64 who was a monster in his battle. Reka was best at his power and endurance. Yet, it was nothing in front of his opponent. Besides, his opponent had a terrifying speed. If this continued, he wouldn’t have any chance to win.

Reka once defeated opponents who were evenly matched or even above his actual strength. If it were the Balrog five years ago, he would have fought with his life without fear. However, the current Reka had lost his fighting spirit and courage that he had before.

“It seems that I have to return those words to you. Are you ready to die?” The hoarse voice behind the mask sounded, making Reka’s heart even more scared. He screamed and took the initiative to punch.

However, Chen Rui could tell that that punch was only strong in appearance but weak in reality. He reached out his hand and grabbed Reka’s fist.

As he approached, Reka lowered his voice and said, “I am part of the Karon Family! You dare to kill me? Aren’t you afraid of offending the Karon Family?”

Chen Rui paused, then he suddenly twisted Reka’s fist. He turned his body, throwing Reka away and shouting, “It seems that you’ve already known that Alan threatened me to deliberately lose to you!” You truly make me very disappointed!”

Chen Rui was really disappointed. He initially wanted to find an opportunity to break through the bottleneck in this battle. Unfortunately, he was facing an opponent who lost his fighting spirit. Even if he was stronger, he was only a soulless body; he didn’t qualify as a whetstone.

Almost everyone in the arena heard Chen Rui’s loud voice using Star Power. The audience were discussing; most of them looked furious and agitated at once. Royce sneered while Arux’s gaze suddenly became fierce, looking at Alan’s face at the side like a sharp knife. Even without looking directly, Alan could feel the needle-like tingling feeling. His face was alternating between blue and red. Eventually, he couldn’t sit still anymore as he stood up. He couldn’t wait to tear the masked figure in the field into pieces.

Aguile! Fucking dick! Not only he didn’t fake losing, but he even revealed everything in front of everyone!

Alan’s behavior further confirmed that Aguile was telling the truth; Arux murderous vibe was even more.

Demons respected the true strongman, and they deeply hated these cheating behaviors. Almost all the audience was shouting, “Kill him! Kill this coward!”

Chen Rui didn’t hesitate and rushed toward Reka. Reka was shocked as he never would’ve thought that his opponent would have the courage to ignore the Karon Family and reveal the matter publicly. He didn’t have the courage to continue battling, and he ran toward the VIP seats, wanting to seek protection from Alan.

Chen Rui leaped and glimpsed at Royce and Arux at the VIP seats. A weird light flashed in his eyes as he extended his right hand and spread his 5 fingers. He shouted, “Reka! Your time has come!”

A white light ball with about 2 diameters was launched from the palm of his hands. Chen Rui’s body that was leaning forward in the air also flew backward due to the huge forward momentum of the light ball, then he slowly landed on the ground.

As Reka turned back, he was terrified when he saw the white light ball. At the brink of death, his instinctive reaction after training for so many years came into play. He desperately used his last remaining strength to teleport and avoided it at the last second.

<Aurora Shot>’s force didn’t diminish and charged toward the VIP seats at high speed. At that moment, even Alan’s face had changed.

In the blink of an eye, Arux’s figure appeared in front of the light ball. He reached out his left hand to face the light ball. However, at the moment the light ball touched his hand, Arux’s body trembled; he immediately reached out his right hand quickly to hold with both hands.

Arux felt the mysterious destructive power of the light ball; the fire in his red pupils were blazing. He snorted and spread his hands open. The <Aurora Shot> was torn into two halves. The white light residual also gradually disappeared in his hands.

Arux was surprised to see the slight cuts on his palm that was slowly healing. The fire in his pupils gradually went out, but the heat was not reduced. He stared in surprise at Chen Rui in the field.

Since Chen Rui was able to shout out Reka’s name when he used <Aurora Shot>, the blow toward the VIP seat could only be seen as an accident. Of course, only someone knew in his heart whether it was truly an accident.

Many people saw clearly that the moment Arux tore the light ball apart, a huge amount of cracks appeared in the fan-shaped area on the ground behind him. That showed how much pressure he had borne just now.

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. Other than the poison dragon, it was the first time he saw someone who could resolve his ultimate move with bare hands. Besides, Arux still hadn’t used his demonic fire to enhance yet. It seemed that if he didn’t break through the Alkaid state, he would be no match at all.

The power of <Aurora Shot> made Reka who dodged using teleportation horrified. When he just took a breath of relief, he saw a tall figure blocking in front of him. The sharp eyes were as murderous as if it were real.

“Sir Arux…” Reka’s body stunned, then his trembling voice stopped.

Arux snorted and ignored Reka. He walked forward; by the 5th step, Reka’s body suddenly fell apart and scattered on the ground while his blood spread quickly.

Almost no one at the arena saw how Arux killed Reka, including Chen Rui.

“Cheater, dies!” Arux didn’t look back at Reka’s body. He looked at Chen Rui who had put on a new set of cloak. “This game, No. 64, Aguile wins!”

When they heard the name of No. 64 reported personally by Arux, the audience got up and echoed. Aguile, the new king of Intermediate Demon in the arena!

Alan was furious; he turned and left. Najib who was standing behind him was dumbfounded.

Alan was really irritated. This time, not only did his huge bet was gone, but Reka, who had initially joined the Karon Family was also killed by Arux. The most awful thing was that Aguile actually dared to reveal his threats before the game publicly. His reputation was completely lost; he would always be ashamed to step foot into the arena ever since.

Chen Rui didn’t feel complacent from the audience’s cheers. Instead, he still felt regretful. In fact, when he was fighting head-on with Reka previously, he already had the inspiration of faintly touching the next realm. That was something that couldn’t be achieved in the training room. However, as Reka’s willpower collapsed causing the battle quality to drop sharply, the inspiration disappeared. He couldn’t find it at once.

Soon, the long-lasting cheers of the audience were suppressed by a gold iron-like strange voice, “Aguile, you are still far from being my opponent. For your subsequent whetstone, you need to find it yourself. You still have about a month left. I am looking forward to beheading a true strongman personally by then.”

The arena that was full of cheers previously was silent suddenly. Even Royce on the VIP seat was moved inexplicably.

Arux’s words made everyone’s face looked shocked, especially the dark elf, Jesse and the people from the Cloak Gang.

Aguile’s opponent after a month is actually Arux! The owner of the arena! He’s also likely to be the strongest Higher Demon in the entire Dark Moon!

No matter how difficult the previous battles were, they were just battles between Intermediate Demons whereas Higher Demon was a huge difference in terms of rank. No one had ever heard that someone could overcome the rank difference and defeat an opponent. Even if Aguile could rank up within 1 month and became Higher Demon, he would still be incomparable against Arux as 4 months ago, a Higher Great Demon of middle-stage didn’t even stand for 10 minutes in the hands of Arux!

Regardless of the outcome after a month, Aguile’s legendary battle in the arena would be the most heated topic in the Dark Moon Estate after the Master Challenge and the Sky Battle.

Royce’s calm eyes were flickering with a strange spirit. Arux invited him to come before this to watch a pleasing battle. From the performance on the arena, No. 64 who was full of potential was indeed good. He wanted to recruit Aguile initially, but never he thought that Aguile would be Arux’s target! Should I convince Arux to give up? Or should I have examined further first?

“I am also looking forward to becoming the new owner of the arena.” Chen Rui took a deep breath and walked back to the preparation room without looking back.

Royce’s gaze moved; his curiosity was increased: This Aguile isn’t simple. He can actually still be calm. Where does his confidence come from?

Under awe of the entrance guards, Chen Rui didn’t meet up with the old dwarf and others, but he went straight out of the arena.

However, in an alley not far from the arena, he was blocked by someone.

“Aguile!” A teeth-clenching voice sounded. Chen Rui had already heard this trash-talking voice in his human identity a lot, so he could call out the other person’s name with his eyes closed: Alan!

“Sheriff Alan, as I said, I’ll make sure you’ll be satisfied. How do you feel now?” Chen Rui sneered, but he was looking at a Great Demon beside Alan.

This Great Demon only had one eye; the other was covered with an eye-patch. The <Analytical Eyes> showed, comprehensive strength: D!

chapters.title: Chapter 66: True Series Enhancement! The Final
chapters.body:
Chapter 66: True Series Enhancement! The Final

“Damn it!” Alan snorted; his body was blazing in flame. A long-poled scythe already appeared in his hand and he teleported to the front of Chen Rui, trying to chop down Chen Rui’s head.

To nurture their only child, Alan, the Karon Family went through painstaking effort. Currently, Alan was at the peak of Intermediate Demon, and he was one step away to be Higher Demon. Thus, that strike was kind of amazing. Chen Rui spent quite a lot of energy during his fight with Reka, but he wasn’t afraid of Alan. Instead, he was concerned about the one-eyed Higher Demon.

Chen Rui twisted his body; instead of retreating, he moved forward. When the scythe was about to touch his body, he suddenly moved sideways and punched the scythe like a bolt of lightning. A corner of the cloak was cut. Before Alan could make his next move, a lightning-like punch hit his abdomen; Alan immediately bent over at his waist in pain.

The one-eyed Great Demon saw Alan missed, then he was about to take action. Then, he saw Alan’s arm was being grabbed by the opponent. The opponent threw forcefully, and Alan was flying toward the Great Demon.

Alan lost his balance, flying in the air. Fortunately, he was caught by someone. It was the one-eyed Great Demon. Alan immediately shouted, “Mikas, kill him!”

Mikas slightly nodded, then he saw Aguile’s figure flicked and disappeared into the night sky while he was catching Alan. The one-eyed Great Demon sneered and disappeared instantly at the same spot. Alan’s furious voice came behind him, “Mikas, torture him to death with flame after you catch him!”

On the roof behind them, a pair of calm red irises quietly watched that scene under the moonlight.

The difference between the two ranks was not as simple as the usual cross-level challenge. There was basically no possibility of winning. Besides, Chen Rui’s injuries and stamina had not recovered; he couldn’t compete with a Higher Demon, so he didn’t force the fight, but he chose to retreat.

However, Mikas’ strength shouldn’t be underestimated. He followed tightly, Chen Rui actually couldn’t get away. Chen Rui’s speed was the best among the Intermediate Demon, but in the eyes of a Higher Demon, he could barely reach the common standard. Also, Mikas’s teleportation was far far better than Reka in terms of distance and recovery speed. Their distance was gradually getting closer. If Chen Rui didn’t exchange a bottle of True. Wind Walk Potion and drank it to greatly improve his speed, he would be almost caught up.

In such a situation, Chen Rui couldn’t return to the lab or the Cloak Gang. As his injuries were not minor, he would be caught up sooner or later. Suddenly, he thought of Paglio’s words and changed his direction, rushing toward the city gate.

Tonight, the city gate was guarded with the lead of the centaur, Ganke. From Ganke’s perspective, he could only feel a gust of wind. Something seemingly passed by, but he couldn’t see clearly in the dark. Before he could react, another gust of wind rushed by. The soldiers were all surprised.

Mikas was secretly annoyed. Although this Aguile is only with the strength of Intermediate Demon, his speed is indeed extraordinary. It’s even way faster than the level shown during the battle with Reka on the field. What’s even more annoying is his cunningness. He constantly makes use of the terrain to circle back and forth. I almost caught him a few times, but he managed to escape again.

However, no matter how cunning Aguile was, the difference was still there. Mikas had rich experience. He calmed down at once; he only locked on his opponent’s position tightly.

Chen Rui gradually felt that he couldn’t stand it anymore. Although <Astral Form> could quickly recover stamina and injuries, there was still a limit. Besides, maintaining high speed with injuries undoubtedly used up more strength. The True. Wind Walk Potion’s effect was 20 minutes. However, even if it was a grand-master level potion, there was still an hour of “cooling” time. In other words, within an hour, there won’t be any effect in drinking potions. Now, the buff had run out.

Sure enough, when he was slightly slower in changing direction, he was immediately captured by Mikas. Mikas’ body was flashed with flame; he used his teleportation talent to accurately block in front of Chen Rui.

Chen Rui had no time to change direction and Mikas had already swept his leg toward Chen Rui. Chen Rui could hardly see the trajectory of this sweep; he could only use the feeling trained from the special training and actual combat. He closed both arms to block the sweep. He felt that both his arms were like being hit by a giant steel hammer; his arms felt like almost cracking. His entire body was blown away by the huge force.

Before Chen Rui could touch the ground, Mikas had caught up with him halfway. He swung his arms and made Chen Rui flew upward. Mikas appeared again in mid-air and slammed at Chen Rui forcefully with both his fists. Chen Rui heard his bones cracking somewhere; he was smashed to the ground heavily like a falling meteor. The area where it was hit could barely feel anything with the sharp pain, and he couldn’t get up at once.

Among the information provided by Shea, Mikas was one of the bodyguards arranged by the Karon Family to stay by Alan’s side; his strength was at early Higher Demon. The difference between ranks was quite huge. Although Chen Rui’s strength was already equivalent to the strongest Intermediate Demon, he was still vulnerable even a freshly-advanced Higher Demon was standing in front of him.

This was also why Alan almost gave up on Athena after he knew that Athena had become a Higher Demon.

“Taking me so much effort to catch up, you can be considered as an abnormal Intermediate Demon.” Mikas appeared in front of Chen Rui, “Yet, even the strongest Intermediate Demon is still just an Intermediate Demon. Today, you will definitely die.”

Based on the situation, he could no longer reach the blue lake. Since he couldn’t retreat, then he would fight to his death. Chen Rui clenched his teeth. He couldn’t bother about his injuries and stamina. He gathered his remaining Star Power to support his body bit by bit and stood up. A few bottles of potions appeared in his hands and he quickly downed everything.

“I never thought you could still stand up.” Mikas’ gaze fell on the potions Chen Rui just drank, and he was shocked, “Are those black potions that you just drank? How is this possible?”

Chen Rui didn’t answer, but he quietly waited for the potions to work. Mikas thought for a moment and shook his head again, “If there is a potion grand master, it would have shocked the Demon Realm long before. Thus, the bottles just now can’t be black potions. They are just healing or enhancement potions with similar colors. Haven’t you noticed the difference between a higher-rank and a lower-rank? It’s still useless even if you drank really black potions! Isn’t it better to accept death with peace of mind?”

“Since you want to suffer more before you die, I, Sir Mikas will satisfy you…”

The moment he finished his words, Mikas had already appeared before Chen Rui. A punch that was whistling in the wind hit directly on Chen Rui’s chest. Strangely, Chen Rui’s reaction, and his offensive and defensive capabilities were enhanced a lot. He had a close all to block Mikas’s punch, but he still couldn’t endure the remaining force and stumbled backward.

Chen Rui didn’t stop his body forcefully, but he led Mikas’s fist to the side using Mikas’ force. Simultaneously, he turned to the side and kicked toward Mikas’ ribs with full force. When it almost hit, a palm appeared before the ribs and blocked his strike. Subsequently, that palm grabbed his foot and quickly twisted it, intending to break his leg bones. The poison dragon liked to use this trick usually, so Chen Rui immediately gave the most appropriate natural reaction; he took advantage of the force to rotate his body while his other leg kicked directly on Mikas’ face.

Mikas stepped back a few steps and felt the burning pain on his face. His eyes were full of anger as he didn’t expect to be kicked by an Intermediate Demon. Although he was not seriously injured, it was a great shame. He snorted furiously and sped up to hit Chen Rui’s ribs like lightning.

Chen Rui felt a sharp pain. If it weren’t for the True. Iron Wall Potion, that blow might have broken a few ribs bones. Mikas’ anger didn’t reduce. He teleported to Chen Rui’s back and suddenly launched a heavy punch again. Chen Rui snorted, turned around and kicked. This time, Mikas didn’t dare to grab his legs and avoided it instead.

Although the potions’ effect enhanced Chen Rui’s strength a lot. Although the gap was reduced and he could counter occasionally, he couldn’t rival against Mikas who was one rank higher than him afterall. After persisting for a while, his body flew away like a kite with loose string by Mikas’ heavy blow. His body which was flying quickly slammed into a huge tree heavily, leaving a shallow pit. Then, the giant tree broke into two pieces and fell loudly.

Chen Rui had blood coming out from his 5 sensory organs, and all his bones seemed to be broken. It was impossible for him to use his Star Power. Every slight move would trigger the wounds of the whole body. However, should he just give up?

Now, he was no longer the rookie who was once terrified by Bloody Hand, Lance’s intimidation in the arena. In the 4-fold gravity training ground, without any Star Power, he had experienced the test of will in the face of life and death more than once.

When you can’t keep going, you still have to stick to it! In a certain sense, willpower determines the body!

Mikas teleported to the front of Chen Rui. As he was about to make a fatal blow, he saw “Aguile” who had already fallen to the ground held his body up and posed a strange posture at him. Aguile was supporting his right wrist with his left hand, and his right fingers opened.

Although he didn’t appear at the VIP seats, Mikas witnessed the battle, especially the situation in which Arux took the light ball with both hands. It instantly made his blood ran cold. At the same time, a giant light ball was shining brightly before him.

“<Aurora Shot>!”

The <Aurora Shot> after enhancement of black potion was Chen Rui’s biggest blow, and also his last hope.

Mikas just used teleport, so he couldn’t make any other reactions at such a desperate moment. He instinctively reached out his hands to catch the ball. At the moment he touched the light ball, Mikas’ body was shocked. The tremendous pressure on his hands was far more than he had imagined. He finally understood why even Arux needed both his hands to endure it. The flame on his body started to burn; his body slowly forced backward uncontrollably, leaving a deep footprint on the ground with every step.

Upon the seventh or eighth step, Mikas suddenly snorted and swung his hands. It was just like tossing a ball, the <Aurora Shot> was flung to the side forcefully. It destroyed a few trees along the way and eventually disappeared without a trace.

Seeing Mikas unscathed, Chen Rui had a bitter smile behind his mask while panting. That <Aurora Shot> just now had emptied his remaining Star Power and the effective time of the black potions were running out. He could clearly feel the potion effect reducing. Along with his extremely heavy injuries, even lifting a finger was extraordinarily difficult.

The difference between Intermediate and Higher Demons was too huge. Even after ingesting enhancement potions, his final blow was still ineffective.

“I never thought that an Intermediate Demon could actually fight with me to this extent. You can’t transform nor teleport, so you should be of a royal family, and you are also a genius. In the future, you could at least be a Demon King-level strongman which was above the Higher Demon. Unfortunately, you have no future.”

Mikas looked at his bloody palm in surprise and smiled cruelly, “Since Master Alan ordered for you to die in the flames painfully, I’ll let you have a taste of my flame talent before you die.”

chapters.title: Chapter 67: Unyielding! Breaking Through In Blazing Flame
chapters.body:
Chapter 67: Unyielding! Breaking Through In Blazing Flame

As Mikas said, he opened his hand and Chen Rui was encircled by flames. This flame was different from the enhancing demonic fire of the Great Demon talent. Instead, it was a flame with a horrifying high temperature. The circle quickly narrowed and wrapped him up. Chen Rui could hear the sizzling sound on his skin, and his clothes were on fire. Yet, the physical pain was second as the source of his willpower – the soul also began to tremble.

“Other than 3 basic talents, an ordinary Great Demon also has a mutated talent. This is my flame talent. Although it can’t be compared with the power of the mutated bloodline, it has the power to destroy the soul! Yet, I will not burn you to death immediately. You shall slowly enjoy the double-torture of soul and body! Being able to kill a royal family member with my flame talent is absolutely memorable.”

Soon, Chen Rui’s body was completely wrapped in flames, and the mask on his face had begun to melt. However, the most painful thing was the torment on his soul. It was a horrible feeling of being ripped apart inch by inch.

In the persistent, intense pain, Chen Rui felt that his consciousness was gradually blurred; death was getting closer and closer. Is everything over?

I’m not willing to accept this. There are still too many things undone.

I want to be a strongman, and I want to control my destiny.

“Be sure to be careful… I haven’t lived long enough!” The stubborn guy wouldn’t even speak a decent caring word.

“I believe that you will succeed!” Although the smile after the iceberg thawed was just a short glimpse, it was enough to be engraved in his memory.

“You… have to be careful.” The care within the red irises was genuine and warm.

“Human brother…”

I’m not willing!

I’m not willing to accept the fact that I won’t hear these voices again!

I’m not willing to accept the fact that I won’t these faces again!

No matter if it’s for myself! For him! For her! Stand up, Chen Rui!
