Although he really wanted to continue to feel the wonderful taste for his comrade, Aldas, he finally held his temptation and paused his path of “scientific exploration”.

The 2 remaining black potions must be exchanged. These 120,000 auras are for training; I cannot use it anymore. I’ll wait until I earn more auras.

Chen Rui thought of Royce’s information and decided to give Aldas a mental preparation in advance. He immediately walked out of the room and came to the lab. Aldas was sitting on the stool and holding a bottle of potion for an experiment. Slee who already had a basic level of pharmaceutics knowledge was watching carefully at the side.

Chen Rui suddenly felt a little embarrassed. In comparison, being an “apprentice” of the potion master, he wasn’t as competent as the imp in learning.

“Slee, I have some important things to discuss with the master. Go guard the gate now. If you find someone coming, immediately remind me.”

“Yes, master.” Slee really focused initially, but when he heard his master’s instructions, he went out immediately without saying a word. In fact, in the imp’s heart, this human had become the best master in the entire Demon Realm. For him to truly learn pharmaceutics knowledge like an apprentice beside a potion master for free was entirely due to his master’s kindness.

Aldas also stopped his experiment and looked at Chen Rui strangely, “What is it? Did something happen in your inheritance test?”

Chen Rui didn’t beat around the bush and directly told Aldas about Joseph coming back to the Dark Moon, and he might threaten or recruit Aldas by using the information about Aldas’ long-lost sister. Aldas immediately stood up, “Did Joseph really find my sister?”

“What would you do if Joseph threatens you to defect with this?”

This question made Aldas hesitate. He didn’t say anything for a while; his heart was obviously struggling. After a long time, his gaze finally became very determined, “I will never betray Princess Royal. However, I will try my best to save my sister even if it costs my life.”

Aldas was not only a potion master, but he also had great magical talent. Especially in wind magic, he could activate lightning without chanting. If it wasn’t his enthusiasm for pharmaceutics, he might have become a wizard that surpassed the lich. However, the dark elf master wasn’t a professional in combats after all. If he truly got into a fight, he probably couldn’t compete against an ordinary Intermediate Demon.

Chen Rui looked serious, “Master, if you trust me, when Joseph comes to you, you just delay him by your hesitation as you did just now; I’ll try to save your sister.”

“You?” Aldas looked suspicious, but he remembered he just said that he would trust Chen Rui, so he couldn’t suspect at once.

Chen Rui understood the dark elf master’s emotions and nodded decisively, “Master, don’t bother about what method I use or who’s going to rescue, you just need to believe me. Not to mention, as far as I know, Joseph hasn’t found your sister, but he only has the clues. So, don’t be fooled by him. If you really can’t delay, just ask to see your sister personally.”

Aldas stared at Chen Rui deeply. Aldas didn’t ask Chen Rui what method was he going to use or how did he get the information, but he nodded slightly, “No wonder you can get the trust and value of Princess Royal. It seems that your talents have always been ignored. I believe in you. However, Joseph clearly knows my loyalty toward Princess Royal that I even declined the recruitment from the Regent at the capital. Why does he still persist to make me serve him? Is it because of my performance during the Master Challenge previously? Actually, if he truly wants to recruit a potion master, there should be someone who is easier to convince than me.”

Speaking of that, Chen Ruil looked guilty and said, “This… maybe it was because something I accidentally… that made Joseph have some misunderstanding.”

Aldas asked curiously, “What is it?”

When Chen Rui said the excuse to scam the material from the magic store last time, Aldas was stunned for a moment. Subsequently, he grabbed Chen Rui’s collar fiercely and yelled, “Dumbass, you can deceive with other things, but you shouldn’t lie anything about the academic! Although poisoning Sandro at the arena last time made me famous, I always felt embarrassed about it. It wasn’t because of your stupid fart king idea, but because it wasn’t my true strength! Now, you actually created some stupid trouble on grand master-level potion. You’re forcing me to fool the entire pharmaceutics field to gain unrightful reputation!”

Sure enough, as soon as it was related to pharmaceutics, the dark elf became fanatic. He was indeed an enthusiast, but the abominable human was studying the vocabulary with interest: Fooling the entire pharmaceutics field to gain unrightful reputation? Did brother Xunzi cross-over and become a Demon King in the Demon Realm? Or is it from some Demon Realm saga?”

If it was before the construction of the exchange center, Chen Rui might feel helpless facing Aldas’s scolding, but now…

Aldas was filled with anger and intended to continue scolding. Suddenly, he trembled, and his actions instantly petrified. His gaze as well was petrified. The source of all these was a bottle of potion that the human was holding.

It was a very ordinary glass. What was different was that the potion in the glass was black.

[1] <a href=”https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Infernal_Affairs”>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Infernal_Affairs</a>

chapters.title: Chapter 74: Joseph'S Return
chapters.body:
Chapter 74: Joseph'S Return

Aldas stared at the bottle; he had forgotten all the anger and outrage. His voice trembled, “This… is this black potion?”

“Black potions – True. Spirit Potion.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Master, do you want it?”

That question was simply nonsense. From Aldas’s frenzy eyes, it clearly stated: “I’ll fight you if you don’t give it to me”.

“Master, I can give it to you, but please promise me one thing.” Chen Rui slowly handed the bottle over.

“Needless to say, I promise you no matter what!” Aldas received the bottle of black potion in a tremble. He couldn’t believe it was the legendary highest-level potion contained in the bottle.

The dark elf moved cautiously lest his shaking hand would break the glass. He immediately placed it nicely on the table. Then, he was afraid of accidentally knocking it down, so he made a safety rack and piled up a lot of things around.

Looked at Aldas’s abnormality, Chen Rui secretly snickered. If the master knew that as long as there was enough aura, not only the “True series”, but also the “Eternal series” could be easily obtained. He would probably hit himself with lightning in excitement and faint happily.

After Aldas placed the black potions, he didn’t open the cork. Instead, he looked at it for a while as if that dark potion was some extraordinary beauty. Only after half an hour, he recovered slightly and asked, “This potion… where did you get it?”

Aldas still had a clear mind after all. Aldas didn’t ask if Chen Rui made it himself as he knew that this apprentice was not “competent”. After learning the basic knowledge of pharmaceutics, Aldas had basically never seen Chen Rui anymore. Instead, the learning progress of the imp was surprising.

“Do you remember my grand master’s inheritance test? Half of it has already passed. As a reward, the grand master’s will instructed me to brew this True. Spirit Potion. When I’m awake, the potion has successfully appeared in front of me. However, the recipe and method can’t be clearly recalled.” Chen Rui felt that the excuses of this grand master were becoming nearly perfect as he couldn’t find any flaws himself.

“So that’s why. Praise the Demon God that the grand master’s inheritance finally shed light on pharmaceutics!” Aldas was moved again, “So, if you can complete this test, can you get the ability to brew black potions?”

“Probably not. Besides, the next half of the inheritance is even more dangerous. One misstep may cost my life.” Chen Rui certainly wouldn’t admit as the cheapest black potions were at least 10,000 auras. Besides, he didn’t want to focus on thinking such matter at the moment, “Master, I want you to promise that if someone knows about the black potion in the future, you will say that you developed them yourself; you must not mention my name!”

“No!” Aldas beat the table furiously; he almost jumped madly. His threatening demeanor was shocking. Chen Rui pointed at the shaking black potions on the table and the dark elf’s anger was instantly gone. He quickly held his precious bottle tight, making a funny pose. However, his resolute attitude was unquestionable.

“This is your glory! I must not do such a shameless thing!”

“Master, you have to think clearly. I’m not giving you this potion for fame, but for you to study it so that you can truly achieve the level of grand master.” Chen Rui said seriously, “Do you want my secret of grand master’s inheritance to be leaked? I am just a human; an outsider; what’s more a powerless outsider. If this biggest secret is leaked, how much trouble would it cost? Can I still stay in the Dark Moon?”

Aldas was really touched for a moment: In terms of value, this bottle of black potion is far more precious than all the potions that Chen Rui had squandered previously. As a potion master, I am absolutely willing to pay any price to exchange for this. Yet, this human only made some jokes, but he didn’t ask for anything and gave it to me.

After the dark elf master calmed down, he began to analyze seriously: Chen Rui was right. If this information is leaked, not only the Fallen Angel Empire, the attention of the other two empires will also focus on the Dark Moon Estate. Every party will fight for Chen Rui at all cost. With Dark Moon’s current strength, Princess Shea can’t hold him. By then, not only will Dark Moon lose Chen Rui, but the balance between the three states will also be broken.

Therefore, even if I study this bottle, I must do it in an extremely secret situation. Before getting any result, I must not let anyone know of it.

Aldas’s analysis made Chen Rui secretly ashamed as he didn’t think of a lot of things. It seemed that he still underestimated the shock that a grand master could bring to the Demon Realm.

“By the way, there is one more thing.” Chen Rui recalled when he “tasted” the black potions and told Aldas the strange feelings including the “principle”. However, the excuses were replaced by the faint feeling acquired when the grand master was inheriting thoughts.

Unlike Chen Rui, a dabbling apprentice, Aldas eyes became serious and he started muttering, “Rhythm… principle…”

The dark elf knew that it was a precious experience left by the grand master. It was like gaining a precious treasure, but he never imagined that someone only mentioned the taste of the potion. Seeing that Aldas was being obsessed, Chen Rui knew that he shouldn’t interrupt. So, he instructed the imp at the entrance and returned to his room.

At that moment, after getting the news of Arux and Royce were at daggers drawn with the Karon Family, Joseph rushed all the way and finally returned to the Dark Moon City before the night falls.

Joseph didn’t go back to his Dark Moon’s mansion, but went straight to the arena to visit the injured Arux. Then, he came to the ransacked magic store under Royce’s accompany. His face became gloomier.

“Sir, this is the case.” Although Royce’s tone wasn’t agitated, he couldn’t conceal the anger in his eyes when he talked about the Karon Family. “The incident at the magic store, I am willing to take full responsibility. Do punish me, sir. ”

Joseph shook his head, “This is all about that dumbass Alan. It isn’t your fault. Are your injuries okay now?”

“It’s still fine. However, Arux is badly hurt, and he needs at least half a month to recover. Mikas isn’t my opponent initially. If it weren’t for his sneak attack with his flame poison, I would never let him do as he likes at the magic store!” Royce clenched his teeth and said, “Alan’s cheating act was exposed by Aguile, and it was known by the entire city. Reka who had joined the Karon Family was also killed by Arux in public. However, Aguile’s potential is really extraordinary. I followed him along the way, trying to recruit him. Coincidentally, I saw Mikas trying to kill Aguile, so I tried to stop, but I didn’t expect so many things to happen! Before Mikas was killed by me, he gave a space bracelet to the guard, Ganke. Many soldiers witnessed it. When Arux and I fought our way to Alan’s residence, Ganke was next to Alan. Those things must be with Alan now!”

Joseph pondered for a moment and asked, “How did Princess Royal react after the incident?”

Royce replied honestly, “Princess Royal naturally wants to see us against Karon Family. On the surface, she sent Old Gauss to mediate, but in reality, it’s to sow dissension.”

In Royce’s heart, for his master to have such capability, his master was definitely not just an insignificant secretary. Princess Royal was very likely to be his chess.

“Well, it seems that there should be no other factors in this matter. If it is related to Princess Royal, she would’ve acted as if it’s none of her business instead of such an obvious provocation.” Joseph nodded thoughtfully and asked, “By the way, is that Aguile truly challenging Arux after a month?”

“Yes. Aguile was only an early Intermediate Demon a month ago. When he defeated Reka, he was already a later-stage Intermediate Demon. According to Arux and my observation, Aguile is probably a mutated Great Demon or descendent of downed royal family. He has some sort of seal on his body that he needs to rely on battle to break through and restore strength. That’s why he has the courage to set a two-month challenge. Arux and him have already signed the War Contract.”

“There’s such guy!” Joseph looked interested, “In your opinion, how probable is this guy joining us?”

“If there isn’t Arux, it is almost 100%.” Royce said affirmatively, “He also has a small force called the Cloak Gang. However, he has offended Alan and has set a duel with Arux. So, he can only seek shelter from a third-party.”

There was a murderous intention in Joseph’s eyes, “Are you talking about Princess Royal?”

Royce nodded, “This afternoon, when Alan sent someone to eliminate the Cloak Gang, Princess Royal’s imperial guards appeared in Cloak Gang’s southeast block, claiming that Cloak Gang has become one of the reserve forces of the imperial guards. Alan’s people were helpless; they could only retreat. These indications showed that Aguile has successfully sought refuge from Princess Royal.”

Joseph frowned, then he heard Royce said, “Sir, you need not worry. Actually, this is my idea for Aguile. When I saved Aguile last night, I proposed to recruit him. Aguile was thankful for my kindness for saving him, and he was moved by the proposal of defecting to sir. However, he insisted that the battle with Arux will never change. If he wins the duel, he asks to replace the Arux’s position to take over the arena. So, before the duel, he will not serve us. I immediately promised on behalf of sir and let him first seek refuge from Shea to protect the strength of Cloak Gang. If I overstep your authority, please forgive me.”

“No, you did very well!” Joseph had already faintly understood Royce’s “intention”; he smiled with admiration, “If Aguile is easily killed by Arux after a month, we don’t lose anything but we can take the advantage to damage Shea. If Aguile truly has the power to compete with Arux after a month, then what we get is a strong member. If I can’t return in time, you must remember to stop the two from killing each other. No matter which party dies, it is not something we want to see.”

Royce bowed, “I understood, sir.”

The fight between Joseph and Kanita was getting fiercer, so it was better to have more talents under him. Otherwise, it wouldn’t matter even if both Arux and Aguile were dead. He then asked, “By the way, the Princess Retail Store that was opened by little princess recently, is the business quite good?”

Royce reported this to Joseph earlier, so he nodded and said, “Yes, especially the demon-fighting chess and princess chess. The Meilon Family once paid 50,000 black crystal coins and bought the alchemy works of an ancient grand master. Rumors says that they still haven’t uncovered the wonders within.”

“The work of a grand master…” Joseph thought of his bet with Alice, and there was a faint cold light in his eyes. “I want to know more about the Princess Retail Store.”

Royce knew that even if he didn’t say it, Joseph could still easily acquire information of the Princess Retail Store because he was now in the Dark Moon, so he told everything that he knew.

As Joseph listened, his face became more serious. He narrowed his eyes, and he fell into deep thought.

Royce exclaimed, “Although I am a layman in business, I’m actually kind of admire the little princess now. She actually manages to turn her weird store into the most famous store in Dark Moon City.”

“No!” Joseph shook his head, “This shouldn’t be little princess’s power, otherwise, her shop has long been famous in the Dark Moon! Don’t underestimate this unremarkable business, the wisdom and knack within are beyond imagination. Let’s go to the Princess Retail Store tomorrow to take a look first.”

Royce said with dissatisfaction, “What about Alan? He is just a trash relying on his family power. Please forgive me, sir, but I can’t stand being oppressed by such a trash!”

Joseph knew that Royce was originally the heir to a big family. Although he was deprived of his honor, his pride in his bones was far more than that of Arux. He assured, “Don’t worry. Although I don’t want to completely fall out with the Karon Family, I will not be bullied. We still have to remain friendly with Alan, but before that, I will give him a little lesson.”

Royce nodded and remained silent. Joseph smiled satisfyingly. He never expected that his “arrogant” subordinate would deliberately instigate him just now.

chapters.title: Chapter 75: Cracked! The Mystery Of [Deep Analysis]
chapters.body:
Chapter 75: Cracked! The Mystery Of [Deep Analysis]

At night, a wyvern flapped its wings and appeared at the blue lake.

Strangely, Chen Rui couldn’t find Paglio at several common places. There was a faint concern in his heart, so he walked to the blue lake with his last hope, wanting to dive into the water to find out.

There was a wicked laugh coming from his back, “Human brother, you took off your clothes, are you planning to take a shower?”

Chen Rui could never forget this familiar voice. The “human brother” gave him goosebumps. He turned around, but there was nothing from the source of the sound.

“Paglio, you asshole! If you don’t come out now, I will go back!”

“ Hehe … Why don’t you threaten with committing suicide? Brother?” The poison dragon’s figure finally appeared from the open space behind but he still didn’t forget to disgust Chen Rui.

“You’re still saying that!” Chen Rui moved and rushed toward him. “You’re such a disgusting guy!”

“Your speed increased again!” Poison dragon’s eyes lit up, but he took a step backward.

Chen Rui felt that an invisible force was blocking in front of him as if a transparent wall stopping him from moving forward. Chen Rui thought of a move and slammed his fist toward the “wall”. It actually sounded like it was a physical hit. Also, this “wall” was extremely sturdy that it even reflected all the damage. It made him agitated. Suffering a slight loss immediately made him became competitive.

“Even your attack has become stronger!” After Paglio finished his sentence, he saw Chen Rui leaped high, striking downward with his hand shaped as a blade. Paglio being Paglio; he instantly noticed the weird power on Chen Rui’s hand that was exuding the terrible sharpness as if a sturdy giant legendary weapon.

“Damn guy, don’t be crazy!” Paglio appeared in front of Chen Rui instantly and Chen Rui was shocked. Chen Rui was using <Aura Blade> of the Mizar state, and it was too late to stop. Then, he saw Paglio swiped his arm like lightning while the “blade” struck directly on the poison dragon’s armm, making a crisp sound as if two metal objects colliding at one place.

Chen Rui felt that the <Aura Blade> struck on the strongest shield. There was a strange vibrating force on the shield which dispersed the sharpness of <Aura Blade>. The remaining power could not break the defense of the “shield”. Instead, he was blown away by the shock and fell to the ground.

Paglio also fell to the ground, and his face looked shocked. The arm that blocked the <Aura Blade> was unharmed, but behind his arm, there was a minor cut on the poison dragon’s forehead as if it was sliced by a sharp blade.

The poison dragon’s physique was extraordinary, so the blade mark was instantly recovered back to its initial state. However, the surprise in his heart was difficult to calm down. That blow just now was seemingly completely defended, but there was a mysterious force that incredibly passed through the defense and hurt him.

Chen Rui stood up and his heart was filled with admiration as he looked at Paglio being “unharmed” by his <Aura Blade>. This guy, although being sarcastic, his strength is unfathomable. If he dispels the seal and restores his power as Demon Overlord, I don’t know how powerful he can be.

“You are… right, according to your saying, this is abnormal! Extremely abnormal!” The poison dragon looked indignant. “You were still injured to the point that you said you’ll suicide. Now, you’re almost fully recovered while your power and speed also advance to another level again. Besides, that secret technique just now is very strange. It can actually hurt me! If you continue to grow like this, you can conquer the entire Demon Realm within a few years!”

As the poison dragon spoke, his hands waved in the air. Then, 2 small marks with the diameter of 1 meter appeared on the ground behind him, emitting a strange light.

“You call that injured?” Chen Rui looked at the forehead that the poison dragon pointed at with disdain. He looked at the 2 markings, “What are those two?”

“You even forgot about the Dragon Inscriptions?” Paglio scolded, “Such an ignorant guy, but you are also extremely lucky at the same time! The secret technique just now must be the grand master’s inheritance. It’s really amazing. However, it such a waste in your hands! The one that you attacked just now was <Reflect> inscription. Unless you can completely destroy it, otherwise, the reflected damage increases as your damage increases. I am now at the strength of Great Demon King, so the inscription manifests the strength of a Demon King. With your current strength, you can’t break the inscription no matter how strong your secret technique is. If I didn’t stop you, you would’ve born the damage of your secret technique just now!”

Chen Rui shuddered because he finally understood why Paglio wanted to intercept, then he immediately cleared his mind: It seems that the record of killing Mikas last night still makes me somewhat complacent. No matter how strong the <Aura Blade> is, there’s still a limit, so I must be careful.

“Speaking of which, you haven’t been learning the inscriptions.” Paglio pointed at another marking, “Do you remember what this is?”

“This is…” Chen Rui’s understanding of inscriptions remained at memorizing, and his understanding was barely the basics. While he was going through the memorized inscriptions in his memory, a notification suddenly appeared in his mind. “Unknown metadata is found. Do you want to activate <Deep Analysis>?”

Chen Rui was stunned. <Deep Analysis>. It’s that incomprehensible expensive skill. 10,000 auras per usage, and it only lasts for half an hour. Now, I have 110,000 auras. To uncover more mystery of the Super System, I’ll give it a try!

“Activate!”

As soon as Chen Rui confirmed in his mind, he felt that his spirit was heightened in an instant. He was reading and analyzing the relevant parts of his memory in a strange way. 10 minutes had passed, seeing Chen Rui looking blurry still, Paglio shook his head. The difficulty of Dragon Inscription is quite hard. Even a dragon can’t master it easily. For this ignorant guy, it is probably harder than achieving the Demon Lord level. I should probably be patient and teach him slowly.

“Forget it, with your intelligence…”

Before Paglio could finish his words, he heard Chen Rui shouted, “Paglio, tell me all the inscription knowledge you know now. Don’t ask me why! Quick!”

Paglio was stunned, and he immediately responded. He began to teach while drawing on the ground. After he talked for a while, he wanted to pause and rest, but the human eyes’ were staring at him and urged, “Quick! Keep talking, the faster the better. It’s best to finish it all!”

When did this guy become so eager to learn? The poison dragon knew there was something odd, but he couldn’t care less and told everything he could think of while drawing everything in the air.

Chen Rui wasn’t trying to comprehend at all, but he was concentrating to memorize everything. Soon, half an hour passed. He didn’t care much and activated <Deep Analysis> again until the poison dragon finished talking.

“Okay, don’t disturb me now!” Chen Rui felt that his brain was like a computer, quickly storing, analyzing, calculating, and even cracking the data that was memorized!

He picked up a branch and started drawing on the ground.

Paglio was shaking his head at first, but he was more surprised toward the end. Although the inscription that Chen Rui drew was far less powerful than Paglio expected, the accuracy was increasingly higher and eventually flawless!

The effective time of the second <Deep Analysis> was finally over; the data was completely analyzed – perhaps it should be called that the analyzed information formed a brand-like thing that engraved deeply in Chen Rui’s mind. It was as if he had mastered the knowledge, and he was able to use it freely.

Certainly, that was only a part of the knowledge from the poison dragon. Yet, the rest were still imprinted in memory. Therefore, Chen Rui could still continue activating <Deep Analysis> to crack more mysteries.

“Your two inscriptions, one of them is <Reflect> and the other is <Hide>. As for my drawings… this represents <Flame> while this stands for <Explode>. Then, this string represents <Poison and Teleport>, am I right?” Chen Rui asked Paglio.

Paglio nodded subconsciously. Suddenly, he stepped forward and looked at Chen Rui with a strange look as if he was going to swallow Chen Rui.

Chen Rui had a chill down his spine. Is this poison dragon’s nest at the Brokeback Mountain [1]!?

“I have more reason to suspect that you are a dragon rather than a damn human!” Paglio said while clenching his teeth. “Even a dragon can’t master the Dragon Inscription so fast!”

Paglio was good at Dragon Inscription. He had immersed himself in the field for nearly 10,000 years of knowledge and experience. Thus, he was also quite famous among the dragons in the Demon Realm. Yet, he never expected this human who was an ignorant rookie to truly master the fundamentals in the blink of an eye. It wasn’t mere memorizing like before, but it was truly understanding!

“Grand master! It must be the inheritance of the grand master!” Paglio reacted very quickly and started at Chen Rui fiercely. “It seems that this Master Wukong is definitely a dragon! Or the legendary dragon’s primogenitor! Why did the primogenitor care for such a shameless human? Yet, I, Master Paglio, a powerful, handsome and talented dragon is ignored!”

“You’re jealous again! That’s not a virtue of the dragon.” Chen Rui protruded his lips disdainfully, but he was overjoyed in his heart. So this is the mystery of <Deep Analysis>! The 20,000 auras spent are absolutely worth it as it could actually deal with the most troublesome Dragon Inscription. Based on this, if I can learn anything, wouldn’t I be a superman?

However, I still don’t understand what “unknown metadata” means. Perhaps there are some restrictions on the target of <Deep Analysis>.

The Super System was like a huge treasure. Chen Rui had gotten the key now, but he was only digging at the shallowest level. The latter would definitely be worth looking forward to.

When he heard that Paglio was complaining to Brother Wukong about what he couldn’t get, Chen Rui shook his head: What’s with the primogenitor of the dragons? It’s just a monkey. Moreover, it’s one of the biggest monkey-exclusive brands in the primeval age store, Spiritual Stone Monkey!

Right at that moment, Chen Rui suddenly felt a strong dizziness in his head as if the world was spinning around. The heightened spirit during <Deep Analysis> previously actually showed an unprecedented feeble. His entire body was staggering; he was going to fall to the ground.

Paglio noticed something was wrong with him, so he quickly supported Chen Ruito sit down on the field slowly.

Chen Rui sat on the ground for a while; he finally got a little better. He felt that the spirit that had been abundant all the time became extremely depleted as if the gushing spring suddenly dried up. It was no wonder he could hardly hold himself.

It seemed that <Deep Analysis> wasn’t a skill that could be used casually. The demand on spirit was quite high. Using it twice consecutively just now actually emptied his spirit.

At that moment, he immediately exchanged a bottle of Spirit Recovery Potion that cost 2000 auras and drank it. However, this white potion which was equivalent to the potion brewed by a grand master was not as effective as expected. Along with <Astral Form > ability, the recovery of spirit was only slightly faster. This might not be due to the potion effect, but the side effect of <Deep Analysis>.

The poison dragon had a lot more questions, but seeing Chen Rui’s state, he didn’t insist; he let Chen Rui rode the wyvern back to rest. In Chen Rui’s current situation, he could no longer use the ordinary <Analytical Eyes>. Fortunately, Kegu was familiar with this round-trip, so Kegu didn’t need his orders and flew directly back to the laboratory of the palace.

Chen Rui went back to his room. He felt an unprecedented mental exhaustion, and he fell asleep.

[1] <a href=”https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brokeback_Mountain”>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brokeback_Mountain</a>

chapters.title: Chapter 76: Encounter At The Princess Retail Store
chapters.body:
Chapter 76: Encounter At The Princess Retail Store

When he finally woke up, it was already noon the next day. Chen Rui felt that his spirit had restored about 30%, then he drank another bottle of exchanged Spirit Recovery Potion. Although he found out the wonder of <Deep Analysis>, he had paid a certain price for his eagerness. Spirit was not only the fuel of magic casting, but it was also the source of will and senses. Under spirit deficiency, forced training would be counterproductive. Therefore, Chen Rui planned to wait until he fully recovered before he started training again.

He once experimented in the ordinary training ground with time rule. However, the time rule was not helpful with the recovery of spirit in this situation. He quitted helplessly and wasted 2000 auras. It seemed that he could only rely on potions and sleep to recover. <Deep Analysis> was really powerful, but in the future, this skill should be used cautiously after assessing the situation.

It would take approximately 2 more days to fully recover his spirit. In terms of time, it could be supplemented by the training ground’s rules. However, it seemed that a lot of auras were needed. Drinking the black potions back then was indeed impulsive. Yet, facing the temptation of permanently increasing strength by drinking potions, leaving 120,000 auras was good enough.

After taking into account the True Spirit Potion and the 20,000 auras consumed last night on <Deep Analysis>, he only had 90,000 auras left. Aura was like money as it was lost as fast as it came. However, within these gains and losses, his personal strength was increased, so there was nothing to regret.

Among the black potions, Eternal Body and Eternal Spirit potions were yet to exchanged and their budget was 200,000 auras. 8-fold gravity, 10-fold time rules or even 100-fold time rule required more auras. The 160,000 black crystal coins he got from Silva previously had about 80,000 left now. Yet, there wasn’t much aura material left in the market after being scoured by the old dwarf lately.

However, Chen Rui already had an idea long ago. Otherwise, he wouldn’t exchange for the black potions recklessly.

That was Mountain Xilang. Mountain Xilang’s “wasted ores” were a useless waste for ordinary people; for Chen Rui, it was a much-needed source of aura, and there were a lot of them! Based on the information, these wasted ores appeared four hundred years ago. It was probably produced by a special “pollution” of the underground demonic beast. In other words,, Mountain Xilang had accumulated these “wasted ores” for a few hundred years. Although one piece could only provide two digits worth of aura which was far worse than the magic materials in terms of “quality”, it had a rather scary number in terms of “quantity”.

Danger and opportunity always come hand in hand. Chen Rui decided to go to Mountain Xilang before the duel with Arux. Yet, but before that, he had to get a map. Otherwise, flying aimlessly would only be a waste on time even if he had the wyverns.

When Chen Rui was thinking, the imp knocked on the door, “Master, are you there?”

Under normal circumstances, Slee wouldn’t disturb, so Chen Rui got up and opened the door, “What’s the matter, Slee?”

“Princess Royal asked for your presence at the council hall.”

Chen Rui knew that Shea wouldn’t interrupt his “inheritance test” for no reason, so there must be something important. Besides, his spirit hadn’t recovered, and it wasn’t appropriate to train. Thus, he immediately rushed to the council hall.

In the council hall, other than Shea, there was also a beautiful figure that Chen Rui hadn’t seen for a long time. Considering the time spent in the training ground, it had been several months. To be honest, he kind of missed her. Especially at the moment of life and death, this figure was one of the reasons that triggered him to breakthrough.

“Chen Rui!” The familiar voice sounded with surprises. It was the familiar short, purple hair and red eyes. However, the blush that flashed past her face seemed a little strange.

“Athena!” Chen Rui was also very happy, “Have you fully adapted to your Higher Demon’s strength?”

“Yes! However, I could barely reach the level of Early Higher Demon. It will become increasingly difficult after this.” Athena nodded strongly. The moment that she looked at him, her face suddenly became worried, “What happened to you? Are you unwell? Have you taken any treatment?”

Due to the sequelae of <Deep Analysis>, Chen Rui’s current spirit state was very bad; Athena noticed it in a glance.

“Yes. Something happened, but it doesn’t matter. I just have to take a few days off.”

Feeling Athena’s undisguised concern, Chen Rui’s heart was warm. He then heard Shea also said, “In terms of the mission, you don’t have to force yourself. The Cloak Gang that you mentioned last time has become one of the reserve forces of the imperial guards.”

“I understand, Princess Royal.”

Chen Rui realized Shea’s first half of the sentence was a hidden concern; she was talking about the “inheritance test”. Although she seemed cold in front of Athena, it was still warm in his heart. The latter half of the sentence indicated Shea’s attitude toward “Aguile” that she had undoubtedly recognized Chen Rui’s trust in Aguile.

However, if it’s just about Athena and the Cloak Gang, Shea wouldn’t specifically summon him to the council hall, so he was waiting for Shea to continue.

“The quarterly meeting will be held tomorrow morning; you have to be present.”

Meeting? Royce seems to have mentioned it before. It’s so rare for me to rest for two days, but I still have to work overtime. I don’t even know if I can fight for employee’s benefit…

“I didn’t want you to attend this meeting, but Joseph and the representatives of several families wanted to see you as the new secretary, so it’s hard to refuse. Usually, such a request is reasonable, but Joseph will not speak without thinking. At the meeting, be wary of him making a fuss with your human identity. If you really can’t do it, you can quit your position as a secretary.”

Chen Rui then realized that it was the nasty-nice Joseph playing tricks at the back; he absolutely had no good intentions. It seemed he had to be very careful during tomorrow’s meeting. Yet, as Shea said, if he really couldn’t do it, then he could just quit his position as a secretary. If he had no desire for power and wealth, Joseph wouldn’t have a chance to make a fuss. With Shea’s trust in him, he would still do whatever he needed to do.

Shea saw him nodded and knew that Chen Rui knew what he should do. She didn’t say anything else and placed a space bracelet on the table, “This is the superior vine stones that Joseph brought back from the Red Spirit Estate. Alice told me that she promised to give her 6 pieces to you. So, the 100 pieces inside and the space bracelet are yours.”

100 pieces! Shouldn’t it be 66 pieces?

Chen Ruil looked surprised; he almost imitated the old dwarf to say “Princess Royal’s generosity is comparable to the Demon Realm’s two moons”. However, he knew that Shea didn’t like to listen to such flattery so he simply said, “Thank you, Your Royal Highness!”

For Chen Rui who possessed the storage warehouse currently, that space bracelet had little value. Besides, he already had Silva’s space ring. Moreover, after achieving the Mizar state, the capacity of the storage warehouse had expanded a lot. Now, there were a lot of spaces but little things. However, space equipment in the Demon Realm was relatively rare. That was also her beauty boss’ kindness, so he had to accept it.

Shea nodded slightly. She took a look at Chen Rui then took at Athena. She suddenly lowered her head and looked at the file in her hands. She said without lifting her head, “Athena just finished her training, and she hasn’t seen Alice. You guys should visit the Princess Retail Store. I believe Alice will be really happy to see both of you.”

Athena also wanted to see Alice, so she left the palace with Chen Rui.

“Chen Rui, didn’t Princess Royal assign you with a two-months mission? How’s it going?”

“There’s still half left.” Chen Rui thought of one thing, “By the way, Athena, have you been to Mountain Xilang?”

“Yes! The first year when I just came to the Dark Moon, I once went there to train.” Athena nodded, “It’s just that the bandits hadn’t spread their wings to the mines back then.”

“So… how long will it take to reach by riding a wyvern?” Seeing there weren’t many people around, Chen Rui whispered.

“Do you want to train long-distance flying with the beasts?” Athena’s eyes lit up.

Chen Rui clearly wouldn’t tell the truth, so he went along and asked, “Actually, it’s just a rough idea. Can you answer me?”

Athena blinked and replied, “The wyvern’s flying ability is strong, but there is a limit. You must choose a place to rest and feed wyvern along the way. Also, you have to choose a safe place to rest at night. If you go alone, it will probably take around 6 days even with a map. So, if you decide to do this kind of training, you can save at least half the time if you have an experienced guide.”

Athena wasn’t a deceitful person after all. The eager expression on her pretty face had clearly written the words “I am the guide”. Chen Rui smiled slightly, but his mind was calculating: 6 days. The journey back and forth will be 12 days. I have to fight Arux in less than a month’s time. I’m definitely in a hurry. Do I really need to bring this guide along?

As they spoke, the two had already arrived at the Princess Retail Store. They saw customers leaving the store one after another, and they constantly looked back. It seemed that something had happened in the store.

Chen Rui and Athena walked in and saw that only the succubus and the imp responsible for serving were left on the first floor. Kaguli, who was in charge of the “security” was gone. A group of people were blocking and confronting at the end of the stairs to the second floor. So, the two quickly approached.

“Athena!”

A greeting from the entrance on the second floor made Athena frowned, and her good mood suddenly became bad. When everyone heard it, they moved and made way.

It was Athena’s most disliked person, the sheriff and general of the guards, Alan. Karon.

“It turns out to be Athena and our new Dark Moon secretary, Sir Chen Rui.”

Another voice with a hidden dagger behind a smile sounded which also made Chen Rui felt uncomfortable. Yet, he still politely bowed, “Sir Joseph.”

It turned out that the two parties that were confronting were Joseph’s and Alan’s men. Joseph was still smiling, but Royce and Vasasha behind him had a strong hostility toward Alan’s men.

Although Alan had more subordinates, none of them were Higher Demon. Under the intimidation, they seemed afraid; it had the taste of trying hard to look imposing. It was mainly because Karon Family’s strongest Higher Demon, Sarado was badly injured fighting with Arux. Also, Mikas was dead. Alan didn’t have any powerhouse to put up a front, so he could only rely on the quantity to barely intimidate.

“Sir Secretary seems to be unwell?” Joseph noticed Chen Rui’s dispirited state, and he asked with concern.

Chen Rui knew that Joseph didn’t have a good intention, so he replied, “I’m sorry for showing this side of me to sir. I have a weak body since I was a child. I have been seriously ill recently, and I didn’t come out much.”

Joseph looked at Athena and smiled meaningfully, “So that’s the case. No wonder our Great Demon race’s genius girl hasn’t shown herself lately.”

When he said that sentence, Chen Rui could feel a pair of smoldering eyes staring at his face. It was Alan. Chen Rui had gotten used to this kind of look, so he couldn’t care less. However, with one sentence, Joseph deflected Alan’s anger toward Chen Rui. Joseph was indeed sinister.

“Athena! Is your training finally over?” The two parties were separated, and Alice’s surprised voice sounded.

Now, everyone had gathered.

chapters.title: Chapter 77: Disputes And Careful Thoughts
chapters.body:
Chapter 77: Disputes And Careful Thoughts

Unsure whether Alice’s words were intentional or not, that sentence made Alan understood that Athena locked herself for training. His anger was slightly relieved and he continued to stare at Joseph fiercely.

Athena saw her friend, Alice whom she hadn’t seen for a long time and finally smiled, “Alice!”

“Chen Rui is here too! Come over!” Alice took Chen Rui’s and Athena’s hands and pulled them to the second floor in front of Joseph and Alan.

Kaguli, Kia and others were all here. There were also a few customers, and one of them was even injured. The customers seemed to not dare to leave because Joseph and Alan were blocking the stairs. Just now, Alice was checking on the injured, so she didn’t notice Athena and Chen Rui at the first place.

Chen Rui knew after asking Alice that the dispute between Joseph and Alan was for the grand master’s work, “burr puzzle”. Of course, if it weren’t for the dispute the night before yesterday, the two sides who were originally working closely together wouldn’t have such a tense relationship.

The birthday of the empire’s regent, Prince Obsidian was coming soon. Alan wanted to buy the burr puzzle as a gift and offer it to Prince Obsidian through his father at the capital. Coincidentally, Joseph came to the Princess Retail Store. After learning about Alan’s intentions, he offered to buy the burr puzzle with twice the price. Alan had already hated Royce and Arux who killed Mikas and fought their way to his mansion. Now that Joseph returned to the Dark Moon, not only he didn’t initiate reconciliation, but he provocatively competed for the burr puzzle. Alan was extremely furious. If it weren’t for his lack of strength, he would’ve started a fight. The injured customer was hurt by Alan’s subordinate because he was unlucky.

“Joseph, are you that rich? You should keep that little money to continue fighting with your brother, Kanita!” Alan diverted his biggest hostility to Joseph again. “I’ll pay 3 times the price! This burr puzzle is mine!”

The original price of the burr puzzle is 50,000 black crystal coins. 3 times the price is 150,000. That’s a huge sum of money!

The Demon Realm’s rule was generally the highest bidder won. Alice didn’t bother greeting Chen Rui and Athena and her big eyes were in the shape of black crystal coins. She immediately asked, “This burr puzzle… Joseph, are you still increasing the price?”

“200,000.” Joseph heard Alan mentioned Kanita’s name intentionally and his eyes flashed with cold lights.

Alan was about to speak, then the lich at his side whispered, “Sir, we don’t have enough money.”

Seeing Joseph’s smile, Alan was even angrier. He thought of something and took out a few things while sneering, “I didn’t bring enough money, but these magic equipments are all of superior quality. If the little princess wants, you can convert them into black crystal coins. I still have a lot of such equipment that I can convert for Your Royal Highness with discount.”

Royce who was behind Joseph growled as he saw the magic equipment; his murderous intention was overflowing. Joseph raised his brow and knew that these were definitely the missing items from his magic store. Alan’s behavior was undoubtedly provocative; both parties were furiously staring at each other at once.

However, Joseph wasn’t angry. He turned around and patted Royce’s shoulder. Royce then took a deep breath and regained his calmness.

Chen Rui praised Royce for his good acting skills in his mind. Alice hesitated and couldn’t make up her mind and secretly looked at Chen Rui for consultation. Chen Rui couldn’t offer his opinion in front of so many people, so he just looked at a plaque at the center of the second floor. On the plaque, there was a word carved according to Chen Rui’s idea: integrity.

Alice was very clever. Following the direction of his gaze, she suddenly understood. She was still frowning and was clearly struggling in her heart. Finally, she said, “I don’t want these things.”

Alan’s face changed at once, then he heard Alice continued to say, “The motto of Princess Retail Store is integrity and that includes all our customers. Alan came in before Joseph today, so the burr puzzle will be sold to Alan at the original price, 50,000 black crystal coins. However, Alan, your subordinate injured my customer, so you must pay for his treatment. Do you have any opinion?”

“I absolutely has no opinion!” Alan was overjoyed and quickly gave the injured a handful of black crystal coins, “I am really grateful! The Princess Retail Store is indeed the best store in the city. Much stronger than some guy’s store!”

Alice nodded and let Kaguli and Kia counted Alan’s 50,000 black crystal coins, then, she removed the magic protection and gave Alan the burr puzzle with a delicate packaging.

Alan carefully opened the box and he looked at the premium version of the burr puzzle as if he received a precious treasure. He then quickly kept it into his space ring. Seeing Alan’s appearance, Alice recalled several pieces of “grand master’s works” piled up messily in her room, and she was secretly laughing. However, she had lost at least 150,000 less black crystal coins this time, and that was bitter thinking about it.

Joseph ignored Alan’s provocative eyes and looked at the word integrity. Although the instant communication between Alice and Chen Rui with their eyes were obscured, it couldn’t hide from Joseph. After taking a deep look at Chen Rui, Joseph bowed toward Alice and left the Princess Retail Store with Royce and Vasasha.

Seeing Joseph left, Alan was obviously proud. He thanked Alice happily and he left too. After both of them left, Chen Rui came over and whispered a few words to Alice. Alice immediately went to comfort the injured person. He was just a member of a small family. In fact, he was only slightly injured. He didn’t need to be compensated by that amount of money. Seeing little princess asking personally, he looked overwhelmed by the kindness.

Alice smiled and said, “Everyone, I am very sorry about what happened today. However, I believe everyone saw that the Princess Retail Store pays particular attention to the word integrity. In the future, no matter who comes to us, they will feel the meaning represented by the word. I hope everyone can shop at ease.”

“Little princess is truly amazing!” Alice’s words and smiles affected everyone. A nobleman said with emotion, “I want to tell everyone about this. The reputation of Princess Retail Store will be known throughout the Dark Moon!”

After these customers finished shopping and left unwillingly, the smiling little princess with “integrity” suddenly changed her face. She leaped angrily and rode on Chen Rui back to choke his neck, “That’s 150,000 black crystal coins! 150,000! Wuwu … Why Chen Rui! You must tell me! Otherwise, I will kill you today!”

Chen Rui almost couldn’t breathe being choked. It seemed that under the influence of money, the little loli with the “halo of miser” had reached the level of Mikas. Athena and Kia saw it and quickly stopped her. They had to persuade for a long time before finally pulling the little miser off Chen Rui’s back.

Chen Rui gasped for air. Seeing little loli’s angry look, he shook his head, “Do you remember what I said when I made you carve that plaque?”

Alice thought about it and replied, “It seems to be ‘integrity outweighs all strategies’.”

“If you want the Princess Retail Store to truly prosper for a long time, or even open more chain stores, you must remember this sentence.” Chen Rui saw Alice still looked like she didn’t understand. “Let me tell you a story. Once, there was a Great Demon King called King Zhao of the Yan Empire. He once spent a million black crystal coins to buy a rare mare…”

When Chen Rui said the Demon Realm edited version of “King Zhao of Yan Empire Buy Horse Carcass [1] with Million Gold”, Kia and Athena seemed to not understand fully, but the clever Alice had already understood the meaning.

There was another meaning that Chen Rui couldn’t tell in front of Kia and Kaguli. The magic store’s booties were troublesome. Staying in Alan’s hands was more conducive to the strategy of driving the tiger to swallow the wolf. Today, Alan’s deliberate show-offs had worsened the relationship between the two parties in reality. However, why did Joseph compete with Alan for the grand master’s work? Wasn’t reconciliation most needed currently?

“I’ve always known that brother Chen Rui is very powerful.” After the little loli understood, her face changed really fast. She was blinking her big eyes and instantly changed from a murderous look to look of adoration, “Perhaps, let’s go to the blue lake again for a picnic?”

“No! My body isn’t great for the past two days, so I can’t travel far.” Chen Rui head shook like a rattle – Are you kidding me? Picnicking again? She certainly prepares another stunning stick and some… damn reference books!

“Really?!” Alice looked disappointed, “I’m so bored in this store everyday; it’s so uncomfortable. Athena, let’s stroll in the city with just the 3 of us.”

“Okay!” Athena agreed immediately.

Chen Rui heard it was just strolling outside, so he couldn’t refuse. Alice thought for a while, “Wait for me downstairs. Also, Kia and Kaguli should go down too. I have something to say to Athena privately.”

After the three went downstairs, Alice’s eyes fell on the well-developed breasts of Athena. She subconsciously compared it with her own, and she obviously felt a huge pressure.

“Are we good friends?”

Athena didn’t understand little loli’s thoughts, so she nodded and said, “Of course. Alice is my best friend.”

“What about Chen Rui?”

Athena’s face was a little hot, “He… is also a good friend!”

The blush flashed past on Athena’s face couldn’t hide from the mature little loli. The little loli’s petite body trembled slightly and the demeanor of a tyrant was released, “Athena! There’s something that I will not give in even if we’re good friends!”

“What is it?” Athena looked puzzled.

“For example… that…” Alice suddenly lost her demeanor and lowered her head. She gently put her two index fingertips together and mumbled, “There is one person… No! There is one thing that both you and I like to eat…”

“That’s simple.” Athena said without thinking, “Cut it in half with a knife and we’ll both take half.”

Alice seemed to be worried. Her eyes flashed with strange brilliance when she heard that sentence, “Cut it?”

“ Achoo! ” Chen Rui who was downstairs sneezed inexplicably. Seeing Kia’s frowning look, he smiled apologetically.

“If you can’t cut it?” The little loli thought for a moment and continued to beat around the bush. “Actually, I don’t know if I truly like to eat. However, this… ‘thing’ makes me feel a bit strange. I might want to eat a little…”

“I don’t understand what you’re saying.” Athena thought for a moment and replied, “However, if it’s something that really can’t be cut open, we will each take a bite until it is finished. We’re good friends, so shouldn’t we share good things?”

“Really? Each takes a bite?” The little loli’s big eyes lit up as if she had solved some key problems, and she skipped happily, “Although I don’t know… but Athena! You’re truly my best friend! ”

“Haven’t I always been?” The unaware Athena still hadn’t realized why Alice was hesitating at once and happy after.

“Let’s go!” Alice regained her strong vitality in the blink of an eye and skipped down the stairs while holding Athena’s hand.

[1] <a href=”http://chineselegend.blogspot.com/2008/12/buy-carcass-with-thousand-taels-of.html”>http://chineselegend.blogspot.com/2008/12/buy-carcass-with-thousand-taels-of.html</a>

chapters.title: Chapter 78: Meeting Proposal! Joseph'S Plot To Murder
chapters.body:
Chapter 78: Meeting Proposal! Joseph'S Plot To Murder

Joseph walked slowly on the road with a smile on his face, but his eyes were filled with gloom. He had been like that since he came out of the Princess Retail Store.

As he was passing through an isolated alley, Joseph’s footsteps stopped and he said firmly, “That human must die.”

As Royce heard that, he asked with surprise, “Sir, that human is nothing but a useless person. Why…”

Joseph said with a dignified look, “I saw a lot of things in the Princess Retail Store just now. Not just the goods but also some hidden wonders. These things are amazing innovations even if you look at the entire Demon Realm. In other words, it is likely to come from beyond the Demon Realm and the human from the surface world is the biggest suspect…”

“Also, I bid with Alan just now wasn’t to teach him a lesson but to raise the price. Then, I’ll buy the burr puzzle and give it to him so that I can please both the little princess and Alan simultaneously. I know Alan’s personality well. As long as you show him deference, reconciliation isn’t a difficult thing.” Joseph’s face became gloomier, “I never thought that human to actually notice my intentions and hinted the little princess. That’s why little princess did that. With that, our relationship with the Karon Family will worsen. If it is not resolved as soon as possible, Kanita might take advantage of that.”

“Is this human really that powerful? He actually influenced the little princess’s decision?” Royce looked like he had a sudden realization. In his mind, he had a whole new understanding of his “master” in his heart. For his master to receive such recognition from someone like Joseph, he must be truly impressive.

“If I guessed it right, the person behind the Princess Retail Store is Chen Rui. For the Princess Retail Store to prosper today, it is all because of the human. That’s why Alice would listen to him. With just one look, she actually grasped all his intentions.”

Having said that, Joseph’s eyes were filled with murderous intention inexplicably, “Since this human appeared in the Dark Moon City, a series of changes have taken place, be it the Master Challenge, the Sky Battle or the Princess Retail Store. Nevermind his impressive talent, even if he’s useless, and he can only bring fortune to Princess Royal’s side, I have to find a way to get rid of him!”

If Chen Rui heard that now, what would he think. Actually, Chen Rui didn’t completely notice Joseph’s intentions. He simply got it by chance. However, Joseph’s wisdom was definitely not someone like Alan could rival. He had already concluded that Chen Rui was the man behind Princess Retail Store. He also associated it with the Master Challenge and the Sky Battle, and even the so-called “luck theory” factor.

“Sir, leave that to me.” Royce thought and requested.

Although Joseph had impressive intelligence, he would’ve never thought his powerful subordinate had become that human’s servant. That request of killing Chen Ruiwas nothing but a fluke to secretly let the “enemy” escape.

“Royce, I know that the incident at the magic store is still bothering you, and you want to make up for it. I have already said that you have no responsibility for that. It was all due to that idiot Alan.” Joseph glanced at Vasasha who had no expression facing Royce and smiled slightly, “As for Chen Rui, I already have a plan. Actually, it is too easy to assassinate this human. I need his death to be more valuable. Princess Royal is currently watching the show between Alan and I leisurely. If this is the case, then I’ll let her worry for a while.”

“Understood.” Royce bowed slightly; his lowered eyes had a faint glow.

The next morning, the quarterly meeting began.

There were many people attending the regular meeting. Chen Rui only knew Joseph and Alan. The rest such as the Saiful Family patriarch, Ford, the Mellon Family patriarch, Carl and other small and medium-sized family representatives were those who could only be seen in that document.

Chen Rui quietly activated <Analytical Eyes> and looked at everyone’s strength.

Female Boss Shea – Race: Pride Royal Family; Strength Rating: Unable to Judge.

Butler Old Gauss – Race: Lich; Strength Rating: D.

Nasty-Nice Joseph – Race: Great Demon; Strength Rating: C.

King of Thrash Talk, Alan – Race: Great Demon; Strength Rating: E.

Saifu Family Patriarch, Ford – Race: Great Demon; Strength Rating: D.

Mellon Family Patriarch, Karl – Race Great Demon; Strength Rating: D.

……

Now that Chen Rui’s personal strength had reached D. While using <Analytical Eyes>, Joseph’s strength rating was no longer “Unable to Judge”, but it was displayed as C; whereas Shea’s strength was still “Unable to Judge”. Chen Rui was quite skilled at using <Analytical Eyes>. He knew that this skill could analyze a level higher than himself, so anything above that would be shown as “Unable to Judge”.

The strongest person present is Shea, followed by Joseph, who must’ve reached the level of Demon King. The worsts are Alan and the representatives of several small families. As Shea said, Alan shouldn’t really be eliminated now. If not, where can we find a sheriff that is weak both physically and cognitively?

Shea’s analysis of “Pride Royal Family” made Chen Rui a little curious. I remember Athena once mentioned that Demon Realm currently has three royal empires, namely the Fallen Angel Empire representing “Pride”, the Bloody Empire representing “Greed” and the Dark Shadow Empire representing “Lust”. Demon Realm had seven great empires during its heyday. In the past millions of years of natural selection, there are only three royal families left in the end. The other four royal families were either dependent on others or have disappeared. Pride, greed, lust… sounds quite familiar.

However, Shea is only 23 years old. Her strength is at least Great Demon King for it to be “Unable to Judge”. How did she train? Does she also have a Super System?

Also, Old Gauss is a lich. The usual upper limit for lich should be Intermediate Demon, which is E. Now, it is displayed as D. It seems that he’s another one with the mutated bloodline.

Chen Rui was observing then a concern sounded, “Secretary, I heard that your body was unwell some time ago. Is it better now?”

This voice didn’t make Chen Rui feel comforted because it was from the nasty-nice Joseph. He just asked this question yesterday, and he deliberately asked the same question again today. He probably had a bad intention.

“Sir Joseph, thanks for your concern.” Chen Rui got up and bowed, “Actually, I blame my body for being too weak. I have been sick for a while, and I have yet to recover.”

The Alan beside didn’t hide his despise at all – Weak human. He hasn’t been in the Demon Realm for that long, but he already can’t endure it and fallen sick. It’s best if he dies from sickness!

“Be sure to take care of your body.” Joseph nodded meaningfully, “Otherwise, how can Princess Royal be assured to give you more important tasks in the future. Actually, I have always thought highly of you.”

Thought highly your ass! Chen Rui secretly complaining: Who doesn’t know you? Shouting brother at the front, but sharpening your knife at the back.

At that moment, Shea spoke up, “Okay. Enough with the chatter. Let’s get started.”

The quarterly meeting was mainly to summarize the situation of the current quarter and make a rough arrangement for the next quarter’s work.

The summary at the beginning was nothing more than reporting the major events which was mainly based on the logbook that Chen Rui was responsible for. After Shea finished the summary, Joseph took the lead and stood up when Shea was asking everyone for the arrangement of the next quarter, “I lost 100 vine stones to the little princess from the Sky Battle last time. As I needed time to collect the vine stones and I had some personal matter at the Red Spirit Estate, I took a long leave last month. After attending this regular meeting, I also want to request for at least two months leave from Princess Royal. After I settled the issues, I will return to serve the Dark Moon. I hope Your Royal Highness can understand.”

Shea slightly nodded. In fact, everyone knew that taking leave was just a formality. Princess Royal was eager for the financial officer to go out the longer the better; it’d be best if he doesn’t return.

“Thanks Your Royal Highness! Please be assured that I will arrange all the work at hand before I take my leave.” Joseph smiled and said some work arrangements. Then, he looked at Chen Rui, who was recording and said, “Upon returning to the Dark Moon this time only that I found out Princess Royal has a secretary around which turned out to be Chen Rui who was outstanding in the Master Challenge and the Air Battle. Actually, I’ve always thought that Chen Rui is very talented. Princess Royal is really excellent in discovering those who are talented.”

As Joseph said, everyone’s eyes were on this tiny secretary. Chen Rui knew that this guy definitely had no good intention, so he was secretly vigilant. Even Alan, a simple-minded guy also understood that Joseph must have a plan for him to praise Chen Rui like that.

Sure enough, Joseph shook his head and said, “Your Royal Highness, please forgive me for being rude. In fact, in my opinion, him being a secretary is an overkill. Chen Rui is Master Aldas’s apprentice and is skilled in pharmaceutics. Besides, he’s daring yet careful. I believe those who have watched the Master Challenge and Sky Battle will understand. I intend to recommend Chen Rui to take on more important tasks. What do you think, Princess Royal?

Shea had already expected Joseph to make a fuss on Chen Rui. She thought it might be discrimination or suppress, but she didn’t expect it to be a recommendation. She frowned and said, “What do you want to recommend Chen Rui to do?”

Joseph smiled and said, “The mining problem has been a chronic problem that has plagued the Dark Moon Estate for many years. As the financial officer in charge, I would like to recommend him to be a mine officer to go to Mountain Xilang. He shall show us his talents and manage the mining industry. What does Your Royal Highness think? ”

Mountain Xilang! Mine officer! Shea’s eyes flickered in cold lights as she immediately understood Joseph’s sinister scheme.

Not just Shea, but everyone present understood the objective of Joseph’s “kind” recommendation.

The Mountain Xilang’s mine used to be the largest source of resources and wealth for the Dark Moon. However, for a few decades, the underground demonic beast had been rampaging, taking many lives of the miners. It seemed that the last mine officer had disappeared in the mine, and his body had yet to be found. Nowadays, there were even bandits who disturbed from time to time, so it was highly dangerous.

Let alone a powerless human like Chen Rui, even a Higher Demon most probably couldn’t return safely. Joseph clearly wanted to kill the human.

Sure enough, the human secretary had a weird look, and he was silenced at once.

As soon as Alan heard that proposal, he couldn’t bother about his bad relationship with Joseph lately, and he was the first one who agreed. The Mellon Family immediately expressed his support on Joseph’s comments. The families that defected to Joseph also supported one after another. Many people looked at Chen Rui with gloat, as if he was already a dead body.

No one knew the true reason of Chen Rui’s strange look – Mountain Xilang was exactly where he wanted to go. Could it be that Joseph also has some knockoff <Mind Reading> skill like Alice!?

At this moment, Old Ford of the Saiful Family spoke up, “The mining industry of Mountain Xilang has always been an important source of income for our Dark Moon. However, the scourge has been frequent in recent years. There are bandits from outside and demonic beasts from within. It’s almost impossible to mine. This human his powerless. I think that Sir Joseph yourself is the best candidate. If you can go there in person, you can definitely solve the problems and let the Dark Moon reinvigorate.”

“Finance and economy are the fundamentals of an estate. I am the person in charge of this work. If I go to the mine personally, and if something happens regarding finance, who will bear this responsibility?”

Joseph’s words brought a faint treat. He sneered, “Old Ford, your son Tim was the last mine officer. I am sorry for his disappearance. However, it doesn’t mean that the secretary valued by the Princess Royal will be the same. Are you questioning the Princess Royal’s choice in choosing her own subordinate? Or is this your revenge that I shouldn’t let Tim go to the mine back then? You have to know that my intention is for the development of the entire Dark Moon!”

Old Ford was shivering for his anger. The Saiful Family was one of Dark Moon’s oldest family, and it had always been rivaling with Joseph who was the outsider. Two years ago, Tim, the eldest son of Old Ford was appointed as a mine officer by Joseph and went missing in the mines as a result. There were no news to date; he had been identified as dead. Thus, Ford hated Joseph to the core. The other small families that supported Shea also expressed their opposition and the council hall became noisy for a while.

The chills in Shea’s cold eyes were looking straight as if it wanted to penetrate Joseph’s heart. Unfortunately, her gaze couldn’t kill, otherwise, Joseph’s smirking face had long turned into a sieve.

Joseph ignored Shea’s anger and looked at Chen Rui with his habitual smile – When this human die, the Princess Retail Store will decline sooner or later. Shea will also lose a major support commercially. Her morale will definitely greatly influenced.

“I am willing to go to the mine.”

The noises suddenly calmed down, and everyone looked at the human who stood up.

chapters.title: Chapter 79: Chen Rui'S Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 79: Chen Rui'S Decision

Chen Rui did that because he thought about it seriously. He had to go to the mine anyway, so might as well do it. He received a secret message from Royce last night. The incident of Princess Retail Store had already made Joseph suspected him. If he stayed in the Dark Moon longer, it might be even more inconvenient.

Although Mountain Xilang was dangerous, it wasn’t comparable to the Silent Night Wetland. With his Higher Demon strength, there shouldn’t be a problem to protect himself. What’s more, his true purpose was the big bulk of auras from the “waste ores”. Mine officer… the mines hadn’t changed much in recent years anyway, so he didn’t need to produce any result in a short time.

As for Arux’s War Contract, he could use the wyvern to sneak back. With such an alibi, no one would suspect Aguile and Chen Rui were the same people.

“Chen Rui!”

Shea got up suddenly, but Joseph spoke first, “Good! Indeed a talent that Princess Royal and I value! If you need anything, tell me. I’ll fully support you!”

Shea frowned, “Chen Rui, the time you spent in the Dark Moon is still too short. You don’t understand the dangers of the mine. Besides, you’re too weak. I don’t want to make the mine’s situation worse.”

“I’m not afraid of danger; I’m willing to work for Your Royal Highness!” Chen Rui had made up his mind to get auras at the mines. His “fanatic” gaze was looking atShea’s beautiful face with an impassioned look, but in his heart, Your Royal Highness was changed to “auras”.

Now, the few demons at the sides could tell that the reason why the new secretary was willing to sacrifice was entirely due to his admiration for Princess Royal. However, although Your Royal Highness was extremely beautiful, she was also known for her coldness and ruthlessness. How could a tiny human move her?

Some of them had richer imagination, thinking that since Joseph had always been pleasing Princess Royal before this. When he knew that Shea had an admired secretary at her side, he was filled with jealousy. Thus, while weakening Princess Royal’s strength, he also cruelly sent his potential “rival in love” to death.

“Princess Royal, since Chen Rui is willing to go, why not give him a chance?” Joseph glanced at Chen Rui with surprise and said, “In order to express my sincerity of recommending, if Chen Rui can manage the problems that plagued Mountain Xilang for decades, I’d recommend him again to be the sheriff.”

The sheriff had always been General Alan’s part-time job. When he heard Joseph’s words, Alan was angered and stared at Joseph fiercely. Yet, Joseph acted like he didn’t notice at all.

This proposal reminded everyone of the big incident that stirred up the city over the past few days. Surely, the sheriff and the financial officer were hostile. In fact, it was considered as Alan’s fault as he cheated at the arena. However, Alan’s loss was also the biggest, since he lost a Higher Demon.

Of course, no one thought that Chen Rui could return alive to be the sheriff. In the eyes of most people, this human was already a dead person.

“If that’s the case, let’s write it down as evidence.” Chen Rui’s words got everyone’s attention again. “As Sir Joseph just told me to tell you if I need anything. I’ve never been to Mountain Xilang, so I need a magic map copy of the entire Dark Moon, a magic eye compass, a torch ring, 10 fluorescent stones…”

Chen Rui said a dozen items in one breath and looked at Joseph embarrassingly at the end, “That should be all. I don’t know if sir would keep your promise?”

These things seemed to be the preparation for the trip to Mountain Xilang, but there were magic items and magic materials. Not only he could collect tiny interest before going to Mountain Xilang, but he could also annoy Joseph a little. If the magic store wasn’t robbed, these were nothing for him. However, these things were “robbed” by Alan now. Of course, the scapegoat of robbing the magical material was also “kindly” taken by the sheriff.

Joseph was stunned as his words out of politeness was taken seriously by the human. Yet, since he promised in front of so many people and his opponent agreed to go to the mine, these little things naturally didn’t matter. It was just like buying his life.

“That’s not a problem. I will send someone to deliver them to the master’s lab. I’ll make sure they’re of the highest quality equipment and items.” Joseph seemed happier, “As for the paperwork, you should draft it yourself. Princess Royal and everyone else are witnesses.”

Chen Rui wrote them down in triplicate, then and the two signed their name on them. Joseph took his copy. He smiled and said, “So, our minE officer, please prepare yourself and go to Mountain Xilang as soon as possible.”

Chen Rui nodded. Shea looked at the paper in her hand calmly. She didn’t say anything, and she was still showing her cold expression that never changed.

On the road outside the palace.

Alan clenched his teeth and said to Joseph, “Why did you gamble my sheriff’s post! Was your sincerity last night a fluke?”

It turned out that Joseph secretly met Alan last night. Under Joseph’s superb diplomatic skills, Alan, who initially hated Joseph’s guts extremely had reconciled with him. The magic equipment and others were considered as compensation for Mikas’ “accidental” death. Both sides also reached an important conclusion. They’d continue to pretend to be discordant to paralyze Shea’s faction.

However, Alan’s anger today wasn’t fake for cooperation, but it was from the bottom of his heart. Clearly, Joseph gambling with his sheriff’s position truly caused his anger.

Joseph looked like he knew everything, and he asked calmly, “If I didn’t do that, how do we continue to act like we’re fighting? Don’t you want to watch that human dies step by step?”

Alan’s anger was slightly calmed, then Joseph added, “Or you really think that the human can come back from Mountain Xilang? Are the demonic beasts and bandits that you mentioned there just a “fluke”?”

Alan also responded at that time, “That’s right, even if he isn’t dead, we can send someone to kill him. We’ll just say that he’s killed by demonic beasts or bandits!”

“My friend, you finally understood.” Joseph smiled slightly, “Now, the items in the magic store have all been given to you. The items that the human mentioned just now, I don’t have it with me, so I have to depend on you.”

“ Hmph , whatever map or compass is useless for me anyway. Yet, I don’t have fluorescent stones, so you have to find a way!” Although they were reconciled on the surface, the thorn in Alan’s heart wasn’t pulled out after all. As he said, he ignored Joseph and strode away.

Looking at Alan’s back, dissatisfaction and contempt appeared for a moment in Joseph’s eyes, but he still didn’t say anything.

In the council hall, Chen Rui was the only one left.

Shea kept staring at him and the invisible pressure made Chen Rui very uncomfortable. After a long time, the iceberg princess finally said, “Why?”

“That’s because I really want to go to Mountain Xilang. That’s the truth.” Chen Rui honestly replied.

“Truth? The position of sheriff is indeed important to the Dark Moon, but why did you bet with your own life? In the face of absolute power, wisdom can hardly play a role, so you have no chance to win this time. You should be very clear about the dangers at Mountain Xilang. If you fail, it means death.”

Chen Rui understood that wisdom was indeed nothing in the face of absolute strength. Thus, when necessary, he’d use strength to overwhelm strength.

“Rest assured. I will come back. Actually, I wanted to say that this is part of the grand master’s test.”

“This excuse is too bad.” Shea shook her head, “I don’t understand; I really don’t understand. Perhaps this could be understood as a means for you to move me?”

Could be understood? Isn’t that “deduction”… Chen Rui’s face was stagnant – I’m answering honestly, but this girl simply doesn’t believe.

Since the beginning of the misunderstanding in the garden last time, this beautiful misunderstanding had been going on. However, as a healthy male… that’s wrong, as a normal man, it was inevitable to have some feelings for the beautiful female boss. Besides, being able to witness Shea’s rare smile or hearing a plain concern, it felt really good.

However, under the powerful “deduction bloodline” of the Lucifer Family, he was playing the role as “admirer” passively most of the time.

“As I said, it’s for myself. I can’t help if you don’t believe me.” Chen Rui sighed, and he didn’t muddle through by expressing admiration.

Shea shook her head, “If you lost your life, what can you do even if you moved me?”

“Can… I truly move you?” Chen Rui’s heart moved, and he asked subconsciously. Jesus, I truly didn’t scheme that.

“Is there any actual meaning between moving or not moving?” Shea sighed, “Actually, with your wisdom, it should be clear that we’re absolutely impossible. You’ve gained my trust, but everything stops here. Maybe I should implement Old Gauss’s proposal to retain your talents by the charm of playing hard to get. However, I’m not doing that. To be honest, you give me a very special feeling. I haven’t had this feeling for a long time. I even thought that I’ve forgotten how to feel it, this feeling… it’s like…”

As Shea said this, her initial expressionless face had a hint of movements; it was slightly trembling. Finally, it returned to the usual poker face.

“Perhaps this feeling is friendship.” Chen Rui added. I never expect Old Gauss to have such a suggestion. He’s such a good man. It’s too bad the boss doesn’t like the idea.

Although there was a little regret in his heart, there was more fulfillment and touch. He knew that Athena had feelings for him, but probably it was just “a bit”; Alice was more like curious and pranks. As for Shea… he wouldn’t be narcissistic enough to think that the Demon Realm’s beauty would like him for no reason. For her to be confessing, it was quite surprisingly already.

This should be the first time since she became the lord.

Perhaps it’s a pity for a dying person, perhaps it’s for him to stop fantasizing… but confess is a confess.

“‘Friends’? I don’t know, maybe.” Shea’s eyes gradually cooled down. “I’m not only the lord of Dark Moon, but also the descendant of Lord of Midnight Sun, who carries heavy responsibilities. This word is a luxury for me. For you, it’s bad luck. I don’t want to discuss this anymore. You’ve obstinately signed the papers just now. Apart from escaping from the Dark Moon, you can only go to the mine. Have you made up your mind?”

“I’ve made up my mind.” Chen Rui nodded firmly, “I’ll go to the mine.”

“Then, no matter what method you use, you have to endure for half a year! After half a year, even if there’s isn’t any accomplishment, I can still use the privilege to transfer you back. Joseph can’t say anything even if he has the evidence.”

Chen Rui was calculating. If it’s half a year, I can go to the Silent Night Wetland. However, the prerequisite is to pass Arux’s challenge and further improve my strength.

“Half a year shouldn’t be a problem. I do need to go for the grand master’s inheritance. Now I can solve the problem along the way. I’ll also take the wyverns with me. By the way, I can also convince Aguile to secretly escort. After all, I have a symbiotic contract with him. If I’m dead, he’ll also die.”
