Chen Rui was shocked. He didn’t expect that Athena to arrange a backup plan for him. He felt that the cold crystal in his hand seemed to contain a burning feeling. He suddenly silenced.

“Athena, you’ll be fine.”

“Chen Rui, you don’t understand…”

“The one who don’t understand is you…” Chen Rui raised his head and stared into Athena’s ruby-like eyes. He took out a green pearl, “Hold this… do you remember this?”

“This is… the antidote given by the blue lake poison dragon previously?” Athena took it and looked at it for a while. “It seems to taste very spicy.”

Chen Rui nodded. “This is called Jade Pearl. A precious crystal of the poison dragon. It’s produced once every 200 years. It can quickly recover from injury and permanently enhance the body’s poison resistance after eating.”

“Permanently enhance physical ability?” Athena was taken aback. “Why did the poison dragon give such precious crystal as antidote?”

“That’s because you, little princess and Kia aren’t poisoned at all.” Chen Rui had kept this in his heart for a long time. He finally couldn’t help but revealed it, “I’m sorry. I never tell you the truth… ”

“You’re such an asshole! You’ve made me always worried!” Athena pounced toward Chen Rui in spite of her injury and pushed him to the ground. She kept beating him, “Damn it! Asshole! Asshole…”

Seeing its master being attacked, Dodo wanted to help initially, but he didn’t dare to intervene due to the trauma of her “mistress” saying that she was going to eat him. Besides, the situation between his master and mistress was a bit strange. It felt like when the season came, the female and male creatures liked to flirt before “attracting” each other. The behavior wasn’t much like it, but it seemed like it. If he disturbed them at this time, he might truly be grilled and eaten.

The slime who had gained considerable intelligence finally wisely chose to turn a blind eye. It was like a “you can’t see me” transparent background.

The judgment of the slime wasn’t unreasonable. Athena was very fierce, but the beating on Chen Rui’s body was powerless. Perhaps it could be understood as she wasn’t able to use her strength as a Higher Demon because of the injuries. However, her voice was truly worse than her bite. Even on a normal human body, it couldn’t make much damage.

Athena’s action finally stopped. She kept panting while laying on Chen Rui’d body. Suddenly, she felt that her action was too embarrassing. Her heart accelerated, then she supported her body up with her blush and gave him another punch before turning over to sit on the ground at the side.

This level of “attack” was only scratching for Chen Rui. However, he knew that this had always been burdening Athena mentally. She even thought of battling the poison dragon to death, so he indeed felt guilty. After being “punched”, he climbed up and explained to her.

When Athena heard that the contract that Chen Rui signed with the poison dragon was a symbiotic contract, she finally understood. At that time, the relationship between the two, along with the characteristic of symbiotic contract, even Athena herself wouldn’t leak such secret that was a matter of life and death.

“Asshole! Why didn’t you keep hiding?” Athena’s anger had almost disappeared. “How much more are you hiding from me?”

“There are actually still a lot…” Chen Rui saw Athena’s eyes dilated again, and he sighed, “Athena, if you believe me, give me a month time. Don’t ask anything now. After a month, I’ll tell you about a lot of things. However, you have to listen to me for this month. Okay?”

Athena frowned slightly and asked, “Do Princess Royal and Alice know about these?”

Chen Rui shook his head, “Other than the guy who shares the symbiotic contract, you’re the only one that knows.”

Athena’s eyebrows raised and her eyes were shining, but her voice still seemed annoyed, “ Hmph! Remember what you said!”

“Alright, don’t be angry anymore. The Jade Pearl’s poison resistance isn’t a lie. For you to ride the wyvern safely isn’t because of the antidote I have you, but its your body’s poison resistance, thus it shouldn’t be a problem when it comes to devil fruit.” Chen Rui smiled and said, “Let’s find a place to rest now for you to recover from your wounds first. Regardless of whether the Jade Pearl is effective or not, eat one more before you eat the devil fruit. After you completely digest the fruit’s power, we’ll continue our journey to Mountain Xilang.”

Athena didn’t throw any more tantrum, gently touched the Jade Pearl in her hand and nodded.

Chen Rui wasn’t a fool. He could somehow felt Athena’s feelings; he did have feelings for Athena too. However, there wasn’t much time left before the battle with Arux. Thus, he should concentrate all his efforts on this matter; he couldn’t be distracted by the other aspects. After this, he would then seriously deal with the problem between them as two single man and woman.

chapters.title: Chapter 87: Mountain Xilang
chapters.body:
Chapter 87: Mountain Xilang

Two days later, two wyverns flew over the black rainforest. Athena who mounted on Kegu looked energetic as the devil fruit effect was completely absorbed by her.

This precious fruit that could wage war was indeed worthy of its reputation. Athena’s strength was originally at the early stage of Higher Demon, but she instantly promoted to the middle stage. That was merely a superficial effect. The invisible potential index was more important. In the future, the probability for her to break through the limit of Higher Demon to become Demon King was greatly increased. Even the further Great Demon King and Demon Emperor level were no longer an impossible fantasy.

With the example of Dodo and Chen Rui’s strong persistence, Athena ate another fruit. As a result, it only made her strength stabler. The tiny possibility of additional ability still didn’t appear. However, this special ability might not necessarily be immediate. It could very likely be obtained in the years of future practice.

As for Dodo’s changes, it might not only be the devil fruit’s effect, but it was most probably also related to the swallowing of dragon’s flesh.

Chen Rui secretly ate a demon fruit, but his power didn’t grow at all. He only increased some aura due to the toxicity, so it was really not worthy. However, with a magical thing like galaxy garden, he could harvest again in 2 months. In the future, it wasn’t impossible to eat them as snacks like Dodo did.

During these two days, Chen Rui didn’t waste his time. He spent all his time in the training ground. His 130,000 auras had only more than 90,000 left. Athena was informed by him to not interfere with his “sleep”. Together with Dodo’s protection, everything was smooth including when Athena consumed the devil fruit.

Like the straw that broke the camel’s back, 8-fold gravity was indeed incomparable to the limit represented by 4-fold gravity. Even after breaking through to Mizar state, it was still really difficult to move without the use of Star Power. The first 10 days, he didn’t know how much hardship did he suffer. When he finished training and saw Athena sleeping like a baby after eating the devil fruit, he felt that there was more energy in his body. After rushing to eat and rest, he once again immersed himself in the self-abusing training.

Chen Rui had taken two black potions, Eternal Power and Eternal Speed. At the time, the potion effect was actually not completely absorbed. Under the high-pressure training, the potion effect accumulated in the body finally came into play.

Dodo had always been obsessed with the devil fruit, but since he tasted the barbecue made by Chen Rui, he began to change his taste, and he was even more loyal to his master. Athena was initially worried about the evil fruit tree, but once Chen Rui told her that he managed to hide it, Athena was relieved.

Two wyverns left the black rainforest. They finally arrived at their destination, Xilang mountain range in 1 ½ day.

Among the rolling Xilang mountain range, there were many tall mountains and deep, dangerous valleys. The area was huge. It reached the Town Leia that bordered the Dark Shadow Empire all the way to the west. Mountain Xilang was the largest mountain in the Xilang mountain range. However, Mountain Xilang had been controlled by the bandits, so the current mining office was located under the remote Mountain Lugang.

When Chen Rui and Athena followed the mark on the magic map and landed with the two wyverns, the guards and miners at the entrance of mining office were all shocked.

As the original mining office was occupied by the bandits, the mining office now was actually a simple stone house that was temporary built. Being shocked by the wyverns, a centaur who looked like a leader came out of the stone house. There were several scars on his face. Hee was holding a walking stick. As soon as he saw Athena jumped off the wyvern’s back, his eyes gradually showed surprise. He approached and greeted, “You are… Ms. Athena!”

“Who are you?” Athena felt that this limping centaur was a bit familiar, but she couldn’t remember his name.

The centaur seemed to be moved, “I’m Gade. I once served General George at the Warlock Fortress. As I was injured in a conflict with the Bloody Empire, I was transferred here 4 years ago.”

Athena finally recalled and said with surprise, “I remembered! You’re Death Hammer, Gade! You even gifted me a sword!”

“Its a great pleasure that Miss still remembers me,” Gade waved his powerless arm and disabled left leg. He sighed, “Unfortunately, I’m no longer the Death Hammer. The general is compassionate toward his subordinates, so he let me come to the Dark Moon for an easy position to retire… Let’s not talk about that. I heard that Miss Athena came to the Dark Moon City 3 years ago. Unfortunately, I couldn’t excuse myself from here. What brings Miss to the mines today?”

“Didn’t you receive the magic communication from the Dark Moon City? Since the official appointment from Princess Royal, the magic communication should be issued already.” Athena looked suspicious.

Gade shook his head and replied, “The communication tower here has been destroyed by the bandits; it hasn’t been repaired.”

Magic communication was actually equivalent to a wireless communication using a communication symbol. In between, a special magic communication tower was needed to transmit messages which was equivalent to the “base station” in Chen Rui’s previous world. If the communication tower was destroyed, the magic communication symbol within the range would be unusable.

The magic communication tower of each line must be set up separately. There were private owned and public owned. For example, there was a dedicated magic communication tower from the capital city to every estate. The “base stations” along the way was also specifically protected.

“That’s why.” Athena pointed at Chen Rui, “This time I was ordered by Princess Shea to protect your new mining officer.”

That sentence made everyone’s sight fell on the human, who they thought it was Ms. Athena’s “servant”. Despite the lack of news, the news of Master Aldas defeating the genius from the capital in a challenge had spread throughout every corner of Dark Moon. Even the people in a secluded place like Mountain Xilang had heard of it. This should be the human apprentice of the master, but how did the apprentice become our boss suddenly?

Chen Rui was no longer the same as before. Under those eyes, he was calm and took out the magic letter of appointment signed by Shea personally. While everyone was paying attention at him, Chen Rui was also observing these “soldiers” under him. There were about a dozen guards, composed mainly by centaurs and dark elves. There weren’t many miners present, and they were all imps and dark elves. Most of the demons present shared the same characteristic, that was, they look dispirited.

Gade took the letter of appointment and his brows gradually frowned. With his eyesight, he could clearly distinguish between true and fake.

The centaur looked at Athena. He had no more doubts in his heart. He immediately bowed at Chen Rui and said,”The mining office guards’ captain, Gade reporting to mining officer.”

The guards and miners were all surprised as they saw Gade bowed. It seemed that Princess Royal truly appointed this weak human as a mining officer!

Like many people, Gade was rather disapproving against this appointment. How can a powerless human lead everyone. However, as Athena was there, he couldn’t say much. He made a welcoming gesture, “Sir and Miss, please come in to talk. Connor, get us some food! The rest of the people… do whatever you need to do!”

Chen Rui and Athena followed Gade into the stone house. The facilities in the stone house were very simple. They were just two stone tables with several chairs and a bed at the back.

“I’m sorry, Miss. The conditions here are very difficult, so I have nothing good to serve. Please simple eat something later.” Gade welcomed the two to sit and asked Athena, “Miss, when are you going back to Dark Moon City?”

Athena shook her head, “I was ordered by Princess Royal to always protect Chen Rui here until his work is over or transferred.”

Gade was slightly shocked, then he nodded with a complicated expression.

Chen Rui saw that and pondered. He asked, “Gade, we just arrived here. Can you briefly introduce the situation here?”

Gade hesitated for a moment and began to talk.

Mountain Xilang was extremely rich in minerals. It had a long history of mining. It had always been the largest and most important resource for Dark Moon. After the Beelzebub Royal Family incident in the Dark Moon 400 years ago, the bustling Dark Moon began to run down. The mines had undergone many changes as well. The underground creatures that had been sealed suddenly broke through the seal and occupied the lower layer of the pit, which was equivalent to controlling the largest mining area. That made mining’s difficulty increased greatly and life-threatening.

More than a year ago, a powerful Red Devil bandit gang appeared. They not only robbed and killed the caravan sent by Princess Royal, Shea, but they also harassed the mines from time to time. They also sent a small team to occupy the main pit and several newly-opened small mine sources. They even killed the miners who went there to mine.

Now, the miners could only mine some cheap open-air ores while defending the bandits’ attack under Gade’s lead. Although the danger was reduced, the income and output were extremely low. Princess Royal once sent Sheriff Alan to eliminate the bandits because of the caravan incident, but both attempts were defeated by the bandits.

Athena heard that the mine’s situation was so bad; it was much worse than what Shea knew. She frowned and said, “Why didn’t you report to the Dark Moon City?”

“We’ve reported it countless times.” Gade sighed, “However, even the army sent by the Dark Moon City has failed. What other way is there? If it wasn’t for miss’ arrival today, I thought that Princess Royal has already given up on us.”

Chen Rui knew that the direct supervisor of the mining industry was the financial officer, which was Joseph. Therefore, it was “reasonable” that only limited information was passed to Shea. At that moment, he asked a key question, “What happened to the previous mining officer?”

The previous mining officer was Tim of the Saiful Family. Gade’s evaluation of Tim was relatively high and within his words revealed a contempt toward Chen Rui. After Tim came to the mine, he made a series of rectification and was quite prestigious. At that time, the main problem of the mine was the underground creatures. When Tim led a group of people to investigate the situation in the main pit, everyone suddenly disappeared, even their bodies couldn’t be found. They were probably eaten by the demonic beasts.

Chen Rui calculated the time. When Tim was in power at the time, Shea hadn’t sent a caravan to the west. So, at most, there was just a sporadic of bandits. When a caravan was dispatched, a powerful bandit gang appeared accordingly which was obviously on purpose. After cutting off the trade route to the west, their controlling target transferred to the mine. It seemed that they wanted to choke the Dark Moon until it completely suffocated.

The reason why they left Gade and the others alive wasn’t because of the bandits’ kindness, but they didn’t want to attract more attention from Shea until the last moment. Once a certain time had come, Chen Rui could imagine that everywhere would have troubles at the same time. Even if Shea had extraordinary ability, she would be helpless as it was a relatively perfect and cruel plan.

“I came here this time is also for a task given by Master Aldas.” Chen Rui thought about it and said the most important purpose of the trip. “The master is now experimenting with a peculiar potion which requires the crystal powder on the waste ores. Can you bring me to them?”

“Waste ores? Crystal powder?” Gade frowned and thought. He finally realized, “You must be talking about the thing stuck on the ores. The crystal is very troublesome and difficult to get rid of it, let alone make it into powder. Also, this waste ores with crystals are only found in the main mining pit of Mountain Xilang. Now, it is under the bandits’ territory.”

Chen Rui didn’t give up and asked, “Where are the waste ores before this?”

Gade answered, “The waste ores are piled up in the waste ores room, which is located at a certain corner above the main pit. Currently, the mineral production is too low, so several people have stolen the waste ores and shipped them back to the city. After that, the bandits killed them all after they noticed it.”

Chen Rui’s brows frowned even more. Zach mentioned this before, but I didn’t expect the actual situation to be much worse. Every piece of waste ore that I converted at the blacksmith shop in Dark Moon City was stained with the blood of the miners!

chapters.title: Chapter 88: Admonishment And Infiltration
chapters.body:
Chapter 88: Admonishment And Infiltration

Athena said angrily, “Fuck! Gade, we must find a way to eliminate those bandits!”

“Miss, please don’t be impulsive!” Gade shook his head. “There are more than 200 bandits in Mountain Xilang, leading by a Great Demon called Barnacle. He is one of the two deputies of the Red Devil, and he’s at the peak of Higher Demon. He still has three strong Higher Demons under him too. We can’t fight them. Besides, that’s just a small part of the Red Devil! Rumors say that the strength of the leader is unfathomable, and he is likely to surpass Higher Demon level. Miss, listen to me, hurry back to the Dark Moon City. Mountain Xilang is too dangerous.”

“No, I have to complete the task given by the Princess Royal, otherwise, I’ll never go back!” Athena’s attitude was very determined. In fact, she requested to be on this trip from Shea.

After listening to the strength of the Red Devil bandits, Chen Rui was immersed in his thoughts: The strength of this bandit group is quite horrifying. Now, there are 4 Higher Demons occupying Mountain Xilang. Even if Alan’s two previous elimination attempts weren’t “fake”, he couldn’t win against that.

Athena was currently middle-stage Higher Demon; Chen Rui was probably equivalent to early High Demon; Dodo’s strength was D-level, a Higher Demon, but his specific level was unknown. Besides, he had no attacking means. He could only tank with its immortality.

3 Higher Demons versus 4 Higher Demons might look like a slight disadvantage, but it couldn’t be calculated in such a way. Barnacle was already at the peak of High Demon. Thus, him alone could defeat all of Chen Rui’s party, so Chen Rui’s party really could fight blindly.

However, the main purpose of this trip for Chen Rui wasn’t to deal with the bandits, but the waste ores that had accumulated for hundreds of years, which was massive aura. In any case, he should explore the situation first.

At that time, a dark elf came in. It was the vice captain, Conner who went to get food. He brought two bowls of Lala Potato-like food, a big dry pancake and a few fruits.

Athena frowned, “Do you usually eat this?”

“Sorry, Ms. Athena.” said Gade embarrassedly “The conditions are getting harder and harder now. This is already the best food here. Many miners only eat one meal a day.”

Connor added, “Those bandits control the nearby water sources and prey. If it weren’t captain’s arrangement and leadership, we would have starved to death if not killed.”

Athena and Chen Rui finally understood why everyone looked weak. It was because they couldn’t even secure a filled tummy.

“You misunderstood, Gade.” Athena stood up and bowed at Gade, “I can’t believe you’ve been guarding this place for 4 years. I should pay my respect to you.”

Gade hurriedly got up and bowed back at Athena. Chen Rui withdrew all the remaining prey from the space bracelet and said, “Gade, ask someone to clean these preys then bring a few of your biggest pot. Later, gather everyone and we’ll drink some soup.”

Gade looked surprised. He quickly asked Connor to work with the preys. His impression of Chen Rui in his eyes was slightly better.

Soon, the fire was started and a few huge iron pots were set up. Chen Rui began to stew on his own hand with some additional condiments. The climate of Mountain Xilang was very cold, so the steaming pot and the long-lost meat fragrance made all the nearby demons drooled. If it weren’t for Gade’s prestige, they would’ve snatched it. Connor gathered almost every miner. There were about four to five hundred people, mostly imps, dwarves, and a few dark elves and centaurs. Almost everyone looked at the few pots beside the… new mining officer with hope.

Before the distribution of meat soup, Chen Rui began the first admonishment as the mining officer.

“First, let me introduce myself, my name is Chen Rui. I was previously the secretary of Princess Royal. Lately, I was recommended by the financial officer, Joseph to become the mining officer.” Chen Rui told his prepared draft, “You may have heard that I have another identity, which is the only apprentice of Master Aldas. That’s right. I’m a weak human being, but I’ve received master’s genuine teaching of poison, for example…”

“Can you give me your crossbow?” Chen Rui came to the nearest dark dwarf. The dwarf didn’t expect the human would look for him, so he was holding the crossbow tight subconsciously and didn’t dare to let go.

Chen Rui was too impatient to be nice. He snatched it directly. He raised it high and waved it, then the sturdy crossbow began to decay quickly ; it scattered like a rotten wood.

“This is one of the dozens poison skills taught by master.” Chen Rui intimidated while looking wicked, “If there are any enemies that fall in my hands, I’m more than happy to have another experiment subject for my poison.”

That move obviously scared many demons who were there, and the noisy scene suddenly calmed down.

Althought talents such as potioneer and mechanic were not very strong in combat, they were equally revered, especially potioneers. The stroy about Aldas poisoning the potioneer genius, Sandro from the capital city with his fart not only spread throughout Dark Moon and the Fallen Angel Empire, but it had even spread to the remaining two empires. Although this human was just an apprentice, he was also the only apprentice of that master. From that move just now, the phrase “received master’s genuine teachings of poison” didn’t seem like bragging. He might even learned a certain level of master’s ultimate move.

Thinking of that, many of the demons that were in front retreated backward at the same time, especially the dwarf who was used for demonstration was shivering in fear. That was the effect Chen Rui wanted. After being in the Demon Realm for so long, he already knew the knack of it. This world advocated the strongest. If one was soft and gentle, it’d only make these people harder to control. He should first use a big stick to intimate them, then he gave them a carrot. That was the most effective way.

“Rest assured everyone. My poison will only be used against the enemies; it won’t cause any harm to my people.” After Chen Rui showed his strength, he immediately threw out the “carrot”, “I know that the mine’s situation is bad, so I don’t have much demand in regards to mining. I have only one request. Which is during my tenure as a mining officer, you have to obey my orders. As for the food, I brought two powerful wyverns. Ms. Athena here is the best swordswoman in the Dark Moon, and she is also the best beast tamer. We will use the wyverns to hunt prey and strive to let everyone drink a hot meat soup every two days. Do you like that?”

Everyone shouted, “Yes!”

Chen Rui had a clear mind that the answer was 100% for the meat soup. Although the meat soup was still not enough, it was already a luxury even just for a bit for those miners who hadn’t tasted meat for a long time. Everyone had a primary impression in their minds: Although the new supervisor is a human, he possess horrible poison. If we were disobedient, we’ll be very miserable; on the contrary, we’ll have meat soup to enjoy if we obey him.

Subsequently, it was the most popular dining time. Gade was indeed from the military as under his command, the distribution of meat soup proceeded in an orderly manner.

After the dinner, Chen Rui made the dwarf stayed there alone. When the dwarf thought of his hesitation when he offered the crossbow and the scary poison, he almost paralyzed on the ground in fear. Chen Rui didn’t say anything, but he commanded the dwarf to go to the opposite summit to help him set up the tent. Athena didn’t want to live in the stone house that Gade offered and refused to use the tent that Chen Rui offered. So, she built a simple tent on the mountainside with some existing materials. Now, the two wyverns were at the summit and behind the summit was a cliff, so Athena chose that position that could better protect Chen Rui.

Although Athena staying at the mountainside made Chen Rui’s movement inconvenient, in a certain sense, it could act as a cover because the people at the foot couldn’t come up.

Seeing that the mining officer easily pulled the two fierce wyverns to the side and tied them, the dwarf revered him more. Fortunately, the mining officer didn’t use him as an experiment subject for the poison, but he merely asked him about the mine’s situation.

According to the dwarf, the main pit was divided into upper and lower layers. After thousands of years of renovation and expansion, it was equivalent to an underground passage accessible to all sides. When the minerals at the upper layer almost finished, a deeper and lower layer pit was opened up. During the previous usual period, it was very convenient to transport minerals through cable cars and lifts.

However, one day, when the miners were conducting deep excavation and survey, they accidentally found an underground world with various powerful creatures below. At that time, the Dark Moon’s lord was a strong Demon Emperor. He immediately rushed here when he heard the news and killed a bunch of underground creatures that came out. He also cast a seal with several powerhouses to prohibit the entry and exit of those creatures.

For thousands of years, it had been safe and sound. 400 years ago, unsure if it was because the seal had lost its power, the underground creatures broke through the seal and occupied the the main pit at the lower mine.

In desperation, the mining officer back then had to destroy the large lifts and sent people to guard the entrance. However, in such a way, the production of minerals was greatly reduced. Many people sneaked down with simple personal rope ladder and risked their lives to mine at lower layer which resulted in the loss of many lives. However, this year, the bandits were rampant. They even controlled some small mining sources that were discovered with great effort, and they were harming the miners. Some of the miners escaped and some of them died, the original thousands of miners had only a few hundred left.

Chen Rui asked the dwarf to draw a map and rewarded him with a big pancake. Dwarf didn’t expect such a good thing to happen, and he left happily. Dwarf was a race with deft hand. Although the map was simple, it was accurate and easy to understand. The main pit was located at the back hill of Mountain Xilang and the waste ores room was located somewhere in the upper level of the main pit.

The sky was getting darker, and Chen Rui began his action. His cover was Dragon Inscription. He only knew some basic inscriptions now. Inscriptions like <Reflect> that Paglio used at the blue lake the other day belonged to the top inscription, which wasn’t only difficult, but it also had various restrictions. One of them was it needed the user’s blood as support and it could only last a certain time. Chen Rui’s current strength was too low. He had troubles even with the basic inscriptions. Besides, he took a long time even to write the inscriptions. However, those who saw him at the foot of the mountain only thought he was doing something to the tent.

He used three inscriptions, namely <Hidden>, <Mute> and <Mirror>. The inscriptions were the great effort of the strength of Higher Demon with the understanding using <Deep Analysis>. After activating, it could only last for a few hours. He didn’t have any other choice anyway. Demon Realm was also a world that depended on who you were born as, for example, the dragons were born with the Demon King’s strength.

However, Chen Rui didn’t need the power to damage enemies. He only needed to create a certain illusion. From the outside, the summit still had a tent and two wyverns. In reality, one of the wyverns was already in the sky flying toward Mountain Xilang. His servent, Dodo who had been hiding in a baggage on the wyvern also accompanied him.

With the help of map and magic compass, Chen Rui quickly found the location of Mountain Xilang. Mountain Xilang was indeed the largest mountain within the Xilang mountain range. He was really surprised by the huge size of the mountain.

After the wyvern flew for a while, they finally found a faint light below, which should be the camp of the Red Devils.

chapters.title: Chapter 89: Cerberus! Whereabouts Were Exposed
chapters.body:
Chapter 89: Cerberus! Whereabouts Were Exposed

At the mountainside behind Mountain Xilang, there were several large stone houses which was the original Dark Moon mining office. They were now occupied by the bandits including the miners’ residential area at the foot of the mountain.

The map showed that the location of the mining office was the only place to enter the main pit. As there was Higher Demon, Chen Rui didn’t dare to ride the wyvern directly into the main pit entrance. He cautiously chose a secluded corner to land and ordered Dodo and Mengda to hide. Then, he put on a cloak and carefully sneaked in.

Today, the dark clouds in the night sky were thick, so the light from the two months was much dimmer. Chen Rui activated <Analytical Eyes>. He had been concealing his presence along the way. He gradually approached the residential area where the lights flashed at the foot of the mountain. There were four guards at the gate, and there were noises coming from inside.

<Analytical Eyes> showed that the 4 guards within the range of the entrance were E and F-level. With Chen Rui’s current strength and the cover of the darkness, he bypassed them without alarming the guards.

The bandits inside didn’t expect anyone would dare to come in; they were drinking and chatting.

“The mining officer really came. I heard that it’s powerless human. That’s truly hilarious!”

“Don’t underestimate that human. He seems to have some poison skills. He’s also an apprentice of Aldas. We can’t afford to provoke that master.”

“We can kill him in a distance without giving him the chance to cast poison. Anyway, he’ll die! By the way, there seems to be a really pretty lady this time, hehe… “

“That’s the daughter of the empire’s First General. She is now a Higher Demon. With your strength, she can break your penis with a gentle kick!”

When that was said, everyone was laughing.

“Even if she’s Higher Demon, our deputy leader, Sir Barnacle is at the peak of Higher Demon. However, Sir Barnacle complained that it’s too boring here, so he went to Town Leia earlier to enjoy with our leader. Yet, Sir Culia is very unfortunate for being asked by Sir Barnacle to come back to keep us company so soon, haha !”

“Fuck this! Who wants to stay in this cold, poor place. There’s not a single woman around. It’s more comfortable back at the estate! Let’s just simply kill all of those damn miners, then we don’t have to suffer this anymore.” A centaur drank a mouthful of wine and said with dissatisfaction.

The dark elf next to him shook his head. “You drank too much. Didn’t our leader say before? It’s not the time yet. We have to maintain the current situation and not to attract more attention from the Dark Moon City. When the timing has mature, you can kill however you like!”

“You’re right, but I don’t know how long do I need to wait…” The centaur looked at the stone house at the mountainside with reverence, and there was a hint of envy in his eyes. “Sir Yagus must feel much more comfortable, since he has Ms. Sully’s company. He naturally doesn’t want to go to Town Leia.”

“Who says he doesn’t want to go. The key is that Ms. Sully’s strength is greater than Sir Yagus. Although they are both early Higher Demon, Ms. Sully is more superior over Sir Yagus. Otherwise, sir would’ve have been enjoying himself at the Town Leia already…”

Another wave of deliberately suppressed laughter went by.

These words were heard by Chen Rui who was eavesdropping at the side. He quickly contemplated. The conversation of these bandits revealed a lot of information.

Firstly, the Town Leia at the border with the Dark Shadow Empire should have a stronghold of the Red Devils, and their leader and main forces were there.

Secondly, the 4 Higher Demons of the bandits at the mine were namely, Banarcle, Culia, Sully and Yagus. Barnacle had already gone to the Town Leia, and Culia went even earlier, but he should return soon. Both Sully and Yagus were early Higher Demon; they were having an extraordinary relationship. Both of them were guarding currently.

Thirdly, as expected, the bandits wanted to kill him, the new mining officer.

Fourthly, leaving the miners alive was indeed a scheme of the Red Devil.

These were just superficial information, but Chen Rui heard more things. Athena and him arrived at the mine for less than half a day, but the bandits already knew it. Obviously, there were spies among the miners; Athena advanced to Higher Demon not long ago and following him to Mountain Xilang was a temporary decision, but the bandits immediately knew her strength. It was obvious that the Dark Moon and the bandits must have an additional magic communication tower to contact. Combined with some information from Shea and Royce, it was almost certain that Red Spirit Estate was secretly manipulating these bandits. They were most probably the military power of the Red Spirit.

The miners’ residential areas were very large. It was more than enough for more than 200 bandits to live in. Due to the unfamiliar terrain and the fact that there were two Higher Demons guarding at the mountainside, Chen Rui didn’t intend to alarm them.

His biggest purpose to come here today was the waste ores room in the main pit.

Chen Rui thought for a while, then he quietly retreated and returned to Mengda. He instructed in his mind, then Mengda flapped its wings and flew away. They went around, avoiding the mining office where the 2 Higher Demons lived and landed at the main pit’s summit from behind.

The distance between the summit and the main pit’s entrance was at least 200 meters high. Even if Chen Rui’s current physique was extraordinary, he would be seriously injured if not dead jumping from such a height. There were also several guards below, so he couldn’t land directly with the wyvern.

If there was a spell like <Feather Fall>, he could probably fall gently. Unfortunately, Chen Rui wasn’t a mage. However, he had an assistant who could stretch and transform at will. This guy had the ability to stretch its body to cover the entire dragon’s bone. So, it should be a piece of cake for it to be a mobile rope.

The main pit was a flat concave entrance. There was the track of cable car used to transport ores, but it had been abandoned for a long time. There were still guards at the summit, but they were all surrounding the fire.

Chen Rui came down silently while Dodo also returned to its onion-head form and landed on his shoulder. Chen Rui looked back at the guards at the bonfire. Indeed, no one realized him at all. He was secretly thinking that he had succeeded, then he sneaked toward the entrance of the main pit.

The main pit was just in front. It was a huge entrance, and there were faint lights of the magic lamp stones inside. At that moment, Chen Rui suddenly felt a sense of crisis in his heart. His hairs were erected as if he was stared at by something terrible. Dodo’s reaction was even faster. He immediately bounced off its master’s shoulder and escaped, but he was caught by Chen Rui. This onion-head who bullied the weak and feared the strong was pretty good at running away.

There were roars from the front; at the same time, a ball of bright light was quickly expanding before his eyes, whistling toward him. Chen Rui had fully absorbed the effects of the Eternal potions, so his speed had increased to a considerable extent. He jumped immediately and dodged before the ball of light hit his body. The bright light seemed to be something like a fireball with terrible force within. The ground actually burst open being hit by it. It was similar to Balrog, Reka’s <Pyroblast>, but the damage was much greater. The sturdy cable car tracks on the ground actually melted and deformed quickly after being affected by this powerful force.

“Damn it!” After careful calculations, Chen Rui didn’t expect there would be a horrible demonic beast guarding the entrance of the main pit. Judging from the light ball’s power, it should at least had the strength of a Higher Demon. The worst thing was that the guards were alarmed, and the demons who were barbecuing were all rushing here.

“Dodo, you go to deal with it. I will help you right away. If you dare to run away, don’t ever think of eating barbecue again!” As Chen Rui said, he threw the onion-head cruelly toward the approximate location of the beast. He then faced the few demon guards.

Chen Rui knew that it was a critical moment, so he didn’t hold back. In the blink of an eye, several guards were all settled, but Dodo’s cries for help also sounded.

Chen Rui hurried forward. Under the moonlight, it was just a buffalo-sized demonic beast biting Dodo.

It was a large canine; hideous; dark; it actually had three head; the horrifying fireball actually came out of its mouth.

<Analytical Eyes> showed: Race: Cerberus; Comprehensive Strength Assessment: D.

Cerberus! Chen Rui heard of this terrible demonic beast. They were powerful, and their sharp teeth and claws could tear metals. Some mutated species could use also long range attack with ice or flame. Obviously, this was a mutated cerberus.

“Enemy! Tear! Die!” Through <Analytical Eyes>, he could understand the meaning of this fellow’s growls. It was just repeating these few words. Its mind was filled with violence and aggression, so it was useless to try communicating.

Dodo was also a Higher Demon. Although he had been pretending to be a “ghost dragon” to act as a tyrant, but after all, he was still the lowest level slime. When it came to a weak one, he could still act like he was strong. However, how could Dodo dare to risk his life to fight with this mighty demonic beast with terrifying fighting talent?

Despite being torn into a few pieces by the cerberus and restored to its original shape, Dodo was still scared and helpless, “Master, I don’t want barbecue anymore; please save me quickly!”

At that time, those at the mountain foot also heard the cerberus’ roar, and they began to raise a commotion. Chen Rui was anxious and had the intention of making the final battle. His hand formed a knife shape, and it was glowing in faint light.

The cerberus saw Chen Rui charging toward it, so it opened the mouth of one of its head and a fireball was shot again directly at him. Chen Rui hurriedly rolled over and barely dodged. His back was slightly burning being hit by the stones that was blasted by the fireball. At that time, he was near the cerberus’ feet. Before he could attack, the hideous heads were already biting toward him.

Chen Rui didn’t expect the cerberus had such fast reaction. He quickly evaded. The cerberus’s three heads attacked one after another cooperatively. It was even difficult for Chen Rui to dodge with his speed.

“Dodo! Tangle it! Quick!” Chen Rui shouted. When he was distracted, his black robe was torn off by the cerberus’ claws. There was a burning pain at the scratched part…

The cerberus was about to chase, but its body suddenly felt tight as if it was tightly wrapped by something. It was immobile for a while and man in the black robe in front of it had already leaped high and struck downward.

The cerberus’ powerful instinct as a demonic beast made it felt that the strike by the man in black robe was exceptionally dangerous. At that moment, it tried its best to struggle and broke the entanglement forcefully. At that time, Chen Rui’s <Aura Blade> had already chopped down its head. The cerberus just got rid of Dodo’s entanglement, so it could only move slightly. In a painful cry, blood was splashing and one of its head was chopped, becoming a two-headed hellhound.

Chen Rui wanted to eliminate this annoying demonic beast at once. Suddenly, he sensed something, and he immediately lowered his body. A sharp weapon flew across and brushed past his head.

The sharp weapon spun for a half circle and flew back. Chen Rui was caught off guard; he could barely dodge it, but there was already a bloody wound under his waist.

The sharp wind fell back into the hands of a male Great Demon. It turned out to be a cross-shaped flying scythe.

Race: Great Demon; Comprehensive Strength Assessment: D.

<Analytical Eyes> shows that Higher Demon appear! Also, it isn’t just one!

It must be Sully and Yagus! They are so quick!

[/pl_text] [/pl_col] [/pl_row]

chapters.title: Chapter 90: Waste Ores Room! One Versus Two
chapters.body:
Chapter 90: Waste Ores Room! One Versus Two

“Who are you? How dare you to come here!” The male Great Demon that should be Yagus shouted.

A female voice sounded next to him, “Don’t bother talking to him! Didn’t you see Sir Barnacle’s pet, Nagurala has been hurt to such extent! We must catch him and cut him into pieces!”

As soon as they finished their words, both Great Demons ignited their demonic fire almost simultaneously.

Chen Rui knew that today’s fierce battle was inevitable. Yagus’ weapon was somewhat similar to a boomerang, and it was too wide open here, hence it’d be very unfavorable to Chen Rui. He thought of something immediately and ran into the main pit. Yagus and Sully would never let him go, so they quickly chased after him.

Dodo was even faster. Knowing that he was slow, he simply jumped onto Chen Rui’s shoulder to hitchhiking. The cerberus was enraged by its injuries, so it chased while roaring.

In a blink of an eye, the several figures had disappeared into the main pit.

The main pit was built for thousands of years, especially the upper layer that had been excavated. The space seemed very large, as if a complex underground labyrinth shaped like a spider web. At every distance, there was a magic lamp for lighting. Chen Rui’s intention of entering the main pit was to fight by making use of the terrain. However, the cerberus’ nose was too keen, and its speed was also fast. It had been following tightly; it was quite troublesome.

“Dodo, I’ll leave the cerberus to you. If I die, you won’t survive too!”

Every word of that sentence was said via <Analytical Eyes> telepathically. When the slime just heard that sentence, he felt that its body was light, and he was thrown backward by his cruel master directly toward the cerberus.

The cerberus sniffed one of its nemesis’ smell, so it suddenly slowed down and began to bite Dodo. That action was happened in a split second while Sully and Yagus didn’t stop; they continued to pursue Chen Rui tightly.

Dodo finally got rid of the cerberus’ bite and stuck on the wall with a frightening heart. Although there was still resentment against its owner, the sentence just now made the slime who wanted to just run away changed its mind. If this two-headed big guy and that two bad guys faced master together, master would likely die. If master died, Dodo would die too.

The onion-head examined the cerberus who was roaring below. To be more precise, this downgraded, two-headed cerberus’ strength seemed to be weakened a lot. Bullying the weak and fearing the evil had always been the virtue of Dodo. Suddenly, its courage increased greatly; it extended its body to wrap the “two-headed” cerberus.

Chen Rui’s true intention wasn’t escaping, otherwise, he would’ve rushed down the mountain instead of running into the main pit or he could still activate “Dark Will’s” <Teleportation> skill. Now, the cerberus had been badly injured, so he couldn’t do anything to improve the situation. Even if he escaped from the two Great Demons, they’d definitely suspect that he was from the mining office. After all, today was the day that Athena and him arrived, so everything was too coincidental.

Besides, his main purpose at Mountain Xilang was aura. Now that Barnacle went to the town of Leia, he might as well kill the 2 enemies at early-stage Higher Demon, then he would get all the aura from the waste ores room.

Besides, the appointment as a mining officer was Joseph’s scheme. If he had no choice, he could just dismiss the miners and let everyone escape. He could just return and “report” to the Dark Moon City. Once She understood the mine’s actual situation, she probably wouldn’t remain indifferent anymore.

However, it wasn’t easy to deal with these two enemies. If it was only Yagus or Sully, even if they had <Teleportation>, escaping shouldn’t be too difficult with Chen Rui’s current speed. However, there were two opponents on the other side that were well-coordinated. He just got rid of them for awhile but was back to being chased again.

Chen Rui just evaded Sully who teleported to him, but two quick hustling sounds were approaching his face. In the rush, he only had time to lean back and dodge Yagus’s flying scythe. Then, Sully attacked again.

Chen Rui couldn’t evade. At that time, the effect of <Aura Blade> hadn’t disappeared, so he slashed toward Sully. Sully witnessed him cut off the cerberus’ head, so she knew that the secret technique was horrifying; she didn’t dare to block directly. Two oddly-shaped daggers appeared in her hands and parried his attack. The weapon was about one meter long and the handle was at the center. Both ends had three-pointed blades and it looked like a dual-headed lotus of the Demon Realm.

Chen Rui wasn’t sure whether the <Aura Blade> of his body could rival with the blade. He turned his wrist, struck on the dagger’s back. There were actually sparks. Sully felt an extremely strong sharpness from her dagger that actually passed to her shoulder from the handle. It was as if a blade sliced through. A line of fresh wound immediately appeared. Fortunately, this dagger was a customized magic weapon, so most of the damage had been blocked. Otherwise, her entire arm might be cut off. Sully wasn’t Paglio, so she wouldn’t hold back. Chen Rui also felt the powerful recoil. The back of his hand was faintly paralyzed. After all, <Aura Blade> wasn’t invincible.

Sully was secretly scared. She didn’t dare to take risk. She leaped away and avoided the second strike of <Aura Blade>. Chen Rui wanted to pursuit then a sharp wind behind him sounded again. The timing was quite accurate. There was no way to avoid it. He immediately shouted, turned around and blocked with <Aura Blade> like lightning without looking back. The flying scythe was immediately divided into two.

Yagus was shocked, but he didn’t panic. Another two flying scythes appeared in his hands while Sully was with her dual dagger in front of her body. Both parties formed a confrontational situation.

Sully was a standard Great Demon woman. She had curved horns; tall; red eyes; her body was hot; Yagus’s appearance was a bit ugly. He had a pointy nose and a long scar.

Through the light of the magic lamp in the main pit, Yagus carefully examined the mysterious man in black robe and frowned, “This guy shouldn’t be Athena from Dark Moon, otherwise, he wouldn’t be able to block our attack combo.”

“It doesn’t matter who he is. Let’s take him down first.” The demonic fire on Sully’s body was blazing and she reminded, “Beware of his secret technique.”

Chen Rui thought quickly in his mind: <Aura Blade> only lasts for 10 minutes. It’s ending soon. If I use <Destructive Aura Blow>, it’ll at most do minor damage with the 2 enemies’ strength; whereas my Star Power will be lowered drastically, so it isn’t worthy. By the same token, a big move like <Aurora Shot> must also be used when there’s an opportunity. Paglio once said that a battle includes the consideration of multiple factors such as tactics, timing, and power distribution.

Sully didn’t give him too much time to consider. She had already launched a rapid attack. Although she was a woman, she was mad in battle, and her melee attack with the dual dagger was especially powerful. Although the main pit was wide, after all, it wasn’t as spacious as outside. Yagus’ flying scythes were limited to a certain extent. Besides, the distance between Sully and Chen Rui was too close, so he might accidentally injure Sully with his long-ranged attack. Therefore, he immediately kept his flying scythe and engaged in close combat.

Chen Rui had learned a little from the bandits about the relationship between Yagus and Sully. Also, they were actually really well-coordinated in battle. Sully’s strength was similar to Chen Rui whereas Yagus strength was slightly inferior. Under their coordination, although Chen Rui had a certain advantage in terms of speed, he was still in an absolute disadvantage. <Aura Blade> had already ended. He needed to wait for an hour before he could use it again.

While Chen Rui was distracted, he was slashed by Sully at his lower ribs. Before he could catch his breath, Yagus’ heavy punch was coming to him. Chen Rui reached out and blocked, and he took the opportunity to fly backward by the force, conveniently dodged Sully’s fatal attack to his heart. He knew that he’d be more passive as this kind of direct battle went on, so he turned around and ran toward another tunnel.

This guerrilla tactic made the joint attack advantage of Sully and Yagis immediately lose its effectiveness. They were secretly scolding their opponent for being despicable The strength of the trio wasn’t much different. So, it was impossible for Chen Rui to make a surprise attack and defeat one at a time, so it became a stalemate.

Sully and Yagus chased for a while, and they seemed to have reached a certain tacit agreement. They gradually forced Chen Rui to a certain direction. It was Chen Rui’s first time coming into the main pit, so he was unfamiliar with the terrain. When he realized their intentions, he was already forced to a dead end. Behind him was an extremely spacious hall; it seemed that there was no way out.

Yagus’ waved both his hands, then 4 to 5 flying scythes flew toward Chen Rui at the same time. Sully followed closely and prepared to sneak attack. Chen Rui knew that it was pointless to man fight them directly, so he retreated to the hall.

At the top of the hall, there was a huge magic lamp hanging from it, shining in bright light. There were also wall lamps installed orderly on surrounding walls, which was much clearer than the light outside. After Chen Rui retreated to the hall, the space inside was much larger than expected. Based on his preliminary estimation, it was as big as a football field. There was a huge deep hole in the hall, which contained stones of different sizes. Chen Rui’s heart was moved. This hall seems to be the… waste ores room that the dwarf described?

Finally, the place was found. Chen Rui’s main purpose here today was here. Unfortunately, the timing wasn’t right as there were two enemies before his eyes. They absolutely wouldn’t give him the chance.

There was a heavy sound coming from the door. He saw Sully was pushing two huge stone doors to close it. In the hands of Yagus, two more flying scythes appeared; his demonic fire blazed. Their faces had a cruel smile at the same time.

Of course, Chen Rui didn’t want to be the sitting duck, so he stepped back back while quickly examining at the surrounding terrain.

Sully’s figure flicked and rushed toward Chen Rui at high speed. It was again the storm-like melee attack. Suddenly, Sully faked an attack and jumped away with a few somersaults. Then, the demonic fire on Yagus’ body suddenly blazed and he snorted furiously, “<Thousand Blades>”

In an instant, the sky was filled with whistling sounds. Countless flying scythes appeared suddenly and surrounded Chen Rui. Chen Rui was taken aback. He was trying to dodge. However, the flying scythes were very skillful. They attacked in a sequence as if several opponents with different rhythms. Yagus’ speed of retrieving and throwing his flying scythes was strangely fast as the flying scythes that flew back were quickly thrown out again with his hands.

The flying scythes around Chen Rui were endless. It was extremely deadly. In the blink of an eye, there were two more bloody wounds on his body. The flying scythes were very sharp. Even with the passive ability of <Astral Form>, the blood that came out couldn’t be stopped at once. At the time of crisis, Chen Rui removed his cloak, shook his hand and the cloak immediately became a flexible whip, swiping left and right to block the flying scythes. However, the whip was slowly shortened. Chen Rui retreated while swiping, then he suddenly disappeared.

Yagus was taken aback to lose his target. Actually, Chen Rui had already fallen into the giant hole and was conveniently the blind spot of his direction. The flying scythes were kept by Yagus one by one. <Thousand Blades> were kind of exaggerated, but there were at least 100. Together with the repeated retrieving and shooting, it was indeed a troublesome ultimate move.

Seeing Yagus missed, Sully was about to go forward, but Chen Rui had already retreated into the pit quickly. He suddenly jumped high and had a few flying scythes that he picked up in his hands. However, his target wasn’t Sully, who chased him tightly but the biggest magic lamp in the air.

However, darts weren’t easy to play, especially these that could turn back. It looked easy, but using it was… too hard. He threw a few out and none of them were close to the target. The most accurate one almost touched the magic lamp,but it spun around and flew back. If it weren’t for this critical moment, Chen Rui would be embarrassed. When he landed, he was almost cut into pieces by Sully.

Sully was obviously intended to repeat the same trick by forcing the opponent to enter the range of Yagus’ flying scythe. Chen Rui certainly wouldn’t be tricked again.

Yagus didn’t wait outside blindly; he had already appeared in the pit. His demonic fire began to flash again which was the precursor to the <Thousand Blades> attack. By the time Chen Rui leaped again, there was already a square stone in his hand. He threw it hard and hit a giant lamp accurately. Surely, stones were the best at any age, whether it was for close or long-ranged attack.

The principle of the magic lamp was by using the principle of magic array to stimulate special material (such as the most commonly used lamp stone) to shine. Being smashed into pieces by a stone, the magic array was also destroyed and the lamp stone was extinguished. Other than a faint light from a wall far away, it was pitch black in the midlle. Chen Rui suddenly disappeared into the dark.

Only the male and female Great Demon had blazing fire on their body; they seemed especially eye-catching.

Within the main pit, the roars from a distance and the exploding sounds made the bandits who arrived at the door dared not to go in while someone said something.

“Nagurala shouldn’t be approached when it’s hunting. We’ll just guard the entrance lest the enemy escape. Besides, it’s too big inside. If we go in recklessly, we’ll be a burden for Ms. Sully instead. I believe they’ll be done soon.”

That suggestion received everyone’s approval, so all of them lit up a torch and magic lighting equipment to surround the entrance of the main pit.

No one knew that the cerberus, Nagurala was very, very depressed now.

This onion-head like transparent guy is able to change its body freely, and it is kind of like the lowest level slime. However, is there such a powerful slime?

This enemy seems vulnerable, but I can’t kill it no matter what. Whether it’s biting, bursting with fireball or it is scattered into hundreds of pieces, it can still gather and restore into a complete onion-head. The annoyingness isn’t just that but also the <Transformation> skill. Just now I was caught off guard being entangled by its rope form. The flesh and blood at my wound actually disappeared quickly, as if they were swallowed. If I didn’t get rid of it in time, I’ll definitely suffer a huge loss.

What should I do to completely kill this stupid onion-head?

Nagula, who was badly injured, stretched out its tongue and panted heavily. Sure enough, the pieces on the ground once again reformed. When Nagurala was watching at the ground with vigilance, it didn’t notice that some transparent “thing” quietly climbed to the stone wall above it by sucking and the cerberus’ head was right below.

chapters.title: Chapter 91: Burning Sully And Dodo, Who Fish For Compliments
chapters.body:
Chapter 91: Burning Sully And Dodo, Who Fish For Compliments

In the waste ores room.

Chen Rui’s strategy was very effective. Now that the center was dark, Yagus’s long-ranged attack loses its power and the flames on both of them made them the easy target.

Yagus reacted very quickly. He didn’t stay in the dark. He teleported and retreated to the door. However, Sully didn’t move but sneered. The demonic fire on her body gradually disappeared, and she also disappeared in the dark.

“ Hmph , this idiot goes for wool and come back shorn. He actually dares to fight Sully in the dark.” Yagus said to himself. Although the flying scythe in his hand wasn’t put down, he clearly had confidence in Sully.

Chen Rui immediately understood Yagus’s confidence. Although it was pitch black, Sully was unaffected at all. Instead, her action seemed more rapid and accurate, as if she were born for the dark.

Initially, Sully’s attack was characterized by its strangeness. With the cover of the dark now, it had become stealthier and harder to dodge.

Within just a few minutes, the ghostly figure made Chen Rui felt overwhelmed. He suffered a few attacks consecutively. Assuming that the magic lamp wasn’t put off, he could’ve still coped with it. Yet, he felt restrained by himself now. Chen Rui knew that he couldn’t go on like this. Since Yagus was at a distant and Sully was alone, he must seize this opportunity to settle one of them. Otherwise, he’d definitely fail.

In Sully’s eyes, her enemy’s reaction seemed to become more sluggish as time went by because of the injury, and he had more trouble in detecting her exact location. A slight change in airflow came from his lower ribs. This time, the enemy’s reaction was obviously even slower. He was pierced by the dagger and screamed. He then formed a knife-shape with his hand and chopped toward the attacking direction. Sully didn’t know whether it was a feint, but thinking of the horror of that secret technique just now, she couldn’t bother removing the dagger and withdrew immediately.

However, this enemy was aimlessly attacking in a madly manner which seemed to be hysterical. Sully suddenly understood that her previous hit had heavily damaged her opponent. She sneered secretly. She feinted to attract her opponent’s attention, then she sneaked to his back like a ghost and stabbed at full force. At that moment, her opponent still didn’t realize. The female Great Demon’s red lips were slightly raised, forming a bloodthirsty smile.

Yagus who was outside noticed the screams and cries weren’t Sully’s voice, and his heart was more determined. He shouted, “Sully, remember to keep him alive, but you must first remove his limbs.”

At the same time as Yagus made a sound, Sully felt a chill in her heart. Her confident attack was suddenly stopped. The dagger in her hand only inserted by three inches. When she looked down at her heart, she looked unbelievable. The thing that pierced her heart was a double-headed dagger, which was her own weapon. Now, it had penetrated her heart while the other side of the dagger was in the hands of Chen Rui.

In Sully’s eyes, in an instant, this enemy pulled out the dagger at his lower ribs at an unimaginable speed and pierced it back at the center of her heart like a lightning. The calmness and accuracy of this blow was nothing like the previous sluggish and mad look previously. It turned out that the enemy had been able to accurately detect her movements. He was baiting her all along.

Sully used her remaining strength and shouted, wanting to take Chen Rui down with herself by putting all force in her hands, but Chen Rui removed the dagger at her heart before that. Then, her remaining power was as if emptied out; she collapsed to the ground.

“Sully!” Yagus finally realized there was something wrong. He shouted aloud, then he held his flying scythe tight, brewing an explosive power in his body. He carefully approached, but he didn’t know that an open palm was aiming directly at him in the dark.

Chen Rui was charging his <Aurora Shot>, waiting Yagus to get close. Suddenly, <Analytical Eyes> showed a reminder. Before he could react, his body was tightly wrapped, and a red light suddenly shone brightly.

It turned out that Sully, who was dying on the ground, heard Yagus’ voice and held Chen Rui down desperately. Who knows how she had the strength to do it

“Yagus! <Thousand Blades>”

Sully’s demonic fire made Chen Rui completely exposed in Yagus’s sight. It was a flame that Sully paid with her life. Chen Rui couldn’t break free from the entanglement at once, but his extended arm still had the palm remained open.

Yagus stepped forward, shouted and countless whistling sound from the sky sounded. He actually launched <Thousand Blades> without hesitation.

A cold light flashed in Chen Rui’s eyes, then a white, huge light ball gushed out at high speed, rushing toward Yagus. Yagus didn’t expect his opponent to have such an ultimate move. He couldn’t use teleport as he was launching <Thousand Blades> at full force. The flying scythes that he threw at the light ball in desperation was instantly swallowed. He could only cross his arms and blocked with his weakened body after using his ultimate move.

However, he still couldn’t take it.

Now, Chen Rui’s strength was nothing like before. They were both early Higher Demon, so Yagus couldn’t possibly fend off the <Aurora Shot> like Mikas did. His demonic fire was almost completely swallowed up by white light, and his body kept moving backward uncontrollably while his defense gradually collapsed. “ Poom! ”, the <Aurora Shot> pushed Yagus into the rear wall and the entire waste ores room seemed to tremble.

The white light finally disappeared. A huge, spherical dent appeared on the hard stone wall, and Yagus’ softened body was deeply trapped in the wall.

The greatest wonder of <Thousand Blades> was the endless loop of attacks. Now that Yagus was knocked out, he naturally couldn’t repeatedly attack. Chen Rui launched <Aurora Shot> just now and couldn’t dodge, so his shoulder was hit. There were a few scratches. On the other hand, Sully, who held tightly became a bunker as her back was inserted with 4 flying scythes. Her demonic fire was extinguished; she was already dead.

“Sir Culia… will come back in 2 days. He’ll avenge me…”

Yagus’ voice came from the wall in front before he died. Before he could finish his words, he was already dead.

A ring appeared on Chen Rui’s finger which was shining in bright light. It was the illumination ring that Joseph “provided”. He gently removed Sully’s hands and placed her corpse on the floor. Then, he removed the flying scythe on his shoulder, and he also the 4 flying scythes on Sully’s back. Finally, he slowly closed her dead eyes that were filled with grievance.

Chen Rui didn’t know why he did these extra things, but his heart was still shocked by Sully’s action. In fact, the stab in her heart was already a fatal wound, but in order to defeat him and protect Yagus, she used her last breathe to make the choice of taking him down with herself. If Chen Rui had a choice, he didn’t want to harm or kill any women, but he had no choice.

In a battle, there were only the enemy and oneself; only life and death.

On the other hand, Yagus was the exact opposite. First, he didn’t hesitate to launch <Thousand Blades>. Even before he died, he didn’t even mention Sully’s name. He only said that Culia would avenge “me” instead of “us”.

nvìng大恶魔……

Female Great Demon……

The only thing that is difficult to die in our lives is love.

Maybe… maybe there’s no maybe…

A pair of familiar beautiful red eyes appeared in his mind inexplicably. His body which was initially cold because of the blood loss was suddenly filled with a warm flow.

Chen Rui’s injuries this time were lighter than when he battled with Mikas. The most serious injury was the one at the lower ribs that he used to lure his enemy, but his Star Power was severely depleted. After drinking a bottle of Healing Potion, he began to examine the huge hole.

Now that the magic lamp at the top was shattered, relying on the illumination ring, he could see layers of the waste ore stacked on top of each other. Chen Rui thought about it and opened his storage warehouse, wanting to keep these waste ores. As a result, the storage warehouse instantly became full for the first time. It was even the expanded warehouse in “Mizar state”.

The minerals in the huge pit were reduced by a few meters suddenly, but it was still not bottomed out. He didn’t know how deep was this pit.

At that moment, the closed stone door of the waste ores room made the sound of being pushed open suddenly, so Chen Rui immediately closed the illumination ring. The door was pushed open, but under the light of the wall lamp, he didn’t see anyone. After some time, a familiar voice finally sounded, “Master, are you there?”

It turned out to be Dodo. Chen Rui activated the torch ring and took a sigh of relief, “Dodo, are you alright?”

As Dodo heard his voice, he hurriedly jumped toward the light, making a strange sound on the ground. When he came to Chen Rui, his expression turned into a flattery smile “Master, Dodo is so amazing. I swallowed the two-headed dog, but the bones tasted too bad, so I spat them out.”

Chen Rui was stunned. As he thought of the huge skeleton in the black rainforest, his heart felt a little creepy, “How did you find me here?”

“Dodo once swallowed a canine-like enemy, then somehow my nose became very sensitive, and I’m able to smell master’s scent.” Dodo’s face suddenly formed a dog-head shaped and sniffed the ground, showing off with his rich body language.

Chen Rui was taken aback: In other words, The chance for Dodo to gain the ability of the swallowed target is the devil fruit’s special ability? No wonder it can use Dragon’s Demeanor. It seems that I gained a pretty awesome servant this time.

The strongest slime in history might become the strongest demonic beasts in history.

“Dodo, well done. You won’t be left out in the barbecue next time.”

When Dodo heard its master praised, he proudly formed two arms and crossed on its “waist”, smiling exaggeratedly with its big mouth.

After Dodo was being proud for awhile, he suddenly thought of something and said, “Master, there were a lot of people blocking at the entrance … Dodo dares not go out…”

That sentence exposed Dodo’s inherent timid character. The title as the strongest demonic monster in history was just a transient, ethereal image. The current strongest slime currently was still just a slime.

Since he killed Sully and Yagus this time and the cerberus was even swallowed by Dodo, it was probably hard to settle. From the words of Yagus, Culia who would return in 2 days, his strength was absolutely above Sully and Yagus; he was at least at the middle stage of Higher Demon. Now, the time was tight. On the one hand, he must train hard with the limited time; on the other hand, he must try to distract Culia’s attention, so that he wouldn’t connect it to the mining office so soon.

The several guards at the main pit entrance were already killed previously. Those who chased were only the cerberus, Sully and Yagus. When the others who were relatively weak arrived, Chen Rui and the others had already entered the main pit, so there wasn’t anyone else that heard or seen anything.

Dodo curiously watched his master pondered for a while, then he actually looked at Dodo with a strange look. Dodo suddenly had a bad feeling, then he heard his master said sincerely, “Dodo, it seems that it’s time for you to go back to your old profession.”

chapters.title: Chapter 92: Monster! The “Spirit Dragon” That Crawled Out Of The Main Pit
chapters.body:
Chapter 92: Monster! The “Spirit Dragon” That Crawled Out Of The Main Pit

Main pit entrance.

The initial roars and noises inside gradually disappeared. The bandits were quietly waiting for the return of their two leaders or the cerberus. However, nothing happened after a long time. All of them were nervous. Some of them suggested to take a look down there.

Some of them insisted to continue waiting and guard the entrance to prevent the enemy from escaping. While they were discussing how to divide the responsibilities, they heard a distant roar from the main pit.

Many of the bandits’ faces changed because they knew that it wasn’t the roars of the cerberus, Nagurala. That roar was deeper and longer than cerberus’; the horror within was far superior than Nagurala.

The roars were getting closer and closer. Then, the ground faintly trembled as if some kind of giant demonic beast was walking. The bandits’ nerves were suddenly tightened. Could it be…

The one fighting with their two leaders and the cerberus, Nagurala was actually the terrible underground demonic beast. The powerful demonic beasts that only roamed in the lower layers actually broke the seal at this time and came to the upper level.

As the tremor approached, the bandits retreated cautiously as if a strong enemy was coming. The tremor stopped when it came to the door and a pile of things was thrown out far away, falling to the ground messily.

It was a rather big skeleton. Under the light of the fire, it showed two white, canine’s skulls. Some of them immediately related it with the disappearance of cerberus’ roars just now. “That’s Nagurala.”

Nagurala… must have been swallowed up by some terrifying demonic beast. Then, aren’t Ms. Sully and Sir Yagus…

That discovery frightened the bandits, and they quickly retreated. Subsequently, the footsteps that trembled the ground sounded again. Then, a huge figure appeared within the bandits’ sight. Under the illumination of the torch and the moonlight, everyone finally saw the true face of the demonic beast. They immediately had a chill down their spines.

It wasn’t a demonic beast; it was a monster.

That should be a dragon. To be precise, it was the skeleton of a dragon. However, this set of skeleton was alive. The pale skeleton glowed creepily, and the eyes were two dots of strange, green light.

Demon Realm used to have necromancer or lich that used corpse or skeletons to fight, but they had never heard of someone who could control the dragon’s skeleton. It was definitely not an undead that was controlled by a mage but a genuine monster.

“A spirit like dragon…” Someone said while trembling.

The monster made a roar filled with anger and an overwhelming demeanor immediately came along. Even if the distance was far away, the bandits could still feel the horrific power of this demeanor. They were intimidated and scared.

The Dragon’s Demeanor was really the legendary Dragon’s Demeanor.

An adult dragon was at least at the level of Demon Emperor, not to mention after becoming a monster.

After the monster roared, it walked toward the bandits with a heavy footstep. Now, no one dared to hesitate. Those who responded slightly faster ran right away; even those who couldn’t stand still crawled down the hill in fear.

The bandits who rushed to the mining office at the mountainside to guard heard the noises from the main pit. Subsequently, an unforgettable scene appeared before their eyes. Their companions were running away from the mountaintop in a fluster. After that, a scary monster with white skeleton appeared at the summit and made a scary roar toward the two moons in the sky.

Emotions were always contagious, especially the transmission of fear. Soon, the bandits at the mountainside joined escaping group, followed by those at the foot of the mountain.

Judging merely the skeleton of the cerberus, a strong demonic beast equivalent to a Higher Demon was eaten to the point that its bones… Wait, the bones were left. However, no one bothered asking pointless questions like “why didn’t Ms. Sully and Sir Yagus escape?”

Dodo was very proud now to the point that he almost forgot the master’s order of not speaking and shouted the slogan of “Mighty Sir Spirit Dragon”. Such intimidating task was much easier than dealing with the cerberus. Besides, for Dodo, who had acted as the ghost dragon for decades, knew how to do it well, so the timing and atmosphere were handled perfectly.

However, Sir Spirit Dragon was now more of an empty shell than when it was in the black rainforest. The roar toward the bandits at the beginning used up all the hardly accumulated Dragon’s Demeanor, so the roars after were basically ineffective.

With Dodo intimating with the dragon’s might, Chen Rui could rest assured and entered the Super System to convert auras in the waste ores room. These waste ores were exactly the same as those sold at the blacksmith shop. They were full of strange crystals. The more advanced a material was, the more time consuming it was to convert. These crystals were easier to convert than any other magic material. Besides, after entering the Mizar state, the speed of <Aura Conversion> was much faster than before. After about 3 hours, the auras increased by 100,000 auras. He had more than 90,000 auras when he left the black rainforest. Together with the passive ability, <Damage Absorption> when he got attacked just now, the total amount had reached 200,000 auras whereas the ores in the storage were only reduced by 10%.

Chen Rui realized it was already midnight after calculating the time. The effective time of Dragon Inscription was ending. Thus, he didn’t stay in the waste ores room and walked out of the waste ores pit. He cleared up the scene and brought Dodo back to the tent on the hill with Mengda.

The next day, Athena saw Chen Rui’s exhausted look and asked, “Did you not sleep well last night? It’s almost noon, but you still look tired.”

“I’m just not used to the new place.” Chen Rui smiled. Actually, after returning last night, he was busy converting aura. At present, the total amount of aura had reached 350,000 while most of the ores in the storage were still not converted. Then, he was really too tired near dawn, so he fell asleep.

Athena remembered that Chen Rui’s physical condition wasn’t very good when he was in the council hall last time. After thinking, she said, “You must have not recovered from the sickness last time, and you are not used to living in a tent. Let me build you a wooden house.”

“You don’t have to. I’m really fine.” Chen Rui knew that Athena was trying to be nice. The last time was the spirit deprived caused by <Deep Analysis>, which was different from the current situation. The injuries he suffered last night were basically recovered. It was just that he was “striving” too hard to convert auras, so he had a lack of sleep.

“Since you’re not feeling well, then don’t go hunting. The nearby water sources and prey are controlled by bandits. I’ll ride Kegu to the green forest that we passed by when we came here to hunt prey. Didn’t you promise to give the miners meat soup?”

“Don’t be so anxious. Yesterday, I said it’d be once every alternate day. Besides, I said “try.” Chen Rui actually reserved some room in his admonishment yesterday to avoid giving an empty promise.

“Chen Rui, I’m not as smart as you are to have so many rhetorics in a sentence.” Athena frowned. “I only know that the miners risk their lives every day to mine, but they can’t even guarantee a filled stomach. That’s too suffering. Since you’re the mining officer now and they’re all your subordinates, shouldn’t you do something?”

Chen Rui didn’t expect Athena to say something like that. The position as a mining officer was just a cover for him to come to Mountain Xilang overtly. He thought he’d at most just let the miners escape before Barnacle returned.

“I thought about it for a long time last night. The power of the bandits were too strong. I couldn’t rival alone. If I’m too impulsive, it might hurt you… and everyone else. What I can do now is to do my best in hunting prey and let them have a filled stomach.” It’s clear that Athena indeed thought it clear last night for her to realize her own shortcomings.

Athena looked at Chen Rui who still remained silent and she asked cautiously, “Am I stupid?”

“Very stupid.” Chen Rui affirmed that question without thinking and Athena’s mood suddenly fell.

Every man for himself and the Devil take the hindmost; the survival of the fittest, the strong will be respected. Protect your own interest is enough, why bother about other people’s business? Do you think you’re the savior?

This type of person, even if in his original world was also an idiot. There were even a lot of examples of kindness ended up with bad results. They were labeled by the “smarter people” as “retarded, dumb” and other “praises”.

Every would have such an idiot, but every world also needs such an idiot. Although without these idiots, the world would still operate normally. However, it was exactly because there were these people that the sky became more blue, the sun became brighter and life became more valuable.

Chen Rui stopped his thought and went on to say, “However, stupidity is contagious. I think I’ve been infected by you.”

Athena’s eyes lit up and raised her head suddenly. Her eyes looked at him with a strange passion while Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Then…”

“Let’s go hunting together?” Athena eagerly added.
